eng: The Pharisees and Sadducees came to Jesus. In order to test him they asked him to show them a sign from heaven.
local: Farizɩan tiinǝ badaara dɩ Sadusɩan tiinǝ dɛɛn ma zaŋɩ ba vu Zezi te, sɩ ba maŋ-o ba nii. Ba ma ta dɩd-o ba wɩ, o kɩ wo-kɩnkagɩlɩ dɩlʋ na wʋ́ brɩ-ba nɩ o dam dɩm sɩɩnɩ dɩ nuŋi Wɛ te tɩn.

eng: But he replied, At evening you say, It will be nice weather because the sky is bright red.
local: Zezi ma lǝri-ba o wɩ: «Kʋ na yɩ dɩdaan-ni nɩ yɩ wɛyuu na yɩ nasʋŋʋ, á yǝni á tɛ á wɩ, tɩga wʋ́ pʋʋrɩ lanyɩranɩ.

eng: And in the morning you say, There will be bad weather today because the sky is cloudy. You know how to make sense of the skys appearance. But you are unable to recognize the signs that point to what the time is.
local: Kʋ nan na yɩ zɩzɩnzɩŋa yɩ wɛyuu na yɩ liirǝ liirǝ, á yǝni á tɛ á wɩ, dʋa mʋ lagɩ ka nɩ. Abam yǝni á waɩ á nii wɛyuu nɩ á lwarɩ tɩga kam yibiyǝ na wʋ́ ta yɩ te tɩn. Bɛɛ nan mʋ yɩ á warɩ á lwarɩ nɩ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ na wʋra tɩ kɩ lele tɩn brɩ Wɛ na lagɩ DƖ kɩ wo-kamunnu tɩlʋ tɩn?.

eng: An evil and unfaithful generation searches for a sign. But it wont receive any sign except Jonahs sign. Then he left them and went away.
local: Zɩm nɔɔna bam yɩ nɔn-balwaarʋ mʋ, ba yigǝ tǝrǝ dɩ Wɛ, yɩ ba laan lagɩ sɩ a kɩ wo-kɩnkagɩlɩ a brɩ-ba. Ba nan bá na, kʋ na daɩ wo-kɩnkagɩlɩ dɩlʋ na maŋɩ dɩ kɩ dɩ Wɛ nijoŋnu Zonasɩ faŋa faŋa tɩn.» O na tagɩ dɩ ba kʋntʋ tɩn, o laan ma yagɩ-ba yɩ o viiri.

eng: When the disciples arrived on the other side of the lake, they had forgotten to bring bread.
local: Zezi karabiǝ bam dɛɛn na ve ba bɛ nɩnɩʋ kʋm ni dɩdoŋ dɩm tɩn, ba ya swe sɩ ba ja dɩpɛ ba wǝli da.

eng: Jesus said to them, Watch out and be on your guard for the yeast of the Pharisees and Sadducees.
local: Zezi ma ta dɩ ba o wɩ: «Fɔgɩ-na á cɩ á tɩtɩ sɩ á yɩ pa Farizɩan tiinǝ bam dɩ Sadusɩan tiinǝ bam dɩ abam ba dabɩlɩ dɩm.».

eng: They discussed this among themselves and said, We didnt bring any bread.
local: O na tagɩ kʋntʋ tɩn, ba ma banɩ daanɩ ba wɩ: «Dɩbam na wʋ jaanɩ dɩpɛ dɩ́ wǝli da tɩn mʋ te o ŋɔɔnɩ kʋntʋ.».

eng: Jesus knew what they were discussing and said, You people of weak faith! Why are you discussing among yourselves the fact that you dont have any bread?.
local: Zezi ma lwarɩ ba na jɩgɩ kʋlʋ ba ŋɔɔnɩ tɩn, yɩ o wɩ: «Bɛɛ mʋ yɩ á ŋɔɔnɩ daanɩ á wɩ, á na ba jɩgɩ dɩpɛ tɩn mʋ te a ŋɔɔnɩ kʋntʋ? Bɛɛ nan yɩ á ba kɩ á wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ?.

eng: Dont you understand yet? Dont you remember the five loaves that fed the five thousand and how many baskets of leftovers you gathered?.
local: Abam ta wʋ lwarɩ Wɛ na jɩgɩ dam te tɩn na? Á nan swe nɩ a dɛɛn kwe dɩpwa yanu mʋ a fɔ fɔ a pa baara mʋrr-tɩnu di ba su ba daarɩ na? Á wʋ guli tɩtwarʋ tɩm ni á dɛɛn na twɛ wʋdiu kʋlʋ na daarɩ á kɩ da tɩn na?.

eng: And the seven loaves that fed the four thousand and how many large baskets of leftovers you gathered?.
local: Á nan wʋ guli nɩ a dɛɛn kwe dɩpwa yarpɛ mʋ a pa baara mʋrr-tɩna di ba su ba daarɩ na? Á wʋ guli tɩtwarʋ tɩm ni á dɛɛn na twɛ á su tɩn na?.

eng: Dont you know that I wasnt talking about bread? But be on your guard for the yeast of the Pharisees and Sadducees.
local: Bɛɛ mʋ nan yɩ á wʋ lwarɩ nɩ kʋ daɩ dɩpɛ taanɩ mʋ a ya tɛa? Á nan fɔgɩ á cɩ á tɩtɩ, sɩ á yɩ pa Farizɩan tiinǝ bam dɩ Sadusɩan tiinǝ bam dɩ abam ba dabɩlɩ dɩm.».

eng: Then they understood that he wasnt telling them to be on their guard for yeast used in making bread. No, he was telling them to watch out for the teaching of the Pharisees and Sadducees.
local: O karabiǝ bam laan ma lwarɩ nɩ, kʋ ya daɩ dabɩlɩ dɩlʋ ba na kɩ dɩpɛ nɩ tɩn taanɩ mʋ o ŋɔɔnɩ dɩ ba. Kʋ nan yɩ sɩ ba yɩ pa Farizɩan tiinǝ dɩ Sadusɩan tiinǝ zaasɩm dɩm mʋ cɔgɩ-ba.

eng: Now when Jesus came to the area of Caesarea Philippi, he asked his disciples, Who do people say the Human One is.
local: Zezi dɛɛn ma vu o yi Sezaarɩ kʋlʋ na yɩ Filipi tɩʋ tɩn. O ma bwe o karabiǝ bam o wɩ: «Nɔɔna yǝni ba tɛ amʋ Nabiin-bu wʋm taanɩ ba wɩ amʋ yɩ wɔɔ mʋ?».

eng: They replied, Some say John the Baptist, others Elijah, and still others Jeremiah or one of the other prophets.
local: Ba ma lǝr-o ba wɩ: «Badaara tɛ ba wɩ, nmʋ yɩ Zan wʋlʋ na miisi nɔɔna na wʋnɩ tɩn mʋ. Badaara dɩ maa tɛ ba wɩ, nmʋ yɩ Eli mʋ. Badaara dɩ maa tɛ ba wɩ, nmʋ yɩ Zeremi naa faŋa faŋa Wɛ nijoŋnu wʋdoŋ mʋ.».

eng: He said, And what about you? Who do you say that I am.
local: O laan ma bwe-ba o wɩ: «Kʋ nan na yɩ abam, abam bʋŋɩ nɩ amʋ yɩ wɔɔ mʋ?».

eng: Simon Peter said, You are the Christ, the Son of the living God.
local: Simɔn Pɩyɛɛrɩ ma lǝr-o o wɩ: «Nmʋ yɩ Krisi mʋ, Ŋwɩa Tu Baŋa-Wɛ Bu wʋlʋ DƖ na tʋŋɩ tɩn.».

eng: Then Jesus replied, Happy are you, Simon son of Jonah, because no human has shown this to you. Rather my Father who is in heaven has shown you.
local: Zezi ma lǝr-o o wɩ: «Simɔn, Zonasɩ bu, nmʋ yɩ yu-yoŋo tu. Bɛŋwaanɩ, kʋ daɩ nabiinu yiyiu mʋ pɛ n lwarɩ cɩga kam kʋntʋ, kʋ yɩ a Ko Wɛ mʋ pɛ n lwarɩ-ka.

eng: I tell you that you are Peter. And Ill build my church on this rock. The gates of the underworld wont be able to stand against it.
local: A nan wʋ́ ta a brɩ-m nɩ nmʋ yɩrɩ mʋ Pɩyɛɛrɩ, kʋ na lagɩ kʋ ta nɩ pulɔrɔ. Pulɔrɔ kʋm kʋntʋ yuu nɩ mʋ a lagɩ a puli a kɔgɔ kʋm kuri da, nɩnɛɛnɩ nɔɔnʋ na cwi sɔŋɔ kuri pulɔrɔ yuu nɩ te tɩn. Yɩ tʋʋnɩ dɩ dɩ dam maama bá wanɩ-kʋ dɩ cɔgɩ.

eng: Ill give you the keys of the kingdom of heaven. Anything you fasten on earth will be fastened in heaven. Anything you loosen on earth will be loosened in heaven.
local: A nan wʋ́ kwe Wɛ paarɩ dɩm borbiǝ a kɩ nmʋ jɩŋa nɩ, sɩ n wanɩ n ma n pʋrɩ cwǝŋǝ n pa nɔɔna taa tɔgɩ da ba zʋʋrɩ Wɛ paarɩ dɩm wʋ. Nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ maama nmʋ na pɛ ni sɩ o zʋ tɩn, Wɛ wʋ́ zɩgɩ nmʋ kwaga nɩ dɩ kʋntʋ. Wʋlʋ maama nmʋ nan na wɩ o bá zʋ tɩn, Wɛ daa ta wʋ́ zɩgɩ nmʋ kwaga nɩ dɩ kʋntʋ.».

eng: Then he ordered the disciples not to tell anybody that he was the Christ.
local: Zezi laan ma kaanɩ o karabiǝ bam, sɩ ba yɩ pa nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ lwarɩ nɩ wʋm mʋ yɩ Krisi wʋm Wɛ na tʋŋɩ tɩn.

eng: From that time Jesus began to show his disciples that he had to go to Jerusalem and suffer many things from the elders, chief priests, and legal experts, and that he had to be killed and raised on the third day.
local: Kʋ na zɩgɩ kantʋ maŋa kam nɩ tɩn, Zezi ma ŋɔɔnɩ jaja dɩ o karabiǝ bam o wɩ: «A maŋɩ sɩ a vu Zeruzalɛm a na yaara zanzan Zwifǝ nakwa bam dɩ ba kaanɩm yigǝ tiinǝ bam dɩ ba cullu karanyɩna tiinǝ bam tee nɩ. Baá gʋ-nɩ, yɩ a laan wʋ́ joori a bi a yagɩ tʋʋnɩ da yatɔ dɛ nɩ.».

eng: Then Peter took hold of Jesus and, scolding him, began to correct him: God forbid, Lord! This wont happen to you.
local: Zezi na tagɩ kʋntʋ tɩn, Pɩyɛɛrɩ ma ja-o o nuŋi daa, yɩ o kaan-o o wɩ: «A Yuutu, yɩ ta n tɛ kʋntʋ! Wɛ bá sɛ sɩ kʋntʋ woŋo kɩ nmʋ.».

eng: But he turned to Peter and said, Get behind me, Satan. You are a stone that could make me stumble, for you are not thinking Gods thoughts but human thoughts.
local: Zezi ma guni o nii Pɩyɛɛrɩ, yɩ o ta dɩd-o o wɩ: «Sʋtaanɩ, ve daa a tee nɩ! Nmʋ lagɩ n pa a tusi mʋ. Nmʋ wʋbʋŋa yam yɩ nabiinǝ nyɩm mʋ, ya ba tɔgɩ Wɛ na lagɩ te tɩn.».

eng: Then Jesus said to his disciples, All who want to come after me must sayno to themselves, take up their cross, and follow me.
local: Zezi laan ma ta dɩ o karabiǝ bam o wɩ: «Nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ maama na lagɩ sɩ o taa tɔgɩ amʋ kwaga tɩn, kʋntʋ tu maŋɩ sɩ o vɩn o tɩtɩ wʋbʋŋa, sɩ o sɛ yaara nɩ wʋlʋ na zɩŋɩ tʋʋn-dagara o maa ve o tʋʋnɩ jǝgǝ te tɩn mʋ, sɩ o laan taa tɔgɩ-nɩ.

eng: All who want to save their lives will lose them. But all who lose their lives because of me will find them.
local: Wʋlʋ maama nan na lagɩ sɩ o yɩrɩ o ŋwɩa tɩn, kʋntʋ tu wʋ́ ga-ka mʋ. Kʋ daarɩ, wʋlʋ maama na sɛ sɩ o ga o ŋwɩa amʋ ŋwaanɩ tɩn, kʋntʋ tu wʋ́ na ŋwɩa Wɛ tee nɩ.

eng: Why would people gain the whole world but lose their lives? What will people give in exchange for their lives?.
local: Nɔɔnʋ nan na nɛ lʋgʋ baŋa wǝǝnu tɩm maama, yɩ o laan na gɛ ŋwɩa Wɛ tee nɩ, bɛɛ nyɔɔrɩ mʋ o nɛa? Kʋlʋkʋlʋ nan tǝrǝ nɔɔnʋ na wʋ́ wanɩ o ma lǝni o ŋwɩa Wɛ tee nɩ.

eng: For the Human One is about to come with the majesty of his Father with his angels. And then he will repay each one for what that person has done.
local: Amʋ Nabiin-bu wʋm nan wʋ́ ba dɩ paarɩ-zulǝ nɩ a Ko Wɛ na jɩgɩ te tɩn, yɩ DƖ malɛsɩ sɩm dɩ wʋ́ tɔgɩ-nɩ. Kantʋ maŋa kam nɩ, a laan wʋ́ pa nɔɔnʋ maama joŋi ŋwɩɩrʋ tɩlʋ na maŋɩ dɩ o tɩtʋŋa na yɩ te tɩn.

eng: I assure you that some standing here wont die before they see the Human One coming in his kingdom.
local: A lagɩ a ta cɩga mʋ dɩ abam sɩ, nɔɔna balʋ zɩm na wʋ yo seeni tɩn badaara bá tɩ, yɩ baá na amʋ Nabiin-bu wʋm na maa bɩɩnɩ dɩ a paarɩ dɩm tɩn.».

eng: A record of the ancestors of Jesus Christ, son of David, son of Abraham.
local: Zezi Krisi nabaara bam kuri na puli te tɩn mʋ tɩntʋ: Zezi Krisi yɩ Davidi dwi tu mʋ, Davidi dɩ maa yɩ Abraham dwi tu.

eng: Abraham was the father of Isaac. Isaac was the father of Jacob. Jacob was the father of Judah and his brothers.
local: Abraham ma lʋ Yizakɩ. Yizakɩ ma lʋ Zakɔbɩ. Zakɔbɩ ma lʋ Zuda dɩ o zɩmbaara dɩ o nyaana.

eng: Judah was the father of Perez and Zerah, whose mother was Tamar. Perez was the father of Hezron. Hezron was the father of Aram.
local: Zuda dɩ Tamaarɩ ma lʋ Farɛsɩ dɩ Zara. Farɛsɩ ma lʋ Esrɔm. Esrɔm ma lʋ Aram.

eng: Aram was the father of Amminadab. Amminadab was the father of Nahshon. Nahshon was the father of Salmon.
local: Aram ma lʋ Amɩnadabɩ. Amɩnadabɩ ma lʋ Naasɔn. Naasɔn ma lʋ Salɩmɔn.

eng: Salmon was the father of Boaz, whose mother was Rahab. Boaz was the father of Obed, whose mother was Ruth. Obed was the father of Jesse.
local: Salɩmɔn dɩ o kaanɩ Rahabɩ ma lʋ Bʋazɩ. Bʋazɩ dɩ o kaanɩ Ruuti ma lʋ Obɛdɩ. Obɛdɩ ma lʋ Zese.

eng: Jesse was the father of David the king. David was the father of Solomon, whose mother had been the wife of Uriah.
local: Zese ma lʋ Davidi wʋlʋ na jigi pɛ tɩn. Davidi dɛɛn di kadǝm wʋlʋ na yɩ Yuri kaanɩ tɩn, yɩ ba lʋ Salɔmɔn.

eng: Solomon was the father of Rehoboam. Rehoboam was the father of Abijah. Abijah was the father of Asaph.
local: Salɔmɔn ma lʋ Robʋam. Robʋam ma lʋ Abɩa. Abɩa ma lʋ Aza.

eng: Asaph was the father of Jehoshaphat. Jehoshaphat was the father of Joram. Joram was the father of Uzziah.
local: Aza ma lʋ Zʋzafatɩ. Zʋzafatɩ ma lʋ Zʋram. Zʋram ma lʋ Yozɩasɩ.

eng: Uzziah was the father of Jotham. Jotham was the father of Ahaz. Ahaz was the father of Hezekiah.
local: Yozɩasɩ ma lʋ Zʋatam. Zʋatam ma lʋ Asasɩ. Asasɩ ma lʋ Ezekɩasɩ.

eng: Hezekiah was the father of Manasseh. Manasseh was the father of Amos. Amos was the father of Josiah.
local: Ezekɩasɩ ma lʋ Manasɩ. Manasɩ ma lʋ Amɔn. Amɔn ma lʋ Zʋzɩasɩ.

eng: Josiah was the father of Jechoniah and his brothers. This was at the time of the exile to Babylon.
local: Zʋzɩasɩ ma lʋ Yɩkonɩa dɩ o nyaana. Yɩkonɩa mɩmaŋa kam nɩ mʋ ba jaanɩ Yisɩrayɛlɩ tiinǝ bam ba vu ba yagɩ Babilɔnɩ tɩʋ nɩ.

eng: After the exile to Babylon: Jechoniah was the father of Shealtiel. Shealtiel was the father of Zerubbabel.
local: Yisɩrayɛlɩ tiinǝ bam viirim dɩm kwaga nɩ mʋ Yɩkonɩa lʋgɩ Salatɩyɛlɩ. Salatɩyɛlɩ ma lʋ Zorobabɛlɩ.

eng: Zerubbabel was the father of Abiud. Abiud was the father of Eliakim. Eliakim was the father of Azor.
local: Zorobabɛlɩ ma lʋ Abidu. Abidu ma lʋ Eliyakɩm. Eliyakɩm ma lʋ Azori.

eng: Azor was the father of Zadok. Zadok was the father of Achim. Achim was the father of Eliud.
local: Azori ma lʋ Sadoki. Sadoki ma lʋ Akimi. Akimi ma lʋ Eliyudi.

eng: Eliud was the father of Eleazar. Eleazar was the father of Matthan. Matthan was the father of Jacob.
local: Eliyudi ma lʋ Eleyazaarɩ. Eleyazaarɩ ma lʋ Matan. Matan ma lʋ Zakɔbɩ.

eng: Jacob was the father of Joseph, the husband of Mary—of whom Jesus was born, who is called the Christ.
local: Zakɔbɩ ma lʋ Zʋzɛfʋ, wʋntʋ mʋ jigi Mari barʋ. Mari dɛɛn ma ba o lʋ Zezi wʋlʋ ba na bǝŋi nɩ Krisi.

eng: So there were fourteen generations from Abraham to David, fourteen generations from David to the exile to Babylon, and fourteen generations from the exile to Babylon to the Christ.
local: Kʋntʋ maa brɩ nɩ, kʋ na zɩgɩ Abraham nɩ kʋ vu kʋ yi Davidi tɩn, ba dwi dɩm yɩ kuni fugǝ-bɩna mʋ. Kʋ na zɩgɩ Davidi nɩ kʋ vu kʋ yi Yisɩrayɛlɩ tiinǝ bam viirim dɩm maŋa kam nɩ tɩn, bantʋ dɩ dwi dɩm yɩ kuni fugǝ-bɩna mʋ. Kʋ na zɩgɩ maŋa kam kʋntʋ nɩ sɩ kʋ vu kʋ yi ba na lʋgɩ Zezi Krisi maŋa kalʋ tɩn, bantʋ dɩ dwi dɩm maa yɩ kuni fugǝ-bɩna.

eng: This is how the birth of Jesus Christ took place. When Mary his mother was engaged to Joseph, before they were married, she became pregnant by the Holy Spirit.
local: Ba na lʋgɩ Zezi Krisi te tɩn mʋ tɩntʋ. O nu Mari dɩ Zʋzɛfʋ tiinǝ maama dɛɛn ya sɛ sɩ ba pa ba zʋ daanɩ, yɩ Mari daa ta wʋ ve o barʋ wʋm te. Maŋa kam kʋntʋ nɩ o ma ba o ja pugǝ dɩ Wɛ Joro dam.

eng: Joseph her husband was a righteous man. Because he didnt want to humiliate her, he decided to call off their engagement quietly.
local: Zʋzɛfʋ wʋlʋ o na lagɩ o zʋ tɩn maa yɩ nɔn-ŋʋm. O maa ba lagɩ sɩ o pa cavɩɩra ja o kaanɩ wʋm nɔɔna maama yigǝ nɩ. O ma bʋŋɩ sɩ o daanɩ o yag-o, sɩ nɔɔna yɩ zaŋɩ ba lwarɩ.

eng: As he was thinking about this, an angel from the Lord appeared to him in a dream and said, Joseph son of David, dont be afraid to take Mary as your wife, because the child she carries was conceived by the Holy Spirit.
local: O na bʋŋɩ kʋntʋ tɩn, Baŋa-Wɛ malɛka ma ba o te o dɩndwɩa wʋnɩ, yɩ ka ta dɩd-o ka wɩ: «Zʋzɛfʋ, Pɛ Davidi dwi tu, yɩ pa n wʋ cɔgɩ sɩ n joŋi Mari n ma n ji n kaanɩ. Bɛŋwaanɩ, o na jɩgɩ pugǝ kam tɩn, kʋ yɩ Wɛ Joro kʋm dam ŋwaanɩ mʋ.

eng: She will give birth to a son, and you will call him Jesus, because he will save his people from their sins.
local: O lagɩ o lʋ bǝkǝrǝ mʋ, sɩ n pa o yɩrɩ nɩ Zezi, bɛŋwaanɩ oó ba o vrɩ o nɔɔna ba lwarɩm wʋnɩ o yagɩ.».

eng: Now all of this took place so that what the Lord had spoken through the prophet would be fulfilled.
local: Zezi lʋra kam dɛɛn sɩɩnɩ ka tɔgɩ kʋntʋ doŋ mʋ, sɩ kʋ pa Baŋa-Wɛ dɛɛn na tagɩ kʋlʋ tɩn sɩɩnɩ kʋ kɩ. Faŋa faŋa tɩn, DƖ nijoŋnu wʋdoŋ dɛɛn tɔɔlɩ DƖ kwǝrǝ kam o wɩ:.

eng: Look! A virgin will become pregnant and give birth to a son, And they will call him, Emmanuel.
local: «Bukɔ wʋlʋ ta na yǝri baarʋ tɩn wʋ́ ba o ja pugǝ o lʋ bǝkǝrǝ, yɩ baá bǝŋi bu wʋm yɩrɩ nɩ Emanuyɛlɩ.» O yɩrɩ dɩm kʋntʋ kuri mʋ yɩ Wɛ wʋra dɩdaanɩ dɩbam.

eng: When Joseph woke up, he did just as an angel from God commanded and took Mary as his wife.
local: Zʋzɛfʋ na dɔ o zaŋɩ tɩn, o ma sɛ o kɩ Baŋa-Wɛ malɛka kam na tagɩ nɩ o kɩ te tɩn. O ma sɛ o joŋi Mari o ja vu sɔŋɔ.

eng: But he didnt have sexual relations with her until she gave birth to a son. Joseph called him Jesus.
local: O ma wʋ pǝni dɩd-o sɩ kʋ vu kʋ yi o na lʋgɩ bu wʋm maŋa kalʋ tɩn. O laan ma pa o yɩrɩ nɩ Zezi.

eng: At that time Herod the ruler heard the news about Jesus.
local: Kantʋ maŋa kam nɩ, Galile Pɛ Erɔdɩ dɛɛn ma ba o ni Zezi ŋwa.

eng: He said to his servants, This is John the Baptist. Hes been raised from the dead. This is why these miraculous powers are at work through him.
local: O ma ta dɩ o tɩntʋŋna o wɩ: «Wʋntʋ wʋ́ ta yɩ Zan wʋlʋ na miisi nɔɔna na wʋnɩ tɩn mʋ. Wʋntʋ mʋ joori o bi o yagɩ tʋʋnɩ. Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ o jɩgɩ dam yɩ o waɩ wo-kɩnkagɩla o kɩa.».

eng: Herod had arrested John, bound him, and put him in prison because of Herodias, the wife of Herods brother Philip.
local: Erɔdɩ dɛɛn tagɩ kʋntʋ doŋ, bɛŋwaanɩ o dɛɛn ya wʋ kɩ Zan lanyɩranɩ, yɩ o ta pa ba gʋ-o. O dɛɛn di kaanɩ wʋdoŋ mʋ, o yɩrɩ mʋ Erɔdɩadɩ. Kaanɩ wʋm dɛɛn yɩ o zɩmbaarʋ Filipi kaanɩ mʋ. Zan ma ta o brɩ-o o wɩ, kʋ culǝ sɩ o di o zɩmbaarʋ kaanɩ yɩ o ta ŋwɩ. Zan na kaan-o kʋntʋ tɩn, o ma pa ba ja-o ba vɔ ba kɩ pɩɩna digǝ nɩ.

eng: Although Herod wanted to kill him, he feared the crowd because they thought John was a prophet.
local: O ya maa bʋŋɩ sɩ o gʋ-o, yɩ o laan kwarɩ tɩʋ kʋm nɔɔna bam, bɛŋwaanɩ ba dɛɛn nii Zan nɩ o yɩ Wɛ nijoŋnu mʋ.

eng: But at Herods birthday party Herodias daughter danced in front of the guests and thrilled Herod.
local: Erɔdɩ lʋra maŋa laan ma ba ka yi. O ma bǝŋi nɔɔna zanzan sɩ ba ba ba tɔgɩ ba di candiǝ. Erɔdɩadɩ bukɔ ma zaŋɩ o vu vǝrǝ bam yigǝ o sa o brɩ-ba. O sɛ dɩm na lana kʋntʋ tɩn, kʋ ma pa Erɔdɩ wʋ poli.

eng: Then he swore to give her anything she asked.
local: O wʋ na poli tɩn, o ma ta o du o wɩ, woŋo kʋlʋ maama bukɔ wʋm na lagɩ tɩn, oó pa-o.

eng: At her mothers urging, the girl said, Give me the head of John the Baptist here on a plate.
local: Bukɔ wʋm nu ma ta o brɩ-o, o na wʋ́ loori kʋlʋ tɩn. O laan ma vu Erɔdɩ te o wɩ: «Woŋo kʋlʋ a na lagɩ tɩn, kʋ yɩ Zan yuu mʋ. Nmʋ na goni-kʋ, sɩ n kɩ zʋŋ-tanlaŋa wʋnɩ n pa-nɩ.».

eng: Although the king was upset, because of his solemn pledge and his guests he commanded that they give it to her.
local: Pɛ Erɔdɩ na ni kʋntʋ tɩn, o wʋ ma tiini kʋ cɔgɩ. O nan na tagɩ o du yɩ o vǝrǝ bam ni tɩn, o ma pa ni sɩ ba kɩ kʋntʋ ba pa-o.

eng: Then he had John beheaded in prison.
local: O ma tʋŋɩ nɔɔna sɩ ba vu pɩɩna digǝ kam ba go Zan yuu kʋm.

eng: They brought his head on a plate and gave it to the young woman, and she brought it to her mother.
local: Ba ma sɩɩnɩ ba go o yuu kʋm ba kɩ zʋŋ-tanlaŋa wʋnɩ ba ja nuŋi ba pa bukɔ wʋm. O laan ma kwe-kʋ o ja vu o pa o nu Erɔdɩadɩ.

eng: But Johns disciples came and took his body and buried it. Then they went and told Jesus what had happened.
local: Zan karabiǝ bam ma zaŋɩ ba vu ba kwe o yɩra yam ba ja vu ba kɩ. Ba laan ma vu ba ta dɩ Zezi kʋlʋ na kɩ tɩn.

eng: Then Pharisees and legal experts came to Jesus from Jerusalem and said.
local: Farizɩan tiinǝ badaara dɩ Wɛ cullu karanyɩna tiinǝ badonnǝ dɛɛn ma nuŋi Zeruzalɛm nɩ ba vu Zezi te, ba ma bwe-o ba wɩ:.

eng: When Jesus heard about John, he withdrew in a boat to a deserted place by himself. When the crowds learned this, they followed him on foot from the cities.
local: Zezi dɛɛn na ni ba na kɩ Zan te tɩn, o ma zaŋɩ o vu o zʋ naboro o nuŋi jǝgǝ kam kʋntʋ nɩ. O ya lagɩ sɩ o bɛ nɩnɩʋ kʋm ni o vu jǝgǝ kalʋ na yɩ gaa wʋ tɩn o yɩranɩ. Nɔɔna zanzan ma ba ba lwarɩ o na maa ve jǝgǝ kalʋ tɩn. Ba ma zaŋɩ ba nuŋi ba tɩɩnɩ dɩm nɩ, yɩ ba vu tɩga nɩ ba vu o te.

eng: Why are your disciples breaking the elders rules handed down to us? They dont ritually purify their hands by washing before they eat.
local: «Bɛɛ mʋ yɩ n karabiǝ bam yǝni ba cɔgɩ cullu tɩlʋ dɩ́ nabaara bam na pɛ dɩbam tɩn? Ba na lagɩ ba di wʋdiu, ba yǝni ba ba sanɩ ba jɩa sɩ kʋ tɔgɩ dɩ́ cullu tɩm na brɩ te tɩn.».

eng: When Jesus arrived and saw a large crowd, he had compassion for them and healed those who were sick.
local: Zezi ma nuŋi naboro kʋm wʋnɩ. O laan ma na nɔn-kɔgɔ kʋm na tu kʋ wʋra. Ba ŋwaŋa ma zʋ-o lanyɩranɩ, yɩ o pa balʋ na ba jɩgɩ yazurǝ tɩn na yazurǝ.

eng: Jesus replied, Why do you break the command of God by keeping the rules handed down to you?.
local: Zezi ma lǝri-ba o wɩ: «Bɛŋwaanɩ mʋ abam yǝni á tɔgɩ á tɩtɩ wʋbʋŋa cullu, yɩ á daarɩ á vɩn Wɛ ni dɩm na brɩ te tɩn?.

eng: That evening his disciples came and said to him, This is an isolated place and its getting late. Send the crowds away so they can go into the villages and buy food for themselves.
local: Tɩga na wʋra ka yi tɩn, o karabiǝ bam laan ma vu ba ta dɩd-o ba wɩ: «Maŋa kam wʋra ka kɛa, yɩ jǝgǝ kalʋ dɩbam na wʋra tɩn yɩ gaa wʋ mʋ. Wʋdiu tǝri yo. Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ, pa nɔɔna bam vu sam wʋ ba yǝgi wʋdiu ba di.».

eng: For God said, Honor your father and your mother, and The person who speaks against father or mother will certainly be put to death .
local: Wɛ tagɩ DƖ wɩ: ‹Nɔɔnʋ maŋɩ sɩ o taa zuli o nu dɩ o ko.› Wɛ daa ta brɩ nɩ, nɔɔnʋ na ŋɔɔnɩ ta-balɔrɔ dɩ o ko naa o nu, kʋntʋ tu maŋɩ sɩ ba gʋ-o mʋ.

eng: But Jesus said to them, Theres no need to send them away. You give them something to eat.
local: Zezi ma lǝri-ba o wɩ: «Ba wʋ maŋɩ sɩ ba viiri. Abam tɩtɩ pa-ba wʋdiu sɩ ba di.».

eng: But you say, If you tell your father or mother,Everything Im expected to contribute to you Im giving to God as a gift,then you dont have to honor your father.
local: Kʋ daarɩ abam nan yǝni á ja Wɛ taanɩ dɩm á gugwǝli yɩ á wɩ: ‹Nɔɔnʋ na jɩgɩ woŋo kʋlʋ o ya na wʋ́ ma o zǝni o nu dɩ o ko tɩn, yɩ o na wɩ, woŋo kʋntʋ yɩ Wɛ nyɩm.

eng: They replied, We have nothing here except five loaves of bread and two fish.
local: Ba ma ta ba wɩ: «Dɩbam na jɩgɩ kʋlʋ tɩn yɩ dɩpwa yanu dɩ kale sɩle yɩranɩ mʋ.».

eng: So you do away with Gods Law for the sake of the rules that have been handed down to you.
local: wʋntʋ daa wʋ maŋɩ sɩ o kwe-kʋ o ma zǝni o ko.› Á na kɩ te tɩn brɩ nɩ á paɩ Wɛ taanɩ dɩm daa ba jɩgɩ kuri dɩ abam, yɩ á daarɩ á tɔgɩ á tɩtɩ cwe mʋ.

eng: He said, Bring them here to me.
local: Zezi ma ta dɩ ba o wɩ, ba ja ba ba pa-o.

eng: Hypocrites! Isaiah really knew what he was talking about when he prophesied about you.
local: Abam yɩ pipiri-nyɩna mʋ. Ezayi dɛɛn jɩgɩ bʋra dɩ o na maŋɩ o ta abam taanɩ faŋa faŋa te tɩn.

eng: He ordered the crowds to sit down on the grass. He took the five loaves of bread and the two fish, looked up to heaven, blessed them and broke the loaves apart and gave them to his disciples. Then the disciples gave them to the crowds.
local: O laan ma ta dɩ nɔɔna bam maama sɩ ba jǝni tɩga nɩ. O ma kwe dɩpwa yanu yam dɩ kale sɩle sɩm, yɩ o kwǝni o yuu wɛɛnɩ o kɩ Wɛ le tɩ ŋwaanɩ. O ma fɔ fɔ dɩpwa yam o maŋɩ o pa o karabiǝ bam, yɩ bantʋ dɩ laan joŋi-ya ba pa nɔɔna bam.

eng: This people honors me with their lips, but their hearts are far away from me.
local: O dɛɛn tagɩ o wɩ: ‹Nɔɔna bantʋ zuli amʋ Wɛ dɩ ba niǝ mʋ, yɩ ba wʋbʋŋa baŋwɛ dɩ amʋ.

eng: Everyone ate until they were full, and they filled twelve baskets with the leftovers.
local: Nɔɔna bam maama ma di ba su ba daarɩ. Ba ma pɛ cicwǝǝru tɩlʋ na daarɩ tɩn ba su tɩtwarʋ fugǝ-tɩle.

eng: Their worship of me is empty since they teach instructions that are human rules .
local: Ba na paɩ amʋ zulǝ yalʋ maama tɩn yɩ kafɛ mʋ. Ba yǝni ba brɩ nabiinǝ wʋbʋŋa cullu, yɩ ba paɩ tɩ yɩ amʋ zaasɩm dɩm mʋ.› ».

eng: Be careful that you dont practice your religion in front of people to draw their attention. If you do, you will have no reward from your Father who is in heaven.
local: «Á taá yɩrɩ á tɩtɩ, sɩ á yɩ taá brɩ kǝm-laarʋ tɩlʋ á na kɩ tɩn nɔɔna yigǝ nɩ. Á na kɩ kʋntʋ doŋ, kʋ bá pa á na nyɔɔrɩ á Ko Wɛ tee nɩ.

eng: About five thousand men plus women and children had eaten.
local: Nɔɔna balʋ dɛɛn na di kʋntʋ tɩn yɩ nɩnɛɛnɩ baara mʋrr-tɩnu mʋ , kʋ wǝli dɩ kaana dɩ biǝ dɩ.

eng: Jesus called the crowd near and said to them, Listen and understand.
local: Zezi laan ma bǝŋi nɔn-kɔgɔ kʋm o pa ba ba o te, yɩ o ta dɩ ba o wɩ: «Cǝgi-na lanyɩranɩ sɩ á ni a taanɩ dɩm kuri.

eng: Whenever you give to the poor, dont blow your trumpet as the hypocrites do in the synagogues and in the streets so that they may get praise from people. I assure you, thats the only reward theyll get.
local: Kʋntʋ tɩn, á na kwe woŋo á pa yinigǝ tu, á yɩ zaŋɩ á pa nɔɔna lwarɩ abam na kɩ kʋlʋ tɩn ni nɩ, nɩ pipiri-nyɩna bam na yǝni ba brɩ ba na kɩ kʋlʋ tɩn ba Wɛ-di sɩm wʋnɩ, dɩ ba tɩʋ kʋm pooni yigǝ nɩ, sɩ kʋ ta pa nɔɔna zuli-ba te tɩn. A lagɩ a ta cɩga mʋ dɩ abam sɩ, bantʋ maŋɩ ba na ba ŋwɩɩrʋ.

eng: Right then, Jesus made the disciples get into the boat and go ahead to the other side of the lake while he dismissed the crowds.
local: Kʋntʋ kwaga nɩ Zezi ma da o pa o karabiǝ bam vu ba zʋ naboro kʋm, sɩ ba da yigǝ ba bɛ nɩnɩʋ kʋm ni dɩdoŋ dɩm. Ba na maa kɛ tɩn, o ma pa kɔgɔ kʋm viiri.

eng: Its not what goes into the mouth that contaminates a person in Gods sight. Its what comes out of the mouth that contaminates the person.
local: Kʋ daɩ woŋo kʋlʋ na tɔgɩ nɔɔnʋ ni kʋ zʋ o wʋ tɩn mʋ cɔg-o. Kʋ yɩ woŋo kʋlʋ na tɔgɩ nɔɔnʋ ni kʋ nuŋi tɩn mʋ cɔg-o.».

eng: But when you give to the poor, dont let your left hand know what your right hand is doing.
local: Nmʋ nan na lagɩ n wǝli yinigǝ tu, sɩ n yɩ pa nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ lwarɩ kʋ ni nɩ, nɩnɛɛnɩ nɔɔnʋ na kwe woŋo o pa dɩ o jazɩm yɩ o jagwiǝ yǝri kʋ ni nɩ te tɩn.

eng: When he sent them away, he went up onto a mountain by himself to pray. Evening came and he was alone.
local: O na pɛ ba viiri tɩn, o ma vu o di piu yuu o yɩranɩ sɩ o warɩ Wɛ. Tɩga ma ba ka yi, yɩ o ta wʋra o yɩranɩ.

eng: Then the disciples came and said to him, Do you know that the Pharisees were offended by what you just said.
local: Zezi karabiǝ bam laan ma vu o te, yɩ ba ta dɩd-o ba wɩ: «Nmʋ wʋ lwarɩ nɩ Farizɩan tiinǝ bam wʋrʋ cɔgɩ dɩ nmʋ taanɩ dɩm na?».

eng: so that you may give to the poor in secret. Your Father who sees what you do in secret will reward you.
local: N Ko Wɛ nan naɩ kʋlʋ n na sǝgi n kɩ tɩn. DƖ laan wʋ́ pa n na nyɔɔrɩ kʋ ŋwaanɩ.

eng: Meanwhile, the boat, fighting a strong headwind, was being battered by the waves and was already far away from land.
local: dɩ o karabiǝ bam maŋɩ ba ja naboro kʋm ba kɛ nɩnɩʋ kʋm tɩtarɩ yigǝ yigǝ. Vu-dɩʋ ma ba kʋ jeeri-ba, yɩ na-ŋʋm tiini sɩ dana kʋ pa na bam pɔgɩlɩ ba magɩ naboro kʋm.

eng: Jesus replied, Every plant that my heavenly Father didnt plant will be pulled up.
local: Zezi ma lǝri-ba o wɩ: «Á nan yɩ taá nii bantʋ. A Ko Wɛ na wʋ jǝri tiu kʋlʋ maama tɩn maŋɩ sɩ kʋ gɔ kʋ yagɩ mʋ.

eng: When you pray, dont be like hypocrites. They love to pray standing in the synagogues and on the street corners so that people will see them. I assure you, thats the only reward theyll get.
local: Abam na yǝni á lagɩ á warɩ Wɛ, sɩ á yɩ zaŋɩ á taá brɩ á tɩtɩ nɩ pipiri-nyɩna bam na kɩ te tɩn. Bantʋ soe sɩ ba taa zaŋɩ wɛɛnɩ mʋ ba warɩ Wɛ ba Wɛ-di sɩm wʋnɩ dɩ pooni yigǝ nɩ, sɩ nɔɔna maama taa na-ba. A lagɩ a ta cɩga mʋ dɩ abam sɩ, bantʋ maŋɩ ba na ba ŋwɩɩrʋ ba ti.

eng: Very early in the morning he came to his disciples, walking on the lake.
local: Tɩga na wʋra ka pʋʋrɩ tɩn, Zezi laan ma zaŋɩ o ve na bam baŋa nɩ o maa ve o karabiǝ bam te.

eng: Leave the Pharisees alone. They are blind people who are guides to blind people. But if a blind person leads another blind person, they will both fall into a ditch.
local: Yǝn-na-ba sɩ bantʋ nyɩ dɩ lilwe vaŋɩna balʋ dɩ na ba naɩ tɩn mʋ. Lilwe nan na lagɩ o vaŋɩ o doŋ, ba maama wʋ́ vu ba tʋ goŋo wʋnɩ mʋ.».

eng: But when you pray, go to your room, shut the door, and pray to your Father who is present in that secret place. Your Father who sees what you do in secret will reward you.
local: Nmʋ nan na lagɩ n warɩ Wɛ, zʋ digǝ wʋ n ja ka ni n pɩ, sɩ n laan warɩ n Ko Wɛ dɩlʋ na wʋ jǝgǝ kalʋ na sǝgi tɩn nɩ. Dɩntʋ nan naɩ kʋlʋ n na sǝgi n kɩ tɩn. DƖ laan wʋ́ pa n na nyɔɔrɩ kʋ ŋwaanɩ.

eng: When the disciples saw him walking on the lake, they were terrified and said, Its a ghost! They were so frightened they screamed.
local: Ba na nɛ-o tɩn, fʋʋnɩ ma tiini dɩ ja-ba, dɩ o na wʋ na bam baŋa nɩ o ve tɩn. Ba ma ta ba wɩ: «Kʋʋ́ ta yɩ ciru mʋ!» Fʋʋnɩ na zʋ-ba kʋntʋ tɩn, ba ma kaasɩ baŋa baŋa.

eng: Then Peter spoke up, Explain this riddle to us.
local: Pɩyɛɛrɩ laan ma ta dɩ Zezi, sɩ o brɩ-ba taanɩ dɩm kuri na yɩ te tɩn.

eng: When you pray, dont pour out a flood of empty words, as the Gentiles do. They think that by saying many words theyll be heard.
local: Abam na wʋra á warɩ Wɛ, á yɩ taá tiini á ŋɔɔnɩ bɩtar-yɔɔrʋ nɩnɛɛnɩ balʋ na yǝri Wɛ tɩn na yǝni ba ŋɔɔnɩ te tɩn. Bantʋ yǝni ba bʋŋɩ nɩ, ba na tiini ba ŋɔɔnɩ ta-farɩ mʋ, Wɛ wʋ́ lǝri ba loro.

eng: Just then Jesus spoke to them, Be encouraged! Its me. Dont be afraid.
local: O laan ma ŋɔɔnɩ dɩ ba o wɩ: «Pa-na á wʋrʋ kɩ dam, sɩ kʋ yɩ amʋ mʋ. Yɩ pa-na fʋʋnɩ taa jɩgɩ abam.».

eng: Jesus said, Dont you understand yet?.
local: O ma ta dɩ ba o wɩ: «Abam dɩ ta ba jɩgɩ wʋbʋŋa na?.

eng: Dont be like them, because your Father knows what you need before you ask.
local: Abam nan yɩ zaŋɩ á kɩ nɩ bantʋ na kɩ te tɩn. Bɛŋwaanɩ á Ko Wɛ maŋɩ DƖ ye kʋlʋ abam na lagɩ tɩn, yɩ á ta wʋ loori-DƖ kʋ ŋwaanɩ.

eng: Peter replied, Lord, if its you, order me to come to you on the water.
local: Pɩyɛɛrɩ ma lǝr-o o wɩ: «A Yuutu, kʋ na sɩɩnɩ kʋ yɩ nmʋ, sɩ n pa-nɩ ni sɩ a dɩ vu na bam baŋa nɩ a ba nmʋ te.».

eng: Dont you know that everything that goes into the mouth enters the stomach and goes out into the sewer?.
local: Á maŋɩ sɩ á taá ye nɩ, woŋo kʋlʋ maama na yǝni kʋ zʋ nɔɔnʋ ni tɩn mʋ yǝni kʋ tu o kana, yɩ o laan daarɩ o tɔ-kʋ o yagɩ.

eng: Pray like this: Our Father who is in heaven, uphold the holiness of your name.
local: Abam nan maŋɩ sɩ á taá warɩ Wɛ tɩntʋ doŋ mʋ: ‹Dɩbam Ko wʋlʋ na wʋ wɛɛnɩ tɩn, sɩ nmʋ yɩrɩ na tiǝ dɩ zulǝ.

eng: And Jesus said, Come. Then Peter got out of the boat and was walking on the water toward Jesus.
local: Zezi maa wɩ, o ba. Pɩyɛɛrɩ laan ma nuŋi naboro kʋm wʋnɩ o tu na bam baŋa nɩ o ve o maa jeeri Zezi.

eng: But what goes out of the mouth comes from the heart. And thats what contaminates a person in Gods sight.
local: Kʋ daarɩ kʋlʋ na nuŋi nɔɔnʋ ni nɩ tɩn yǝni kʋ zɩgɩ o wʋbʋŋa nɩ mʋ kʋ nuŋi. Kʋ nan yɩ wǝǝnu tɩm kʋntʋ mʋ yǝni tɩ cɔgɩ nɔɔna.

eng: Bring in your kingdom so that your will is done on earth as its done in heaven.
local: sɩ nmʋ paarɩ ba, sɩ nmʋ wʋbʋŋa kɩ lʋgʋ baŋa nɩ, nɩ kʋ na kɩ n sɔŋɔ nɩ te tɩn.

eng: But when Peter saw the strong wind, he became frightened. As he began to sink, he shouted, Lord, rescue me.
local: O na nɛ viu kʋm na tiini kʋ dana te tɩn, fʋʋnɩ ma zʋ-o, yɩ o laan wʋra o miisi na bam kuri nɩ. O na wʋra o miisi tɩn, o ma loori Zezi dɩ kwǝr-dɩa o wɩ: «A Yuutu, vrɩ a ŋwɩa!».

eng: Out of the heart come evil thoughts, murders, adultery, sexual sins, thefts, false testimonies, and insults.
local: Nɔɔnʋ wʋbʋŋa mʋ paɩ o lagɩ wo-balwaarʋ kǝm, tɩ na yɩ nɔn-gʋra dɩ boorim wo-zɔɔna dwi maama, dɩ ŋwɩɩnɩ, vwa-fɔra, bɩbara dɩ nɔn-tʋra.

eng: Give us the bread we need for today.
local: Pa dɩbam wʋdiu zɩm sɩ kʋ maŋɩ dɩbam.

eng: Jesus immediately reached out and grabbed him, saying, You man of weak faith! Why did you begin to have doubts.
local: Zezi laan ma da o twɩ o jɩŋa o ja-o, yɩ o ta dɩd-o o wɩ: «Bɛɛ mʋ yɩ n ba jɩgɩ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ amʋ? Bɛŋwaanɩ mʋ n jɩgɩ bʋbwɛa dɩ amʋ?».

eng: These contaminate a person in Gods sight. But eating without washing hands doesnt contaminate in Gods sight.
local: Kʋ nan yɩ wǝǝnu tɩm kʋntʋ mʋ cɔgɩ nɔɔna. Kʋ daarɩ, nɔɔnʋ na di wʋdiu yɩ o wʋ sanɩ o jɩa, kʋntʋ warɩ kʋ cɔg-o.».

eng: Forgive us for the ways we have wronged you, just as we also forgive those who have wronged us.
local: Yagɩ dɩ́ lwarɩm n ma n cɛ dɩbam, nɩ dɩbam dɩ na yagɩ dɩ́ ma cɛ dɩ́ donnǝ te tɩn.

eng: When they got into the boat, the wind settled down.
local: Ba laan ma vu ba zʋ naboro kʋm wʋ. Viu kʋm ma da kʋ zɩgɩ.

eng: From there, Jesus went to the regions of Tyre and Sidon.
local: Zezi dɛɛn ma zaŋɩ o nuŋi jǝgǝ kam kʋntʋ nɩ, yɩ o vu Tiiri dɩ Sidɔn tɩɩnɩ dɩm wʋnɩ.

eng: And dont lead us into temptation, but rescue us from the evil one.
local: Yɩ pa dɩ́ na maŋɩm dɩlʋ na wʋ́ pa dɩ́ tʋ tɩn. Nan vrɩ dɩbam wo-lwaanʋ tu jɩŋa nɩ. ›.

eng: Then those in the boat worshipped Jesus and said, You must be Gods Son.
local: Nɔɔna balʋ na wʋ naboro kʋm wʋnɩ tɩn ma kuni doonǝ ba zuli Zezi, yɩ ba ta ba wɩ: «N sɩɩnɩ n yɩ Baŋa-Wɛ Bu cɩga cɩga.».

eng: A Canaanite woman from those territories came out and shouted, Show me mercy, Son of David. My daughter is suffering terribly from demon possession.
local: Kaanɩ wʋdoŋ maa zʋʋrɩ je sɩm kʋntʋ nɩ, o yɩ dwi-gɛ tu mʋ. O ma vu Zezi te, yɩ o kaasɩ dɩ kwǝr-dɩa o ta dɩd-o o wɩ: «Amʋ tu, Pɛ Davidi dwi tu, popo duri a yibwǝnǝ. Cicirǝ mʋ jɩgɩ a bukɔ, yɩ ka tiini ka jɩg-o ka yaara.».

eng: If you forgive others their sins, your heavenly Father will also forgive you.
local: Abam na yagɩ á ma cɛ nɔɔna balʋ na kɩ abam lwarɩm tɩn, á Ko Wɛ dɩ wʋ́ yagɩ abam lwarɩm DƖ ma cɛ abam.

eng: When they had crossed the lake, they landed at Gennesaret.
local: Ba ma vu ba bɛ ba yi bubɛ dɩdɩm dɩm. Ba na yi jǝgǝ kalʋ tɩn yɩrɩ mʋ Zenezarɛtɩ.

eng: But he didnt respond to her at all. His disciples came and urged him, Send her away; she keeps shouting out after us.
local: Zezi maa cɩm. O karabiǝ bam ma vu o te, ba loor-o sɩ o zǝni kaanɩ wʋm sɩ o viiri, o na tɔgɩ-ba yɩ o kɩ sɔɔ tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: But if you dont forgive others, neither will your Father forgive your sins.
local: Kʋ daarɩ, abam na wʋ yagɩ á ma cɛ balʋ na kɩ abam lwarɩm tɩn, á Ko Wɛ dɩ bá yagɩ abam lwarɩm DƖ ma cɛ abam.

eng: When the people who lived in that place recognized him, they sent word throughout that whole region, and they brought to him everyone who was sick.
local: Tɩʋ kʋm kʋntʋ tiinǝ bam ma ba ba lwarɩ Zezi. Ba na lwar-o tɩn, ba ma tʋŋɩ ni ba pa nawurǝ yam maama, yɩ ba ja balʋ na ba jɩgɩ yazurǝ tɩn ba ba o te, sɩ o pa ba na yazurǝ.

eng: Jesus replied, Ive been sent only to the lost sheep, the people of Israel.
local: Zezi ma lǝri-ba o wɩ: «Wɛ tʋŋɩ amʋ sɩ a ba a zǝni DƖ tɩtɩ nɔɔna Yisɩrayɛlɩ dwi tiinǝ bam mʋ, bɛŋwaanɩ bantʋ nyɩ dɩ peeni sɩlʋ na je tɩn mʋ.».

eng: And when you fast, dont put on a sad face like the hypocrites. They distort their faces so people will know they are fasting. I assure you that they have their reward.
local: Abam nan na vɔgɩ ni, sɩ á yɩ nywanɩ á yigǝ, nɩ pipiri-nyɩna bam na yǝni ba kɩ te tɩn. Bantʋ yǝni ba pa ba yibiyǝ lǝni sɩ kʋ pa nɔɔna lwarɩ nɩ ba vɔgɩ ni mʋ. A lagɩ a ta cɩga mʋ dɩ abam sɩ, bantʋ maŋɩ ba na ba ŋwɩɩrʋ.

eng: Then they begged him that they might just touch the edge of his clothes. Everyone who touched him was cured.
local: Ba ma loor-o sɩ o na sɛ, sɩ o yagɩ sɩ yawɩɩna bam dwe o gɔrɔ kʋm ni má. Balʋ maama na dwe o gɔrɔ kʋm kʋntʋ tɩn dɛɛn sɩɩnɩ ba na yazurǝ.

eng: But she knelt before him and said, Lord, help me.
local: Kaanɩ wʋm laan ma vu o kuni doonǝ o yigǝ nɩ, yɩ o loor-o o wɩ: «Amʋ tu, zǝni-nɩ!».

eng: When you fast, brush your hair and wash your face.
local: Nmʋ nan na vɔgɩ ni, sɩ n su n yiǝ sɩ n daarɩ n lɩ n yuu lanyɩranɩ.

eng: Then you wont look like you are fasting to people, but only to your Father who is present in that secret place. Your Father who sees in secret will reward you.
local: Kʋntʋ mʋ wʋ́ pa nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ bá lwarɩ nɩ n vɔgɩ ni. N Ko Wɛ dɩlʋ na wʋ jǝgǝ kalʋ na sǝgi nɩ tɩn yɩranɩ mʋ ye. Dɩntʋ nan naɩ kʋlʋ n na sǝgi n kɩ tɩn. DƖ laan wʋ́ pa n na nyɔɔrɩ kʋ ŋwaanɩ.».

eng: He replied, It is not good to take the childrens bread and toss it to dogs.
local: Zezi ma lǝr-o o wɩ: «Kʋ wʋ maŋɩ sɩ nɔɔnʋ joŋi o biǝ wʋdiu o dʋlɩ o pa kakuri.».

eng: Stop collecting treasures for your own benefit on earth, where moth and rust eat them and where thieves break in and steal them.
local: «Nan yɩ zaŋɩ á kwaanɩ sɩ á na jɩjɩgɩrʋ zanzan lʋgʋ kʋntʋ baŋa nɩ. Á na tiŋi jɩjɩgɩrʋ lʋgʋ baŋa yo, tɩ wʋ́ ba tɩ cɔgɩ. Tʋa wʋ́ mu-tɩ, yɩ tɩ wʋ́ sʋŋɩ tɩ cɔgɩ. Ŋwɩɩna dɩ ma wʋ́ bwǝri sɔŋɔ kʋm ba zʋ ba ŋɔ-tɩ.

eng: She said, Yes, Lord. But even the dogs eat the crumbs that fall off their masters table.
local: Kaanɩ wʋm ma lǝri o wɩ: «Amʋ tu, n tagɩ cɩga. Kakuri nan waɩ sɩ twɛ wʋdiu kʋlʋ sɩ tu wʋm na di yɩ kʋ siiri tɩga nɩ tɩn sɩ di.».

eng: Instead, collect treasures for yourselves in heaven, where moth and rust dont eat them and where thieves dont break in and steal them.
local: Abam nan maŋɩ sɩ á tiŋi á jɩjɩgɩrʋ zanzan Wɛ-sɔŋɔ nɩ mʋ. Dáanɩ mʋ tʋa daa bá wanɩ ka mu-tɩ, yɩ tɩ bá sʋŋɩ tɩ cɔgɩ, yɩ ŋwɩɩna dɩ bá wanɩ ba ŋɔ-tɩ.

eng: After Jesus was born in Bethlehem in the territory of Judea during the rule of King Herod, magi came from the east to Jerusalem.
local: Ba dɛɛn lʋgɩ Zezi Zude tɩʋ kʋdoŋ nɩ mʋ, kʋ yɩrɩ mʋ Betelɩhɛm. Kʋ maa yɩ maŋa kalʋ Erɔdɩ dɛɛn na yɩ pɛ tɩn. Yiyǝn-yeenǝ badaara dɛɛn ma nuŋi wa-puli seeni ba ba ba yi Zeruzalɛm.

eng: Jesus answered, Woman, you have great faith. It will be just as you wish. And right then her daughter was healed.
local: Zezi laan ma lǝr-o o wɩ: «Kaanɩ, n cɩga sɩɩnɩ n kɩ n wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ amʋ. Kʋntʋ tɩn, nmʋ na lagɩ kʋlʋ tɩn, Wɛ wʋ́ kɩ DƖ pa-m.» Maŋa kam kʋntʋ nɩ nɔ́ɔ mʋ o bukɔ wʋm nɛ yazurǝ.

eng: Where your treasure is, there your heart will be also.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ, abam jɩjɩgɩrʋ na tigi mɛ tɩn, á bɩcara dɩ tigi dáanɩ mʋ.

eng: They asked, Where is the newborn king of the Jews? Weve seen his star in the east, and weve come to honor him.
local: Ba laan ma bwe nɔɔna ba wɩ: «Bu wʋm ba na lʋgɩ sɩ o ji Zwifǝ pɛ tɩn wʋ yǝn mʋ? Bɛŋwaanɩ dɩbam nɛ calɩcʋa kalʋ na brɩ o lʋra kam tɩn na nuŋi bri-kwaga seeni, yɩ dɩbam ba sɩ dɩ́ zul-o.».

eng: Jesus moved on from there along the shore of the Galilee Sea. He went up a mountain and sat down.
local: Zezi laan ma kɛ o vu o tɔgɩ Galile nɩnɩʋ kʋm ni, yɩ o daarɩ o vu o di piu yuu o jǝni da.

eng: The eye is the lamp of the body. Therefore, if your eye is healthy, your whole body will be full of light.
local: Nɔɔnʋ yiǝ mʋ nyɩ nɩnɛɛnɩ kanɩa kalʋ na paɩ o yɩra jɩgɩ pooni te tɩn. Kʋntʋ tɩn, nmʋ yiǝ na lana, kʋ paɩ n yɩra maama wʋ pooni wʋnɩ mʋ.

eng: When King Herod heard this, he was troubled, and everyone in Jerusalem was troubled with him.
local: Pɛ Erɔdɩ dɛɛn na ni kʋntʋ tɩn, liǝ maa jɩg-o dɩ nɔɔna balʋ maama na zʋʋrɩ Zeruzalɛm nɩ tɩn.

eng: Large crowds came to him, including those who were paralyzed, blind, injured, and unable to speak, and many others. They laid them at his feet, and he healed them.
local: O na je da kʋntʋ tɩn, kɔ-fɔrɔ maa tui o te, yɩ ba jaanɩ yawɩɩna zanzan ba wǝli da ba tui. Badaara dɛɛn yɩ gwanɩ, badonnǝ maa yɩ lilwǝ dɩ kwaarʋ dɩ mɩmaarʋ, kʋ wǝli dɩ balʋ yawɩɩrʋ dwi dwi na jɩgɩ-ba tɩn. Ba maa jaanɩ-ba ba ve ba tiŋi Zezi yigǝ nɩ, yɩ o pa ba na yazurǝ.

eng: Dont judge, so that you wont be judged.
local: «Abam yɩ taá ŋɔɔnɩ á donnǝ wǝǝnu, sɩ Wɛ yɩ ŋɔɔnɩ abam dɩ wǝǝnu.

eng: But if your eye is bad, your whole body will be full of darkness. If then the light in you is darkness, how terrible that darkness will be!.
local: Nmʋ yiǝ nan na ba lana, kʋ paɩ n yɩra maama wʋ lim wʋnɩ mʋ. Kʋntʋ tɩn, nmʋ yiǝ ya na maŋɩ sɩ ya taa yɩ pooni tɩn nan na yɩ lim, kʋ laan wʋ́ ta tiini kʋ yɩ lim kʋ ja gaalɩ.

eng: He gathered all the chief priests and the legal experts and asked them where the Christ was to be born.
local: O laan ma bǝŋi Zwifǝ kaanɩm yigǝ tiinǝ bam maama, dɩdaanɩ Wɛ cullu karanyɩna tiinǝ bam, yɩ ba la daanɩ. O ma bwe-ba o wɩ: «Yǝn mʋ ba maŋɩ sɩ ba lʋ Krisi wʋm?».

eng: So the crowd was amazed when they saw those who had been unable to speak talking, and the paralyzed cured, and the injured walking, and the blind seeing. And they praised the God of Israel.
local: Kʋ dɛɛn ma sʋ nɔn-kɔgɔ kʋm dɩ ba na nɛ mɩmaarʋ joori tɩ ŋɔɔna, yɩ gwanɩ dɩ na yazurǝ, yɩ kwaarʋ dɩ waɩ tɩ veǝ, yɩ lilwǝ yiǝ dɩ joori ya naɩ tɩn. Ba na nɛ wo-kɩnkagɩla yam tɩn, kʋ ma pa ba zuli Baŋa-Wɛ dɩlʋ na yɩ Yisɩrayɛlɩ tiinǝ bam Yuutu tɩn.

eng: Youll receive the same judgment you give. Whatever you deal out will be dealt out to you.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ, abam na ŋɔɔnɩ á donnǝ wǝǝnu te tɩn, Wɛ wʋ́ tɔgɩ kʋntʋ doŋ mʋ DƖ ma di á sarɩya. Abam na maɩ bwaŋa kalʋ á maŋɩ á pa á donnǝ tɩn, Wɛ dɩ wʋ́ maɩ bwaŋa kantʋ mʋ DƖ maŋɩ DƖ pa abam sɩ kʋ taa maɩ daanɩ.

eng: Then the Spirit led Jesus up into the wilderness so that the devil might tempt him.
local: Wɛ Joro kʋm dɛɛn na tu Zezi te kʋntʋ tɩn, kʋ laan ma ja-o kʋ vu kagʋa wʋnɩ, sɩ sʋtaanɩ maŋ-o dɩ nii.

eng: No one can serve two masters. Either you will hate the one and love the other, or you will be loyal to the one and have contempt for the other. You cannot serve God and wealth.
local: Nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ bá wanɩ o lɩ wʋbʋŋ-dɩdwɩ, sɩ o ma tʋŋɩ o pa o yuutiinǝ bale. Oó ta culi dɩdʋ wʋm yɩ o daarɩ o soe wʋdoŋ wʋm, naa oó ta nɩgɩ dɩdʋ wʋm yɩ o daarɩ o gooni wʋdoŋ wʋm. Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ abam bá wanɩ á pa sɩ Wɛ taa yɩ á yuutu, sɩ á daarɩ á pa sǝbu dɩ taa yɩ á yuutu.

eng: They said, In Bethlehem of Judea, for this is what the prophet wrote.
local: Ba ma lǝr-o ba wɩ: «Kʋʋ́ ta yɩ Betelɩhɛm nɩ mʋ, Zude tɩʋ nɩ. Bɛŋwaanɩ faŋa faŋa Wɛ nijoŋnu wʋdoŋ pʋpʋnɩ o wɩ:.

eng: Now Jesus called his disciples and said, I feel sorry for the crowd because they have been with me for three days and have nothing to eat. I dont want to send them away hungry for fear they wont have enough strength to travel.
local: Zezi laan ma bǝŋi o karabiǝ bam, yɩ o ta dɩ ba o wɩ: «A jɩgɩ nɔɔna bantʋ ŋwaŋa, dɩ ba na tu ba wʋ a tee nɩ zɩm da yatɔ yɩ ba daa ba jɩgɩ wʋdiu sɩ ba di tɩn. A ba lagɩ sɩ a pa ba viiri yɩ ba wʋ di kʋlʋkʋlʋ. Ba na lagɩ ba viiri kʋntʋ, kana wʋ́ pa ba bǝri cwǝŋǝ nɩ mʋ.».

eng: Why do you see the splinter thats in your brothers or sisters eye, but dont notice the log in your own eye?.
local: Abam nyɩ dɩ nɔɔnʋ na nii o doŋ yi nɩ o na ga-balaŋa da, yɩ o daarɩ o ba lagɩ sɩ o lwarɩ nɩ o tɩtɩ yi jɩgɩ daa tɩn. Kʋ maŋɩ sɩ kʋ taa yɩ kʋntʋ doŋ na?.

eng: After Jesus had fasted for forty days and forty nights, he was starving.
local: Zezi dɛɛn maa wʋra taan da fiinna, yɩ o ba di wʋdiu wɩa dɩ tɩtɩɩ maama. Kana maa jɩg-o.

eng: Therefore, I say to you, dont worry about your life, what youll eat or what youll drink, or about your body, what youll wear. Isnt life more than food and the body more than clothes?.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ a lagɩ a ta abam, sɩ á yɩ taá liǝ dɩ lʋgʋ baŋa kʋlʋkʋlʋ, kʋ na yɩ á ni-wʋdiu, naa á na wʋ́ zʋ gwaarʋ tɩlʋ tɩn. Bɛŋwaanɩ á ŋwɩa garɩ wʋdiu. Yɩra yalʋ Wɛ na pɛ abam tɩn dɩ maa garɩ gwaarʋ.

eng: You, Bethlehem, land of Judah, by no means are you least among the rulers of Judah, because from you will come one who governs, who will shepherd my people Israel.
local: ‹Betelɩhɛm, tɩʋ kʋlʋ na yɩ balaŋa Zude tɩɩnɩ dɩm wʋnɩ tɩn, daɩ tɩʋ kʋlʋ na muri tɩn. Bɛŋwaanɩ nmʋ wʋnɩ mʋ baá lʋ dɩdɛɛrʋ wʋlʋ na wʋ́ ta nii a nɔɔna balʋ na yɩ Yisɩrayɛlɩ dwi tiinǝ tɩn baŋa nɩ.› ».

eng: Now when Jesus had come down from the mountain, large crowds followed him.
local: Zezi laan ma zaŋɩ o tu piu kʋm yuu nɩ o maa kɛa, yɩ kɔ-fɔrɔ tɔgɩ o kwaga.

eng: His disciples replied, Where are we going to get enough food in this wilderness to satisfy such a big crowd.
local: O karabiǝ bam ma bwe-o ba wɩ: «Dɩbam wʋ́ kɩ ta mʋ dɩ́ na wʋdiu gaa kʋntʋ wʋnɩ dɩ́ pa kɔ-fɔrɔ kʋntʋ di?».

eng: How can you say to your brother or sister, Let me take the splinter out of your eye, when theres a log in your eye?.
local: Daa na wʋ nmʋ yi nɩ tɩn, nń kɩ ta mʋ n ta dɩ n doŋ nɩ o pa n lɩ gaa o yi nɩ n yagɩ?.

eng: The tempter came to him and said, Since you are Gods Son, command these stones to become bread.
local: Sʋtaanɩ laan ma ba o te, yɩ dɩ ta dɩd-o dɩ wɩ: «Nmʋ na sɩɩnɩ n yɩ Baŋa-Wɛ Bu, sɩ n ta dɩ kandwa yantʋ sɩ ya ji wʋdiu sɩ n di.».

eng: Look at the birds in the sky. They dont sow seed or harvest grain or gather crops into barns. Yet your heavenly Father feeds them. Arent you worth much more than they are?.
local: Nan maanɩ-na á nii zunǝ na yɩ te tɩn. Bantʋ ba duǝ, yɩ ba ba zagɩ mɩna ba kɩ tuli nɩ. Kʋ nan yɩ á Ko Wɛ mʋ nii ba baŋa nɩ dɩ ba ni-wʋdiu. Abam nan ba jɩgɩ kuri á dwe zunǝ bam na?.

eng: Then Herod secretly called for the magi and found out from them the time when the star had first appeared.
local: Erɔdɩ na ni kʋntʋ tɩn, o ma daanɩ o bǝŋi yiyǝn-yeenǝ bam sɩ ba ba o te. O ma kwaanɩ o bwe-ba, sɩ o lwarɩ dɛ dɩm calɩcʋa kam na puli ka nuŋi tɩn.

eng: A man with a skin disease came, kneeled before him, and said, Lord, if you want, you can make me clean.
local: O na maa kɛ tɩn, nanyɔŋɔ kʋdoŋ ma vu o te, yɩ kʋ kuni doonǝ o yigǝ nɩ kʋ loor-o kʋ wɩ: «Amʋ tu, nmʋ na laga, nń wanɩ n pa a na yazurǝ a ji lanyɩranɩ.».

eng: He called his twelve disciples and gave them authority over unclean spirits to throw them out and to heal every disease and every sickness.
local: Zezi dɛɛn ma bǝŋi o karabiǝ fugǝ-bale bam sɩ ba ba o te. O ma pa-ba dam sɩ ba wanɩ ciciri ba zǝli nɔɔna yɩra nɩ, sɩ ba daarɩ ba pa nɔɔna na yazurǝ dɩ ba yawɩɩrʋ dwi maama.

eng: Jesus said, How much bread do you have? They responded, Seven loaves and a few fish.
local: O ma bwe-ba o wɩ: «Abam jɩgɩ dɩpwa yagra mʋ?» Ba ma lǝr-o ba wɩ: «Dɩpwa yarpɛ mʋ wʋra, dɩ kalǝŋ-balɛ sɩgratʋ.».

eng: Boarding a boat, Jesus crossed to the other side of the lake and went to his own city.
local: Zezi laan ma joori o vu o zʋ naboro kʋm. O ma bɛ nɩnɩʋ kʋm o vu o yi o tɩtɩ tɩʋ Kapɛrnawum.

eng: You deceive yourself! First take the log out of your eye, and then youll see clearly to take the splinter out of your brothers or sisters eye.
local: Nmʋ yɩ pipiri-nyɩm dɩ nmʋ na kɩ n doŋ te tɩn. Nmʋ nan maŋɩ sɩ n lɩ n tɩtɩ yi daa kam mʋ, sɩ n laan wanɩ n nii lanyɩranɩ sɩ n lɩ n doŋ yi gaa kam.

eng: Jesus replied, Its written, People wont live only by bread, but by every word spoken by God .
local: Zezi ma lǝri o wɩ: «Kʋ nan pʋpʋnɩ Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm wʋnɩ kʋ wɩ: ‹Kʋ daɩ wʋdiu yɩranɩ mʋ paɩ nabiinu ŋwɩ, kʋ yɩ Wɛ ni-taanɩ dɩm maama mʋ paɩ nabiinu ŋwɩa.› ».

eng: Who among you by worrying can add a single moment to your life?.
local: Abam wʋlʋwʋlʋ bá wanɩ o toŋi o ŋwɩa dɩ fɩnfɩɩn dɩ, o na maŋɩ o li te dɩ.

eng: He sent them to Bethlehem, saying, Go and search carefully for the child. When youve found him, report to me so that I too may go and honor him.
local: O laan ma tʋŋɩ-ba sɩ ba vu Betelɩhɛm, yɩ o wɩ: «Ve-na á kwaanɩ á beeri bu wʋm jǝgǝ, sɩ á na nɛ-o, sɩ á joori á ba á ta á brɩ-nɩ, sɩ a dɩ vu a zul-o.».

eng: At that time Jesus went through the wheat fields on the Sabbath. His disciples were hungry so they were picking heads of wheat and eating them.
local: Da yam kʋntʋ ni nɩ Zezi dɛɛn ma tɔgɩ karɩ wʋ o maa kɛa. Kʋ dɛɛn yɩ Zwifǝ bam siun dɛ nɩ mʋ. O karabiǝ bam dɩ maa tɔgɩ ba wʋra, yɩ kana jɩgɩ-ba. Ba ma bwǝri mɩna ba yu ba dʋna.

eng: Jesus reached out his hand and touched him, saying, I do want to. Become clean. Instantly his skin disease was cleansed.
local: Zezi ma sɛ. O ma twɩ o jɩŋa o dwe-o, yɩ o wɩ: «Ɛɛn, a laga. Zaŋɩ dɩ yazurǝ sɩ n ji lanyɩranɩ.» O na tagɩ kʋntʋ bɩdwɩ baŋa nɩ tɩn, mʋ nɔɔnʋ wʋm nanywaanʋ tɩm dɛ tɩ je yɩ o yɩra ji lanyɩranɩ.

eng: Here are the names of the twelve apostles: first, Simon, who is called Peter; and Andrew his brother; James the son of Zebedee; and John his brother.
local: O karabiǝ fugǝ-bale bam yɩra mʋ tɩntʋ: O ma da yigǝ o bǝŋi Simɔn wʋlʋ yɩrɩ dɩdoŋ na yɩ Pɩyɛɛrɩ tɩn, dɩ Andre wʋlʋ na yɩ Simɔn nyaanɩ tɩn, dɩ Zakɩ, dɩ o nyaanɩ Zan balʋ na yɩ Zebede biǝ tɩn.

eng: He told the crowd to sit on the ground.
local: Zezi laan ma ta dɩ nɔn-kɔgɔ kʋm sɩ ba maama jǝni tɩga nɩ.

eng: People brought to him a man who was paralyzed, lying on a cot. When Jesus saw their faith, he said to the man who was paralyzed, Be encouraged, my child, your sins are forgiven.
local: O na wʋra tɩn, nɔɔna badonnǝ ma zɩŋɩ kɔrɔ dɩ gungolo ba ba o te. Zezi ma lwarɩ ba na tiini ba kɩ ba wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩd-o te tɩn. O ma ta dɩ kɔrɔ kʋm o wɩ: «A bu, kɩ pu-dɩa, sɩ nmʋ lwarɩm dɩm ti.».

eng: Dont give holy things to dogs, and dont throw your pearls in front of pigs. They will stomp on the pearls, then turn around and attack you.
local: Yɩ zaŋɩ á kwe wǝǝnu tɩlʋ na yɩ wo-kamunǝ Wɛ yigǝ nɩ á pa balʋ na vɩn Wɛ tɩn. Á na kɩ kʋntʋ, baá cɔgɩ-tɩ, yɩ ba daarɩ ba cɔgɩ abam tɩtɩ dɩ ba wǝli da.».

eng: After that the devil brought him into the holy city and stood him at the highest point of the temple. He said to him.
local: Sʋtaanɩ laan ma ja-o dɩ ja vu dɩ zʋ Wɛ tɩtɩ tɩʋ Zeruzalɛm wʋ. Dɩ ma ja-o dɩ vu dɩ di Wɛ-di-kamunu kʋm yuu mɛ na dwara tɩn dɩ zɩg-o da.

eng: And why do you worry about clothes? Notice how the lilies in the field grow. They dont wear themselves out with work, and they dont spin cloth.
local: Bɛɛ nan mʋ yɩ á kɩ liǝ dɩ gwaarʋ woŋo? Maanɩ-na á nii ga-punnu tɩm lam na yɩ te tɩn. Tɩntʋ nan warɩ tɩ tʋŋɩ yɩ tɩ warɩ gwaarʋ tɩ sɔ.

eng: When they heard the king, they went; and look, the star they had seen in the east went ahead of them until it stood over the place where the child was.
local: Pɛ wʋm na tagɩ kʋntʋ dɩ ba tɩn, ba laan ma zaŋɩ ba maa kɛa. Ba na maa kɛ tɩn, ba ma da ba na calɩcʋa kalʋ ba ya na maŋɩ ba na wa-puli seeni tɩn. Ka laan maa wʋ ba yigǝ nɩ wɛyuu nɩ ka veǝ, yɩ ka vu ka zɩgɩ ka maŋɩ dɩ bu wʋm na wʋ mɛ tɩn.

eng: When the Pharisees saw this, they said to him, Look, your disciples are breaking the Sabbath law.
local: Farizɩan tiinǝ dɩ ma tɔgɩ ba wʋra. Ba ma na ba na kɩ kʋlʋ tɩn. Ba laan ma ta dɩ Zezi ba wɩ: «Nii nmʋ karabiǝ bam na kɩ kʋlʋ. Ba tʋŋɩ tɩtʋŋɩ dɩlʋ na cɔgɩ dɩbam siun dɛ cullu tɩm tɩn mʋ.».

eng: Jesus said to him, Dont say anything to anyone. Instead, go and show yourself to the priest and offer the gift that Moses commanded. This will be a testimony to them.
local: Zezi laan ma ta dɩd-o o wɩ: «Yɩ zaŋɩ n ta kʋlʋ na kɩ tɩn n brɩ nɔɔna. Nan yɔɔrɩ n vu Wɛ kaanɩm tu wʋm te sɩ n pa o nii n yɩra yam, sɩ n daarɩ n ja pɛɛra yalʋ Moyisi cullu tɩm na brɩ nɩ ya maŋɩ tɩn n vu n pa-o, sɩ o ma kaanɩ Baŋa-Wɛ. Kʋntʋ mʋ wʋ́ brɩ nɔɔna maama nɩ n yawɩʋ kʋm sɩɩnɩ kʋ je.».

eng: Philip; and Bartholomew; Thomas; and Matthew the tax collector; James the son of Alphaeus; and Thaddaeus.
local: Filipi dɩ Batelemi, Toma dɩ Matiyu wʋlʋ ya na yɩ lampo-joŋnu tɩn, Zakɩ wʋlʋ na yɩ Alɩfɩ bu tɩn, dɩ Tadɩ.

eng: He took the seven loaves of bread and the fish. After he gave thanks, he broke them into pieces and gave them to the disciples, and the disciples gave them to the crowds.
local: O ma daarɩ o kwe dɩpwa yarpɛ yam dɩ kale sɩm, yɩ o kɩ Wɛ le tɩ ŋwaanɩ. O ma ja-tɩ o fɔ fɔ o pa o karabiǝ bam, yɩ bantʋ dɩ laan joŋi ba pa nɔɔna bam.

eng: Some legal experts said among themselves, This man is insulting God.
local: Wɛ cullu karanyɩna tiinǝ badonnǝ maa wʋra, yɩ ba bwɛ ba tɩtɩ nɩ ba wɩ: «Nɔɔnʋ wʋntʋ ŋɔɔnɩ o twɩ Wɛ mʋ o paɩ o dɩ Wɛ yɩ bɩdwɩ mʋ.».

eng: Ask, and you will receive. Search, and you will find. Knock, and the door will be opened to you.
local: «Á taá loori Wɛ, sɩ DƖ wʋ́ pa abam kʋlʋ á na lagɩ tɩn. Beeri-na kʋlʋ á na lagɩ tɩn, sɩ á wʋ́ na. Magɩ-na boro, sɩ baá pʋrɩ ba pa abam.

eng: Since you are Gods Son, throw yourself down; for it is written, I will command my angels concerning you, and they will take you up in their hands so that you wont hit your foot on a stone. .
local: yɩ dɩ wɩ: «Nmʋ na yɩ Wɛ Bu, sɩ n faŋɩ n cu tɩga nɩ sɩ dɩ́ nii. Bɛŋwaanɩ kʋ pʋpʋnɩ Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm wʋnɩ kʋ wɩ: ‹Wɛ wʋ́ pa DƖ malɛsɩ ba nmʋ ŋwaanɩ, sɩ lwǝri-m dɩ sɩ jɩa, sɩ n yɩ tʋ tɩga nɩ n magɩ n naga dɩ kandwɛ.› ».

eng: But I say to you that even Solomon in all of his splendor wasnt dressed like one of these.
local: Nan taá ye-na nɩ, tɩntʋ jɩgɩ lam tɩ dwe Pɛ Salɔmɔn dɛɛn na maŋɩ o zʋʋrɩ gwar-ŋʋnnʋ tɩlʋ tɩn.

eng: When they saw the star, they were filled with joy.
local: Kʋ ma pa ba tiini ba jɩgɩ wʋpolo lanyɩranɩ.

eng: But he said to them, Havent you read what David did when he and those with him were hungry?.
local: Zezi ma lǝri-ba o wɩ: «Abam ta wʋ fɔgɩ á karɩmɩ Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm na brɩ Pɛ Davidi taanɩ te tɩn na? Kʋ brɩ sɩ kana dɛɛn mʋ jaanɩ wʋntʋ dɩ o nɔɔna.

eng: When Jesus went to Capernaum, a centurion approached.
local: Zezi laan ma vu o yi tɩʋ kʋdoŋ, kʋ yɩrɩ mʋ Kapɛrnawum. Pamaŋna yigǝ tu wʋdoŋ ma ba o te.

eng: Simon the Cananaean; and Judas, who betrayed Jesus.
local: Simɔn wʋlʋ na yɩ Zelɔtɩ nɔɔna bam wʋ nɔɔnʋ tɩn, dɩ Zudasɩ Yiskarɩyo wʋlʋ na wʋ́ ba o yǝgi Zezi o pa nɔɔna tɩn.

eng: Everyone ate until they were full. The disciples collected seven baskets full of leftovers.
local: Nɔɔna bam maama dɛɛn ma di ba su ba daarɩ. Ba laan ma twɛ cicwǝǝru tɩlʋ na daarɩ tɩn ba su tɩtwarʋ tɩrpɛ.

eng: But Jesus knew what they were thinking and said, Why do you fill your minds with evil things?.
local: Zezi ma lwarɩ ba na bʋŋɩ kʋlʋ tɩn. O ma bwe-ba o wɩ: «Bɛɛ mʋ yɩ á jɩgɩ wʋbʋŋ-balwaarʋ tɩntʋ á wʋnɩ?.

eng: For everyone who asks, receives. Whoever seeks, finds. And to everyone who knocks, the door is opened.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ wʋlʋ maama na loori Wɛ sɩ DƖ pa-o woŋo tɩn wʋ́ joŋi. Wʋlʋ maama na beeri woŋo tɩn wʋ́ na-kʋ. Baá pʋrɩ ba pa wʋlʋ maama na magɩ boro tɩn.

eng: Jesus replied, Again its written, Dont test the Lord your God .
local: Zezi ma lǝri o wɩ: «Kʋ ta pʋpʋnɩ kʋ wɩ: ‹Yɩ zaŋɩ n maŋɩ n Yuutu Baŋa-Wɛ n nii.› ».

eng: If God dresses grass in the field so beautifully, even though its alive today and tomorrow its thrown into the furnace, wont God do much more for you, you people of weak faith?.
local: Kʋ nan na yɩ gaarʋ tɩm kʋntʋ, tɩntʋ ba jɩgɩ dɛ dɩ nɔɔna na zwɛ-tɩ. Dɩ kʋntʋ dɩ Wɛ ta mʋ paɩ tɩ jɩgɩ lam kʋntʋ doŋ. Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ, kʋ na yɩ abam, Wɛ bá nii abam baŋa nɩ cɩga? Bɛɛ nan yɩ á ba kɩ á wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ?.

eng: They entered the house and saw the child with Mary his mother. Falling to their knees, they honored him. Then they opened their treasure chests and presented him with gifts of gold, frankincense, and myrrh.
local: Ba ma vu ba zʋ sɔŋɔ kʋm wʋ. Ba ma na bu wʋm dɩ o nu Mari. Ba ma kuni doonǝ ba zul-o. Ba laan ma bwǝli ba zɩla ba lɩ pɛɛra ba pa-o. Ba pɛɛra yam yɩ sǝbu-sɩŋa, dɩ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ ba na zwɛ yɩ tɩ lwǝm ywǝmmǝ tɩn, dɩ tralɩ nugǝ kalʋ yɩrɩ na yɩ Miiri tɩn.

eng: He went into Gods house and broke the law by eating the bread of the presence, which only the priests were allowed to eat.
local: O ma vu o zʋ Wɛ digǝ, yɩ o kwe culu dɩpɛ dɩlʋ na tigi da Wɛ ŋwaanɩ tɩn o pa o dɩ o nɔɔna bam di. Kʋ nan ya culǝ sɩ bantʋ di dɩpɛ dɩm. Kʋ yɩ Wɛ kaanɩm tiinǝ yɩranɩ mʋ jɩgɩ cwǝŋǝ sɩ ba di-dɩ.

eng: pleading with him, Lord, my servant is flat on his back at home, paralyzed, and his suffering is awful.
local: yɩ o loor-o o wɩ: «Amʋ tu, a jɩgɩ a tɩntʋŋnʋ mʋ o tigi sɔŋɔ nɩ yɩ o wɔɛ, kʋ tiini kʋ cana o yɩra nɩ. O ma gwarɩgɩ yɩ o warɩ o zaŋɩ.».

eng: Jesus sent these twelve out and commanded them, Dont go among the Gentiles or into a Samaritan city.
local: Zezi laan ma tʋŋɩ bantʋ fugǝ-bale bam sɩ ba nuŋi ba vu ba tɔɔlɩ Wɛ kwǝrǝ kam. Ba na lagɩ ba kɛ tɩn, o ma pa-ba ni o wɩ: «Yɩ zaŋɩ á vu dwi-gɛ tiinǝ na zʋʋrɩ mɛ tɩn, naa á vu Samari tiinǝ tɩʋ.

eng: Four thousand men ate, plus women and children.
local: Nɔɔna balʋ dɛɛn na di kʋntʋ tɩn yi nɩ baara mʋrr-tɩna , kʋ wǝli dɩ kaana dɩ biǝ dɩ.

eng: Which is easier—to say, Your sins are forgiven, or to say, Get up and walk?.
local: Kɔɔ mʋ yɩ mwalɩ kʋ dwe, a na tagɩ dɩ kɔrɔ kʋm a wɩ: ‹Nmʋ lwarɩm dɩm ti› mʋ yɩ mwalɩ, naa a na tagɩ a wɩ: ‹Zaŋɩ n ta n veǝ› mʋ yɩ mwalɩ?.

eng: Who among you will give your children a stone when they ask for bread?.
local: Abam wʋlʋ na jɩgɩ bu yɩ o na loori-m wʋdiu, nmʋ wʋ́ sɛ n kwe kandwɛ n pa-o na?.

eng: Then the devil brought him to a very high mountain and showed him all the kingdoms of the world and their glory.
local: Sʋtaanɩ daa ma ja-o dɩ ja vu dɩ di piu kʋlʋ na tiini kʋ dwara tɩn yuu. Dɩ laan ma brɩ-o lʋgʋ baŋa tɩɩnɩ dɩm maama dɩ wo-laarʋ tɩlʋ maama na wʋra tɩn.

eng: Therefore, dont worry and say, What are we going to eat? or What are we going to drink? or What are we going to wear.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ, á yɩ taá liǝ dɩ á na wʋ́ di woŋo kʋlʋ naa á na wʋ́ zʋ woŋo kʋlʋ tɩn.

eng: Because they were warned in a dream not to return to Herod, they went back to their own country by another route.
local: Wɛ ma pa ba lwarɩ ba dɩndwɩa wʋnɩ, nɩ ba daa yɩ joori ba da Erɔdɩ te. Ba laan ma tɔgɩ cwǝ-gaa ba joori ba vu ba tɩʋ kʋm.

eng: Or havent you read in the Law that on the Sabbath the priests in the temple treat the Sabbath as any other day and are still innocent?.
local: Naa, abam ta wʋ fɔgɩ á karɩmɩ Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm na brɩ nɩ, Wɛ kaanɩm tiinǝ bam yǝni ba cɔgɩ siun dɛ culu kʋm dɩ ba na tʋŋɩ DƖ digǝ kam tɩtʋŋa siun dɛ maama wʋnɩ tɩn? Ba nan na yǝni ba tʋŋɩ kʋntʋ tɩn, ba ta jɩgɩ bʋra kʋ wʋnɩ.

eng: Jesus responded, Ill come and heal him.
local: Zezi ma lǝr-o o wɩ: «Aá da a vu sɩ a pa o na yazurǝ.».

eng: Go instead to the lost sheep, the people of Israel.
local: Á nan maŋɩ sɩ á vu Yisɩrayɛlɩ dwi tiinǝ bam te, bɛŋwaanɩ bantʋ nyɩ dɩ peeni sɩlʋ na je tɩn mʋ.

eng: After dismissing the crowds, Jesus got into the boat and came to the region of Magadan.
local: Zezi laan ma banɩ kɔgɔ kʋm o pa kʋ viiri. O ma daarɩ o vu o zʋ naboro o bɛ o vu o yi tɩʋ kʋdoŋ kʋ yɩrɩ mʋ Magadan.

eng: But so you will know that the Human One has authority on the earth to forgive sins—he said to the man who was paralyzed—Get up, take your cot, and go home.
local: Amʋ nan wʋ́ pa abam lwarɩ nɩ, amʋ na yɩ Nabiin-bu wʋm tɩn jɩgɩ dam lʋgʋ baŋa nɩ, sɩ a yagɩ nɔɔna lwarɩm a ma cɛ-ba.» O laan ma ta dɩ kɔrɔ kʋm o wɩ: «Zaŋɩ wɛɛnɩ sɩ n kwe n gungolo kʋm n ja n vu sɔŋɔ.».

eng: Or give them a snake when they ask for fish?.
local: Naa o na loori-m kalǝŋǝ, nń sɛ n pa-o bɩsankwɩa na?.

eng: He said, Ill give you all these if you bow down and worship me.
local: Dɩ ma ta dɩd-o dɩ wɩ: «Nmʋ na sɛ n kuni doonǝ n zuli amʋ, aá pa n ta n te wǝǝnu tɩntʋ maama.».

eng: Gentiles long for all these things. Your heavenly Father knows that you need them.
local: Balʋ na yǝri Wɛ tɩn mʋ tiini ba bʋŋɩ wǝǝnu tɩm kʋntʋ maama wʋbʋŋa. Abam Ko Wɛ nan maŋɩ DƖ ye woŋo kʋlʋ na maŋɩ dɩ abam tɩn.

eng: When the magi had departed, an angel from the Lord appeared to Joseph in a dream and said, Get up. Take the child and his mother and escape to Egypt. Stay there until I tell you, for Herod will soon search for the child in order to kill him.
local: Yiyǝn-yeenǝ bam na kɛ ba daarɩ kʋntʋ tɩn, Baŋa-Wɛ malɛka ma da ka ba Zʋzɛfʋ te o dɩndwɩa wʋnɩ, yɩ ka wɩ: «Zaŋɩ n ja bu wʋm dɩ o nu n ja n duri n vu Ezipi tɩʋ, sɩ á taá zʋʋrɩ da, sɩ kʋ yi maŋa kam a na wʋ́ pa abam ni sɩ á nuŋi Ezipi á joori á ba tɩn. Bɛŋwaanɩ Erɔdɩ mʋ lagɩ o zaŋɩ o beeri bu wʋm sɩ o gʋ-o.».

eng: But I tell you that something greater than the temple is here.
local: Kʋ daarɩ lele kʋntʋ, wʋlʋ na dwe Wɛ-di-kamunu kʋm tɩn nan mʋ wʋ yo.

eng: But the centurion replied, Lord, I dont deserve to have you come under my roof. Just say the word and my servant will be healed.
local: Pamaŋna yigǝ tu wʋm ma lǝri o wɩ: «Amʋ tu, a wʋ maŋɩ sɩ n ba n zʋ amʋ sɔŋɔ. Nan weeni n ta dɩ n ni nɩ a tɩntʋŋnʋ wʋm zaŋɩ. N na tagɩ kʋntʋ, oó na yazurǝ.

eng: As you go, make this announcement: The kingdom of heaven has come near.
local: Nan ve-na á brɩ-ba nɩ maŋa kam yiǝ, Wɛ paarɩ dɩm lagɩ dɩ ba nɔɔna tɩtarɩ nɩ.

eng: The man got up and went home.
local: O na tagɩ kʋntʋ tɩn, nɔɔnʋ wʋm ma sɩɩnɩ o zaŋɩ o vu sɔŋɔ.

eng: If you who are evil know how to give good gifts to your children, how much more will your heavenly Father give good things to those who ask him.
local: Awo. Abam wʋrʋ na ba lana yɩ á ta ye sɩ á taá paɩ á biǝ wo-laarʋ tɩlʋ ba na lagɩ tɩn, á Ko Wɛ na lamma DƖ dwe abam tɩn bá kwe wo-laarʋ DƖ pa balʋ na loori-DƖ tɩn na?.

eng: Jesus responded, Go away, Satan, because its written, You will worship the Lord your God and serve only him .
local: Zezi laan ma ta dɩ-dɩ o wɩ: «Sʋtaanɩ, ve daa a tee nɩ! Sɩ kʋ pʋpʋnɩ Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm wʋnɩ kʋ wɩ: ‹Kʋ yɩ n Yuutu Baŋa-Wɛ yɩranɩ mʋ n maŋɩ sɩ n kuni doonǝ n zuli, sɩ n kɩ DƖ wʋbʋŋa na lagɩ te tɩn.› ».

eng: Joseph got up and, during the night, took the child and his mother to Egypt.
local: Zʋzɛfʋ na ni kʋntʋ tɩn, o ma sɩɩnɩ o zaŋɩ o ja bu wʋm dɩ o nu wʋm, o nuŋi tɩtɩɩ dɩm kʋntʋ nɩ o vu Ezipi.

eng: Instead, desire first and foremost Gods kingdom and Gods righteousness, and all these things will be given to you as well.
local: Abam maŋɩ sɩ á da yigǝ á beeri Baŋa-Wɛ paarɩ dɩm dɩ ŋwɩa kalʋ na tɔgɩ Wɛ wʋbʋŋa tɩn. Á na kɩ kʋntʋ, Wɛ laan wʋ́ wǝli abam wǝǝnu tɩlʋ na daarɩ tɩn.

eng: If you had known what this means, I want mercy and not sacrifice , you wouldnt have condemned the innocent.
local: Wɛ tagɩ DƖ wɩ: ‹Amʋ lagɩ sɩ nabiinǝ taa jɩgɩ da-ŋwaŋa mʋ, sɩ kʋ daɩ nɩ a lagɩ sɩ ba taa maɩ ba wǝǝnu mʋ ba kaanɩ-nɩ.› Abam ya na lwarɩ taanɩ dɩntʋ kuri, á ya bá di balʋ na jɩgɩ bʋra tɩn taanɩ.

eng: Im a man under authority, with soldiers under me. I say to one, Go, and he goes, and to another, Come, and he comes. I say to my servant, Do this, and the servant does it.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ, amʋ dɩ yɩ nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ nɔɔna badonnǝ na jɩgɩ dam amʋ baŋa nɩ tɩn, yɩ a dɩ daa ta jɩgɩ dam pamaŋna badaara baŋa nɩ. A na tagɩ a wɩ, nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ ve, o maŋɩ sɩ o vu mʋ. A nan daa na wɩ, nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ ba, o dɩ wʋ́ ba mʋ. Kʋ daa zɩ yɩ a tɩntʋŋnʋ, a na wɩ o kɩ woŋo, oó kɩ mʋ. Kʋntʋ, a ye sɩ, nmʋ na tagɩ kʋlʋ maama kʋʋ́ kɩ.».

eng: Heal the sick, raise the dead, cleanse those with skin diseases, and throw out demons. You received without having to pay. Therefore, give without demanding payment.
local: Ve-na á taá pa yawɩɩna na yazurǝ, sɩ á daarɩ á taá bi balʋ na tɩgɩ tɩn, sɩ á pa nanywaanʋ joori tɩ na yazurǝ tɩ ji lanyɩranɩ, sɩ á daarɩ á taá zǝli ciciri nɔɔna yɩra nɩ. Á nan maŋɩ sɩ á zǝni nɔɔna zaanɩ mʋ, nɩ abam dɩ na joŋi Wɛ dam dɩm zaanɩ te tɩn.

eng: When the crowds saw what had happened, they were afraid and praised God, who had given such authority to human beings.
local: Nɔn-kɔgɔ kʋm maama na nɛ kʋntʋ tɩn, fʋʋnɩ ma zʋ-ba. Ba ma zuli Wɛ dɩ DƖ na pɛ dam dɩntʋ doŋ wʋ nabiinǝ tee nɩ tɩn.

eng: Therefore, you should treat people in the same way that you want people to treat you; this is the Law and the Prophets.
local: Á taá kɩ á donnǝ lanyɩranɩ, sɩ kʋ maŋɩ dɩ á na lagɩ sɩ bantʋ taa kɩ abam te tɩn. Kʋntʋ mʋ yɩ cɩga kalʋ Moyisi dɩ Wɛ nijoŋnǝ bam zaasɩm dɩm na maŋɩ dɩ brɩ tɩn.».

eng: The devil left him, and angels came and took care of him.
local: Sʋtaanɩ laan ma viiri dɩ daar-o. Wɛ malɛsɩ laan ma ba Zezi te sɩ zǝn-o.

eng: He stayed there until Herod died. This fulfilled what the Lord had spoken through the prophet: I have called my son out of Egypt .
local: Ba ma zʋʋrɩ da taan, sɩ kʋ vu kʋ yi maŋa kalʋ Erɔdɩ na tɩgɩ tɩn. Kʋ dɛɛn kɩ kʋntʋ mʋ, sɩ kʋ pa Baŋa-Wɛ dɛɛn na tagɩ kʋlʋ tɩn sɩɩnɩ kʋ kɩ. Faŋa faŋa tɩn, DƖ dɛɛn pɛ DƖ nijoŋnu wʋdoŋ tɔɔlɩ DƖ kwǝrǝ o wɩ: «Amʋ Wɛ bǝŋi a bu wʋm sɩ o nuŋi Ezipi nɩ mʋ o ba.».

eng: Therefore, stop worrying about tomorrow, because tomorrow will worry about itself. Each day has enough trouble of its own.
local: Dɛ maama tui dɩ dɩ tɩtɩ cam mʋ. Á nan yɩ taá pa liǝ jɩgɩ abam dɩ jwa woŋo. Yagɩ-na sɩ jwa dɛ dɩm tɩtɩ wʋ́ nii dɩ tɩtɩ woŋo.».

eng: The Human One is Lord of the Sabbath.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ amʋ Nabiin-bu wʋm jɩgɩ ni siun dɛ cullu tɩm baŋa nɩ.».

eng: In those days John the Baptist appeared in the desert of Judea announcing.
local: Nɔɔnʋ wʋdoŋ dɛɛn mʋ wʋra, o yɩrɩ mʋ Zan. Wʋntʋ mʋ yɩ wʋlʋ na miisi nɔɔna na wʋnɩ tɩn. O dɛɛn ma ba o wʋ Zude nɩ o beeri kagʋa wʋnɩ, yɩ o tɔɔlɩ Wɛ kwǝrǝ.

eng: When Jesus heard this, he was impressed and said to the people following him, I say to you with all seriousness that even in Israel I havent found faith like this.
local: Zezi na ni kʋntʋ tɩn, kʋ ma tiini kʋ sʋ-o. O ma ta dɩ balʋ na tɔgɩ ba wʋra tɩn o wɩ: «A lagɩ a ta cɩga mʋ dɩ abam sɩ, a wʋ nɛ nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ o na jɩgɩ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ amʋ nɩnɛɛnɩ nɔɔnʋ wʋntʋ na jɩgɩ wʋ-dɩdʋa te tɩn, kʋ na maŋɩ kʋ yɩ Yisɩrayɛlɩ dwi tiinǝ bam wʋnɩ dɩ.

eng: Workers deserve to be fed, so dont gather gold or silver or copper coins for your money belts to take on your trips.
local: Á na maa ve, sɩ á yɩ zaŋɩ á kwe sǝbu-sɩŋa naa sǝbu á kɩ á gwar-fwɛɛla nɩ á wǝli da.

eng: As Jesus continued on from there, he saw a man named Matthew sitting at a kiosk for collecting taxes. He said to him, Follow me, and he got up and followed him.
local: Zezi laan ma nuŋi o maa kɛa. O ma na nɔɔnʋ wʋdoŋ, o yɩrɩ mʋ Matiyu. O dɛɛn je mɛ seeni o na yǝni o joŋi lampoo tɩn mʋ. Zezi ma ta dɩd-o o wɩ: «Zaŋɩ n ta n tɔgɩ-nɩ.» O ma sɩɩnɩ o zaŋɩ o tɔgɩ o kwaga.

eng: Go in through the narrow gate. The gate that leads to destruction is broad and the road wide, so many people enter through it.
local: «Á taá cʋ á tɩtɩ, sɩ á wanɩ á tɔgɩ cwǝ-mɩmɩna kam á vu á na ŋwɩa Wɛ tee nɩ. Kʋ daarɩ cwǝŋǝ kalʋ ni na yalma yɩ ka vǝŋǝ yɩ mwalɩ mwalɩ tɩn maa ve ka kweeli cɔgɩm jǝgǝ nɩ mʋ, yɩ nɔɔna zanzan mʋ tɔgɩ cwǝŋǝ kantʋ.

eng: Now when Jesus heard that John was arrested, he went to Galilee.
local: Zezi dɛɛn na lwarɩ nɩ ba jaanɩ Zan ba kɩ pɩɩna digǝ nɩ tɩn, o ma joori o vu Galile.

eng: When Herod knew the magi had fooled him, he grew very angry. He sent soldiers to kill all the children in Bethlehem and in all the surrounding territory who were two years old and younger, according to the time that he had learned from the magi.
local: Erɔdɩ dɛɛn na tu o lwarɩ nɩ yiyǝn-yeenǝ bam lʋʋrɩ o yigǝ nɩ ba viiri tɩn, o bam ma tiini dɩ zaŋɩ. O ma pa ni sɩ o nɔɔna vu Betelɩhɛm dɩ kʋ tɩ-balwa bam maama wʋnɩ, ba gʋ bǝkǝri-balɛ sɩlʋ na yi bɩna yale dɩ balʋ na muri bɩna yale tɩn maama. O nan kɩ kʋntʋ, sɩ kʋ maŋɩ dɩ yiyǝn-yeenǝ bam na pɛ o lwarɩ maŋa kalʋ calɩcʋa kam na nuŋi tɩn mʋ.

eng: Jesus left that place and went into their synagogue.
local: Zezi laan ma nuŋi jǝgǝ kantʋ nɩ o vu o zʋ Zwifǝ bam Wɛ-digǝ.

eng: Change your hearts and lives! Here comes the kingdom of heaven.
local: O maa yǝni o ta o brɩ-ba sɩ ba lǝni ba wʋrʋ ba yagɩ kǝm-balwaarʋ, sɩ maŋa kam laan yiǝ Wɛ paarɩ dɩm na lagɩ dɩ ba nɔɔna tɩtarɩ nɩ tɩn.

eng: I say to you that there are many who will come from east and west and sit down to eat with Abraham and Isaac and Jacob in the kingdom of heaven.
local: A lagɩ a ta abam sɩ, nɔɔna zanzan wʋ́ nuŋi lʋgʋ baŋa je maama nɩ, ba ba ba zʋ Wɛ paarɩ dɩm wʋ. Dáanɩ mʋ ba laan wʋ́ jǝni dɩ dɩbam nabaara Abraham dɩ Yizakɩ dɩ Zakɔbɩ, yɩ ba di ywǝǝni daanɩ.

eng: Dont take a backpack for the road or two shirts or sandals or a walking stick.
local: Nan yɩ kwe-na tampɔgɔ kʋlʋ ba na kɩ wʋdiu da tɩn. Á nan yɩ kwe gwaarʋ tɩle tɩle naa natra naa nacǝgǝ á wǝli da. Bɛŋwaanɩ tɩntʋŋnʋ maŋɩ dɩ o ni-wʋdiu mʋ.

eng: As Jesus sat down to eat in Matthews house, many tax collectors and sinners joined Jesus and his disciples at the table.
local: Zezi dɛɛn ma vu Matiyu sɔŋɔ sɩ o di wʋdiu, o dɩ o karabiǝ bam. Lampo-joŋnǝ dɩ nɔn-cɩcɔgɩrʋ zanzan dɩ maa tɔgɩ ba wʋra ba di wʋdiu kʋm dɩ ba.

eng: But the gate that leads to life is narrow and the road difficult, so few people find it.
local: Kʋ daarɩ cwǝŋǝ kalʋ nmʋ na wʋ́ da sɩ n vu n joŋi ŋwɩa Wɛ tee nɩ tɩn ni yɩ mɩmɩna mʋ, yɩ ka pɩɩnɩ. Nɔɔna fɩnfɩɩn yɩranɩ mʋ tɔgɩ cwǝŋǝ kam kʋntʋ.».

eng: He left Nazareth and settled in Capernaum, which lies alongside the sea in the area of Zebulun and Naphtali.
local: O maa daa wʋ maŋɩ Nazarɛtɩ nɩ, yɩ o kɛ o vu Galile tɩʋ kʋdoŋ, kʋ yɩrɩ mʋ Kapɛrnawum, o zʋʋrɩ da. Tɩʋ kʋm kʋntʋ wʋ nɩnɩʋ ni nɩ mʋ, dɩ je sɩlʋ Zabulɔn dwi tiinǝ dɩ Nɛfitali dwi tiinǝ ya na zʋʋrɩ tɩn.

eng: This fulfilled the word spoken through Jeremiah the prophet.
local: Biǝ bam gʋm dɩm ma pa Wɛ nijoŋnu Zeremi na tagɩ Wɛ kwǝrǝ kalʋ faŋa faŋa tɩn sɩɩnɩ kʋ kɩ.

eng: A man with a withered hand was there. Wanting to bring charges against Jesus, they asked, Does the Law allow a person to heal on the Sabbath.
local: Nɔɔnʋ maa wʋra o jɩŋa dɩdʋa na tɩga. Farizɩan tiinǝ badonnǝ dɩ maa tɔgɩ ba wʋra ba na lagɩ cwǝŋǝ sɩ ba brɩ nɩ Zezi kɩ o tusi. Ba ma bwe-o ba wɩ: «Nɔɔnʋ jɩgɩ cwǝŋǝ sɩ o pa o doŋ na yazurǝ siun dɛ dɩm nɩ na?».

eng: He was the one of whom Isaiah the prophet spoke when he said: The voice of one shouting in the wilderness, Prepare the way for the Lord; make his paths straight. .
local: Zan yɩ wʋlʋ Wɛ nijoŋnu Ezayi na maŋɩ o ŋɔɔnɩ o taanɩ faŋa faŋa tɩn o wɩ: «Nɔɔnʋ mʋ wʋ kagʋa wʋnɩ o tɔɔlɩ o kwǝrǝ o wɩ: ‹Zaŋɩ-na á fɔgɩ á kwɛ dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm cwǝŋǝ kam, o na lagɩ o ba o tɔgɩ da tɩn. Pa-na cwe sɩlʋ o na lagɩ o ba o tɔgɩ tɩn fɔgɩ sɩ yɔɔrɩ lanyɩranɩ.› ».

eng: But the children of the kingdom will be thrown outside into the darkness. People there will be weeping and grinding their teeth.
local: Kʋ daarɩ, Yisɩrayɛlɩ dwi tiinǝ balʋ ya na maŋɩ sɩ ba zʋ Wɛ paarɩ dɩm wʋ tɩn, bantʋ daa bá na cwǝŋǝ sɩ ba zʋ. Wɛ wʋ́ zǝli-ba DƖ yagɩ lim je nɩ, mɛ nɔɔna na yaara yɩ ba keerǝ yɩ ba dʋnɩ ba nwa tɩn.».

eng: Whatever city or village you go into, find somebody in it who is worthy and stay there until you go on your way.
local: Abam nan na ve á yi tɩʋ kʋlʋ maama, sɩ á lagɩ nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ na wʋ́ jeeri abam dɩ wʋpolo tɩn, á vu o sɔŋɔ á taá wʋra sɩ kʋ ba kʋ yi á viirim.

eng: But when the Pharisees saw this, they said to his disciples, Why does your teacher eat with tax collectors and sinners.
local: Farizɩan tiinǝ dɩ maa tɔgɩ ba wʋra. Bantʋ na nɛ Zezi na kɩ te tɩn, ba ma vu ba ta dɩ o karabiǝ bam ba wɩ: «Bɛɛ mʋ kɩ yɩ á karanyɩna kam di wʋdiu dɩdaanɩ lampo-joŋnǝ dɩ nɔn-cɩcɔgɩrʋ tɩm kʋntʋ?».

eng: Watch out for false prophets. They come to you dressed like sheep, but inside they are vicious wolves.
local: «Á taá yɩrɩ á tɩtɩ dɩ balʋ na paɩ ba yɩ Wɛ nijoŋnǝ yɩ ba daɩ tɩn. Bantʋ yǝni ba kɩ ba yibiyǝ nɩ ba yɩ nɔn-ŋʋna mʋ te abam yigǝ nɩ, yɩ ba nan lagɩ ba cɔgɩ abam nɩ nywǝnkuri na lagɩ sɩ cɔgɩ peeni te tɩn mʋ.

eng: This fulfilled what Isaiah the prophet said.
local: O na zʋʋrɩ da kʋntʋ tɩn, kʋ dɛɛn ma pa Wɛ nijoŋnu Ezayi na maŋɩ o tɔɔlɩ Wɛ kwǝrǝ faŋa faŋa te tɩn sɩɩnɩ kʋ kɩ.

eng: A voice was heard in Ramah, weeping and much grieving. Rachel weeping for her children, and she did not want to be comforted, because they were no more.
local: O dɛɛn tagɩ o wɩ: «Sɔɔ mʋ zaŋɩ Rama tɩʋ wʋnɩ. Nɔɔna mʋ wʋra ba keerǝ, yɩ ba coosǝ zanzan. Rasɛɛlɩ mʋ tiini o keerǝ o biǝ ŋwaanɩ, o maa ba sɛ sɩ nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ gan-o, o biǝ bam na tɩga tɩn ŋwaanɩ.».

eng: Jesus replied, Who among you has a sheep that falls into a pit on the Sabbath and will not take hold of it and pull it out?.
local: Zezi ma lǝri-ba o wɩ: «Abam wʋlʋ na jɩgɩ piǝ, yɩ ka na tʋ vʋl-kɔgɔ wʋnɩ siun dɛ dɩm nɩ, á bá nii ka baŋa nɩ sɩ á lɩ-ka na?.

eng: John wore clothes made of camels hair, with a leather belt around his waist. He ate locusts and wild honey.
local: Zan dɛɛn zʋʋrɩ gɔrɔ kʋlʋ ba na sɔgɩ dɩ yogondi kʋrʋ tɩn mʋ. O maa maɩ kilǝ o ma ja o tǝŋǝ. O wʋdiu mʋ yɩ kayɩra dɩ tʋʋrʋ.

eng: Jesus said to the centurion, Go; it will be done for you just as you have believed. And his servant was healed that very moment.
local: Zezi laan ma ta dɩ pamaŋna yigǝ tu wʋm o wɩ: «Nan ve. Nmʋ na kɩ n wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ amʋ sɩ a kɩ kʋlʋ tɩn, Wɛ wʋ́ pa kʋ kɩ.» Maŋa kam kʋntʋ nɩ nɔ́ɔ mʋ o tɩntʋŋnʋ wʋm sɩɩnɩ o na yazurǝ.

eng: When you go into a house, say, Peace.
local: Á nan na ve á zʋ sɔŋɔ kʋlʋ, sɩ á jɔɔnɩ-ba á ta nɩ: ‹Wɛ wʋ́ pa abam yazurǝ.›.

eng: When Jesus heard it, he said, Healthy people dont need a doctor, but sick people do.
local: Zezi ma ni ba na tagɩ kʋlʋ tɩn. O laan ma ta o wɩ: «Kʋ na yɩ balʋ na jɩgɩ yazurǝ tɩn, bantʋ wʋ maŋɩ sɩ ba vu dɔgɩta tu te sɩ o sooni-ba. Kʋ daarɩ balʋ na ba jɩgɩ yazurǝ tɩn mʋ maŋɩ sɩ ba vu sɩ ba na soonim.

eng: You will know them by their fruit. Do people get bunches of grapes from thorny weeds, or do they get figs from thistles?.
local: Ba tɩtʋŋa nan mʋ wʋ́ pa á lwarɩ ba na yɩ balʋ tɩn. Bɛŋwaanɩ tiu tǝrǝ kʋ na wʋ́ wanɩ kʋ lǝ kʋ doŋ biǝ. N bá na swan sabara yuu nɩ naa mɔɔla kaligoŋo yuu nɩ.

eng: Land of Zebulun and land of Naphtali, alongside the sea, across the Jordan, Galilee of the Gentiles.
local: O dɛɛn tagɩ o wɩ: «Kʋ na yɩ Zabulɔn dɩ Nɛfitali tɩɩnɩ dɩm, dɩ je sɩlʋ na wʋ nɩnɩʋ kʋm seeni tɩn, dɩ je sɩlʋ na wʋ Zʋrdɛn bugǝ kam bubɛ dɩdoŋ dɩm kwaga nɩ tɩn, dɩ Galile je sɩlʋ dwi-gɛ tiinǝ na zʋʋrɩ da tɩn.

eng: After King Herod died, an angel from the Lord appeared in a dream to Joseph in Egypt.
local: Erɔdɩ dɛɛn ma ba o tɩ, yɩ Zʋzɛfʋ daa ta wʋ Ezipi nɩ. Baŋa-Wɛ malɛka ma daa ba Zʋzɛfʋ te o dɩndwɩa wʋnɩ, yɩ ka wɩ:.

eng: How much more valuable is a person than a sheep! So the Law allows a person to do what is good on the Sabbath.
local: Nabiinu nan tiini o jɩgɩ kuri o dwe piǝ. Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ nɔɔnʋ jɩgɩ cwǝŋǝ sɩ o kɩ o doŋ lanyɩranɩ siun dɛ dɩm nɩ.».

eng: People from Jerusalem, throughout Judea, and all around the Jordan River came to him.
local: Nɔɔna zanzan maa yǝni ba nuŋi Zeruzalɛm, dɩ Zude tɩɩnɩ dɩm maama, dɩ Zʋrdɛn bugǝ ni je sɩm, ba ve o te.

eng: Jesus went home with Peter and saw Peters mother-in-law lying in bed with a fever.
local: Zezi laan ma vu Pɩyɛɛrɩ-ba sɔŋɔ. O ma na Pɩyɛɛrɩ tɩnkaanɩ na tigǝ o ba jɩgɩ yazurǝ. Kʋ yɩ paa mʋ jɩg-o.

eng: If the house is worthy, give it your blessing of peace. But if the house isnt worthy, take back your blessing.
local: Sɔŋɔ kʋm tiinǝ nan na jeeri abam lanyɩranɩ, yazurǝ yam wʋ́ ta wʋra dɩ ba. Kʋ daarɩ, ba na wʋ jeeri abam lanyɩranɩ, yazurǝ yam wʋ́ joori ya ba abam te.

eng: Go and learn what this means: I want mercy and not sacrifice . I didnt come to call righteous people, but sinners.
local: Wɛ tɩtɩ maŋɩ DƖ ta DƖ wɩ: ‹A lagɩ sɩ nabiinǝ taa jɩgɩ da-ŋwaŋa mʋ, sɩ kʋ daɩ nɩ ba taa maɩ ba wǝǝnu mʋ ba kaanɩ-nɩ.› Ve-na á zaasɩ taanɩ dɩm kʋntʋ kuri cɩga. Amʋ na tu lʋgʋ baŋa tɩn, kʋ daɩ sɩ a bǝŋi balʋ na maŋɩ ba yɩ nɔn-ŋʋna tɩn, amʋ nan tu sɩ a bǝŋi nɔn-balwaarʋ mʋ sɩ ba ba amʋ te.».

eng: In the same way, every good tree produces good fruit, and every rotten tree produces bad fruit.
local: Tu-ŋʋŋʋ mʋ lǝri bu-ŋʋna. Tu-balɔrɔ dɩ maa lǝri bu-balwaarʋ.

eng: the people who lived in the dark have seen a great light, and a light has come upon those who lived in the region and in shadow of death.
local: jǝgǝ kantʋ tiinǝ bam dɛɛn ya wʋ lim wʋnɩ mʋ, yɩ ba laan ba ba na pooni zanzan. Balʋ na zʋʋrɩ da tɩn ya ba jɩgɩ tɩɩna dɩ Wɛ, tʋʋnɩ mʋ ya te-ba. Pooni laan ma zǝŋi ba baŋa nɩ.».

eng: Get up, the angel said, and take the child and his mother and go to the land of Israel. Those who were trying to kill the child are dead.
local: «Zaŋɩ n ja bu wʋm dɩ o nu n joori n vu Yisɩrayɛlɩ tɩʋ. Bɛŋwaanɩ wʋlʋ ya na lagɩ sɩ o gʋ bu wʋm tɩn laan tɩga.».

eng: Then Jesus said to the man, Stretch out your hand. So he did and it was made healthy, just like the other one.
local: O na tagɩ kʋntʋ tɩn, o laan ma ta dɩ nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ jɩŋa kam na tɩgɩ tɩn o wɩ: «Twɩ n jɩŋa kam.» Nɔɔnʋ wʋm ma sɩɩnɩ o twɩ-ka. O jɩŋa kam ma joori ka ji lanyɩranɩ nɩ o jɩ-ŋʋŋa kam te.

eng: As they confessed their sins, he baptized them in the Jordan River.
local: Ba maa tɛ ba brɩ kʋlʋ ba na kɩ ba cɔgɩ tɩn. O laan maa paɩ ba tu Zʋrdɛn bugǝ kam wʋnɩ, yɩ o miisi-ba na wʋnɩ Wɛ ŋwaanɩ.

eng: He touched her hand, and the fever left her. Then she got up and served them.
local: Zezi ma vu o ja o jɩŋa, yɩ paa kam nuŋi o yɩra nɩ. Kaanɩ wʋm laan ma zaŋɩ o kɩ wʋdiu o pa-o.

eng: If anyone refuses to welcome you or listen to your words, shake the dust off your feet as you leave that house or city.
local: Abam nan na ve sɔŋɔ kʋlʋ naa tɩʋ kʋlʋ, yɩ ba na wʋ sɛ sɩ ba jeeri abam naa ba cǝgi abam taanɩ, sɩ á nuŋi je sɩm kʋntʋ nɩ. Á na maa viirǝ, sɩ á pɩɩsɩ á nɛ fogo kʋm á yagɩ da.

eng: At that time Johns disciples came and asked Jesus, Why do we and the Pharisees frequently fast, but your disciples never fast.
local: Zan karabiǝ dɛɛn ma vu Zezi te, yɩ ba bwe-o ba wɩ: «Dɩbam dɩ Farizɩan tiinǝ bam yǝni dɩ́ vɔ ni maŋa zanzan. Bɛɛ mʋ yɩ nmʋ karabiǝ bam ba vɔ ni kʋntʋ?».

eng: A good tree cant produce bad fruit. And a rotten tree cant produce good fruit.
local: Tu-ŋʋŋʋ tǝrǝ kʋ na wʋ́ lǝ bu-balwaarʋ. Tu-balɔrɔ dɩ nan tǝrǝ kʋ na wʋ́ lǝ bu-ŋʋna.

eng: From that time Jesus began to announce, Change your hearts and lives! Here comes the kingdom of heaven.
local: Zezi na joori o vu Galile tɩn, kʋ zɩgɩ maŋa kantʋ nɩ mʋ o puli o tɔɔlɩ Wɛ kwǝrǝ, o brɩ nɔɔna nɩ ba maŋɩ sɩ ba lǝni ba wʋrʋ ba yagɩ kǝm-balwaarʋ, bɛŋwaanɩ maŋa kam laan yiǝ Wɛ paarɩ dɩm na lagɩ dɩ ba nɔɔna tɩtarɩ nɩ tɩn.

eng: Joseph got up, took the child and his mother, and went to the land of Israel.
local: Zʋzɛfʋ na ni kʋntʋ tɩn, o ma sɩɩnɩ o zaŋɩ o ja bu wʋm dɩ o nu o joori o vu Yisɩrayɛlɩ tɩʋ kʋm.

eng: The Pharisees went out and met in order to find a way to destroy Jesus.
local: Farizɩan tiinǝ bam na nɛ kʋntʋ tɩn, ba ma nuŋi ba vu ba banɩ daanɩ sɩ ba lagɩ cwǝŋǝ ba gʋ Zezi.

eng: Many Pharisees and Sadducees came to be baptized by John. He said to them, You children of snakes! Who warned you to escape from the angry judgment that is coming soon?.
local: Zan na wʋra o miisi nɔɔna na wʋnɩ tɩn, o nɛ nɩ Farizɩan tiinǝ dɩ Sadusɩan tiinǝ zanzan tui o te. O ma ta dɩ ba o wɩ: «Abam nyɩ dɩ bɩsankwɩ-dwǝ mʋ. Wɔɔ mʋ brɩ abam sɩ á kwaanɩ á lu cam dɩlʋ Wɛ na lagɩ DƖ pa nabiinǝ na tɩn wʋnɩ?.

eng: That evening people brought to Jesus many who were demon-possessed. He threw the spirits out with just a word. He healed everyone who was sick.
local: Tɩga na tu ka wʋra ka yi tɩn, nɔɔna maa jaanɩ ciciri na jɩgɩ balʋ tɩn zanzan ba tui Zezi te. O maa yǝni o ma o ni-taanɩ o zǝli ciciri sɩm, yɩ o daarɩ o pa yawɩɩna bam maama na yazurǝ.

eng: I assure you that it will be more bearable for the land of Sodom and Gomorrah on Judgment Day than it will be for that city.
local: A nan lagɩ a ta cɩga mʋ dɩ abam sɩ, Wɛ sarɩya dɛ dɩm na yiǝ, Sodɔm dɩ Gomɔɔrɩ tiinǝ bá tiini ba na lɛɛrʋ nɩ tɩʋ kʋm kʋntʋ nɔɔna te.

eng: Jesus responded, The wedding guests cant mourn while the groom is still with them, can they? But the days will come when the groom will be taken away from them, and then theyll fast.
local: Zezi ma lǝri-ba o wɩ: «Nɔɔnʋ na di kaanɩ yɩ o kɩ candiǝ, yɩ o cilonnǝ na wʋra sɩ ba tɔgɩ ba di, bantʋ wʋ́ wanɩ ba nywanɩ ba yigǝ sɩ ba yɩ di wʋdiu yɩ kan-barʋ wʋm ta wʋ ba tee nɩ na? Ba bá sɛ ba kɩ kʋntʋ. Kʋ nan wʋ́ ba kʋ yi maŋa kam ba laan na wʋ́ ja kan-barʋ wʋm ba viiri tɩn. Maŋa kam kʋntʋ nɩ yɩ o daa na ba ta wʋ ba tee nɩ tɩn, mʋ o cilonnǝ bam laan wʋ́ vɔ ni.

eng: Every tree that doesnt produce good fruit is chopped down and thrown into the fire.
local: Tiu kʋlʋ maama na ba lǝri bu-ŋʋna tɩn, baá go-kʋ ba dɩ mini nɩ mʋ.

eng: As Jesus walked alongside the Galilee Sea, he saw two brothers, Simon, who is called Peter, and Andrew, throwing fishing nets into the sea, because they were fishermen.
local: Zezi dɛɛn maa wʋ Galile nɩnɩʋ kʋm ni nɩ o veǝ. O ma na nɔɔna bale, ba yɩ cʋrʋ mʋ. Ba dɩdʋa yɩrɩ mʋ Simɔn, o yɩrɩ dɩdoŋ maa yɩ Pɩyɛɛrɩ. Wʋdoŋ wʋm maa yɩ o nyaanɩ, o yɩrɩ mʋ Andre. Ba yɩ kalǝŋ-jara mʋ, yɩ ba wʋ na bam wʋnɩ ba dʋlɩ bʋrɩ ba ma jaanɩ kale.

eng: But when he heard that Archelaus ruled over Judea in place of his father Herod, Joseph was afraid to go there. Having been warned in a dream, he went to the area of Galilee.
local: O laan ma ba o lwarɩ nɩ Erɔdɩ bu Arɩsɩla mʋ lǝni o ko wʋm yuu nɩ o di paarɩ Zude tɩɩnɩ dɩm baŋa nɩ. Kʋ ma pa o kwarɩ fʋʋnɩ sɩ o joori o vu jǝgǝ kam kʋntʋ. O dɩndwɩa wʋnɩ Wɛ ma pa o lwarɩ kʋlʋ o na maŋɩ sɩ o kɩ tɩn, kʋ pa o lɛɛrɩ o vu Galile tɩʋ.

eng: Jesus knew what they intended to do, so he went away from there. Large crowds followed him, and he healed them all.
local: Zezi dɛɛn ma lwarɩ ba na lagɩ ba kɩ-o te tɩn. O ma nuŋi jǝgǝ kam kʋntʋ nɩ. Nɔn-kɔgɔ zanzan dɛɛn maa tɔg-o. O ma pa ba maama na yazurǝ dɩ ba yawɩɩrʋ.

eng: Produce fruit that shows you have changed your hearts and lives.
local: Abam nan maŋɩ sɩ á taá kɩ kǝnǝ yalʋ na wʋ́ brɩ nɩ á sɩɩnɩ á lǝni á wʋrʋ á yagɩ kǝm-balwaarʋ tɩn mʋ.

eng: This happened so that what Isaiah the prophet said would be fulfilled: He is the one who took our illnesses and carried away our diseases.
local: O kɩ kʋntʋ, sɩ kʋ pa Wɛ nijoŋnu Ezayi na maŋɩ o ta kʋlʋ faŋa faŋa tɩn mʋ sɩɩnɩ kʋ kɩ, nɩ o dɛɛn na tagɩ o wɩ: «Wʋntʋ mʋ joŋi dɩbam cam dɩ dɩ́ yawɩɩrʋ maama o zɩŋɩ.».

eng: Look, Im sending you as sheep among wolves. Therefore, be wise as snakes and innocent as doves.
local: Cǝgi-na, a lagɩ a tʋŋɩ abam nɩnɛɛnɩ peeni na maa ve sɩ sɩ gwaanɩ nywǝnkuri wʋnɩ te tɩn mʋ. Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ á maŋɩ sɩ á taá cʋ á tɩtɩ, sɩ á taá jɩgɩ swan nɩ bɩsankwɩ te, sɩ á daarɩ á pa á wʋrʋ taa lana nɩ kunkwǝnǝ na yɩ te tɩn.

eng: No one sews a piece of new, unshrunk cloth on old clothes because the patch tears away the cloth and makes a worse tear.
local: Nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ dɩ nan bá sɛ o kwe garyi-dʋʋrɩ o ma fǝri gwar-doŋo kʋlʋ na kaarɩ tɩn. O na kɩ kʋntʋ, kʋ fǝrim dɩm laan wʋ́ vuuri gɔrɔ kʋm kʋ pa kʋ tiini kʋ cɔgɩ zanzan.

eng: Therefore, you will know them by their fruit.
local: Kʋntʋ tɩn, ba tɩtʋŋa mʋ wʋ́ pa á lwarɩ ba na yɩ balʋ tɩn.

eng: Come, follow me, he said, and Ill show you how to fish for people.
local: Zezi laan ma ta dɩ ba o wɩ: «Zaŋɩ-na á ba á taá tɔgɩ-nɩ. Aá pa á taá beeri nɔɔna mʋ á pa-nɩ sɩ ba da amʋ kwaga, nɩ á na yǝni á jaanɩ kale te tɩn.».

eng: He settled in a city called Nazareth so that what was spoken through the prophets might be fulfilled: He will be called a Nazarene.
local: O laan ma vu o yi tɩʋ kʋdoŋ, kʋ yɩrɩ mʋ Nazarɛtɩ, yɩ o zʋʋrɩ da. Kʋ laan ma pa Wɛ nijoŋnǝ bam dɛɛn na tɔɔlɩ DƖ kwǝrǝ faŋa faŋa te tɩn sɩɩnɩ kʋ kɩ. Ba dɛɛn tagɩ ba wɩ: «Baá bǝŋ-o nɩ Nazarɛtɩ tu.».

eng: But he ordered them not to spread the word about him.
local: O ma daarɩ o kaanɩ-ba o wɩ, ba yɩ zaŋɩ ba pa nɔɔna lwarɩ o ni nɩ.

eng: And dont even think about saying to yourselves, Abraham is our father. I tell you that God is able to raise up Abrahams children from these stones.
local: Abam yɩ taá bʋŋa á pa á tɩtɩ nɩ, á na yɩ Abraham dwi tiinǝ tɩn, á daa wʋ maŋɩ sɩ á lǝni á wʋrʋ. Wɛ na laga, DƖ wʋ́ wanɩ DƖ pa kandwa yantʋ lǝni ya ji Abraham dwi tiinǝ.

eng: Now when Jesus saw the crowd, he ordered his disciples to go over to the other side of the lake.
local: Zezi dɛɛn na nɛ nɩ kɔ-fɔrɔ tiini kʋ wʋ o tee nɩ tɩn, o ma pa o karabiǝ bam ni sɩ ba bɛ nɩnɩʋ kʋm ni dɩdoŋ dɩm.
