local: Kʋ daarɩ, wʋlʋ na dɛ najɩrɩ dɩm ni o zʋ sɩ o pʋrɩ o peeni sɩm tɩn, wʋm mʋ yɩ peeni sɩm nayɩrʋ wʋm tɩtɩ.

eng: The guard at the gate opens the gate for him, and the sheep listen to his voice. He calls his own sheep by name and leads them out.
local: O na lagɩ o zʋ, wʋlʋ na nii najɩrɩ dɩm ni baŋa nɩ tɩn wʋ́ pʋrɩ o pa o zʋ. Peeni sɩm wʋ́ ni o kwǝrǝ, yɩ oó bǝŋi o tɩtɩ peeni sɩm yɩra, yɩ sɩ da-o sɩ nuŋi.

eng: Whenever he has gathered all of his sheep, he goes before them and they follow him, because they know his voice.
local: O na jaanɩ-sɩ o nuŋi, oó ta tɔgɩ sɩ yigǝ, yɩ peeni sɩm tɔgɩ o kwaga, bɛŋwaanɩ sɩ ye o kwǝrǝ.

eng: They wont follow a stranger but will run away because they dont know the strangers voice.
local: Kʋ nan na yɩ nɔn-gaa, sɩ bá sɛ sɩ tɔg-o. Sɩ wʋ́ duri sɩ viiri mʋ, bɛŋwaanɩ sɩ yǝri o kwǝrǝ.».

eng: Those who heard Jesus use this analogy didnt understand what he was saying.
local: Zezi na tagɩ kʋntʋ o brɩ-ba tɩn, ba ma wʋ lwarɩ o taanɩ dɩm kuri.

eng: So Jesus spoke again, I assure you that I am the gate of the sheep.
local: Zezi daa ma ta o wɩ: «A lagɩ a ta cɩga mʋ dɩ abam sɩ, amʋ mʋ nyɩ dɩ ni dɩlʋ peeni sɩm na tɔgɩ da tɩn.

eng: All who came before me were thieves and outlaws, but the sheep didnt listen to them.
local: Balʋ maama na dɛ yigǝ ba ba ba zʋ ba loori amʋ tɩn nyɩ dɩ ŋwɩɩna dɩ vɩrna mʋ. Peeni sɩm ma wʋ sɛ ba ni.

eng: I am the gate. Whoever enters through me will be saved. They will come in and go out and find pasture.
local: Amʋ mʋ yɩ ni dɩm. Wʋlʋ maama na tɔgɩ amʋ o zʋ tɩn, kʋntʋ tu wʋ́ na vrɩm. O nan wʋ́ na ŋwɩa kalʋ na ywǝmmǝ tɩn, nɩ peeni na tɔgɩ najɩrɩ ni sɩ nuŋi sɩ di yɩ sɩ joori sɩ zʋʋrɩ te tɩn.

eng: The thief enters only to steal, kill, and destroy. I came so that they could have life—indeed, so that they could live life to the fullest.
local: Ŋwɩɩnʋ na tu o zʋ, o lagɩ sɩ o ŋɔ mʋ o gʋ o daarɩ o ja o cɔgɩ. Kʋ nan na yɩ amʋ, a tu sɩ a pa nabiinǝ mʋ na ŋwɩa kalʋ na ywǝnǝ tɩn cɩga cɩga.

eng: I am the good shepherd. The good shepherd lays down his life for the sheep.
local: Amʋ mʋ nyɩ dɩ nayɩr-ŋʋm cɩga cɩga, yɩ a soe a nɔɔna. Nayɩr-ŋʋm sɛ tʋʋnɩ mʋ o peeni ŋwaanɩ.

eng: When the hired hand sees the wolf coming, he leaves the sheep and runs away. Thats because he isnt the shepherd; the sheep arent really his. So the wolf attacks the sheep and scatters them.
local: Kʋ daarɩ, kʋ na yɩ wʋlʋ na tɔgɩ peeni sɩm o joŋi sǝbu tɩn, wʋntʋ daɩ nayɩrʋ wʋlʋ na yɩ peeni sɩm tu tɩn. Wʋntʋ na nɛ nywǝnkurǝ na maa bɩɩna, oó duri mʋ o daarɩ peeni sɩm. Nywǝnkurǝ kam wʋ́ zʋ peeni sɩm wʋ ka ja-sɩ ka pa sɩ jagɩ.

eng: Hes only a hired hand and the sheep dont matter to him.
local: Oó duri o viiri, bɛŋwaanɩ o tɔgɩ peeni sɩm sǝbu ŋwaanɩ mʋ, sɩ o ba jɩgɩ sɩ ŋwaŋa.

eng: I am the good shepherd. I know my own sheep and they know me.
local: Amʋ mʋ yɩ nayɩr-ŋʋm cɩga cɩga. Amʋ ye a nɔɔna bam, yɩ ba dɩ ye amʋ.

eng: just as the Father knows me and I know the Father. I give up my life for the sheep.
local: nɩnɛɛnɩ amʋ Ko na ye-nɩ yɩ amʋ dɩ ye-o te tɩn. Amʋ wʋ́ sɛ sɩ a tɩ a nɔɔna bam ŋwaanɩ, nɩ nayɩr-ŋʋm na sɛ sɩ o tɩ o peeni ŋwaanɩ te tɩn.

eng: I have other sheep that dont belong to this sheep pen. I must lead them too. They will listen to my voice and there will be one flock, with one shepherd.
local: A daa ta jɩgɩ peeni sɩdaara, sɩ na tǝri najɩrɩ dɩntʋ wʋnɩ. A nan maŋɩ sɩ a vu a kalɩ-sɩ mʋ a ja ba a kɩ daanɩ. Peeni sɩntʋ dɩ wʋ́ ni amʋ kwǝrǝ. Kʋntʋ, a peeni sɩm maama wʋ́ la jǝgǝ dɩdʋa, yɩ nayɩrʋ dɩdʋa nii-sɩ.

eng: This is why the Father loves me: I give up my life so that I can take it up again.
local: A Ko Wɛ soe amʋ, dɩ a na sɛ sɩ a tɩ nabiinǝ ŋwaanɩ, sɩ a joori a bi a na ŋwɩa tɩn.

eng: No one takes it from me, but I give it up because I want to. I have the right to give it up, and I have the right to take it up again. I received this commandment from my Father.
local: Nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ nan bá wanɩ o pa a ga a ŋwɩa. Amʋ tɩtɩ nan mʋ lɩ wʋbʋŋa sɩ a ga-ka. A jɩgɩ cwǝŋǝ sɩ a ga a ŋwɩa kam. A nan ta jɩgɩ cwǝŋǝ sɩ a joori a bi a na-ka. Mʋ woŋo kʋlʋ a Ko na pɛ-nɩ ni sɩ a kɩ tɩn.».

eng: There was another division among the Jews because of Jesus words.
local: Zezi na tagɩ kʋntʋ o ti tɩn, kampwara daa ma ba Zwifǝ bam wʋ o taanɩ dɩm ŋwaanɩ.

eng: Many of them said, He has a demon and has lost his mind. Why listen to him.
local: Ba zanzan maa tɛ ba wɩ: «Cicirǝ mʋ jɩg-o, o yuu mʋ tǝrǝ. Bɛɛ mʋ yɩ á cǝgi o taanɩ?».

eng: Others said, These arent the words of someone who has a demon. Can a demon heal the eyes of people who are blind.
local: Kʋ daarɩ badaara maa tɛ ba wɩ: «Wʋlʋ yuu na tǝrǝ tɩn bá wanɩ o ŋɔɔnɩ tɩntʋ doŋ. Cicirǝ na jɩgɩ wʋlʋ tɩn bá wanɩ o puri lilwe yiǝ.».

eng: The time came for the Festival of Dedication in Jerusalem. It was winter.
local: Kʋ dɛɛn ma ba kʋ yi sɩ Zwifǝ bam di ba candiǝ kalʋ yɩrɩ na yɩ Bakwebapawɛ tɩn Zeruzalɛm nɩ. Kʋ yɩ waarʋ mɩmaŋa nɩ mʋ.

eng: and Jesus was in the temple, walking in the covered porch named for Solomon.
local: Zezi dɛɛn ma vu Wɛ-di-kamunu kʋm. O maa wʋ Salɔmɔn kʋnkɔlɔ kʋm nɩ o kaaga.

eng: The Jewish opposition circled around him and asked, How long will you test our patience? If you are the Christ, tell us plainly.
local: Zwifǝ badaara laan ma ba ba gilim-o, yɩ ba bwe-o ba wɩ: «Nmʋ yɩ Krisi wʋm Wɛ na tʋŋɩ tɩn na? Bɛɛ mʋ yɩ n pa kʋ tiini kʋ yɩ wʋbʋŋa zanzan dɩ dɩbam? Ta cɩga n brɩ dɩbam sɩ dɩ́ kɔ joro.».

eng: Jesus answered, I have told you, but you dont believe. The works I do in my Fathers name testify about me.
local: O ma lǝri-ba o wɩ: «A maŋɩ a ta a brɩ abam, yɩ á ba sɛ a ni. Tɩtʋŋa yalʋ a Ko Wɛ na pɛ a tʋŋɩ tɩn mʋ brɩ nɩ a jɩgɩ cɩga.

eng: but you dont believe because you dont belong to my sheep.
local: Abam nan ba sɛ a ni, bɛŋwaanɩ abam daɩ amʋ nɔɔna.

eng: My sheep listen to my voice. I know them and they follow me.
local: A nɔɔna bam nyɩ dɩ peeni sɩlʋ na cǝgi amʋ kwǝrǝ tɩn mʋ. A maa ye-sɩ, yɩ sɩ tɔgɩ-nɩ.

eng: I give them eternal life. They will never die, and no one will snatch them from my hand.
local: Amʋ paɩ a nɔɔna bam na ŋwɩa kalʋ na ba ti tɩn mʋ, yɩ ba bá fɔgɩ ba cɔgɩ maŋa dɩ maŋa. Nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ bá wanɩ o vrɩ-ba amʋ jɩŋa nɩ.

eng: My Father, who has given them to me, is greater than all, and no one is able to snatch them from my Fathers hand.
local: Kʋ yɩ a Ko Wɛ mʋ kwe-ba DƖ kɩ a jɩŋa nɩ. Dɩntʋ nan mʋ dwe woŋo maama. Nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ bá wanɩ o vrɩ-ba DƖ jɩŋa nɩ.

eng: I and the Father are one.
local: Amʋ dɩ a Ko Wɛ yɩ bɩdwɩ mʋ.».

eng: Again the Jewish opposition picked up stones in order to stone him.
local: Zezi na tagɩ kʋntʋ tɩn, Zwifǝ bam daa ma kwe kandwa sɩ ba ma dʋl-o ba gʋ.

eng: Jesus responded, I have shown you many good works from the Father. For which of those works do you stone me.
local: O ma ta dɩ ba o wɩ: «Amʋ Ko pɛ a tʋŋɩ tɩtʋŋ-ŋʋna zanzan mʋ a brɩ abam. Tɩtʋŋa yantʋ wʋnɩ dɔɔ tɩtɩ mʋ pɛ abam kwaanɩ sɩ á gʋ amʋ dɩ kandwa?».

eng: The Jewish opposition answered, We dont stone you for a good work but for insulting God. You are human, yet you make yourself out to be God.
local: Ba ma lǝr-o ba wɩ: «Kʋ daɩ tɩtʋŋ-ŋʋm ŋwaanɩ mʋ dɩ́ lagɩ dɩ́ dʋlɩ-m dɩ́ gʋ. Kʋ yɩ nmʋ na twɩ Wɛ tɩn ŋwaanɩ mʋ. Nmʋ yɩ nabiinu mʋ, yɩ n paɩ n yɩ Wɛ mʋ.».

eng: Jesus replied, Isnt it written in your Law, I have said, you are gods?.
local: O ma lǝri-ba o wɩ: «Wɛ cullu tɔnɔ kʋlʋ DƖ na pɛ abam tɩn wʋnɩ mʋ kʋ pʋpʋnɩ kʋ wɩ, Wɛ tagɩ dɩ nɔɔna badonnǝ DƖ wɩ: ‹Abam dɩdʋa dɩdʋa yɩ Wɛ nyɩnyʋgʋ mʋ.›.

eng: Scripture calls those to whom Gods word came gods , and scripture cant be abolished.
local: Kʋ brɩ nɩ Wɛ dɛɛn pɛ DƖ kwǝrǝ nɔɔna bantʋ mʋ, yɩ DƖ bǝŋi-ba nɩ DƖ nyɩnyʋgʋ. Kʋlʋ na pʋpʋnɩ Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm wʋnɩ tɩn bá wanɩ kʋ ji kafɛ.

eng: So how can you say that the one whom the Father has made holy and sent into the world insults God because he said, I am Gods Son?.
local: Amʋ nan yɩ wʋlʋ a Ko Wɛ na lɩ sɩ a kɩ DƖ wʋbʋŋa, yɩ DƖ tʋŋɩ-nɩ sɩ a ba lʋgʋ baŋa tɩn mʋ. Kʋntʋ, a na tagɩ nɩ a yɩ Wɛ Bu tɩn, bɛɛ mʋ yɩ á ba sɛa? Bɛɛ mʋ yɩ á brɩ nɩ a twɩ Wɛ mʋ?.

eng: If I dont do the works of my Father, dont believe me.
local: Maanɩ-na á nii a tɩtʋŋa yam na yɩ te tɩn. Kʋ na daɩ a Ko Wɛ tɩtʋŋa mʋ a tʋŋa, sɩ á yɩ sɛ-nɩ.

eng: But if I do them, and you dont believe me, believe the works so that you can know and recognize that the Father is in me and I am in the Father.
local: Kʋ nan na yɩ Wɛ tɩtʋŋa, á na maŋɩ á ba sɛ amʋ, sɩ á sɛ tɩtʋŋa yam na brɩ te tɩn. Á na sɛ tɩtʋŋa yam kʋntʋ, á wʋ́ sɩɩnɩ á lwarɩ nɩ a Ko wʋra dɩ amʋ, yɩ amʋ dɩ wʋra dɩ a Ko.».

eng: Again, they wanted to arrest him, but he escaped from them.
local: O na tagɩ kʋntʋ tɩn, ba daa maa lagɩ sɩ ba ja-o. O ma lu ba jɩa wʋnɩ o viiri.

eng: Jesus went back across the Jordan to the place where John had baptized at first, and he stayed there.
local: Zezi ma joori o vu o bɛ Zʋrdɛn bugǝ kam. O ma vu je sɩlʋ Zan dɛɛn na yǝni o miisi nɔɔna na wʋnɩ tɩn, o zʋʋrɩ da.

eng: Many people came to him. John didnt do any miraculous signs, they said, but everything John said about this man was true.
local: Nɔɔna zanzan dɛɛn maa tui o te. Ba maa yǝni ba tɛ ba wɩ: «Zan nan wʋ kɩ wo-kɩnkagɩla. Kʋ daarɩ o na tagɩ kʋlʋ maama Zezi ŋwaanɩ tɩn yɩ cɩga mʋ.».

eng: Many believed in Jesus there.
local: Je sɩm kʋntʋ nɩ nɔɔna zanzan ma kɩ ba wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Zezi.

eng: And Jesus went to the Mount of Olives.
local: Kʋ daarɩ Zezi dɛɛn ma vu Olivi piu kʋm yuu.

eng: Early in the morning he returned to the temple. All the people gathered around him, and he sat down and taught them.
local: Tɩga na pʋʋrɩ tɩtɩɩtɩ puru tɩn, Zezi ma joori o vu o zʋ Wɛ-di-kamunu kʋm wʋ. Nɔn-kɔgɔ kʋm maama ma ba kʋ gilim-o. O ma jǝni tɩga nɩ o wʋra o brɩ-ba.

eng: The legal experts and Pharisees brought a woman caught in adultery. Placing her in the center of the group.
local: Wɛ cullu karanyɩna tiinǝ dɩ Farizɩan tiinǝ ma ja kaanɩ wʋlʋ ba na pɩɩr-o boorim baŋa nɩ tɩn, ba ja ba ba zɩgɩ ba maama yigǝ nɩ.

eng: they said to Jesus, Teacher, this woman was caught in the act of committing adultery.
local: Ba ma ta dɩ Zezi ba wɩ: «Karanyɩna, dɩbam pɩɩrɩ kaanɩ wʋntʋ boorim baŋa nɩ mʋ.

eng: In the Law, Moses commanded us to stone women like this. What do you say.
local: Moyisi na pɛ dɩbam Wɛ cullu tɩlʋ tɩn pɛ dɩbam ni sɩ, kaanɩ na kɩ kǝm dɩntʋ doŋ, sɩ dɩ́ dʋl-o dɩ́ gʋ mʋ. Kʋ nan na yɩ nmʋ, nmʋ wɩ dɩ́ kɩ ta mʋ?».

eng: They said this to test him, because they wanted a reason to bring an accusation against him. Jesus bent down and wrote on the ground with his finger.
local: Ba na bwe-o kʋntʋ tɩn, ba lagɩ sɩ ba maŋɩ Zezi mʋ ba nii, baá wanɩ ba saŋ-o na? Zezi ma tiiri o ma o nʋa o la tɩga nɩ.

eng: They continued to question him, so he stood up and replied, Whoever hasnt sinned should throw the first stone.
local: Ba maa ta joori ba bwe Zezi taan. O laan ma kwǝni wɛɛnɩ, yɩ o ta dɩ ba o wɩ: «Abam wʋlʋ na wʋ kɩ lwarɩm tɩn, sɩ o da yigǝ o kwe kandwɛ o ma dʋlɩ kaanɩ wʋm.».

eng: Bending down again, he wrote on the ground.
local: O laan ma joori o tiiri o wʋra o la tɩga nɩ dɩ o nʋa.

eng: Those who heard him went away, one by one, beginning with the elders. Finally, only Jesus and the woman were left in the middle of the crowd.
local: Ba na ni o na tagɩ te tɩn, ba nakwa bam mʋ dɛ yigǝ ba nuŋi dɩdʋa dɩdʋa ba viiri. Ba maama ma nuŋi ba daarɩ Zezi yɩranɩ, yɩ kaanɩ wʋm daa ta zɩgɩ o yigǝ nɩ.

eng: Jesus stood up and said to her, Woman, where are they? Is there no one to condemn you.
local: O ma kwǝni wɛɛnɩ, yɩ o bwe kaanɩ wʋm o wɩ: «Balʋ na saŋɩ nmʋ tɩn wʋ yǝn? Ba nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ daa wʋ daarɩ sɩ o ŋɔɔnɩ o cɔgɩ nmʋ na?».

eng: She said, No one, sir. Jesus said, Neither do I condemn you. Go, and from now on, dont sin anymore.
local: O ma lǝri o wɩ: «Aye, a tu, ba nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ daa wʋ daarɩ.» Zezi ma ta dɩd-o o wɩ: «Amʋ dɩ nan bá di nmʋ sarɩya. Ve, nan daa n yɩ kɩ lwarɩm.».

eng: Jesus spoke to the people again, saying, I am the light of the world. Whoever follows me wont walk in darkness but will have the light of life.
local: Zezi dɛɛn ma ta dɩ nɔɔna bam o wɩ: «Amʋ mʋ yɩ pooni a paɩ nabiinǝ maama. Wʋlʋ nan na tɔgɩ amʋ tɩn, kʋntʋ tu daa bá vu lim wʋnɩ. Kʋntʋ tu wʋ́ na pooni dɩlʋ na wʋ́ pa-o ŋwɩa cɩga cɩga tɩn.».

eng: Then the Pharisees said to him, Because you are testifying about yourself, your testimony isnt valid.
local: Farizɩan tiinǝ bam ma ta dɩd-o ba wɩ: «Nmʋ na paɩ n tɩtɩ cɩga tɩn, n taanɩ dɩm ba jɩgɩ kuri.».

eng: Jesus replied, Even if I testify about myself, my testimony is true, since I know where I came from and where Im going. You dont know where I come from or where Im going.
local: O ma lǝri-ba o wɩ: «A na maŋɩ a paɩ a tɩtɩ cɩga dɩ, kʋ ta yɩ cɩga mʋ, bɛŋwaanɩ amʋ ye a na nuŋi mɛ tɩn. Abam nan yǝri amʋ na nuŋi mɛ dɩ mɛ a na maa ve tɩn.

eng: You judge according to human standards, but I judge no one.
local: Abam yǝni á di nɔɔna taanɩ nɩ nabiinǝ wʋbʋŋa na lagɩ te tɩn mʋ. Amʋ nan ba di nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ taanɩ.

eng: Even if I do judge, my judgment is truthful, because Im not alone. My judgments come from me and from the Father who sent me.
local: Kʋ daarɩ, amʋ na lagɩ a di nɔɔna taanɩ, amʋ taanɩ dim dɩm wʋ́ ta yɩ cɩga mʋ, bɛŋwaanɩ amʋ Ko mʋ tʋŋɩ-nɩ. O nan wʋra dɩ amʋ, kʋ daɩ amʋ yɩranɩ mʋ wʋ́ di nɔɔna taanɩ.

eng: In your Law it is written that the witness of two people is true.
local: Kʋ pʋpʋnɩ Moyisi cullu twaanʋ tɩm wʋnɩ kʋ wɩ, nɔɔna bale na jɩgɩ ni dɩdʋa, ba na tagɩ kʋlʋ tɩn yɩ cɩga mʋ.

eng: I am one witness concerning myself, and the Father who sent me is the other.
local: Amʋ paɩ a tɩtɩ cɩga, yɩ a Ko wʋlʋ na tʋŋɩ-nɩ tɩn dɩ paɩ amʋ cɩga.».

eng: They asked him, Where is your Father? Jesus answered, You dont know me and you dont know my Father. If you knew me, you would also know my Father.
local: Ba ma bwe-o ba wɩ: «N ko wʋm bɛɛ?» O ma lǝri-ba o wɩ: «Abam yǝri amʋ na yɩ wʋlʋ tɩn, yɩ á yǝri a Ko wʋm dɩ. Á ya na ye amʋ, á ya wʋ́ lwarɩ a Ko wʋm dɩ.».

eng: He spoke these words while he was teaching in the temple area known as the treasury. No one arrested him, because his time hadnt yet come.
local: Zezi dɛɛn tagɩ wǝǝnu tɩm kʋntʋ o brɩ nɔɔna Wɛ-di-kamunu kʋm wʋnɩ, jǝgǝ kalʋ nɔɔna na ve ba dɩ sǝbu da ba pa Wɛ tɩn mʋ. O na tagɩ kʋntʋ o ti tɩn, nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ wʋ nɛ cwǝŋǝ sɩ o ja-o, o maŋa kam ta na wʋ yi tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: Jesus continued, Im going away. You will look for me, and you will die in your sin. Where Im going, you cant come.
local: Zezi daa ma ta dɩ nɔn-kɔgɔ kʋm o wɩ: «Amʋ wʋ́ viiri, yɩ abam wʋ́ beeri amʋ jǝgǝ á ga, bɛŋwaanɩ abam wʋ́ tɩ á lwarɩm dɩm wʋnɩ mʋ. A na maa ve mɛ tɩn, abam bá wanɩ da á vu.».

eng: The Jewish leaders said, He isnt going to kill himself, is he? Is that why he said, Where Im going, you cant come.
local: Zwifǝ bam maa tɛ daanɩ ba wɩ: «O na tagɩ o wɩ, dɩbam bá wanɩ dɩ́ vu o na maa ve mɛ tɩn, kʋ brɩ nɩ o lagɩ o gʋ o tɩtɩ mʋ na?».

eng: He said to them, You are from below; Im from above. You are from this world; Im not from this world.
local: O ma ta dɩ ba o wɩ: «Abam yɩ lʋgʋ baŋa nɔɔna mʋ, amʋ nan nuŋi wɛyuu mʋ. Abam kugu je yɩ lʋgʋ baŋa yo mʋ. Amʋ kugu je nan daɩ lʋgʋ kʋntʋ.

eng: This is why I told you that you would die in your sins. If you dont believe that I Am, you will die in your sins.
local: Kʋntʋ mʋ a tagɩ a brɩ abam nɩ, abam wʋ́ tɩ á lwarɩm dɩm wʋnɩ mʋ, bɛŋwaanɩ abam na wʋ sɛ nɩ amʋ sɩɩnɩ a yɩ wʋlʋ na wʋra maŋa maama tɩn, á wʋ́ tɩ á lwarɩm dɩm wʋnɩ mʋ.».

eng: Who are you? they asked. Jesus replied, Im exactly who I have claimed to be from the beginning.
local: Ba ma bwe-o ba wɩ: «Nmʋ yɩ wɔɔ mʋ?» O ma ta dɩ ba o wɩ: «Kʋ yɩ kʋlʋ a na maŋɩ a ta a brɩ abam tɩn mʋ.

eng: I have many things to say in judgment concerning you. The one who sent me is true, and what I have heard from him I tell the world.
local: Amʋ ya jɩgɩ wǝǝnu zanzan sɩ a ŋɔɔnɩ a ma di abam taanɩ. Wʋlʋ nan na tʋŋɩ-nɩ tɩn tiini o yɩ cɩga tu mʋ. A na ni kʋlʋ o tee nɩ tɩn yɩranɩ mʋ a tɛ a brɩ nabiinǝ.».

eng: They didnt know he was speaking about his Father.
local: Zezi na tagɩ wǝǝnu tɩm kʋntʋ tɩn, ba wʋ lwarɩ nɩ kʋ yɩ o Ko Baŋa-Wɛ taanɩ mʋ o ŋɔɔnɩ dɩ ba.

eng: So Jesus said to them, When the Human One is lifted up, then you will know that I Am. Then you will know that I do nothing on my own, but I say just what the Father has taught me.
local: O laan ma ta dɩ ba o wɩ: «Maŋa wʋ́ ba, yɩ á kwe amʋ wʋlʋ na yɩ Nabiin-bu wʋm tɩn á zǝŋi wɛɛnɩ. Á laan wʋ́ lwarɩ nɩ amʋ sɩɩnɩ a yɩ wʋlʋ na wʋra maŋa maama tɩn. Abam ta wʋ́ lwarɩ nɩ amʋ ba kɩ kʋlʋkʋlʋ a tɩtɩ nɩ. A nan yǝni a tɛ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ a Ko wʋm na brɩ-nɩ tɩn yɩranɩ mʋ a brɩ nɔɔna.

eng: He who sent me is with me. He doesnt leave me by myself, because I always do what makes him happy.
local: Wʋlʋ nan na tʋŋɩ-nɩ tɩn wʋ amʋ tee nɩ, o wʋ yagɩ-nɩ a yɩranɩ, bɛŋwaanɩ a yǝni a kɩ kʋlʋ na poli o wʋ tɩn mʋ maŋa maama.».

eng: While Jesus was saying these things, many people came to believe in him.
local: Zezi dɛɛn na ŋɔɔnɩ kʋntʋ doŋ tɩn, nɔɔna zanzan laan ma kɩ ba wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩd-o.

eng: Jesus said to the Jews who believed in him, You are truly my disciples if you remain faithful to my teaching.
local: Zezi laan ma ta dɩ Zwifǝ balʋ na sɛ-o tɩn o wɩ: «Abam na sɛ amʋ zaasɩm dɩm yɩ á wʋ yagɩ, á wʋ́ sɩɩnɩ á ji amʋ karabiǝ cɩga cɩga.

eng: Then you will know the truth, and the truth will set you free.
local: Abam laan wʋ́ ba á lwarɩ cɩga, yɩ cɩga kam wʋ́ vrɩ abam ka yagɩ sɩ á taá te á tɩtɩ.».

eng: They responded, We are Abrahams children; weve never been anyones slaves. How can you say that we will be set free.
local: Ba ma lǝr-o ba wɩ: «Dɩbam yɩ Abraham dwi tiinǝ mʋ, dɩbam maŋɩ dɩ́ wʋ jigi nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ gambɛ. Bɛŋwaanɩ mʋ yɩ n ta n wɩ, dɩ́ wʋ́ ta te dɩ́ tɩtɩ tɩn?».

eng: Jesus answered, I assure you that everyone who sins is a slave to sin.
local: O ma ta dɩ ba o wɩ: «A lagɩ a ta cɩga mʋ dɩ abam sɩ, wʋlʋ maama na kɩ lwarɩm tɩn yɩ lwarɩm gambaa mʋ.

eng: A slave isnt a permanent member of the household, but a son is.
local: Kʋ nan na yɩ gambaa, kantʋ ba zʋʋrɩ ka tu sɔŋɔ nɩ maŋa maama. Kʋ daarɩ, kʋ na yɩ sɔŋɔ kʋm bu, wʋntʋ jɩgɩ kugu je sɔŋɔ kʋm wʋnɩ maŋa kalʋ na ba ti tɩn.

eng: Therefore, if the Son makes you free, you really will be free.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ, Wɛ Bu wʋm na vrɩ abam o yagɩ, á wʋ́ sɩɩnɩ á taá te á tɩtɩ.

eng: I know that you are Abrahams children, yet you want to kill me because you dont welcome my teaching.
local: Amʋ ye nɩ abam yɩ Abraham dwi tiinǝ mʋ, yɩ abam ta kwaanɩ sɩ á gʋ amʋ, bɛŋwaanɩ á ba sɛ a zaasɩm dɩm.

eng: Im telling you what Ive seen when I am with the Father, but you are doing what youve heard from your father.
local: Amʋ ŋɔɔnɩ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ a na nɛ amʋ Ko tee nɩ tɩn mʋ. Abam dɩ nan kɩ kʋlʋ á na niǝ abam ko tee nɩ tɩn mʋ.».

eng: They replied, Our father is Abraham. Jesus responded, If you were Abrahams children, you would do Abrahams works.
local: Ba ma lǝr-o ba wɩ: «Dɩbam ko mʋ Abraham.» O ma ta dɩ ba o wɩ: «Abam ya na sɩɩnɩ á yɩ Abraham biǝ, á ya wʋ́ taá kɩ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ Abraham dɛɛn na kɩ tɩn mʋ.

eng: Instead, you want to kill me, though I am the one who has spoken the truth I heard from God. Abraham didnt do this.
local: Amʋ tagɩ cɩga kalʋ a na ni Wɛ tee nɩ tɩn a brɩ abam, yɩ abam kwaanɩ sɩ á gʋ-nɩ. Abraham dɛɛn nan ba kɩ abam kǝm dɩm doŋ.

eng: You are doing your fathers works. They said, Our ancestry isnt in question! The only Father we have is God.
local: Abam yǝni á kɩ kǝnǝ yalʋ á ko na kɩ tɩn mʋ.» Ba ma lǝr-o ba wɩ: «Dɩbam daɩ tampirǝ. Wɛ tɩtɩ yɩranɩ mʋ yɩ dɩbam Ko.».

eng: Jesus replied, If God were your Father, you would love me, for I came from God. Here I am. I havent come on my own. God sent me.
local: O ma ta dɩ ba o wɩ: «Baŋa-Wɛ ya na yɩ abam Ko, á ya wʋ́ taá soe amʋ, bɛŋwaanɩ amʋ nuŋi Wɛ te mʋ a ba a wʋra dɩ abam. A wʋ tu a tɩtɩ nɩ. Wɛ mʋ tʋŋɩ-nɩ.

eng: Why dont you understand what Im saying? Its because you cant really hear my words.
local: Bɛɛ mʋ yɩ abam ba ni a taanɩ dɩm kuri? Kʋ yɩ abam na ba lagɩ sɩ á sɛ a taanɩ dɩm tɩn mʋ.

eng: Your father is the devil. You are his children, and you want to do what your father wants. He was a murderer from the beginning. He has never stood for the truth, because theres no truth in him. Whenever that liar speaks, he speaks according to his own nature, because hes a liar and the father of liars.
local: Abam yɩ á ko sʋtaanɩ biǝ mʋ. Á maa lagɩ sɩ á taá kɩ dɩ wʋbʋŋa na lagɩ te tɩn. Pulim nɩ tɩn sʋtaanɩ maŋɩ dɩ yɩ nɔn-gʋrʋ mʋ. Dɩ ba fɔgɩ dɩ tɔgɩ cɩga cwǝŋǝ, bɛŋwaanɩ cɩga tǝri dɩ wʋnɩ. Dɩ na yǝni dɩ fɔ vwan, kʋ yɩ dɩ wʋbʋŋa na maŋɩ ya yɩ te tɩn mʋ. Dɩ yɩ vwa-fɔrʋ mʋ. Dɩntʋ nan mʋ yɩ vwa-nyɩna ko.

eng: Because I speak the truth, you dont believe me.
local: Kʋ na yɩ amʋ, a yǝni a tɛ cɩga mʋ. Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ abam ba sɛ amʋ.

eng: Who among you can show Im guilty of sin? Since I speak the truth, why dont you believe me?.
local: Abam wɔɔ mʋ wʋ́ wanɩ o brɩ nɩ amʋ kɩ a cɔgɩ? Amʋ nan na ŋɔɔnɩ cɩga tɩn, bɛɛ mʋ yɩ á ba sɛ-nɩ?.

eng: Gods children listen to Gods words. You dont listen to me because you arent Gods children.
local: Wʋlʋ na yɩ Wɛ nɔɔnʋ tɩn cǝgi Wɛ taanɩ mʋ. Abam nan na daɩ Wɛ nɔɔna tɩn mʋ paɩ á ba cǝgǝ.».

eng: The Jewish opposition answered, We were right to say that you are a Samaritan and have a demon, werent we.
local: Zwifǝ bam ma lǝri Zezi ba wɩ: «Dɩbam jɩgɩ bʋra sɩ dɩ́ ta nɩ, nmʋ sɩɩnɩ n yɩ Samari tu mʋ. N yirisi mʋ.».

eng: I dont have a demon, Jesus replied. But I honor my Father and you dishonor me.
local: O ma lǝri-ba o wɩ: «A ba yirisǝ. Amʋ paɩ a Ko mʋ zulǝ. Kʋ daarɩ abam nan gooni amʋ mʋ.

eng: Im not trying to bring glory to myself. Theres one who is seeking to glorify me, and hes the judge.
local: A nan ba beeri a tɩtɩ zulǝ. Wɛ yɩranɩ mʋ pa-nɩ zulǝ, yɩ dɩntʋ mʋ di nabiinǝ taanɩ.

eng: I assure you that whoever keeps my word will never die.
local: A lagɩ a ta cɩga mʋ dɩ abam sɩ, wʋlʋ maama na sɛ yɩ o kɩ a na tagɩ kʋlʋ tɩn, tʋʋnɩ daa bá ja kʋntʋ tu.».

eng: The Jewish opposition said to Jesus, Now we know that you have a demon. Abraham and the prophets died, yet you say, Whoever keeps my word will never die.
local: Zwifǝ bam laan ma ta dɩd-o ba wɩ: «N taanɩ dɩm n na tagɩ tɩn pɛ dɩ́ lwarɩ nɩ n yirisi mʋ. Abraham dɛɛn tɩga, yɩ Wɛ nijoŋnǝ bam maama dɩ tɩ. Nmʋ nan ta tagɩ n wɩ, wʋlʋ na sɛ yɩ o kɩ n na tagɩ kʋlʋ tɩn, tʋʋnɩ daa bá ja kʋntʋ tu.

eng: Are you greater than our father Abraham? He died and the prophets died, so who do you make yourself out to be.
local: Nmʋ yɩ nɔn-kamunu n dwe dɩbam ko Abraham mʋ na? Wʋntʋ nan tɩga. Wɛ nijoŋnǝ bam dɩ ma tɩ. Nmʋ bʋŋɩ n paɩ n yɩ wɔɔ?».

eng: Jesus answered, If I glorify myself, my glory is meaningless. My Father, who you say is your God, is the one who glorifies me.
local: O ma lǝri-ba o wɩ: «A ya na lagɩ yɩrɩ a pa a tɩtɩ, kʋntʋ ya yɩ kafɛ mʋ. Kʋ yɩ a Ko Wɛ mʋ zǝŋi a yɩrɩ, kʋ yɩ dɩntʋ mʋ abam yǝni á tɛ á wɩ: ‹Wɛ dɩlʋ na yɩ dɩbam Wɛ tɩn.›.

eng: You dont know him, but I do. If I said I didnt know him, I would be like you, a liar. But I do know him, and I keep his word.
local: Abam nan yǝri-DƖ, amʋ nan ye-DƖ. A ya na tagɩ a wɩ, a yǝri-DƖ, a ya yɩ vwa-nyɩm mʋ nɩnɛɛnɩ abam te. Amʋ nan sɩɩnɩ a ye-DƖ, yɩ a sɛ a kɩ kʋlʋ DƖ na tagɩ tɩn.

eng: Your father Abraham was overjoyed that he would see my day. He saw it and was happy.
local: Abam ko Abraham dɛɛn jɩgɩ wʋpolo sɩ o na maŋa kam a na wʋ́ ba tɩn. O nan sɩɩnɩ o na-ka, yɩ o wʋ poli.».

eng: You arent even years old! the Jewish opposition replied. How can you say that you have seen Abraham.
local: Ba ma lǝri ba wɩ: «Nmʋ ta wʋ yi bɩna fiinnu, yɩ n kɩ ta mʋ n na Abraham?».

eng: I assure you, Jesus replied, before Abraham was, I Am.
local: O ma lǝri-ba o wɩ: «A lagɩ a ta cɩga mʋ dɩ abam sɩ, ba dɛɛn ta na wʋ lʋgɩ Abraham tɩn, amʋ maŋɩ a wʋra mʋ, a nan ta wʋ́ ta wʋra maŋa maama.».

eng: So they picked up stones to throw at him, but Jesus hid himself and left the temple.
local: Zezi na tagɩ kʋntʋ tɩn, ba laan ma kwe kandwa sɩ ba ma dʋl-o ba gʋ. O ma sǝgi o nuŋi Wɛ-di-kamunu kʋm wʋnɩ.

eng: Before the Festival of Passover, Jesus knew that his time had come to leave this world and go to the Father. Having loved his own who were in the world, he loved them fully.
local: Dɛ dɩdwɩ na daarɩ sɩ ba di Pakɩ candiǝ kam tɩn, Zezi dɛɛn maa ye nɩ o maŋa kam yiǝ, sɩ o yagɩ lʋgʋ baŋa sɩ o daarɩ o vu o Ko te. O maa soe balʋ na yɩ o nɔɔna lʋgʋ baŋa nɩ tɩn, yɩ o tiini o so-ba kʋ ja gaalɩ.

eng: Jesus and his disciples were sharing the evening meal. The devil had already provoked Judas, Simon Iscariots son, to betray Jesus.
local: Zezi dɩ o karabiǝ bam maa je ba di wʋdiu tɩtɩɩ nɩ, dɩ sʋtaanɩ ya maŋɩ dɩ pa Zudasɩ Yiskarɩyo wʋlʋ na yɩ Simɔn bu tɩn lɩ wʋbʋŋa sɩ o yǝgi Zezi o pa nɔɔna.

eng: Jesus knew the Father had given everything into his hands and that he had come from God and was returning to God.
local: Zezi maa ye nɩ o Ko Wɛ mʋ pɛ-o dam woŋo maama baŋa nɩ, yɩ o ye nɩ o nuŋi Wɛ te mʋ, o nan ta wʋ́ joori o vu Wɛ te.

eng: So he got up from the table and took off his robes. Picking up a linen towel, he tied it around his waist.
local: Ba na wʋra ba di tɩn, o ma zaŋɩ da. O lɩ o na zʋ gɔrɔ kʋlʋ o daŋɩ tɩn, yɩ o daarɩ o vɔ pʋpaa o tǝŋǝ nɩ.

eng: Then he poured water into a washbasin and began to wash the disciples feet, drying them with the towel he was wearing.
local: O ma kɩ na o kɩ kacuǝ wʋnɩ o wʋra o maa zarɩ o karabiǝ bam nɛ, yɩ o ma pʋpaa kʋm o ma guguni-sɩ.

eng: When Jesus came to Simon Peter, Peter said to him, Lord, are you going to wash my feet.
local: O ma ba o yi Simɔn Pɩyɛɛrɩ te. Wʋntʋ ma ta dɩd-o o wɩ: «A yuutu, nmʋ mʋ wʋ́ zarɩ amʋ nɛ na?».

eng: Jesus replied, You dont understand what Im doing now, but you will understand later.
local: Zezi ma lǝr-o o wɩ: «Nmʋ bá lwarɩ amʋ na wʋra a kɩ kʋlʋ tɩn kuri lele, n nan wʋ́ ba n lwarɩ kʋ kuri.».

eng: No! Peter said. You will never wash my feet! Jesus replied, Unless I wash you, you wont have a place with me.
local: Pɩyɛɛrɩ ma ta o wɩ: «N brɩ n bá zarɩ a nɛ maŋa dɩ maŋa.» Zezi ma lǝr-o o wɩ: «A na wʋ zarɩ n nɛ sɩm, n bá n wanɩ n ta n yɩ amʋ nɔɔnʋ.».

eng: Simon Peter said, Lord, not only my feet but also my hands and my head.
local: Simɔn Pɩyɛɛrɩ ma ta dɩd-o o wɩ: «Kʋ na yɩ kʋntʋ, a yuutu, yɩ zarɩ a nɛ yɩranɩ, zarɩ a jɩa dɩ a yuu dɩ n wǝli da.».

eng: Jesus responded, Those who have bathed need only to have their feet washed, because they are completely clean. You disciples are clean, but not every one of you.
local: Zezi laan ma ta dɩd-o o wɩ: «Wʋlʋ na swɛ o yɩra tɩn daa ba jɩgɩ digiru, yɩ o daa wʋ maŋɩ sɩ o swɛ o yɩra, kʋ na daɩ o nɛ yɩranɩ. Abam ba jɩgɩ digiru, kʋ nan daɩ á maama.».

eng: He knew who would betray him. Thats why he said, Not every one of you is clean.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ Zezi maŋɩ o ye wʋlʋ na lagɩ o yǝg-o o pa nɔɔna tɩn. Mʋ kʋ kuri o tagɩ o wɩ, kʋ daɩ ba maama mʋ ba jɩgɩ digiru tɩn.

eng: After he washed the disciples feet, he put on his robes and returned to his place at the table. He said to them, Do you know what Ive done for you?.
local: Zezi na zarɩ ba nɛ sɩm o ti tɩn, o ma joori o zʋ o gɔrɔ kʋm, yɩ o vu o jǝni o jǝŋǝ je nɩ. O laan ma bwe-ba o wɩ: «Abam lwarɩ kʋlʋ amʋ na kɩ dɩ abam tɩn kuri na?.

eng: You call me Teacher and Lord, and you speak correctly, because I am.
local: Abam yǝni á bǝ amʋ nɩ, Karanyɩna naa á Yuutu mʋ. Abam na bǝ te tɩn kʋ maŋɩ, bɛŋwaanɩ amʋ sɩɩnɩ a yɩ kʋntʋ mʋ.

eng: If I, your Lord and teacher, have washed your feet, you too must wash each others feet.
local: Amʋ nan na yɩ abam Yuutu dɩ á Karanyɩna yɩ a zarɩ abam nɛ tɩn, kʋ maŋɩ sɩ abam dɩ laan zuli daanɩ kʋntʋ mʋ.

eng: I have given you an example: Just as I have done, you also must do.
local: Amʋ nan kɩ a brɩ abam, sɩ á lwǝni amʋ na kɩ abam te tɩn mʋ.

eng: I assure you, servants arent greater than their master, nor are those who are sent greater than the one who sent them.
local: A lagɩ a ta cɩga mʋ dɩ abam sɩ, gambaa tǝrǝ ka na dwe ka tu. Tɩntʋŋnʋ nan tǝrǝ o na dwe wʋlʋ na tʋŋ-o tɩn.

eng: Since you know these things, you will be happy if you do them.
local: Abam na lwarɩ tɩn, á na kɩ kʋntʋ, á wʋ́ taá jɩgɩ yu-yoŋo.

eng: Im not speaking about all of you. I know those whom Ive chosen. But this is to fulfill the scripture, The one who eats my bread has turned against me.
local: Kʋ nan daɩ abam maama taanɩ mʋ a tɛa. A ye balʋ a na kuri tɩn. Kʋ daarɩ kʋlʋ na pʋpʋnɩ Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm wʋnɩ tɩn maŋɩ sɩ kʋ kɩ mʋ. Kʋ tagɩ kʋ wɩ: ‹Wʋlʋ na jǝni o di wʋdiu dɩ amʋ tɩn mʋ joori o zɩgɩ amʋ zɩga.›.

eng: Im telling you this now, before it happens, so that when it does happen you will believe that I Am.
local: A nan wuuri a ta a brɩ abam mʋ yɩ kʋ ta wʋ kɩ, sɩ kʋ na tu kʋ kɩ, sɩ á wanɩ á sɛ nɩ amʋ yɩ wʋlʋ na wʋra maŋa maama tɩn.

eng: I assure you that whoever receives someone I send receives me, and whoever receives me receives the one who sent me.
local: A lagɩ a ta cɩga mʋ dɩ abam sɩ, nɔɔnʋ na jeeri wʋlʋ maama a na tʋŋɩ tɩn, kʋntʋ tu jeeri amʋ mʋ. Kʋ daarɩ, wʋlʋ na jeeri amʋ tɩn, o jeeri wʋlʋ na tʋŋɩ-nɩ tɩn mʋ.».

eng: After he said these things, Jesus was deeply disturbed and testified, I assure you, one of you will betray me.
local: Zezi na tagɩ kʋntʋ o ti tɩn, o wʋ ma tiini kʋ cɔgɩ kʋ pa o ŋɔɔnɩ jaja o wɩ: «A lagɩ a ta cɩga mʋ dɩ abam sɩ, abam dɩdʋa mʋ lagɩ o yǝgi amʋ o pa nɔɔna.».

eng: His disciples looked at each other, confused about which of them he was talking about.
local: O na tagɩ kʋntʋ tɩn, o karabiǝ bam maa nii daanɩ, yɩ ba brɩ ba yǝri wʋlʋ tɩtɩ o na tɛ bantʋ wʋnɩ tɩn.

eng: One of the disciples, the one whom Jesus loved, was at Jesus side.
local: Wʋlʋ Zezi na soe lanyɩranɩ ba wʋnɩ tɩn maa je o tɩkǝri nɩ.

eng: Simon Peter nodded at him to get him to ask Jesus who he was talking about.
local: Simɔn Pɩyɛɛrɩ ma yɩgɩsɩ o jɩŋa o brɩ wʋntʋ, sɩ o bwe Zezi o nii, kʋ yɩ wɔɔ taanɩ mʋ o tɛa.

eng: Leaning back toward Jesus, this disciple asked, Lord, who is it.
local: Nɔɔnʋ wʋm ma fɔɔrɩ o yi Zezi o sal-o, yɩ o bwe o wɩ: «A Yuutu, kʋ yɩ wɔɔ mʋ?».

eng: Jesus answered, Its the one to whom I will give this piece of bread once I have dipped into the bowl.Then he dipped the piece of bread and gave it to Judas, Simon Iscariots son.
local: Zezi ma lǝri o wɩ: «Amʋ na fɔgɩ dɩpɛ a lu dwǝ wʋnɩ a pa wʋlʋ tɩn, mʋ kʋ tu.» O laan ma fɔ dɩpɛ dɩm o ma lu o pa Zudasɩ Yiskarɩyo wʋlʋ na yɩ Simɔn bu tɩn.

eng: After Judas took the bread, Satan entered into him. Jesus told him, What you are about to do, do quickly.
local: Zudasɩ na joŋi dɩpɛ dɩm kʋntʋ tɩn, sʋtaanɩ ma zʋ o bɩcarɩ. Zezi ma ta dɩd-o o wɩ: «Kɩ lɩla sɩ n kɩ kʋlʋ nmʋ na lagɩ n kɩ tɩn.».

eng: No one sitting at the table understood why Jesus said this to him.
local: Balʋ maama na je ba di tɩn wʋlʋwʋlʋ ma wʋ lwarɩ Zezi na tagɩ kʋlʋ dɩd-o tɩn kuri.

eng: Some thought that, since Judas kept the money bag, Jesus told him, Go, buy what we need for the feast, or that he should give something to the poor.
local: Zudasɩ nan na nii ba kɔgɔ kʋm sǝbu kʋm baŋa nɩ tɩn, ba badaara maa bʋŋɩ nɩ Zezi tʋŋ-o sɩ o vu o yǝgi wʋdiu mʋ sɩ ba ma di candiǝ kam, naa o ga tʋŋ-o sɩ o vu o pa yinigǝ tiinǝ wǝǝnu mʋ.

eng: So when Judas took the bread, he left immediately. And it was night.
local: Zudasɩ na joŋi dɩpɛ dɩm tɩn, o ma da o zaŋɩ o nuŋi. Kʋ dɛɛn yɩ tɩtɩɩ nɩ mʋ.

eng: When Judas was gone, Jesus said, Now the Human One has been glorified, and God has been glorified in him.
local: Zudasɩ na nuŋi o daarɩ kʋntʋ tɩn, Zezi ma ta o wɩ: «Lele kʋntʋ amʋ Nabiin-bu wʋm wʋ́ na paarɩ-zulǝ, yɩ Wɛ tɩtɩ wʋ́ na zulǝ amʋ ŋwaanɩ.

eng: If God has been glorified in him, God will also glorify the Human One in himself and will glorify him immediately.
local: Wɛ na nɛ zulǝ amʋ ŋwaanɩ tɩn, DƖ laan wʋ́ pa a na paarɩ-zulǝ DƖ tɩtɩ tee nɩ. Wɛ nan wʋ́ pa a na zulǝ lele kʋntʋ.

eng: Little children, Im with you for a little while longer. You will look for me—but, just as I told the Jewish leaders, I also tell you now—Where Im going, you cant come.
local: A biǝ-ba, a daa bá tiini a daanɩ abam tee nɩ. Abam nan wʋ́ ba á beeri amʋ jǝgǝ. A nan lagɩ a ta a brɩ abam kʋlʋ a na maŋɩ a ta a brɩ Zwifǝ bam a wɩ, amʋ na lagɩ a vu mɛ tɩn, abam bá wanɩ da á vu.

eng: I give you a new commandment: Love each other. Just as I have loved you, so you also must love each other.
local: A nan lagɩ a pa abam ni-dʋʋrɩ mʋ. Taá soe-na daanɩ. Amʋ na soe abam te tɩn, abam dɩ taá soe daanɩ kʋntʋ.

eng: This is how everyone will know that you are my disciples, when you love each other.
local: Á na soe daanɩ, nɔɔna maama wʋ́ lwarɩ nɩ abam yɩ a karabiǝ mʋ.».

eng: Simon Peter said to Jesus, Lord, where are you going? Jesus answered, Where I am going, you cant follow me now, but you will follow later.
local: Simɔn Pɩyɛɛrɩ ma bwe Zezi o wɩ: «A yuutu, yǝn mʋ n lagɩ n vu?» Zezi ma lǝri o wɩ: «Amʋ na lagɩ a vu mɛ tɩn, nmʋ bá wanɩ n da n vu lele kʋntʋ. Maŋa kadoŋ nɩ mʋ, nmʋ laan wʋ́ wanɩ n da-nɩ n vu.».

eng: Peter asked, Lord, why cant I follow you now? Ill give up my life for you.
local: Pɩyɛɛrɩ ma ta o wɩ: «A yuutu, bɛɛ mʋ yɩ a bá wanɩ a tɔgɩ nmʋ lele kʋntʋ? Amʋ wʋ́ sɛ sɩ a tɩ nmʋ ŋwaanɩ.».

eng: Jesus replied, Will you give up your life for me? I assure you that you will deny me three times before the rooster crows.
local: Zezi ma lǝr-o o wɩ: «Nmʋ wʋ́ sɩɩnɩ n sɛ sɩ n tɩ amʋ ŋwaanɩ na? A lagɩ a ta cɩga mʋ dɩ nmʋ sɩ, kʋ na wʋ́ loori sɩ cɩbwɩʋ keeri tɩn, nmʋ wʋ́ fʋ kuni bɩtɔ nɩ n yǝri amʋ.».

eng: Dont be troubled. Trust in God. Trust also in me.
local: Zezi laan ma ta dɩ o karabiǝ bam o wɩ: «Á yɩ pa á bɩcara taa maga. Kɩ-na á wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ, sɩ á kɩ á wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ amʋ dɩ.

eng: My Fathers house has room to spare. If that werent the case, would I have told you that Im going to prepare a place for you?.
local: A Ko wʋm sɔŋɔ nɩ, je zanzan mʋ wʋra. A nan lagɩ a vu a kwɛ je mʋ a pa abam. Kʋ na daɩ cɩga, a ya bá ta dɩ abam.

eng: When I go to prepare a place for you, I will return and take you to be with me so that where I am you will be too.
local: A na ve a kwɛ je sɩm a ti abam ŋwaanɩ, a laan wʋ́ joori a ba a ja abam, sɩ á tɔgɩ á vu á taá wʋ amʋ na wʋ mɛ tɩn.

eng: You know the way to the place Im going.
local: Abam nan ye a na maa ve tɩn cwǝŋǝ.».

eng: Thomas asked, Lord, we dont know where you are going. How can we know the way.
local: Toma ma ta dɩd-o o wɩ: «A yuutu, dɩbam yǝri nmʋ na lagɩ n vu mɛ tɩn. Dɩ́ nan wʋ́ kɩ ta mʋ dɩ́ lwarɩ ka cwǝŋǝ?».

eng: Jesus answered, I am the way, the truth, and the life. No one comes to the Father except through me.
local: Zezi ma ta dɩd-o o wɩ: «Amʋ mʋ yɩ cwǝŋǝ dɩ cɩga tu dɩ ŋwɩa tu. Nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ bá wanɩ o vu a Ko Wɛ te dɩ o na wʋ dɛ amʋ o vu.

eng: If you have really known me, you will also know the Father. From now on you know him and have seen him.
local: Abam na ye amʋ, á wʋ́ lwarɩ a Ko wʋm dɩ. Lele kʋntʋ abam lwar-o, á nan nɛ-o dɩ.».

eng: Philip said, Lord, show us the Father; that will be enough for us.
local: Filipi ma ta o wɩ: «A yuutu, brɩ dɩbam n Ko wʋm, sɩ kʋntʋ wʋ́ maŋɩ dɩbam.».

eng: Jesus replied, Dont you know me, Philip, even after I have been with you all this time? Whoever has seen me has seen the Father. How can you say, Show us the Father?.
local: Zezi ma lǝri o wɩ: «Filipi, amʋ daanɩ abam tee nɩ yɩ nmʋ ta yǝri amʋ na? Wʋlʋ maama na nɛ amʋ tɩn nɛ amʋ Ko wʋm mʋ. Bɛŋwaanɩ mʋ yɩ n ta n wɩ, a brɩ abam a Ko wʋm?.

eng: Dont you believe that I am in the Father and the Father is in me? The words I have spoken to you I dont speak on my own. The Father who dwells in me does his works.
local: Nmʋ wʋ sɛ nɩ amʋ wʋra dɩ a Ko yɩ a Ko wʋra dɩ amʋ na? Taanɩ dɩlʋ amʋ na tagɩ a brɩ abam tɩn daɩ amʋ tɩtɩ nyɩm. Kʋ yɩ amʋ Ko wʋm mʋ ŋwɩ amʋ wʋnɩ, yɩ o tʋŋɩ o tɩtʋŋa.

eng: Trust me when I say that I am in the Father and the Father is in me, or at least believe on account of the works themselves.
local: Taá jɩgɩ-na wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ amʋ, sɩ amʋ wʋra dɩ a Ko yɩ a Ko wʋra dɩ amʋ. Á na wʋ kɩ á wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ amʋ a taanɩ dɩm ŋwaanɩ, á weeni á kɩ á wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ amʋ tɩtʋŋa yalʋ amʋ na tʋŋɩ tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: I assure you that whoever believes in me will do the works that I do. They will do even greater works than these because I am going to the Father.
local: A lagɩ a ta cɩga mʋ dɩ abam sɩ, wʋlʋ na kɩ o wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ amʋ tɩn wʋ́ tʋŋɩ tɩtʋŋa yalʋ doŋ amʋ na tʋŋɩ tɩn. O nan wʋ́ tʋŋɩ tɩtʋŋ-kamunǝ sɩ ya taa dwe amʋ na kɩ te tɩn, amʋ na lagɩ a vu a Ko te tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: I will do whatever you ask for in my name, so that the Father can be glorified in the Son.
local: Kʋlʋ maama abam na wʋ́ loori amʋ yɩrɩ ŋwaanɩ tɩn, aá kɩ-kʋ a pa abam sɩ a Ko Wɛ na zulǝ amʋ ŋwaanɩ.

eng: When you ask me for anything in my name, I will do it.
local: Abam na loori woŋo kʋlʋ maama amʋ yɩrɩ ŋwaanɩ tɩn, amʋ wʋ́ kɩ-kʋ a pa abam.

eng: If you love me, you will keep my commandments.
local: Abam na soe amʋ, á wʋ́ sɛ a niǝ yam.

eng: I will ask the Father, and he will send another Companion, who will be with you forever.
local: A nan wʋ́ loori a Ko wʋm sɩ o pa abam Zǝnnu wʋdoŋ. Wʋntʋ wʋ́ ta wʋ abam tee nɩ maŋa kalʋ na ba ti tɩn.

eng: This Companion is the Spirit of Truth, whom the world cant receive because it neither sees him nor recognizes him. You know him, because he lives with you and will be with you.
local: Wʋntʋ mʋ yɩ Wɛ Joro kʋlʋ na yɩ cɩga tu tɩn. Nɔɔna balʋ kugu je na wʋ lʋgʋ baŋa nɩ tɩn bá wanɩ ba sɛ-o, bɛŋwaanɩ ba bá wanɩ ba na-o, yɩ ba bá wanɩ ba lwar-o dɩ. Kʋ daarɩ abam nan ye-o, bɛŋwaanɩ o wʋra dɩ abam, yɩ oó ta ŋwɩ abam wʋnɩ.

eng: I wont leave you as orphans. I will come to you.
local: Amʋ bá yagɩ abam á yɩranɩ. Aá joori a ba abam te.

eng: Soon the world will no longer see me, but you will see me. Because I live, you will live too.
local: Kʋ na kɩ fɩɩn, lʋgʋ baŋa nɔɔna bam daa bá na amʋ. Abam nan wʋ́ na-nɩ. Bɛŋwaanɩ, amʋ na jɩgɩ ŋwɩa Wɛ tee nɩ tɩn, abam dɩ wʋ́ na ŋwɩa Wɛ tee nɩ.

eng: On that day you will know that I am in my Father, you are in me, and I am in you.
local: Dɛ dɩm kʋntʋ nɩ á wʋ́ lwarɩ nɩ a wʋra dɩ a Ko Wɛ, yɩ abam dɩ wʋra dɩ amʋ, yɩ amʋ dɩ wʋra dɩ abam.

eng: Whoever has my commandments and keeps them loves me. Whoever loves me will be loved by my Father, and I will love them and reveal myself to them.
local: Nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ maama na sɛ a niǝ yam yɩ o tɔgɩ-ya tɩn mʋ yɩ wʋlʋ na soe amʋ tɩn. A Ko Wɛ wʋ́ ta soe kʋntʋ tu. A dɩ nan wʋ́ ta so-o, yɩ a kwǝri a pa o lwarɩ amʋ na yɩ wʋlʋ tɩn.».

eng: Judas asked, Lord, why are you about to reveal yourself to us and not to the world.
local: Zezi na tagɩ kʋntʋ tɩn, nɔɔnʋ wʋdoŋ dɩ yɩrɩ na yɩ Zudasɩ yɩ kʋ daɩ Zudasɩ Yiskarɩyo tɩn ma lǝri o wɩ: «A yuutu, nmʋ wʋ́ kɩ ta mʋ n pa dɩbam lwarɩ nmʋ na yɩ wʋlʋ tɩn, yɩ lʋgʋ baŋa nɔɔna bam bá lwarɩ?».

eng: Jesus answered, Whoever loves me will keep my word. My Father will love them, and we will come to them and make our home with them.
local: Zezi ma lǝr-o o wɩ: «Wʋlʋ na soe amʋ tɩn wʋ́ sɛ o kɩ a na tagɩ kʋlʋ tɩn mʋ. A Ko wʋ́ ta soe kʋntʋ tu, yɩ amʋ dɩ a Ko wʋ́ ba o te dɩ́ taá wʋra dɩd-o.

eng: Whoever doesnt love me doesnt keep my words. The word that you hear isnt mine. It is the word of the Father who sent me.
local: Wʋlʋ maama nan na ba soe amʋ tɩn bá sɛ o kɩ a na tagɩ kʋlʋ tɩn. Taanɩ dɩlʋ abam nan na ni tɩn daɩ amʋ nyɩm, dɩ nuŋi a Ko wʋlʋ na tʋŋɩ-nɩ tɩn te mʋ.

eng: I have spoken these things to you while I am with you.
local: A maŋɩ a ta wǝǝnu tɩm kʋntʋ a brɩ abam maŋa kam a ta na wʋ abam tee nɩ tɩn.

eng: The Companion, the Holy Spirit, whom the Father will send in my name, will teach you everything and will remind you of everything I told you.
local: Kʋ daarɩ, Zǝnnu wʋlʋ na wʋ́ ba abam te tɩn, wʋntʋ mʋ yɩ Wɛ Joro kʋm a Ko Wɛ na wʋ́ tʋŋɩ sɩ kʋ ba amʋ yɩrɩ ŋwaanɩ tɩn. Kʋntʋ wʋ́ brɩ abam woŋo maama, yɩ kʋʋ́ pa á guli kʋlʋ maama amʋ na maŋɩ a ta a brɩ abam tɩn.

eng: Peace I leave with you. My peace I give you. I give to you not as the world gives. Dont be troubled or afraid.
local: Amʋ yagɩ wʋ-zuru mʋ a pa abam. Kʋ yɩ amʋ tɩtɩ wʋ-zuru mʋ a pɛ abam. Amʋ na pɛ abam wʋ-zuru kʋlʋ tɩn, kʋ daɩ lʋgʋ baŋa nyɩm. Á yɩ pa á bɩcara taa maga, á nan yɩ taá jɩgɩ liǝ dɩ.

eng: You have heard me tell you, Im going away and returning to you. If you loved me, you would be happy that I am going to the Father, because the Father is greater than me.
local: Abam maŋɩ á ni amʋ na tagɩ dɩ abam nɩ, a lagɩ a viiri, yɩ a ta wʋ́ joori a ba abam te. Abam ya na soe amʋ, á wʋ́ taá jɩgɩ wʋpolo dɩdaanɩ amʋ na lagɩ a vu a Ko Wɛ te tɩn, bɛŋwaanɩ a Ko Wɛ dwe amʋ.

eng: I have told you before it happens so that when it happens you will believe.
local: Amʋ nan tagɩ wǝǝnu tɩntʋ a brɩ abam lele kʋntʋ yɩ tɩ daa ta wʋ kɩ, sɩ tɩ na tu tɩ kɩ, sɩ á wanɩ á sɛ a taanɩ dɩm.

eng: I wont say much more to you because this worlds ruler is coming. He has nothing on me.
local: Amʋ daa bá ŋɔɔnɩ taanɩ zanzan dɩ abam, lʋgʋ baŋa pɛ sʋtaanɩ na maa bɩɩnɩ tɩn ŋwaanɩ. Wʋntʋ nan bá jɩgɩ dam dɩ amʋ.

eng: Rather, he comes so that the world will know that I love the Father and do just as the Father has commanded me. Get up. Were leaving this place.
local: A nan maŋɩ sɩ a pa lʋgʋ baŋa nɔɔna lwarɩ nɩ a soe a Ko wʋm, kʋntʋ mʋ a kɩ kʋlʋ maama a Ko na pɛ-nɩ ni sɩ a kɩ tɩn mʋ. Á zaŋɩ sɩ dɩ́ viiri.».

eng: I am the true vine, and my Father is the vineyard keeper.
local: Zezi ma ta dɩ ba o wɩ: «Amʋ yɩ vinyǝ tiu cɩga cɩga. A Ko maa yɩ tiu kʋm tu, yɩ o nii kʋ baŋa nɩ.

eng: He removes any of my branches that dont produce fruit, and he trims any branch that produces fruit so that it will produce even more fruit.
local: Naga kalʋ na nuŋi tiu kʋm yɩra nɩ yɩ ka ba lǝri biǝ tɩn, oó go-ka o yagɩ mʋ. Kʋ daarɩ naga kalʋ na lǝri biǝ tɩn, oó farɩsɩ-ka mʋ, sɩ ka taa lana, sɩ ka taa fɔgɩ ka lǝri biǝ zanzan.

eng: You are already trimmed because of the word I have spoken to you.
local: Abam bɩcara nan maŋɩ ya kwɛ lanyɩranɩ, nɩ ba na farɩsɩ tiu nɛ yɩ sɩ lana te tɩn, á na sɛ taanɩ dɩlʋ amʋ na ŋɔɔnɩ a brɩ abam tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: Remain in me, and I will remain in you. A branch cant produce fruit by itself, but must remain in the vine. Likewise, you cant produce fruit unless you remain in me.
local: Taá wʋra dɩ amʋ, sɩ amʋ dɩ wʋ́ ta ŋwɩ abam wʋnɩ. Tiu naga bá wanɩ ka lǝ biǝ ka yɩranɩ yɩ ka tǝri tiu kʋm yɩra nɩ. Kʋ nan yɩ bɩdwɩ mʋ dɩ abam. Abam maŋɩ sɩ á taá wʋra dɩ amʋ mʋ, sɩ á laan wanɩ á taá kɩ kǝm-laarʋ.

eng: I am the vine; you are the branches. If you remain in me and I in you, then you will produce much fruit. Without me, you cant do anything.
local: Amʋ mʋ yɩ tiu kʋm, yɩ abam yɩ kʋ nɛ sɩm. Wʋlʋ maama na wʋra dɩ amʋ yɩ amʋ ŋwɩ kʋntʋ tu wʋnɩ tɩn wʋ́ ta kɩ kǝm-laarʋ mʋ, nɩ naga kalʋ na lǝri biǝ zanzan tɩn. Amʋ nan na tǝri á bɩcara nɩ, á bá wanɩ kʋlʋkʋlʋ á kɩ.

eng: If you dont remain in me, you will be like a branch that is thrown out and dries up. Those branches are gathered up, thrown into a fire, and burned.
local: Wʋlʋ na tǝrǝ dɩ amʋ tɩn nyɩ dɩ tiu naga kalʋ ba na goni ba yagɩ yɩ ka kʋ tɩn mʋ. Tiu nɛ sɩlʋ na kʋgɩ tɩn, baá pɛ-sɩ ba kɩ mini nɩ mʋ yɩ sɩ di.

eng: If you remain in me and my words remain in you, ask for whatever you want and it will be done for you.
local: Abam nan na wʋra dɩ amʋ, yɩ amʋ taanɩ dɩm na wʋ á bɩcara nɩ, á wʋ́ wanɩ á loori kʋlʋ maama á wʋbʋŋa na lagɩ tɩn, yɩ á wʋ́ na-kʋ.

eng: My Father is glorified when you produce much fruit and in this way prove that you are my disciples.
local: Abam na kɩ kǝm-laarʋ, nɩ tiu na lǝri bu-ŋʋna zanzan te tɩn, á wʋ́ sɩɩnɩ á taá yɩ amʋ karabiǝ, yɩ kʋntʋ wʋ́ pa a Ko wʋm na zulǝ.

eng: As the Father loved me, I too have loved you. Remain in my love.
local: Nɩnɛɛnɩ a Ko na soe amʋ te tɩn, amʋ dɩ soe abam kʋntʋ mʋ. Taá jɩgɩ-na amʋ sono kʋm á bɩcara nɩ.

eng: If you keep my commandments, you will remain in my love, just as I kept my Fathers commandments and remain in his love.
local: Abam na kɩ a na tagɩ kʋlʋ tɩn, á wʋ́ wanɩ á taá jɩgɩ amʋ sono kʋm kʋntʋ, nɩ amʋ dɩ na kɩ a Ko na tagɩ kʋlʋ yɩ a jɩgɩ o sono kʋm a bɩcarɩ nɩ te tɩn.

eng: I have said these things to you so that my joy will be in you and your joy will be complete.
local: A tagɩ wǝǝnu tɩntʋ a brɩ abam, sɩ wʋpolo kʋlʋ a na jɩgɩ tɩn mʋ taa wʋ abam wʋnɩ, sɩ kʋ pa abam wʋpolo kʋm ja gaalɩ.

eng: This is my commandment: love each other just as I have loved you.
local: Ni dɩlʋ amʋ na lagɩ a pa abam tɩn mʋ tɩntʋ: Á taá soe daanɩ, nɩnɛɛnɩ a na soe abam te tɩn.

eng: No one has greater love than to give up ones life for ones friends.
local: Sono tǝrǝ kʋ na dwe tɩntʋ, sɩ nɔɔnʋ sɛ sɩ o tɩ o donnǝ ŋwaanɩ.

eng: You are my friends if you do what I command you.
local: Abam na kɩ a na tagɩ kʋlʋ tɩn, á wʋ́ ta yɩ a cilonnǝ mʋ.

eng: I dont call you servants any longer, because servants dont know what their master is doing. Instead, I call you friends, because everything I heard from my Father I have made known to you.
local: Amʋ daa bá ta bǝ abam nɩ a tɩntʋŋna. Bɛŋwaanɩ tɩntʋŋnʋ yǝri kʋlʋ o yuutu na lagɩ o kɩ tɩn. Kʋ nan na yɩ abam, a tagɩ kʋlʋ maama a na ni a Ko Wɛ tee nɩ tɩn a brɩ abam. Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ a laan bǝ abam nɩ a cilonnǝ.

eng: You didnt choose me, but I chose you and appointed you so that you could go and produce fruit and so that your fruit could last. As a result, whatever you ask the Father in my name, he will give you.
local: Kʋ nan daɩ abam mʋ kuri amʋ. Kʋ yɩ amʋ mʋ kuri abam, yɩ a daarɩ a pa abam ni sɩ á taá kɩ kǝm-laarʋ. Kǝm-laarʋ tɩm kʋntʋ wʋ́ ta wʋra maŋa maama. Abam na kɩ kǝm-laarʋ tɩm kʋntʋ, a Ko wʋ́ pa abam kʋlʋ maama á na wʋ́ loori o tee nɩ amʋ yɩrɩ ŋwaanɩ tɩn.

eng: I give you these commandments so that you can love each other.
local: Amʋ na pɛ abam ni sɩ á kɩ kʋlʋ tɩn mʋ tɩntʋ: Á taá soe daanɩ.».

eng: If the world hates you, know that it hated me first.
local: Zezi daa ma ta o wɩ: «Lʋgʋ baŋa nɔɔna bam wʋ́ culi abam. Ba nan na culi abam, sɩ á lwarɩ nɩ ba maŋɩ ba da yigǝ ba culi amʋ mʋ.

eng: If you belonged to the world, the world would love you as its own. However, I have chosen you out of the world, and you dont belong to the world. This is why the world hates you.
local: Abam ya na yɩ lʋgʋ baŋa nyɩm, kʋ nɔɔna bam ya wʋ́ ta soe abam, á na yɩ kʋ nyɩm tɩn ŋwaanɩ. Amʋ nan mʋ kuri abam lʋgʋ nɔɔna bam wʋnɩ, yɩ á daa daɩ ba nyɩm. Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ balʋ na yɩ lʋgʋ baŋa nɔɔna tɩn wʋ́ ta culi abam.

eng: Remember what I told you, Servants arent greater than their master. If the world harassed me, it will harass you too. If it kept my word, it will also keep yours.
local: Guli-na a na maŋɩ a ta kʋlʋ a brɩ abam tɩn: Tɩntʋŋnʋ tǝrǝ o na dwe o yuutu. Ba na yaarɩ amʋ tɩn, baá yaarɩ abam dɩ mʋ. Ba nan na sɛ amʋ ni-taanɩ dɩm, baá sɛ abam dɩ ni-taanɩ mʋ.

eng: The world will do all these things to you on account of my name, because it doesnt know the one who sent me.
local: Ba nan wʋ́ kɩ abam tɩntʋ wǝǝnu tɩm maama amʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ, bɛŋwaanɩ ba yǝri wʋlʋ na tʋŋɩ-nɩ tɩn.

eng: If I hadnt come and spoken to the people of this world, they wouldnt be sinners. But now they have no excuse for their sin.
local: Amʋ ya na wʋ tu a ŋɔɔnɩ cɩga a brɩ-ba, lwarɩm ya bá ta wʋ ba yuu nɩ. Lele kʋntʋ ba nan daa bá wanɩ ba ta nɩ ba jɩgɩ bʋra.

eng: Whoever hates me also hates the Father.
local: Wʋlʋ maama na culi amʋ tɩn, kʋntʋ tu culi a Ko wʋm dɩ mʋ.

eng: If I hadnt done works among them that no one else had done, they wouldnt be sinners. But now they have seen and hated both me and my Father.
local: Amʋ kɩ tɩtʋŋ-ŋʋna yalʋ nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ ta na wʋ kɩ ya doŋ tɩn a brɩ-ba. A ya na wʋ kɩ a brɩ-ba, lwarɩm ya bá ta wʋ ba yuu nɩ. Ba nan nɛ a na kɩ kʋlʋ tɩn, yɩ ba ta culi amʋ dɩ a Ko wʋm maama.

eng: This fulfills the word written in their Law, They hated me without a reason.
local: Kʋ nan kɩ sɩ kʋ pa kʋlʋ na pʋpʋnɩ Wɛ cullu tɔnɔ kʋm wʋnɩ tɩn mʋ sɩɩnɩ kʋ kɩ, dɩ kʋ na wɩ: ‹Ba culi amʋ, yɩ a wʋ kɩ kʋlʋkʋlʋ.›.

eng: When the Companion comes, whom I will send from the Father—the Spirit of Truth who proceeds from the Father—he will testify about me.
local: Zǝnnu wʋm nan wʋ́ nuŋi a Ko te o ba. Wʋm mʋ yɩ Wɛ Joro kʋlʋ na yɩ cɩga tu tɩn. A nan wʋ́ tʋŋ-o yɩ o ba abam te, yɩ o laan wʋ́ ŋɔɔnɩ a cɩga kam o brɩ abam.

eng: You will testify too, because you have been with me from the beginning.
local: Abam dɩ nan wʋ́ ŋɔɔnɩ a cɩga kam taanɩ á brɩ nɔɔna, bɛŋwaanɩ abam maŋɩ á wʋra dɩ amʋ pulim nɩ mʋ.».

eng: Six days before Passover, Jesus came to Bethany, home of Lazarus, whom Jesus had raised from the dead.
local: Da yardʋ dɛɛn na daarɩ sɩ kʋ yi Pakɩ candiǝ kam tɩn, Zezi ma vu o yi Betani. Kʋ yɩ dáanɩ mʋ Lazaarɩ zʋʋrɩ da. Wʋntʋ mʋ yɩ nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ Zezi na pɛ o bi o yagɩ tʋʋnɩ tɩn.

eng: Lazarus and his sisters hosted a dinner for him. Martha served and Lazarus was among those who joined him at the table.
local: Ba ma kɩ wʋdiu ba pa-o jǝgǝ kam kʋntʋ nɩ. Marɩtɩ maa wʋra o maŋɩ wʋdiu kʋm. Lazaarɩ ma tɔgɩ o jǝni sɩ o di dɩ Zezi.

eng: Then Mary took an extraordinary amount, almost three-quarters of a pound, of very expensive perfume made of pure nard. She anointed Jesus feet with it, then wiped his feet dry with her hair. The house was filled with the aroma of the perfume.
local: Mari laan ma kwe tralɩ nugǝ kalʋ yɩrɩ na yɩ naadɩ tɩn. Ka dɛɛn yɩ kunkwǝlǝ yi mʋ, yɩ ka tiini ka lana. Nugǝ kam kʋntʋ yǝlo cana zanzan. O ma kwe-ka o ma turi Zezi nɛ. O ma daarɩ o ma o yuuywe o guguni o nɛ sɩm. Tralɩ nugǝ kam lwǝm dɩm ma zaŋɩ sɔŋɔ kʋm maama wʋnɩ.

eng: Judas Iscariot, one of his disciples , complained.
local: Zezi karabiǝ bam dɩdʋa wʋlʋ yɩrɩ na yɩ Zudasɩ Yiskarɩyo tɩn dɩ tɔgɩ o wʋra. Wʋntʋ mʋ yɩ wʋlʋ na wʋ́ ba o yǝgi Zezi o pa nɔɔna tɩn.

eng: This perfume was worth a years wages! Why wasnt it sold and the money given to the poor? .
local: O na nɛ Mari na kɩ te tɩn, o ma ta o wɩ: «Bɛɛ mʋ yɩ o kɩ kʋntʋ? Dɩ́ ya waɩ dɩ́ kwe tralɩ nugǝ kam dɩ́ yǝgi, yɩ dɩ́ cɛ dɩ́ pa yinigǝ tiinǝ. Ka sǝbu kʋm ya wʋ́ yi sǝbu-dala biǝ-yatɔ .».

eng: He said this not because he cared about the poor but because he was a thief. He carried the money bag and would take what was in it.
local: O na tagɩ kʋntʋ tɩn, kʋ daɩ nɩ o jɩgɩ yinigǝ tiinǝ bam ŋwaŋa mʋ. O yɩ ŋwɩɩnʋ mʋ. Wʋntʋ mʋ nii ba kɔgɔ kʋm sǝbu kʋm baŋa nɩ, yɩ o yǝni o ŋɔnɩ-kʋ o lɩa.

eng: Then Jesus said, Leave her alone. This perfume was to be used in preparation for my burial, and this is how she has used it.
local: Zezi laan ma lǝri o wɩ: «Yagɩ o yɩra, sɩ o kɩ kʋntʋ a na wʋ́ tɩ yɩ ba kɩ-nɩ tɩn ŋwaanɩ mʋ.

eng: You will always have the poor among you, but you wont always have me.
local: Kʋ nan na yɩ yinigǝ tiinǝ, bantʋ ta wʋra mʋ dɩ abam maŋa maama. Kʋ daarɩ amʋ nan bá ta wʋra dɩ abam maŋa maama.».

eng: Many Jews learned that he was there. They came not only because of Jesus but also to see Lazarus, whom he had raised from the dead.
local: Zwifǝ kɔgɔ zanzan ma lwarɩ nɩ Zezi wʋ Betani nɩ. Ba ma zaŋɩ ba vu da. Ba na ve tɩn, kʋ daɩ Zezi yɩranɩ ŋwaanɩ, kʋ yɩ sɩ ba dɩ na Lazaarɩ wʋlʋ Zezi na pɛ o bi o yagɩ tʋʋnɩ tɩn mʋ.

eng: The chief priests decided that they would kill Lazarus too.
local: Wɛ kaanɩm yigǝ tiinǝ bam laan ma kɩ ni daanɩ sɩ ba gʋ Lazaarɩ dɩ.

eng: It was because of Lazarus that many of the Jews had deserted them and come to believe in Jesus.
local: bɛŋwaanɩ Lazaarɩ biim dɩm mʋ te Zwifǝ zanzan joori ba yigǝ tiinǝ bam kwaga nɩ, yɩ ba daarɩ ba sɛ Zezi.

eng: The next day the great crowd that had come for the festival heard that Jesus was coming to Jerusalem.
local: Tɩga na pʋʋrɩ tɩn, nɔn-kɔgɔ kʋlʋ na tu Zeruzalɛm sɩ ba di candiǝ kam tɩn ma lwarɩ nɩ Zezi maa bɩɩna.

eng: They took palm branches and went out to meet him. They shouted, Hosanna! Blessings on the one who comes in the name of the Lord! Blessings on the king of Israel.
local: Ba ma vu ba kaarɩ kʋrʋ-vɔɔrʋ, yɩ ba nuŋi ba maa ve sɩ ba jeer-o. Ba na maa ve tɩn, ba maa zul-o ba wɩ: «Ozaana! Zuli-na wʋlʋ na tu dɩ́ Yuutu Baŋa-Wɛ yɩrɩ ŋwaanɩ tɩn. Wʋntʋ mʋ yɩ Yisɩrayɛlɩ dwi tiinǝ pɛ.».

eng: Jesus found a young donkey and sat on it, just as it is written.
local: Zezi ma na bɩna-pɔla o di, nɩ Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm na maŋɩ kʋ ta te tɩn. Kʋ pʋpʋnɩ kʋ wɩ:.

eng: Dont be afraid, Daughter Zion. Look! Your king is coming , sitting on a donkeys colt .
local: «Abam balʋ na zʋʋrɩ Siyɔn tɩʋ kʋm nɩ tɩn, á yɩ taá kwarɩ fʋʋnɩ. Nii-na á pɛ wʋm, o diini bɩna-pɔla o maa bɩɩna.».

eng: His disciples didnt understand these things at first. After he was glorified, they remembered that these things had been written about him and that they had done these things to him.
local: Maŋa kam kʋntʋ nɩ, Zezi karabiǝ bam ya ma wʋ lwarɩ wǝǝnu tɩm kʋntʋ kuri. Kʋ daarɩ maŋa kam Zezi na tɩgɩ yɩ o bi o yagɩ tʋʋnɩ o na paarɩ-zulǝ Wɛ tee nɩ tɩn, mʋ ba laan guli Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm na tagɩ o taanɩ te tɩn, dɩ nɔn-kɔgɔ kʋm na kɩ kʋlʋ ba zul-o tɩn.

eng: The crowd who had been with him when he called Lazarus out of the tomb and raised him from the dead were testifying about him.
local: Nɔɔna balʋ dɛɛn na wʋ Zezi tee nɩ yɩ o pa Lazaarɩ bi o yagɩ tʋʋnɩ tɩn ya maŋɩ ba ta ba brɩ tɩʋ kʋm nɔɔna bam, o na kɩ te o bǝŋi Lazaarɩ yɩ o nuŋi yibeeli dɩm wʋnɩ tɩn.

eng: Thats why the crowd came to meet him, because they had heard about this miraculous sign that he had done.
local: Kʋ yɩ kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ nɔn-kɔgɔ kʋm nuŋi tɩʋ kʋm nɩ ba jeer-o, ba na ni nɩ o kɩ wo-kɩnkagɩlɩ dɩm kʋntʋ tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: Therefore, the Pharisees said to each other, See! Youve accomplished nothing! Look! The whole world is following him.
local: Farizɩan tiinǝ bam laan maa tɛ daanɩ ba wɩ: «Á wʋ nɛ? Dɩbam brɩ dɩ́ bá wanɩ kʋlʋkʋlʋ dɩ́ kɩ. Nii-na lʋgʋ kʋm nɔɔna bam maama mʋ tɔgɩ o kwaga.».

eng: Some Greeks were among those who had come up to worship at the festival.
local: Grɛkɩ tiinǝ balʋ dɛɛn na tɔgɩ ba vu Zeruzalɛm sɩ ba di candiǝ kam ba zuli Wɛ tɩn badaara ma vu Filipi te.

eng: They came to Philip, who was from Bethsaida in Galilee, and made a request: Sir, we want to see Jesus.
local: Wʋntʋ nuŋi Galile tɩʋ kʋlʋ yɩrɩ na yɩ Betisayida tɩn mʋ. Ba ma ta dɩd-o ba wɩ: «Dɩbam lagɩ sɩ dɩ́ na Zezi mʋ.».

eng: Philip told Andrew, and Andrew and Philip told Jesus.
local: Filipi ma vu o ta dɩ Andre. Bantʋ bale ma vu ba ta ba brɩ Zezi.

eng: Jesus replied, The time has come for the Human One to be glorified.
local: Zezi ma ta dɩ ba o wɩ: «Maŋa kam laan yiǝ, sɩ Wɛ pa Nabiin-bu wʋm na paarɩ-zulǝ.

eng: I assure you that unless a grain of wheat falls into the earth and dies, it can only be a single seed. But if it dies, it bears much fruit.
local: A lagɩ a ta cɩga mʋ dɩ abam sɩ, nmʋ na jɩgɩ mɩn-dwi, yɩ n na dugi-dɩ tɩga nɩ, dɩ wʋ́ nuŋi dɩ kɩ biǝ zanzan mʋ. Nmʋ nan na wʋ sɛ sɩ n du-dɩ tɩga nɩ sɩ dɩ puli dɩ nuŋi dɩ daarɩ sɩ mɩn-bu wʋm pɔ, dɩ wʋ́ ta yɩ dɩdwɩ yɩranɩ mʋ taan, n bá na nyɔɔrɩ dɩ baŋa nɩ.

eng: Those who love their lives will lose them, and those who hate their lives in this world will keep them forever.
local: Wʋlʋ na soe o tɩtɩ ŋwɩa tɩn, kʋntʋ tu bá na ŋwɩa Wɛ tee nɩ. Wʋlʋ nan na vɩn o ŋwɩa lʋgʋ kʋntʋ baŋa nɩ tɩn, kʋ tu wʋ́ na ŋwɩa kalʋ na ba ti tɩn Wɛ tee nɩ.

eng: Whoever serves me must follow me. Wherever I am, there my servant will also be. My Father will honor whoever serves me.
local: Wʋlʋ maama na lagɩ sɩ o tʋŋɩ amʋ tɩtʋŋa tɩn, kʋntʋ tu maŋɩ sɩ o tɔgɩ a kwaga mʋ. Kʋntʋ, a na wʋ mɛ tɩn, a tɩntʋŋnʋ wʋm dɩ wʋ́ ta tɔgɩ o wʋra. Wʋlʋ maama na tʋŋɩ amʋ tɩtʋŋa tɩn, amʋ Ko wʋ́ pa o na zulǝ.».

eng: Now I am deeply troubled. What should I say? Father, save me from this time? No, for this is the reason I have come to this time.
local: Zezi ma ta o wɩ: «A wʋ mʋ cɔgɩ zanzan. A nan wʋ́ ta nɩ bɛɛ mʋ? Aá loori a Ko mʋ sɩ o vrɩ-nɩ yaara yantʋ wʋnɩ na? Awo. Kʋ yɩ kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ amʋ maŋɩ a ba sɩ a yaarɩ.

eng: Father, glorify your name! Then a voice came from heaven, I have glorified it, and I will glorify it again.
local: A nan wʋ́ loori a Ko sɩ o pa o yɩrɩ na zulǝ.» Kwǝrǝ laan ma ŋɔɔnɩ wɛyuu nɩ ka wɩ: «A maŋɩ a pa a yɩrɩ na zulǝ, a nan ta wʋ́ pa dɩ na zulǝ.».

eng: The crowd standing there heard and said, Its thunder. Others said, An angel spoke to him.
local: Nɔn-kɔgɔ kʋlʋ na zɩgɩ da tɩn ma ni kwǝrǝ kam, yɩ ba ta ba wɩ, dʋa mʋ mumunǝ. Badaara maa wɩ, kʋ yɩ malɛka mʋ ŋɔɔnɩ dɩd-o.

eng: Jesus replied, This voice wasnt for my benefit but for yours.
local: Zezi ma ta dɩ ba o wɩ: «Kʋ daɩ amʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ kwǝrǝ kantʋ ŋɔɔnɩ, kʋ yɩ abam ŋwaanɩ mʋ ka ŋɔɔna.

eng: Now is the time for judgment of this world. Now this worlds ruler will be thrown out.
local: Maŋa laan yiǝ sɩ Wɛ di nabiinǝ taanɩ, sɩ DƖ zǝli lʋgʋ baŋa pɛ wʋm.

eng: When I am lifted up from the earth, I will draw everyone to me. .
local: Kʋ daarɩ kʋ na yɩ amʋ, maŋa kalʋ ba na wʋ́ zǝŋi amʋ wɛɛnɩ tɩn, amʋ wʋ́ pa nabiinǝ maama ba amʋ te.».

eng: He said this to show how he was going to die.
local: O na tagɩ kʋntʋ tɩn, o brɩ o na lagɩ o tɩ tʋʋnɩ dwi dɩlʋ tɩn mʋ.

eng: The crowd responded, We have heard from the Law that the Christ remains forever. How can you say that the Human One must be lifted up? Who is this Human One.
local: Nɔn-kɔgɔ kʋm ma lǝr-o kʋ wɩ: «Dɩbam ni nɩ kʋ pʋpʋnɩ Wɛ cullu tɔnɔ wʋnɩ kʋ wɩ, Krisi wʋm Wɛ na tʋŋɩ tɩn maŋɩ sɩ o taa ŋwɩ mʋ maŋa maama. Bɛɛ nan mʋ yɩ n ta n wɩ, ba maŋɩ sɩ ba zǝŋi Nabiin-bu wʋm wɛɛnɩ? Nabiin-bu wʋntʋ nan yɩ wɔɔ?».

eng: Jesus replied, The light is with you for only a little while. Walk while you have the light so that darkness doesnt overtake you. Those who walk in the darkness dont know where they are going.
local: Zezi ma lǝri-ba o wɩ: «Pooni bá tiini dɩ daanɩ abam tee nɩ. Pooni dɩm ta na wʋ á tee nɩ maŋa kalʋ tɩn, sɩ á taá veǝ, sɩ lim yɩ ba dɩ yi abam. Wʋlʋ na ve lim wʋnɩ tɩn yǝri o na ve mɛ.

eng: As long as you have the light, believe in the light so that you might become people whose lives are determined by the light. After Jesus said these things, he went away and hid from them.
local: Pooni dɩm ta na wʋ á tee nɩ tɩn, á nan sɛ wʋlʋ na yɩ pooni dɩm tɩn, sɩ á daarɩ á taá yɩ pooni dɩm biǝ.» Zezi na tagɩ kʋntʋ o ti tɩn, o ma nuŋi ba tɩtarɩ nɩ o vu o sǝgi.

eng: Jesus had done many miraculous signs before the people, but they didnt believe in him.
local: Dɩ o na maŋɩ o kɩ wo-kɩnkagɩla zanzan ba yibiyǝ nɩ tɩn, ba daa ta wʋ sɛ-o.

eng: This was to fulfill the word of the prophet Isaiah: Lord, who has believed through our message? To whom is the arm of the Lord fully revealed?.
local: Kʋntʋ ma pa kʋlʋ Wɛ nijoŋnu Ezayi dɛɛn na tagɩ tɩn sɩɩnɩ kʋ kɩ. O dɛɛn tagɩ faŋa faŋa o wɩ: «Yuutu Baŋa-Wɛ, nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ wʋ sɛ dɩ́ na tagɩ taanɩ dɩlʋ dɩ́ brɩ-ba tɩn. Nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ nan wʋ lwarɩ dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm dam dɩm na yɩ te tɩn.».

eng: Isaiah explains why they couldnt believe.
local: Ba wʋ wanɩ ba sɛ Zezi taanɩ dɩm, bɛŋwaanɩ Ezayi ta tagɩ o wɩ:.

eng: He made their eyes blind and closed their minds so that they might not see with their eyes, understand with their minds, and turn their lives around— and I would heal them.
local: «Dɩntʋ mʋ dwe ba yiǝ, yɩ DƖ pa ba wʋbʋŋa tɩ, sɩ ba yiǝ yam yɩ wanɩ ya taa naɩ, sɩ ba wʋbʋŋa yam dɩ yɩ wanɩ ya lwarɩ Wɛ taanɩ dɩm kuri, sɩ ba yɩ lǝni ba wʋbʋŋa ba sɛ Wɛ sɩ DƖ pa ba na yazurǝ.».

eng: Isaiah said these things because he saw Jesus glory; he spoke about Jesus.
local: Ezayi dɛɛn tagɩ dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm taanɩ kʋntʋ, bɛŋwaanɩ o wuuri o na Zezi paarɩ-zulǝ na yɩ te yɩ o daa ta wʋ tu lʋgʋ baŋa.

eng: Even so, many leaders believed in him, but they wouldnt acknowledge their faith because they feared that the Pharisees would expel them from the synagogue.
local: Dɩ kʋntʋ dɩ, Zwifǝ yigǝ tiinǝ zanzan dɩ ta kɩ ba wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Zezi. Ba na kwarɩ Farizɩan tiinǝ bam tɩn ŋwaanɩ mʋ, ba wʋ ŋɔɔnɩ-kʋ jaja, sɩ baá zǝli-ba ba Wɛ-digǝ kam nɩ.

eng: They believed, but they loved human praise more than Gods glory.
local: Ba na kɩ te tɩn brɩ nɩ ba soe sɩ nabiinǝ wʋrʋ poli dɩ ba kʋ dwe Wɛ wʋ na poli dɩ ba.

eng: Jesus shouted, Whoever believes in me doesnt believe in me but in the one who sent me.
local: Zezi ma ta dɩ kwǝr-dɩa o wɩ: «Wʋlʋ na kɩ o wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ amʋ tɩn, kʋ daɩ nɩ o sɛ amʋ yɩranɩ mʋ, kʋ yɩ wʋlʋ na tʋŋɩ-nɩ tɩn mʋ o sɛ.

eng: Whoever sees me sees the one who sent me.
local: Wʋlʋ na nɛ amʋ tɩn nɛ wʋlʋ na tʋŋɩ-nɩ tɩn dɩ mʋ.

eng: I have come as a light into the world so that everyone who believes in me wont live in darkness.
local: Amʋ tu lʋgʋ baŋa sɩ a taa yɩ pooni mʋ a paɩ nabiinǝ, sɩ wʋlʋ maama na sɛ amʋ tɩn daa yɩ maŋɩ lim wʋnɩ.

eng: If people hear my words and dont keep them, I dont judge them. I didnt come to judge the world but to save it.
local: Wʋlʋ na ni a taanɩ dɩm yɩ o wʋ sɛ sɩ o kɩ kʋlʋ a na tagɩ tɩn, kʋ daɩ amʋ mʋ cɔgɩ kʋntʋ tu, bɛŋwaanɩ amʋ na tu lʋgʋ baŋa tɩn, kʋ daɩ sɩ a di nabiinǝ taanɩ sɩ a cɔgɩ-ba. Kʋ nan yɩ sɩ a vrɩ-ba ba lwarɩm wʋnɩ mʋ.

eng: Whoever rejects me and doesnt receive my words will be judged at the last day by the word I have spoken.
local: Wʋlʋ na vɩn amʋ yɩ o wʋ sɛ a taanɩ dɩm tɩn, mʋ kʋlʋ na wʋ́ cɔg-o: Taanɩ dɩlʋ amʋ na ŋɔɔnɩ a brɩ nɔɔna tɩn mʋ wʋ́ zaŋɩ lʋgʋ tiim dɛ dɩm nɩ dɩ brɩ nɩ kʋntʋ tu ba jɩgɩ bʋra.

eng: I dont speak on my own, but the Father who sent me commanded me regarding what I should speak and say.
local: Kʋ nan daɩ a tɩtɩ wʋbʋŋa mʋ a ŋɔɔna. Kʋ yɩ a Ko wʋlʋ na tʋŋɩ-nɩ tɩn mʋ pɛ-nɩ ni sɩ a ta kʋlʋ DƖ wʋbʋŋa na lagɩ tɩn, yɩ DƖ ta brɩ-nɩ kʋlʋ a na wʋ́ ŋɔɔnɩ tɩn.

eng: I know that his commandment is eternal life. Therefore, whatever I say is just as the Father has said to me.
local: Amʋ nan ye sɩ balʋ na sɛ ni dɩlʋ a Ko Wɛ na pɛ-nɩ sɩ a ŋɔɔnɩ tɩn wʋ́ na ŋwɩa kalʋ na ba ti tɩn. A na yǝni a ŋɔɔnɩ te maama tɩn, kʋ yɩ a Ko Wɛ na tagɩ kʋlʋ o brɩ-nɩ tɩn mʋ.».

eng: When Jesus finished saying these things, he looked up to heaven and said, Father, the time has come. Glorify your Son, so that the Son can glorify you.
local: Zezi na tagɩ taanɩ dɩm kʋntʋ o ti tɩn, o ma kwǝni o yuu wɛɛnɩ yɩ o wɩ: «Amʋ Ko, a tʋʋnɩ maŋa kam laan yiǝ. Amʋ yɩ nmʋ Bu mʋ. Nan pa a na zulǝ, sɩ amʋ dɩ wʋ́ pa n na zulǝ.

eng: You gave him authority over everyone so that he could give eternal life to everyone you gave him.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ nmʋ pɛ-nɩ dam nabiinǝ maama baŋa nɩ, sɩ a wanɩ a pa balʋ maama nmʋ na pɛ-nɩ tɩn na ŋwɩa kalʋ na ba ti tɩn.

eng: This is eternal life: to know you, the only true God, and Jesus Christ whom you sent.
local: Ŋwɩa kalʋ na ba ti tɩn mʋ yɩ sɩ nabiinǝ wanɩ ba lwarɩ nmʋ wʋlʋ yɩranɩ na yɩ Cɩga Tu Baŋa-Wɛ tɩn, sɩ ba daarɩ ba taa ye amʋ Zezi Krisi wʋlʋ nmʋ na tʋŋɩ tɩn.

eng: I have glorified you on earth by finishing the work you gave me to do.
local: A pɛ nɔɔna lwarɩ nmʋ zulǝ yam lʋgʋ baŋa nɩ. A ti tɩtʋŋɩ dɩm nmʋ na pɛ-nɩ sɩ a tʋŋɩ tɩn.

eng: Now, Father, glorify me in your presence with the glory I shared with you before the world was created.
local: Amʋ Ko, pa a na paarɩ-zulǝ nmʋ tee nɩ lele kʋntʋ, paarɩ-zulǝ yalʋ a na maŋɩ a jɩgɩ dɩ nmʋ kʋ loori lʋgʋ baŋa ta na wʋ kɩ tɩn.

eng: I have revealed your name to the people you gave me from this world. They were yours and you gave them to me, and they have kept your word.
local: Amʋ pɛ nɔɔna balʋ nmʋ na kuri lʋgʋ baŋa nɔɔna bam wʋnɩ n kɩ amʋ jɩŋa nɩ tɩn lwarɩ nmʋ na yɩ wʋlʋ. Bantʋ yɩ nmʋ nyɩm mʋ, yɩ n kwe-ba n kɩ amʋ jɩŋa nɩ. Ba nan sɛ nmʋ ni-taanɩ dɩm.

eng: Now they know that everything you have given me comes from you.
local: Lele kʋntʋ ba lwarɩ nɩ, kʋlʋ maama nmʋ na pɛ amʋ tɩn nuŋi nmʋ te mʋ.

eng: This is because I gave them the words that you gave me, and they received them. They truly understood that I came from you, and they believed that you sent me.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ kwǝrǝ kalʋ nmʋ na pɛ amʋ tɩn mʋ a pɛ-ba, yɩ ba sɛ. Ba nan lwarɩ lanyɩranɩ nɩ amʋ nuŋi nmʋ te mʋ, yɩ ba ta sɛ nɩ nmʋ tʋŋɩ-nɩ.

eng: Im praying for them. Im not praying for the world but for those you gave me, because they are yours.
local: A nan loori nmʋ bantʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ, sɩ a ba loori nmʋ lʋgʋ baŋa nɔɔna bam ŋwaanɩ. Kʋ yɩ nɔɔna balʋ nmʋ na kɩ a jɩŋa nɩ tɩn ŋwaanɩ mʋ, bɛŋwaanɩ bantʋ yɩ nmʋ nyɩm mʋ.

eng: Everything that is mine is yours and everything that is yours is mine; I have been glorified in them.
local: Woŋo kʋlʋ maama a na jɩgɩ tɩn yɩ nmʋ nyɩm mʋ, yɩ nmʋ dɩ na jɩgɩ woŋo kʋlʋ maama tɩn yɩ amʋ nyɩm. Nɔɔna balʋ na yɩ nmʋ nyɩm yɩ n kɩ-ba amʋ jɩŋa nɩ tɩn mʋ pɛ a na zulǝ.

eng: Im no longer in the world, but they are in the world, even as Im coming to you. Holy Father, watch over them in your name, the name you gave me, that they will be one just as we are one.
local: Amʋ daa bá ta wʋ lʋgʋ baŋa nɩ, bantʋ nan ta wʋra mʋ. A maa bɩɩnɩ nmʋ te mʋ. Amʋ Ko, Wʋ-poŋo Tu Baŋa-Wɛ, maɩ nmʋ yɩrɩ dam dɩm n ta n maɩ n nii n nɔɔna bam baŋa nɩ, yɩrɩ dɩlʋ nmʋ na pɛ amʋ tɩn, sɩ kʋ pa ba taa yɩ woŋo dɩdʋa, nɩ nmʋ dɩ amʋ na yɩ dɩdʋa te tɩn.

eng: When I was with them, I watched over them in your name, the name you gave to me, and I kept them safe. None of them were lost, except the one who was destined for destruction, so that scripture would be fulfilled.
local: A na wʋra dɩ ba maŋa kalʋ tɩn, nmʋ yɩrɩ dam dɩm n na pɛ-nɩ tɩn mʋ a mɛ a nii ba baŋa nɩ, a ma cɩ-ba yɩ ba wʋlʋwʋlʋ wʋ je, kʋ na daɩ wʋlʋ wʋm na maŋɩ sɩ o cɔgɩ tɩn yɩranɩ. Nmʋ tɔnɔ kʋm brɩ nɩ wʋntʋ maŋɩ sɩ o cɔgɩ mʋ.

eng: Now Im coming to you and I say these things while Im in the world so that they can share completely in my joy.
local: Lele kʋntʋ amʋ maa bɩɩnɩ nmʋ te, a nan tagɩ wǝǝnu tɩntʋ lʋgʋ baŋa nɩ mʋ, sɩ kʋ pa nmʋ nɔɔna bam taa jɩgɩ amʋ wʋpolo kʋm doŋ ba wʋnɩ, sɩ ba taa jɩgɩ wʋpolo kʋ gaalɩ.

eng: I gave your word to them and the world hated them, because they dont belong to this world, just as I dont belong to this world.
local: A ma pa-ba nmʋ taanɩ dɩm. Balʋ kugu je na wʋ lʋgʋ baŋa nɩ tɩn ma culi-ba, ba na daɩ lʋgʋ baŋa nyɩm tɩn ŋwaanɩ, nɩ amʋ dɩ na daɩ lʋgʋ baŋa nyɩm te tɩn.

eng: Im not asking that you take them out of this world but that you keep them safe from the evil one.
local: Kʋ nan daɩ nɩ a loori nmʋ sɩ n lɩ-ba lʋgʋ baŋa nɩ. A loori nmʋ sɩ n cɩ-ba sʋtaanɩ na yɩ wo-lwaanʋ tu tɩn jɩŋa nɩ mʋ.

eng: They dont belong to this world, just as I dont belong to this world.
local: Ba daɩ lʋgʋ baŋa nyɩm, nɩ amʋ dɩ na daɩ lʋgʋ baŋa nyɩm te tɩn.

eng: Make them holy in the truth; your word is truth.
local: Fɔgɩ n kwɛ-ba dɩ n cɩga kam sɩ ba taa yɩ nmʋ nyɩm. Nmʋ taanɩ dɩm yɩ cɩga mʋ.

eng: As you sent me into the world, so I have sent them into the world.
local: Amʋ tʋŋɩ-ba lʋgʋ wʋnɩ, nɩ nmʋ dɩ na tʋŋɩ amʋ lʋgʋ baŋa nɩ te tɩn mʋ.

eng: I made myself holy on their behalf so that they also would be made holy in the truth.
local: Kʋ nan yɩ bantʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ a kwe a tɩtɩ a kɩ nmʋ jɩŋa nɩ, sɩ kʋ pa bantʋ dɩ wanɩ ba taa yɩ nmʋ nyɩm cɩga cɩga.

eng: Im not praying only for them but also for those who believe in me because of their word.
local: A nan ba loori nmʋ a paɩ bantʋ yɩranɩ má, kʋ yɩ balʋ dɩ na wʋ́ ba ba kɩ ba wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ amʋ bantʋ taanɩ dɩm ŋwaanɩ tɩn dɩ mʋ.

eng: I pray they will be one, Father, just as you are in me and I am in you. I pray that they also will be in us, so that the world will believe that you sent me.
local: A nan loori nmʋ, sɩ kʋ pa ba maama taa yɩ woŋo dɩdʋa mʋ. Amʋ Ko, nmʋ ŋwɩ amʋ wʋnɩ, yɩ amʋ dɩ ŋwɩ nmʋ wʋnɩ. Nan pa bantʋ dɩ taa ŋwɩ dɩ dɩbam kʋntʋ doŋ, sɩ ba taa yɩ woŋo dɩdʋa, sɩ kʋ pa lʋgʋ baŋa nɔɔna sɛ nɩ nmʋ tʋŋɩ-nɩ.

eng: Ive given them the glory that you gave me so that they can be one just as we are one.
local: A pɛ-ba zulǝ yalʋ nmʋ na pɛ amʋ tɩn, sɩ ba wanɩ ba taa yɩ woŋo dɩdʋa, nɩ amʋ dɩ nmʋ na yɩ dɩdʋa te tɩn.

eng: Im in them and you are in me so that they will be made perfectly one. Then the world will know that you sent me and that you have loved them just as you loved me.
local: Amʋ ŋwɩ ba wʋnɩ yɩ nmʋ ŋwɩ amʋ wʋnɩ, sɩ kʋ pa ba sɩɩnɩ ba taa yɩ woŋo dɩdʋa, sɩ lʋgʋ baŋa nɔɔna wanɩ ba lwarɩ nɩ nmʋ mʋ tʋŋɩ-nɩ, yɩ nmʋ soe nmʋ nɔɔna bam, nɩnɛɛnɩ nmʋ na soe amʋ te tɩn.

eng: Father, I want those you gave me to be with me where I am. Then they can see my glory, which you gave me because you loved me before the creation of the world.
local: Amʋ Ko, a lagɩ sɩ balʋ nmʋ na kɩ a jɩŋa nɩ tɩn taa tɔgɩ ba wʋ amʋ na wʋ mɛ tɩn, sɩ kʋ pa ba na amʋ paarɩ-zulǝ yalʋ nmʋ na pɛ-nɩ tɩn. Bɛŋwaanɩ nmʋ maŋɩ n soe amʋ kʋ loori lʋgʋ baŋa daa ta na wʋ kɩ tɩn.

eng: Righteous Father, even the world didnt know you, but Ive known you, and these believers know that you sent me.
local: Amʋ Ko, nmʋ yɩ Cɩga Tu. Lʋgʋ kʋm nɔɔna bam nan yǝri nmʋ. A nan ye nmʋ, yɩ a nɔɔna bam dɩ ye nɩ nmʋ tʋŋɩ-nɩ.

eng: Ive made your name known to them and will continue to make it known so that your love for me will be in them, and I myself will be in them.
local: Amʋ nan pɛ ba lwarɩ nmʋ na yɩ wʋlʋ tɩn, yɩ a daa ta wʋ́ pa ba lwarɩ nmʋ, sɩ kʋ pa sono kʋlʋ nmʋ na jɩgɩ amʋ ŋwaanɩ tɩn taa wʋ ba wʋnɩ, sɩ amʋ tɩtɩ taa ŋwɩ ba wʋnɩ.».

eng: After he said these things, Jesus went out with his disciples and crossed over to the other side of the Kidron Valley. He and his disciples entered a garden there.
local: Zezi dɛɛn na tagɩ wǝǝnu tɩm kʋntʋ o ti tɩn, o dɩ o karabiǝ bam ma zaŋɩ ba nuŋi ba kɛ. Ba ma vu ba bɛ nabara kalʋ yɩrɩ na yɩ Sɩdrɔn tɩn. Gaarɩ maa wʋ jǝgǝ kam kʋntʋ nɩ. Ba ma vu ba zʋ dɩ wʋ.

eng: Judas, his betrayer, also knew the place because Jesus often gathered there with his disciples.
local: Zezi dɩ o karabiǝ bam dɛɛn yǝni ba jeeri daanɩ gaarɩ dɩm kʋntʋ nɩ mʋ. Kʋntʋ mʋ pɛ Zudasɩ wʋlʋ na lagɩ o yǝgi Zezi o pa tɩn dɩ ye ka jǝgǝ.

eng: Judas brought a company of soldiers and some guards from the chief priests and Pharisees. They came there carrying lanterns, torches, and weapons.
local: Zudasɩ ma tɔgɩ dɩ pamaŋ-kɔgɔ o vu jǝgǝ kam kʋntʋ. Wɛ kaanɩm yigǝ tiinǝ bam dɩ Farizɩan tiinǝ bam dɩ tʋŋɩ ba nɔɔna sɩ ba tɔgɩ ba vu. Ba ma jɩgɩ ba jara zɩla dɩdaanɩ min-zwǝǝnu dɩ mɔɔla.

eng: Jesus knew everything that was to happen to him, so he went out and asked, Who are you looking for.
local: Zezi nan maŋɩ o ye kʋlʋ maama na lagɩ kʋ kɩ-o tɩn. O ma fɔɔrɩ o twɛ ba te, yɩ o bwe-ba o wɩ: «Wɔɔ mʋ abam laga?».

eng: They answered, Jesus the Nazarene. He said to them, I Am.
local: Ba ma lǝr-o ba wɩ: «Zezi wʋlʋ na yɩ Nazarɛtɩ tu tɩn mʋ dɩ́ laga.» Zezi ma ta o wɩ: «Kʋ yɩ amʋ mʋ kʋntʋ.» Zudasɩ wʋlʋ na yǝg-o o pa tɩn dɩ maa tɔgɩ o zɩgɩ dɩ ba.

eng: When he said, I Am, they shrank back and fell to the ground.
local: Zezi na tagɩ dɩ ba o wɩ wʋm mʋ kʋntʋ tɩn, ba ma titwǝni ba joori kwaga ba tʋ tɩga nɩ.

eng: He asked them again, Who are you looking for? They said, Jesus the Nazarene.
local: O ma joori o bwe-ba o wɩ: «Wɔɔ mʋ abam laga?» Ba ma ta ba wɩ: «Zezi wʋlʋ na yɩ Nazarɛtɩ tu tɩn mʋ dɩ́ laga.».

eng: Jesus answered, I told you, I Am. If you are looking for me, then let these people go.
local: Zezi ma ta dɩ ba o wɩ: «A maŋɩ a ta a brɩ abam nɩ, amʋ mʋ kʋntʋ. Kʋ nan na yɩ amʋ mʋ á laga, sɩ á yagɩ bantʋ sɩ ba viiri.».

eng: This was so that the word he had spoken might be fulfilled: I didnt lose anyone of those whom you gave me.
local: O tagɩ kʋntʋ, sɩ kʋ pa o na maŋɩ o ta taanɩ dɩlʋ tɩn mʋ sɩɩnɩ dɩ kɩ, dɩ o na wɩ: «Amʋ Ko, a wʋ pɛ balʋ maama nmʋ na kɩ a jɩŋa nɩ tɩn dɩ dɩdʋa dɩ je.».

eng: Then Simon Peter, who had a sword, drew it and struck the high priests servant, cutting off his right ear.
local: Simɔn Pɩyɛɛrɩ maa jɩgɩ sʋ-lɔŋɔ. O ma lɩ-kʋ o ma zagɩ Wɛ kaanɩm yuutu wʋm tɩntʋŋnʋ jazɩm zwɛ o go. Tɩntʋŋnʋ wʋm yɩrɩ mʋ Malɩkusi.

eng: Jesus told Peter, Put your sword away! Am I not to drink the cup the Father has given me.
local: Zezi ma ta dɩ Pɩyɛɛrɩ o wɩ: «Joori n sɩn n sʋgʋ kʋm kʋ polo nɩ. Nmʋ bʋŋɩ nɩ a lagɩ sɩ a lu cam dɩlʋ a Ko na pɛ-nɩ tɩn mʋ na?».

eng: Then the company of soldiers, the commander, and the guards from the Jewish leaders took Jesus into custody. They bound him.
local: Pamaŋna bam kɔgɔ kʋm dɩ ba dɩdɛɛrʋ wʋm dɩ Zwifǝ bam nɔɔna bam laan ma ja Zezi ba vɔ.

eng: and led him first to Annas. He was the father-in-law of Caiaphas, the high priest that year. .
local: Ba ma ja-o ba da yigǝ ba vu Annɩ te. O yɩ Kayifu tɩmbaarʋ mʋ. Kayifu mʋ yɩ Wɛ kaanɩm yuutu bɩnɩ dɩm kʋntʋ nɩ.

eng: Caiaphas was the one who had advised the Jewish leaders that it was better for one person to die for the people.
local: Wʋntʋ dɛɛn mʋ ya tagɩ dɩ Zwifǝ bam nɩ kʋ maŋɩ sɩ nɔɔnʋ dɩdʋa mʋ tɩ nɔɔna bam maama ŋwaanɩ.

eng: Simon Peter and another disciple followed Jesus. Because this other disciple was known to the high priest, he went with Jesus into the high priests courtyard.
local: Simɔn Pɩyɛɛrɩ dɩ o doŋ karabu dɩdʋa ma tɔgɩ Zezi kwaga. Karabu wʋm kʋntʋ dɩ Wɛ kaanɩm yuutu wʋm ye daanɩ lanyɩranɩ. O ma tɔgɩ dɩ Zezi o zʋ Wɛ kaanɩm yuutu wʋm sɔŋɔ kʋnkɔlɔ.

eng: However, Peter stood outside near the gate. Then the other disciple came out and spoke to the woman stationed at the gate, and she brought Peter in.
local: Pɩyɛɛrɩ ma maŋɩ mancoŋo ni nɩ o zɩga. Zezi karabu wʋlʋ dɩ Wɛ kaanɩm yuutu wʋm na ye daanɩ tɩn ma joori o nuŋi o ta dɩ bɩsankana kalʋ na nii mancoŋo kʋm ni dɩm baŋa nɩ tɩn, yɩ o daarɩ o ja Pɩyɛɛrɩ o zʋ.

eng: The servant woman stationed at the gate asked Peter, Arent you one of this mans disciples? Im not, he replied.
local: Bɩsankana kam ma bwe Pɩyɛɛrɩ ka wɩ: «Nmʋ tɔgɩ n yɩ Zezi karabu mʋ na?» O ma lǝri o wɩ: «A daɩ o karabu.».

eng: The servants and the guards had made a fire because it was cold. They were standing around it, warming themselves. Peter joined them there, standing by the fire and warming himself.
local: Waarʋ dɛɛn ma wʋra. Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ tɩntʋŋna bam dɩ Zwifǝ yigǝ tiinǝ nɔɔna bam ma dwe mini ba zɩgɩ ba weerǝ. Pɩyɛɛrɩ dɩ ma vu o tɔgɩ o zɩgɩ da o weeri mini dɩm.

eng: Meanwhile, the chief priest questioned Jesus about his disciples and his teaching.
local: Wɛ kaanɩm yuutu wʋm laan ma bwe Zezi o karabiǝ bam laŋa, dɩ o zaasɩm dɩm na yɩ te tɩn.

eng: Jesus answered, Ive spoken openly to the world. Ive always taught in synagogues and in the temple, where all the Jews gather. Ive said nothing in private.
local: Zezi ma lǝr-o o wɩ: «Amʋ yǝni a ŋɔɔnɩ jaja mʋ a brɩ nɔɔna bam maama. A nan yǝni a brɩ nɔɔna bam ba Wɛ-di sɩm nɩ mʋ dɩ Wɛ-di-kamunu kʋm nɩ, mɛ Zwifǝ bam maama na yǝni ba jeeri daanɩ tɩn. A wʋ fɔgɩ a sǝgi a ta kʋlʋkʋlʋ.

eng: Why ask me? Ask those who heard what I told them. They know what I said.
local: Bɛɛ nan mʋ yɩ n bwe amʋ sɩ n nii? Nan bwe balʋ na cǝgi amʋ taanɩ dɩm tɩn n nii a na tagɩ kʋlʋ dɩ ba tɩn, sɩ bantʋ mʋ ye a na tagɩ kʋlʋ tɩn.».

eng: After Jesus spoke, one of the guards standing there slapped Jesus in the face. Is that how you would answer the high priest? he asked.
local: Zezi na tagɩ kʋntʋ tɩn, Zwifǝ yigǝ tiinǝ bam tɩntʋŋnʋ dɩdʋa na zɩgɩ o tɩkǝri nɩ tɩn ma lɔ o pʋpɔŋɔ, yɩ o bwe-o o wɩ: «Bɛɛ mʋ yɩ n ŋɔɔnɩ kʋntʋ doŋ dɩ Wɛ kaanɩm yuutu wʋm?».

eng: Jesus replied, If I speak wrongly, testify about what was wrong. But if I speak correctly, why do you strike me.
local: Zezi ma lǝr-o o wɩ: «A na tagɩ kʋlʋ a cɔgɩ tɩn, sɩ n ta sɩ dɩ́ lwarɩ. Kʋ nan na yɩ cɩga mʋ a taga, bɛɛ mʋ yɩ n magɩ-nɩ?».

eng: Then Annas sent him, bound, to Caiaphas the high priest.
local: Annɩ laan ma pa ba ja-o ba vu Kayifu wʋlʋ na yɩ Wɛ kaanɩm yuutu tɩn te, yɩ ba ta wʋ bwǝl-o.

eng: Meanwhile, Simon Peter was still standing with the guards, warming himself. They asked, Arent you one of his disciples? Peter denied it, saying, Im not.
local: Simɔn Pɩyɛɛrɩ daa ta maa zɩgɩ da o weeri mini dɩm. Ba ma bwe-o ba wɩ: «Nmʋ tɔgɩ n yɩ nɔɔnʋ wʋntʋ karabu mʋ na?» Pɩyɛɛrɩ ma fʋ o wɩ, wʋm daɩ o karabu.

eng: A servant of the high priest, a relative of the one whose ear Peter had cut off, said to him, Didnt I see you in the garden with him.
local: Wɛ kaanɩm yuutu wʋm tɩntʋŋnʋ dɩdʋa, wʋlʋ cʋrʋ Pɩyɛɛrɩ na zagɩ o zwɛ o go tɩn, ma ta dɩd-o o wɩ: «Amʋ wʋ nɛ abam daanɩ gaarɩ dɩm wʋnɩ na?».

eng: Peter denied it again, and immediately a rooster crowed.
local: Pɩyɛɛrɩ daa ta ma fʋ. Cɩbwɩʋ ma da kʋ keeri.

eng: The Jewish leaders led Jesus from Caiaphas to the Roman governors palace. It was early in the morning. So that they could eat the Passover, the Jewish leaders wouldnt enter the palace; entering the palace would have made them ritually impure.
local: Ba laan ma ja Zezi ba nuŋi Kayifu sɔŋɔ nɩ ba vu Rom gʋvɩrma tu wʋm sɔŋɔ. Kʋ dɛɛn yɩ tɩtɩɩtɩ mʋ. Zwifǝ bam ma wʋ dɛ ba zʋ sɔŋɔ kʋm wʋ ba cullu tɩm ŋwaanɩ. Ba maŋɩ sɩ ba cɩ ba tɩtɩ dɩ digiru sɩ ba wanɩ ba na cwǝŋǝ ba di Pakɩ candiǝ kam.

eng: So Pilate went out to them and asked, What charge do you bring against this man.
local: Gʋvɩrma tu Pilatɩ ma nuŋi ba te, yɩ o bwe-ba o wɩ: «Bɛɛ mʋ yɩ abam saŋɩ nɔɔnʋ wʋntʋ?».

eng: They answered, If he had done nothing wrong, we wouldnt have handed him over to you.
local: Ba ma lǝr-o ba wɩ: «Nɔɔnʋ wʋntʋ ya na wʋ kɩ o cɔgɩ, dɩ́ ya bá ja-o dɩ́ ba nmʋ te.».

eng: Pilate responded, Take him yourselves and judge him according to your Law. The Jewish leaders replied, The Law doesnt allow us to kill anyone. .
local: Pilatɩ ma ta dɩ ba o wɩ: «Abam tɩtɩ nan joŋ-o sɩ á di o taanɩ, sɩ kʋ tɔgɩ abam cullu tɩm na yɩ te tɩn.» Zwifǝ bam ma lǝri ba wɩ: «Dɩbam ba jɩgɩ cwǝŋǝ sɩ dɩ́ gʋ nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ.».

eng: This was so that Jesus word might be fulfilled when he indicated how he was going to die.
local: Kʋntʋ nan kɩ sɩ kʋ pa Zezi na tagɩ kʋlʋ tɩn mʋ sɩɩnɩ kʋ kɩ, dɩ o na tagɩ nɩ oó tɩ tʋʋnɩ dɩlʋ dwi tɩn.

eng: Pilate went back into the palace. He summoned Jesus and asked, Are you the king of the Jews.
local: Pilatɩ laan ma joori o zʋ sɔŋɔ kʋm wʋ o bǝŋi Zezi, yɩ o bwe-o o wɩ: «Nmʋ yɩ Zwifǝ bam pɛ mʋ na?».

eng: Jesus answered, Do you say this on your own or have others spoken to you about me.
local: Zezi ma bwe-o o wɩ: «Nmʋ na tagɩ kʋntʋ tɩn, kʋ yɩ nmʋ tɩtɩ wʋbʋŋa taanɩ mʋ naa nɔɔna mʋ tagɩ a taanɩ dɩ nmʋ?».

eng: Pilate responded, Im not a Jew, am I? Your nation and its chief priests handed you over to me. What have you done.
local: O ma lǝri o wɩ: «Amʋ daɩ Zwifu. Kʋ yɩ nmʋ tɩtɩ dwi tiinǝ dɩ ba kaanɩm yigǝ tiinǝ bam mʋ jaanɩ nmʋ ba ba ba kɩ amʋ jɩŋa nɩ. Kɔɔ mʋ n kɩa?».

eng: Jesus replied, My kingdom doesnt originate from this world. If it did, my guards would fight so that I wouldnt have been arrested by the Jewish leaders. My kingdom isnt from here.
local: Zezi ma lǝri o wɩ: «Amʋ paarɩ dɩm wʋ nuŋi lʋgʋ baŋa, sɩ dɩ ya na yɩ lʋgʋ baŋa nyɩm, a nɔɔna bam ya wʋ́ kɩ jara sɩ ba cɩ sɩ Zwifǝ bam yɩ wanɩ ba ja amʋ. Kʋ nan na yɩ te tɩn, amʋ paarɩ dɩm daɩ lʋgʋ baŋa nyɩm.».

eng: So you are a king? Pilate said. Jesus answered, You say that I am a king. I was born and came into the world for this reason: to testify to the truth. Whoever accepts the truth listens to my voice.
local: Pilatɩ ma bwe-o o wɩ: «Kʋntʋ, nmʋ za yɩ pɛ mʋ na?» Zezi ma lǝri o wɩ: «Nmʋ tɩtɩ mʋ tagɩ n wɩ, a yɩ pɛ. A tu sɩ a ŋɔɔnɩ cɩga mʋ a brɩ nɔɔna lʋgʋ baŋa nɩ. Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ ba lʋgɩ amʋ. Wʋlʋ maama na yɩ cɩga nɔɔnʋ tɩn mʋ cǝgi amʋ taanɩ.».

eng: What is truth? Pilate asked. After Pilate said this, he returned to the Jewish leaders and said, I find no grounds for any charge against him.
local: O ma ta dɩd-o o wɩ: «Bɛɛn yɩ cɩga?» Pilatɩ na tagɩ kʋntʋ tɩn, o laan ma joori o nuŋi pooni o ta dɩ Zwifǝ bam o wɩ: «Amʋ wʋ nɛ o na kɩ kʋlʋ o cɔgɩ tɩn sɩ a di o taanɩ.

eng: You have a custom that I release one prisoner for you at Passover. Do you want me to release for you the king of the Jews.
local: Abam nan yǝni á jɩgɩ mɩʋ kʋdoŋ: Pakɩ candiǝ kam maŋa nɩ, amʋ yǝni a lɩ abam pɩɩnʋ dɩdʋa mʋ a yagɩ yɩ o viiri. Abam nan lagɩ sɩ a yagɩ Zwifǝ bam pɛ wʋm mʋ na?».

eng: They shouted, Not this man! Give us Barabbas.
local: Ba ma kaasɩ dɩ kwǝr-dɩa ba wɩ: «Kʋ daɩ wʋntʋ, kʋ yɩ Barabasɩ mʋ dɩ́ laga sɩ n yagɩ.» Barabasɩ ya yɩ nɔn-vɩrnʋ mʋ.

eng: Then Pilate had Jesus taken and whipped.
local: Pilatɩ laan ma pa ba ja Zezi ba magɩ dɩ balaara.

eng: The soldiers twisted together a crown of thorns and put it on his head, and dressed him in a purple robe.
local: Pamaŋna bam ma kɩ sabarɩ ba ma sɔ yipugǝ ba pu o yuu nɩ. Ba ma kwe gwar-sʋŋʋ ba zʋ-o, yɩ ba mwan-o.

eng: Over and over they went up to him and said, Greetings, king of the Jews! And they slapped him in the face.
local: Ba maa ve o te, yɩ ba tɛ dɩd-o ba wɩ: «Zwifǝ bam pɛ, dɩnle», yɩ ba lɔɛ o pʋpwaanʋ.

eng: Pilate came out of the palace again and said to the Jewish leaders, Look! Im bringing him out to you to let you know that I find no grounds for a charge against him.
local: Pilatɩ daa ta ma joori o nuŋi pooni, yɩ o ta dɩ kɔgɔ kʋm o wɩ: «Nii-na, aá pa nɔɔnʋ wʋm nuŋi o ba o zɩgɩ abam yigǝ nɩ, sɩ á wanɩ á lwarɩ nɩ amʋ wʋ nɛ o na kɩ kʋlʋ o cɔgɩ tɩn.».

eng: When Jesus came out, wearing the crown of thorns and the purple robe, Pilate said to them, Heres the man.
local: Zezi ma nuŋi dɩ o yuu sabarɩ yipugǝ kam dɩ o gwar-sʋŋʋ kʋm. Pilatɩ ma ta dɩ ba o wɩ: «Nii-na nɔɔnʋ wʋm da.».

eng: When the chief priests and their deputies saw him, they shouted out, Crucify, crucify! Pilate told them, You take him and crucify him. I dont find any grounds for a charge against him.
