eng: So how can they call on someone they dont have faith in? And how can they have faith in someone they havent heard of? And how can they hear without a preacher?.
local: Kʋ nan na yɩ kʋntʋ tɩn, nɔɔna wʋ́ kɩ ta mʋ ba loori zǝnǝ o tee nɩ, yɩ ba wʋ kɩ ba wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩd-o? Ba nan wʋ́ kɩ ta mʋ ba kɩ ba wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩd-o, yɩ ba wʋ ni o kwǝrǝ? Ba nan wʋ́ kɩ ta mʋ ba ni o kwǝrǝ yɩ nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ wʋ tɔɔlɩ-ka o brɩ-ba?.

eng: If you live on the basis of selfishness, you are going to die. But if by the Spirit you put to death the actions of the body, you will live.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ, á na tɔgɩ wo-yɔɔrʋ tɩlʋ nabiinǝ wʋbʋŋa na lagɩ tɩn, tʋʋnɩ wʋ́ ja abam. Kʋ daarɩ, á nan na tɔgɩ Wɛ Joro kʋm dam ŋwaanɩ á cɩ á tɩtɩ dɩ kǝm-balwaarʋ tɩlʋ á fra na zʋʋrɩ tɩn, á wʋ́ na ŋwɩa Wɛ tee nɩ.

eng: And how can they preach unless they are sent? As it is written, How beautiful are the feet of those who announce the good news. .
local: Nɔɔnʋ nan wʋ́ kɩ ta mʋ o vu o tɔɔlɩ Wɛ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam o brɩ-ba dɩ ba na wʋ tʋŋ-o? Kʋ nan pʋpʋnɩ Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm wʋnɩ kʋ wɩ: «Balʋ na beeri ba tɔɔlɩ Wɛ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam ba brɩ nɔɔna tɩn vǝŋǝ jɩgɩ wʋpolo mʋ.».

eng: All who are led by Gods Spirit are Gods sons and daughters.
local: Balʋ maama na paɩ Wɛ Joro kʋm brɩ-ba cwǝŋǝ tɩn yɩ Wɛ biǝ mʋ.

eng: But everyone hasnt obeyed the good news. As Isaiah says, Lord, who has had faith in our message? .
local: Kʋ nan daɩ nɩ nɔɔna maama mʋ sɛ Wɛ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam. Ezayidɛɛn tagɩ o wɩ: «Yuutu Baŋa-Wɛ, wɔɔ mʋ joŋi dɩbam ni-taanɩ dɩm?».

eng: You didnt receive a spirit of slavery to lead you back again into fear, but you received a Spirit that shows you are adopted as his children. With this Spirit, we cry, Abba, Father.
local: Joro kʋlʋ Wɛ na kɩ á bɩcara nɩ tɩn ba paɩ fʋʋnɩ jɩgɩ abam daga nɩ gambɛ te. Wɛ Joro kʋm nan paɩ á yɩ Wɛ biǝ mʋ. Kʋ maa paɩ dɩ́ jɩgɩ cwǝŋǝ sɩ dɩ́ bǝŋi Wɛ nɩ Dɩ́ Ko Baba.

eng: So, faith comes from listening, but its listening by means of Christs message.
local: Kʋntʋ ma brɩ nɩ nɔɔna zwa na ni kʋlʋ tɩn, mʋ ba kɩ ba wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ kʋ. Taanɩ dɩlʋ ba nan na wʋ́ ni tɩn mʋ yɩ Zezi Krisi kwǝrǝ kam.

eng: The same Spirit agrees with our spirit, that we are Gods children.
local: Wɛ Joro kʋm mʋ paɩ dɩbam jwǝǝru tɩm lwarɩ nɩ dɩ́ sɩɩnɩ dɩ́ yɩ Wɛ biǝ mʋ.

eng: But I ask you, didnt they hear it? Definitely! Their voice has gone out into the entire earth, and their message has gone out to the corners of the inhabited world. .
local: Amʋ lagɩ a bwe a nii, Yisɩrayɛlɩ tiinǝ bam wʋ ni Wɛ kwǝrǝ kam mʋ na? Kʋ yɩ cɩga ba ni-ka, nɩ Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm na tagɩ kʋ wɩ: «Ba tɔɔlɩ o kwǝrǝ kam lʋgʋ baŋa je maama, yɩ ba ni-taanɩ jagɩ dɩ yi je maama.».

eng: But if we are children, we are also heirs. We are Gods heirs and fellow heirs with Christ, if we really suffer with him so that we can also be glorified with him.
local: Dɩ́ na yɩ Wɛ biǝ tɩn, dɩ́ wʋ́ ba dɩ́ na wo-laarʋ tɩlʋ maama DƖ na tiŋi sɩ DƖ pa DƖ biǝ bam tɩn. Dɩ́ wʋ́ tɔgɩ dɩ DƖ Bu Zezi Krisi dɩ́ joŋi kʋlʋ maama Wɛ na tiŋi sɩ DƖ pa-o tɩn. Dɩ́ na tɔgɩ dɩ Zezi dɩ́ na yaara, dɩ́ laan wʋ́ ba dɩ́ tɔgɩ dɩd-o dɩ́ na paarɩ zulǝ.

eng: But I ask you again, didnt Israel understand? First, Moses says, I will make you jealous of those who arent a people, of a people without understanding. .
local: Amʋ ta lagɩ a bwe a nii, Yisɩrayɛlɩ tiinǝ bam sɩɩnɩ ba wʋ ni Wɛ taanɩ dɩm kuri mʋ na? Ba niǝ. Dayigǝ tɩn, Wɛ dɛɛn tɔgɩ Moyisiŋwaanɩ mʋ DƖ ta dɩ ba DƖ wɩ: «Amʋ wʋ́ pa abam taá jɩgɩ wʋ-gʋʋ dɩ dwi tiinǝ balʋ na daɩ amʋ nɔɔna tɩn. Amʋ wʋ́ pa abam bana zaŋɩ dɩ nɔɔna balʋ na yǝri kʋlʋkʋlʋ tɩn.».

eng: I believe that the present suffering is nothing compared to the coming glory that is going to be revealed to us.
local: Amʋ ye nɩ dɩ́ na jɩgɩ yaara yalʋ lele tɩn bá wanɩ ya taa maɩ dɩ paarɩ-zulǝ yalʋ dɩ́ na wʋ́ na Wɛ tee nɩ tɩn.

eng: And Isaiah even dares to say, I was found by those who didnt look for me; I revealed myself to those who didnt ask for me. .
local: Kʋntʋ kwaga nɩ Ezayi dɛɛn nɛ baarɩ yɩ o ta o wɩ: «Nɔɔna balʋ ya na ba bʋŋɩ sɩ ba ba ba sɛ amʋ Wɛ tɩn, bantʋ laan mʋ tu ba sɛ amʋ. Amʋ pɛ balʋ na maŋɩ ba wʋ bwe amʋ bwiǝ tɩn mʋ ba ba lwarɩ amʋ.».

eng: The whole creation waits breathless with anticipation for the revelation of Gods sons and daughters.
local: Wɛ na kɩ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ maama tɩn tiini tɩ lagɩ sɩ tɩ na dɛ dɩm Wɛ na wʋ́ ba DƖ brɩ DƖ biǝ bam paarɩ-zulǝ jaja tɩn.

eng: But he says about Israel, All day long I stretched out my hands to a disobedient and contrary people. .
local: Kʋ nan na yɩ Yisɩrayɛlɩ tiinǝ bam, Wɛ tagɩ DƖ wɩ: «Dɛ maama wʋnɩ amʋ te a jɩa sɩ a ma joŋi abam, yɩ á vɩn sɩ á ba amʋ te.».

eng: Im speaking the truth in Christ—Im not lying, as my conscience assures me with the Holy Spirit.
local: Amʋ na yɩ Zezi Krisi nɔɔnʋ tɩn, a ŋɔɔnɩ cɩga mʋ sɩ kʋ daɩ vwan. Wɛ Jorokʋm na wʋ a bɩcarɩ nɩ tɩn mʋ paɩ a ye nɩ kʋ sɩɩnɩ kʋ yɩ cɩga mʋ.

eng: Creation was subjected to frustration, not by its own choice—it was the choice of the one who subjected it—but in the hope.
local: Wǝǝnu tɩlʋ maama Wɛ na kɩ tɩn tu tɩ daa ba jɩgɩ kuri. Kʋ nan daɩ wǝǝnu tɩm tɩtɩ mʋ lagɩ kʋntʋ. Kʋ yɩ Wɛ mʋ pɛ tɩ ji kafɛ, yɩ DƖ nan paɩ tɩ ta jɩgɩ tɩɩna nɩ.

eng: I have great sadness and constant pain in my heart.
local: dɩ a na brɩ nɩ a wʋ tiini kʋ cɔgɩ yɩ a jɩgɩ liǝ maŋa maama amʋ tɩtɩ dwi tiinǝ bam ŋwaanɩ dɩ ba na wʋ sɛ Zezi Krisi tɩn.

eng: that the creation itself will be set free from slavery to decay and brought into the glorious freedom of Gods children.
local: wǝǝnu tɩlʋ maama DƖ na kɩ tɩn wʋ́ ba tɩ na vrɩm, sɩ tɩ daa yɩ cɔgɩ nɩ tɩ zɩm na yǝni tɩ cɔgɩ te tɩn. Wɛ wʋ́ fɔgɩ DƖ kwɛ-tɩ sɩ tɩ laan ba tɩ taa jɩgɩ lam DƖ tee nɩ, sɩ kʋ maŋɩ dɩ DƖ biǝ bam na wʋ́ na paarɩ-zulǝ yalʋ tɩn.

eng: I wish I could be cursed, cut off from Christ if it helped my brothers and sisters, who are my flesh-and-blood relatives.
local: A ya wʋ́ ta lagɩ sɩ Wɛ cɔgɩ amʋ tɩtɩ DƖ daarɩ DƖ pɔɔrɩ-nɩ Zezi Krisi tee nɩ, dɩ kʋ na wʋ́ wanɩ kʋ pa a ko-biǝ Zwifǝ bam na vrɩm.

eng: We know that the whole creation is groaning together and suffering labor pains up until now.
local: Dɩ́ nan ye nɩ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ maama Wɛ na kɩ tɩn jɩgɩ cam mʋ dɩ zɩm maama, nɩ kaanɩ na vri pugǝ yɩ o kʋnɩ te tɩn.

eng: They are Israelites. The adoption as Gods children, the glory, the covenants, the giving of the Law, the worship, and the promises belong to them.
local: Ba yɩ Yisɩrayɛlɩdwi tiinǝ mʋ. Kʋ yɩ bantʋ mʋ Wɛ dɛɛn pɛ ba ji DƖ biǝ, yɩ DƖ pa-ba DƖ paarɩ-zulǝ yam. DƖ ma go ni nɩ DƖ wʋ́ ta wʋra dɩ ba, yɩ DƖ daarɩ DƖ kɩ DƖ cullu tɩm ba jɩŋa nɩ. DƖ ma brɩ-ba ba na maŋɩ sɩ ba taa zuli-DƖ te tɩn. DƖ ma daarɩ DƖ go niǝ dɩ ba.

eng: And its not only the creation. We ourselves who have the Spirit as the first crop of the harvest also groan inside as we wait to be adopted and for our bodies to be set free.
local: Kʋ nan daɩ wǝǝnu tɩm kʋntʋ yɩranɩ, kʋ yɩ dɩ dɩbam balʋ Wɛ na kɩ DƖ Jorokʋm dɩ́ bɩcara nɩ tɩn dɩ mʋ. Kʋntʋ mʋ yɩ Wɛ dayigǝ pɛɛrɩ dɩlʋ na brɩ nɩ dɩ́ wʋ́ ba dɩ́ na DƖ wo-laarʋ tɩm maama. Dɩbam dɩ nan kʋnɩ mʋ, yɩ dɩ́ jɩgɩ tɩɩna dɩ́ cǝgi maŋa kam Wɛ na wʋ́ pa dɩ́ ji DƖ tɩtɩ sɔŋɔ biǝ, sɩ DƖ vrɩ dɩ́ yɩra yam yaara maama wʋnɩ.

eng: The Jewish ancestors are theirs, and the Christ descended from those ancestors. He is the one who rules over all things, who is God, and who is blessed forever. Amen.
local: Ba dwi dɩm kuri nuŋi dɩbam nabaarʋ Abrahamdwi dɩm wʋnɩ mʋ. Ba na lʋgɩ Zezi Krisi lʋgʋ baŋa nɩ tɩn, kʋ yɩ bantʋ dwi dɩm wʋnɩ mʋ ba lʋg-o. Wʋntʋ mʋ yɩ wǝǝnu maama Tu. O maa yɩ Wɛ yɩ o maŋɩ dɩ zulǝ sɩ kʋ taa ve maŋa kalʋ na ba ti tɩn. Amina.

eng: We were saved in hope. If we see what we hope for, that isnt hope. Who hopes for what they already see?.
local: Wɛ na vrɩ dɩbam tɩn mʋ paɩ dɩ́ jɩgɩ tɩɩna nɩ dɩ́ wʋ́ na kʋlʋ DƖ na wʋ́ pa dɩbam tɩn. Dɩ́ ya na maŋɩ dɩ́ na kʋlʋ dɩ́ na jɩgɩ tɩɩna kʋ ŋwaanɩ tɩn, dɩ́ ya daa bá ta jɩgɩ kʋ tɩɩna. Nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ ba ta tɩɩnɩ kʋlʋ o na maŋɩ o na tɩn.

eng: But its not as though Gods word has failed. Not all who are descended from Israel are part of Israel.
local: A nan ba lagɩ a ta nɩ Wɛ na goni DƖ ni sɩ DƖ kɩ kʋlʋ tɩn jigi kafɛ. Bɛŋwaanɩ kʋ daɩ nɩ Yisɩrayɛlɩ dwi tiinǝ bam maama mʋ sɩɩnɩ ba yɩ Yisɩrayɛlɩ tiinǝ cɩga cɩga Wɛ yigǝ nɩ.

eng: But if we hope for what we dont see, we wait for it with patience.
local: Dɩ́ nan ta jɩgɩ tɩɩna sɩ dɩ́ wʋ́ na Wɛ wo-laarʋ tɩlʋ dɩ́ ta na wʋ nɛ tɩn. Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ dɩ́ zuri dɩ́ yɩra dɩ́ cǝgi tɩ maŋa kam.

eng: Not all of Abrahams children are called Abrahams descendants, but instead your descendants will be named through Isaac. .
local: Abraham dwi tiinǝ bam maama nan daɩ o biǝ cɩga cɩga Wɛ yigǝ nɩ. Wɛ dɛɛn tagɩ dɩ Abraham DƖ wɩ: «Nmʋ bu Yizakɩ dwi dɩm yɩranɩ mʋ wʋ́ ta yɩ n dwi tiinǝ cɩga cɩga.».

eng: In the same way, the Spirit comes to help our weakness. We dont know what we should pray, but the Spirit himself pleads our case with unexpressed groans.
local: Wɛ Joro kʋm dɩ nan wǝli dɩbam, dɩ́ na bwǝnǝ tɩn ŋwaanɩ. Dɩbam yǝri dɩ́ na wʋ́ loori Wɛ te sɩ kʋ maŋɩ tɩn. DƖ Joro kʋm nan loori-DƖ kʋ pa dɩbam dɩ ŋwana yalʋ na bá wanɩ ya ta dɩ nabiinǝ bɩtarɩ tɩn.

eng: That means it isnt the natural children who are Gods children, but it is the children from the promise who are counted as descendants.
local: Kʋ brɩ nɩ Wɛ tee nɩ, kʋ daɩ biǝ balʋ maama Abraham na lʋgɩ tɩn mʋ yɩ Wɛ biǝ cɩga cɩga. Kʋ nan yɩ biǝ balʋ Wɛ na goni ni ba ŋwaanɩ tɩn mʋ sɩɩnɩ ba yɩ DƖ biǝ cɩga cɩga.

eng: The one who searches hearts knows how the Spirit thinks, because he pleads for the saints, consistent with Gods will.
local: Wɛ nan ye dɩ́ bɩcara na yɩ te tɩn, yɩ DƖ kwǝri DƖ ye DƖ Joro kʋm dɩ wʋbʋŋa na lagɩ kʋlʋ tɩn, bɛŋwaanɩ Wɛ Joro kʋm tɔgɩ Wɛ wʋbʋŋa na lagɩ te tɩn mʋ, yɩ kʋ loori Wɛ kʋ pa dɩbam balʋ na yɩ DƖ nɔɔna tɩn.

eng: The words in the promise were: A year from now I will return, and Sarah will have a son .
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ Wɛ dɛɛn goni ni DƖ wɩ: «Maŋa kam kʋntʋ na joori ka yi, amʋ wʋ́ joori a ba dɩ Saralʋgɩ bǝkǝrǝ.».

eng: We know that God works all things together for good for the ones who love God, for those who are called according to his purpose.
local: Dɩ́ ye nɩ balʋ na soe Wɛ yɩ DƖ bǝŋi-ba nɩ DƖ na maŋɩ DƖ lɩ wʋbʋŋa te tɩn, DƖ kɩ-ba lanyɩranɩ woŋo maama wʋnɩ.

eng: Not only that, but also Rebecca conceived children with one man, our ancestor Isaac.
local: Kʋ dɛ kʋntʋ mʋ yɩ dɩbam nabaarʋ Yizakɩ kaanɩ Rabɛka dɛɛn ja pugǝ o lʋ yiywa bale.

eng: We know this because God knew them in advance, and he decided in advance that they would be conformed to the image of his Son. That way his Son would be the first of many brothers and sisters.
local: Wɛ dɛɛn maŋɩ DƖ jɩgɩ bantʋ wʋbʋŋa DƖ bɩcarɩ nɩ faŋa faŋa mʋ, yɩ DƖ daarɩ DƖ kuri-ba sɩ ba laan ba ba taa nyɩ nɩ DƖ Bu wʋm na yɩ te tɩn. Kʋntʋ ma wʋ́ pa Wɛ Bu Zezi na nyaana zanzan, balʋ dɩ na yɩ Wɛ biǝ yɩ ba saŋɩ o kwaga tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: When they hadnt been born yet and when they hadnt yet done anything good or bad, it was shown that Gods purpose would continue because it was based on his choice.
local: Maŋa kam Rabɛka ta na wʋ lʋgɩ o biǝ bale bam yɩ ba daa ta yǝri lanyɩranɩ naa balɔrɔ tɩn, Wɛ dɛɛn tagɩ dɩd-o DƖ wɩ: «Nakwɩ wʋm mʋ wʋ́ ta yɩ o nyaanɩ wʋm tɩntʋŋnʋ.» Kʋ kɩ kʋntʋ sɩ Wɛ na kuri-ba daanɩ te tɩn mʋ tɔgɩ DƖ na maŋɩ DƖ lɩ wʋbʋŋa te tɩn. Kʋ brɩ nɩ Wɛ kurim dɩm tɔgɩ DƖ na bǝŋi wʋlʋ sɩ o taa yɩ DƖ nɔɔnʋ tɩn mʋ, sɩ kʋ daɩ nɔɔnʋ wʋm tɩtʋŋa ŋwaanɩ.

eng: Those who God decided in advance would be conformed to his Son, he also called. Those whom he called, he also made righteous. Those whom he made righteous, he also glorified.
local: Wɛ nan na maŋɩ DƖ kuri balʋ tɩn mʋ DƖ bǝŋi sɩ ba taa yɩ DƖ nɔɔna. DƖ na bǝŋi-ba kʋntʋ tɩn, DƖ ma pa ba na cɩga DƖ tee nɩ. Balʋ DƖ na pɛ ba na cɩga kam tɩn mʋ DƖ pɛ ba na paarɩ-zulǝ DƖ tee nɩ.

eng: As it is written, I loved Jacob, but I hated Esau .
local: nɩ kʋ daa ta na pʋpʋnɩ Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm wʋnɩ kʋ wɩ: «Amʋ soe Zakɔbɩ, yɩ a daarɩ a yagɩ Ezayu.».

eng: So what are we going to say about these things? If God is for us, who is against us?.
local: Kʋ na yɩ kʋntʋ tɩn, dɩ́ wʋ́ ta nɩ bɛɛ mʋ? Wɛ na wʋra dɩ dɩbam tɩn, nɔɔnʋ wɔɔ mʋ wʋ́ wanɩ o cɔgɩ dɩbam?.

eng: So what are we going to say? Isnt this unfair on Gods part? Absolutely not!.
local: Dɩ́ nan wʋ́ ta nɩ bɛɛ mʋ? Dɩ́ bá wanɩ dɩ́ ta nɩ Wɛ ba jɩgɩ cɩga dɩ DƖ na kɩ te tɩn.

eng: He didnt spare his own Son but gave him up for us all. Wont he also freely give us all things with him?.
local: Wɛ nan wʋ vɩn sɩ DƖ tɩtɩ Bu wʋm na yaara, yɩ DƖ sɛ DƖ kɩ-o nabiinǝ jɩŋa nɩ sɩ o tɩ dɩbam maama ŋwaanɩ. Wɛ na pɛ dɩbam DƖ Bu wʋm kʋntʋ tɩn, DƖ ta wʋ́ kwe wo-laarʋ maama DƖ pa dɩbam zaanɩ DƖ wǝli da.

eng: He says to Moses, Ill have mercy on whomever I choose to have mercy, and Ill show compassion to whomever I choose to show compassion .
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ Wɛ dɛɛn tagɩ dɩ Moyisi DƖ wɩ: «Amʋ wʋ́ ja nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ ŋwaŋa a na lagɩ tɩn mʋ, yɩ a daarɩ a duri nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ yibwǝnǝ a na lagɩ tɩn.».

eng: Who will bring a charge against Gods elect people? It is God who acquits them.
local: Nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ bá wanɩ o co dɩbam balʋ Wɛ na kuri tɩn DƖ yigǝ nɩ. Bɛŋwaanɩ kʋ yɩ Wɛ tɩtɩ mʋ pɛ dɩ́ na cɩga DƖ tee nɩ.

eng: So then, it doesnt depend on a persons desire or effort. It depends entirely on God, who shows mercy.
local: Kʋntʋ brɩ nɩ kʋ maama tɔgɩ Wɛ na jɩgɩ nɔɔna ŋwaŋa te tɩn mʋ, sɩ kʋ daɩ nabiinǝ wʋbʋŋa na lagɩ kʋlʋ tɩn naa ba tɩtʋŋa na yɩ te tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: Who is going to convict them? It is Christ Jesus who died, even more, who was raised, and who also is at Gods right side. It is Christ Jesus who also pleads our case for us.
local: Nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ bá wanɩ o pa dɩ́ ga bʋra Wɛ tee nɩ. Bɛŋwaanɩ kʋ yɩ Zezi Krisi tɩtɩ mʋ tɩgɩ dɩbam ŋwaanɩ, yɩ o joori o bi o yagɩ tʋʋnɩ o jɩgɩ ŋwɩa Wɛ tee nɩ. O laan maa je Wɛ jazɩm nɩ yɩ o loori Wɛ o pa dɩbam.

eng: Scripture says to Pharaoh, I have put you in this position for this very thing: so I can show my power in you and so that my name can be spread through the entire earth. .
local: Kʋ pʋpʋnɩ Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm wʋnɩ, nɩ Wɛ dɛɛn tagɩ dɩ Ezipipa-farʋ wʋm DƖ wɩ: «Amʋ pɛ n di paarɩ sɩ a wanɩ a tɔgɩ nmʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ a brɩ nɔɔna amʋ dam dɩm na maɩ te tɩn, sɩ kʋ pa nɔɔna taa zǝŋi amʋ yɩrɩ dɩm lʋgʋ baŋa maama nɩ.».

eng: Who will separate us from Christs love? Will we be separated by trouble, or distress, or harassment, or famine, or nakedness, or danger, or sword?.
local: Nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ bá wanɩ o cɔgɩ dɩbam dɩ Zezi Krisi sono kʋm daanɩ. Yaara mʋ wʋ́ wanɩ ya cɔgɩ dɩbam dɩ Zezi Krisi sono kʋm na? Wʋ-cɔgɔ mʋ naa, bɛɛsa mʋ naa, kana mʋ naa, yinigǝ mʋ naa, cam dɩlʋ na wʋ́ ba tɩn mʋ naa, naa tʋʋnɩ mʋ? Awo, tɩ bá wanɩ tɩ cɔgɩ dɩbam dɩ Zezi Krisi sono kʋm daanɩ.

eng: So then, God has mercy on whomever he wants to, but he makes resistant whomever he wants to.
local: Kʋ brɩ nɩ Wɛ duri balʋ ŋwaŋa DƖ na lagɩ tɩn mʋ, yɩ DƖ daarɩ DƖ pa badonnǝ ta kʋ ba wʋrʋ nɩ DƖ na lagɩ te tɩn.

eng: As it is written, We are being put to death all day long for your sake. We are treated like sheep for slaughter. .
local: Kʋ pʋpʋnɩ Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm wʋnɩ kʋ wɩ: «Dɩbam na yɩ nmʋ Wɛ nɔɔna tɩn mʋ paɩ dɩ́ tɔgɩ tʋʋnɩ wʋ dɩ́ kɛ dɛ maama. Ba kwe dɩbam ba ma ji nɩ peeni sɩlʋ ba na jɩgɩ ba ve ba gʋ te tɩn mʋ.».

eng: So you are going to say to me, Then why does he still blame people? Who has ever resisted his will.
local: Abam wʋ dɩdʋa waɩ o bwe amʋ nɩ: «Kʋ na yɩ kʋntʋ, bɛɛ mʋ yɩ Wɛ nan brɩ nɩ nɔɔna kɩ ba cɔgɩ? Nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ nan bá wanɩ o vɩn kʋlʋ Wɛ na lagɩ sɩ o kɩ tɩn.».

eng: But in all these things we win a sweeping victory through the one who loved us.
local: Wɛ nan na soe dɩbam tɩn, DƖ tiini DƖ paɩ dɩbam wɔnɔ wǝǝnu tɩm kʋntʋ maama wʋnɩ.

eng: You are only a human being. Who do you think you are to talk back to God? Does the clay say to the potter, Why did you make me like this? .
local: Nabiinu yɩ wɔɔ mʋ sɩ o wanɩ o magɩ kantɔgɔ dɩ Wɛ? Kʋntʋ tɩn, kamɔgɔ wʋ́ wanɩ kʋ bwe kʋ mɔrʋ wʋm nɩ: «Bɛɛ mʋ yɩ n mɔ-nɩ tɩntʋ doŋ» na?.

eng: Im convinced that nothing can separate us from Gods love in Christ Jesus our Lord: not death or life, not angels or rulers, not present things or future things, not powers.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ amʋ ye lanyɩranɩ nɩ kʋlʋkʋlʋ tǝrǝ kʋ na wʋ́ wanɩ kʋ cɔgɩ dɩbam dɩ Wɛ sono kʋm daanɩ. Kʋ na yɩ tʋʋnɩ naa ŋwɩa, naa kʋ na yɩ malɛsɩ naa wɛyuu tɩlampolo dɩdɛɛra bam maama, naa kʋ na yɩ zɩm wǝǝnu naa jwa wǝǝnu tɩlʋ na bɩɩnɩ tɩn, naa wǝǝnu tɩlʋ maama na jɩgɩ dam nabiinǝ baŋa nɩ tɩn.

eng: Doesnt the potter have the power over the clay to make one pot for special purposes and another for garbage from the same lump of clay?.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ kamɔ-mɔrʋ wʋm jɩgɩ cwǝŋǝ sɩ o kwe dɔgɔ o ma mɔ kamwarʋ tɩlʋ dwi maama o na lagɩ tɩn. O waɩ o cɛ dɔgɔ kʋm kʋntʋ o maa mɔɔnɩ kamɔgɔ sɩ kʋ taa yɩ lʋnnɩ nyɩm, yɩ o daarɩ o mɔɔnɩ kʋdoŋ sɩ kʋ taa yɩ tɩtʋŋa nyɩm.

eng: or height or depth, or any other thing that is created.
local: kʋ na yɩ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ na jɩgɩ dam wɛyuu tɩlampolo nɩ dɩ tɩlʋ na jɩgɩ dam tɩga kuri nɩ tɩn, naa wǝǝnu tɩlʋ maama Wɛ na kɩ tɩn, tɩntʋ maama wʋnɩ kʋlʋkʋlʋ bá wanɩ kʋ cɔgɩ dɩbam dɩ Wɛ sono kʋm daanɩ, bɛŋwaanɩ kʋ yɩ sono kʋlʋ Wɛ na jɩgɩ dɩ dɩbam dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi Krisi ŋwaanɩ tɩn mʋ.

eng: What if God very patiently puts up with pots made for wrath that were designed for destruction, because he wanted to show his wrath and to make his power known?.
local: Kʋ nan yɩ kʋntʋ mʋ dɩ Wɛ. DƖ na lagɩ sɩ DƖ brɩ nɔɔna DƖ ban-zɔŋɔ kʋm dɩ DƖ dam dɩm na maɩ te tɩn, DƖ jɩgɩ cwǝŋǝ sɩ DƖ kɩ kʋntʋ. DƖ nan pɩɩnɩ DƖ banɩ mʋ dɩ balʋ na pɛ DƖ banɩ zaŋɩ yɩ ba maŋɩ dɩ cɔgɩm tɩn.

eng: What if he did this to make the wealth of his glory known toward pots made for mercy, which he prepared in advance for glory?.
local: sɩ DƖ daarɩ DƖ pa nɔɔna balʋ DƖ na jɩgɩ ba ŋwaŋa tɩn tɔgɩ ba na DƖ paarɩ dɩm na tiini dɩ jɩgɩ zulǝ te tɩn. Bantʋ mʋ yɩ balʋ DƖ na maŋɩ DƖ lɩ sɩ ba zʋ DƖ paarɩ zulǝ yam wʋnɩ tɩn.

eng: We are the ones God has called. We dont come only from the Jews but we also come from the Gentiles.
local: Kʋ nan yɩ dɩbam mʋ kʋntʋ. Wɛ mʋ kuri dɩbam nabiinǝ dwi maama wʋnɩ, yɩ kʋ daɩ Zwifǝ dwi dɩm yɩranɩ má wʋnɩ.

eng: As it says also in Hosea, I will call my people those who arent my people, and the one who isnt well loved, I will call loved one. .
local: nɩ kʋ na maŋɩ kʋ pʋpʋnɩ Oze tɔnɔ kʋm wʋnɩ te tɩn. Wɛ dɛɛn tagɩ DƖ wɩ: «Nɔɔna balʋ ya na daɩ amʋ nɔɔna tɩn, mʋ a laan wʋ́ bǝŋi-ba nɩ amʋ nɔɔna. Dwi tiinǝ balʋ amʋ ya na ba soe tɩn, mʋ a laan wʋ́ bǝŋi-ba nɩ amʋ nɔn-sonnu.».

eng: And in the place where it was said to them, You arent my people, there they will be called the living Gods children .
local: «Je sɩlʋ nɩ nɔ́ɔ Wɛ ya na tagɩ dɩ ba DƖ wɩ, ba daɩ DƖ nɔɔna tɩn, kʋ yɩ dáanɩ mʋ ba laan wʋ́ bǝŋi-ba nɩ Ŋwɩa Tu Baŋa-Wɛ biǝ.».

eng: But Isaiah cries out for Israel, Though the number of Israels children will be like the sand of the sea, only a remaining part will be saved, .
local: Ezayidɩ dɛɛn tagɩ Yisɩrayɛlɩtiinǝ bam taanɩ o wɩ: «Yisɩrayɛlɩ tiinǝ bam na maŋɩ ba tiini ba daga nɩ bugǝ ni kasʋllʋ na daga te tɩn, ba fɩnfɩɩn yɩranɩ mʋ wʋ́ na vrɩm.

eng: because the Lord does what he says completely and quickly. .
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ Yuutu Baŋa-Wɛ bá daanɩ sɩ DƖ kɩ kʋlʋ maama DƖ na maŋɩ DƖ lɩ wʋbʋŋa sɩ DƖ kɩ tɩn lʋgʋ baŋa nɩ.».

eng: As Isaiah prophesied, If the Lord of the heavenly forces had not left descendants for us, we would have been like Sodom, and we would have become like Gomorrah. .
local: Kʋ ta yɩ nɩnɛɛnɩ Ezayi na maŋɩ o ta te o wɩ: «Dam-fɔrɔ Tu Baŋa-Wɛ ya na wʋ daarɩ dɩbam biǝ badaara DƖ yagɩ, sɩ kʋ pa dɩ́ dwi dɩm toŋi, dɩ́ ya wʋ́ ti mʋ, nɩ Sodɔmdɩ Gomɔɔrɩ tiinǝ bam dwi dɩm dɛɛn na ti te tɩn.».

eng: So what are we going to say? Gentiles who werent striving for righteousness achieved righteousness, the righteousness that comes from faith.
local: Dɩ́ nan wʋ́ ta nɩ bɛɛ mʋ? Dwi-gɛtiinǝ balʋ ya na ba kwaanɩ sɩ ba na cɩga Wɛ tee nɩ tɩn laan mʋ tu ba na cɩga Wɛ tee nɩ, ba na kɩ ba wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: But though Israel was striving for a Law of righteousness, they didnt arrive.
local: Kʋ daarɩ, Yisɩrayɛlɩ tiinǝ bam na tiini ba kwaanɩ sɩ ba na cɩga Wɛ tee nɩ DƖ cullu tɩm tɔgɩm ŋwaanɩ tɩn, ba wʋ nɛ.

eng: Why? Its because they didnt go for it by faith but they went for it as if it could be reached by doing something. They have tripped over a stumbling block.
local: Bɛɛ mʋ yɩ ba nan wʋ nɛ cɩga Wɛ tee nɩ? Bantʋ ya bʋŋɩ sɩ ba na cɩga ba kǝm-laarʋ tɩm ŋwaanɩ mʋ, yɩ kʋ daɩ nɩ ba kɩ ba wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ. Ba na vɩn sɩ ba sɛ Wɛ kʋntʋ tɩn, kʋ maa nyɩ dɩ ba magɩ ba naga mʋ dɩ kandwɛ dɩlʋ na paɩ nɔɔna tri ba tʋɩ tɩn.

eng: As it is written: Look! Im putting a stumbling block in Zion, which is a rock that offends people. And the one who has faith in him will not be put to shame. .
local: nɩ kʋ na maŋɩ kʋ pʋpʋnɩ Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm wʋnɩ kʋ wɩ: «Nii-na, amʋ Wɛ lagɩ a cwi kandwɛ mʋ Siyɔnnɩ. Dɩ maa yɩ kandwɛ dɩlʋ nɔɔna na wʋ́ magɩ ba tɩtɩ dɩ dɩ ba tʋ tɩga nɩ tɩn. Kʋ daarɩ nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ na kɩ o wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ wʋlʋ na yɩ kandwɛ dɩm kʋntʋ tɩn, cavɩɩra bá fɔgɩ ya ja kʋntʋ tu.».

eng: So I ask you, has God rejected his people? Absolutely not! Im an Israelite, a descendant of Abraham, from the tribe of Benjamin.
local: Kʋntʋ tɩn, amʋ ta lagɩ a bwe a nii, Wɛ vɩn DƖ tɩtɩ nɔɔna Yisɩrayɛlɩtiinǝ bam mʋ na? Aye! Kʋ daɩ kʋntʋ. Amʋ tɩtɩ dɩ yɩ Yisɩrayɛlɩ dwi tu mʋ. A yɩ Abrahamnaa mʋ, yɩ a nuŋi Bɛnzamɛndwi dɩm wʋnɩ.

eng: God hasnt rejected his people, whom he knew in advance. Or dont you know what the scripture says in the case of Elijah, when he pleads with God against Israel?.
local: Wɛ wʋ vɩn DƖ nɔɔna balʋ DƖ na maŋɩ DƖ kuri pulim nɩ tɩn. Abam nan maŋɩ á ye Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm na tagɩ Eli taanɩ te, dɩ o na warɩ Wɛ o ta Yisɩrayɛlɩ tiinǝ bam na kɩ te yɩ kʋ wʋ maŋɩ tɩn.

eng: Lord, they have killed your prophets, and they have torn down your altars. Im the only one left, and they are trying to take my life. .
local: O dɛɛn warɩ Wɛ o wɩ: «Yuutu Baŋa-Wɛ, ba gʋ nmʋ nijoŋnǝ bam maama, yɩ ba daarɩ ba cɔgɩ nmʋ kaanɩm bimbinǝ yam. Kʋ laan daarɩ amʋ yɩranɩ mʋ, yɩ ba kwaanɩ sɩ ba gʋ amʋ dɩ.».

eng: But what is Gods reply to him? I have kept for myself seven thousand people who havent bowed their knees to Baal. .
local: Wɛ nan lǝr-o DƖ wɩ bɛɛ mʋ? DƖ dɛɛn wɩ: «Amʋ lɩ nɔɔna mʋrr-tɩrpɛ mʋ , sɩ ba taa yɩ amʋ tɩtɩ nɔɔna. Bantʋ ta wʋ fɔgɩ ba kuni doonǝ ba zuli Baalɩ.».

eng: So also in the present time there is a remaining group by the choice of Gods grace.
local: Kʋ nan ta yɩ bɩdwɩ mʋ dɩ zɩm maama. Nɔɔna fɩnfɩɩn ta mʋ daarɩ, Wɛ na tɔgɩ DƖ zaanɩ dɩm ŋwaanɩ DƖ kuri-ba tɩn.

eng: But if it is by grace, it isnt by whats done anymore. If it were, Gods grace wouldnt be grace.
local: Wɛ dɛ DƖ zaanɩ dɩm ŋwaanɩ mʋ DƖ kuri-ba, sɩ kʋ daɩ ba tɩtʋŋ-ŋʋna ŋwaanɩ. Kʋ ya na yɩ ba tɩtʋŋ-ŋʋna ŋwaanɩ mʋ Wɛ kuri-ba, kʋ ya daa bá ta yɩ DƖ zaanɩ dɩm DƖ na pɛ-ba tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: So what? Israel didnt find what it was looking for. Those who were chosen found it, but the others were resistant.
local: Kʋ brɩ nɩ Yisɩrayɛlɩ tiinǝ bam wʋ nɛ cɩga kalʋ ba na kwaanɩ sɩ ba na Wɛ tee nɩ tɩn. Nɔɔna balʋ Wɛ na kuri tɩn nan mʋ nɛ-ka. Balʋ na daarɩ tɩn bɩcarɩ digili.

eng: As it is written, God gave them a dull spirit, so that their eyes would not see and their ears not hear, right up until the present day. .
local: Kʋ maa kɩ-ba nɩ kʋ na pʋpʋnɩ te Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm wʋnɩ kʋ wɩ: «Wɛ mʋ pɛ ba wʋbʋŋa tɩ, yɩ ba daa ba ni kʋlʋkʋlʋ kuri. Dɩ zɩm maama, ba yiǝ ta ba naɩ, yɩ ba zwa dɩ kwarɩmɩ dɩ Wɛ cɩga kam.».

eng: And David says, Their table should become a pitfall and a trap, a stumbling block and payback to them for what they have done. .
local: Davididɩ dɛɛn tagɩ ba taanɩ o wɩ: «Wɛ wʋ́ pa ywǝǝni dɩlʋ ba na bʋŋɩ sɩ ba di tɩn pipiri dɩ ji woŋo kʋlʋ na wʋ́ ja-ba kʋ cɔgɩ, nɩ cɩkʋ na jaanɩ-ba te tɩn. Kʋ maa wʋ́ pa Wɛ pa ba na cam yɩ ba tʋ tɩga nɩ.

eng: Their eyes should be darkened so they cant see, and their backs always bent. .
local: Wɛ wʋ́ pa ba yiǝ dwe yɩ ba daa bá ta naɩ. DƖ maa wʋ́ pa ba yɩra cɛ dɩ yaara taan, maŋa maama.».

eng: So Im asking you: They havent stumbled so that theyve fallen permanently, have they? Absolutely not! But salvation has come to the Gentiles by their failure, in order to make Israel jealous.
local: Amʋ ta lagɩ a bwe a nii, Yisɩrayɛlɩ tiinǝ bam na tri ba tʋ kʋntʋ tɩn, kʋ brɩ nɩ ba daa bá wanɩ ba zaŋɩ ba joori ba fɔgɩ dɩ Wɛ mʋ na? Aye! Bantʋ na vɩn Wɛ cɩga kam te tɩn mʋ pɛ dwi-gɛtiinǝ wanɩ ba na vrɩm Wɛ tee nɩ. Wɛ kɩ kʋntʋ sɩ kʋ pa Yisɩrayɛlɩ tiinǝ bam mʋ taa jɩgɩ wʋ-gʋʋ dɩ ba.

eng: But if their failure brings riches to the world, and their defeat brings riches to the Gentiles, how much more will come from the completion of their number!.
local: Yisɩrayɛlɩ tiinǝ bam na kɩ ba cɔgɩ tɩn mʋ pɛ nabiinǝ maama wanɩ ba na zǝnǝ lanyɩranɩ Wɛ tee nɩ. Bantʋ na gɛ kʋlʋ ba na maŋɩ sɩ ba na tɩn mʋ pɛ dwi-gɛ tiinǝ na cwǝŋǝ ba joŋi Wɛ zǝnǝ yam. Kʋ brɩ nɩ Yisɩrayɛlɩ tiinǝ kɔgɔ kʋlʋ na wʋ́ ba tɔgɩ Wɛ tɩn na puli kʋ ti, kʋʋ́ pa nɔɔna na Wɛ zǝnǝ zanzan kʋ ja gaalɩ.

eng: Im speaking to you Gentiles. Considering that Im an apostle to the Gentiles, I publicize my own ministry.
local: Kʋ yɩ dɩ abam dwi-gɛtiinǝ mʋ a lagɩ a ta taanɩ dɩntʋ. Amʋ na yɩ Zezi tɩntʋŋnʋ sɩ a taa tɔɔlɩ o kwǝrǝ kam a brɩ dwi-gɛ tiinǝ tɩn, a brɩ nɩ kʋ tiini kʋ yɩ tɩtʋŋ-kamunu mʋ.

eng: in the hope that somehow I might make my own people jealous and save some of them.
local: Amʋ kwaanɩ a tʋŋɩ sɩ kʋ pa wʋ-gʋʋ mʋ ja a donnǝ Yisɩrayɛlɩtiinǝ bam, sɩ kʋ wanɩ kʋ pa Wɛ vrɩ ba badonnǝ amʋ tɩtʋŋa yam ŋwaanɩ.

eng: If their rejection has brought about a close relationship between God and the world, how can their acceptance mean anything less than life from the dead?.
local: Wɛ na yagɩ bantʋ tɩn, kʋ pɛ lʋgʋ baŋa dwi tiinǝ maama laan ba ba fɔgɩ dɩ Wɛ. Kʋ daarɩ maŋa kalʋ Wɛ na wʋ́ joori DƖ joŋi-ba tɩn, kʋʋ́ ta nyɩ dɩ twa na joori ba na ŋwɩa te tɩn mʋ.

eng: But if part of a batch of dough is offered to God as holy, the whole batch of dough is holy too. If a root is holy, the branches will be holy too.
local: Dɩ́ ye nɩ, nmʋ na dɛ yigǝ n fɔ dɩpɛ n tiŋi Wɛ ŋwaanɩ, dɩlʋ maama na daarɩ tɩn daa ta yɩ Wɛ nyɩm mʋ. Tiu kuri na yɩ Wɛ nyɩm, kʋ nɛ sɩm maama dɩ yɩ Wɛ nyɩm mʋ.

eng: If some of the branches were broken off, and you were a wild olive branch, and you were grafted in among the other branches and shared the root that produces the rich oil of the olive tree.
local: Yisɩrayɛlɩ tiinǝ bam nyɩ dɩ Olivitiu ba na jǝri gaarɩ wʋnɩ te tɩn mʋ. Kʋ yɩ nɩnɛɛnɩ Wɛ mʋ goni tiu kʋm kʋntʋ nɛ sɩdaara DƖ yagɩ, yɩ DƖ daarɩ DƖ kwe Olivi tiu kʋlʋ na wʋ gaa wʋnɩ tɩn nɛ DƖ toŋi DƖ gwaanɩ nɛ sɩdonnǝ sɩm wʋnɩ. Abam balʋ na yɩ dwi-gɛ tiinǝ tɩn nyɩ dɩ nɛ sɩlʋ ba na toŋi tɩn mʋ. Sɩ laan ma wǝri yɩ sɩ tɔgɩ sɩ naɩ tiu kʋm kugu kʋm nyʋa kam.

eng: then dont brag like youre better than the other branches. If you do brag, be careful: its not you that sustains the root, but its the root that sustains you.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ, nmʋ yɩ ta n gooni nɛ sɩlʋ ba na goni ba yagɩ tɩn. Nmʋ na brɩ n tɩtɩ kʋntʋ, ta n ye sɩ kʋ daɩ nmʋ mʋ paɩ tiu kʋm kugu kʋm zɩga. Kʋ yɩ kugu kʋm mʋ jɩgɩ nmʋ.

eng: You will say then, Branches were broken off so that I could be grafted in.
local: Nmʋ nan waɩ n tɛ nɩ: «Wɛ goni nɛ sɩm kʋntʋ DƖ yagɩ, kʋ daarɩ sɩ amʋ mʋ na jǝgǝ a toŋi tiu kʋm yɩra nɩ.».

eng: Fine. They were broken off because they werent faithful, but you stand only by your faithfulness. So dont think in a proud way; instead be afraid.
local: Kʋ sɩɩnɩ kʋ kɩ kʋntʋ mʋ. Wɛ nan goni nɛ sɩm kʋntʋ DƖ yagɩ, ba na wʋ kɩ ba wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ DƖ tɩn ŋwaanɩ mʋ. Nmʋ nan na wanɩ n toŋi tiu kʋm yɩra nɩ tɩn, kʋ yɩ n na kɩ n wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ tɩn ŋwaanɩ mʋ. Nan yɩ zaŋɩ n ta n kɩ kamunni, za n ta n kwarɩ Wɛ.

eng: If God didnt spare the natural branches, he wont spare you either.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ, Wɛ na wʋ sɛ sɩ DƖ yagɩ tiu kʋm tɩtɩ nɛ sɩm sɩ je nɩ tɩn, nmʋ dɩ na ba jɩgɩ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ DƖ, DƖ bá yagɩ-m da.

eng: So look at Gods kindness and harshness. Its harshness toward those who fell, but its Gods kindness for you, provided you continue in his kindness; otherwise, you could be cut off too.
local: Kʋ maama nan brɩ Wɛ na kɩ nɔɔna lanyɩranɩ te, yɩ DƖ daarɩ DƖ vaŋɩ nɔɔna zwa te tɩn mʋ. Kʋ na yɩ balʋ na kɩ ba cɔgɩ tɩn, DƖ vaŋɩ ba zwa mʋ. Kʋ daarɩ, nmʋ nan na wʋ yagɩ Wɛ cwǝŋǝ kam tɔgɩm, DƖ wʋ́ ta kɩ nmʋ lanyɩranɩ. Nmʋ nan na yagɩ Wɛ cwǝŋǝ kam, DƖ laan wʋ́ go nmʋ dɩ DƖ yagɩ mʋ nɩ tiu naga te.

eng: And even those who were cut off will be grafted back in if they dont continue to be unfaithful, because God is able to graft them in again.
local: Yisɩrayɛlɩ tiinǝ bam nan na kɩ ba wʋ-dɩdʋa ba sɛ Wɛ, baá joori ba na ba jǝgǝ kam. Wɛ wʋ́ wanɩ DƖ joori DƖ toŋi-ba da.

eng: If you were naturally part of a wild olive tree and you were cut off from it, and then, contrary to nature, you were grafted into the cultivated olive tree, wont these natural branches stand an even better chance of being grafted back onto their own olive tree?.
local: Kʋntʋ tɩn, nmʋ wʋlʋ na yɩ dwi-gɛ tu tɩn nyɩ dɩ naga kalʋ Wɛ na goni Olivi tiu kʋlʋ na wʋ gaa wʋnɩ tɩn yɩra nɩ mʋ. DƖ ma pa nmʋ toŋi Olivi tiu kʋlʋ na wʋ gaarɩ wʋnɩ tɩn yɩra nɩ, yɩ kʋ daɩ nɩ nɔɔna na yǝni ba kɩ te tɩn. Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ kʋ bá ta cana dɩ Wɛ sɩ DƖ joori DƖ toŋi nɛ sɩlʋ DƖ ya na goni tɩn sɩ tɩtɩ kugu kʋm je nɩ.

eng: I dont want you to be unaware of this secret, brothers and sisters. That way you wont think too highly of yourselves. A part of Israel has become resistant until the full number of the Gentiles comes in.
local: A ko-biǝ-ba, amʋ lagɩ sɩ á lwarɩ Wɛ cɩga kalʋ dɛɛn na sǝgi tɩn mʋ. Abam na sɩɩnɩ á lwarɩ kʋntʋ, á daa bá ta bʋŋɩ nɩ á yɩ swan tiinǝ. Kʋ na yɩ te tɩn, lele kʋntʋ Yisɩrayɛlɩtiinǝ badaara wʋrʋ digili yɩ ba warɩ Wɛ cɩga kam kuri ba ni. Kʋ nan wʋ́ ta yɩ kʋntʋ, sɩ kʋ vu kʋ yi maŋa kam dwi-gɛtiinǝ balʋ na sɛ Wɛ tɩn kɔgɔ kʋm na wʋ́ puli kʋ ti tɩn.

eng: In this way, all Israel will be saved, as it is written: The deliverer will come from Zion. He will remove ungodly behavior from Jacob. .
local: Kʋntʋ, Yisɩrayɛlɩ tiinǝ kɔgɔ kʋm maama laan wʋ́ na vrɩm, nɩ kʋ na pʋpʋnɩ Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm wʋnɩ kʋ wɩ: «Wʋlʋ na paɩ nɔɔna na vrɩm tɩn wʋ́ nuŋi Siyɔnnɩ o ba, yɩ oó pa Zakɔbɩdwi tiinǝ bam lwarɩm dɩm ti.

eng: This is my covenant with them, when I take away their sins .
local: Amʋ Wɛ wʋ́ go ni dɩntʋ a pa-ba, nɩ amʋ wʋ́ saarɩ ba lwarɩm dɩm a yagɩ.».

eng: According to the gospel, they are enemies for your sake, but according to Gods choice, they are loved for the sake of their ancestors.
local: Yisɩrayɛlɩ tiinǝ bam na vɩn Wɛ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam tɩn, ba jigi Wɛ dʋna mʋ, yɩ kʋntʋ laan pa abam dwi-gɛ tiinǝ bam na vrɩm Wɛ tee nɩ. Kʋ daarɩ, kʋ na yɩ Wɛ na kuri nɔɔna sɩ ba taa yɩ DƖ nɔɔna te tɩn laŋa nɩ, DƖ soe Yisɩrayɛlɩ tiinǝ bam, DƖ dɛɛn na goni ni dɩ ba nabaara bam tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: Gods gifts and calling cant be taken back.
local: Wɛ nan ba kɩ a ya na maanɩ, dɩ DƖ na kuri nɔɔna yɩ DƖ kɩ-ba lanyɩranɩ te tɩn.

eng: Once you were disobedient to God, but now you have mercy because they were disobedient.
local: Abam dwi-gɛ tiinǝ dɛɛn ya vɩn Wɛ mʋ, yɩ á laan ba á lwarɩ DƖ yibwǝn-durǝ kam, Yisɩrayɛlɩ tiinǝ bam na vɩn Wɛ tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: In the same way, they have also been disobedient because of the mercy that you received, so now they can receive mercy too.
local: Bantʋ dɩ laan tu ba vɩn Wɛ ni, yɩ abam na Wɛ yibwǝnǝ kam, sɩ kʋ wanɩ kʋ pa bantʋ dɩ laan ba ba lwarɩ DƖ yibwǝn-durǝ kam na yɩ te tɩn.

eng: God has locked up all people in disobedience, in order to have mercy on all of them.
local: Wɛ nan pɛ nɔɔna maama nyɩ nɩ ba wʋ pɩɩna digǝ nɩ mʋ te, ba na vɩn DƖ ni tɩn ŋwaanɩ, sɩ DƖ laan wanɩ DƖ duri ba maama yibwǝnǝ.

eng: Gods riches, wisdom, and knowledge are so deep! They are as mysterious as his judgments, and they are as hard to track as his paths!.
local: Maanɩ-na á nii Wɛ zaanɩ dɩm na tiini dɩ dagɩ te. Wɛ wʋbʋŋa dɩ DƖ yǝno kʋm dɩ ma tiini kʋ lirǝ. Nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ bá wanɩ o lwarɩ DƖ na lɩ wʋbʋŋa sɩ DƖ kɩ te tɩn, naa o lwarɩ cwe sɩlʋ DƖ na tɔgɩ tɩn, nɩ kʋ na pʋpʋnɩ Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm wʋnɩ kʋ wɩ:.

eng: Who has known the Lords mind? Or who has been his mentor? .
local: «Nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ bá wanɩ o lwarɩ Baŋa-Wɛ wʋbʋŋa, naa o brɩ-DƖ DƖ na wʋ́ kɩ te tɩn.

eng: Or who has given him a gift and has been paid back by him? .
local: Nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ bá wanɩ o kwe o woŋo o jɩnɩ Wɛ.».

eng: All things are from him and through him and for him. May the glory be to him forever. Amen.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ wǝǝnu maama nuŋi Wɛ te mʋ, yɩ dɩntʋ mʋ nii tɩ maama baŋa nɩ, yɩ tɩ maama yɩ dɩntʋ nyɩm mʋ. Wɛ maŋɩ dɩ zulǝ mʋ, sɩ kʋ taa ve maŋa kalʋ na ba ti tɩn. Amina.

eng: So, brothers and sisters, because of Gods mercies, I encourage you to present your bodies as a living sacrifice that is holy and pleasing to God. This is your appropriate priestly service.
local: A ko-biǝ-ba, Wɛ na tiini DƖ jɩgɩ abam ŋwaŋa kʋntʋ tɩn, a loori abam sɩ á kwe á tɩtɩ á pa Wɛ nɩnɛɛnɩ ba na mɛ woŋo ba kɩ kaanɩm ba pa Wɛ tɩn, sɩ á taá ŋwɩ dɩ wʋ-poŋo, sɩ kʋ poli Wɛ wʋ lanyɩranɩ. Kʋntʋ mʋ yɩ zulǝ yalʋ na maŋɩ sɩ á pa Wɛ tɩn.

eng: Dont be conformed to the patterns of this world, but be transformed by the renewing of your minds so that you can figure out what Gods will is—what is good and pleasing and mature.
local: Á yɩ pa á wʋbʋŋa taa tɔgɩ balʋ na yǝri Wɛ tɩn cwe sɩm. Kwaanɩ-na sɩ Wɛ pa á taá jɩgɩ wʋbʋŋ-dʋʋra, sɩ kʋ lǝni á ŋwɩa kam maama. Abam laan wʋ́ ba á lwarɩ Wɛ wʋbʋŋa na lagɩ sɩ á kɩ kʋlʋ tɩn, yɩ á wʋ́ lwarɩ nɩ kʋ tiini kʋ lana cɩga cɩga yɩ kʋ poli DƖ wʋ.

eng: Because of the grace that God gave me, I can say to each one of you: dont think of yourself more highly than you ought to think. Instead, be reasonable since God has measured out a portion of faith to each one of you.
local: Wɛ na kɩ-nɩ yu-yoŋo sɩ a taa yɩ DƖ tɩntʋŋnʋ tɩn, a lagɩ a ta dɩ abam maama sɩ á yɩ taá bʋŋɩ kamunni á pa á tɩtɩ, nɩ á dwe á na maŋɩ á yɩ te tɩn. Á nan taá jɩgɩ wʋbʋŋ-ŋʋna, sɩ kʋ maŋɩ dɩ Wɛ na pɛ abam dɩdʋa dɩdʋa pɛɛrɩ te á na kɩ á wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ DƖ tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: We have many parts in one body, but the parts dont all have the same function.
local: Nabiinu yɩra yɩ woŋo dɩdʋa mʋ, yɩ ya laan pɔɔrɩ je dwi tǝri tǝri. Jǝgǝ maama nan jɩgɩ ka tɩtʋŋa mʋ yɩra yam wʋnɩ.

eng: In the same way, though there are many of us, we are one body in Christ, and individually we belong to each other.
local: Kʋ nan yɩ bɩdwɩ mʋ dɩ dɩbam balʋ dɩ na ŋwɩ dɩ Zezi Krisi tɩn. Dɩ́ tiini dɩ́ daga, yɩ dɩ́ nan yɩ kɔgɔ dɩdʋa mʋ. Dɩbam maama dɩdʋa dɩdʋa maa tʋŋɩ dɩ́ wǝli daanɩ, nɩ yɩra yam je sɩm dwi tǝri tǝri na tʋŋɩ sɩ zǝni daanɩ te tɩn.

eng: We have different gifts that are consistent with Gods grace that has been given to us. If your gift is prophecy, you should prophesy in proportion to your faith.
local: Wɛ-pɛɛra yalʋ DƖ na pɛ dɩbam tɩn yɩ dwi tǝri tǝri mʋ, nɩ DƖ na pɛ dɩbam zaanɩ te tɩn. Wɛ na pɛ wʋlʋ waɩ o ŋɔɔnɩ yiyiu-ŋwɛ tɩn, kʋntʋ tu maŋɩ sɩ o taa tɔgɩ o na jɩgɩ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ te tɩn mʋ o ma ŋɔɔnɩ-sɩ.

eng: If your gift is service, devote yourself to serving. If your gift is teaching, devote yourself to teaching.
local: Wɛ na pɛ wʋlʋ waɩ o tʋŋɩ o wǝli o donnǝ tɩn, kʋntʋ tu maŋɩ sɩ o taa tʋŋɩ kʋntʋ mʋ. Wʋlʋ Wɛ na pɛ o waɩ o brɩ o donnǝ Wɛ cɩga kam tɩn, sɩ o dɩ kwaanɩ o taa brɩ-ka.

eng: If your gift is encouragement, devote yourself to encouraging. The one giving should do it with no strings attached. The leader should lead with passion. The one showing mercy should be cheerful.
local: Wɛ na pɛ wʋlʋ waɩ o kwe nɔɔna sɩ ba na baarɩ tɩn maŋɩ sɩ o taa kɩ kʋntʋ mʋ. Wʋlʋ dɩ na cɛ o wǝǝnu o maa zǝni o donnǝ tɩn maŋɩ sɩ o ma o wʋ-yoŋo mʋ o wǝli-ba lanyɩranɩ. Wʋlʋ nan na yɩ nɔɔna yigǝ tu tɩn maŋɩ sɩ o kwaanɩ o taa brɩ-ba cwǝŋǝ lanyɩranɩ. Wʋlʋ nan na duri o donnǝ yibwǝnǝ tɩn maŋɩ sɩ o taa kɩ-kʋ dɩ wʋpolo mʋ.

eng: Love should be shown without pretending. Hate evil, and hold on to what is good.
local: Á taá soe daanɩ dɩ cɩga. Á taá culi wo-lwaanʋ dwi maama, sɩ á daarɩ á taá kɩ kʋlʋ maama na lana tɩn.

eng: Love each other like the members of your family. Be the best at showing honor to each other.
local: Á na yɩ ko-biǝ daanɩ Zezi Krisi ŋwaanɩ tɩn, á taá soe daanɩ dɩ á wʋrʋ maama, sɩ á taá nɩgɩ daanɩ lanyɩranɩ.

eng: Dont hesitate to be enthusiastic—be on fire in the Spirit as you serve the Lord!.
local: Á na tʋŋɩ á pa Wɛ te tɩn, á yɩ pa yawɔrɔ zʋ abam. Kwe-na á bɩcara maama á taá maa tʋŋɩ á pa dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm.

eng: Be happy in your hope, stand your ground when youre in trouble, and devote yourselves to prayer.
local: Á na jɩgɩ tɩɩna dɩ Wɛ te tɩn, á taá jɩgɩ wʋpolo kʋ ŋwaanɩ. Yaara na yi abam, sɩ á vɔ pu-dɩa. Kwaanɩ-na á taá loori Wɛ maŋa maama.

eng: Contribute to the needs of Gods people, and welcome strangers into your home.
local: Cɛ-na á wǝǝnu á ma zǝni balʋ na yɩ Wɛ nɔɔna yɩ yinigǝ jɩgɩ-ba tɩn. Á taá jeeri vǝrǝ lanyɩranɩ á sam nɩ.

eng: Bless people who harass you—bless and dont curse them.
local: Kʋ na yɩ balʋ na jɩgɩ abam ba bɛɛsɩ tɩn, sɩ á taá loori Wɛ sɩ DƖ kɩ-ba lanyɩranɩ. Á nan yɩ sɔɔlɩ á cɔgɩ-ba.

eng: Be happy with those who are happy, and cry with those who are crying.
local: Kɩ-na wʋpolo dɩ balʋ na jɩgɩ wʋpolo tɩn, sɩ á daarɩ á wǝli dɩ balʋ na keeri tɩn á keeri.

eng: Consider everyone as equal, and dont think that youre better than anyone else. Instead, associate with people who have no status. Dont think that youre so smart.
local: Á taá jɩgɩ-na wʋbʋŋ-dɩdwɩ. Á yɩ taá kɩ kamunni. Tu-na á tɩtɩ sɩ á taá tʋŋɩ tɩtʋŋ-balɛ dɩ. Á yɩ taá bʋŋɩ á pa á jɩgɩ swan.

eng: Dont pay back anyone for their evil actions with evil actions, but show respect for what everyone else believes is good.
local: Nɔɔnʋ na kɩ abam lwarɩm, á dɩ daa yɩ joori á kɩ-o lwarɩm á ma ŋwɩ. Nan kwaanɩ-na sɩ á taá kɩ kʋlʋ na lana tɩn nɔɔna maama yigǝ nɩ.

eng: If possible, to the best of your ability, live at peace with all people.
local: Kwaanɩ-na lanyɩranɩ sɩ á taá zʋʋrɩ dɩ ywǝǝni nɔɔna maama tɩtarɩ nɩ, nɩ á na waɩ te tɩn.

eng: Dont try to get revenge for yourselves, my dear friends, but leave room for Gods wrath. It is written, Revenge belongs to me; I will pay it back, says the Lord .
local: A badon-sonnu-ba, á yɩ taá bʋŋɩ sɩ á kɩ balʋ na kɩ abam lwarɩm tɩn dɩ lwarɩm. Nan yagɩ-na, sɩ Wɛ ban-zɔŋɔ kʋm wʋ́ ba ba baŋa. Bɛŋwaanɩ kʋ pʋpʋnɩ Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm wʋnɩ, nɩ Baŋa-Wɛ tagɩ DƖ wɩ: «Amʋ yɩ wʋlʋ na wʋ́ cɔgɩ nɔɔna dɩ ba kǝm-balwaarʋ tɩn. Amʋ wʋ́ pa ba joori ba na kʋlʋ na maŋɩ dɩ ba tɩn.».

eng: Instead, If your enemy is hungry, feed him; if he is thirsty, give him a drink. By doing this, you will pile burning coals of fire upon his head .
local: Kʋ nan ta pʋpʋnɩ kʋ wɩ: «Nmʋ dʋm kana na wɔɛ, sɩ n pa-o wʋdiu sɩ o di. Na-nyɔm na jɩg-o, sɩ n pa-o na sɩ o nyɔ. N na kɩ kʋntʋ, kʋʋ́ pa cavɩɩra tiini ya ja-o.».

eng: Dont be defeated by evil, but defeat evil with good.
local: Abam nan yɩ pa lwarɩm wanɩ abam. Á taá kɩ kǝm-laarʋ sɩ tɩ wanɩ lwarɩm dam tɩ cɔgɩ.

eng: Every person should place themselves under the authority of the government. There isnt any authority unless it comes from God, and the authorities that are there have been put in place by God.
local: Abam maama maŋɩ sɩ á sɛ dɩdɛɛra balʋ na te á tɩɩnɩ dɩm tɩn ni, bɛŋwaanɩ nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ ba jɩgɩ dam sɩ o taa te o doŋ yɩ Wɛ wʋ pɛ kʋ tu cwǝŋǝ. Dɩdɛɛra balʋ na wʋra tɩn yɩ Wɛ mʋ tiŋi-ba.

eng: So anyone who opposes the authority is standing against what God has established. People who take this kind of stand will get punished.
local: Wʋlʋ maama na vɩn dɩdɛɛra bam kʋntʋ ni tɩn, kʋ tu vɩn cwǝŋǝ kalʋ Wɛ na tiŋi tɩn mʋ. Balʋ na kɩ kʋntʋ doŋ tɩn wʋ́ na cam.

eng: The authorities dont frighten people who are doing the right thing. Rather, they frighten people who are doing wrong. Would you rather not be afraid of authority? Do whats right, and you will receive its approval.
local: Dɩdɛɛra bam nan ba paɩ fʋʋnɩ jɩgɩ balʋ na kɩ kǝm-laarʋ tɩn. Fʋʋnɩ jɩgɩ balʋ na kɩ kǝm-balwaarʋ tɩn mʋ. Nmʋ na ba lagɩ sɩ fʋʋnɩ taa jɩgɩ-m dɩ dɩdɛɛra bam, n maŋɩ sɩ n ta n kɩ kǝm-laarʋ mʋ sɩ kʋ pa n na zulǝ ba tee nɩ.

eng: It is Gods servant given for your benefit. But if you do whats wrong, be afraid because it doesnt have weapons to enforce the law for nothing. It is Gods servant put in place to carry out his punishment on those who do what is wrong.
local: Wɛ nan tiŋi dɩdɛɛra bam sɩ ba taa tʋŋɩ ba pa-DƖ abam zǝnǝ ŋwaanɩ mʋ. Abam nan na kɩ wo-balwaarʋ, á maŋɩ sɩ á taá kwarɩ fʋʋnɩ, bɛŋwaanɩ dɩdɛɛra bam sɩɩnɩ ba jɩgɩ cwǝŋǝ sɩ ba pa nɔɔna na cam. Bantʋ mʋ yɩ balʋ Wɛ na tiŋi sɩ ba tɔgɩ DƖ ban-zɔŋɔ kʋm ŋwaanɩ ba ma pa balʋ na kɩ lwarɩm tɩn na cam.

eng: That is why it is necessary to place yourself under the governments authority, not only to avoid Gods punishment but also for the sake of your conscience.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ á maŋɩ sɩ á sɛ ba ni. Kʋ daɩ ba na wʋ́ pa á na cam tɩn yɩranɩ ŋwaanɩ. Á sɛ-ba, bɛŋwaanɩ á ye á bɩcara nɩ, nɩ á maŋɩ sɩ á tɔgɩ cɩga cwǝŋǝ mʋ.

eng: You should also pay taxes for the same reason, because the authorities are Gods assistants, concerned with this very thing.
local: Kʋ ta yɩ kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ á maŋɩ sɩ á taá ŋwɩ lampoo. Bɛŋwaanɩ dɩdɛɛra bam tʋŋɩ ba pa Wɛ mʋ, dɩ ba na kwaanɩ ba tʋŋɩ te tɩn.

eng: So pay everyone what you owe them. Pay the taxes you owe, pay the duties you are charged, give respect to those you should respect, and honor those you should honor.
local: Nan taá ŋwɩ kʋlʋ maama ba na maŋɩ sɩ ba joŋi á tee nɩ tɩn á pa-ba. Kʋ na yɩ wʋlʋ na joŋi á yuu lampoo tɩn, naa wʋlʋ dɩ na joŋi á wǝǝnu lampoo tɩn, sɩ á ŋwɩ á lampoo maama á pa-ba. Kʋ na yɩ wʋlʋ na maŋɩ sɩ á taá kwar-o tɩn, sɩ á taá kwar-o. Kʋ na yɩ wʋlʋ na maŋɩ dɩ zulǝ tɩn, sɩ á taá zul-o.

eng: Dont be in debt to anyone, except for the obligation to love each other. Whoever loves another person has fulfilled the Law.
local: Abam nan yɩ taá jɩgɩ-na nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ woŋo jɩnɩ, jɩnɩ dɩlʋ á na wʋ́ taá jɩgɩ tɩn mʋ yɩ sɩ á taá soe á donnǝ. Wʋlʋ maama na soe o doŋ tɩn sɩɩnɩ o tɔgɩ Wɛ cullu tɩm dɩ DƖ niǝ yam mʋ.

eng: The commandments, Dont commit adultery, dont murder, dont steal, dont desire what others have, and any other commandments, are all summed up in one word: You must love your neighbor as yourself. .
local: Wɛ cullu tɩm brɩ nɩ: «Yɩ kɩ boorim, yɩ gʋ nɔɔnʋ, yɩ ŋɔnɩ, yɩ pa n yi zʋ n donnǝ wǝǝnu.» Cullu tɩm kʋntʋ dɩdaanɩ Wɛ niǝ yam maama nan tɔgɩ ni dɩdʋa mʋ. Ni dɩntʋ nan mʋ wɩ: «Ta n soe n doŋ nɩ n tɩtɩ te.».

eng: Love doesnt do anything wrong to a neighbor; therefore, love is what fulfills the Law.
local: Nmʋ na soe n doŋ, n daa n bá wanɩ n kɩ-o balɔrɔ. Wʋlʋ na soe o doŋ tɩn sɩɩnɩ o kɩ Wɛ niǝ yam na brɩ kʋlʋ tɩn mʋ.

eng: As you do all this, you know what time it is. The hour has already come for you to wake up from your sleep. Now our salvation is nearer than when we first had faith.
local: Á taá kɩ-na kʋntʋ, sɩ abam ye maŋa kalʋ wʋnɩ dɩ́ na wʋra tɩn. Maŋa yi sɩ á zaŋɩ á yagɩ dɔɔm. Maŋa kalʋ Wɛ na wʋ́ ba DƖ vrɩ dɩbam tɩn daarɩ fɩɩn sɩ ka yi, yɩ kʋ daa daɩ nɩnɛɛnɩ maŋa kalʋ dɩ́ dɛɛn na puli dɩ́ kɩ dɩ́ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Zezi tɩn.

eng: The night is almost over, and the day is near. So lets get rid of the actions that belong to the darkness and put on the weapons of light.
local: Maŋa kam daarɩ fɩɩn sɩ ka yi, nɩ tɩga na lagɩ ka pʋʋrɩ te tɩn. Tɩtɩɩ dɩm lagɩ dɩ kɛ sɩ wɩa pooni ba. Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ, á pa dɩ́ yagɩ kikiǝ yalʋ maama na yɩ lim nyɩm tɩn, sɩ dɩ́ daarɩ dɩ́ ma Wɛ dam dɩm dɩ́ cɩ dɩ́ tɩtɩ, sɩ dɩ́ wanɩ dɩ́ tɔgɩ pooni cwǝŋǝ kam.

eng: Lets behave appropriately as people who live in the day, not in partying and getting drunk, not in sleeping around and obscene behavior, not in fighting and obsession.
local: Pa-na dɩ́ tɔgɩ cwǝŋǝ sɩ kʋ maŋɩ dɩ balʋ na wʋ pooni wʋnɩ te tɩn. Á nan pa-na dɩ́ yagɩ nɔn-kwǝlim dɩ sa-nyɔrɩ dɩ boorim dɩ wo-digiru kikiǝ maama. Á yɩ taá jaanɩ daanɩ naa á taá kɩ wʋ-gʋʋ daanɩ.

eng: Instead, dress yourself with the Lord Jesus Christ, and dont plan to indulge your selfish desires.
local: Pa-na abam ŋwɩa kam dɩdaanɩ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi Krisi ŋwɩa kam taa yɩ bɩdwɩ. Nan yɩ pa-na á wʋbʋŋa taa tɔgɩ wo-yɔɔrʋ tɩlʋ á fra na zʋʋrɩ tɩn.

eng: Welcome the person who is weak in faith—but not in order to argue about differences of opinion.
local: Joŋi-na nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ wʋbʋŋa ta na wʋ bɩgɩ Wɛ cwǝŋǝ kam wʋnɩ tɩn lanyɩranɩ. Á nan yɩ magɩ kantɔgɔ dɩ o na bʋŋɩ te tɩn.

eng: One person believes in eating everything, while the weak person eats only vegetables.
local: Nɔɔnʋ wʋra o wʋbʋŋa na bɩga Wɛ cwǝŋǝ kam wʋnɩ, kʋ ma pa o ba culi kʋlʋkʋlʋ dim. Kʋ daarɩ nɔɔnʋ wʋdoŋ wʋra o wʋbʋŋa na wʋ bɩgɩ yɩ kʋ pa o culi nwam.

eng: Those who eat must not look down on the ones who dont, and the ones who dont eat must not judge the ones who do, because God has accepted them.
local: Wʋlʋ nan na waɩ o di woŋo maama tɩn yɩ zaŋɩ o gooni wʋlʋ wʋm o na ba di woŋo maama tɩn. Wʋlʋ dɩ nan na ba di woŋo maama tɩn yɩ zaŋɩ o co wʋlʋ na di woŋo maama tɩn, bɛŋwaanɩ o dɩ yɩ Wɛ nɔɔnʋ mʋ.

eng: Who are you to judge someone elses servants? They stand or fall before their own Lord .
local: Nmʋ yɩ wɔɔ mʋ sɩ n co nɔɔnʋ wʋdoŋ tɩntʋŋnʋ? Kʋ yɩ o tɩtɩ yuutu wʋm mʋ maŋɩ sɩ o nii o kɩ cɩga naa o wʋ kɩ. Wʋlʋ na yɩ dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm nɔɔnʋ tɩn kɩ lanyɩranɩ mʋ, bɛŋwaanɩ dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm wʋ́ wanɩ o pa o taa kɩ lanyɩranɩ.

eng: One person considers some days to be more sacred than others, while another person considers all days to be the same. Each person must have their own convictions.
local: Nɔɔnʋ wʋra o na lɩ dɛ o pa dɩ dwe da yadonnǝ yam. Kʋ daarɩ nɔɔnʋ wʋdoŋ dɩ maa wʋra o na ba kuri da yam daanɩ. Nɔɔnʋ maama nan maŋɩ sɩ o kɩ kʋlʋ o na ye o bɩcarɩ nɩ nɩ kʋ maŋɩ tɩn.

eng: Someone who thinks that a day is sacred, thinks that way for the Lord. Those who eat, eat for the Lord, because they thank God. And those who dont eat, dont eat for the Lord, and they thank the Lord too.
local: Nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ na kuri dɛ sɩ dɩ taa yɩ da-kamunu tɩn yǝni o kɩ dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm ŋwaanɩ mʋ. Wʋlʋ na di woŋo maama tɩn kɩ kʋntʋ o ma zuli dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm mʋ, o na yǝni o kɩ Wɛ le wʋdiu kʋm baŋa nɩ tɩn ŋwaanɩ. Wʋlʋ dɩ nan na ba di woŋo maama tɩn dɩ kɩ kʋntʋ o ma zuli dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm mʋ, yɩ o dɩ kɩ Wɛ le kʋ ŋwaanɩ.

eng: We dont live for ourselves and we dont die for ourselves.
local: Dɩbam wʋlʋwʋlʋ ba ŋwɩ o tɩtɩ yɩranɩ ŋwaanɩ. Dɩ́ wʋlʋ nan na tɩgɩ dɩ, kʋ ta daɩ o tɩtɩ yɩranɩ ŋwaanɩ.

eng: If we live, we live for the Lord, and if we die, we die for the Lord. Therefore, whether we live or die, we belong to God.
local: Dɩ́ zɩ na ŋwɩ, dɩ́ ŋwɩ dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm ŋwaanɩ mʋ. Dɩ́ nan zɩ na tɩgɩ dɩ, kʋ ta yɩ dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm ŋwaanɩ mʋ. Bɛŋwaanɩ, dɩ́ na ŋwɩ naa dɩ́ na tɩga, dɩ́ ta yɩ dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm nɔɔna mʋ.

eng: This is why Christ died and lived: so that he might be Lord of both the dead and the living.
local: Zezi Krisi tɩgɩ yɩ o joori o bi o na ŋwɩa, sɩ o taa yɩ twa dɩ naŋʋna Yuutu mʋ.

eng: But why do you judge your brother or sister? Or why do you look down on your brother or sister? We all will stand in front of the judgment seat of God.
local: Kʋ na yɩ kʋntʋ tɩn, bɛɛ mʋ yɩ n co n ko-bu? Sɩ nmʋ dɩ, bɛɛ mʋ yɩ n gooni n ko-bu? Dɩbam maama nan lagɩ dɩ́ ba dɩ́ zɩgɩ Wɛ yigǝ nɩ mʋ, sɩ DƖ di dɩbam taanɩ.

eng: Because it is written, As I live, says the Lord, every knee will bow to me, and every tongue will give praise to God. .
local: Kʋ pʋpʋnɩ Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm wʋnɩ, nɩ Baŋa-Wɛ tagɩ DƖ wɩ: «Amʋ na yɩ ŋwɩa tu tɩn, kʋ yɩ cɩga mʋ nɩ, nɔɔna maama wʋ́ ba ba kuni doonǝ amʋ yigǝ nɩ, yɩ bá ta dɩ ba niǝ jaja, nɩ amʋ mʋ yɩ Baŋa-Wɛ.».

eng: So then, each of us will give an account of ourselves to God.
local: Kʋntʋ brɩ nɩ dɩbam maama lagɩ dɩ́ ba dɩ́ zɩgɩ Wɛ yigǝ nɩ mʋ, sɩ nɔɔnʋ maama ta kʋlʋ o na kɩ tɩn.

eng: So stop judging each other. Instead, this is what you should decide: never put a stumbling block or obstacle in the way of your brother or sister.
local: Kʋntʋ tɩn, dɩ́ daa yɩ ta co dɩ́ donnǝ. Nan lɩ-na wʋbʋŋa sɩ á yɩ kɩ kʋlʋ na wʋ́ pa á ko-bu tusi naa o yagɩ Wɛ cwǝŋǝ tɔgɩm tɩn.

eng: I know and Im convinced in the Lord Jesus that nothing is wrong to eat in itself. But if someone thinks something is wrong to eat, it becomes wrong for that person.
local: Amʋ na ŋwɩ dɩ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi tɩn, amʋ ye lanyɩranɩ nɩ wʋdiu tǝrǝ kʋ tɩtɩ na yɩ wo-digiru Wɛ yigǝ nɩ. Nɔɔnʋ nan na pɛ woŋo kʋlʋ yɩ culu, kʋ sɩɩnɩ kʋ yɩ culu mʋ kʋ pa nɔɔnʋ wʋm kʋntʋ.

eng: If your brother or sister is upset by your food, you are no longer walking in love. Dont let your food destroy someone for whom Christ died.
local: Nmʋ nan na pɛ n ko-bu wʋ cɔgɩ dɩ n na di wʋdiu kʋlʋ tɩn, kʋ brɩ nɩ n daa n ba tɔgɩ sono cwǝŋǝ mʋ. Yɩ pa nmʋ na di wʋdiu kʋlʋ tɩn cɔgɩ nɔɔnʋ dɩ Wɛ daanɩ, yɩ o yɩ wʋlʋ Zezi Krisi na tɩgɩ o ŋwaanɩ tɩn.

eng: And dont let something you consider to be good be criticized as wrong.
local: Yɩ pa nɔɔna na cwǝŋǝ sɩ ba co woŋo kʋlʋ na lana dɩ nmʋ tɩn.

eng: Gods kingdom isnt about eating food and drinking but about righteousness, peace, and joy in the Holy Spirit.
local: Dɩbam na yɩ Wɛ paarɩ dɩm nɔɔna te tɩn ba tɔgɩ wʋdiiru dim ŋwaanɩ. Kʋ nan tɔgɩ dɩ́ na kɩ cɩga Wɛ yigǝ nɩ tɩn ŋwaanɩ mʋ, dɩ wʋ-zuru dɩ wʋpolo, nɩ Wɛ Joro kʋm na paɩ dɩbam te tɩn.

eng: Whoever serves Christ this way pleases God and gets human approval.
local: Wʋlʋ maama nan na tʋŋɩ o pa Zezi Krisi kʋntʋ doŋ tɩn, kʋntʋ tu wʋ́ poli Wɛ wʋ, yɩ nɔɔna dɩ wʋ́ pa-o cɩga.

eng: So lets strive for the things that bring peace and the things that build each other up.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ, pa-na dɩ́ kwaanɩ dɩ́ taá kɩ kʋlʋ maama na paɩ nɔɔna jɩgɩ ywǝǝni daanɩ yɩ kʋ zǝni-ba sɩ ba bɩ Wɛ cwǝŋǝ wʋnɩ tɩn.

eng: Dont destroy what God has done because of food. All food is acceptable, but its a bad thing if it trips someone else.
local: Yɩ pa wʋdiiru dim cɔgɩ Wɛ tɩtʋŋa. Wʋdiiru maama maŋɩ dim mʋ. Nmʋ nan na di kʋlʋ na wʋ́ pa n doŋ wʋ cɔgɩ kʋ ŋwaanɩ tɩn, sɩ n yagɩ kʋ dim.

eng: Its a good thing not to eat meat or drink wine or to do anything that trips your brother or sister.
local: Kʋ lana sɩ n yɩ kɩ kʋlʋ maama na wʋ́ pa n ko-bu tusi Wɛ cwǝŋǝ nɩ tɩn, kʋ na yɩ nwana dim naa sana nyɔm naa kʋlʋ maama dɩ.

eng: Keep the belief that you have to yourself—its between you and God. People are blessed who dont convict themselves by the things they approve.
local: Nmʋ na ye kʋlʋ n wʋbʋŋa nɩ kantʋ laŋa nɩ tɩn, ta n jɩgɩ-kʋ nmʋ dɩ Wɛ laŋa nɩ. Nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ na ye kʋlʋ na lana sɩ o kɩ yɩ o ba jɩgɩ wʋbʋŋa yale kʋ baŋa nɩ tɩn, kʋntʋ tu jɩgɩ yu-yoŋo.

eng: But those who have doubts are convicted if they go ahead and eat, because they arent acting on the basis of faith. Everything that isnt based on faith is sin.
local: Kʋ daarɩ, nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ na jɩgɩ bʋbwɛa dɩ o na di wʋdiu kʋlʋ tɩn, kʋntʋ tu bá na bʋra Wɛ tee nɩ. Kʋ brɩ nɩ o ba jɩgɩ wʋ-dɩdʋa o dim dɩm wʋnɩ. Woŋo kʋlʋ maama nmʋ na wʋ́ kɩ yɩ n ba jɩgɩ wʋ-dɩdʋa tɩn, kʋ yɩ lwarɩm mʋ.

eng: We who are powerful need to be patient with the weakness of those who dont have power, and not please ourselves.
local: Dɩbam balʋ wʋbʋŋa na bɩgɩ Wɛ cwǝŋǝ kam wʋnɩ tɩn maŋɩ sɩ dɩ́ taá wǝli balʋ wʋbʋŋa ta na wʋ bɩgɩ tɩn mʋ, ba wʋbʋŋa ta na bwǝnǝ tɩn ŋwaanɩ. Dɩ́ wʋ maŋɩ sɩ dɩ́ taá kɩ kʋlʋ na poli dɩbam yɩranɩ wʋrʋ tɩn.

eng: Each of us should please our neighbors for their good in order to build them up.
local: Dɩbam maama nan maŋɩ sɩ dɩ́ taá kɩ kʋlʋ na wʋ́ poli dɩ́ donnǝ wʋrʋ tɩn mʋ, dɩ́ maŋɩ sɩ dɩ́ kɩ-ba lanyɩranɩ mʋ sɩ kʋ pa ba fɔgɩ ba bɩ Wɛ cwǝŋǝ wʋnɩ.

eng: Christ didnt please himself, but, as it is written, The insults of those who insulted you fell on me. .
local: Zezi Krisi dɛɛn nan wʋ kɩ kʋlʋ na poli o yɩranɩ wʋ tɩn, nɩ Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm na tagɩ te kʋ wɩ: «Trʋ tɩlʋ nɔɔna na twɩ nmʋ Baŋa-Wɛ tɩn mʋ joori tɩ tʋ amʋ yuu nɩ.».

eng: Whatever was written in the past was written for our instruction so that we could have hope through endurance and through the encouragement of the scriptures.
local: Kʋlʋ maama dɛɛn na pʋpʋnɩ Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm wʋnɩ tɩn yɩ sɩ kʋ taa brɩ dɩbam Wɛ cɩga kam mʋ, sɩ kʋ pa dɩ́ na pu-dɩa dɩ baarɩ sɩ dɩ́ taá jɩgɩ tɩɩna Wɛ tee nɩ.

eng: May the God of endurance and encouragement give you the same attitude toward each other, similar to Christ Jesus attitude.
local: Wɛ mʋ yɩ wʋlʋ na paɩ nɔɔna pu-dɩa dɩ baarɩ tɩn, yɩ dɩntʋ wʋ́ pa á taá jɩgɩ wʋbʋŋ-dɩdwɩ nɩ Zezi Krisi na lagɩ te tɩn.

eng: That way you can glorify the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ together with one voice.
local: Kʋntʋ, kʋʋ́ pa abam maama sɛ daanɩ yɩ á taá jɩgɩ ni dɩdwɩ á ma zuli Wɛ dɩlʋ na yɩ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi Krisi Ko tɩn.

eng: So welcome each other, in the same way that Christ also welcomed you, for Gods glory.
local: Joŋi-na daanɩ lanyɩranɩ nɩ Zezi Krisi na joŋi abam te tɩn. Kʋntʋ wʋ́ pa Wɛ na zulǝ.

eng: Im saying that Christ became a servant of those who are circumcised for the sake of Gods truth, in order to confirm the promises given to the ancestors.
local: Amʋ nan lagɩ a ta abam nɩ Zezi Krisi tu sɩ o tʋŋɩ o pa Zwifǝbam mʋ, sɩ kʋ pa Wɛ na goni ni dɩ ba nabaara bam te tɩn sɩɩnɩ kʋ kɩ, sɩ kʋ brɩ nɩ Wɛ yɩ cɩga tu.

eng: and so that the Gentiles could glorify God for his mercy. As it is written, Because of this I will confess you among the Gentiles, and I will sing praises to your name .
local: O tum dɩm ta yɩ sɩ kʋ pa dwi-gɛtiinǝ bam dɩ mʋ ba ba zuli Wɛ DƖ na jɩgɩ ba yibwǝnǝ tɩn ŋwaanɩ, nɩ Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm na tagɩ te kʋ wɩ: «Amʋ wʋ́ wǝli dɩ dwi-gɛ tiinǝ bam a zuli nmʋ, yɩ a leeni a tee nmʋ yɩrɩ.».

eng: And again, it says, Rejoice, Gentiles, with his people .
local: Kʋ ta pʋpʋnɩ kʋ wɩ: «Abam dwi-gɛ tiinǝ bam wǝli-na dɩ Wɛ nɔɔna bam maama á taá kɩ wʋpolo.».

eng: And again, Praise the Lord, all you Gentiles, and all the people should sing his praises .
local: Kʋ ta wɩ: «Abam dwi-gɛ tiinǝ bam maama taá zuli-na Yuutu Baŋa-Wɛ. Pa-na lʋgʋ baŋa dwi maama taa tee-DƖ.».

eng: And again, Isaiah says, There will be a root of Jesse, who will also rise to rule the Gentiles. The Gentiles will place their hope in him .
local: Ezayidɩ dɛɛn tagɩ o wɩ: «Zesedwi dɩm tu dɩdʋa wʋ́ zaŋɩ o ba sɩ o taa te lʋgʋ baŋa dwi tiinǝ maama, yɩ bantʋ wʋ́ ta jɩgɩ tɩɩna o ŋwaanɩ.».

eng: May the God of hope fill you with all joy and peace in faith so that you overflow with hope by the power of the Holy Spirit.
local: Wɛ dɩlʋ na paɩ á jɩgɩ tɩɩna tɩn wʋ́ pa á tiini á taá jɩgɩ wʋpolo dɩ wʋ-zuru, á na kɩ á wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ DƖ tɩn ŋwaanɩ. Wɛ Joro kʋm dam laan wʋ́ pa á na jɩgɩ tɩɩna dɩ Wɛ te tɩn fɔgɩ kʋ puli kʋ ja gaalɩ.

eng: My brothers and sisters, I myself am convinced that you yourselves are full of goodness, filled with all knowledge, and are able to teach each other.
local: A ko-biǝ-ba, amʋ tɩtɩ ye nɩ abam kɩ kǝm-laarʋ zanzan mʋ, yɩ á tiini á jɩgɩ yǝno kʋ paɩ á waɩ á brɩ daanɩ dɩ Wɛ cɩga kam.

eng: But Ive written to you in a sort of daring way, partly to remind you of what you already know. Im writing to you in this way because of the grace that was given to me by God.
local: Amʋ pʋpʋnɩ wǝǝnu tɩdonnǝ dɩ baarɩ mʋ tɔnɔ kʋntʋ wʋnɩ, sɩ a maa guli abam wǝǝnu tɩlʋ á na maŋɩ á zaasɩ tɩn. Amʋ pʋpʋnɩ kʋntʋ dɩ Wɛ na pɛ-nɩ yu-yoŋo.

eng: It helps me to be a minister of Christ Jesus to the Gentiles. Im working as a priest of Gods gospel so that the offering of the Gentiles can be acceptable and made holy by the Holy Spirit.
local: sɩ a taa yɩ Zezi Krisi tɩntʋŋnʋ dwi-gɛtiinǝ bam ŋwaanɩ tɩn mʋ. Amʋ na tʋŋɩ a pa Wɛ te tɩn yɩ sɩ a yǝni a tɔɔlɩ DƖ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam mʋ, sɩ a wanɩ a joŋi dwi-gɛ tiinǝ a kɩ-ba Wɛ jɩŋa nɩ, sɩ ba pa DƖ wʋ poli, DƖ Jorokʋm na fɔgɩ kʋ kwɛ ba bɩcara tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: So in Christ Jesus I brag about things that have to do with God.
local: Kʋntʋ, amʋ na ŋwɩ dɩ Zezi Krisi tɩn ŋwaanɩ, a kɩ wʋpolo dɩ a na tʋŋɩ a pa Wɛ te tɩn.

eng: I dont dare speak about anything except what Christ has done through me to bring about the obedience of the Gentiles. He did it by what Ive said and what Ive done.
local: Amʋ nan ba jɩgɩ baarɩ sɩ a ŋɔɔnɩ kʋlʋkʋlʋ, kʋ na daɩ Zezi Krisi na mɛ amʋ o kɩ kʋlʋ tɩn yɩranɩ. Kʋ yɩ Zezi mʋ pɛ kʋ tɔgɩ dɩ a ni-taanɩ dɩ a tɩtʋŋa yɩ dwi-gɛ tiinǝ bam sɛ Wɛ.

eng: by the power of signs and wonders, and by the power of Gods Spirit. So Ive completed the circuit of preaching Christs gospel from Jerusalem all the way around to Illyricum.
local: Ba ma sɛ Wɛ dɩ DƖ na dɛ DƖ Joro kʋm dam ŋwaanɩ DƖ pa ba na wo-kɩnkagɩla dɩ maana yalʋ na brɩ DƖ dam tɩn. Kʋ yɩ kʋntʋ doŋ mʋ amʋ zɩgɩ Zeruzalɛm nɩ a tʋlɩ je sɩm maama a vu a yi Yiliiri, yɩ a brɩ Wɛ cɩga kalʋ maama na yɩ Zezi Krisi kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam nyɩm tɩn.

eng: In this way, I have a goal to preach the gospel where they havent heard of Christ yet, so that I wont be building on someone elses foundation.
local: Maŋa maama amʋ lagɩ sɩ a kwaanɩ a taa tɔɔlɩ Zezi kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam je sɩlʋ nɩ, ba daa ta na wʋ ni Zezi Krisi taanɩ dɩm da tɩn mʋ. Amʋ ba lagɩ sɩ a tɔɔlɩ-ka je sɩlʋ nɩ, ba na maŋɩ ba ni-ka tɩn, sɩ kʋ yɩ taa nyɩ nɩ, nɔɔnʋ wʋdoŋ kǝbrǝ yuu nɩ mʋ amʋ tu a lɔ.

eng: Instead, as its written, Those who hadnt been told about him will see, and those who hadnt heard will understand .
local: nɩ kʋ na maŋɩ kʋ pʋpʋnɩ Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm wʋnɩ te kʋ wɩ: «Ba ta na wʋ tɔɔlɩ o kwǝrǝ ba brɩ balʋ tɩn laan wʋ́ ba ba lwarɩ-ka. Balʋ ta na wʋ ni o ŋwa tɩn laan wʋ́ ba ba ni o cɩga kam kuri.».

eng: Thats why Ive been stopped so many times from coming to see you.
local: Mʋ kʋ kuri amʋ gɛ laŋa kuni zanzan sɩ a ba abam te.

eng: But now, since I dont have any place to work in these regions anymore, and since Ive wanted to come to see you for many years.
local: Kʋ daarɩ lele kʋntʋ, je sɩm kʋntʋ nɩ jǝgǝ daa tǝrǝ ba na wʋ ni Zezi kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam da. Abam fra na maŋɩ ya jɩgɩ amʋ bɩna zanzan sɩ a ba a na abam tɩn.

eng: Ill visit you when I go to Spain. I hope to see you while Im passing through. And I hope you will send me on my way there, after I have first been reenergized by some time in your company.
local: amʋ laan bʋŋɩ sɩ a ba maŋa kalʋ a na lagɩ a zaŋɩ a vu Ɛsɩpanyɩ tɩn. Amʋ lagɩ sɩ a tɔgɩ abam te, sɩ a wanɩ a kɩ wʋpolo dɩ abam maŋa fɩnfɩɩn, sɩ á laan wanɩ á wǝli-nɩ sɩ a kwe cwǝŋǝ a kɛ.

eng: But now Im going to Jerusalem, to serve Gods people.
local: Kʋ daarɩ lele kʋntʋ amʋ lagɩ a vu Zeruzalɛm mʋ, sɩ a tʋŋɩ a wǝli Zezi nɔɔna balʋ na wʋ dáanɩ tɩn.

eng: Macedonia and Achaia have been happy to make a contribution for the poor among Gods people in Jerusalem.
local: Zezi kɔgɔ kʋm nɔɔna balʋ na wʋ Masɩdʋanɩ dɩ Akayi tɩɩnɩ dɩm nɩ tɩn mʋ mɛ ba wʋbʋŋa ba la sǝbu, sɩ ba ma wǝli Zezi nɔɔna balʋ na wʋ Zeruzalɛm nɩ yɩ yinigǝ jɩgɩ-ba tɩn.

eng: They were happy to do this, and they are actually in debt to Gods people in Jerusalem. If the Gentiles got a share of the Jewish peoples spiritual resources, they ought to minister to them with material resources.
local: Kʋ yɩ ba tɩtɩ mʋ mɛ ba wʋbʋŋa ba kɩ kʋntʋ. Kʋ nan maŋɩ sɩ ba wǝli-ba kʋntʋ doŋ, bɛŋwaanɩ Zwifǝ bam ya maŋɩ ba kwe wǝǝnu tɩlʋ Wɛ Jorona pɛ-ba tɩn mʋ ba cɛ dɩ dwi-gɛtiinǝ bam. Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ dwi-gɛ tiinǝ bam maŋɩ sɩ ba dɩ daa wǝli Zwifǝ bam dɩ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ na yɩ ba yɩra zǝnǝ nyɩm tɩn.

eng: So then after I have finished this job and have safely delivered the final amount of the Gentiles offering to them, I will leave for Spain, visiting you on the way.
local: Amʋ na ti tɩtʋŋɩ dɩntʋ yɩ a kwe sǝbu kʋm maama a kɩ nɔɔna bam jɩŋa nɩ, amʋ laan wʋ́ tɔgɩ abam te, yɩ a daarɩ a kɛ a vu Ɛsɩpanyɩ.

eng: And I know that when I come to you I will come with the fullest blessing of Christ.
local: Amʋ nan ye nɩ, a na tu abam te, Zezi Krisi wʋ́ kɩ abam lanyɩranɩ kʋ ja gaalɩ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, I urge you, through our Lord Jesus Christ and through the love of the Spirit, to join me in my struggles in your prayers to God for me.
local: A ko-biǝ-ba, amʋ nan lagɩ a loori abam dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi Krisi yɩrɩ ŋwaanɩ, dɩ sono kʋlʋ Wɛ Joro kʋm na pɛ dɩbam tɩn ŋwaanɩ, sɩ á tɔgɩ á wǝli-nɩ á taá tiini á loori Wɛ á pa-nɩ a tɩtʋŋ-cɛɛra yam wʋnɩ.

eng: Pray that I will be rescued from the people in Judea who dont believe. Also, pray that my service for Jerusalem will be acceptable to Gods people there.
local: Loori-na Wɛ, sɩ DƖ joŋi-nɩ balʋ na wʋ Zude nɩ yɩ ba vɩn Zezi tɩn jɩŋa nɩ, sɩ DƖ daarɩ DƖ pa Zezi nɔɔna balʋ na wʋ Zeruzalɛm nɩ tɩn joŋi kʋlʋ amʋ na wʋ́ pa-ba tɩn dɩ wʋpolo.

eng: so that I can come to you with joy by Gods will and be reenergized with your company.
local: Wɛ na sɛ, amʋ laan wʋ́ wanɩ a ba abam te dɩ wʋpolo, yɩ a di ywǝǝni dɩ abam.

eng: May the God of peace be with you all. Amen.
local: Bɩcarɩ-zuru Tu Baŋa-Wɛ wʋ́ ta wʋ abam tee nɩ. Amina.

eng: Im introducing our sister Phoebe to you, who is a servant of the church in Cenchreae.
local: Amʋ nan lagɩ a brɩ abam dɩ́ ko-bu Feebe na yɩ wʋlʋ tɩn mʋ. Wʋntʋ yɩ kaanɩ wʋlʋ na tʋŋɩ o wǝli Zezi kɔgɔ kʋlʋ na wʋ Sankrɩ nɩ tɩn mʋ.

eng: Welcome her in the Lord in a way that is worthy of Gods people, and give her whatever she needs from you, because she herself has been a sponsor of many people, myself included.
local: Abam nan maŋɩ sɩ á joŋ-o lanyɩranɩ dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm ŋwaanɩ, nɩ kʋ na maŋɩ sɩ Wɛ nɔɔna taa kɩ te tɩn. Á taá wǝl-o dɩ kʋlʋ maama o na lagɩ abam tee nɩ tɩn, bɛŋwaanɩ o tɩtɩ dɩ zǝni nɔɔna zanzan, kʋ na dwe dɩdɩ dɩ amʋ dɩ.

eng: Say hello to Prisca and Aquila, my coworkers in Christ Jesus.
local: Jɔɔnɩ-na Prisili dɩ Akwila á pa-nɩ. Bantʋ mʋ tɔgɩ dɩ amʋ yɩ dɩ́ tʋŋɩ dɩ́ pa Zezi Krisi.

eng: who risked their own necks for my life. Im not the only one who thanks God for them, but all the churches of the Gentiles do the same.
local: Ba ya gɛ fɩɩn sɩ ba tɩ amʋ ŋwaanɩ. Amʋ nan kɩ-ba le, kʋ nan daɩ amʋ yɩranɩ, kʋ yɩ dwi-gɛtiinǝ balʋ maama na tu ba sɛ Zezi tɩn dɩ mʋ kɩ-ba le.

eng: Also say hello to the church that meets in their house. Say hello to Epaenetus, my dear friend, who was the first convert in Asia for Christ.
local: Jɔɔnɩ-na Zezi kɔgɔ kʋlʋ na jeeri ba sɔŋɔ kʋm nɩ tɩn á pa-nɩ. Jɔɔnɩ-na amʋ ciloŋ-sono Yipayinɛtɩ á pa-nɩ, wʋntʋ mʋ yɩ wʋlʋ na dɛ yigǝ o sɛ Zezi Krisi Azi tɩɩnɩ dɩm maama wʋnɩ tɩn.

eng: Say hello to Mary, who has worked very hard for you.
local: Jɔɔnɩ-na Mari wʋlʋ na tiini o tʋŋɩ o pa abam tɩn dɩ.

eng: Say hello to Andronicus and Junia, my relatives and my fellow prisoners. They are prominent among the apostles, and they were in Christ before me.
local: Jɔɔnɩ-na amʋ dwi tiinǝ Andronikusi dɩ Zuniyasɩ. Bantʋ mʋ ya tɔgɩ ba wʋ pɩɩna digǝ nɩ dɩ amʋ. Ba yɩ balʋ na jɩgɩ yɩr-ŋʋm Zezi tɩntʋŋna bam wʋnɩ, yɩ bantʋ sɛ Zezi Krisi ba loori amʋ.

eng: Say hello to Ampliatus, my dear friend in the Lord.
local: Jɔɔnɩ-na Ampiliatusi wʋlʋ na yɩ a ciloŋ-sono dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm ŋwaanɩ tɩn á pa-nɩ.

eng: Say hello to Urbanus, our coworker in Christ, and my dear friend Stachys.
local: Jɔɔnɩ-na Yuribɛn wʋlʋ na tɔgɩ dɩ dɩbam o tʋŋɩ Zezi Krisi tɩtʋŋa tɩn, dɩdaanɩ amʋ ciloŋ-sono Sɩtakisi dɩ.

eng: Say hello to Apelles, who is tried and true in Christ. Say hello to the members of the household of Aristobulus.
local: Jɔɔnɩ-na Apeeli wʋlʋ na brɩ nɩ o yɩ Zezi Krisi tɩntʋŋnʋ cɩga cɩga tɩn á pa-nɩ. Jɔɔnɩ-na Arisobuli sɔŋɔ tiinǝ bam dɩ.

eng: Say hello to my relative Herodion. Say hello to the members of the household of Narcissus who are in the Lord.
local: Jɔɔnɩ-na amʋ dwi tu Erodiyɔn á pa-nɩ. Jɔɔnɩ-na balʋ na yɩ Narisisi sɔŋɔ tiinǝ yɩ ba yɩ dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm nɔɔna tɩn á pa-nɩ.

eng: Say hello to Tryphaena and Tryphosa, who are workers for the Lord. Say hello to my dear friend Persis, who has worked hard in the Lord.
local: Jɔɔnɩ-na Trifɛnɩ dɩ Trifɔsɩ, bantʋ mʋ yɩ kaana balʋ na tiini ba tʋŋɩ dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm tɩtʋŋa yam tɩn. Jɔɔnɩ-na a ko-bu-sono Pɛɛrsidi, wʋntʋ mʋ yɩ kaanɩ wʋlʋ dɩ na tiini o tʋŋɩ o pa dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm.

eng: Say hello to Rufus, who is an outstanding believer, along with his mother and mine.
local: Jɔɔnɩ-na Rufusi wʋlʋ na yɩ dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm tɩntʋŋ-ŋʋm tɩn, dɩ o nu wʋlʋ na kɩ amʋ lanyɩranɩ nɩ o tɩtɩ bu te tɩn.

eng: Say hello to Asyncritus, Phlegon, Hermes, Patrobas, Hermas, and the brothers and sisters who are with them.
local: Jɔɔnɩ-na Asɩnkriti dɩ Filigon dɩ Ɛrmɛsɩ dɩ Patrobasɩ dɩ Ɛrmasɩ, dɩdaanɩ dɩ́ ko-biǝ balʋ maama na wʋ ba tee nɩ tɩn.

eng: Say hello to Philologus and Julia, Nereus and his sister, and Olympas, and all the saints who are with them.
local: Jɔɔnɩ-na Filologi dɩ Zuli, dɩ Neere dɩ o nakɔ, dɩ Olimpa, dɩdaanɩ Wɛ nɔɔna balʋ maama na wʋ ba tee nɩ tɩn.

eng: Say hello to each other with a holy kiss. All the churches of Christ say hello to you.
local: Á na jeeri daanɩ, sɩ á taá jɔɔnɩ daanɩ lanyɩranɩ dɩ sono dɩ wʋ-poŋo. Zezi kɔgɔ kʋm na wʋ je sɩlʋ maama nɩ tɩn dɩ jɔɔnɩ abam.

eng: Brothers and sisters, I urge you to watch out for people who create divisions and problems against the teaching that you learned. Keep away from them.
local: A ko-biǝ-ba, a nan loori abam sɩ á fɔgɩ á cɩ á tɩtɩ dɩ balʋ na jaanɩ kampwara ba tui nɔɔna tɩtarɩ, yɩ ba paɩ ba tusi Wɛ cwǝŋǝ wʋnɩ tɩn. Bantʋ mʋ jɩgɩ zaasɩm dɩlʋ ba na brɩ abam tɩn ba yáala. Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ ja-na á tɩtɩ dɩ ba.

eng: People like that arent serving the Lord. They are serving their own feelings. They deceive the hearts of innocent people with smooth talk and flattery.
local: Nɔɔna bam kʋntʋ doŋ ba kɩ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi Krisi na lagɩ kʋlʋ tɩn, ba tɔgɩ ba tɩtɩ fra na zʋʋrɩ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ tɩn mʋ. Ba yǝni ba ŋɔɔnɩ bɩtar-ywe mʋ, yɩ ba ma ni-sʋŋɩ ba ma ganɩ balʋ na ba va ni tɩn ba pa ba wʋbʋŋa lǝni.

eng: The news of your obedience has reached everybody, so Im happy for you. But I want you to be wise about whats good, and innocent about whats evil.
local: Nɔɔna maama ye abam na tɔgɩ Wɛ lanyɩranɩ te tɩn, kʋntʋ mʋ paɩ amʋ tiini a jɩgɩ wʋpolo dɩ abam. Amʋ nan lagɩ sɩ abam taá jɩgɩ swan mʋ sɩ á taá kɩ kʋlʋ na lana tɩn, sɩ á daarɩ á taá ye á tɩtɩ sɩ lwarɩm yɩ cɔgɩ abam.

eng: The God of peace will soon crush Satan under your feet. The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with you.
local: Wɛ dɩlʋ na paɩ nɔɔna wʋ-zuru tɩn bá daanɩ DƖ cɔgɩ sʋtaanɩdam, yɩ DƖ laan pa á nɔ-dɩ dɩ á nɛ. Dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi wʋ́ pa abam yu-yoŋo.

eng: Timothy my coworker says hello to you, and Lucius, Jason, and Sosipater, my relatives.
local: Timoti wʋlʋ na tɔgɩ dɩ amʋ o tʋŋɩ tɩn dɩ jɔɔnɩ abam. Amʋ dwi tiinǝ Lukiyusi dɩ Zazɔn dɩ Sosipatɛɛrɩ dɩ jɔɔnɩ abam.

eng: Im Tertius, and Im writing this letter to you in the Lord—hello!.
local: Amʋ Tɛrɩtiyusi mʋ pʋpʋnɩ Pooli ni-taanɩ dɩntʋ yɩ o pa abam, amʋ dɩ nan jɔɔnɩ abam dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm ŋwaanɩ.

eng: Gaius, who is host to me and to the whole church, says hello to you. Erastus the city treasurer says hello to you, along with our brother Quartus.
local: Gayusi wʋlʋ amʋ Pooli na zʋʋrɩ o sɔŋɔ nɩ yɩ Zezi kɔgɔ kʋm dɩ jeeri da tɩn jɔɔnɩ abam. Erasɩtɩ wʋlʋ na yɩ tɩʋ kʋm sǝbu-tiŋnu tɩn, dɩdaanɩ dɩ́ ko-bu Kwatusi dɩ jɔɔnɩ abam. .

eng: May the glory be to God who can strengthen you with my good news and the message that I preach about Jesus Christ. He can strengthen you with the announcement of the secret that was kept quiet for a long time.
local: Dɩ́ kɩ Wɛ le, dɩntʋ dam dɩm mʋ paɩ á fɔgɩ á zɩgɩ lanyɩranɩ dɩ á na sɛ DƖ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kalʋ amʋ na tɔɔlɩ Zezi Krisi ŋwaanɩ tɩn. Kʋntʋ mʋ abam laan tu á lwarɩ Wɛ cɩga kalʋ dɛɛn ya na sǝgi faŋa faŋa tɩn.

eng: Now that secret is revealed through what the prophets wrote. It is made known to the Gentiles in order to lead to their faithful obedience based on the command of the eternal God.
local: Lele kʋntʋ Wɛ tɔgɩ DƖ nijoŋnǝ bam dɛɛn na pʋpʋnɩ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ ba tiŋi tɩn ŋwaanɩ mʋ, DƖ pa DƖ cɩga kam kʋntʋ ba ka lwarɩ jaja. Wɛ dɩlʋ na jɩgɩ ŋwɩa sɩ kʋ taa ve maŋa kalʋ na ba ti tɩn laan mʋ pɛ ni, sɩ lʋgʋ baŋa dwi maama na cwǝŋǝ ba lwarɩ DƖ cɩga kam, sɩ ba daarɩ ba kɩ ba wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ DƖ ba sɛ DƖ ni.

eng: May the glory be to God, who alone is wise! May the glory be to him through Jesus Christ forever! Amen.
local: Dɩntʋ yɩranɩ mʋ yɩ swan maama tu, yɩ DƖ ba jɩgɩ doŋ. Dɩntʋ mʋ maŋɩ dɩ zulǝ sɩ kʋ taa ve maŋa kalʋ na ba ti tɩn Zezi Krisi yɩrɩ ŋwaanɩ. Amina.

eng: From Paul, called by Gods will to be an apostle of Jesus Christ, and from Sosthenes our brother.
local: Amʋ Pooli wʋlʋ Wɛ na kuri dɩ DƖ tɩtɩ wʋbʋŋa sɩ a taa yɩ Zezi Krisi tɩntʋŋnʋ tɩn mʋ pʋpʋnɩ tɔnɔ kʋntʋ, yɩ dɩ́ ko-bu Sositɛnɩ dɩ tɔgɩ o wǝli-nɩ.

eng: To Gods church that is in Corinth: To those who have been made holy to God in Christ Jesus, who are called to be Gods people. Together with all those who call upon the name of our Lord Jesus Christ in every place—hes their Lord and ours!.
local: Dɩ́ pʋpʋnɩ sɩ dɩ́ pa abam balʋ na yɩ Zezi kɔgɔ kʋm wʋ nɔɔna yɩ á zʋʋrɩ Korɛntɩ nɩ tɩn mʋ. Abam mʋ yɩ balʋ Wɛ na kuri sɩ á taá yɩ DƖ nɔɔna Zezi Krisi ŋwaanɩ tɩn. DƖ ma lɩ abam sɩ á taá yɩ DƖ nɔɔna, kʋ wǝli dɩ balʋ na wʋ je maama yɩ ba zuli Zezi Krisi tɩn. Wʋntʋ mʋ yɩ bantʋ dɩ dɩbam maama Yuutu.

eng: Grace to you and peace from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Dɩ́ Ko Wɛ dɩ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi Krisi wʋ́ pa abam yazurǝ dɩ yu-yoŋo.

eng: I thank my God always for you, because of Gods grace that was given to you in Christ Jesus.
local: Maŋa maama a yǝni a kɩ Wɛ le abam ŋwaanɩ, dɩ DƖ na pɛ abam yu-yoŋo Zezi Krisi ŋwaanɩ tɩn.

eng: That is, you were made rich through him in everything: in all your communication and every kind of knowledge.
local: Abam na ŋwɩ dɩ Zezi tɩn, Wɛ sɩɩnɩ DƖ pa abam yu-yoŋo woŋo maama wʋnɩ, sɩ á taá ye DƖ cɩga kam maama, sɩ á kwǝri á taá waɩ á ŋɔɔnɩ DƖ taanɩ dɩm.

eng: in the same way that the testimony about Christ was confirmed with you.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ, dɩ́ dɛɛn na tɔɔlɩ Zezi Krisi kwǝrǝ kam dɩ abam tɩn, ka tiini ka ja kuri abam tee nɩ.

eng: The result is that you arent missing any spiritual gift while you wait for our Lord Jesus Christ to be revealed.
local: Á nɛ Wɛ pɛɛra yalʋ maama á na lagɩ tɩn, yɩ á cǝgi dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi Krisi sɩ o joori o ba sɩ dɩ́ na-o.

eng: He will also confirm your testimony about Christ until the end so that you will be blameless on the day of our Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Wʋntʋ mʋ wʋ́ pa á taá zɩgɩ kǝŋkǝŋ sɩ kʋ vu yi tiim maŋa, sɩ á yɩ taá jɩgɩ wo-lɔŋɔ dɛ dɩm o na wʋ́ joori o ba tɩn nɩ.

eng: God is faithful, and you were called by him to partnership with his Son, Jesus Christ our Lord.
local: Wɛ yɩ cɩga tu, yɩ dɩntʋ mʋ kuri abam sɩ á taá ŋwɩ dɩ DƖ Bu Zezi Krisi, o na yɩ dɩbam Yuutu tɩn.

eng: Now I encourage you, brothers and sisters, in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ: Agree with each other and dont be divided into rival groups. Instead, be restored with the same mind and the same purpose.
local: A ko-biǝ-ba, a loori abam dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi Krisi yɩrɩ ŋwaanɩ sɩ á taá jɩgɩ ni-mɔrɔ, sɩ á yɩ taá pɔɔrɩ daanɩ. Á nan kwaanɩ-na á kɩ á wʋbʋŋa daanɩ, sɩ á kɩ ni dɩdwɩ.

eng: My brothers and sisters, Chloes people gave me some information about you, that youre fighting with each other.
local: A tagɩ kʋntʋ, Klowe-ba sɔŋɔ tiinǝ na tagɩ dɩ amʋ ba wɩ á magɩ kantɔgɔ mʋ daanɩ tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: What I mean is this: that each one of you says, I belong to Paul, I belong to Apollos, I belong to Cephas, I belong to Christ.
local: Abam badaara wɩ, á tɔgɩ Pooli mʋ. Abam badonnǝ maa wɩ, á tɔgɩ Apolɔsɩ mʋ. Badonnǝ maa wɩ, ba tɔgɩ Pɩyɛɛrɩ mʋ. Babam dɩ maa wɩ, ba tɔgɩ Zezi Krisi mʋ.

eng: Has Christ been divided? Was Paul crucified for you, or were you baptized in Pauls name?.
local: Abam bʋŋɩ nɩ Zezi Krisi pɔɔrɩ yɩra yɩra mʋ na? Amʋ Pooli mʋ tɩgɩ tʋʋn-dagarakam baŋa nɩ abam ŋwaanɩ na? Ba miisi abam na wʋnɩ amʋ yɩrɩ ŋwaanɩ mʋ na?.

eng: Thank God that I didnt baptize any of you, except Crispus and Gaius.
local: A kɩ Wɛ le, bɛŋwaanɩ amʋ wʋ miisi abam wʋlʋwʋlʋ na wʋnɩ, kʋ na daɩ Krisipu dɩ Gayusi yɩranɩ.

eng: so that nobody can say that you were baptized in my name!.
local: Kʋntʋ tɩn, nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ bá wanɩ o ta nɩ a miisi abam na wʋnɩ amʋ yɩrɩ ŋwaanɩ.

eng: Oh, I baptized the house of Stephanas too. Otherwise, I dont know if I baptized anyone else.
local: Ah, a guli a ta na miisi Sɩtefanasɩ dɩ o sɔŋɔ tiinǝ dɩ, kʋ daarɩ kʋntʋ kwaga nɩ, wʋlʋ na wǝli da, a daa wʋ guli.

eng: Christ didnt send me to baptize but to preach the good news. And Christ didnt send me to preach the good news with clever words so that Christs cross wont be emptied of its meaning.
local: Zezi Krisi tʋŋɩ-nɩ sɩ a taa tɔɔlɩ o kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam mʋ a brɩ nɔɔna, sɩ o wʋ tʋŋɩ-nɩ sɩ a taa miisi nɔɔna na wʋnɩ. A na tɔɔlɩ Wɛ kwǝrǝ kam te tɩn, kʋ daɩ dɩ lʋgʋ baŋa swan mʋ a maa tɔɔlɩ-ka. A ya na tɔɔlɩ-ka dɩ lʋgʋ baŋa swan mʋ, Zezi tʋʋnɩ dɩm dagara kam baŋa nɩ tɩn ya bá ta jɩgɩ kuri kʋ paɩ nabiinǝ.

eng: The message of the cross is foolishness to those who are being destroyed. But it is the power of God for those of us who are being saved.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ Zezi tʋʋnɩ dɩm dagara kam baŋa nɩ tɩn taanɩ dɩm yɩ jwǝrim mʋ balʋ yigǝ na tǝrǝ dɩ Wɛ tɩn tee nɩ. Kʋ nan na yɩ dɩbam balʋ Wɛ na vrɩ lwarɩm wʋnɩ tɩn, taanɩ dɩntʋ yɩ Wɛ tɩtɩ dam mʋ dɩ dɩbam.

eng: It is written in scripture: I will destroy the wisdom of the wise, and I will reject the intelligence of the intelligent .
local: Kʋ nan maŋɩ kʋ pʋpʋnɩ Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm wʋnɩ kʋ wɩ: «Amʋ Baŋa-Wɛ wʋ́ cɔgɩ swan tiinǝ wʋbʋŋa, yɩ a daarɩ a pa yi-pʋrɩ-nyɩna yi-pʋrʋ kʋm yáalɩ.».

eng: Where are the wise? Where are the legal experts? Where are todays debaters? Hasnt God made the wisdom of the world foolish?.
local: Swan tiinǝ swan yam daa jɩgɩ kuri na? Tɔn-yeenǝ dɩ nɔɔna balʋ na ye ŋwaŋa tɩn yi-pʋrʋ kʋm jɩgɩ kuri na? Wɛ nan brɩ dɩbam nɩ lʋgʋ baŋa swan yam maama yɩ jwǝrim mʋ.

eng: In Gods wisdom, he determined that the world wouldnt come to know him through its wisdom. Instead, God was pleased to save those who believe through the foolishness of preaching.
local: Wɛ swan yam ŋwaanɩ nabiinǝ bá wanɩ ba ma ba tɩtɩ swan ba lwarɩ-DƖ. Wɛ nan lɩ DƖ wʋbʋŋa sɩ DƖ tɔgɩ kwǝrǝ kalʋ dɩ́ na brɩ nɔɔna yɩ ba paɩ ka yɩ jwǝrim tɩn ŋwaanɩ mʋ, DƖ ma vrɩ balʋ na sɛ kwǝrǝ kam tɩn DƖ yagɩ.

eng: Jews ask for signs, and Greeks look for wisdom.
local: Zwifǝ bam lagɩ sɩ ba na wo-kɩnkagɩla yalʋ na brɩ Wɛ dam tɩn mʋ. Grɛkɩ tiinǝ maa lagɩ sɩ ba cǝgi taanɩ dɩlʋ na wʋ́ brɩ-ba swan tɩn.

eng: but we preach Christ crucified, which is a scandal to Jews and foolishness to Gentiles.
local: Kʋ nan na yɩ dɩbam, dɩ́ tɔɔlɩ Zezi Krisi wʋlʋ na tɩgɩ tʋʋn-dagarabaŋa nɩ tɩn kwǝrǝ mʋ. Kwǝrǝ kam kʋntʋ maa yɩ ta-balɔrɔ mʋ Zwifǝ bam tee nɩ, yɩ ka yɩ jwǝrim mʋ dɩ dwi-gɛ tiinǝ bam dɩ.

eng: But to those who are called—both Jews and Greeks—Christ is Gods power and Gods wisdom.
local: Kʋ daarɩ dɩbam balʋ Wɛ na kuri tɩn, kʋ na yɩ Zwifǝ bam naa dwi-gɛ tiinǝ dɩ, taanɩ dɩm kʋntʋ mʋ pɛ dɩ́ lwarɩ nɩ Zezi Krisi yɩ Wɛ swan yam dɩ DƖ dam tu.

eng: This is because the foolishness of God is wiser than human wisdom, and the weakness of God is stronger than human strength.
local: Woŋo kʋlʋ nɔɔna na paɩ kʋ yɩ jwǝrim Wɛ tee nɩ tɩn garɩ nabiinǝ swan maama, yɩ kʋlʋ na bwǝmmǝ DƖ tee nɩ tɩn dana kʋ dwe nabiinǝ dam maama.

eng: Look at your situation when you were called, brothers and sisters! By ordinary human standards not many were wise, not many were powerful, not many were from the upper class.
local: A ko-biǝ-ba, á bʋŋɩ á dɛɛn na yɩ te yɩ Wɛ laan ba DƖ kuri abam tɩn. Kʋ daɩ á zanzan yi dɛɛn mʋ pʋʋrɩ nɩnɛɛnɩ nabiinǝ na lagɩ yi-pʋrʋ kʋlʋ tɩn. Kʋ daɩ á zanzan mʋ yɩ dɩdɛɛra, naa á zanzan mʋ nuŋi nadunǝ sam.

eng: But God chose what the world considers foolish to shame the wise. God chose what the world considers weak to shame the strong.
local: Wɛ nan kuri balʋ nabiinǝ na paɩ ba yɩ jwǝǝru tɩn mʋ, sɩ DƖ ma pa cavɩɩra di swan tiinǝ. DƖ ma kuri balʋ nabiinǝ na paɩ ba yɩ nabwǝnǝ tɩn, sɩ DƖ ma pa cavɩɩra di dam tiinǝ.

eng: And God chose what the world considers low-class and low-life—what is considered to be nothing—to reduce what is considered to be something to nothing.
local: DƖ ma daarɩ DƖ kuri balʋ nabiinǝ na gooni yɩ ba ba nɩgɩ tɩn, sɩ DƖ ma pa wǝǝnu tɩlʋ nabiinǝ na paɩ tɩ jɩgɩ kuri tɩn ji kafɛ.

eng: So no human being can brag in Gods presence.
local: Wɛ kuri nɔɔna bam kʋntʋ doŋ mʋ, sɩ nabiinǝ yɩ zaŋɩ ba wanɩ ba tee ba tɩtɩ DƖ yigǝ nɩ.

eng: It is because of God that you are in Christ Jesus. He became wisdom from God for us. This means that he made us righteous and holy, and he delivered us.
local: Wɛ nan mʋ pɛ abam ŋwɩ dɩ Zezi Krisi. Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ swan yalʋ Zezi na joŋi Wɛ tee nɩ tɩn laan jigi dɩbam swan. Wʋntʋ mʋ paɩ dɩ́ jɩgɩ cɩga Wɛ tee nɩ. O maa paɩ dɩ́ yɩ Wɛ nɔɔna. O ma kwe o tɩtɩ ŋwɩa o ma vrɩ dɩbam lwarɩm wʋnɩ.

eng: This is consistent with what was written: The one who brags should brag in the Lord! .
local: Kʋntʋ tɩn, kʋlʋ na pʋpʋnɩ Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm wʋnɩ tɩn yɩ cɩga mʋ, dɩ kʋ na wɩ: «Wʋlʋ na lagɩ sɩ o kɩ wʋpolo tɩn, sɩ o pa kʋ taa yɩ dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm ŋwaanɩ.».

eng: When I came to you, brothers and sisters, I didnt come preaching Gods secrets to you like I was an expert in speech or wisdom.
local: A ko-biǝ-ba, amʋ dɛɛn na tu abam te tɩn, a wʋ ŋɔɔnɩ swan naa yiyiu-ŋwɛ zanzan dɩ abam, dɩ a na tɔɔlɩ Wɛ kwǝrǝ kam a brɩ abam te tɩn.

eng: I had made up my mind not to think about anything while I was with you except Jesus Christ, and to preach him as crucified.
local: A wʋ kɩ a wʋbʋŋa nɩ sɩ a brɩ abam woŋo kʋdoŋ, kʋ na daɩ Zezi Krisi taanɩ dɩm yɩranɩ dɩ o tʋʋnɩ dɩm dagara kam baŋa nɩ tɩn.

eng: I stood in front of you with weakness, fear, and a lot of shaking.
local: A na wʋ abam tee nɩ maŋa kalʋ tɩn, a bwǝnǝ, yɩ fʋʋnɩ dɩ jɩgɩ-nɩ, yɩ a yɩra saɩ.

eng: My message and my preaching werent presented with convincing wise words but with a demonstration of the Spirit and of power.
local: A taanɩ dɩm dɩ a na tɔɔlɩ Wɛ kwǝrǝ kam te tɩn, kʋ daɩ nabiinǝ swan mʋ a ma a tɔɔlɩ-ka sɩ a pa á sɛ. Kʋ yɩ Wɛ Jorokʋm dam mʋ pɛ abam lwarɩ nɩ taanɩ dɩm yɩ cɩga.

eng: I did this so that your faith might not depend on the wisdom of people but on the power of God.
local: Kʋntʋ tɩn, á na kɩ á wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Zezi tɩn, kʋ yɩ Wɛ dam dɩm ŋwaanɩ mʋ, sɩ kʋ daɩ nabiinǝ swan ŋwaanɩ.

eng: What we say is wisdom to people who are mature. It isnt a wisdom that comes from the present day or from todays leaders who are being reduced to nothing.
local: Dɩbam nan yǝni dɩ́ brɩ balʋ wʋbʋŋa na bɩgɩ tɩn mʋ swan, ya nan daɩ nabiinǝ swan naa lʋgʋ baŋa dɩdɛɛra bam swan. Bantʋ wʋ́ ba ba cɔgɩ dɩ ba dam dɩm maama.

eng: We talk about Gods wisdom, which has been hidden as a secret. God determined this wisdom in advance, before time began, for our glory.
local: Dɩbam na brɩ swan yalʋ tɩn yɩ Wɛ nyɩm mʋ. Nabiinǝ nan yǝri ya ni nɩ, ya na sǝgi dɩ ba tɩn ŋwaanɩ. Wɛ dɛɛn maŋɩ DƖ kɩ DƖ wʋbʋŋa nɩ mʋ kʋ loori lʋgʋ pulim, sɩ DƖ swan yam kʋntʋ pa dɩ́ wanɩ dɩ́ na zulǝ DƖ tee nɩ.

eng: It is a wisdom that none of the present-day rulers have understood, because if they did understand it, they would never have crucified the Lord of glory!.
local: Lʋgʋ baŋa dɩdɛɛra bam wʋlʋwʋlʋ nan wʋ lwarɩ ya kuri. Ba ya na ye, ba ya bá ja Wɛ-sɔŋɔ paarɩ tu Zezi ba pa tʋʋn-dagarabaŋa nɩ ba gʋ.

eng: But this is precisely what is written: God has prepared things for those who love him that no eye has seen, or ear has heard, or that havent crossed the mind of any human being .
local: Kʋ nan kɩ nɩ Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm na tagɩ kʋ wɩ: «Wɛ fɔgɩ DƖ kɩ wo-laarʋ DƖ tiŋi sɩ DƖ pa balʋ na so-DƖ tɩn. Nabiinǝ yi wʋ nɛ wǝǝnu tɩm kʋntʋ doŋ, yɩ ba zwa wʋ ni tɩ ŋwa, yɩ ba ba jɩgɩ tɩ wʋbʋŋa dɩ.».

eng: God has revealed these things to us through the Spirit. The Spirit searches everything, including the depths of God.
local: Wɛ nan tagɩ DƖ Jorokʋm ŋwaanɩ mʋ DƖ ma pa dɩ́ lwarɩ wǝǝnu tɩm kʋntʋ. Wɛ Joro kʋm ye woŋo maama kuri, yɩ kʋ ye Wɛ wʋbʋŋa maama dɩ.

eng: Who knows a persons depths except their own spirit that lives in them? In the same way, no one has known the depths of God except Gods Spirit.
local: Wɔɔ mʋ wʋ́ wanɩ nabiinu wʋbʋŋa o lwarɩ, kʋ na daɩ o tɩtɩ joro? Kʋ nan yɩ kʋntʋ mʋ dɩ Wɛ dɩ, nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ yǝri Wɛ wʋbʋŋa, kʋ na daɩ DƖ tɩtɩ Joro kʋm yɩranɩ.

eng: We havent received the worlds spirit but Gods Spirit so that we can know the things given to us by God.
local: Joro kʋlʋ Wɛ na kɩ dɩbam bɩcara nɩ tɩn daɩ lʋgʋ baŋa nyɩm. Kʋ nuŋi Wɛ te mʋ, sɩ kʋ pa dɩ́ lwarɩ wo-laarʋ tɩlʋ DƖ na pɛ dɩbam zaanɩ tɩn.

eng: These are the things we are talking about—not with words taught by human wisdom but with words taught by the Spirit—we are interpreting spiritual things to spiritual people.
local: Dɩ́ na yǝni dɩ́ brɩ nɔɔna cɩga kam yɩ dɩ́ ŋɔɔnɩ taanɩ dɩlʋ tɩn daɩ nabiinǝ swan taanɩ. Kʋ yɩ Wɛ Joro kʋm mʋ brɩ dɩbam taanɩ dɩlʋ na maŋɩ sɩ dɩ́ taá ŋɔɔnɩ tɩn. Dɩbam tɛ cɩga kalʋ na yɩ Wɛ Joro nyɩm tɩn mʋ dɩ́ brɩ balʋ DƖ Joro kʋm na wʋ ba bɩcara nɩ tɩn.

eng: But people who are unspiritual dont accept the things from Gods Spirit. They are foolishness to them and cant be understood, because they can only be comprehended in a spiritual way.
local: Wɛ Joro kʋm na tǝri wʋlʋ bɩcarɩ nɩ tɩn ba sɛ sɩ o joŋi cɩga kalʋ Wɛ Joro kʋm na brɩ tɩn. Ka yɩ wo-jwǝǝru mʋ o tee nɩ. O bá wanɩ o lwarɩ ka kuri, bɛŋwaanɩ kʋ yɩ Wɛ Joro kʋm mʋ brɩ ka kuri cɩga cɩga.

eng: Spiritual people comprehend everything, but they themselves arent understood by anyone.
local: Wʋlʋ maama Wɛ Joro kʋm na wʋ o bɩcarɩ nɩ tɩn mʋ waɩ o ye woŋo maama kuri. Nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ nan bá wanɩ o na kʋntʋ tu wo-lɔŋɔ o ta.
