eng: Then he appeared to James, then to all the apostles.
local: Zakɩ dɩ ma na-o, yɩ o daarɩ o pa o tɩntʋŋna bam maama na-o.

eng: and last of all he appeared to me, as if I were born at the wrong time.
local: Kʋntʋ kwaga nɩ, o laan ma pa amʋ na nyɩ dɩ bu wʋlʋ ba na lʋga yɩ o lʋra maŋa ta wʋ yi tɩn dɩ na-o.

eng: Im the least important of the apostles. I dont deserve to be called an apostle, because I harassed Gods church.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ amʋ tiini a muri Zezi tɩntʋŋna bam maama wʋnɩ. A ya brɩ a wʋ maŋɩ sɩ ba taa bǝ-nɩ nɩ Zezi tɩntʋŋnʋ, a dɛɛn na bɛɛsɩ Zezi nɔɔna bam tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: I am what I am by Gods grace, and Gods grace hasnt been for nothing. In fact, I have worked harder than all the others—that is, it wasnt me but the grace of God that is with me.
local: Wɛ nan na kɩ-nɩ yu-yoŋo tɩn mʋ pɛ a yɩ a na yɩ wʋlʋ zɩm tɩn. DƖ na kɩ-nɩ yu-yoŋo te tɩn daɩ kafɛ. Amʋ tiini a tʋŋɩ Wɛ tɩtʋŋa yam a dwǝni DƖ tɩntʋŋna bam maama. Kʋ nan daɩ a tɩtɩ dam ŋwaanɩ mʋ a waɩ a tʋŋa. Kʋ yɩ Wɛ na kɩ-nɩ yu-yoŋo yɩ DƖ dam dɩm wʋ amʋ tee nɩ tɩn ŋwaanɩ mʋ.

eng: So then, whether you heard the message from me or them, this is what we preach and this is what you have believed.
local: Dɩbam balʋ na yɩ Zezi tɩntʋŋna tɩn maama yǝni dɩ́ brɩ cɩga dɩdʋa mʋ. Kʋ na yɩ amʋ na brɩ kʋlʋ tɩn, naa bantʋ dɩ na brɩ kʋlʋ tɩn, kʋ yɩ cɩga kalʋ abam na sɛ tɩn mʋ.

eng: So if the message that is preached says that Christ has been raised from the dead, then how can some of you say, Theres no resurrection of the dead?.
local: Dɩbam maama na tɔɔlɩ Wɛ kwǝrǝ kam te tɩn, dɩ́ tɔɔlɩ dɩ́ brɩ nɔɔna nɩ Zezi Krisi bi o yagɩ tʋʋnɩ mʋ. Bɛɛ nan mʋ yɩ abam badonnǝ tɛ á wɩ, twa biim tǝrǝ?.

eng: If theres no resurrection of the dead, then Christ hasnt been raised either.
local: Kʋ ya na yɩ cɩga nɩ twa biim tǝrǝ, kʋ brɩ nɩ Zezi Krisi tɩtɩ dɩ wʋ bi mʋ.

eng: If Christ hasnt been raised, then our preaching is useless and your faith is useless.
local: Wʋntʋ nan ya na wʋ bi, dɩbam kwǝr-tɔɔla kam yɩ kafɛ mʋ, abam dɩ na kɩ á wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ ka te tɩn dɩ ya yɩ kafɛ mʋ.

eng: We are found to be false witnesses about God, because we testified against God that he raised Christ, when he didnt raise him if its the case that the dead arent raised.
local: yɩ dɩbam dɩ na brɩ Wɛ cɩga kam te tɩn ya yɩ vwan mʋ, dɩ́ na yǝni dɩ́ brɩ nɔɔna nɩ Wɛ mʋ bi Zezi Krisi DƖ pa o yagɩ tʋʋnɩ tɩn ŋwaanɩ. Twa biim nan ya na sɩɩnɩ dɩ tǝrǝ, kʋ brɩ nɩ Wɛ wʋ bi Zezi mʋ.

eng: If the dead arent raised, then Christ hasnt been raised either.
local: Kʋntʋ tɩn, twa biim ya na tǝrǝ, kʋ brɩ nɩ Zezi Krisi tɩtɩ dɩ maŋɩ o wʋ bi mʋ.

eng: If Christ hasnt been raised, then your faith is worthless; you are still in your sins.
local: Wʋntʋ nan ya na wʋ bi o yagɩ tʋʋnɩ, kʋ brɩ nɩ abam na kɩ á wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩd-o te tɩn yɩ kafɛ mʋ, yɩ á lwarɩm dɩm ya ta wʋ á yuu nɩ mʋ.

eng: and whats more, those who have died in Christ are gone forever.
local: Kʋ nan ta brɩ nɩ, balʋ na sɛ Zezi Krisi yɩ ba laan tɩ tɩn ya wʋ́ ga ŋwɩa Wɛ tee nɩ.

eng: If we have a hope in Christ only in this life, then we deserve to be pitied more than anyone else.
local: Kʋ na yɩ lʋgʋ baŋa ŋwɩa kantʋ yɩranɩ, yɩ kʋ daɩ nɩ kʋlʋkʋlʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ dɩbam jɩgɩ tɩɩna Zezi Krisi tee nɩ, kʋ brɩ nɩ dɩ́ yɩ balʋ na tiini ba yɩ yinigǝ tiinǝ tɩn mʋ nɔɔna maama tee nɩ.

eng: But in fact Christ has been raised from the dead. Hes the first crop of the harvest of those who have died.
local: Kʋ nan sɩɩnɩ kʋ yɩ cɩga mʋ: Zezi Krisi bi o yagɩ tʋʋnɩ. Wʋntʋ mʋ yɩ wʋlʋ na dɛ yigǝ o bi o vu Wɛ te, sɩ kʋ brɩ nɩ balʋ dɩ na tɩgɩ tɩn wʋ́ bi ba yagɩ tʋʋnɩ.

eng: Since death came through a human being, the resurrection of the dead came through one too.
local: Tʋʋnɩ zɩgɩ nabiinu dɩdʋa yɩra nɩ mʋ dɩ ba lʋgʋ baŋa. Kʋ nan ta yɩ bɩdwɩ mʋ dɩ twa biim dɩ, nabiinu dɩdʋa dɩ mʋ jaanɩ twa biim o ba.

eng: In the same way that everyone dies in Adam, so also everyone will be given life in Christ.
local: Nabiinǝ maama na yɩ Adambiǝ tɩn ŋwaanɩ mʋ te dɩ́ maama tʋa nɩ wʋntʋ te. Kʋ nan ta yɩ kʋntʋ doŋ mʋ dɩ balʋ maama na ŋwɩ dɩ Zezi Krisi tɩn, bantʋ dɩ wʋ́ bi ba yagɩ tʋʋnɩ.

eng: Each event will happen in the right order: Christ, the first crop of the harvest, then those who belong to Christ at his coming.
local: Nɔɔnʋ maama dɩ o jǝgǝ mʋ. Zezi Krisi mʋ dɛ yigǝ o bi o vu Wɛ te. Kʋ daarɩ balʋ na yɩ o nɔɔna tɩn dɩ wʋ́ bi maŋa kam o na wʋ́ joori o ba tɩn mʋ.

eng: and then the end, when Christ hands over the kingdom to God the Father, when he brings every form of rule, every authority and power to an end.
local: Kʋntʋ kwaga nɩ mʋ lʋgʋ baŋa woŋo maama laan wʋ́ ti. Maŋa kam kʋntʋ nɩ mʋ Zezi Krisi wʋ́ cɔgɩ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ maama na jɩgɩ dam nabiinǝ baŋa nɩ tɩn, kʋ na yɩ wɛyuu dɩdɛɛra naa tɩga baŋa dɩdɛɛra maama, oó pa ba dam dɩm laan ti. O ma wʋ́ daarɩ o kwe woŋo kʋlʋ maama o na di paarɩ kʋ baŋa nɩ tɩn o kɩ o Ko Wɛ jɩŋa nɩ.

eng: It is necessary for him to rule until he puts all enemies under his feet .
local: Kʋ nan fɩn mʋ sɩ Zezi di paarɩ, sɩ kʋ taa ve maŋa kam Wɛ na wʋ́ kɩ o dʋna maama o nɛ kuri nɩ tɩn.

eng: Death is the last enemy to be brought to an end.
local: Tʋʋnɩ nan mʋ yɩ dʋm wʋlʋ o na wʋ́ cɔgɩ o ma kweeli tɩn.

eng: since he has brought everything under control under his feet. When it says that everything has been brought under his control, this clearly means everything except for the one who placed everything under his control.
local: Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm tagɩ kʋ wɩ: «Wɛ kɩ wǝǝnu maama wʋm nɛ kuri nɩ mʋ sɩ o taa te tɩ maama.» Kʋ nan na wɩ, o taa te wǝǝnu maama tɩn, kʋ daɩ nɩ o te Wɛ tɩtɩ dɩ mʋ o wǝli da. Kʋ yɩ Wɛ mʋ kwe wǝǝnu tɩm maama DƖ kɩ Zezi dam kuri nɩ.

eng: But when all things have been brought under his control, then the Son himself will also be under the control of the one who gave him control over everything so that God may be all in all.
local: Kʋ daarɩ maŋa kalʋ Zezi na wʋ́ ba o taa te wǝǝnu maama tɩn, wʋm tɩtɩ na yɩ Wɛ Bu tɩn wʋ́ kwe o tɩtɩ o pa o Ko Wɛ. Bɛŋwaanɩ Wɛ yɩ dɩlʋ na maŋɩ DƖ kɩ wǝǝnu maama DƖ Bu wʋm dam kuri nɩ tɩn mʋ. Kʋntʋ tɩn, Wɛ mʋ te wǝǝnu maama dɩ DƖ dam maama.

eng: Otherwise, what are those who are getting baptized for the dead doing? If the dead arent raised, then why are they being baptized for them?.
local: Á nan bʋŋɩ nɔɔna balʋ na yǝni ba paɩ ba miisi-ba na wʋnɩ ba twa ŋwaanɩ tɩn woŋo á nii. Ba na ba bʋŋɩ nɩ twa biim wʋra, bɛŋwaanɩ mʋ yɩ ba paɩ ba miisi-ba na wʋnɩ twa bam ŋwaanɩ?.

eng: And what about us? Why are we in danger all day every day?.
local: Twa biim nan ya na tǝrǝ, bɛŋwaanɩ mʋ yɩ dɩbam ba kwarɩ fʋʋnɩ sɩ dɩ́ yaarɩ dɩ́ tɩ Wɛ ŋwaanɩ maŋa maama?.

eng: Brothers and sisters, I swear by the pride I have in you in Christ Jesus our Lord, Im facing death every day.
local: A ko-biǝ-ba, dɛ maama amʋ yǝni a tɔgɩ tʋʋnɩ te mʋ a kɛa. Kʋ yɩ cɩga mʋ. Amʋ tiini a jɩgɩ wʋpolo dɩ abam á na ŋwɩ dɩ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi Krisi tɩn ŋwaanɩ. Mʋ kʋ kuri a tagɩ kʋntʋ.

eng: From a human point of view, what good does it do me if I fought wild animals in Ephesus? If the dead arent raised, lets eat and drink because tomorrow well die .
local: Efɛɛzɩ nɩ ba kɩ amʋ nɩnɛɛnɩ kagʋ-vara na ciŋi sɩ ba ja nɔɔna te tɩn mʋ. Amʋ na sɛ sɩ a yaarɩ kʋntʋ tɩn, kʋ ya na yɩ lʋgʋ baŋa ŋwɩa kantʋ yɩranɩ má ŋwaanɩ mʋ, bɛɛ nyɔɔrɩ mʋ aá na? Twa biim nan ya na tǝrǝ, dɩ́ ya wʋ́ ta nɩ nɔɔna badaara na tɛ te ba wɩ: «Pa-na dɩ́ taá di sɩ dɩ́ daarɩ dɩ́ taá nyɔɛ, sɩ dɩ́ jwa yɩ twa mʋ.».

eng: Dont be deceived, bad company corrupts good character.
local: Yɩ pa-na ba ganɩ abam sɩ á tusi. Kʋ yɩ cɩga mʋ nɩ: «Nmʋ na tɔgɩ dɩ nɔn-balwaarʋ, baá sʋgɩ-m ba pa n dɩ kɩ kǝm-balwaarʋ mʋ.».

eng: Sober up by acting like you should and dont sin. Some of you are ignorant about God—I say this because you should be ashamed of yourselves!.
local: Pa-na á wʋbʋŋa joori ya taa tɔgɩ cwǝŋǝ, sɩ á daarɩ á yagɩ kǝm-lwaanʋ tɩm. Abam badaara ta yǝri Wɛ. A tagɩ kʋntʋ, sɩ kʋ pa cavɩɩra mʋ zʋ abam.

eng: But someone will say, How are the dead raised? What kind of body will they have when they come back.
local: Abam dɩdʋa waɩ o bwe nɩ: «Kʋʋ́ kɩ ta mʋ sɩ twa bi? Ba nan na joori ba bi, ba yɩra wʋ́ ta yɩ tɩta mʋ?».

eng: Look, fool! When you put a seed into the ground, it doesnt come back to life unless it dies.
local: Nmʋ wʋbʋŋa mʋ muri na? N na kwe woŋo n du tɩga nɩ, kʋ maŋɩ sɩ kʋ puli mʋ kʋ nuŋi, kʋ daarɩ sɩ kʋ bu wʋm pɔ.

eng: What you put in the ground doesnt have the shape that it will have, but its a bare grain of wheat or some other seed.
local: Nmʋ na dugi kʋlʋ, dɩ kʋlʋ na wʋ́ puli kʋ nuŋi tɩn ba nyɩ daanɩ. Nmʋ na kwe kʋlʋ n du tɩn, kʋ na yɩ mɩna naa kʋ zɩ yɩ wo-duuru tɩlʋ dwi maama, tɩ yɩ wo-dwǝ má mʋ n dugǝ.

eng: God gives it the sort of shape that he chooses, and he gives each of the seeds its own shape.
local: Wo-dwi dɩm nan na nuŋi, Wɛ mʋ wʋ́ pa-dɩ dɩ yɩra, nɩ DƖ na lagɩ te tɩn. Wɛ nan ta mʋ paɩ wo-dwi maama nyɩnyʋgʋ, kʋ maŋɩ dɩ wo-dwi dɩm tɩtɩ na yɩ te tɩn.

eng: All flesh isnt alike. Humans have one kind of flesh, animals have another kind of flesh, birds have another kind of flesh, and fish have another kind.
local: Kʋ nan daɩ nɩ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ maama na ŋwɩ tɩn ya-nwana mʋ yɩ bɩdwɩ. Nabiinǝ dɩ vara dɩ zunǝ dɩ kale maama jɩgɩ ya-nwana yɩra yɩra mʋ.

eng: There are heavenly bodies and earthly bodies. The heavenly bodies have one kind of glory, and the earthly bodies have another kind of glory.
local: Wɛyuu wǝǝnu dɩ wʋra mʋ, yɩ tɩga baŋa wǝǝnu dɩ wʋra. Wɛyuu wǝǝnu tɩm dɩ jɩgɩ tɩ lam mʋ, yɩ tɩga baŋa wǝǝnu tɩm dɩ jɩgɩ tɩ lam.

eng: The sun has one kind of glory, the moon has another kind of glory, and the stars have another kind of glory .
local: Wɩa kam dɩ jɩgɩ ka lam mʋ, yɩ cana kam dɩ jɩgɩ ka lam. Calɩcwɩ sɩm dɩ maa jɩgɩ sɩ lam, yɩ sɩ lam dɩm nan daɩ bɩdwɩ.

eng: Its the same with the resurrection of the dead: a rotting body is put into the ground, but what is raised wont ever decay.
local: Wǝǝnu tɩntʋ maama nan brɩ twa biim na yɩ te tɩn mʋ. Nɔɔnʋ na tɩga, o yɩra yam ba na kɩ tɩn yɩ yɩra yalʋ na wʋ́ pɔ tɩn mʋ. Kʋ daarɩ o yɩra yalʋ na wʋ́ bi ya yagɩ tʋʋnɩ tɩn daa bá pɔ maŋa dɩ maŋa.

eng: Its degraded when its put into the ground, but its raised in glory. Its weak when its put into the ground, but its raised in power.
local: Yɩra yalʋ ba na kɩ tɩga nɩ tɩn ba jɩgɩ lam, yɩ yalʋ na wʋ́ bi tɩn wʋ́ ta jɩgɩ lam zanzan. Yɩra yalʋ ba na kɩ tɩn bwǝnǝ, yɩ yalʋ na wʋ́ bi tɩn wʋ́ ta dana.

eng: Its a physical body when its put into the ground, but its raised as a spiritual body. If theres a physical body, theres also a spiritual body.
local: Yɩra yalʋ ba na kɩ tɩga nɩ tɩn yɩ lʋgʋ baŋa ŋwɩa kam nyɩm mʋ, kʋ daarɩ yalʋ na wʋ́ bi tɩn yɩ ŋwɩ-dʋŋa kalʋ Wɛ Jorokʋm na wʋ́ pa dɩbam tɩn nyɩm mʋ. Lʋgʋ baŋa yɩra yam na wʋra tɩn, Wɛ ŋwɩ-dʋŋa kam yɩra yam dɩ wʋra mʋ.

eng: So it is also written, The first human, Adam, became a living person, and the last Adam became a spirit that gives life.
local: Kʋntʋ mʋ kʋ pʋpʋnɩ Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm wʋnɩ kʋ wɩ: «Pulim nɩ tɩn Wɛ kɩ Adammʋ DƖ pa o jɩgɩ lʋgʋ baŋa yɩra yɩ o ŋwɩ.» Kʋ daarɩ Zezi mʋ yɩ Adam wʋlʋ na kweeli tɩn, yɩ o jɩgɩ Joro kʋ na paɩ nabiinǝ ŋwɩ-dʋŋa tɩn.

eng: But the physical body comes first, not the spiritual one—the spiritual body comes afterward.
local: Kʋ nan yɩ lʋgʋ baŋa ŋwɩa kam mʋ tui yigǝ, yɩ Wɛ-sɔŋɔ ŋwɩ-dʋŋa kam laan saŋɩ ka ba.

eng: The first human was from the earth made from dust; the second human is from heaven.
local: Wɛ mɛ tɩɩrʋ mʋ DƖ kɩ nabiinu wʋlʋ na tu yigǝ tɩn. Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ wʋntʋ yɩ lʋgʋ baŋa nyɩm mʋ. Kʋ daarɩ nabiinu wʋlʋ nan na tu kwaga tɩn nuŋi Wɛ-sɔŋɔ mʋ.

eng: The nature of the person made of dust is shared by people who are made of dust, and the nature of the heavenly person is shared by heavenly people.
local: Lʋgʋ baŋa nɔɔna bam maama nyɩ dɩ Wɛ na mɛ tɩɩrʋ DƖ kɩ nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ dayigǝ tɩn mʋ. Nɔɔna balʋ maama nan na yɩ Wɛ-sɔŋɔ nyɩm tɩn nyɩ dɩ wʋlʋ na nuŋi Wɛ-sɔŋɔ tɩn mʋ.

eng: We will look like the heavenly person in the same way as we have looked like the person made from dust.
local: Nɩnɛɛnɩ dɩbam na jɩgɩ lʋgʋ baŋa nɔɔnʋ wʋm nyɩnyʋgʋ tɩn, dɛ wʋra dɩ́ wʋ́ ba dɩ́ taá jɩgɩ Wɛ-sɔŋɔ nɔɔnʋ wʋm dɩ nyɩnyʋgʋ.

eng: This is what Im saying, brothers and sisters: Flesh and blood cant inherit Gods kingdom. Something that rots cant inherit something that doesnt decay.
local: A ko-biǝ-ba, a lagɩ a ta a brɩ abam nɩ, dɩ́ lʋgʋ baŋa yɩra yam bá wanɩ ya na jǝŋǝ je Wɛ paarɩ dɩm wʋnɩ. Yɩra yalʋ na wʋ́ pɔ tɩn bá wanɩ ya maŋɩ dɩ ŋwɩa kalʋ na ba ti tɩn.

eng: Listen, Im telling you a secret: All of us wont die, but we will all be changed.
local: Fɔgɩ-na á cǝgi, sɩ a ta Wɛ cɩga kalʋ ya na sǝgi tɩn a brɩ abam. Dɩbam maama bá tɩ dɩ́ ti sɩ Zezi laan ba. Dɩ́ nan na tɩga naa dɩ́ ta wʋ tɩgɩ dɩ, dɩbam maama yɩra yam wʋ́ lǝni mʋ.

eng: in an instant, in the blink of an eye, at the final trumpet. The trumpet will blast, and the dead will be raised with bodies that wont decay, and we will be changed.
local: Kʋʋ́ da kʋ kɩ yibʋgɩsa wʋnɩ mʋ, maŋa kam ba na wʋ́ wu kweelim nabɔnɔ kʋm tɩn. Nabɔnɔ kʋm na wugǝ, twa wʋ́ bi ba zaŋɩ dɩ yɩra yalʋ na ba pɔɛ tɩn, yɩ dɩbam dɩ yɩra wʋ́ lǝni.

eng: Its necessary for this rotting body to be clothed with what cant decay, and for the body that is dying to be clothed in what cant die.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ, dɩbam yɩra yalʋ na wʋ́ pɔ tɩn maŋɩ sɩ ya lǝni ya ji yalʋ na bá pɔ tɩn mʋ, sɩ dɩ́ yɩra yalʋ tʋʋnɩ na waɩ tɩn lǝni ya ji yalʋ tʋʋnɩ na bá wanɩ tɩn.

eng: And when the rotting body has been clothed in what cant decay, and the dying body has been clothed in what cant die, then this statement in scripture will happen: Death has been swallowed up by a victory .
local: Kʋntʋ maama na kɩa, kʋ laan wʋ́ pa kʋlʋ na pʋpʋnɩ Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm wʋnɩ tɩn kɩ, nɩ kʋ na maŋɩ kʋ ta te kʋ wɩ: «Wɛ wanɩ tʋʋnɩ dɩ dɩ dam dɩm maama.».

eng: Where is your victory, Death? Where is your sting, Death? .
local: «Tʋʋnɩ, n dam dɩm daa bɛɛ? N daa n wʋ́ wanɩ n cɔgɩ nɔɔna na?».

eng: Deaths sting is sin, and the power of sin is the Law.
local: Kʋ yɩ lwarɩm ŋwaanɩ mʋ tʋʋnɩ jɩgɩ dam sɩ dɩ cɔgɩ nɔɔna. Lwarɩm dɩ nan nɛ dɩ dam Wɛ cullu tɩm vɩʋn ŋwaanɩ mʋ.

eng: Thanks be to God, who gives us this victory through our Lord Jesus Christ!.
local: Dɩ́ nan kɩ Wɛ le dɩ DƖ na paɩ dɩbam wɔnɔ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi Krisi ŋwaanɩ sɩ dɩ́ wanɩ tʋʋnɩ dɩ dɩ dam dɩm maama tɩn.

eng: As a result of all this, my loved brothers and sisters, you must stand firm, unshakable, excelling in the work of the Lord as always, because you know that your labor isnt going to be for nothing in the Lord.
local: Kʋntʋ tɩn, a ko-bu-sonnu-ba, fɔgɩ á zɩgɩ-na kǝŋkǝŋ dɩ pu-dɩa, sɩ á cɛ dɩ dɩ́ Yuutu tɩtʋŋa yam maŋa maama, dɩ á na ye nɩ tɩtʋŋa yalʋ maama á na tʋŋɩ á pa dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm tɩn na daɩ kafɛ tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: Pursue love, and use your ambition to try to get spiritual gifts but especially so that you might prophesy.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ, kwaanɩ-na sɩ á taá jɩgɩ sono, sɩ á daarɩ á kwaanɩ á joŋi Wɛ-pɛɛra yalʋ DƖ Jorokʋm na paɩ nɔɔna tɩn á wǝli da, kʋ na dwe dɩdɩ sɩ á wanɩ á ŋɔɔnɩ Wɛ yiyiu-ŋwɛ.

eng: This is because those who speak in a tongue dont speak to people but to God; no one understands it—they speak mysteries by the Spirit.
local: Nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ na ŋɔɔnɩ ta-gɛ sɩm tɩn ŋɔɔnɩ dɩ Wɛ mʋ, sɩ kʋ daɩ dɩ nabiinǝ, ba na ba ni o taanɩ dɩm kuri tɩn ŋwaanɩ. Wɛ Joro kʋm mʋ paɩ o ŋɔɔnɩ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ na sǝgi tɩn.

eng: Those who prophesy speak to people, building them up, and giving them encouragement and comfort.
local: Kʋ daarɩ nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ na waɩ o ŋɔɔnɩ Wɛ yiyiu-ŋwɛ tɩn ŋɔɔnɩ o brɩ nabiinǝ mʋ, sɩ kʋ kwe-ba kʋ daarɩ kʋ zǝni-ba sɩ ba taa fɔgɩ ba zɩgɩ kǝŋkǝŋ dɩ pu-dɩa.

eng: People who speak in a tongue build up themselves; those who prophesy build up the church.
local: Wʋlʋ na ŋɔɔnɩ ta-gɛ sɩm tɩn, kʋ wǝli o tɩtɩ yɩranɩ mʋ. Wʋlʋ nan na ŋɔɔnɩ Wɛ yiyiu-ŋwɛ tɩn, kʋ wǝli Zezi kɔgɔ kʋm maama mʋ.

eng: I wish that all of you spoke in tongues, but Id rather you could prophesy. Those who prophesy are more important than those who speak in tongues, unless they are able to interpret them so that the church might be built up.
local: Amʋ ya lagɩ sɩ abam maama taa waɩ á ŋɔɔnɩ ta-gɛ sɩm, a nan tiini a lagɩ sɩ á taá waɩ á ŋɔɔnɩ Wɛ yiyiu-ŋwɛ sɩm mʋ á dwe dɩdɩ. Bɛŋwaanɩ wʋlʋ na ŋɔɔnɩ Wɛ yiyiu-ŋwɛ tɩn tiini o jɩgɩ zǝnǝ o dwe wʋlʋ na ŋɔɔnɩ ta-gɛ tɩn, kʋ na daɩ nɩ nɔɔnʋ na wʋra sɩ o wanɩ o pipiri o taanɩ dɩm kuri sɩ kʋ zǝni Zezi kɔgɔ kʋm maama.

eng: After all, brothers and sisters, if I come to you speaking in tongues, how will I help you unless I speak to you with a revelation, some knowledge, a prophecy, or a teaching?.
local: Kʋntʋ tɩn, a ko-biǝ-ba, amʋ na tu abam te, yɩ a na ŋɔɔnɩ ta-gɛ yɩranɩ mʋ dɩ abam, bɛɛ nyɔɔrɩ mʋ á lagɩ á na? Kʋlʋ na wʋ́ wǝli abam tɩn mʋ yɩ a na ŋɔɔnɩ taanɩ dɩlʋ na wʋ́ pa á na vɩɩrɩm, naa dɩ pa á na yǝno, naa a ŋɔɔnɩ Wɛ yiyiu-ŋwɛ, naa a zaasɩ abam Wɛ cɩga kam.

eng: Likewise, things that arent alive like a harp or a lyre can make a sound, but if there arent different notes in the sounds they make, how will the tune from the harp or the lyre be recognized?.
local: Dɩ́ nan kwe duduurǝ na yɩ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ na ba jɩgɩ ŋwɩa tɩn dɩ́ ma maŋɩ dɩ́ nii: Nɔɔnʋ na jɩgɩ wuǝ o wui yɔɔ yɔɔ, naa o jɩgɩ kɔnɔ o magɩ yɔɔ yɔɔ, nɔɔna wʋ́ kɩ ta mʋ ba ni kʋ ywǝǝni?.

eng: And if a trumpet call is unrecognizable, then who will prepare for battle?.
local: Nɔɔnʋ nan na jɩgɩ jara nabɔnɔ o wui yɔɔ yɔɔ, nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ bá wanɩ o lwarɩ nɩ jara mʋ wʋra sɩ o nuŋi o vu.

eng: Its the same way with you: If you dont use language that is easy to understand when you speak in a tongue, then how will anyone understand what is said?.
local: Kʋ nan yɩ bɩdwɩ mʋ dɩ n na ŋɔɔnɩ ta-gɛ yɩ nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ warɩ sɩ kuri o pipiri, nɔɔna wʋ́ kɩ ta mʋ ba lwarɩ n na tɛ kʋlʋ tɩn kuri? Kʋntʋ nan brɩ nɩ n ŋɔɔnɩ n yagɩ gaa wʋnɩ mʋ.

eng: It will be as if you are speaking into the air! There are probably many language families in the world, and none of them are without meaning.
local: Taana dwi zanzan mʋ wʋ lʋgʋ baŋa nɩ, yɩ taan-taanɩ tǝrǝ dɩ na ba jɩgɩ kuri dɩ pa dɩ tiinǝ.

eng: So if I dont know the meaning of the language, then I will be like a foreigner to those who speak it, and they will be like foreigners to me.
local: Nɔɔnʋ nan na ŋɔɔnɩ taanɩ dɩlʋ a na ba ni tɩn dɩ amʋ, kʋntʋ brɩ nɩ dɩbam maama bale yɩ vǝrǝ mʋ da-tee nɩ.

eng: The same holds true for you: since you are ambitious for spiritual gifts, use your ambition to try to work toward being the best at building up the church.
local: Kʋ nan yɩ kʋntʋ mʋ dɩ abam dɩ, abam na lagɩ sɩ á joŋi pɛɛra yalʋ Wɛ Joro kʋm na paɩ tɩn, á nan kwaanɩ-na á joŋi pɛɛra yalʋ na wʋ́ zǝni Zezi kɔgɔ kʋm sɩ kʋ zɩgɩ lanyɩranɩ tɩn.

eng: Therefore, those who speak in a tongue should pray to be able to interpret.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ, abam wʋlʋ na waɩ o ŋɔɔnɩ ta-gɛ, sɩ o tiini o loori Wɛ sɩ DƖ pa o taa waɩ sɩ kuri dɩ o tɛa.

eng: If I pray in a tongue, my spirit prays but my mind isnt productive.
local: Amʋ na mɛ ta-gɛ sɩm a ma a warɩ Wɛ, kʋ yɩ a joro mʋ ŋɔɔna, sɩ amʋ tɩtɩ ba ni sɩ kuri.

eng: What should I do? Ill pray in the Spirit, but Ill pray with my mind too; Ill sing a psalm in the Spirit, but Ill sing the psalm with my mind too.
local: Kʋlʋ na maŋɩ sɩ a kɩ tɩn mʋ yɩ sɩ a warɩ Wɛ dɩ a wʋbʋŋa maama dɩ a joro maama, sɩ a daarɩ a taa leeni dɩ a wʋbʋŋa maama dɩ a joro maama a taa zuli Wɛ.

eng: After all, if you praise God in the Spirit, how will the people who arent trained in that language say Amen! to your thanksgiving, when they dont know what you are saying?.
local: Kʋ nan na daɩ kʋntʋ, yɩ n na mɛ ta-gɛ sɩm n ma n zuli Wɛ, yɩ nɔn-gaa na je o cǝgǝ, o bá wanɩ o ni sɩ kuri. Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ, oó kɩ ta mʋ o tɔgɩ o sɛ nmʋ na zuli Wɛ te tɩn sɩ o dɩ ta nɩ «Amina»?.

eng: You may offer a beautiful prayer of thanksgiving, but the other person is not being built up.
local: Nmʋ na zuli Wɛ te tɩn na maŋɩ kʋ lamma te, kʋ bá zǝni nɔɔnʋ wʋm kʋntʋ.

eng: I thank God that I speak in tongues more than all of you.
local: Kʋ na yɩ amʋ, a kɩ Wɛ le dɩ DƖ na pɛ-nɩ dam sɩ a taa ŋɔɔnɩ ta-gɛ sɩm a dwe abam maama tɩn.

eng: But in the church Id rather speak five words in my right mind than speak thousands of words in a tongue so that I can teach others.
local: Kʋ daarɩ, a na wʋ Zezi kɔgɔ kʋm wʋnɩ, a tiini a lagɩ sɩ a taa maɩ taanɩ dɩlʋ ba na ni tɩn mʋ a ma ŋɔɔnɩ a brɩ-ba. A na ŋɔɔnɩ bɩtarɩ sɩnu má yɩranɩ, kʋ garɩ a na ŋɔɔnɩ ta-gɛ sɩm bɩtarbiǝ mʋrr-fugǝ yɩ nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ ba ni sɩ kuri.

eng: Brothers and sisters, dont be like children in the way you think. Well, be babies when it comes to evil, but be adults in your thinking.
local: A ko-biǝ-ba, á yɩ taá jɩgɩ bu-balwa wʋbʋŋa. Kʋ daarɩ kʋ na yɩ lwarɩm jǝgǝ nɩ, sɩ á taá nyɩ nɩnɛɛnɩ bu-sɩsɩn na yǝri lwarɩm kǝm te tɩn, sɩ á pa á wʋbʋŋa bɩ Wɛ cwǝŋǝ kam wʋnɩ.

eng: In the Law it is written: I will speak to this people with foreign languages and foreigners lips, but they will not even listen to me this way , says the Lord.
local: Kʋ pʋpʋnɩ Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm wʋnɩ kʋ wɩ: «Amʋ Baŋa-Wɛ wʋ́ tʋŋɩ vǝrǝ, sɩ ba ba ba ŋɔɔnɩ amʋ ni-taanɩ dɩm dɩ abam. Baá ŋɔɔnɩ taanɩ dɩlʋ á na ba ni tɩn dɩ abam. Nan dɩ kʋntʋ dɩ, á ta bá sɛ a ni.».

eng: So then, tongues are a sign for those who dont believe, not for those who believe. But prophecy is a sign for believers, not for those who dont believe.
local: Kʋntʋ mʋ Wɛ maɩ ta-gɛ DƖ maa brɩ DƖ dam balʋ na wʋ sɛ-DƖ tɩn tee nɩ, sɩ kʋ daɩ balʋ na sɛ-DƖ tɩn tee nɩ. Kʋ daarɩ Wɛ yiyiu-ŋwɛ sɩm mʋ brɩ DƖ dam balʋ na sɛ-DƖ tɩn tee nɩ, sɩ kʋ daɩ balʋ na wʋ sɛ-DƖ tɩn tee nɩ.

eng: So suppose that the whole church is meeting and everyone is speaking in tongues. If people come in who are outsiders or unbelievers, wont they say that you are out of your minds?.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ, Zezi kɔgɔ kʋm maama na jeeri daanɩ, yɩ á maama na wʋra á ŋɔɔnɩ ta-gɛ, yɩ nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ na maŋɩ o wʋ ni-sɩ naa balʋ na wʋ sɛ Wɛ tɩn na tu ba zʋ á wʋnɩ yɩ ba ba ni sɩ kuri tɩn, ba bá ta nɩ á co mʋ na?.

eng: But if everyone is prophesying when an unbeliever or outsider comes in, they are tested by all and called to account by all.
local: Abam maama nan na ŋɔɔnɩ Wɛ yiyiu-ŋwɛ á brɩ daanɩ, yɩ nɔɔnʋ wʋm kʋntʋ doŋ na tu o zʋ á wʋ, wʋntʋ wʋ́ lwarɩ nɩ Wɛ dam mʋ wʋ á tee nɩ. O na ni kʋlʋ maama tɩn wʋ́ pa o lwarɩ nɩ o ba jɩgɩ bʋra Wɛ tee nɩ, yɩ o kwǝri o lwarɩ nɩ Wɛ lagɩ DƖ di o taanɩ.

eng: The secrets of their hearts are brought to light. When that happens, they will fall on their faces and worship God, proclaiming out loud that truly God is among you!.
local: Wʋbʋŋa yalʋ maama ya na sǝgi o wʋnɩ tɩn laan wʋ́ ba ya lwarɩ jaja mʋ, yɩ o laan wʋ́ kɩ o yuu tɩga nɩ o zuli Wɛ, yɩ o sɛ nɩ Wɛ sɩɩnɩ DƖ wʋ abam tɩtarɩ nɩ.

eng: What is the outcome of this, brothers and sisters? When you meet together, each one has a psalm, a teaching, a revelation, a tongue, or an interpretation. All these things must be done to build up the church.
local: A ko-biǝ-ba, abam na jeeri daanɩ sɩ á zuli Wɛ, á na maŋɩ sɩ á kɩ kʋlʋ tɩn mʋ tɩntʋ: Abam dɩdʋa mʋ wʋ́ zaŋɩ o pa lǝŋǝ. Dɩdʋa dɩ ma zaŋɩ o brɩ Wɛ cɩga kam. Wʋdoŋ dɩ ma zaŋɩ o ta vɩɩrɩm dɩlʋ Wɛ na brɩ-o tɩn. Wʋwʋm dɩ ma zaŋɩ o ŋɔɔnɩ ta-gɛ, yɩ wʋdoŋ dɩ ma zaŋɩ o ta ta-gɛ sɩm kuri o brɩ á kɔgɔ kʋm. Wǝǝnu tɩntʋ maama zǝni Zezi kɔgɔ kʋm sɩ kʋ fɔgɩ kʋ zɩgɩ kǝŋkǝŋ.

eng: If some speak in a tongue, then let two or at most three speak, one at a time, and someone must interpret.
local: Abam badaara na lagɩ á ŋɔɔnɩ ta-gɛ sɩm, kʋ maŋɩ sɩ á taá yɩ bale naa batɔ yɩranɩ mʋ. Kʋ maŋɩ sɩ á taá zaŋɩ á ŋɔɔnɩ á daarɩ á pa daanɩ mʋ, sɩ á dɩdʋa zaŋɩ o ta ŋwɛ sɩm kuri.

eng: However, if there is no interpreter, then they should keep quiet in the meeting. They should speak privately to themselves and to God.
local: Nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ nan na tǝri á wʋnɩ sɩ o wanɩ o ta ŋwɛ sɩm kuri, balʋ ya na lagɩ ba ŋɔɔnɩ-sɩ tɩn maŋɩ sɩ ba yagɩ mʋ, sɩ ba na wʋ ba yɩranɩ, sɩ ba taa ŋɔɔnɩ-sɩ dɩ Wɛ.

eng: In the case of prophets, let two or three speak and have the rest evaluate what is said.
local: Kʋ daarɩ, kʋ na yɩ balʋ na ŋɔɔnɩ Wɛ yiyiu-ŋwɛ sɩm tɩn, kʋ maŋɩ sɩ bale naa batɔ mʋ zaŋɩ ba ŋɔɔnɩ dɩdʋa dɩdʋa, sɩ badaara bam taa cǝgǝ, sɩ ba laan bwɛ ba nii sɩ yɩ cɩga mʋ naa vwan mʋ.

eng: And if some revelation comes to someone else who is sitting down, the first one should be quiet.
local: Wɛ na vɩɩrɩ nɔɔnʋ dɩdʋa DƖ cɩga kam balʋ na je ba cǝgi tɩn wʋnɩ sɩ o ta o brɩ Zezi kɔgɔ kʋm, kʋ maŋɩ sɩ wʋlʋ na zɩgɩ o ŋɔɔnɩ Wɛ yiyiu-ŋwɛ sɩm tɩn mʋ pu o ni, sɩ o daarɩ sɩ wʋdoŋ wʋm ta-ka.

eng: You can all prophesy one at a time so that everyone can learn and be encouraged.
local: Kʋntʋ tɩn, abam maama waɩ á ŋɔɔnɩ Wɛ yiyiu-ŋwɛ sɩm dɩdʋa dɩdʋa, sɩ kʋ pa á zaasɩ Wɛ cɩga kam da-tee nɩ, sɩ á taá fɔgɩ á zɩgɩ kǝŋkǝŋ.

eng: The spirits of prophets are under the control of the prophets.
local: Balʋ na joŋi dam Wɛ Jorokʋm tee nɩ sɩ ba taa ŋɔɔnɩ Wɛ yiyiu-ŋwɛ sɩm tɩn waɩ ba tɩtɩ ba jaana maŋa kalʋ ba na wʋra ba ŋɔɔnɩ-sɩ tɩn.

eng: God isnt a God of disorder but of peace. Like in all the churches of Gods people.
local: Wɛ lagɩ sɩ woŋo maama taa tɔgɩ cwǝŋǝ mʋ dɩ yazurǝ, sɩ DƖ ba lagɩ yɔɔ yɔɔ kǝm.

eng: the women should be quiet during the meeting. They are not allowed to talk. Instead, they need to get under control, just as the Law says.
local: Abam na kikili daanɩ sɩ á zuli Wɛ, kʋ maŋɩ sɩ kaana taa je cɩm mʋ sɩ ba taa cǝgǝ. Mʋ kʋ na yɩ te Zezi kɔgɔ kʋm jǝgǝ maama nɩ. Ba ba jɩgɩ cwǝŋǝ sɩ ba da ba ŋɔɔnɩ. Kʋ maŋɩ sɩ ba sɛ baara bam, nɩ Wɛ cullu tɩm na maŋɩ tɩ brɩ te tɩn mʋ.

eng: If they want to learn something, they should ask their husbands at home. It is disgraceful for a woman to talk during the meeting.
local: Ba na lagɩ sɩ ba lwarɩ woŋo kʋlʋ kuri, ba maŋɩ sɩ ba bwe ba banna mʋ sɔŋɔ nɩ, sɩ kʋ wʋ maŋɩ sɩ kaanɩ zaŋɩ o ŋɔɔnɩ á kikilǝ kam wʋnɩ.

eng: Did the word of God originate with you? Has it come only to you?.
local: Abam bʋŋɩ á paɩ Wɛ taanɩ dɩm nuŋi abam te mʋ na? Mʋ naa á bʋŋɩ á paɩ abam yɩranɩ mʋ ye Wɛ taanɩ dɩm na?.

eng: If anyone thinks that they are prophets or spiritual people, then let them recognize that what Im writing to you is the Lords command.
local: Abam wʋlʋ na bʋŋɩ nɩ o yɩ Wɛ nijoŋnu naa o joŋi Wɛ Joro kʋm pɛɛrɩ tɩn maŋɩ sɩ o taa ye nɩ, amʋ na pʋpʋnɩ kʋlʋ a pa abam tɩn yɩ dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm kwǝrǝ mʋ.

eng: If someone doesnt recognize this, they arent recognized.
local: Nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ maama na vɩn amʋ na pʋpʋnɩ kʋlʋ tɩn, Wɛ dɩ wʋ́ vɩn kʋntʋ tu.

eng: So then, brothers and sisters, use your ambition to try to get the gift of prophecy, but dont prevent speaking in tongues.
local: Kʋntʋ, a ko-biǝ-ba, kwaanɩ-na sɩ á taá ŋɔɔnɩ Wɛ yiyiu-ŋwɛ sɩm. Á nan yɩ zaŋɩ á cɩ balʋ na ŋɔɔnɩ ta-gɛ sɩm Wɛ Joro kʋm na pɛ tɩn.

eng: Everything should be done with dignity and in proper order.
local: Nan taá kɩ-na woŋo maama sɩ kʋ taa tɔgɩ cwǝŋǝ nɩ kʋ na maŋɩ te tɩn.

eng: Concerning the collection of money for Gods people: You should do what I have directed the churches in Galatia to do.
local: Kʋ daarɩ kʋ na yɩ sǝbu kʋlʋ á na laɩ á maa zǝni Wɛ nɔɔna bam tɩn, á taá kɩ nɩnɛɛnɩ amʋ na maŋɩ a brɩ Zezi kɔgɔ kʋlʋ na wʋ Galatɩ tɩ-niǝ yam nɩ sɩ ba taa kɩ te tɩn.

eng: On the first day of the week, each of you should set aside whatever you can afford from what you earn so that the collection wont be delayed until I come.
local: Siun dɛ maama na yiǝ, sɩ nɔɔnʋ maama lɩ sǝbu kʋlʋ o na nɛ tɩn wʋnɩ o tiŋi, sɩ amʋ na tuǝ, sɩ á daa yɩ taá zɩgɩ á laɩ sǝbu.

eng: Then when I get there, Ill send whomever you approve to Jerusalem with letters of recommendation to bring your gift.
local: Amʋ na tu abam te, abam na lɩ nɔɔna balʋ tɩn, a laan wʋ́ la tɔnɔ a tʋŋɩ-ba dɩ á sǝbu kʋm sɩ ba ja vu Zeruzalɛm.

eng: If it seems right for me to go too, theyll travel with me.
local: Kʋ nan daa na maŋɩ sɩ amʋ tɩtɩ mʋ vu, dɩ́ wʋ́ tɔgɩ daanɩ dɩ́ vu.

eng: Ill come to you after I go through Macedonia, and because Im going through Macedonia.
local: A lagɩ sɩ a da Masɩdʋanɩ mʋ, sɩ a laan daarɩ a ba abam te.

eng: I may stay with you or even spend the winter there in Corinth so that you can send me on my way to wherever Im off to next.
local: A na tu abam te, a lagɩ sɩ a daanɩ fɩɩn mʋ, dɛdoŋ aá ti waarʋ mɩmaŋa kam dáanɩ. Kʋntʋ kwaga nɩ, á laan wʋ́ wanɩ á zǝni-nɩ sɩ a vu a daa na wʋ́ vu mɛ tɩn.

eng: I dont want to make a quick visit to you, since I hope to spend some time with you if the Lord lets it happen.
local: Amʋ ba lagɩ sɩ a wuuri a ba abam te maŋa fɩnfɩɩn, sɩ a joori a viiri. Wɛ nan na sɛ, amʋ ya lagɩ sɩ a ba a daanɩ abam tee nɩ mʋ.

eng: Ill stay here in Ephesus until the Festival of Pentecost.
local: A nan lagɩ a maŋɩ Efɛɛzɩ nɩ mʋ sɩ kʋ vu kʋ yi Pantɩkoticandiǝ kam maŋa.

eng: In spite of the fact that there are many opponents, a big and productive opportunity has opened up for my mission here.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ Wɛ pʋrɩ cwǝŋǝ lanyɩranɩ DƖ pa-nɩ, sɩ a tiini a tʋŋɩ DƖ tɩtʋŋa yo seeni. Nɔɔna zanzan nan mʋ wʋra ba kwaana sɩ ba cɩ a yigǝ.

eng: If Timothy comes to you, be sure that he has no reason to be afraid while hes with you, because he does the work of the Lord just like I do.
local: Timoti nan na tu abam te, sɩ á jeer-o lanyɩranɩ sɩ kʋ yɩ pa fʋʋnɩ taa jɩg-o. Bɛŋwaanɩ o dɩ tʋŋɩ dɩ́ Yuutu tɩtʋŋa yam mʋ nɩ amʋ te.

eng: So dont let anyone disrespect him, but send him on in peace so he can join me. Im waiting for him along with the brothers and sisters.
local: Nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ yɩ zaŋɩ o goon-o. Kwaanɩ-na sɩ á wǝl-o o cwǝŋǝ kam vǝŋǝ wʋnɩ, sɩ o wanɩ o vu dɩ yazurǝ o ba amʋ te. Amʋ dɩ dɩ́ ko-biǝ bam nan nii-o cwǝŋǝ nɩ sɩ o ba.

eng: Concerning Apollos our brother: I strongly encouraged him to visit you with the brothers and sisters, but he didnt want to go now. Hell come when he has an opportunity.
local: Kʋ nan na yɩ dɩ́ ko-bu Apolɔsɩ, amʋ tiini a loor-o mʋ sɩ o tɔgɩ dɩ dɩ́ ko-biǝ bam o ba abam te. Nan dɩ kʋ dɩ, o ta wʋ lɩ wʋbʋŋa sɩ o ba lele. O nan na nɛ cwǝŋǝ maŋa kalʋ tɩn, oó ba.

eng: Stay awake, stand firm in your faith, be brave, be strong.
local: Taá cʋ-na á tɩtɩ, sɩ á zɩgɩ kǝŋkǝŋ Wɛ cwǝŋǝ kam wʋnɩ. Taá jɩgɩ-na baarɩ dɩ dam.

eng: Everything should be done in love.
local: Á taá kɩ-na woŋo maama dɩ sono.

eng: Brothers and sisters, I encourage you to do something else. You know that the people in Stephanas household were the first crop of the harvest to come from the mission to Achaia. They have dedicated themselves to the service of Gods people.
local: A ko-biǝ-ba, á maŋɩ á ye Sɩtefanasɩ dɩ o sɔŋɔ tiinǝ na tɔgɩ Wɛ te tɩn. Bantʋ mʋ dɛ yigǝ ba sɛ Zezi Akayi nɩ, yɩ ba sɛ ba tʋŋɩ ba zǝni Wɛ nɔɔna bam dɩ ba wʋ maama.

eng: So accept the authority of people like them and of anyone who cooperates and works hard.
local: Kʋntʋ tɩn, a loori abam sɩ á sɛ nɔɔna bam kʋntʋ dwi ni, dɩdaanɩ balʋ maama na tʋŋɩ Wɛ tɩtʋŋa yam nɩ bantʋ te tɩn.

eng: Im so happy that Stephanas, Fortunatus, and Achaicus have arrived; theyve made up for my missing you.
local: Amʋ jɩgɩ wʋpolo dɩ Sɩtefanasɩ dɩ Fɔtunatusi dɩ Akayikusi na tu amʋ te tɩn. Bantʋ mʋ pɛ a wʋ lwarɩ nɩ abam tǝrǝ.

eng: Indeed theyve provided my spirit and yours with a much-needed rest. Therefore, give them proper recognition.
local: Bantʋ mʋ pɛ a jɩgɩ wʋ-zuru, nɩ ba na pɛ abam dɩ jɩgɩ wʋ-zuru te tɩn. Kʋntʋ, kʋ maŋɩ sɩ á taá nɩgɩ nɔɔna bantʋ dwi.

eng: The churches in the province of Asia greet you. Aquila and Prisca greet you warmly in the Lord, together with the church that meets in their house.
local: Zezi kɔgɔ kʋm maama Azitɩ-niǝ yam wʋnɩ tɩn jɔɔnɩ abam. Akwila dɩ Prisili dɩ Zezi kɔgɔ kʋlʋ na jeeri ba sɔŋɔ nɩ tɩn dɩ jɔɔnɩ abam lanyɩranɩ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi yɩrɩ ŋwaanɩ.

eng: All the brothers and sisters greet you. You in turn should greet each other with a holy kiss.
local: Dɩ́ ko-biǝ bam maama dɩ jɔɔnɩ abam. Á taá jɔɔnɩ daanɩ lanyɩranɩ dɩ sono dɩ wʋ-poŋo.

eng: Here is my greeting in my own handwriting—Paul.
local: Amʋ Pooli mʋ jɔɔnɩ abam. A tɩtɩ laan mʋ pʋpʋnɩ tɩntʋ dɩ a jɩŋa.

eng: A curse on anyone who doesnt love the Lord. Come, Lord!.
local: Nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ maama na ba soe dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm tɩn, Wɛ wʋ́ cɔgɩ kʋ tu. Marana ta!.

eng: The grace of the Lord Jesus be with you.
local: Dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi wʋ́ pa abam yu-yoŋo.

eng: My love is with all of you in Christ Jesus.
local: Amʋ soe abam maama dɩ́ na ŋwɩ dɩ Zezi Krisi tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: From Paul, an apostle of Christ Jesus by Gods will, and Timothy our brother. To Gods church that is in Corinth, along with all of Gods people throughout Achaia.
local: Amʋ Pooli wʋlʋ Wɛ na kuri dɩ DƖ tɩtɩ wʋbʋŋa sɩ a taa yɩ Zezi Krisi tɩntʋŋnʋ tɩn mʋ pʋpʋnɩ tɔnɔ kʋntʋ, yɩ dɩ́ ko-bu Timoti mʋ tɔgɩ o wǝli-nɩ. Dɩ́ pʋpʋnɩ sɩ dɩ́ pa abam balʋ na yɩ Wɛ kɔgɔ kʋm wʋ nɔɔna yɩ á zʋʋrɩ Korɛntɩ nɩ tɩn, kʋ wǝli dɩ Wɛ nɔɔna maama balʋ na zʋʋrɩ Akayi tɩɩnɩ dɩm maama nɩ tɩn.

eng: Grace to you and peace from God our Father and from our Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Dɩ́ Ko Wɛ dɩ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi Krisi wʋ́ pa abam yazurǝ dɩ yu-yoŋo.

eng: May the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ be blessed! He is the compassionate Father and God of all comfort.
local: Pa-na dɩ́ kɩ Wɛ le. Dɩntʋ mʋ yɩ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi Krisi Ko, yɩ DƖ yɩ dɩbam Ko wʋlʋ na jɩgɩ dɩbam ŋwaŋa tɩn. DƖ maa yɩ Wɛ dɩlʋ na zǝni nɔɔna sɩ ba bɩcara taa zurǝ maŋa maama tɩn.

eng: Hes the one who comforts us in all our trouble so that we can comfort other people who are in every kind of trouble. We offer the same comfort that we ourselves received from God.
local: Dɩ́ na wʋ yaara yalʋ maama wʋnɩ, dɩntʋ mʋ yǝni DƖ pa dɩ́ bɩcara zurǝ, sɩ kʋ pa dɩ́ wanɩ dɩ́ zǝni balʋ dɩ na wʋ yaara dwi maama wʋnɩ tɩn sɩ ba dɩ bɩcara taa zurǝ, nɩ Wɛ na zǝni dɩbam dɩ te tɩn.

eng: That is because we receive so much comfort through Christ in the same way that we share so many of Christs sufferings.
local: Zezi Krisi na yaarɩ zanzan tɩn, dɩbam dɩ tɔgɩ dɩ́ na yaara yantʋ doŋ mʋ. Dɩ́ nan na ŋwɩ dɩd-o tɩn, dɩ́ ta wʋ́ tɔgɩ dɩ́ na zǝnǝ Wɛ tee nɩ, nɩnɛɛnɩ DƖ na zǝni Zezi Krisi lanyɩranɩ te tɩn.

eng: So if we have trouble, it is to bring you comfort and salvation. If we are comforted, it is to bring you comfort from the experience of endurance while you go through the same sufferings that we also suffer.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ, dɩbam na wʋ yaara wʋnɩ, kʋ yɩ sɩ kʋ zǝni abam mʋ sɩ á bɩcara taa zurǝ, sɩ á daarɩ á taá tɔgɩ Wɛ cwǝŋǝ lanyɩranɩ. Wɛ nan na pɛ dɩbam dɩ bɩcara zurǝ, kʋ yɩ sɩ abam dɩ na zǝnǝ yantʋ doŋ mʋ, sɩ á wanɩ á na dam á vɔ á wʋ á zɩgɩ kǝŋkǝŋ yaara yam wʋnɩ, nɩ dɩbam dɩ na nɛ yaara te tɩn.

eng: Our hope for you is certain, because we know that as you are partners in suffering, so also you are partners in comfort.
local: Kʋntʋ, dɩbam jɩgɩ tɩɩna dɩ abam, bɛŋwaanɩ dɩ́ ye nɩ, abam na tɔgɩ á na dɩbam yaara yam doŋ tɩn, á dɩ wʋ́ tɔgɩ á na zǝnǝ Wɛ tee nɩ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we dont want you to be unaware of the troubles that we went through in Asia. We were weighed down with a load of suffering that was so far beyond our strength that we were afraid we might not survive.
local: Dɩ́ ko-biǝ-ba, dɩ́ lagɩ dɩ́ pa abam lwarɩ yaara yalʋ maama dɩ́ na nɛ Azi tɩɩnɩ dɩm nɩ tɩn mʋ. Dɩ́ na nɛ cam dɩlʋ tɩn tiini dɩ dana dɩ dwe dɩbam, yɩ dɩ́ yaá bʋŋɩ nɩ dɩ́ wʋ́ ga dɩ́ ŋwɩa.

eng: It certainly seemed to us as if we had gotten the death penalty. This was so that we would have confidence in God, who raises the dead, instead of ourselves.
local: Dɩ́ nan na zɩgɩ tʋʋnɩ yigǝ nɩ kʋntʋ tɩn, kʋ yɩ sɩ kʋ pa dɩ́ daa yɩ taá tɩɩgɩ dɩ́ tɩtɩ dam mʋ, sɩ dɩ́ daarɩ dɩ́ kɩ dɩ́ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ dɩlʋ na jɩgɩ dam DƖ paɩ nɔɔna bi ba yagɩ tʋʋnɩ tɩn.

eng: God rescued us from a terrible death, and he will rescue us. We have set our hope on him that he will rescue us again.
local: Wɛ nan mʋ vrɩ dɩbam yaara yalʋ na cana nɩ tʋʋnɩ te tɩn wʋnɩ, yɩ DƖ ta wʋ́ vrɩ dɩbam kʋntʋ doŋ mʋ. Dɩ́ maa jɩgɩ tɩɩna Wɛ tee nɩ, nɩ DƖ ta wʋ́ vrɩ dɩbam tʋʋnɩ jɩŋa nɩ.

eng: since you are helping with your prayer for us. Then many people can thank God on our behalf for the gift that was given to us through the prayers of many people.
local: Abam nan wʋ́ zǝni dɩbam dɩ á na wʋ́ loori Wɛ á pa dɩbam tɩn. Kʋntʋ, nɔɔna zanzan na loori Wɛ, kʋ pa dɩ́ na zǝnǝ, kʋ nan wʋ́ pa nɔɔna zanzan dɩ kɩ Wɛ le, dɩ DƖ na joŋi ba loro kʋm ba na loori dɩbam ŋwaanɩ tɩn.

eng: We have conducted ourselves with godly sincerity and pure motives in the world, and especially toward you. This is why we are confident, and our conscience confirms this. We didnt act with human wisdom but we relied on the grace of God.
local: Dɩbam na jɩgɩ wʋpolo tɩn, kʋ yɩ sɩ dɩ́ ye dɩ́ bɩcarɩ nɩ, nɩ dɩ́ tɔgɩ cwǝŋǝ dɩ wʋ-poŋo mʋ, dɩ dɩ́ na brɩ dɩ́ wʋ dɩ abam te tɩn. Kʋ nan yɩ Wɛ mʋ zǝni dɩbam yɩ dɩ́ yɩ kʋntʋ. Kʋ daɩ dɩ nabiinǝ swan, kʋ yɩ Wɛ zaanɩ dɩm ŋwaanɩ mʋ dɩ́ tɔgɩ cwǝŋǝ kʋntʋ doŋ nɔɔna maama yigǝ nɩ, kʋ na dwe dɩdɩ abam yigǝ nɩ.

eng: We dont write anything to you except what you can read and also understand. I hope that you will understand totally.
local: Dɩ́ na pʋpʋnɩ kʋlʋ dɩ́ pa abam tɩn ba jɩgɩ wo-sǝgiru. Á wʋ́ wanɩ á karɩmɩ yɩ á ni tɩ kuri.

eng: since you have already understood us partly. Understand that in the day of our Lord Jesus, we will make you proud as you will also make us proud.
local: Abam nan ni dɩbam na kɩ kʋlʋ tɩn fɩnfɩɩn yɩranɩ mʋ. Amʋ nan jɩgɩ tɩɩna nɩ á wʋ́ ba á ni kʋ kuri fasɩ fasɩ, sɩ dɛ dɩm dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi Krisi na wʋ́ joori o ba tɩn, sɩ abam laan taá jɩgɩ wʋpolo dɩbam ŋwaanɩ, nɩ dɩbam dɩ na jɩgɩ wʋpolo dɩ abam te tɩn.

eng: Because I was sure of this, I wanted to visit you first so that you could have a second opportunity to see me.
local: Amʋ na tiini a jɩgɩ abam cɩga kʋntʋ tɩn, a ya dɛ yigǝ a bʋŋɩ sɩ a ba abam te mʋ, sɩ a daarɩ a kɛ a vu Masɩdʋanɩ, sɩ a na zɩgɩ da a maa joorǝ, sɩ a daa ta tɔgɩ á te, sɩ kʋ pa á na zǝnǝ kuni bɩle. Kʋntʋ á laan ya wʋ́ wanɩ á wǝli-nɩ sɩ a kɛ a vu Zude.

eng: So I wasnt unreliable when I planned to do this, was I? Or do I make decisions with a substandard human process so that I say Yes, yes and No, no at the same time?.
local: Amʋ na bʋŋɩ sɩ a ba yɩ a wʋ wanɩ a na cwǝŋǝ tɩn, á paɩ sɩ amʋ yɩ niǝ yale yale tu mʋ na? Amʋ na yǝni a bʋŋɩ sɩ a kɩ kǝm dɩlʋ tɩn, á paɩ sɩ kʋ yɩ amʋ tɩtɩ yɩranɩ zǝnǝ ŋwaanɩ mʋ na? Abam bʋŋɩ nɩ amʋ yɩ wʋlʋ na yǝni o wɩ ɛɛn yɩ o joori o wɩ aye tɩn mʋ na?.

eng: But as God is faithful, our message to you isnt both yes and no.
local: Wɛ nan yɩ cɩga tu yɩ DƖ ye nɩ dɩbam na tɛ kʋlʋ dɩ́ brɩ abam tɩn daɩ niǝ yale, nɩnɛɛnɩ ɛɛn dɩ awo na gwaanɩ daanɩ te tɩn.

eng: Gods Son, Jesus Christ, is the one who was preached among you by us—through me, Silvanus, and Timothy—he wasnt yes and no. In him it is always yes.
local: Dɩbam nan na brɩ abam Wɛ cɩga kam te tɩn, amʋ dɩ Silivɛn dɩ Timoti pɛ á lwarɩ Zezi Krisi wʋlʋ na yɩ Wɛ Bu wʋm tɩn na yɩ te. Wʋntʋ daɩ niǝ yale yale tu. Wʋntʋ nan mʋ yɩ wʋlʋ na wɩ ɛɛn yɩranɩ tɩn.

eng: All of Gods promises have their yes in him. That is why we say Amen through him to the glory of God.
local: Zezi na wɩ ɛɛn tɩn, dɩ́ maŋɩ sɩ dɩ́ lwarɩ nɩ Wɛ na goni ni sɩ DƖ kɩ kʋlʋ maama DƖ pa dɩbam tɩn yɩ cɩga mʋ. Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ, dɩ́ na yǝni dɩ́ warɩ Wɛ, dɩ́ tɔgɩ Zezi Krisi ŋwaanɩ dɩ́ wɩ «Amina», sɩ kʋ pa Wɛ taa jɩgɩ zulǝ dɩbam tee nɩ.

eng: God is the one who establishes us with you in Christ and who anointed us.
local: Kʋ yɩ Wɛ mʋ paɩ dɩbam dɩ abam maama zɩgɩ kǝŋkǝŋ Zezi Krisi tɔgɩm dɩm wʋnɩ. Kʋ ta yɩ dɩntʋ mʋ kuri dɩbam sɩ dɩ́ taá yɩ DƖ tɩntʋŋna.

eng: God also sealed us and gave the Spirit as a down payment in our hearts.
local: Wɛ ma kɩ DƖ Joro kʋm dɩ́ bɩcara nɩ sɩ kʋ brɩ nɩ dɩ́ yɩ DƖ nɔɔna. DƖ Joro kʋm ma pa dɩ́ da yigǝ dɩ́ lwarɩ nɩ dɩ́ laan wʋ́ ba dɩ́ na Wɛ wo-laarʋ tɩlʋ maama DƖ na tiŋi dɩbam ŋwaanɩ tɩn.

eng: I call on God as my witness—I didnt come again to Corinth because I wanted to spare you.
local: Wɛ mʋ yɩ amʋ maana tu. Amʋ na tɛ kʋlʋ tɩn na yɩ vwan, sɩ DƖ gʋ-nɩ. Amʋ na joori a lǝni a wʋbʋŋa sɩ a daa yɩ ba abam te Korɛntɩ nɩ tɩn, kʋ yɩ sɩ a yɩ ba a pa á daa na wʋ-cɔgɔ mʋ.

eng: It isnt that we are trying to control your faith, but we are working with you for your happiness, because you stand firm in your faith.
local: Kʋ nan daɩ nɩ dɩbam yɩ balʋ na wʋ́ fɩn abam dɩ á na maŋɩ sɩ á kɩ á wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ te tɩn, bɛŋwaanɩ abam maŋɩ á sɛ-DƖ dɩ pu-dɩa. Dɩ́ nan yɩ balʋ na wʋ́ wǝli dɩ abam dɩ́ tʋŋɩ, sɩ á taá jɩgɩ wʋpolo Wɛ ŋwaanɩ tɩn mʋ.

eng: So I decided that, for my own sake, I wouldnt visit you again while I was upset.
local: Mʋ kʋ kuri a joori a bʋŋɩ a wʋnɩ, sɩ a daa yɩ ba abam te, sɩ kʋ yɩ pa wʋ-cɔgɔ daa ta wʋra.

eng: If I make you sad, who will be there to make me glad when you are sad because of me?.
local: Abam mʋ yɩ balʋ na wʋ́ wanɩ á pa amʋ taa jɩgɩ wʋpolo tɩn. Kʋntʋ, amʋ na tu abam te, yɩ kʋ pa á wʋ cɔgɩ, nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ daa bá ta wʋra o na wʋ́ wanɩ o pa a na wʋpolo.

eng: Thats why I wrote this very thing to you, so that when I came I wouldnt be made sad by the ones who ought to make me happy. I have confidence in you, that my happiness means your happiness.
local: Kʋ yɩ kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ a ya pʋpʋnɩ tɔnɔ kʋm a pa abam. Amʋ dɛɛn ba lagɩ sɩ a ba abam te, sɩ kʋ pa amʋ wʋ cɔgɩ dɩ abam. Kʋ nan maŋɩ sɩ á taá yɩ balʋ na paɩ amʋ wʋ poli tɩn mʋ. Amʋ nan jɩgɩ abam cɩga nɩ, amʋ na jɩgɩ wʋpolo abam dɩ jɩgɩ wʋpolo mʋ.

eng: I wrote to you in tears, with a very troubled and anxious heart. I didnt write to make you sad but so you would know the overwhelming love that I have for you.
local: Amʋ dɛɛn na pʋpʋnɩ tɔnɔ kʋm a pa abam tɩn, a wʋ tiini kʋ cɔgɩ zanzan, yɩ liǝ jɩgɩ-nɩ kʋ pa a yi-na nuŋi zanzan abam ŋwaanɩ. Amʋ na pʋpʋnɩ te tɩn, kʋ daɩ sɩ kʋ pa á wʋrʋ cɔgɩ. Kʋ nan yɩ sɩ á wanɩ á lwarɩ amʋ na tiini a soe abam kʋ ja gaalɩ te tɩn mʋ.

eng: But if someone has made anyone sad, that person hasnt hurt me but all of you to some degree .
local: Nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ na kɩ o cɔgɩ tɩn, kʋ daɩ amʋ yɩranɩ wʋ mʋ cɔgɩ dɩd-o, kʋ yɩ abam maama mʋ, sɩ a nan yɩ zaŋɩ a ŋɔɔnɩ a ja gaalɩ, a ye sɩ abam zanzan wʋrʋ mʋ cɔgɩ.

eng: The punishment handed out by the majority is enough for this person.
local: Abam zanzan na pɛ o na cam tɩn, kʋ maŋɩ sɩ á laan yag-o mʋ.

eng: This is why you should try your best to forgive and to comfort this person now instead, so that this person isnt overwhelmed by too much sorrow.
local: Á nan maŋɩ sɩ á yagɩ á maa cɛ-o mʋ, sɩ á daarɩ á taá kɩ-o lanyɩranɩ, sɩ o bɩcarɩ taa zurǝ. Kʋ na daɩ kʋntʋ, o wʋ na tiini kʋ cɔgɩ, kʋʋ́ pa o wʋbʋŋa vugimi.

eng: So I encourage you to show your love for this person.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ a loori abam sɩ á pa o lwarɩ nɩ á so-o.

eng: This is another reason why I wrote you. I wanted to test you and see if you are obedient in everything.
local: Amʋ na pʋpʋnɩ tɔnɔ kʋm tɩn, kʋ yɩ sɩ a maasɩ abam a nii, á wʋ́ sɛ á tɔgɩ amʋ ni dɩm woŋo maama baŋa nɩ naa á bá sɛ mʋ.

eng: If you forgive anyone for anything, I do too. And whatever Ive forgiven , I did it for you in the presence of Christ.
local: Abam na yagɩ nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ kǝm á ma cɛ-o, amʋ dɩ wʋ́ yagɩ a ma cɛ-o mʋ. Kʋ na maŋɩ sɩ a yagɩ a ma cɛ nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ, kʋ yɩ abam ŋwaanɩ mʋ a kɩ kʋntʋ Zezi Krisi yigǝ nɩ.

eng: This is so that we wont be taken advantage of by Satan, because we are well aware of his schemes.
local: Kʋ nan maŋɩ sɩ dɩ́ duri nɔɔnʋ wʋm ŋwaŋa kʋntʋ, sɩ kʋ yɩ pa sʋtaanɩ na cwǝŋǝ dɩ wanɩ dɩbam. Bɛŋwaanɩ dɩ́ maŋɩ dɩ́ ye dɩntʋ na bʋŋɩ sɩ dɩ pa dɩbam tusi te tɩn.

eng: When I came to Troas to preach Christs gospel, the Lord gave me an opportunity to preach.
local: Amʋ na ve a yi tɩʋ kʋlʋ yɩrɩ na yɩ Trʋasɩ sɩ a tɔɔlɩ Zezi Krisi kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam a brɩ nɔɔna tɩn, a nɛ nɩ dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm ya pɛ-nɩ cwǝŋǝ sɩ a tɔɔlɩ-ka.

eng: But I was worried because I couldnt find my brother Titus there. So I said good-bye to them and went on to Macedonia.
local: Nan dɩ kʋntʋ dɩ, a wʋ nɛ wʋ-zuru dɩ a na beeri dɩ́ ko-bu Titi je a ga tɩn. A na wʋ nɛ-o tɩn, a ma banɩ nɔɔna bam yɩ a daarɩ a kɛ Masɩdʋanɩ.

eng: But thank God, who is always leading us around through Christ as if we were in a parade. He releases the fragrance of the knowledge of him everywhere through us.
local: Nan pa-na dɩ́ taá kɩ Wɛ le. Bɛŋwaanɩ dɩntʋ mʋ paɩ Zezi Krisi wɔnɔ, yɩ dɩ́ tɔgɩ o kwaga maŋa maama, sɩ dɩ́ taá paɩ nɔɔna lwarɩ Wɛ kwǝrǝ kam je maama, nɩnɛɛnɩ woŋo kʋlʋ lwǝm na ywǝnǝ yɩ dɩ zaŋɩ dɩ jagɩ je maama te tɩn.

eng: We smell like the aroma of Christs offering to God, both to those who are being saved and to those who are on the road to destruction.
local: Dɩbam nyɩ dɩ lwǝm dɩlʋ na ywǝnǝ tɩn mʋ Wɛ yigǝ nɩ, dɩ́ na brɩ nɔɔna Zezi Krisi cɩga kam tɩn ŋwaanɩ. Dɩbam nyɩ dɩ lwǝm dɩm kʋntʋ mʋ nɔɔna maama tee nɩ. Kʋ na yɩ balʋ na lagɩ ba ga ba ŋwɩa Wɛ tee nɩ tɩn, lwǝm dɩm kʋntʋ maa paɩ ba ye nɩ tʋʋnɩ wʋ́ ja-ba. Kʋ nan na yɩ balʋ Wɛ na vrɩ ba ŋwɩa tɩn, lwǝm dɩm wʋ́ ta jɩgɩ ywǝǝni ba tee nɩ, dɩ pa ba ye nɩ baá na Wɛ ŋwɩ-dʋŋa kam. Wɔɔ mʋ yi sɩ o tʋŋɩ tɩtʋŋ-kamunu kʋm kʋntʋ?.

eng: We arent like so many people who hustle the word of God to make a profit. We are speaking through Christ in the presence of God, as those who are sincere and as those who are sent from God.
local: Nɔɔna zanzan na brɩ Wɛ kwǝrǝ kam te tɩn, ba paɩ kʋ nyɩ dɩ pipiu mʋ sɩ ba na nyɔɔrɩ kʋ baŋa nɩ. Dɩbam nan daɩ kʋntʋ doŋ. Wɛ na tʋŋɩ dɩbam tɩn, dɩ́ yǝni dɩ́ kwe dɩ́ wʋ maama mʋ dɩ́ maa brɩ DƖ cɩga kam, bɛŋwaanɩ dɩ́ zɩgɩ Wɛ yigǝ nɩ mʋ dɩ́ ŋɔɔna, dɩ́ na yɩ Zezi Krisi tɩntʋŋna tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: Are we starting to commend ourselves again? We dont need letters of introduction to you or from you like other people, do we?.
local: Abam badaara nan daa ta wʋ́ bʋŋɩ nɩ dɩ́ lagɩ dɩ́ brɩ dɩ́ tɩtɩ mʋ dɩ dɩ́ na ŋɔɔnɩ te tɩn. Abam nan maŋɩ á ye dɩbam na yɩ te, yɩ á daa wʋ maŋɩ sɩ á joŋi twaanʋ tɩlʋ na brɩ dɩbam cɩga na yɩ te tɩn nɔɔna badaara tee nɩ. Abam nan wʋ maŋɩ sɩ á pʋpʋnɩ tɔnɔ kʋlʋ na brɩ dɩbam na yɩ te tɩn á pa nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ. Nɔɔna badonnǝ nan mʋ maŋɩ sɩ ba kɩ kʋntʋ, sɩ kʋ daɩ dɩbam.

eng: You are our letter, written on our hearts, known and read by everyone.
local: Abam tɩtɩ nan mʋ brɩ dɩbam cɩga na yɩ te tɩn. Abam nyɩ dɩ tɔnɔ mʋ te kʋ na pʋpʋnɩ dɩbam bɩcarɩ nɩ, yɩ nɔɔna maama wʋ́ wanɩ ba karɩmɩ yɩ ba kwǝri ba lwarɩ tɩn.

eng: You show that you are Christs letter, delivered by us. You werent written with ink but with the Spirit of the living God. You werent written on tablets of stone but on tablets of human hearts.
local: Abam na jɩgɩ á ŋwɩa te tɩn nyɩ dɩ tɔnɔ mʋ Zezi Krisi na tɔgɩ dɩbam ŋwaanɩ o pʋpʋnɩ. O nan na pʋpʋnɩ te tɩn, o mɛ Ŋwɩa Tu Baŋa-Wɛ Joro kʋm mʋ o pʋpʋnɩ, sɩ kʋ daɩ bǝrǝ mʋ o mɛ o pʋpʋnɩ. Pʋpʋnɩm dɩm kʋntʋ nan wʋ kɩ kandwa-pɩlɛ baŋa nɩ, o pʋpʋnɩ-dɩ nabiinǝ bɩcara nɩ mʋ.

eng: This is the confidence that we have through Christ in the presence of God.
local: Dɩ́ ye nɩ kʋntʋ yɩ cɩga mʋ, dɩ Zezi Krisi na pɛ dɩ́ lwarɩ nɩ Wɛ mʋ tʋŋɩ dɩbam tɩn.

eng: It isnt that we ourselves are qualified to claim that anything came from us. No, our qualification is from God.
local: Kʋ nan daɩ dɩ dɩbam tɩtɩ dam mʋ dɩ́ wʋ́ wanɩ dɩ́ ma tʋŋɩ Wɛ tɩtʋŋa yam. Kʋ yɩ Wɛ mʋ paɩ dɩbam dam yɩ dɩ́ maa tʋŋa.

eng: He has qualified us as ministers of a new covenant, not based on what is written but on the Spirit, because what is written kills, but the Spirit gives life.
local: DƖ ma pa dɩ́ yɩ DƖ tɩntʋŋna kʋntʋ, sɩ dɩ́ taá brɩ nɔɔna DƖ ni-dʋʋrɩ dɩm DƖ na goni tɩn na yɩ te tɩn. DƖ ni-dʋʋrɩ dɩm kʋntʋ nan ba tɔgɩ cullu tɩlʋ ba dɛɛn na pʋpʋnɩ tɩn. Dɩntʋ nan tɔgɩ dɩ Wɛ Joro kʋm dam mʋ. Cullu tɩm nan paɩ tʋʋnɩ mʋ naɩ cwǝŋǝ dɩ jaanɩ nabiinǝ. Kʋ daarɩ Wɛ Joro kʋm nan mʋ paɩ nabiinǝ na ŋwɩa Wɛ tee nɩ.

eng: The ministry that brought death was carved in letters on stone tablets. It came with such glory that the Israelites couldnt look for long at Moses face because his face was shining with glory, even though it was a fading glory.
local: Kʋ na yɩ Wɛ na kwe DƖ cullu tɩm DƖ kɩ Moyisi jɩŋa nɩ sɩ o pa DƖ nɔɔna bam tɩn, DƖ dɛɛn pʋpʋnɩ-tɩ DƖ kɩ kandwa-pɩlɛ baŋa nɩ mʋ. Wɛ dɛɛn na kwe-tɩ DƖ kɩ Moyisi jɩŋa nɩ kʋntʋ tɩn, DƖ paarɩ-zulǝ yam maa tiini ya wʋra, yɩ kʋ pa Moyisi yibiyǝ tiini ka nyɩɩna. O yibiyǝ kam nyɩɩnɩm dɩm na pɩpɩlɩ Yisɩrayɛlɩ tiinǝ bam yiǝ dɩ pa ba warɩ ba nii o seeni tɩn wʋ́ ba kɛ. Nan dɩ cullu tɩm na jaanɩ tʋʋnɩ mʋ tɩ ba tɩn, tɩ daa ta jɩgɩ Wɛ paarɩ-zulǝ.

eng: Wont the ministry of the Spirit be much more glorious?.
local: Kʋ daarɩ Wɛ Joro kʋm nan na wǝli nɔɔna te tɩn laan wʋ́ pa Wɛ paarɩ-zulǝ yam tiini ya ja gaalɩ.

eng: If the ministry that brought condemnation has glory, how much more glorious is the ministry that brings righteousness?.
local: Wɛ cullu tɩm na brɩ nɩ nɔɔna wʋ́ ga bʋra DƖ tee nɩ yɩ tɩ ta jɩgɩ paarɩ-zulǝ te tɩn, Wɛ na wǝli nɔɔna sɩ ba na cɩga DƖ tee nɩ te tɩn laan wʋ́ ta tiini kʋ jɩgɩ paarɩ-zulǝ kʋ ja gaalɩ.

eng: In fact, what was glorious isnt glorious now, because of the glory that is brighter.
local: Kʋ na yɩ cɩga tɩn, woŋo kʋlʋ ya na jɩgɩ zulǝ tɩn daa ba jɩgɩ zulǝ, zɩm woŋo kʋm na tiini kʋ jɩgɩ paarɩ-zulǝ kʋ ja gaalɩ tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: If the glory that fades away was glorious, how much more glorious is the one that lasts!.
local: Wɛ cullu tɩm dɛɛn wʋra dɩ DƖ paarɩ-zulǝ yam, yɩ tɩntʋ ba tɩ kɛ. Kʋ daarɩ DƖ zǝnǝ yalʋ na wʋ́ ta wʋra maŋa maama tɩn wʋ́ pa DƖ paarɩ-zulǝ yam tiini ya ta wʋra ya ja gaalɩ.

eng: So, since we have such a hope, we act with great confidence.
local: Dɩ́ na jɩgɩ tɩɩna dɩ Wɛ kʋntʋ doŋ tɩn mʋ te dɩ́ waɩ dɩ́ brɩ DƖ cɩga kam jaja.

eng: We arent like Moses, who used to put a veil over his face so that the Israelites couldnt watch the end of what was fading away.
local: Dɩbam nan bá sǝgi kʋlʋkʋlʋ nɩnɛɛnɩ Moyisi dɛɛn na kwe gɔrɔ o ma kwǝli o yiǝ tɩn. O dɛɛn kɩ kʋntʋ sɩ Yisɩrayɛlɩ tiinǝ bam mʋ yɩ taa naɩ o yibiyǝ kam nyɩɩnɩm dɩm na wʋra dɩ ti tɩn.

eng: But their minds were closed. Right up to the present day the same veil remains when the old covenant is read. The veil is not removed because it is taken away by Christ.
local: Bantʋ wʋbʋŋa ma tɩ, yɩ kʋ pa ba na karɩmɩ twaanʋ tɩlʋ na brɩ Wɛ dɛɛn na goni ni DƖ pa Moyisi tɩn, ba warɩ ba lwarɩ DƖ cɩga kam kuri. Kʋ yɩ nɩnɛɛnɩ gɔrɔ kʋm daa ta mʋ kwǝli ba yiǝ dɩ zɩm maama. Kʋ nan yɩ Zezi Krisi mʋ wʋ́ pa gɔrɔ kʋm kʋntʋ dwanɩ nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ na sɛ-o tɩn yiǝ nɩ.

eng: Even today, whenever Moses is read, a veil lies over their hearts.
local: Nan dɩ zɩm maama dɩ, bantʋ na karɩmɩ Moyisi twaanʋ tɩm, ba ba ni kʋ kuri, gɔrɔ kʋm kʋntʋ na kwǝli ba yiǝ tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: But whenever someone turns back to the Lord, the veil is removed.
local: Nɔɔnʋ nan na lǝni o wʋ o sɛ dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm, kʋʋ́ pa gɔrɔ kʋm dwanɩ kʋntʋ tu yiǝ nɩ.

eng: The Lord is the Spirit, and where the Lords Spirit is, there is freedom.
local: Dɩ́ Yuutu wʋlʋ dɩ́ na ŋɔɔnɩ o woŋo yo seeni tɩn, kʋ lagɩ kʋ ta nɩ Wɛ Joro mʋ. Wɛ Joro kʋm nan na wʋ nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ tee nɩ tɩn, o laan te o tɩtɩ mʋ.

eng: All of us are looking with unveiled faces at the glory of the Lord as if we were looking in a mirror. We are being transformed into that same image from one degree of glory to the next degree of glory. This comes from the Lord, who is the Spirit.
local: Dɩbam balʋ maama na sɛ Zezi tɩn daa ba jɩgɩ gɔrɔ kʋlʋ na kwǝli dɩ́ yiǝ tɩn. Kʋ maa paɩ dɩ́ waɩ dɩ́ nii dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm paarɩ-zulǝ yam jaja. Dɩ́ na nii-o kʋntʋ tɩn, kʋ maa paɩ dɩ́ laan lǝni dɩ́ nyɩ nɩ o tɩtɩ te, sɩ dɩ́ taá waɩ dɩ́ brɩ o paarɩ-zulǝ yam na yɩ te tɩn, sɩ ya taa fɔgɩ ya pulǝ ya wǝli da. Dɩ́ Yuutu Joro kʋm tɩtʋŋa yam mʋ tɩntʋ.

eng: This is why we dont get discouraged, given that we received this ministry in the same way that we received Gods mercy.
local: Dɩbam bá ga baarɩ, bɛŋwaanɩ Wɛ lanyɩranɩ kǝm dɩm ŋwaanɩ mʋ DƖ pɛ dɩbam tɩtʋŋɩ dɩm kʋntʋ.

eng: Instead, we reject secrecy and shameful actions. We dont use deception, and we dont tamper with Gods word. Instead, we commend ourselves to everyones conscience in the sight of God by the public announcement of the truth.
local: Dɩbam nan jɩgɩ dɩ́ tɩtɩ mʋ dɩ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ nɔɔna na sǝgi ba kɩ yɩ tɩ jɩgɩ cavɩɩra tɩn. Dɩ́ nan ba ganɩ nɔɔna dɩ swan, naa dɩ́ lǝni Wɛ taanɩ dɩm. Dɩ́ yɔɔrɩ dɩ́ brɩ Wɛ cɩga kam mʋ jaja, sɩ kʋ pa nɔɔna maama lwarɩ nɩ dɩ́ na kɩ te tɩn tɔgɩ cwǝŋǝ Wɛ yigǝ nɩ.

eng: And even if our gospel is veiled, it is veiled to those who are on the road to destruction.
local: Dɩ́ na brɩ Wɛ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam te tɩn kuri na sǝgi nɔɔna tee nɩ, kʋ yɩ balʋ na lagɩ ba ga ba ŋwɩa Wɛ tee nɩ tɩn yɩranɩ má mʋ ka sǝgi ba tee nɩ.

eng: The god of this age has blinded the minds of those who dont have faith so they couldnt see the light of the gospel that reveals Christs glory. Christ is the image of God.
local: Bantʋ ba sɛ Wɛ cɩga kam, bɛŋwaanɩ sʋtaanɩ dɩlʋ na di dam lʋgʋ kʋntʋ baŋa nɩ tɩn mʋ pɛ ba wʋbʋŋa vugimi. Dɩ kɩ kʋntʋ, sɩ ba yɩ wanɩ ba na pooni dɩlʋ Wɛ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam na lagɩ ka pa-ba tɩn mʋ. Kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam kʋntʋ brɩ Zezi Krisi paarɩ-zulǝ na yɩ te tɩn mʋ. Wʋntʋ mʋ nyɩ dɩ Baŋa-Wɛ fasɩ.

eng: We dont preach about ourselves. Instead, we preach about Jesus Christ as Lord, and we describe ourselves as your slaves for Jesus sake.
local: Dɩbam na yǝni dɩ́ tɔɔlɩ Wɛ kwǝrǝ kam te tɩn, kʋ daɩ nɩ dɩ́ tɩtɩ mʋ dɩ́ jɩgɩ dɩ́ brɩ nɔɔna. Dɩ́ nan brɩ nɔɔna nɩ Zezi Krisi mʋ yɩ nabiinǝ Yuutu, yɩ dɩbam yɩ balʋ na tʋŋɩ dɩ́ pa abam o ŋwaanɩ tɩn mʋ.

eng: God said that light should shine out of the darkness. He is the same one who shone in our hearts to give us the light of the knowledge of Gods glory in the face of Jesus Christ.
local: Baŋa-Wɛ mʋ yɩ wʋlʋ na maŋɩ o ta o wɩ: «Pooni zǝŋi lim wʋnɩ». Dɩntʋ nan ta mʋ yɩ dɩlʋ na pɛ pooni ba dɩ zǝŋi dɩ́ bɩcara nɩ tɩn, sɩ dɩ́ lwarɩ DƖ paarɩ-zulǝ yam na yɩ te, yɩ yantʋ mʋ dɩ́ naɩ Zezi Krisi yibiyǝ nɩ.

eng: But we have this treasure in clay pots so that the awesome power belongs to God and doesnt come from us.
local: Wɛ na pɛ dɩbam tɩtʋŋɩ dɩm kʋntʋ tɩn, kʋ nyɩ dɩ DƖ kwe wǝǝnu tɩlʋ na yɩ lʋnnɩ nyɩm tɩn mʋ DƖ kɩ kamɔrʋ kɔɔra wʋnɩ. Dɩ́ na nyɩ dɩ kɔɔra kʋntʋ tɩn, kʋ brɩ nɩ kʋ daɩ dɩbam tɩtɩ dam, kʋ yɩ Wɛ dam-fɔrɔ kʋm ŋwaanɩ mʋ.

eng: We are experiencing all kinds of trouble, but we arent crushed. We are confused, but we arent depressed.
local: Yaara zanzan yǝni ya yi dɩbam, yɩ ya warɩ dɩ́ yigǝ ya cɩ. Liǝ yǝni ya tiini ya ja dɩbam, yɩ ya warɩ dɩbam wʋbʋŋa ya cɔgɩ.

eng: We are harassed, but we arent abandoned. We are knocked down, but we arent knocked out.
local: Nɔɔna yǝni ba bɛɛsɩ dɩbam, Wɛ nan ba fɔgɩ DƖ yagɩ dɩbam. Dɩ́ dʋna yǝni ba magɩ dɩbam ba dɩ tɩga nɩ, yɩ ba ba fɔgɩ ba gʋɩ dɩbam.

eng: We always carry Jesus death around in our bodies so that Jesus life can also be seen in our bodies.
local: Dɩbam jɩgɩ Zezi tʋʋnɩ dɩm yaara yam doŋ mʋ dɩ́ ŋwɩa wʋnɩ maŋa maama, sɩ kʋ brɩ nɩ Zezi ŋwɩa kam mʋ wʋ dɩbam wʋnɩ.

eng: We who are alive are always being handed over to death for Jesus sake so that Jesus life can also be seen in our bodies that are dying.
local: Dɩbam ŋwɩa kam wʋnɩ maŋa maama dɩ́ wʋ tʋʋnɩ ni nɩ mʋ, dɩ́ na sɛ Zezi tɩn ŋwaanɩ, sɩ kʋ pa Zezi ŋwɩa kam taa wʋ dɩ́ yɩra yalʋ na wʋ́ ba ya tɩ tɩn wʋnɩ.

eng: So death is at work in us, but life is at work in you.
local: Kʋntʋ, dɩbam zɩgɩ tʋʋnɩ yigǝ nɩ mʋ maŋa maama, sɩ abam wanɩ á na ŋwɩa Wɛ tee nɩ.

eng: We have the same faithful spirit as what is written in scripture: I had faith, and so I spoke. We also have faith, and so we also speak.
local: Kʋ maŋɩ kʋ pʋpʋnɩ Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm wʋnɩ kʋ wɩ: «Amʋ na kɩ a wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ tɩn mʋ pɛ a ŋɔɔna.» Dɩbam dɩ na jɩgɩ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ kʋntʋ doŋ tɩn mʋ paɩ dɩ́ ŋɔɔnɩ DƖ cɩga kam.

eng: We do this because we know that the one who raised the Lord Jesus will also raise us with Jesus, and he will bring us into his presence along with you.
local: Dɩbam ye nɩ Wɛ mʋ bi dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi DƖ pa o yagɩ tʋʋnɩ, yɩ DƖ ta wʋ́ bi dɩbam dɩ, sɩ dɩ́ na ŋwɩa DƖ tee nɩ dɩ́ na ŋwɩ dɩ Zezi tɩn ŋwaanɩ. Kʋntʋ mʋ Wɛ wʋ́ pa dɩbam dɩ abam maama tɔgɩ daanɩ dɩ́ vu dɩ́ zɩgɩ DƖ yigǝ nɩ.

eng: All these things are for your benefit. As grace increases to benefit more and more people, it will cause gratitude to increase, which results in Gods glory.
local: Dɩ́ na kɩ te maama tɩn yɩ abam zǝnǝ ŋwaanɩ mʋ. Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ, Wɛ wʋ́ vrɩ nɔɔna zanzan DƖ zaanɩ dɩm ŋwaanɩ, yɩ kʋʋ́ pa ba taa kɩ-DƖ le zanzan yɩ ba zuli-DƖ kʋ ja gaalɩ.

eng: So we arent depressed. But even if our bodies are breaking down on the outside, the person that we are on the inside is being renewed every day.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ dɩ́ bá ga baarɩ. Kʋ na yɩ nabiinǝ yɩra yalʋ dɩ́ na jɩgɩ tɩn, ya kwɩn ya ve mʋ dɛ maama sɩ ya ba ya bugi. Kʋ daarɩ kʋ na yɩ dɩ́ jwǝǝru tɩm, Wɛ fɔgɩ DƖ kwɛ-tɩ mʋ dɛ maama.

eng: Our temporary minor problems are producing an eternal stockpile of glory for us that is beyond all comparison.
local: Lele kʋntʋ dɩ́ jɩgɩ yaara fɩnfɩɩn mʋ, yɩ ya bá daanɩ. Ya nan wʋ́ pa dɩ́ ba dɩ́ na paarɩ-zulǝ zanzan Wɛ tee nɩ sɩ kʋ taa ve maŋa kalʋ na ba ti tɩn, yɩ paarɩ-zulǝ yam kʋntʋ wʋ́ tiini ya dwǝni yaara yam ya na maɩ te tɩn.

eng: We dont focus on the things that can be seen but on the things that cant be seen. The things that can be seen dont last, but the things that cant be seen are eternal.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ dɩ́ wʋbʋŋa ba tɔgɩ lʋgʋ baŋa wǝǝnu tɩlʋ na naɩ dɩ yiǝ tɩn. Dɩ́ wʋbʋŋa nan tɔgɩ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ na ba naɩ dɩ yiǝ tɩn mʋ. Bɛŋwaanɩ dɩ́ yiǝ na naɩ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ tɩn yǝni tɩ ba daana. Kʋ daarɩ tɩlʋ na ba naɩ dɩ yiǝ tɩn wʋ́ ta wʋra sɩ kʋ taa ve maŋa kalʋ na ba ti tɩn.

eng: Since we work together with him, we are also begging you not to receive the grace of God in vain.
local: Dɩbam na wǝli dɩ Wɛ dɩ́ tʋŋɩ DƖ tɩtʋŋa yam tɩn, dɩ́ loori abam sɩ á yɩ zaŋɩ á pa Wɛ zaanɩ dɩm DƖ na pɛ abam tɩn ji kafɛ.

eng: He says, I listened to you at the right time, and I helped you on the day of salvation. Look, now is the right time! Look, now is the day of salvation!.
local: Baŋa-Wɛ maŋɩ DƖ ta DƖ wɩ: «Maŋa kalʋ na maŋɩ dɩ a wʋbʋŋa tɩn, amʋ sɛ nmʋ loro kʋm. Dɛ dɩlʋ na maŋɩ sɩ a vrɩ nmʋ tɩn, amʋ zǝni nmʋ.» Nii-na! Wɛ zǝnǝ maŋa kam yiǝ. Kʋ yɩ zɩm mʋ DƖ lagɩ DƖ vrɩ abam.

eng: We dont give anyone any reason to be offended about anything so that our ministry wont be criticized.
local: Dɩ́ na tʋŋɩ Wɛ ŋwaanɩ tɩn, dɩ́ ba lagɩ sɩ nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ na cwǝŋǝ o lwɛ dɩ́ tɩtʋŋɩ dɩm. Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ dɩ́ ba kɩ kʋlʋ na wʋ́ cɔgɩ nɔɔnʋ wʋ sɩ o yɩ da Wɛ tɩn.

eng: Instead, we commend ourselves as ministers of God in every way. We did this with our great endurance through problems, disasters, and stressful situations.
local: Dɩ́ nan kwaanɩ dɩ́ brɩ dɩ́ tɩtɩ nɩ dɩ́ yɩ Wɛ tɩntʋŋna mʋ woŋo maama wʋnɩ. Dɩ́ yǝni dɩ́ vɔ dɩ́ wʋ mʋ, kʋ na yɩ yaara naa cam dɩ wʋ-cɔgɔ wʋnɩ.

eng: We went through beatings, imprisonments, and riots. We experienced hard work, sleepless nights, and hunger.
local: Ba magɩ dɩbam yɩ ba jaanɩ dɩbam ba kɩ pɩɩna digǝ nɩ kuni zanzan. Ba maa yeeri dɩbam. Dɩ́ maa yǝni dɩ́ tʋŋɩ tɩtʋŋ-cɛɛra. Dɩ́ maa ba dɔ dɩ́ sui, yɩ dɩ́ pɩɩnɩ dɩ́ tɩtɩ dɩ kana.

eng: We displayed purity, knowledge, patience, and generosity. We served with the Holy Spirit, genuine love.
local: Dɩ́ ma maɩ wʋ-poŋo dɩ yǝno dɩ wʋ-zuru dɩ́ maa tʋŋa, yɩ dɩ́ ta kwǝri dɩ́ kɩ nɔɔna lanyɩranɩ. Dɩ́ maa jɩgɩ Wɛ Joro kʋm dam dɩ sono cɩga cɩga.

eng: telling the truth, and Gods power. We carried the weapons of righteousness in our right hand and our left hand.
local: Dɩ́ maa ŋɔɔnɩ Wɛ cɩga kam dɩ́ brɩ nɔɔna, yɩ dɩ́ jɩgɩ Wɛ dam dɩ́ ma dɩ́ tʋŋa. Dɩ́ na yɔɔrɩ dɩ́ tɔgɩ cɩga cwǝŋǝ te tɩn, kʋ nyɩ dɩ dɩ́ na ze jara zɩla jazɩm dɩ jagwiǝ te tɩn mʋ.

eng: We were treated with honor and dishonor and with verbal abuse and good evaluation. We were seen as both fake and real.
local: Nɔɔna badonnǝ paɩ dɩbam zulǝ, yɩ badaara gooni dɩbam. Babam maa twɩ dɩbam, yɩ badaara paɩ dɩbam cɩga. Badonnǝ maa paɩ dɩ́ yɩ balʋ na ganɩ nɔɔna tɩn, yɩ dɩ́ nan yɔɔrɩ dɩ́ tɔgɩ cɩga mʋ.

eng: as unknown and well known, as dying—and look, we are alive! We were seen as punished but not killed.
local: Badaara tɛ ba wɩ, ba yǝri dɩbam, yɩ nɔɔna maama yagɩ ba ye dɩbam lanyɩranɩ. Badonnǝ ma paɩ dɩ́ lagɩ dɩ́ tɩ mʋ, yɩ dɩ́ nan ta ŋwɩ. Ba paɩ dɩ́ naɩ cam, yɩ ba nan wʋ wanɩ ba gʋ dɩbam.

eng: as going through pain but always happy, as poor but making many rich, and as having nothing but owning everything.
local: Nɔɔna maa paɩ dɩ́ wʋ cɔga, yɩ dɩ́ nan ta jɩgɩ wʋpolo maŋa maama. Nɔɔna paɩ dɩ́ yɩ yinigǝ tiinǝ mʋ, yɩ dɩ́ yagɩ dɩ́ wǝli nɔɔna zanzan dɩ wo-laarʋ. Nɔɔna paɩ dɩ́ ba jɩgɩ kʋlʋkʋlʋ mʋ, yɩ dɩ́ nan jɩgɩ woŋo maama Wɛ yigǝ nɩ.

eng: Corinthians, we have spoken openly to you, and our hearts are wide open.
local: Dɩ́ badonnǝ Korɛntɩ tiinǝ-ba, dɩ́ kwe dɩ́ bɩcara maama mʋ dɩ́ ma ŋɔɔnɩ dɩ abam jaja. Dɩbam tiini dɩ́ soe abam dɩ dɩ́ bɩcara maama.

eng: There are no limits to the affection that we feel for you. You are the ones who placed boundaries on your affection for us.
local: Kʋ nan daɩ dɩbam mʋ cɩgɩ sono kʋlʋ na wʋ dɩbam dɩ abam laŋa nɩ tɩn daanɩ, kʋ yɩ abam mʋ cɩga.

eng: But as a fair trade—Im talking to you like you are children—open your hearts wide too.
local: Amʋ nan loori abam nɩ á yɩ a biǝ mʋ te, sɩ á taá jɩgɩ amʋ sono kʋm doŋ á bɩcara nɩ.

eng: Dont be tied up as equal partners with people who dont believe. What does righteousness share with that which is outside the Law? What relationship does light have with darkness?.
local: Abam nan yɩ zaŋɩ á kwe á tɩtɩ á wǝli dɩ balʋ na ba tɔgɩ Zezi tɩn, sɩ lanyɩranɩ dɩ balɔrɔ ba jɩgɩ wǝl-dɔnɔ daanɩ. Pooni dɩ lim dɩ nan ba jɩgɩ wǝl-dɔnɔ.

eng: What harmony does Christ have with Satan? What does a believer have in common with someone who doesnt believe?.
local: Zezi Krisi dɩ sʋtaanɩ bá wanɩ ba taa jɩgɩ ni-dɩdwɩ. Wʋlʋ na sɛ Zezi tɩn dɩ wʋlʋ na wʋ sɛ-o tɩn bá wanɩ ba taa jɩgɩ wʋbʋŋ-dɩdwɩ.

eng: What agreement can there be between Gods temple and idols? Because we are the temple of the living God. Just as God said, I live with them, and I will move among them. I will be their God, and they will be my people. .
local: Jwǝnǝ nan bá wanɩ ya taa jɩgɩ wǝl-dɔnɔ dɩ Wɛ tɩtɩ digǝ. Dɩbam nan mʋ nyɩ dɩ Wɛ digǝ kam DƖ na zʋʋrɩ ka wʋnɩ tɩn. Bɛŋwaanɩ Wɛ maŋɩ DƖ ta DƖ wɩ: «Amʋ wʋ́ ta zʋʋrɩ a nɔɔna bam wʋnɩ, yɩ a wʋra dɩ ba. Amʋ wʋ́ ta yɩ bantʋ Wɛ, yɩ ba dɩ wʋ́ ta yɩ amʋ nɔɔna.».

eng: Therefore, come out from among them and be separated, says the Lord. Dont touch what is unclean. Then I will welcome you. .
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ Wɛ tagɩ DƖ wɩ: «Abam maŋɩ sɩ á lɩ á tɩtɩ balʋ na wʋ sɛ amʋ tɩn tɩtarɩ nɩ, sɩ á daarɩ á pɔɔrɩ á tɩtɩ dɩ ba. Á fɔgɩ á cɩ á tɩtɩ dɩ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ maama na yɩ wo-zɔɔna tɩn. Kʋntʋ mʋ amʋ wʋ́ joŋi abam.

eng: I will be a father to you, and you will be my sons and daughters, says the Lord Almighty .
local: Amʋ wʋ́ ta yɩ abam Ko, yɩ abam dɩ wʋ́ ta yɩ amʋ biǝ.» Mʋ dɩ́ Yuutu Baŋa-Wɛ dɩlʋ na jɩgɩ dam wǝǝnu maama baŋa nɩ tɩn na tagɩ te.

eng: We know that if the tent that we live in on earth is torn down, we have a building from God. Its a house that isnt handmade, which is eternal and located in heaven.
local: Dɩbam yɩra yam dɩ́ na jɩgɩ lʋgʋ baŋa nɩ tɩn nyɩ dɩ vwe mʋ dɩ́ na zʋʋrɩ dɩ wʋnɩ. Dɩ́ nan ye nɩ, vwe dɩm kʋntʋ na cɔgɩ, Wɛ wʋ́ pa dɩ́ na digǝ DƖ sɔŋɔ nɩ sɩ dɩ́ taá zʋʋrɩ da. Kʋ daɩ nabiinǝ mʋ lɔgɩ digǝ kam kʋntʋ. Ka nan wʋ́ ta wʋra maŋa kalʋ na ba ti tɩn.

eng: We groan while we live in this residence. We really want to dress ourselves with our building from heaven.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ dɩbam yǝni dɩ́ kʋna dɩ cam, yɩ dɩ́ fra tiini ya zʋ Wɛ-sɔŋɔ kʋm, dɩ́ na lagɩ sɩ Wɛ pa dɩ́ zʋ digǝ kalʋ DƖ na lagɩ DƖ pa dɩbam tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: since we assume that when we take off this tent, we wont find out that we are naked.
local: Wɛ na pɛ dɩ́ zʋ digǝ kam kʋntʋ nɩnɛɛnɩ dɩ́ na zʋ gɔrɔ te tɩn, dɩ́ daa bá ta nyɩ nɩ nɔn-kalambwǝǝlu te.

eng: Yes, while we are in this tent we groan, because we are weighed down. We want to be dressed not undressed, so that what is dying can be swallowed up by life.
local: Dɩ́ ta na zʋʋrɩ dɩ́ lʋgʋ baŋa vwe dɩm wʋnɩ tɩn, dɩ́ yǝni dɩ́ kʋnɩ mʋ nɩ dɩ́ zɩŋɩ zɩla mʋ te. Kʋ nan daɩ nɩ dɩ́ lagɩ sɩ dɩ́ dɩ dɩ́ yɩra yam mʋ dɩ́ yagɩ. Dɩ́ lagɩ sɩ dɩ́ zʋ ya-dʋʋra yalʋ Wɛ na tiŋi DƖ sɔŋɔ nɩ sɩ DƖ pa dɩbam tɩn mʋ, sɩ DƖ ŋwɩ-dʋŋa kam laan pa dɩ́ yɩra yalʋ na wʋ́ tɩ tɩn daa yɩ taa jɩgɩ kuri.

eng: Now the one who prepared us for this very thing is God, and God gave us the Spirit as a down payment for our home.
local: Baŋa-Wɛ tɩtɩ mʋ kwɛ dɩbam sɩ dɩ́ ba dɩ́ na ya-dʋʋra yam kʋntʋ DƖ tee nɩ, yɩ DƖ pa dɩbam DƖ Joro kʋm, sɩ kʋ da yigǝ kʋ pa dɩ́ lwarɩ nɩ dɩ́ laan wʋ́ ba dɩ́ na wo-laarʋ tɩlʋ Wɛ na tiŋi sɩ DƖ pa dɩbam tɩn maama.

eng: So we are always confident, because we know that while we are living in the body, we are away from our home with the Lord.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ dɩ́ jɩgɩ pu-dɩa maŋa maama, yɩ dɩ́ ye nɩ, dɩ́ ta na jɩgɩ lʋgʋ baŋa yɩra yam tɩn mʋ paɩ dɩ́ ta wʋ ve dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm sɔŋɔ.

eng: We live by faith and not by sight.
local: Kʋ daɩ nɩ dɩ́ yiǝ maŋɩ ya na Wɛ-sɔŋɔ kʋm wǝǝnu tɩm kʋntʋ. Dɩ́ nan kɩ dɩ́ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ nɩ dɩ́ wʋ́ na-tɩ.

eng: We are confident, and we would prefer to leave the body and to be at home with the Lord.
local: Kʋntʋ mʋ paɩ dɩ́ jɩgɩ pu-dɩa, yɩ dɩ́ ye nɩ kʋʋ́ ta lamma kʋ pa dɩbam sɩ dɩ́ yagɩ dɩ́ yɩra yalʋ na yɩ lʋgʋ baŋa nyɩm tɩn, sɩ dɩ́ daarɩ dɩ́ vu dɩ́ taá wʋ dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm sɔŋɔ nɩ.

eng: So our goal is to be acceptable to him, whether we are at home or away from home.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ dɩ́ kwaanɩ dɩ́ lagɩ sɩ dɩ́ kɩ kʋlʋ na wʋ́ poli dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm wʋ maŋa maama tɩn, dɩ́ na wʋ tɩga baŋa nɩ naa dɩ́ zɩ ve Wɛ-sɔŋɔ dɩ.

eng: We all must appear before Christ in court so that each person can be paid back for the things that were done while in the body, whether they were good or bad.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ dɩbam maama maŋɩ sɩ dɩ́ ba dɩ́ zɩgɩ Zezi Krisi yigǝ nɩ sɩ o di dɩbam taanɩ. Nɔɔnʋ maama maŋɩ sɩ o joŋi kʋlʋ na maŋɩ dɩ o kikiǝ yalʋ maama o na kɩ lʋgʋ baŋa nɩ tɩn, kʋ na yɩ o kǝm-laarʋ naa o kǝm-balwaarʋ.

eng: So we try to persuade people, since we know what it means to fear the Lord. We are well known by God, and I hope that in your heart we are well known by you as well.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ dɩ́ ye dɩ́ na maŋɩ sɩ dɩ́ taá kwarɩ dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm te. Mʋ kʋ kuri dɩ́ kwaana sɩ dɩ́ pa nɔɔna lwarɩ Wɛ cɩga kam. Wɛ ye dɩbam wʋ lanyɩranɩ. Amʋ nan bʋŋɩ nɩ abam dɩ wʋ́ ta ye kʋntʋ á bɩcara nɩ.

eng: We arent trying to commend ourselves to you again. Instead, we are giving you an opportunity to be proud of us so that you could answer those who take pride in superficial appearance, and not in what is in the heart.
local: Kʋ nan daɩ nɩ dɩbam lagɩ sɩ dɩ́ brɩ dɩ́ tɩtɩ mʋ dɩ abam. Dɩ́ lagɩ sɩ dɩ́ zǝni abam mʋ, sɩ á wanɩ á taá jɩgɩ wʋpolo dɩbam ŋwaanɩ. Kʋntʋ mʋ á wʋ́ wanɩ á vɩn balʋ na tu abam te, yɩ ba jɩgɩ tɩɩra dɩ ba na brɩ ba tɩtɩ te, yɩ ba yigǝ tǝrǝ dɩ ba wʋrʋ na yɩ te tɩn.

eng: If we are crazy, its for Gods sake. If we are rational, its for your sake.
local: Abam paɩ dɩbam ba jɩgɩ swan mʋ na? Kʋ nan na maŋɩ kʋ yɩ kʋntʋ dɩ, kʋ yɩ Wɛ ŋwaanɩ mʋ. Dɩ́ nan jɩgɩ swan, kʋ yɩ abam zǝnǝ ŋwaanɩ mʋ.

eng: The love of Christ controls us, because we have concluded this: one died for the sake of all; therefore, all died.
local: Dɩ́ na kɩ kʋlʋ maama tɩn, kʋ yɩ Zezi Krisi sono kʋm ŋwaanɩ mʋ. Bɛŋwaanɩ dɩ́ ye lanyɩranɩ nɩ nɔɔnʋ dɩdʋa mʋ tɩga o lǝni nɔɔna maama yuu nɩ, yɩ kʋntʋ brɩ nɩ ba maama dɩ tɔgɩ dɩd-o ba tɩ mʋ.

eng: He died for the sake of all so that those who are alive should live not for themselves but for the one who died for them and was raised.
local: Zezi tɩgɩ ba maama ŋwaanɩ mʋ, sɩ balʋ na ŋwɩ tɩn daa yɩ taa ŋwɩ nɩ ba tɩtɩ na lagɩ te tɩn, sɩ ba taa ŋwɩ wʋlʋ na lǝni ba yuu nɩ o tɩ yɩ o joori o bi o yagɩ tʋʋnɩ tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: So then, from this point on we wont recognize people by human standards. Even though we used to know Christ by human standards, that isnt how we know him now.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ dɩbam daa ba kuri nɔɔna da-wʋnɩ nɩ nabiinǝ wʋbʋŋa na yɩ te tɩn. Dɩbam dɛɛn ya jɩgɩ wʋbʋŋa yantʋ doŋ mʋ dɩdaanɩ dɩ́ na nii Zezi Krisi te tɩn. Lele kʋntʋ dɩ́ nan daa ba jeeli kʋntʋ doŋ.

eng: So then, if anyone is in Christ, that person is part of the new creation. The old things have gone away, and look, new things have arrived!.
local: Nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ na ŋwɩ dɩ Zezi Krisi tɩn, kʋ brɩ nɩ o jɩgɩ Wɛ ŋwɩ-dʋŋa kam mʋ, yɩ o ŋwɩ-doŋǝ kam kɛ. O ŋwɩa kam maama laan lǝni ka ji ŋwɩ-dʋŋa mʋ.

eng: All of these new things are from God, who reconciled us to himself through Christ and who gave us the ministry of reconciliation.
local: Kʋ yɩ Wɛ mʋ kɩ kʋ maama. Dɩntʋ mʋ tagɩ Zezi Krisi ŋwaanɩ DƖ fɔgɩ dɩbam dɩ DƖ tɩtɩ daanɩ, yɩ DƖ daarɩ DƖ pa dɩbam tɩtʋŋɩ dɩm kʋntʋ, sɩ dɩ́ brɩ nɔɔna sɩ ba dɩ Wɛ fɔgɩ daanɩ.

eng: In other words, God was reconciling the world to himself through Christ, by not counting peoples sins against them. He has trusted us with this message of reconciliation.
local: Dɩ́ yǝni dɩ́ brɩ nɔɔna nɩ Baŋa-Wɛ dɛ Zezi Krisi ŋwaanɩ mʋ DƖ fɔgɩ nabiinǝ dɩ DƖ tɩtɩ daanɩ, kʋ pa Wɛ daa ba jeeli ba lwarɩm. DƖ ma tʋŋɩ dɩbam sɩ dɩ́ taá brɩ nɔɔna DƖ fɔgɩm dɩm kʋntʋ na yɩ te tɩn.

eng: My dear friends, since we have these promises, lets cleanse ourselves from anything that contaminates our body or spirit so that we make our holiness complete in the fear of God.
local: A badon-sonnu-ba, Wɛ na goni DƖ ni dɩm DƖ pa DƖ nɔɔna bam kʋntʋ tɩn, kʋ maama yɩ dɩbam ŋwaanɩ mʋ. Mʋ kʋ kuri, á pa-na dɩ́ lɩ dɩ́ tɩtɩ wo-zɔɔna yalʋ maama dɩ́ na wʋ́ kɩ yɩ ya cɔgɩ dɩ́ yɩra dɩdaanɩ dɩ́ wʋbʋŋa tɩn wʋnɩ. Pa-na dɩ́ taá kwaana dɩ́ jɩgɩ wʋ-poŋo fasɩ, dɩ́ na kwarɩ Wɛ tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: So we are ambassadors who represent Christ. God is negotiating with you through us. We beg you as Christs representatives, Be reconciled to God.
local: Kʋ nan yɩ dɩbam lǝni Zezi Krisi yuu nɩ mʋ sɩ dɩ́ taá brɩ nɔɔna Wɛ cɩga kam kʋntʋ. Kʋ maa nyɩ dɩ Wɛ tɩtɩ mʋ tɔgɩ dɩbam ŋwaanɩ DƖ ŋɔɔna dɩ abam. Dɩ́ nan loori abam Zezi Krisi ŋwaanɩ sɩ á sɛ, sɩ á dɩ Wɛ fɔgɩ daanɩ.

eng: Make room in your hearts for us. We didnt do anything wrong to anyone. We didnt ruin anyone. We didnt take advantage of anyone.
local: Pa-na dɩbam sono taa wʋ á bɩcara nɩ. Dɩbam nan wʋ kɩ abam wʋlʋwʋlʋ wo-balɔrɔ. Dɩ́ wʋ kɩ dɩ́ cɔgɩ nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ yigǝ. Dɩ́ nan wʋ pini abam wʋlʋwʋlʋ woŋo.

eng: God caused the one who didnt know sin to be sin for our sake so that through him we could become the righteousness of God.
local: Zezi Krisi mʋ yɩ wʋlʋ na ba jɩgɩ lwarɩm tɩn. Wɛ nan pɛ dɩbam lwarɩm dɩm tɔgɩ wʋntʋ, sɩ kʋ pa dɩ́ taá jɩgɩ cɩga mʋ Wɛ tee nɩ wʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ.

eng: Im not saying this to make you feel guilty. Ive already said that you are in our hearts so that we die and live together with you.
local: Amʋ wʋ tagɩ kʋntʋ sɩ kʋ yáalɩ abam. Amʋ maŋɩ a ta dɩ abam nɩ, kʋlʋkʋlʋ bá wanɩ kʋ pɔɔrɩ dɩbam dɩ abam sono kʋm daanɩ, kʋ na yɩ ŋwɩa naa tʋʋnɩ dɩ.

eng: I have every confidence in you. Im terribly proud of you. Im filled with encouragement. Im overwhelmed with happiness while in the middle of our problems.
local: Amʋ tiini a jɩgɩ abam cɩga, yɩ a jɩgɩ wʋpolo zanzan abam ŋwaanɩ. Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ, yaara yalʋ maama na jɩgɩ dɩbam tɩn, amʋ ta jɩgɩ baarɩ yɩ a tiini a jɩgɩ wʋpolo.

eng: Even after we arrived in Macedonia, we couldnt rest physically. We were surrounded by problems. There was external conflict, and there were internal fears.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ, dɩbam na ve dɩ́ yi Masɩdʋanɩ tɩn, dɩ́ wʋ nɛ siun dɩ fɩnfɩɩn dɩ. Cana dwi tǝri tǝri tiini ya ja dɩbam. Nɔɔna dɛɛn magɩ kantɔgɔ dɩ dɩbam, yɩ fʋʋnɩ tiini dɩ zʋ dɩbam.

eng: However, God comforts people who are discouraged, and he comforted us by Titus arrival.
local: Wɛ nan yɩ dɩlʋ na zǝni nɔɔna balʋ wʋrʋ na cɔgɩ tɩn, yɩ DƖ pa ba bɩcara pǝni tɩga nɩ. DƖ ma pa dɩbam dɩ bɩcara pǝni tɩga nɩ, dɩ DƖ na pɛ Titi ba dɩbam te tɩn.

eng: We werent comforted only by his arrival but also by the comfort he had received from you. He told us about your desire to see me, how you were sorry, and about your concern for me, so that I was even happier.
local: Kʋlʋ na pɛ dɩbam wʋ poli tɩn mʋ yɩ sɩ o na tu o ta abam na zǝn-o te á pa o bɩcarɩ pǝni tɩga nɩ tɩn, sɩ kʋ daɩ o na tu o wʋ dɩbam tee nɩ tɩn yɩranɩ má ŋwaanɩ. O ma ta o brɩ dɩbam amʋ fra na tiini ya jɩgɩ abam te, dɩ á wʋrʋ na tiini tɩ cɔgɩ dɩ á na kɩ kʋlʋ na wʋ maŋɩ tɩn. O ta ma ta abam na kwaana á zɩgɩ amʋ kwaga nɩ te tɩn. Amʋ na ni abam ŋwa kʋntʋ tɩn, kʋ pɛ amʋ wʋ tiini kʋ poli.

eng: Even though my letter hurt you, I dont regret it. Well—I did regret it just a bit because I see that that letter made you sad, though only for a short time.
local: Amʋ nan ye nɩ, a na pʋpʋnɩ tɔnɔ kʋlʋ a pa abam tɩn mʋ pɛ á jɩgɩ wʋ-cɔgɔ. Amʋ nan ta wʋ joori a za wʋbʋŋa dɩ a na pʋpʋnɩ-kʋ te tɩn. Kʋ-yigǝ nɩ tɩn, amʋ wʋbʋŋa ya waɩ ya zaɩ dɩ a tɔnɔ kʋm na pɛ abam wʋ cɔgɩ tɩn, kʋ nan wʋ tiini kʋ daanɩ.

eng: Now Im glad—not because you were sad but because you were made sad enough to change your hearts and lives. You felt godly sadness so that no one was harmed by us in any way.
local: Amʋ laan nan jɩgɩ wʋpolo. Kʋ daɩ abam wʋ na cɔgɩ tɩn ŋwaanɩ mʋ a jɩgɩ wʋpolo, kʋ yɩ á wʋ-cɔgɔ kʋm na pɛ á lǝni á wʋ te tɩn mʋ. Á wʋ-cɔgɔ kʋm maŋɩ dɩ Wɛ na lagɩ te tɩn mʋ, sɩ dɩbam wʋ kɩ abam wo-lɔŋɔ.

eng: Godly sadness produces a changed heart and life that leads to salvation and leaves no regrets, but sorrow under the influence of the world produces death.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ, nɔɔnʋ na jɩgɩ wʋ-cɔgɔ kʋlʋ na maŋɩ dɩ Wɛ wʋbʋŋa tɩn, kʋʋ́ pa o lǝni o wʋ o daarɩ o na ŋwɩa Wɛ tee nɩ, yɩ kʋntʋ bá wanɩ kʋ pa o ta nɩ, o ya na maanɩ. Kʋ daarɩ, nɔɔnʋ nan na jɩgɩ wʋ-cɔgɔ nɩ balʋ na yǝri Wɛ tɩn te, kʋʋ́ pa wʋntʋ ga o ŋwɩa Wɛ tee nɩ.

eng: Look at what this very experience of godly sadness has produced in you: such enthusiasm, what a desire to clear yourselves of blame, such indignation, what fear, what purpose, such concern, what justice! In everything you have shown yourselves to be innocent in the matter.
local: Á nan maanɩ-na á nii wʋ-cɔgɔ kʋlʋ na yɩ Wɛ wʋbʋŋa tɩn na pɛ á lǝni wǝǝnu tɩlʋ á ŋwɩa wʋnɩ. Kʋ pɛ á laan sɩɩnɩ á yiǝ dɩ Wɛ tɔgɩm, yɩ á kwaanɩ sɩ á brɩ nɩ á wʋ tɔgɩ á kɩ lwarɩm dɩm kʋntʋ. Kʋ ta ma pa banɩ jɩgɩ abam dɩ wo-lɔŋɔ kʋlʋ na kɩ abam tɩtarɩ nɩ tɩn. Fʋʋnɩ ma zʋ abam, yɩ amʋ fra jɩgɩ abam. Á ma tiini á kwaanɩ sɩ á laan tʋŋɩ Wɛ na lagɩ te tɩn, yɩ á vaŋɩ wʋlʋ na kɩ wo-lɔŋɔ kʋm tɩn zwɛ. Abam na kɩ kʋlʋ maama tɩn brɩ nɩ á ba jɩgɩ wo-lɔŋɔ kǝm dɩm kʋntʋ wʋnɩ.

eng: So although I wrote to you, it wasnt for the sake of the one who did wrong, or for the sake of the one who was wronged, but to show you your own enthusiasm for us in the sight of God.
local: Amʋ na pʋpʋnɩ tɔnɔ kʋm a pa abam tɩn, kʋ daɩ wʋlʋ na kɩ o cɔgɩ tɩn ŋwaanɩ, kʋ nan daɩ o na kɩ lwarɩm dɩm dɩ wʋlʋ tɩn dɩ. Amʋ nan lagɩ sɩ a pa abam mʋ lwarɩ jaja Wɛ yigǝ nɩ, nɩ abam kwaanɩ zanzan dɩbam ŋwaanɩ.

eng: Because of this we have been encouraged. And in addition to our own encouragement, we were even more pleased at how happy Titus was. His mind has been put at rest by all of you.
local: Kʋ yɩ kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ dɩ́ bɩcara pǝni tɩga nɩ. Kʋ nan daɩ kʋntʋ yɩranɩ má. Dɩbam ta jɩgɩ wʋpolo kʋ ja gaalɩ, dɩ́ na nɛ sɩ Titi wʋ poli dɩ abam tɩn ŋwaanɩ dɩ abam na pɛ o na baarɩ tɩn.

eng: If Ive bragged about you to him in any way, I havent been embarrassed. Instead, our bragging to Titus has also been proven to be true, just like everything we said to you was true.
local: Amʋ na lagɩ a tʋŋ-o sɩ o ba abam te tɩn, amʋ tee abam fɩnfɩɩn a brɩ-o. Abam nan wʋ pɛ cavɩɩra ja amʋ dɩ a na tee abam te tɩn. Kʋntʋ tɩn, dɩbam na tee abam dɩ́ brɩ Titi te tɩn jɩgɩ cɩga mʋ, nɩ dɩ́ na yǝni dɩ́ tɛ cɩga dɩ abam maŋa maama te tɩn.

eng: His devotion to you is growing even more as he remembers how all of you were obedient when you welcomed him with fear and trembling.
local: O na tu abam te tɩn, á jeer-o lanyɩranɩ dɩ ya-sɩʋ, yɩ á daarɩ á sɛ o ni. Kʋntʋ, o na yǝni o guli abam gulǝ, kʋ paɩ o tiini o jɩgɩ abam sono kʋ ja gaalɩ.

eng: Im happy, because I can completely depend on you.
local: Amʋ tiini a jɩgɩ wʋpolo dɩ abam, a na jɩgɩ abam cɩga woŋo maama wʋnɩ tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we want to let you know about the grace of God that was given to the churches of Macedonia.
local: A ko-biǝ-ba, dɩ́ lagɩ sɩ dɩ́ pa abam lwarɩ Wɛ na kɩ Zezi nɔɔna balʋ na wʋ Masɩdʋanɩ tɩɩnɩ dɩm nɩ tɩn yu-yoŋo te tɩn mʋ.

eng: While they were being tested by many problems, their extra amount of happiness and their extreme poverty resulted in a surplus of rich generosity.
local: Ba nɛ maŋɩm zanzan dɩ yaara yalʋ na yi-ba tɩn, yɩ ba nan ta jɩgɩ wʋpolo kʋ ja gaalɩ. Dɩ yinigǝ na tiini ka jɩgɩ-ba tɩn dɩ, ba daa ta zǝni nɔɔna lanyɩranɩ dɩ wʋ-yoŋo.

eng: I assure you that they gave what they could afford and even more than they could afford, and they did it voluntarily.
local: Kʋ yɩ cɩga mʋ, ba wǝli nɔɔna kʋ maŋɩ dɩ ba tɩtɩ na jɩgɩ te tɩn, yɩ ba ta yǝni ba paɩ kʋ dwǝni ba tɩtɩ na wʋ́ daarɩ kʋlʋ tɩn.

eng: They urgently begged us for the privilege of sharing in this service for the saints.
local: Ba tɩtɩ nan mʋ mɛ ba wʋbʋŋa ba loori dɩbam sɩ dɩ́ pa-ba cwǝŋǝ, sɩ ba taa tɔgɩ ba wǝli Wɛ nɔɔna balʋ yinigǝ na jɩgɩ-ba Zeruzalɛm nɩ tɩn.

eng: They even exceeded our expectations, because they gave themselves to the Lord first and to us, consistent with Gods will.
local: Ba na pɛ te tɩn tiini kʋ dwe dɩbam ya na tɩɩnɩ nɩ baá pa te tɩn. Ba nan maŋɩ ba da yigǝ ba kɩ ba tɩtɩ dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm jɩŋa nɩ mʋ, yɩ ba daarɩ ba kɩ ba tɩtɩ dɩbam dɩ jɩŋa nɩ, sɩ kʋ maŋɩ dɩ Wɛ wʋbʋŋa na lagɩ te tɩn.

eng: As a result, we challenged Titus to finish this work of grace with you the way he had started it.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ dɩ́ loori Titi wʋlʋ na maŋɩ o puli o joŋi abam sǝbu-lɩʋ kʋm tɩn, sɩ o joori o ba abam te o wǝli abam sɩ á tʋŋɩ tɩtʋŋɩ dɩm kʋntʋ á ti.

eng: Be the best in this work of grace in the same way that you are the best in everything, such as faith, speech, knowledge, total commitment, and the love we inspired in you.
local: Abam na tɔgɩ Wɛ cwǝŋǝ te tɩn maŋɩ kʋ lana kʋ ja gaalɩ, dɩ á na jɩgɩ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ yɩ á tɔɔlɩ DƖ kwǝrǝ kam lanyɩranɩ yɩ á jɩgɩ yǝno te tɩn. Á ta kwǝri á kwaanɩ dɩ Wɛ tɩtʋŋa yam, yɩ á tiini á soe dɩbam. Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ kwaanɩ-na sɩ á taá pa á wʋrʋ ywǝmmǝ dɩ tɩtʋŋɩ dɩm kʋntʋ.

eng: Im not giving an order, but by mentioning the commitment of others, Im trying to prove the authenticity of your love also.
local: Amʋ nan ba lagɩ sɩ a fɩn abam dɩ á na wʋ́ la sǝbu kʋm te tɩn. Amʋ nan pɛ abam mʋ lwarɩ nɔɔna badaara na tiini ba kwaanɩ ba wǝli ba donnǝ te tɩn. Kʋntʋ mʋ abam wʋ́ wanɩ á brɩ nɩ á sɩɩnɩ á soe á donnǝ.

eng: You know the grace of our Lord Jesus Christ. Although he was rich, he became poor for your sakes, so that you could become rich through his poverty.
local: Abam maŋɩ á ye yu-yoŋo kʋlʋ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi Krisi na pɛ o nɔɔna bam tɩn. Wʋntʋ mʋ sɛ o yagɩ o na maŋɩ o jɩgɩ jɩjɩgɩrʋ tɩlʋ maama tɩn, yɩ o daarɩ o ji yinigǝ tu abam ŋwaanɩ, sɩ kʋ wanɩ kʋ pa abam ji jɩjɩgɩrʋ tiinǝ Wɛ tee nɩ o yinigǝ kam ŋwaanɩ.

eng: Im giving you my opinion about this. Its to your advantage to do this, since you not only started to do it last year but you wanted to do it too.
local: Amʋ nan na bʋŋɩ te tɩn, kʋʋ́ ta lana sɩ á kwaanɩ á ti tɩtʋŋɩ dɩlʋ abam na maŋɩ á puli tɩn. Bɩm dɩlʋ na kɛ tɩn, abam mʋ yɩ balʋ na dɛ yigǝ á la sǝbu, yɩ abam daa ta mʋ dɛ yigǝ á jɩgɩ kʋ wʋbʋŋa.

eng: Now finish the job as well so that you finish it with as much enthusiasm as you started, given what you can afford.
local: Nan tʋŋɩ-na tɩtʋŋɩ dɩm kʋntʋ á vu á ti dɩ wʋbʋŋ-ŋʋna, nɩ á na maŋɩ á lɩ wʋbʋŋa te tɩn, sɩ á taá paɩ kʋ maŋɩ dɩ á na jɩgɩ te tɩn.

eng: A gift is appreciated because of what a person can afford, not because of what that person cant afford, if its apparent that its done willingly.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ, abam na lɩ wʋbʋŋa sɩ á wǝli nɔɔna tɩn, kʋ ba cɔga dɩ woŋo kʋm na maɩ te tɩn maama. Á nan maŋɩ sɩ á wǝli nɔɔna kʋ maŋɩ dɩ kʋlʋ á na jɩgɩ tɩn mʋ, sɩ kʋ daɩ nɩ kʋ gaalɩ te á na jɩgɩ tɩn. Zǝnǝ yam kʋntʋ doŋ lana Wɛ tee nɩ.

eng: It isnt that we want others to have financial ease and you financial difficulties, but its a matter of equality.
local: Kʋ nan daɩ nɩ amʋ lagɩ sɩ a pa abam taá wǝli nɔɔna sɩ bantʋ sin, sɩ abam tɩtɩ daarɩ á ji yinigǝ tiinǝ mʋ. Kʋ yɩ sɩ á taá tǝli daanɩ mʋ.

eng: At the present moment, your surplus can fill their deficit so that in the future their surplus can fill your deficit. In this way there is equality.
local: Lele kʋntʋ abam jɩŋa gara, yɩ á wʋ́ wanɩ á wǝli balʋ yinigǝ na jɩgɩ-ba tɩn. Kʋ daarɩ, yinigǝ na tu ka ja abam dɩ, bantʋ dɩ daa wʋ́ wanɩ ba wǝli abam dɩ ba na jɩgɩ kʋlʋ tɩn. Kʋntʋ mʋ á maama wʋ́ ta tǝli daanɩ.

eng: As it is written, The one who gathered more didnt have too much, and the one who gathered less didnt have too little. .
local: Kʋ nyɩ dɩ kʋ na pʋpʋnɩ Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm wʋnɩ kʋ wɩ: «Nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ na nɛ wʋdiu zanzan tɩn daa wʋ daarɩ kʋlʋkʋlʋ. Wʋlʋ nan na nɛ fɩnfɩɩn tɩn nyɩm daa wʋ mur-o.».

eng: But thank God, who put the same commitment that I have for you in Titus heart.
local: Dɩ́ nan kɩ Wɛ le dɩ DƖ na pɛ Titi wʋbʋŋa sɩ o kwaanɩ o wǝli abam, nɩnɛɛnɩ dɩbam na lagɩ sɩ dɩ́ wǝli abam te tɩn.

eng: Not only has he accepted our challenge but hes on his way to see you voluntarily, and hes excited.
