local: O ma sɛ dɩbam na loor-o sɩ o kɩ kʋlʋ abam wǝlim ŋwaanɩ tɩn. Wʋntʋ tɩtɩ nan maŋɩ o lɩ wʋbʋŋa sɩ o ba abam te, bɛŋwaanɩ o tiini o lagɩ sɩ o wǝli abam.

eng: We are sending the brother who is famous in all the churches because of his work for the gospel along with him.
local: Dɩ́ nan lagɩ sɩ dɩ́ pa dɩ́ ko-bu wʋdoŋ mʋ tɔgɩ dɩ wʋntʋ o ba. O maa yɩ wʋlʋ Zezi nɔɔna bam maama na nɩg-o dɩ o na brɩ Wɛ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam te tɩn.

eng: In addition to this, he is chosen by the churches to be our traveling companion in this work of grace, which we are taking care of for the sake of the glory of the Lord himself, and to show our desire to help.
local: Ba ta ma kwǝri ba lɩ-o sɩ o taa tɔgɩ dɩ dɩbam o jaanɩ sǝbu kʋlʋ dɩ́ na ma dɩ́ zǝni yinigǝ tiinǝ tɩn o ve Zeruzalɛm. Dɩ́ na wǝli nɔɔna bam kʋntʋ tɩn, kʋ yɩ sɩ dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm mʋ na zulǝ, yɩ kʋ brɩ nɩ dɩ́ lagɩ sɩ dɩ́ taá wǝli nɔɔna.

eng: We are trying to avoid being blamed by anyone for the way we take care of this large amount of money.
local: Dɩ́ nan kwaanɩ dɩ́ yɩrɩ dɩ́ tɩtɩ mʋ, sɩ nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ yɩ na cwǝŋǝ o yáalɩ dɩbam, dɩ dɩ́ na laɩ sǝbu-fɔrɔ kʋm yɩ dɩ́ cɛ-kʋ dɩ́ ma tʋŋɩ te tɩn baŋa nɩ.

eng: We care about doing the right thing, not only in the Lords eyes but also in the eyes of other people.
local: Dɩ́ nan kwaanɩ sɩ dɩ́ kɩ kʋlʋ na lana dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm yigǝ nɩ dɩ nabiinǝ dɩ yigǝ nɩ tɩn mʋ.

eng: We are sending our brother with them. We have tested his commitment in many ways and many times. Now hes even more committed, because he has so much confidence in you.
local: Kʋntʋ mʋ dɩ́ daa ta lagɩ sɩ dɩ́ tʋŋɩ dɩ́ ko-bu wʋdoŋ sɩ o tɔgɩ dɩ bantʋ o ba á te. Wǝǝnu zanzan wʋnɩ mʋ dɩ́ maas-o, yɩ dɩ́ lwarɩ nɩ o kwaana dɩ Wɛ tɩtʋŋa yam. O jɩgɩ abam cɩga lanyɩranɩ, yɩ kʋ pa o tiini o bʋŋɩ sɩ o wǝli abam.

eng: If there is any question about Titus, he is my partner and coworker among you. If there is any question about our brothers, they are the churches apostles and an honor to Christ.
local: Kʋ na yɩ Titi, dɩbam mʋ tɔgɩ daanɩ dɩ́ tʋŋɩ abam ŋwaanɩ. Kʋ daarɩ kʋ na yɩ badaara bam, kʋ yɩ Zezi nɔɔna bam mʋ lɩ-ba sɩ ba taa tʋŋa, sɩ kʋ pa Zezi Krisi na zulǝ.

eng: So show them the proof of your love and the reason we are so proud of you, in such a way that the churches can see it.
local: Kʋntʋ, kwaanɩ-na sɩ kʋ pa ba lwarɩ nɩ á soe á donnǝ, sɩ Zezi nɔɔna bam lwarɩ kʋ ni nɩ. Kʋntʋ, ba laan wʋ́ lwarɩ nɩ, dɩ́ na jɩgɩ wʋpolo dɩ abam te tɩn sɩɩnɩ kʋ yɩ cɩga mʋ.

eng: Its unnecessary for me to write to you about this service for Gods people.
local: Kʋ na yɩ dɩ zǝnǝ yalʋ abam na wʋ́ tʋŋɩ á pa Wɛ nɔɔna balʋ yinigǝ na jɩgɩ-ba tɩn, amʋ daa wʋ maŋɩ sɩ a pʋpʋnɩ kʋlʋkʋlʋ a ma wǝli da a brɩ abam.

eng: I know about your willingness to help. I brag about you to the Macedonians, saying, Greece has been ready since last year, and your enthusiasm has motivated most of them.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ a maŋɩ a ye nɩ abam jɩgɩ wʋbʋŋa sɩ á wǝli-ba, yɩ a tee abam Masɩdʋanɩ tiinǝ bam yigǝ nɩ. A brɩ-ba nɩ, abam balʋ na zʋʋrɩ Akayi tɩɩnɩ dɩm nɩ tɩn maŋɩ á ti á yigǝ sɩ á la sǝbu kʋm, kʋ zɩgɩ deen bɩm dɩm nɩ mʋ. Masɩdʋanɩ tiinǝ bam na lwarɩ abam na tiini á kwaanɩ sɩ á wǝli nɔɔna te tɩn, kʋ ma pa sɩ ba zanzan wʋbʋŋa tɔgɩ kǝm dɩm kʋntʋ doŋ.

eng: But Im sending the brothers so that our bragging about you in this case wont be empty words, and so that you can be prepared, just as I keep telling them you will be.
local: Amʋ nan bʋŋɩ sɩ a pa dɩ́ ko-biǝ bam ba abam te, sɩ kʋ pa dɩbam na tee abam te tɩn yɩ ba kʋ ji kafɛ. Kʋntʋ mʋ wʋ́ pa á wanɩ á ti á yigǝ nɩnɛɛnɩ amʋ na maŋɩ a ta kʋlʋ a brɩ-ba tɩn.

eng: If some Macedonians should come with me and find out that you arent ready, we would be embarrassed as far as this project goes.
local: Kʋ na daɩ kʋntʋ, Masɩdʋanɩ tiinǝ bam na tɔgɩ dɩ amʋ ba ba abam te yɩ ba lwarɩ nɩ á ta wʋ ti á yigǝ, kʋʋ́ pa cavɩɩra ja dɩbam dɩ dɩ́ na wɩ dɩ́ jɩgɩ á cɩga te tɩn. Kʋ ma wʋ́ pa cavɩɩra ja abam dɩ.

eng: This is why I thought it was necessary to encourage the brothers to go to you ahead of time and arrange in advance the generous gift you have already promised. I want it to be a real gift from you. I dont want you to feel like you are being forced to give anything.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ amʋ bʋŋɩ nɩ kʋ maŋɩ sɩ a loori dɩ́ ko-biǝ bam, sɩ ba da yigǝ ba wuuri ba ba abam te. Kʋntʋ wʋ́ pa á wanɩ á la pɛɛra yam á ti, nɩnɛɛnɩ á na maŋɩ á ta nɩ á wʋ́ kɩ te tɩn, sɩ dɩ́ laan ba dɩ́ joŋi. Amʋ lagɩ sɩ á ma á wʋ-yoŋo mʋ á pa sǝbu kʋm, sɩ á yɩ ta kɔrɔ ŋwaanɩ.

eng: What I mean is this: the one who sows a small number of seeds will also reap a small crop, and the one who sows a generous amount of seeds will also reap a generous crop.
local: Kʋ nyɩ dɩ nɔɔnʋ na dugi wǝǝnu fɩnfɩɩn te tɩn mʋ, kʋntʋ tu wʋ́ ba o na fɩnfɩɩn mʋ. Kʋ daarɩ wʋlʋ na dugi zanzan tɩn, kʋntʋ tu wʋ́ ba o na zanzan mʋ.

eng: Everyone should give whatever they have decided in their heart. They shouldnt give with hesitation or because of pressure. God loves a cheerful giver.
local: Nɔɔnʋ maama nan maŋɩ sɩ o pa sɩ kʋ maŋɩ dɩ o na lɩ o wʋbʋŋa te tɩn mʋ, sɩ kʋ daɩ dɩ wʋ-cɔgɔ naa nɔɔnʋ na fɩ-o tɩn ŋwaanɩ. Wʋlʋ na paɩ dɩ wʋpolo tɩn, Wɛ soe kʋntʋ tu mʋ.

eng: God has the power to provide you with more than enough of every kind of grace. That way, you will have everything you need always and in everything to provide more than enough for every kind of good work.
local: Wɛ nan jɩgɩ dam sɩ DƖ pa abam DƖ zaanɩ dɩm maama, sɩ kʋ pa á taá jɩgɩ kʋlʋ maama á na lagɩ tɩn maŋa maama, yɩ á daa ta wʋ́ ta jɩgɩ kʋ gaalɩ sɩ á taá ma kɩ wo-laarʋ dwi maama.

eng: As it is written, He scattered everywhere; he gave to the needy; his righteousness remains forever. .
local: nɩ Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm na tagɩ kʋ wɩ: «Nɔn-ŋʋm pɔɔrɩ o wǝǝnu mʋ o paɩ yinigǝ tiinǝ, yɩ o kǝm-laarʋ tɩm wʋ́ ta wʋra mɩmaŋa maama.».

eng: The one who supplies seed for planting and bread for eating will supply and multiply your seed and will increase your crop, which is righteousness.
local: Kʋ yɩ Wɛ mʋ paɩ nɔɔna wo-dwǝ yɩ ba duǝ, yɩ DƖ daarɩ DƖ pa-ba wʋdiu yɩ ba di. DƖ nan daa ta wʋ́ zǝni abam sɩ á wanɩ á wǝli nɔɔna dɩ kǝm-laarʋ zanzan, nɩ á na du wǝǝnu zanzan te tɩn. Kʋntʋ mʋ á kǝm-laarʋ tɩm laan wʋ́ ba tɩ kɩ dagɩm, nɩ faa na dagɩ te tɩn.

eng: You will be made rich in every way so that you can be generous in every way. Such generosity produces thanksgiving to God through us.
local: Wɛ wʋ́ pa á taá jɩgɩ wo-laarʋ dwi maama, sɩ á wanɩ á taá wǝli nɔɔna lanyɩranɩ. Kʋntʋ mʋ wʋ́ pa nɔɔna zanzan taa kɩ Wɛ le, ba na joŋi abam zǝnǝ yam dɩbam tee nɩ tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: Your ministry of this service to Gods people isnt only fully meeting their needs but it is also multiplying in many expressions of thanksgiving to God.
local: Abam na jɩgɩ Wɛ nɔɔna bam á wǝli te tɩn mʋ paɩ ba naɩ kʋlʋ ba ya na gɛ tɩn. Kʋ nan daɩ kʋntʋ yɩranɩ, kʋ ta wʋ́ pa nɔɔna zanzan tiini ba taa kɩ Wɛ le kʋ ja gaalɩ.

eng: They will give honor to God for your obedience to your confession of Christs gospel. They will do this because this service provides evidence of your obedience, and because of your generosity in sharing with them and with everyone.
local: Abam zǝnǝ yam kʋntʋ mʋ wʋ́ brɩ nɩ á tɔgɩ Wɛ cɩga cɩga, yɩ kʋ pa DƖ na zulǝ zanzan, dɩ nɔɔna bam na lwarɩ nɩ á sɩɩnɩ á sɛ Zezi Krisi kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam nɩ á na maŋɩ á ta te tɩn. Wɛ ta wʋ́ na zulǝ nɔɔna tee nɩ, dɩ á na lɩ á wǝǝnu á ma zǝni-ba, yɩ á daarɩ á pa nɔɔna badonnǝ dɩ te tɩn.

eng: They will also pray for you, and they will care deeply for you because of the outstanding grace that God has given to you.
local: Ba ma wʋ́ ta loori Wɛ abam ŋwaanɩ, yɩ baá ta soe abam dɩ ba wʋ maama, dɩ Wɛ na tiini DƖ kɩ abam yu-yoŋo kʋ ja gaalɩ tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: Thank God for his gift that words cant describe!.
local: Pa-na dɩ́ kɩ Wɛ le DƖ na wǝli dɩbam maama dɩ DƖ pɛɛrɩ dɩlʋ na ba jɩgɩ doŋ tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: I, Paul, make a personal request to you with the gentleness and kindness of Christ. Im shy when Im with you, but Im bossy when Im away from you!.
local: Amʋ Pooli mʋ loori abam sɩ á cǝgi. Abam badonnǝ tɛ á wɩ, amʋ na wʋ abam tee nɩ, a yǝni a yɩ wʋlʋ na zurǝ dɩ abam tɩn mʋ. Kʋ daarɩ, amʋ na tǝri abam tee nɩ, a yǝni a cana mʋ dɩ abam. Kʋ nan yɩ Zezi Krisi wʋlʋ na nɩgɩ nɔɔna yɩ o jɩgɩ ba ŋwaŋa tɩn ŋwaanɩ mʋ a loori abam sɩ á lǝni, sɩ a na tu abam te, sɩ a daa yɩ kɩ kǝm-cɛɛrɩ dɩ abam. Kʋ nan na yɩ balʋ na bʋŋɩ nɩ dɩ́ tɩtʋŋa tɔgɩ nabiinǝ wʋbʋŋa na yɩ te tɩn, a ye lanyɩranɩ nɩ amʋ wʋ́ ta jɩgɩ baarɩ sɩ a wanɩ a bwɛ-ba.

eng: Although we live in the world, we dont fight our battles with human methods.
local: Kʋ yɩ cɩga, dɩ́ sɩɩnɩ dɩ́ yɩ nabiinǝ mʋ, kʋ nan daɩ nabiinǝ wʋbʋŋa mʋ dɩ́ ma dɩ́ jaŋɩ sɩ dɩ́ vɩn kʋlʋ maama na yɩ balɔrɔ tɩn.

eng: Our weapons that we fight with arent human, but instead they are powered by God for the destruction of fortresses. They destroy arguments.
local: Kʋntʋ maa nyɩ dɩ dɩ́ lagɩ dɩ́ kɩ jara mʋ te, kʋ nan daɩ nabiinǝ jara zɩla mʋ dɩ́ jɩga. Kʋ yɩ Wɛ dam mʋ dɩ́ jɩga, yɩ dɩ́ maa cɔgɩ Wɛ dʋna bam dam. Dɩ́ cɔgɩ wʋbʋŋa yalʋ na paɩ ya jɩgɩ swan yɩ ya yagɩ ya yɩ vwan tɩn.

eng: and every defense that is raised up to oppose the knowledge of God. They capture every thought to make it obedient to Christ.
local: yɩ dɩ́ yáalɩ zaasɩm dɩlʋ maama na zaŋɩ sɩ dɩ cɩ nabiinǝ Wɛ cɩga kam wʋnɩ tɩn. Dɩ́ maa wanɩ wʋbʋŋa yam kʋntʋ maama dam, yɩ dɩ́ paɩ ya lǝni ya sɛ Zezi Krisi ni.

eng: Once your obedience is complete, we are ready to punish any disobedience.
local: Kʋntʋ, abam na sɛ Zezi Krisi ni dɩm á ti, dɩbam laan wʋ́ wanɩ dɩ́ vaŋɩ balʋ maama na wʋ abam tɩtarɩ nɩ yɩ ba ba sɛ tɩn zwa.

eng: Look at what is right in front of you! If anyone is sure about belonging to Christ, that person should think again. We belong to Christ just like that person.
local: Maanɩ-na á nii kʋ na yɩ te tɩn. Abam wʋlʋ na jɩgɩ cɩga nɩ o yɩ Zezi Krisi nɔɔnʋ, kʋntʋ tu maŋɩ sɩ o lwarɩ nɩ dɩbam dɩ yɩ Zezi nɔɔna mʋ nɩ wʋntʋ te.

eng: Even if I went on to brag about our authority, I wouldnt be ashamed of it. The Lord gave us that authority to build you up and not to destroy you.
local: Kʋ nan na yɩ amʋ na tiini a brɩ abam a tɩtɩ dɩ Wɛ na pɛ dɩbam ni dɩlʋ tɩn ŋwaanɩ, amʋ ba kwarɩ cavɩɩra dɩ kʋntʋ. Dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm pɛ dɩbam ni dɩm kʋntʋ, sɩ dɩ́ taá ma dɩ́ kwɛ abam mʋ, sɩ kʋ daɩ sɩ dɩ́ ma cɔgɩ abam.

eng: I dont want it to seem like Im trying to intimidate you with my letters.
local: Amʋ ba lagɩ sɩ abam bʋŋɩ nɩ a pʋpʋnɩ a twaanʋ tɩm sɩ a ma fugi abam mʋ.

eng: I know what some people are saying: His letters are severe and powerful, but in person he is weak and his speech is worth nothing.
local: Abam badaara tɛ nɩ, wǝǝnu tɩlʋ amʋ na pʋpʋnɩ a twaanʋ tɩm wʋnɩ tɩn mʋ cana, yɩ tɩ ta kwǝri tɩ dana. Kʋ daarɩ, amʋ tɩtɩ na wʋ á tee nɩ, a yɩ zurim yɩranɩ mʋ, yɩ a ni-taanɩ ba kɩ kʋlʋkʋlʋ.

eng: These people need to think about this—that when we are with you, our actions will show that we are the same as the words we wrote when we were away from you.
local: Balʋ na yǝni ba tɛ kʋntʋ doŋ tɩn maŋɩ sɩ ba lwarɩ nɩ, dɩ́ na tǝri abam tee nɩ yɩ dɩ́ pʋpʋnɩ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ maama tɩn yɩ bɩdwɩ mʋ dɩ dɩ́ na wʋ abam tee nɩ yɩ dɩ́ kɩ te tɩn.

eng: We wont dare to place ourselves in the same league or to compare ourselves with some of those who are promoting themselves. When they measure themselves by themselves, and compare themselves with themselves, they have no understanding.
local: Kʋ na yɩ balʋ na brɩ ba tɩtɩ tɩn, dɩbam ba lagɩ sɩ dɩ́ nyiŋi dɩ́ tɩtɩ dɩ bantʋ dɩ́ nii, naa dɩ́ ta nɩ dɩbam dɩ bantʋ maɩ daanɩ. Bantʋ ba jɩgɩ swan. Ba yǝni ba maɩ ba tɩtɩ wʋbʋŋa mʋ ba maa maŋɩ daanɩ ba nii ba na yɩ te tɩn.

eng: We wont take pride in anything more than what is appropriate. Lets look at the boundaries of our work area that God has assigned to us. Its an area that includes you.
local: Kʋ nan na yɩ dɩbam, dɩ́ ba lagɩ sɩ dɩ́ tee dɩ́ tɩtɩ sɩ kʋ gaalɩ Wɛ na pɛ dɩbam tɩtʋŋɩ dɩlʋ sɩ dɩ́ taá tʋŋɩ tɩn. Kʋ yɩ Wɛ mʋ pɛ dɩbam tɩtʋŋɩ dɩm kʋntʋ sɩ dɩ́ tʋŋɩ abam tɩtarɩ nɩ, yɩ dɩbam maŋɩ sɩ dɩ́ kɩ wʋpolo dɩ kʋntʋ mʋ.

eng: We arent going out of bounds, as if our work area doesnt extend as far as you. We were the first ones to travel as far as Corinth with the gospel of Christ.
local: Kʋntʋ, dɩbam wʋ gaalɩ sisǝm dɩlʋ Wɛ na pɛ dɩbam tɩn, dɩ dɩ́ na tu abam te dɩ́ tɔɔlɩ Zezi Krisi kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam tɩn.

eng: We dont take pride in what other people do outside of our boundaries. We hope that our work will be extended even more by you as your faith grows, until it expands fully .
local: Dɩbam ba tee dɩ́ tɩtɩ nɔɔna badonnǝ tɩtʋŋa baŋa nɩ, sɩ dɩ́ gaalɩ sisǝm dɩlʋ Wɛ na pɛ dɩbam tɩn. Dɩ́ nan jɩgɩ tɩɩna nɩ á na jɩgɩ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ te tɩn wʋ́ fɔgɩ kʋ kɩ dam, sɩ kʋ pa tɩtʋŋa yalʋ dɩ́ na tʋŋɩ abam ŋwaanɩ tɩn wanɩ ya puli zanzan, sɩ kʋ maŋɩ dɩ tɩtʋŋa yalʋ Wɛ na pɛ dɩbam tɩn.

eng: We hope that our work grows even to the point of the gospel being preached in places beyond Corinth, without bragging about what has already been done in another persons work area.
local: Kʋ daa ta wʋ́ pa dɩ́ na cwǝŋǝ dɩ́ tɔɔlɩ Wɛ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam dɩ́ gaalɩ abam na zʋʋrɩ je sɩlʋ nɩ tɩn. Kʋntʋ mʋ dɩ́ ba tee dɩ́ tɩtɩ dɩ Wɛ tɩtʋŋa yalʋ DƖ tɩntʋŋna badonnǝ na maŋɩ ba tʋŋɩ tɩn.

eng: But, the one who brags should brag in the Lord. .
local: Kʋ nan pʋpʋnɩ Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm wʋnɩ kʋ wɩ: «Wʋlʋ na lagɩ sɩ o kɩ wʋpolo tɩn, sɩ o pa kʋ taa yɩ dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm ŋwaanɩ.».

eng: It isnt the person who promotes himself or herself who is approved but the person whom the Lord commends.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ, kʋ daɩ nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ na paɩ o tɩtɩ cɩga tɩn sɩɩnɩ o jɩgɩ cɩga mʋ, kʋ nan yɩ wʋlʋ dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm na brɩ nɩ o yɩ cɩga tu tɩn mʋ.

eng: I hope that you will put up with me while I act like a fool. Well, in fact, you are putting up with me!.
local: Abam nan kwaanɩ sɩ á ja á bɩcara dɩ amʋ na lagɩ a ta jwǝrim dɩlʋ fɩnfɩɩn tɩn. Á nan ja á bɩcara dɩ amʋ!.

eng: Im deeply concerned about you with the same concern that God has. As your father, I promised you in marriage to one husband. I promised to present you as an innocent virgin to Christ himself.
local: Amʋ ba sɛ abam ŋwaanɩ, nɩ Wɛ dɩ na ba sɛ DƖ nɔɔna ŋwaanɩ te tɩn. Amʋ lagɩ sɩ a kɩ abam Zezi Krisi jɩŋa nɩ mʋ, sɩ kʋlʋkʋlʋ yɩ cɔgɩ abam. Kʋ maa nyɩ dɩ abam yɩ nɩ bukɔ wʋlʋ na wʋ cɔgɩ tɩn mʋ amʋ na goni ni sɩ a kwe a pa nɔɔnʋ dɩdʋa, yɩ nɔɔnʋ wʋm kʋntʋ mʋ yɩ Zezi Krisi.

eng: But Im afraid that your minds might be seduced in the same way as the snake deceived Eve with his devious tricks. You might be unable to focus completely on a genuine and innocent commitment to Christ.
local: Amʋ nan jɩgɩ liǝ mʋ dɩ abam nɩ nɔɔna badaara wʋ́ sʋgɩ abam sɩ á daa yɩ sɛ Zezi Krisi dɩ á bɩcara maama, nɩnɛɛnɩ sʋtaanɩ dɛɛn na jigi bɩsankwɩa dɩ kɩ swan dɩ ganɩ Awa te tɩn.

eng: If a person comes and preaches some other Jesus than the one we preached, or if you receive a different Spirit than the one you had received, or a different gospel than the one you embraced, you put up with it so easily!.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ, nɔɔnʋ wʋdoŋ na tu abam te yɩ o brɩ abam wǝǝnu Zezi yɩrɩ ŋwaanɩ yɩ tɩ ba tɔgɩ dɩbam zaasɩm dɩm, á yǝni á sɛ mʋ mwalɩ mwalɩ. Á maa yǝni á sɛ joro kʋlʋ na daɩ Wɛ Joro kʋm á na maŋɩ á joŋi tɩn, yɩ á daa ta sɛ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kadoŋ, ka na daɩ Zezi kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kalʋ dɩbam na brɩ abam tɩn.

eng: I dont consider myself as second-rate in any way compared to the super-apostles.
local: Kʋ na yɩ balʋ na paɩ ba yɩ Zezi tɩntʋŋna yɩ ba pa ba dwe maama tɩn, amʋ ye sɩ a wʋ muri ba yigǝ nɩ dɩ fɩnfɩɩn dɩ.

eng: But even if Im uneducated in public speaking, Im not uneducated in knowledge. We have shown this to you in every way and in everything we have done.
local: Amʋ na maŋɩ a warɩ a ŋɔɔnɩ nɩ bantʋ te, a swan vɩɩrɩ a ye kʋlʋ a na ŋɔɔnɩ tɩn, yɩ maŋa maama dɩ́ maa yǝni dɩ́ pa á lwarɩ nɩ dɩ́ jɩgɩ swan woŋo maama wʋnɩ jaja.

eng: Did I commit a sin by humbling myself to give you an advantage because I preached the gospel of God to you free of charge?.
local: Amʋ na tu abam te a brɩ Wɛ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam tɩn, kʋ yɩ zaanɩ mʋ a tʋŋɩ a pa abam. Amʋ tu a tɩtɩ sɩ kʋ pa abam mʋ na yɩrɩ. Á bʋŋɩ nɩ a kɩ a tusi mʋ na?.

eng: I robbed other churches by taking a salary from them in order to serve you!.
local: Amʋ dɛɛn na wʋ abam tee nɩ a tʋŋɩ kʋntʋ tɩn, a joŋi a ŋwɩɩrʋ je-gɛ mʋ Zezi nɔɔna bam tee nɩ, nɩnɛɛnɩ a vrɩ bantʋ mʋ sɩ a ma tʋŋɩ a pa abam te.

eng: While I was with you, I didnt burden any of you even though I needed things. The believers who came from Macedonia gave me everything I needed. I kept myself from being a financial drain on you in any way, and I will continue to keep myself from being a burden.
local: Amʋ na yǝni a ga woŋo maŋa kam a na wʋ á tee nɩ tɩn, a ba yaarɩ abam wʋlʋwʋlʋ. Kʋ nan yɩ dɩ́ ko-biǝ balʋ na nuŋi Masɩdʋanɩ ba ba tɩn mʋ jaanɩ kʋlʋ maama a na lagɩ tɩn ba ba ba pa-nɩ. Amʋ dɛɛn na maŋɩ a ba yaarɩ abam tɩn, a daa ta bá yaarɩ abam.

eng: Since Christs truth is in me, I wont stop telling the entire area of Greece that Im proud of what I did.
local: Amʋ na jɩgɩ Zezi Krisi cɩga kam te tɩn, a na beeri a vu je dɩ je Akayi nɩ, nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ bá wanɩ o cɩ amʋ yigǝ dɩ wʋpolo kʋlʋ a na jɩgɩ a ma tɔɔlɩ Wɛ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam zaanɩ tɩn.

eng: Why? Is it because I dont love you? God knows that I do!.
local: Amʋ nan na kɩ kʋntʋ tɩn, kʋ brɩ nɩ a ba soe abam mʋ na? Wɛ nan ye nɩ amʋ soe abam.

eng: But Im going to continue to do what Im doing. I want to contradict the claims of the people who want to be treated like they are the same as us because of what they brag about.
local: Amʋ nan ta wʋ́ ta tʋŋɩ zaanɩ nɩ a na maŋɩ a kɩ te tɩn, sɩ kʋ pa balʋ na lagɩ sɩ ba brɩ ba tɩtɩ nɩ ba tʋŋɩ nɩ dɩbam te tɩn daa yɩ na cwǝŋǝ ba brɩ ba tɩtɩ kʋntʋ.

eng: Such people are false apostles and dishonest workers who disguise themselves as apostles of Christ.
local: Bantʋ na kɩ te tɩn, kʋ yɩ ba ganɩ nɔɔna mʋ. Ba maa paɩ ba yɩ Zezi Krisi tɩntʋŋna mʋ, yɩ kʋ nan yɩ vwan mʋ.

eng: And no wonder! Even Satan disguises himself as an angel of light.
local: Kʋntʋ nan daɩ wo-kɩnkagɩlɩ. Sʋtaanɩ tɩtɩ waɩ dɩ lǝni dɩ brɩ nɩ dɩ yɩ malɛka kalʋ na jɩgɩ Wɛ pooni tɩn mʋ.

eng: It is no great surprise then that his servants also disguise themselves as servants of righteousness. Their end will be what their actions deserve.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ kʋ ba cana sɩ sʋtaanɩ tɩntʋŋna dɩ lǝni ba brɩ ba tɩtɩ nɩ ba yɩ tɩntʋŋna balʋ na tɔgɩ Wɛ cɩga kam tɩn. Kʋ kweelim je nɩ mʋ bantʋ nan wʋ́ ba na cam sɩ kʋ maŋɩ dɩ ba tɩtʋŋa na yɩ te tɩn.

eng: I repeat, no one should take me for a fool. But if you do, then allow me to be a fool so that I can brag like a fool for a bit.
local: Amʋ daa ta joori a loori abam sɩ á yɩ bʋŋɩ nɩ amʋ yɩ joro mʋ. Abam nan na maŋɩ á bʋŋɩ nɩ a yɩ kʋntʋ mʋ, sɩ á kwaanɩ á ja á bɩcara, sɩ a wanɩ a na cwǝŋǝ a brɩ a tɩtɩ fɩnfɩɩn nɩ bantʋ te.

eng: Im not saying what Im saying because the Lord tells me to. Im saying it like Im a fool. Im putting my confidence in this business of bragging.
local: Amʋ na lagɩ a ŋɔɔnɩ te a ma brɩ a tɩtɩ dagɩm tɩn, kʋ ba tɔgɩ dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm wʋbʋŋa, kʋ nyɩ dɩ jwǝrim mʋ te.

eng: Since so many people are bragging based on human standards, that is how Im going to brag too.
local: Nɔɔna zanzan nan na yǝni ba tɔgɩ nabiinǝ wʋbʋŋa ba ma brɩ ba tɩtɩ tɩn, amʋ dɩ waɩ a brɩ kʋntʋ doŋ.

eng: Because you, who are so wise, are happy to put up with fools.
local: Abam yǝni á sɛ balʋ na yɩ jwǝǝru tɩn mwalɩ mwalɩ dɩ wʋpolo, yɩ á paɩ kʋ yɩ swan mʋ á jɩga.

eng: You put up with it if someone enslaves you, if someone exploits you, if someone takes advantage of you, if someone places themselves over you, or if someone hits you in the face.
local: Abam yǝni á sɛ wʋlʋ maama na tu abam te yɩ o jɩgɩ fɩfɩʋn naa o di nyɔɔrɩ á baŋa nɩ tɩn, naa o na ganɩ abam o vrɩ tɩn, naa o na gooni abam tɩn, naa o na lɔɛ abam pʋpwaanʋ tɩn.

eng: Im ashamed to say that we have been weak in comparison! But in whatever they challenge me, I challenge them .
local: Kʋ nan na yɩ dɩbam, dɩ́ bwǝnǝ sɩ dɩ́ sɛ dɩ́ kɩ abam kʋntʋ doŋ. Kʋntʋ nan wʋ́ ta jɩgɩ cavɩɩra na? Nɔɔnʋ nan na wʋ kwarɩ cavɩɩra sɩ o brɩ o tɩtɩ dɩ kʋlʋ o na kɩ tɩn, amʋ dɩ bá kwarɩ cavɩɩra sɩ a kɩ kʋntʋ doŋ, sɩ a ŋɔɔnɩ jwǝrim.

eng: Are they Hebrews? So am I. Are they Israelites? So am I. Are they descendants of Abraham? So am I.
local: Bantʋ brɩ nɩ ba yɩ Zwifǝ cɩga cɩga mʋ, amʋ dɩ nan sɩɩnɩ a yɩ Zwifu mʋ. Bantʋ brɩ nɩ ba yɩ Yisɩrayɛlɩ tiinǝ mʋ, amʋ dɩ nan yɩ Yisɩrayɛlɩ tu mʋ. Ba wɩ ba kuri nuŋi Abraham dwi tiinǝ wʋnɩ mʋ, amʋ dɩ kuri nan nuŋi daanɩ mʋ.

eng: Are they ministers of Christ? Im speaking like a crazy person. What Ive done goes well beyond what theyve done. Ive worked much harder. Ive been imprisoned much more often. Ive been beaten more times than I can count. Ive faced death many times.
local: Bantʋ brɩ nɩ ba tʋŋɩ Zezi Krisi tɩtʋŋa mʋ, amʋ nan tʋŋɩ-ya a dwe-ba. Amʋ na tʋŋɩ a pa Zezi te tɩn tiini kʋ cɛ a yɩra kʋ dwǝni bantʋ. Ba jaanɩ amʋ ba kɩ pɩɩna digǝ nɩ kuni zanzan kʋ dwǝni bantʋ. Ba daa ta ma magɩ amʋ zanzan kʋ dwǝni bantʋ. Amʋ dɛ tʋʋnɩ te kuni zanzan a kɛ.

eng: I received the forty lashes minus one from the Jews five times.
local: Zwifǝ yigǝ tiinǝ bam jaanɩ amʋ kuni bɩnu ba magɩ balaarɩ yi fiintɔ-nʋgʋ .

eng: I was beaten with rods three times. I was stoned once. I was shipwrecked three times. I spent a day and a night on the open sea.
local: Rom tiinǝ bam dɩ ma ja-nɩ kuni bɩtɔ ba magɩ dɩ da-lɔŋɔ. Maŋa kadoŋ nɩ nɔn-kɔgɔ ma dʋlɩ-nɩ dɩ kandwa sɩ ba gʋ. Kuni bɩtɔ mʋ a zʋ naboro a tɔgɩ nɩnɩʋ kʋm wʋ, yɩ kʋ ba kʋ cɔgɩ kʋ maŋɩ na bam wʋnɩ. Kuni bɩdwɩ mʋ amʋ dɩn na bam baŋa nɩ tɩtɩɩ dɩ wɩa maama.

eng: Ive been on many journeys. I faced dangers from rivers, robbers, my people, and Gentiles. I faced dangers in the city, in the desert, on the sea, and from false brothers and sisters.
local: Amʋ na yǝni a beeri maŋa maama tɩn, a nɛ cana zanzan, kʋ na yɩ dɩ bwi na su sɩ pɛɛlɩ, dɩ vɩnvɩrna tee nɩ, kʋ wǝli dɩ amʋ tɩtɩ dwi tiinǝ Zwifǝ bam tee nɩ dɩ dwi-gɛ tiinǝ dɩ tee nɩ. Amʋ daa ta nɛ cana tɩɩnɩ dɩm wʋnɩ dɩ kagʋa wʋnɩ dɩ nɩnɩʋ kʋm wʋnɩ, kʋ ta wǝli dɩ nɔɔna balʋ na paɩ ba yɩ dɩ́ ko-biǝ yɩ ba yagɩ ba daɩ tɩn tee nɩ.

eng: I faced these dangers with hard work and heavy labor, many sleepless nights, hunger and thirst, often without food, and in the cold without enough clothes.
local: Amʋ yǝni a tiini a tʋŋɩ zanzan kʋ cɛ a yɩra nɩ. Kuni zanzan kʋ ma pa a ba dɔ a sui. Kana dɩ na-nyɔm dɩ maa jaanɩ-nɩ yɩ a pɩɩnɩ a tɩtɩ kuni zanzan. Waarʋ maa yǝni tɩ zʋ-nɩ yɩ a ba jɩgɩ gwaarʋ.

eng: Besides all the other things I could mention, theres my daily stress because Im concerned about all the churches.
local: Amʋ nan bá wanɩ a ta wǝǝnu tɩm maama a ti. Kʋlʋ nan na wǝli da tɩn, Zezi nɔɔna bam na wʋ je sɩlʋ maama nɩ tɩn wʋbʋŋa mʋ tiini ya jɩgɩ-nɩ dɛ maama.

eng: Who is weak without me being weak? Who is led astray without me being furious about it?.
local: Nɔɔnʋ na bwǝnǝ Wɛ cwǝŋǝ kam tɔgɩm wʋnɩ, kʋ cɔgɩ amʋ wʋ mʋ nɩnɛɛnɩ kʋ yɩ amʋ tɩtɩ mʋ te. Nɔɔnʋ na tusi o yagɩ Wɛ cwǝŋǝ kam tɔgɩm, kʋ yǝni kʋ tiini kʋ cɔgɩ a wʋ mʋ.

eng: If its necessary to brag, Ill brag about my weaknesses.
local: Kʋ nan na fɩn sɩ a brɩ a tɩtɩ tɩn, amʋ wʋ́ brɩ a tɩtɩ dɩ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ na brɩ nɩ a bwǝnǝ tɩn mʋ.

eng: The God and Father of the Lord Jesus, the one who is blessed forever, knows that Im not lying.
local: Baŋa-Wɛ ye nɩ amʋ ba fɔ vwan. Dɩntʋ mʋ yɩ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi Ko, yɩ DƖ maŋɩ dɩ zulǝ sɩ kʋ taa ve maŋa kalʋ na ba ti tɩn.

eng: At Damascus the governor under King Aretas was guarding the city of Damascus in order to capture me.
local: Amʋ dɛɛn na wʋ Damasɩ tɩʋ kʋm wʋnɩ tɩn, gʋvɩrma tu wʋlʋ na nii tɩʋ kʋm o pa Pɛ Arɩta tɩn mʋ tiŋi nɔɔna tɩʋ kʋm niǝ yam nɩ, sɩ ba yɩrɩ amʋ ba ja ba pa-o.

eng: but I got away from him by being lowered in a basket through a window in the city wall.
local: Zezi karabiǝ bam ma kwe-nɩ ba kɩ tɩtɔgɔ wʋnɩ, yɩ ba lǝ ŋʋna kʋ ni nɩ ba pa a tɔgɩ tɩʋ kʋm kǝbrǝ kam tǝkoro a tu yɩ a lu.

eng: It is necessary to brag, not that it does any good. Ill move on to visions and revelations from the Lord.
local: Kʋ nan fɩn mʋ sɩ a brɩ a tɩtɩ dɩ kʋ na maŋɩ kʋ ba jɩgɩ nyɔɔrɩ dɩ, yɩ a ta wʋ́ ta dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm na pɛ a yi na Wɛ-sɔŋɔ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ na sǝgi tɩn, dɩdaanɩ o na mɛ o cɩga kam o ma vɩɩrɩ-nɩ te tɩn.

eng: I know a man in Christ who was caught up into the third heaven fourteen years ago. I dont know whether it was in the body or out of the body. God knows.
local: Amʋ nan ye nɔɔnʋ wʋdoŋ, o na yɩ Zezi Krisi nɔɔnʋ. Bɩna fugǝ-yana na kɛ tɩn, Wɛ dɛɛn kwe-o DƖ ja DƖ di DƖ sɔŋɔ. Amʋ nan yǝri kʋ yɩ o yɩra tɩtɩ mʋ naa o joro mʋ. Wɛ nan mʋ ye kʋ na yɩ te tɩn.

eng: I know that this man was caught up into paradise and that he heard unspeakable words that were things no one is allowed to repeat. I dont know whether it was in the body or apart from the body. God knows.
local: Amʋ nan ye nɩ wʋntʋ sɩɩnɩ o yi Wɛ-sɔŋɔ mʋ. Kʋ nan na yɩ o yɩra tɩtɩ mʋ naa o joro mʋ, amʋ yǝri, Wɛ mʋ ye. Kʋ nan yɩ dáanɩ mʋ o ni bɩtarɩ sɩlʋ na warɩ sɩ ŋɔɔnɩ tɩn, yɩ sɩ wʋ maŋɩ sɩ nabiinu ta dɩ o ni tɩn.

eng: Ill brag about this man, but I wont brag about myself, except to brag about my weaknesses.
local: Amʋ wʋ́ ta kɩ wʋpolo nɔɔnʋ wʋm kʋntʋ na nɛ kʋlʋ tɩn ŋwaanɩ mʋ. Kʋ na daɩ kʋntʋ a bá sɛ sɩ a brɩ a tɩtɩ, kʋ na daɩ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ na brɩ nɩ a bwǝnǝ tɩn yɩranɩ ŋwaanɩ.

eng: If I did want to brag, I wouldnt make a fool of myself because Id tell the truth. Im holding back from bragging so that no one will give me any more credit than what anyone sees or hears about me.
local: Amʋ ya na bʋŋɩ sɩ a brɩ a tɩtɩ, kʋ bá ta yɩ jwǝrim a na tɛ cɩga tɩn ŋwaanɩ. A nan bá brɩ a tɩtɩ kʋntʋ. A ba lagɩ sɩ nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ bʋŋɩ kʋlʋ na dwe amʋ tɩn o pa-nɩ, sɩ o laan taa nii a tɩtʋŋa na yɩ te dɩ a ni-taanɩ na yɩ te tɩn.

eng: I was given a thorn in my body because of the outstanding revelations Ive received so that I wouldnt be conceited. Its a messenger from Satan sent to torment me so that I wouldnt be conceited.
local: Wɛ ba lagɩ sɩ a kɩ kamunni dɩ wo-kɩnkagɩla yalʋ zanzan a na nɛ tɩn. Mʋ kʋ kuri DƖ pɛ cam wʋ a yɩra wʋnɩ, nɩ sabarɩ na zɔ-nɩ te tɩn. Sʋtaanɩ ma tɔgɩ kʋ ŋwaanɩ sɩ dɩ yaarɩ-nɩ, sɩ a daa yɩ wanɩ a kɩ kamunni.

eng: I pleaded with the Lord three times for it to leave me alone.
local: Kuni bɩtɔ mʋ a loori dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm sɩ o lɩ cam dɩm kʋntʋ a yɩra nɩ.

eng: He said to me, My grace is enough for you, because power is made perfect in weakness. So Ill gladly spend my time bragging about my weaknesses so that Christs power can rest on me.
local: O maa wʋ sɛ, yɩ o wɩ: «Amʋ zaanɩ dɩm maŋɩ nmʋ. Bɛŋwaanɩ amʋ dam dɩm wʋ́ tiini dɩ tʋŋɩ balʋ na bwǝnǝ tɩn tee nɩ mʋ.» Mʋ kʋ kuri amʋ kɩ wʋpolo zanzan dɩ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ na brɩ nɩ a bwǝnǝ tɩn, sɩ kʋ pa Zezi Krisi dam dɩm taa kwǝli-nɩ.

eng: Therefore, Im all right with weaknesses, insults, disasters, harassments, and stressful situations for the sake of Christ, because when Im weak, then Im strong.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ, a na yǝni a bwǝnǝ, naa nɔɔna na jɩgɩ-nɩ ba twɩa, naa cam dɩ bɛɛsɩm dɩ liǝ na jɩgɩ-nɩ, amʋ ta jɩgɩ wʋpolo dɩ kʋntʋ maama Zezi Krisi ŋwaanɩ. Bɛŋwaanɩ, a na yǝni a bwǝnǝ maŋa kalʋ tɩn, kantʋ maŋa nɩ mʋ Zezi pa-nɩ dam.

eng: Ive become a fool! You made me do it. Actually, I should have been commended by you. Im not inferior to the super-apostles in any way, even though Im a nonentity.
local: Amʋ na brɩ a tɩtɩ te tɩn yɩ jwǝrim mʋ, yɩ kʋ yɩ abam fɩfɩʋn ŋwaanɩ mʋ a kɩ kʋntʋ. Kʋ yɩ abam mʋ ya maŋɩ sɩ á brɩ amʋ cɩga kam. Kʋ yɩ cɩga mʋ nɩ amʋ daɩ kʋlʋkʋlʋ. Kʋ nan na yɩ balʋ na paɩ ba yɩ Zezi tɩntʋŋna yɩ ba pa ba dwe maama tɩn, a wʋ muri bantʋ yigǝ nɩ dɩ fɩnfɩɩn dɩ.

eng: The signs of an apostle were performed among you with continuous endurance through signs, wonders, and miracles.
local: Amʋ dɛɛn na wʋ abam tee nɩ tɩn, amʋ tʋŋɩ dɩ pu-dɩa mʋ, yɩ Wɛ kɩ wo-kɩnkagɩla dɩ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ maama na brɩ nɩ amʋ sɩɩnɩ a yɩ Zezi tɩntʋŋnʋ tɩn.

eng: How were you treated worse than the other churches, except that I myself wasnt a financial burden on you? Forgive me for this wrong!.
local: Abam nan bʋŋɩ nɩ a wʋ kɩ abam lanyɩranɩ nɩ a na kɩ Zezi nɔɔna bam je sɩdonnǝ nɩ te tɩn mʋ na? Kʋ nan yɩ cɩga mʋ nɩ a wʋ yaarɩ abam sɩ á pa-nɩ zǝnǝ. Á nan yagɩ kʋntʋ woŋo kʋm á ma cɛ-nɩ.

eng: Look, Im ready to visit you a third time, and I wont be a burden on you. I dont want your things; I want you. It isnt the childrens responsibility to save up for their parents but parents for children.
local: Amʋ na ti a yigǝ sɩ a ba abam te lele kʋntʋ tɩn, kʋ laan lagɩ kʋ kɩ kuni bɩtɔ mʋ. Amʋ nan daa ta bá yaarɩ abam sɩ á pa-nɩ zǝnǝ. Kʋ nan daɩ á wǝǝnu naa á sǝbu mʋ a laga, kʋ yɩ á tɩtɩ mʋ. Kʋ yɩ kwǝ mʋ lagɩ wǝǝnu ba tiŋi ba biǝ ŋwaanɩ, sɩ kʋ daɩ biǝ mʋ wʋ́ kɩ kʋntʋ ba pa ba kwǝ. Abam nan nyɩ dɩ amʋ biǝ mʋ te.

eng: I will very gladly spend and be spent for your sake. If I love you more, will you love me less?.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ amʋ wʋ́ ta jɩgɩ wʋpolo sɩ a kwe a wǝǝnu maama a cɔgɩ kʋ wǝli dɩ a tɩtɩ yɩra abam ŋwaanɩ. Amʋ na tiini a soe abam te tɩn, kʋ maŋɩ sɩ abam taá ba soe amʋ na?.

eng: We all know that I didnt place a burden on you, but in spite of that you think Im a con artist who fooled you with a trick.
local: Abam laan lwarɩ nɩ a dɛɛn ba yaarɩ abam amʋ zǝnǝ ŋwaanɩ. Nɔɔna badaara nan tɛ nɩ, amʋ kɩ swan mʋ a ma joŋi á sǝbiǝ.

eng: I havent taken advantage of you through any of the people I sent to you, have I?.
local: Kʋ nan na yɩ amʋ na tʋŋɩ nɔɔna balʋ maama abam tee nɩ tɩn, a wʋ tɔgɩ ba wʋlʋwʋlʋ ŋwaanɩ a pini abam sǝbu.

eng: I strongly encouraged Titus to go to you and sent the brother with him. Titus didnt take advantage of you, did he? Didnt we live by the same Spirit? Didnt we walk in the same footsteps?.
local: Kʋ na yɩ Titi, a dɛɛn loor-o mʋ sɩ o ba abam te, yɩ a tʋŋɩ dɩ́ ko-bu wʋdoŋ sɩ o tɔgɩ dɩd-o o ba. Titi nan wʋ pini abam kʋlʋkʋlʋ. Abam paɩ sɩ Titi dɩ amʋ wʋbʋŋa daɩ bɩdwɩ mʋ na? Dɩbam nan tɔgɩ cwǝŋǝ dɩdʋa mʋ.

eng: Have you been thinking up to now that we are defending ourselves to you? Actually, we are speaking in the sight of God and in Christ. Dear friends, everything is meant to build you up.
local: Abam bʋŋɩ nɩ dɩ́ na ŋɔɔnɩ tɩntʋ maama tɩn, kʋ yɩ abam yigǝ nɩ mʋ dɩ́ ŋɔɔnɩ sɩ dɩ́ ma joŋi dɩ́ tɩtɩ na? Dɩ́ nan na ŋwɩ dɩ Zezi Krisi tɩn, kʋ yɩ Wɛ yigǝ nɩ mʋ dɩ́ ŋɔɔna. A badon-sonnu-ba, dɩ́ na kɩ kʋlʋ maama tɩn yɩ sɩ dɩ́ zǝni abam mʋ, sɩ á vu yigǝ Wɛ cwǝŋǝ kam wʋnɩ.

eng: Im afraid that maybe when I come you will be different from the way I want you to be, and that Ill be different from the way you want me to be. Im afraid that there might be fighting, obsession, losing your temper, competitive opposition, backstabbing, gossip, conceit, and disorderly conduct.
local: Amʋ nan jɩgɩ liǝ mʋ abam ŋwaanɩ sɩ, a na tu abam te, abam bá ta yɩ nɩ amʋ na lagɩ te tɩn, yɩ kʋʋ́ pa amʋ dɩ bá ta yɩ nɩ abam na lagɩ te tɩn. Amʋ ta maa jɩgɩ liǝ sɩ á wʋ́ ta magɩ kantɔgɔ daanɩ, yɩ á jɩgɩ wʋ-gʋrʋ dɩ ban-zɔŋɔ, yɩ á lagɩ á yɩratʋ zǝnǝ, yɩ á twɩ daanɩ, yɩ á yɩ bɩbarɩ-nyɩna, yɩ á gooni daanɩ, yɩ á kwǝri á kɩ yɔɔ yɔɔ.

eng: Im afraid that when I come again, my God may embarrass me in front of you. I might have to go into mourning over all the people who have sinned before and havent changed their hearts and lives from what they used to practice: moral corruption, sexual immorality, and doing whatever feels good.
local: Amʋ daa ta jɩgɩ liǝ mʋ dɩ abam sɩ, amʋ na joori a ba á te, amʋ Tu Wɛ wʋ́ pa a na cavɩɩra abam ŋwaanɩ, dɩ abam zanzan na wʋ lǝni á wʋ dɩ lwarɩm dɩlʋ á na maŋɩ á kɩ tɩn. Amʋ na nɛ kʋntʋ, kʋʋ́ pa a wʋ cɔgɩ zanzan dɩ á ta na kɩ wo-digiru dɩ boorim kikiǝ dwi maama yɩ á ba yagɩ tɩn.

eng: This is the third time that Im coming to visit you. Every matter is settled on the evidence of two or three witnesses.
local: Amʋ na lagɩ a ba abam te lele tɩn, kʋ laan lagɩ kʋ kɩ kuni bɩtɔ mʋ. Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm nan tagɩ kʋ wɩ: «Nɔɔnʋ na lagɩ sɩ o saŋɩ o doŋ, kʋ maŋɩ sɩ nɔɔna bale naa batɔ mʋ taa yɩ o maana tiinǝ.».

eng: When I was with you on my second visit, I already warned those who continued to sin. Now Im repeating that warning to all the rest of you while Im at a safe distance: if I come again, I wont spare anyone.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ amʋ daa ta lagɩ a kaanɩ abam balʋ dɛɛn na maŋɩ á kɩ lwarɩm tɩn dɩ balʋ na daarɩ tɩn maama, sɩ á lǝni á wʋrʋ dɩ á kǝm-balwaarʋ tɩm. Amʋ daama na wʋ abam tee nɩ tɩn, a maŋɩ a kaanɩ abam kʋntʋ. Amʋ nan daa tǝri abam tee nɩ lele kʋntʋ, yɩ a lagɩ sɩ a ta kaanɩ abam, sɩ kʋ kɩ kuni bɩle. Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ, taá ye-na nɩ, amʋ na joori a ba sɩ a na abam, nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ maama daa ta na wʋ zagɩ o kikiǝ tɩn bá lu.

eng: Since you are demanding proof that Christ speaks through me, Christ isnt weak in dealing with you but shows his power among you.
local: Kʋntʋ mʋ abam wʋ́ lwarɩ nɩ kʋ sɩɩnɩ kʋ yɩ Zezi Krisi kwǝrǝ mʋ a jɩgɩ a ŋɔɔna, nɩ abam na maŋɩ á lagɩ sɩ á lwarɩ te tɩn. Zezi na kɩ abam te tɩn ba brɩ nɩ o bwǝnǝ, o brɩ o dam mʋ abam tɩtarɩ nɩ.

eng: Certainly he was crucified because of weakness, but he lives by the power of God. Certainly we also are weak in him, but we will live together with him, because of Gods power that is directed toward you.
local: Kʋ nan yɩ cɩga, o sɛ o tu o tɩtɩ o ji nabwǝm yɩ ba pa-o tʋʋn-dagara baŋa nɩ. Kʋ daarɩ o laan nan jɩgɩ ŋwɩa Wɛ dam dɩm ŋwaanɩ mʋ. Dɩbam na yɩ o nɔɔna tɩn, dɩbam dɩ bwǝnǝ mʋ, dɩ́ nan na ŋwɩ dɩd-o tɩn, dɩ́ na wʋ́ kɩ te dɩ abam tɩn yɩ Wɛ dam dɩm ŋwaanɩ mʋ.

eng: Examine yourselves to see if you are in the faith. Test yourselves. Dont you understand that Jesus Christ is in you? Unless, of course, you fail the test.
local: Abam nan maŋɩ sɩ á maanɩ á tɩtɩ mʋ á nii, á jɩgɩ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Zezi na. Abam na maanɩ á tɩtɩ kʋntʋ, á bá lwarɩ nɩ Zezi Krisi wʋra dɩ abam na? Naa kʋ yɩ abam maŋɩ á tɩtɩ mʋ yɩ á maŋɩ á ga?.

eng: But I hope that you will realize that we dont fail the test.
local: Amʋ nan jɩgɩ tɩɩna sɩ á maanɩ á lwarɩ nɩ dɩbam sɩɩnɩ dɩ́ yɩ Zezi Krisi tɩntʋŋna mʋ.

eng: We pray to God that you dont do anything wrong, not because we want to appear to pass the test but so that you might do the right thing, even if we appear to fail.
local: Dɩ́ yǝni dɩ́ loori Wɛ dɩ́ pa abam, sɩ á yɩ taá kɩ lwarɩm mʋ. Kʋ daɩ nɩ dɩ́ lagɩ sɩ dɩ́ brɩ nɔɔna mʋ nɩ dɩ́ yɩ Zezi tɩntʋŋna. Dɩ́ nan lagɩ sɩ á taá kɩ kʋlʋ na lana tɩn mʋ, dɩ nɔɔna na maŋɩ ba brɩ nɩ dɩbam mʋ tʋŋɩ dɩ́ ga dɩ.

eng: We cant do anything against the truth but only to help the truth.
local: Dɩbam bá sɛ sɩ dɩ́ kɩ kʋlʋ na wʋ́ cɔgɩ Wɛ cɩga kam tɩn, dɩ́ wʋ́ ta kɩ te na wʋ́ zǝni-ka tɩn mʋ.

eng: We are happy when we are weak but you are strong. We pray for this: that you will be made complete.
local: Abam na jɩgɩ Wɛ dam dɩm, yɩ dɩbam na maŋɩ dɩ́ bwǝnǝ, dɩ́ ta jɩgɩ wʋpolo. Dɩ́ nan wʋ́ ta loori Wɛ sɩ DƖ zǝni abam, sɩ á bɩ lanyɩranɩ Wɛ cwǝŋǝ kam wʋnɩ.

eng: This is why Im writing these things while Im away. Im writing so that I wont need to act harshly when Im with you by using the authority that the Lord gave me. He gave it to me so that I could build you up, not tear you down.
local: Kʋ yɩ kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ a pʋpʋnɩ wǝǝnu tɩntʋ a pa abam yɩ a tǝri á tee nɩ, sɩ a na tu á te, sɩ a daa yɩ kɩ kǝm-cɛɛrɩ dɩ abam dɩ dam dɩlʋ dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm na pɛ-nɩ tɩn. Dam dɩm kʋntʋ yɩ sɩ a ma fɔgɩ abam mʋ, sɩ kʋ daɩ sɩ a ma cɔgɩ abam.

eng: Finally, brothers and sisters, good-bye. Put things in order, respond to my encouragement, be in harmony with each other, and live in peace—and the God of love and peace will be with you.
local: A ko-biǝ-ba, Wɛ wʋ́ pa á jǝni lanyɩranɩ. Kwaanɩ-na sɩ Wɛ wʋ́ pa á bɩ lanyɩranɩ DƖ cwǝŋǝ kam wʋnɩ. Á nan kɩ-na nɩ amʋ na loori abam te tɩn. Á taá jɩgɩ wʋbʋŋ-dɩdwɩ, sɩ á daarɩ á taá jɩgɩ bɩcarɩ-zuru, sɩ Wɛ dɩlʋ na paɩ sono dɩ bɩcarɩ-zuru tɩn wʋ́ ta wʋ abam tee nɩ.

eng: Say hello to each other with a holy kiss. All of Gods people say hello to you.
local: Á na jeeri daanɩ, sɩ á taá jɔɔnɩ daanɩ lanyɩranɩ dɩ sono dɩ wʋ-poŋo. Wɛ nɔɔna bam maama jɔɔnɩ abam.

eng: The grace of the Lord Jesus Christ, the love of God, and the fellowship of the Holy Spirit be with you all.
local: Dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi Krisi wʋ́ pa abam maama yu-yoŋo, Baŋa-Wɛ sono kʋm wʋ́ ta wʋ á tee nɩ, yɩ DƖ Joro kʋm wʋ́ pa á taá ŋwɩ daanɩ dɩ ywǝǝni.

eng: From Paul, an apostle who is not sent from human authority or commissioned through human agency, but sent through Jesus Christ and God the Father who raised him from the dead.
local: Amʋ Pooli wʋlʋ na yɩ Zezi Krisi tɩntʋŋnʋ tɩn mʋ pʋpʋnɩ tɔnɔ kʋntʋ. Kʋ daɩ nabiinǝ mʋ tʋŋɩ-nɩ, kʋ nan daɩ nɔɔnʋ mʋ tiŋi-nɩ sɩ a taa yɩ Zezi Krisi tɩntʋŋnʋ. Kʋ yɩ Zezi Krisi tɩtɩ mʋ kuri-nɩ, dɩdaanɩ dɩ́ Ko Wɛ dɩlʋ na bi-o DƖ pa o yagɩ tʋʋnɩ tɩn.

eng: and from all the brothers and sisters with me. To the churches in Galatia.
local: Dɩ́ ko-biǝ balʋ maama na wʋ amʋ tee nɩ tɩn dɩ jɔɔnɩ abam balʋ na yɩ Zezi kɔgɔ kʋm wʋ nɔɔna yɩ á zʋʋrɩ Galatɩ tɩɩnɩ dɩm nɩ tɩn.

eng: Grace and peace to you from God the Father and the Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Dɩ́ Ko Wɛ dɩ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi Krisi wʋ́ pa abam yazurǝ dɩ yu-yoŋo.

eng: He gave himself for our sins, so he could deliver us from this present evil age, according to the will of our God and Father.
local: Zezi Krisi nan mʋ dɛ dɩ́ Ko Wɛ wʋbʋŋa na lagɩ te tɩn maama yɩ o sɛ sɩ o tɩ dɩbam lwarɩm ŋwaanɩ, sɩ o ma wanɩ o vrɩ dɩbam zɩm lʋgʋ baŋa wo-balwaarʋ tɩm wʋnɩ.

eng: To God be the glory forever and always! Amen.
local: Baŋa-Wɛ maŋɩ dɩ zulǝ mʋ sɩ kʋ taa ve maŋa kalʋ na ba ti tɩn. Amina.

eng: Im amazed that you are so quickly deserting the one who called you by the grace of Christ to follow another gospel.
local: Abam na kɩ te tɩn nan mʋ pɛ amʋ yɩra sɔɔrɩ. Wɛ dɛ Zezi Krisi ŋwaanɩ mʋ DƖ kuri abam zaanɩ sɩ á taá yɩ DƖ nɔɔna, yɩ á laan da á zaŋɩ á ma á kwaga á ya dɩntʋ, sɩ á daarɩ á sɛ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kadoŋ.

eng: Its not really another gospel, but certain people are confusing you and they want to change the gospel of Christ.
local: Kʋ yɩ cɩga mʋ, kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kadoŋ daa tǝrǝ, kʋ na daɩ Zezi kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kalʋ dɩ́ na maŋɩ dɩ́ brɩ abam tɩn yɩranɩ. Amʋ nan tagɩ kʋntʋ, bɛŋwaanɩ nɔɔna badaara mʋ wʋ abam tɩtarɩ nɩ ba na kwaanɩ sɩ ba pipiri Zezi Krisi kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam, yɩ ba paɩ á wʋbʋŋa vugimǝ.

eng: However, even if we ourselves or a heavenly angel should ever preach anything different from what we preached to you, they should be under a curse.
local: Nɔɔnʋ nan na tu á te yɩ o brɩ abam kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kadoŋ, yɩ ka daɩ Zezi kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kalʋ dɩ́ na maŋɩ dɩ́ brɩ abam tɩn, sɩ á yɩ sɛ kʋntʋ tu. Kʋ na maŋɩ kʋ yɩ dɩbam tɩtɩ wʋ nɔɔnʋ, naa kʋ na yɩ malɛka mʋ zɩ nuŋi wɛyuu, yɩ ka na brɩ abam kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kadoŋ, Wɛ wʋ́ cɔgɩ kʋ tu.

eng: Im repeating what weve said before: if anyone preaches something different from what you received, they should be under a curse!.
local: Amʋ nan ta wʋ́ joori a fɔgɩ a ta nɩnɛɛnɩ dɩbam na maŋɩ dɩ́ ta kʋlʋ dɩ abam tɩn. Nɔɔnʋ na brɩ abam kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kadoŋ, yɩ kʋ daɩ Wɛ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kalʋ á na maŋɩ á sɛ tɩn, Wɛ wʋ́ cɔgɩ kʋ tu.

eng: Am I trying to win over human beings or God? Or am I trying to please people? If I were still trying to please people, I wouldnt be Christs slave.
local: A na tagɩ kʋlʋ tɩn, kʋ daɩ nɩ a lagɩ sɩ nabiinǝ mʋ sɛ nɩ a na kɩ kʋlʋ tɩn maŋɩ, kʋ yɩ sɩ Wɛ mʋ sɛ nɩ a na kɩ te tɩn maŋɩ. A nan ba lagɩ sɩ a pa nabiinǝ wʋrʋ poli dɩ amʋ. A ya na lagɩ kʋntʋ, a bá wanɩ a taa yɩ Zezi Krisi tɩntʋŋnʋ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, I want you to know that the gospel I preached isnt human in origin.
local: A ko-biǝ-ba, a lagɩ sɩ á lwarɩ nɩ Zezi kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kalʋ amʋ dɛɛn na tɔɔlɩ a brɩ abam tɩn wʋ nuŋi nabiinǝ te.

eng: I didnt receive it or learn it from a human. It came through a revelation from Jesus Christ.
local: Kʋ daɩ nabiinu mʋ kwe-ka o pa-nɩ sɩ a tɔɔlɩ. Nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ nan wʋ zaasɩ-nɩ-ka. Kʋ yɩ Zezi Krisi tɩtɩ mʋ vɩɩrɩ amʋ o kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam.

eng: You heard about my previous life in Judaism, how severely I harassed Gods church and tried to destroy it.
local: Abam maŋɩ á ni amʋ dɛɛn na tɔgɩ Zwifǝ cullu tɩm cwǝŋǝ kam yɩ a kɩ te tɩn. A dɛɛn tiini a bɛɛsɩ Zezi nɔɔna bam, yɩ a ya kwaana sɩ a cɔgɩ ba kɔgɔ kʋm maama.

eng: I advanced in Judaism beyond many of my peers, because I was much more militant about the traditions of my ancestors.
local: Kʋ na yɩ a yuu donnǝ bam wʋnɩ, a dɛɛn sɛ Zwifǝ bam cullu tɩm a dwǝni ba zanzan, amʋ dɛɛn na kwaanɩ a tɔgɩ dɩ́ nabaara bam cwe sɩm lanyɩranɩ tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: But God had set me apart from birth and called me through his grace. He was pleased.
local: Dɩ kʋntʋ maama, Wɛ kɩ-nɩ yu-yoŋo yɩ DƖ kuri-nɩ kʋ loori ba na wʋ́ lʋ-nɩ tɩn. DƖ laan ma bǝŋi-nɩ sɩ a taa tʋŋɩ a pa-DƖ.

eng: to reveal his Son to me, so that I might preach about him to the Gentiles. I didnt immediately consult with any human being.
local: Maŋa kalʋ DƖ wʋbʋŋa na lagɩ tɩn mʋ DƖ vɩɩrɩ-nɩ sɩ a lwarɩ DƖ Bu wʋm, sɩ a daarɩ a tɔɔlɩ o kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam a brɩ dwi-gɛ tiinǝ. Maŋa kam kʋntʋ nɩ a wʋ ve a bwe nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ woŋo ka ŋwaanɩ.

eng: I didnt go up to Jerusalem to see the men who were apostles before me either, but I went away into Arabia and I returned again to Damascus.
local: Amʋ wʋ ve Zeruzalɛm sɩ a na balʋ na maŋɩ ba yɩ Zezi tɩntʋŋna ba loori amʋ tɩn. A nan yɔɔrɩ Arabi mʋ a vu. Kʋntʋ kwaga nɩ mʋ a laan joori a ba Damasɩ.

eng: Then after three years I went up to Jerusalem to visit Cephas and stayed with him fifteen days.
local: Bɩna yatɔ na kɛ tɩn, a laan ma zaŋɩ a vu Zeruzalɛm sɩ a na Pɩyɛɛrɩ, sɩ dɩ́ lwarɩ daanɩ. A ma kɩ da fugǝ-yanu o tee nɩ.

eng: But I didnt see any other of the apostles except James the brother of the Lord.
local: Amʋ daa wʋ nɛ Zezi tɩntʋŋnʋ wʋdoŋ a wǝli da, kʋ na daɩ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi nyaanɩ Zakɩ yɩranɩ mʋ a nɛa.

eng: Before God, Im not lying about the things that Im writing to you!.
local: A na pʋpʋnɩ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ maama tɩn yɩ cɩga mʋ. Wɛ ye amʋ wʋ. Kʋ nan daɩ vwan mʋ a fɔga.

eng: Then I went into the regions of Syria and Cilicia.
local: Kʋntʋ kwaga nɩ, a laan ma zaŋɩ a tʋlɩ a vu Siiri dɩ Silisi tɩɩnɩ dɩm.

eng: but I wasnt known personally by the Christian churches in Judea.
local: Zezi Krisi nɔɔna balʋ na wʋ Zude tɩɩnɩ dɩm nɩ tɩn ya daa ta wʋ nɛ amʋ dɩ ba yi.

eng: They only heard a report about me: The man who used to harass us now preaches the faith that he once tried to destroy.
local: Ba nan maŋɩ ba ni nɔɔna badaara na tɛ amʋ taanɩ ba wɩ: «Nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ dɛɛn ya na bɛɛsɩ dɩbam tɩn laan mʋ zagɩ o kikiǝ, yɩ o wʋra o tɔɔlɩ Wɛ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam sɩ o pa nɔɔna ba ba sɛ Zezi Krisi, yɩ kʋ yɩ Zezi cwǝŋǝ kam kʋntʋ mʋ o dɛɛn kwaana sɩ o ya cɔgɩ.».

eng: So they were glorifying God because of me.
local: Ba na ni amʋ taanɩ kʋntʋ tɩn, kʋ ma pa ba zuli Wɛ lanyɩranɩ.

eng: Then after fourteen years I went up to Jerusalem again with Barnabas, and I took Titus along also.
local: Bɩna fugǝ yana na kɛ tɩn, amʋ dɩ Banabasɩ ma joori dɩ́ vu Zeruzalɛm. A ma ja Titi dɩ a wǝli da.

eng: I went there because of a revelation, and I laid out the gospel that I preach to the Gentiles for them. But I did it privately with the influential leaders to make sure that I wouldnt be working or that I hadnt worked for nothing.
local: Kʋ nan yɩ Wɛ mʋ brɩ-nɩ sɩ a vu dáanɩ. A ma vu a na balʋ ba na nii nɩ ba yɩ Zezi kɔgɔ kʋm yigǝ tiinǝ tɩn. A na nɛ-ba tɩn, amʋ dɩ bantʋ yɩranɩ ma jǝni daanɩ dɩ́ ŋɔɔnɩ, sɩ a pa ba lwarɩ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kalʋ a na yǝni a brɩ dwi-gɛ tiinǝ bam tɩn. Bɛŋwaanɩ amʋ ba lagɩ sɩ a na puli a brɩ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kalʋ tɩn dɩ a ta na jɩgɩ kalʋ a brɩ lele tɩn ji kafɛ.

eng: However, not even Titus, who was with me and who was a Greek, was required to be circumcised.
local: Titi wʋlʋ na tɔgɩ dɩ amʋ o vu Zeruzalɛm tɩn maa yɩ Grɛkɩ tu. Ba nan wʋ fɩ-o ba pa o go nɩ Zwifǝ bam na goni ba bǝkǝri te tɩn.

eng: But false brothers and sisters, who were brought in secretly, slipped in to spy on our freedom, which we have in Christ Jesus, and to make us slaves.
local: Nɔɔna badaara nan mʋ wʋra ba na paɩ ba yɩ Zezi karabiǝ yɩ ba yagɩ ba daɩ. Nɔɔna bam kʋntʋ ya ŋɔgɩ mʋ ba zʋ Zezi kɔgɔ kʋm wʋ, sɩ ba maanɩ dɩbam ba nii dɩ́ na ŋwɩ dɩ Zezi Krisi yɩ dɩ́ te dɩ́ tɩtɩ te tɩn. Ba nan lagɩ sɩ ba pa dɩ́ joori dɩ́ ji gambɛ mʋ Zwifǝ bam cullu tɩm ŋwaanɩ.

eng: We didnt give in and submit to them for a single moment, so that the truth of the gospel would continue to be with you.
local: Dɩ́ nan wʋ sɛ-ba dɩ fɩnfɩɩn dɩ, sɩ ba yɩ wanɩ ba cɔgɩ cɩga kalʋ abam na maŋɩ á lwarɩ Wɛ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam wʋnɩ tɩn.

eng: The influential leaders didnt add anything to what I was preaching—and whatever they were makes no difference to me, because God doesnt show favoritism.
local: Amʋ dɛɛn na ve a ŋɔɔnɩ dɩ balʋ ba na wɩ ba yɩ Zezi kɔgɔ kʋm yigǝ tiinǝ tɩn, ba wʋ nɛ woŋo sɩ ba wǝli amʋ zaasɩm dɩm nɩ. Ba nan na sɩɩnɩ ba yɩ yigǝ tiinǝ, naa ba na daɩ dɩ, kʋ daɩ kʋlʋkʋlʋ dɩ amʋ, bɛŋwaanɩ Wɛ ba kuri nɔɔna daanɩ.

eng: But on the contrary, they saw that I had been given the responsibility to preach the gospel to the people who arent circumcised, just as Peter had been to the circumcised.
local: Bantʋ nan nɛ nɩ Wɛ mʋ sɩɩnɩ DƖ kɩ DƖ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam amʋ jɩŋa nɩ sɩ a ja vu a brɩ dwi-gɛ tiinǝ, nɩ DƖ na kɩ-ka Pɩyɛɛrɩ jɩŋa nɩ sɩ o ma brɩ Zwifǝ bam te tɩn.

eng: The one who empowered Peter to become an apostle to the circumcised empowered me also to be one to the Gentiles.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ Wɛ mʋ pɛ Pɩyɛɛrɩ dam sɩ o taa yɩ Zezi tɩntʋŋnʋ Zwifǝ bam ŋwaanɩ. Kʋ nan yɩ dɩntʋ dɩ mʋ pɛ amʋ dam sɩ a taa yɩ Zezi tɩntʋŋnʋ dwi-gɛ tiinǝ bam ŋwaanɩ.

eng: James, Cephas, and John, who are considered to be key leaders, shook hands with me and Barnabas as equals when they recognized the grace that was given to me. So it was agreed that we would go to the Gentiles, while they continue to go to the people who were circumcised.
local: Zakɩ dɩ Pɩyɛɛrɩ dɩ Zan balʋ ba na nii nɩ ba yɩ Zezi kɔgɔ kʋm dɩdɛɛra tɩn ma lwarɩ nɩ, kʋ yɩ Wɛ mʋ pɛ-nɩ yu-yoŋo sɩ a taa tʋŋɩ tɩtʋŋɩ dɩm kʋntʋ. Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ ba ma sɛ sɩ amʋ dɩ Banabasɩ taa tʋŋɩ dɩ ba, yɩ ba ja dɩ́ jɩa. Dɩ́ maama ma sɛ nɩ amʋ dɩ Banabasɩ maŋɩ sɩ dɩ́ vu dwi-gɛ tiinǝ bam te mʋ dɩ́ brɩ-ba Wɛ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam, sɩ bantʋ dɩ maŋɩ Zwifǝ bam tee nɩ ba brɩ-ka.

eng: They asked only that we would remember the poor, which was certainly something I was willing to do.
local: Woŋo dɩdʋa yɩranɩ mʋ ba loori dɩbam, sɩ dɩ́ yɩ swe kʋ ni nɩ. Kʋ yɩ sɩ dɩ́ guli dɩ́ zǝni yinigǝ tiinǝ balʋ na wʋ ba kɔgɔ kʋm wʋnɩ Zeruzalɛm nɩ tɩn. Mʋ woŋo kʋlʋ a na tiini a kwaanɩ a kɩa.

eng: But when Cephas came to Antioch, I opposed him to his face, because he was wrong.
local: Kʋ daarɩ maŋa kalʋ Pɩyɛɛrɩ dɛɛn na tu o wʋ Antɩɔsɩ nɩ tɩn, mʋ amʋ kaan-o jaja, sɩ a brɩ-o nɩ o wʋ kɩ cɩga.

eng: He had been eating with the Gentiles before certain people came from James. But when they came, he began to back out and separate himself, because he was afraid of the people who promoted circumcision.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ, o na yi Antɩɔsɩ tɩn, o yǝni o tɔgɩ o di dɩ dwi-gɛ tiinǝ mʋ. Kʋ daarɩ, nɔɔna badonnǝ na nuŋi Zakɩ-ba te ba ba dáanɩ tɩn, Pɩyɛɛrɩ laan pipiri o wʋbʋŋa yɩ o vɩn sɩ o taa tɔgɩ o di dɩ dwi-gɛ tiinǝ bam. O pɔɔrɩ o tɩtɩ kʋntʋ, bɛŋwaanɩ o kwarɩ balʋ na brɩ nɩ wʋlʋ maama na tɔgɩ Wɛ cwǝŋǝ tɩn maŋɩ sɩ o go nɩ Zwifǝ bam na goni ba bǝkǝri te tɩn.

eng: And the rest of the Jews also joined him in this hypocrisy so that even Barnabas got carried away with them in their hypocrisy.
local: Zwifǝ balʋ na tu ba sɛ Zezi tɩn badaara dɩ ma ji pipiri-nyɩna nɩ Pɩyɛɛrɩ na kɩ te tɩn, yɩ Banabasɩ dɩ yagɩ o tɩtɩ o pa ba ja-o ba zʋ ba pipirim dɩm wʋnɩ.

eng: But when I saw that they werent acting consistently with the truth of the gospel, I said to Cephas in front of everyone, If you, though youre a Jew, live like a Gentile and not like a Jew, how can you require the Gentiles to live like Jews.
local: Kʋntʋ mʋ a nɛ nɩ ba daa ba tɔgɩ cɩga kalʋ Wɛ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam na brɩ tɩn. A laan ma zɩgɩ ba maama yigǝ nɩ, yɩ a ta dɩ Pɩyɛɛrɩ a wɩ: «Nmʋ yɩ Zwifu mʋ, yɩ n kɩ nɩ n yɩ dwi-gɛ tu mʋ te yɩ n daa ba tɔgɩ Zwifǝ cullu tɩm. Bɛɛ nan mʋ yɩ n laan lagɩ sɩ n fɩn dwi-gɛ tiinǝ bam sɩ ba sɛ Zwifǝ bam cullu tɩm?».

eng: We are born Jews—were not Gentile sinners.
local: Kʋ yɩ cɩga mʋ, dɩbam yɩ Zwifǝ bam tɩtɩ dwi mʋ, sɩ dɩ́ daɩ dwi-gɛ tiinǝ balʋ na yǝri Wɛ cullu tɩm tɩn.

eng: However, we know that a person isnt made righteous by the works of the Law but rather through the faithfulness of Jesus Christ. We ourselves believed in Christ Jesus so that we could be made righteous by the faithfulness of Christ and not by the works of the Law—because no one will be made righteous by the works of the Law.
local: Dɩ kʋ dɩ, dɩbam laan tu dɩ́ lwarɩ nɩ nɔɔnʋ wʋ́ na cɩga Wɛ tee nɩ mʋ dɩ o na kɩ o wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Zezi Krisi yɩranɩ, sɩ kʋ daɩ nɩ o na sɛ cullu tɩlʋ Wɛ na pɛ Zwifǝ bam tɩn ŋwaanɩ. Kʋntʋ tɩn, dɩ́ tu dɩ́ kɩ dɩ́ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Zezi Krisi sɩ kʋ pa dɩ́ na cɩga mʋ Wɛ tee nɩ, bɛŋwaanɩ kʋ pʋpʋnɩ kʋ wɩ: «Nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ bá wanɩ o na cɩga Wɛ tee nɩ DƖ cullu tɩm sɛɛm ŋwaanɩ.».

eng: But if it is discovered that we ourselves are sinners while we are trying to be made righteous in Christ, then is Christ a servant of sin? Absolutely not!.
local: Dɩbam balʋ na ŋwɩ dɩ Zezi Krisi tɩn jɩgɩ tɩɩna nɩ dɩ́ wʋ́ na cɩga Wɛ tee nɩ. Kʋ nan ya na yɩ cɩga nɩ dɩbam balʋ na ba tɔgɩ Zwifǝ bam cullu tɩm tɩn yɩ nɔn-balwaarʋ mʋ Wɛ yigǝ nɩ, kʋ brɩ nɩ Zezi tɩtɩ mʋ ganɩ dɩbam sɩ dɩ́ tusi na? Aye. Kʋ daɩ kʋntʋ.

eng: If I rebuild the very things that I tore down, I show that I myself am breaking the Law.
local: Amʋ nan na joori a pipiri a sɛ Zwifǝ cullu tɩm a ya na maŋɩ a yagɩ tɩ tɔgɩm tɩn, kʋ brɩ nɩ a yɩ nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ na kɩ o cɔgɩ cullu tɩm tɩn mʋ.

eng: I died to the Law through the Law, so that I could live for God.
local: Wɛ cullu tɩm tɩtɩ mʋ brɩ nɩ amʋ nyɩ dɩ nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ na tɩgɩ tɩn mʋ te, tɩ nan daa ba jɩgɩ dam amʋ baŋa nɩ Zezi na vrɩ-nɩ tɩn ŋwaanɩ. Kʋ nan kɩ kʋntʋ, sɩ kʋ pa a taa ŋwɩ Wɛ ŋwaanɩ mʋ.

eng: I have been crucified with Christ and I no longer live, but Christ lives in me. And the life that I now live in my body, I live by faith, indeed, by the faithfulness of Gods Son, who loved me and gave himself for me.
local: Ba dɛɛn na pagɩ Zezi Krisi tʋʋn-dagara baŋa nɩ tɩn, kʋ nyɩ dɩ amʋ tɔgɩ dɩd-o mʋ a tɩ. Kʋ daa daɩ amʋ tɩtɩ mʋ ŋwɩ, kʋ yɩ Zezi Krisi mʋ ŋwɩ a wʋnɩ. A na jɩgɩ ŋwɩa kalʋ lele kʋntʋ lʋgʋ baŋa nɩ tɩn, kʋ yɩ a na kɩ a wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ Bu Zezi tɩn ŋwaanɩ mʋ. Wʋntʋ mʋ soe amʋ, yɩ o sɛ o tɩ amʋ ŋwaanɩ.

eng: I dont ignore the grace of God, because if we become righteous through the Law, then Christ died for no purpose.
local: A bá sɛ sɩ a vɩn Wɛ pɛɛrɩ dɩlʋ DƖ na pɛ-nɩ zaanɩ tɩn. Nɔɔnʋ ya na wʋ́ wanɩ o na cɩga Wɛ tee nɩ o na tɔgɩ DƖ cullu tɩm tɩn ŋwaanɩ, kʋ brɩ nɩ Zezi Krisi tʋʋnɩ dɩm ya yɩ kafɛ mʋ.

eng: You irrational Galatians! Who put a spell on you? Jesus Christ was put on display as crucified before your eyes!.
local: Abam Galatɩ tiinǝ-ba, á kikiǝ nyɩ dɩ ba tulimi abam mʋ ba pa á swan daa tǝrǝ te. Ba dɛɛn tɔɔlɩ ba brɩ abam jaja kʋ na kɩ te yɩ Zezi Krisi tɩ tʋʋn-dagara kam baŋa nɩ tɩn.

eng: I just want to know this from you: Did you receive the Spirit by doing the works of the Law or by believing what you heard?.
local: A nan lagɩ a bwe abam woŋo dɩdʋa yɩranɩ mʋ a nii. Abam dɛɛn na joŋi Wɛ Joro kʋm yɩ kʋ wʋ á wʋnɩ tɩn, kʋ yɩ á tɩtʋŋa na tɔgɩ cullu tɩm tɩn ŋwaanɩ mʋ na? Awo. Kʋ yɩ á na ni Wɛ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam yɩ á sɛ tɩn ŋwaanɩ mʋ.

eng: Are you so irrational? After you started with the Spirit, are you now finishing up with your own human effort?.
local: Bɛɛ mʋ yɩ á ba jɩgɩ swan kʋntʋ? Abam na puli á tɔgɩ Zezi dɩ Wɛ Joro kʋm dam tɩn, á laan lagɩ sɩ á pipiri á da-o dɩ á tɩtɩ dam mʋ á vu á guri na?.

eng: Did you experience so much for nothing? I wonder if it really was for nothing.
local: Wǝǝnu tɩlʋ maama na kɩ abam tɩtarɩ nɩ tɩn wʋ́ ji kafɛ mʋ na? Aye. Amʋ bʋŋɩ nɩ tɩ bá ji kafɛ.

eng: So does the one providing you with the Spirit and working miracles among you do this by you doing the works of the Law or by you believing what you heard?.
local: Wɛ na pɛ abam DƖ Joro kʋm yɩ DƖ daarɩ DƖ kɩ wo-kɩnkagɩla abam tɩtarɩ nɩ tɩn, DƖ kɩ kʋntʋ abam tɩtʋŋa na tɔgɩ cullu tɩm tɩn ŋwaanɩ mʋ na? Aye. Kʋ yɩ á na ni Wɛ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam yɩ á kɩ á wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Zezi tɩn ŋwaanɩ mʋ.

eng: Understand that in the same way that Abraham believed God and it was credited to him as righteousness, .
local: Kʋntʋ mʋ kʋ pʋpʋnɩ Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm wʋnɩ kʋ wɩ: Abraham kɩ o wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ, yɩ Wɛ pa o na cɩga kʋ ŋwaanɩ.

eng: those who believe are the children of Abraham.
local: Kʋntʋ mʋ wʋ́ pa á lwarɩ nɩ Abraham dwi tiinǝ cɩga cɩga yɩ balʋ na kɩ ba wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ tɩn mʋ.

eng: But when it saw ahead of time that God would make the Gentiles righteous on the basis of faith, scripture preached the gospel in advance to Abraham: All the Gentiles will be blessed in you .
local: Faŋa faŋa tɩn kʋ maŋɩ kʋ pʋpʋnɩ Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm wʋnɩ kʋ wɩ: Wɛ wʋ́ pa dwi-gɛ tiinǝ dɩ na cɩga DƖ tee nɩ, dɩ ba na kɩ ba wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ DƖ tɩn ŋwaanɩ. Mʋ kʋ kuri Wɛ dɛ yigǝ DƖ ta DƖ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam dɩ Abraham DƖ wɩ: «Amʋ wʋ́ ta nmʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ a kɩ lʋgʋ baŋa dwi maama lanyɩranɩ.».

eng: Therefore, those who believe are blessed together with Abraham who believed.
local: Kʋntʋ tɩn, balʋ maama dɩ na kɩ ba wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ nɩ Abraham dɛɛn na kɩ o wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ DƖ te tɩn, Wɛ dɩ wʋ́ kɩ-ba lanyɩranɩ.

eng: All those who rely on the works of the Law are under a curse, because it is written, Everyone is cursed who does not keep on doing all the things that have been written in the Law scroll .
local: Kʋ daarɩ balʋ na tɩɩgɩ cullu tɩm sɩ ba ma na cɩga Wɛ tee nɩ tɩn wʋ́ na cɔgɩm. Bɛŋwaanɩ kʋ pʋpʋnɩ Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm wʋnɩ kʋ wɩ: «Wʋlʋ maama na wʋ tɔgɩ kʋlʋ maama na pʋpʋnɩ kʋ kɩ Wɛ cullu tɔnɔ kʋm wʋnɩ tɩn, Wɛ wʋ́ cɔgɩ kʋntʋ tu.».

eng: But since no one is made righteous by the Law as far as God is concerned, it is clear that the righteous one will live on the basis of faith .
local: Dɩ́ nan ye lanyɩranɩ nɩ, nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ bá na cɩga Wɛ tee nɩ dɩ o na tɔgɩ cullu tɩm tɩn ŋwaanɩ. Kʋ nan pʋpʋnɩ kʋ wɩ: «Wʋlʋ na jɩgɩ cɩga Wɛ tee nɩ tɩn mʋ yɩ wʋlʋ na kɩ o wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ DƖ tɩn, oó na ŋwɩa cɩga cɩga.».

eng: The Law isnt based on faith; rather, the one doing these things will live by them .
local: Nɔɔnʋ na tɔgɩ cullu tɩm kʋ daɩ nɩ o kɩ o wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ, nɩ kʋ na pʋpʋnɩ kʋ wɩ: «Wʋlʋ na kɩ Wɛ cullu tɩm na brɩ te tɩn wʋ́ na ŋwɩa kʋ ŋwaanɩ.».

eng: Christ redeemed us from the curse of the Law by becoming a curse for us—because it is written, Everyone who is hung on a tree is cursed .
local: Dɩbam nan na wʋ kɩ kʋlʋ maama Wɛ cullu tɩm na brɩ tɩn, dɩ́ maŋɩ sɩ dɩ́ na cɔgɩm mʋ. Zezi Krisi nan mʋ tɩgɩ tʋʋn-dagara kam baŋa nɩ o ma lɩ dɩbam cɔgɩm dɩm kʋntʋ wʋnɩ. Wɛ ma pa Zezi lǝni dɩbam yuu nɩ o na cɔgɩm dɩlʋ dɩbam ya na maŋɩ sɩ dɩ́ na tɩn. Kʋ yɩ nɩ kʋ na pʋpʋnɩ kʋ wɩ: «Wʋlʋ maama ba na gʋ ba lǝ daa yuu nɩ tɩn, Wɛ mʋ cɔgɩ kʋntʋ tu.».

eng: He redeemed us so that the blessing of Abraham would come to the Gentiles through Christ Jesus, and that we would receive the promise of the Spirit through faith.
local: Zezi Krisi dɛɛn sɛ o tɩ kʋntʋ doŋ mʋ, sɩ kʋ wanɩ kʋ pa Wɛ kɩ dwi-gɛ tiinǝ dɩ lanyɩranɩ, nɩ DƖ dɛɛn na goni ni dɩ Abraham te tɩn. Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ dɩbam wʋ́ wanɩ dɩ́ joŋi Wɛ Joro kʋm, nɩ DƖ na goni ni sɩ DƖ pa dɩbam te tɩn, dɩ́ na kɩ dɩ́ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ DƖ tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, Ill use an example from human experience. No one ignores or makes additions to a validated will.
local: A ko-biǝ-ba, a lagɩ a ma lʋgʋ baŋa woŋo mʋ a ma brɩ abam Wɛ cɩga kam na yɩ te tɩn. Nɔɔna bale na kɩ ni dɩdʋa ba go ni ba pa daanɩ woŋo baŋa nɩ, nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ daa bá wanɩ o cɔgɩ ba ni dɩm kʋntʋ, naa o kɩ woŋo kʋdoŋ o daa wǝli da.

eng: The promises were made to Abraham and to his descendant. It doesnt say, and to the descendants, as if referring to many rather than just one. It says, and to your descendant, who is Christ.
local: Wɛ dɛɛn na goni ni dɩ Abraham tɩn, kʋ yɩ dɩ o naa kʋm dɩ mʋ. Kʋ na pʋpʋnɩ te tɩn, kʋ wʋ tagɩ nɩ o naarʋ. Kʋ pʋpʋnɩ kʋ wɩ o naa mʋ. Kʋ brɩ nɩ kʋ yɩ nɔɔnʋ dɩdʋa taanɩ mʋ, yɩ o naa kʋm kʋntʋ mʋ yɩ Zezi Krisi.

eng: Im saying this: the Law, which came four hundred thirty years later, doesnt invalidate the agreement that was previously validated by God so that it cancels the promise.
local: Kʋlʋ amʋ na lagɩ a ta tɩn mʋ yɩ sɩ, Wɛ dɛɛn goni ni dɩ Abraham, yɩ kʋntʋ kwaga nɩ, bɩna biǝ yana dɩ fiintɔ laan na kɛ tɩn, DƖ daa ma kwe DƖ cullu tɩm DƖ pa Zwifǝ bam. Wɛ cullu tɩm kʋntʋ nan bá wanɩ tɩ cɔgɩ ni dɩlʋ DƖ ya na maŋɩ DƖ go dɩ Abraham tɩn. Tɩ bá wanɩ tɩ pa DƖ ni-gonim dɩm ji kafɛ.

eng: If the inheritance were based upon the Law, it would no longer be from the promise. But God has given it graciously to Abraham through a promise.
local: Wɛ ya na pɛ nɔɔna DƖ pɛɛrɩ dɩm ba na tɔgɩ DƖ cullu tɩm tɩn ŋwaanɩ mʋ, DƖ ni-gonim dɩm ya daa ba jɩgɩ kuri. Dɩ́ nan ye nɩ, Wɛ pɛ Abraham DƖ pɛɛrɩ dɩm DƖ na goni ni dɩd-o tɩn ŋwaanɩ mʋ.

eng: So why was the Law given? It was added because of offenses, until the descendant would come to whom the promise had been made. It was put in place through angels by the hand of a mediator.
local: Kʋ nan na yɩ kʋntʋ, bɛŋwaanɩ mʋ yɩ Wɛ kwe DƖ cullu tɩm DƖ pa Zwifǝ bam? DƖ kwe-tɩ DƖ wǝli DƖ ni-gonim dɩm nɩ, sɩ kʋ wanɩ kʋ pa dɩ́ lwarɩ kʋlʋ na yɩ lwarɩm tɩn mʋ. DƖ cullu tɩm dɛɛn maŋɩ sɩ tɩ taa wʋra, sɩ kʋ vu kʋ yi maŋa kam Abraham naa kʋm na wʋ́ ba lʋgʋ baŋa tɩn mʋ. Wʋntʋ mʋ yɩ wʋlʋ Wɛ na goni DƖ ni dɩm o ŋwaanɩ tɩn. Wɛ dɛɛn tɔgɩ DƖ malɛsɩ sɩm jɩŋa mʋ DƖ kwe DƖ cullu tɩm DƖ pa DƖ nɔɔna bam, yɩ yiginu dɛɛn mʋ wʋ bantʋ dɩ Wɛ tɩtarɩ nɩ.

eng: Now the mediator does not take one side; but God is one.
local: Yiginu na wʋ nɔɔna bale tɩtarɩ nɩ, o ba wʋra nɔɔnʋ dɩdʋa ŋwaanɩ, Wɛ nan yɩ dɩdʋa mʋ. DƖ na goni DƖ ni dɩ Abraham tɩn, DƖ yɔɔrɩ DƖ ŋɔɔnɩ dɩ Abraham tɩtɩ mʋ.

eng: So, is the Law against the promises of God? Absolutely not! If a Law had been given that was able to give life, then righteousness would in fact have come from the Law.
local: Kʋntʋ maama nan brɩ nɩ Wɛ cullu tɩm warɩ tɩ maŋɩ dɩ DƖ ni-gonim dɩm mʋ na? Awo, kʋ daɩ kʋntʋ. Cullu tǝrǝ tɩ na wʋ́ wanɩ tɩ pa nɔɔna na ŋwɩa Wɛ tee nɩ. Cullu tɩntʋ doŋ ya na wʋra, tɩ ya wʋ́ wanɩ tɩ pa nɔɔna na cɩga Wɛ tee nɩ.

eng: But scripture locked up all things under sin, so that the promise based on the faithfulness of Jesus Christ might be given to those who have faith.
local: Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm nan brɩ dɩbam nɩ nabiinǝ maama wʋ lwarɩm dam kuri nɩ mʋ. Kʋntʋ, kʋ yɩ balʋ na kɩ ba wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Zezi Krisi tɩn yɩranɩ mʋ wʋ́ joŋi pɛɛrɩ dɩlʋ Wɛ na goni ni sɩ DƖ pa balʋ na jɩgɩ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ DƖ tɩn.

eng: Before faith came, we were guarded under the Law, locked up until faith that was coming would be revealed.
local: Kʋ daarɩ, kʋ na wʋ́ loori sɩ Zezi ba sɩ dɩ́ kɩ dɩ́ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩd-o tɩn, dɩbam dɛɛn nyɩ nɩ dɩ́ wʋ pɩɩna digǝ nɩ mʋ te, cullu tɩm na cǝŋi dɩbam tɩn ŋwaanɩ, yɩ kʋ vu kʋ yi maŋa kalʋ Wɛ na vɩɩrɩ dɩbam dɩ́ na kɩ dɩ́ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ DƖ te tɩn.

eng: so that the Law became our custodian until Christ so that we might be made righteous by faith.
local: Kʋntʋ mʋ cullu tɩm dɛɛn jɩgɩ dɩbam tɩ kweǝ, sɩ kʋ vu kʋ yi maŋa kam dɩ́ na lwarɩ Zezi Krisi tɩn, sɩ dɩ́ laan na cɩga Wɛ tee nɩ dɩ́ na kɩ dɩ́ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩd-o tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: But now that faith has come, we are no longer under a custodian.
local: Dɩbam laan nan na kɩ dɩ́ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Zezi tɩn, woŋo daa tǝrǝ kʋ na wʋ́ ta te dɩbam.

eng: You are all Gods children through faith in Christ Jesus.
local: Abam na ŋwɩ dɩ Zezi Krisi tɩn, á maama yɩ Wɛ biǝ mʋ á na kɩ á wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ DƖ tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: All of you who were baptized into Christ have clothed yourselves with Christ.
local: Abam wʋlʋ maama ba na miis-o na wʋnɩ tɩn laan ŋwɩ dɩ Zezi Krisi mʋ, yɩ o nyɩ dɩ Zezi tɩtɩ mʋ te.

eng: There is neither Jew nor Greek; there is neither slave nor free; nor is there male and female, for you are all one in Christ Jesus.
local: Kʋntʋ tɩn, kampwara daa tǝri Zwifu dɩ dwi-gɛ tu laŋa nɩ. Kampwara nan ta tǝri gambaa dɩ wʋlʋ na te o tɩtɩ tɩn laŋa nɩ. Kampwara nan tǝri baarʋ dɩ kaanɩ laŋa nɩ dɩ. Abam na ŋwɩ dɩ Zezi Krisi tɩn, á maama yɩ woŋo dɩdʋa mʋ.

eng: Now if you belong to Christ, then indeed you are Abrahams descendants, heirs according to the promise.
local: Abam na yɩ Zezi Krisi nɔɔna tɩn, kʋ pɛ á tɔgɩ á yɩ Abraham naarʋ mʋ, yɩ á wʋ́ joŋi pɛɛrɩ dɩlʋ Wɛ na goni ni sɩ DƖ pa Abraham naarʋ tɩm tɩn.

eng: Im saying that as long as the heirs are minors, they are no different from slaves, though they really are the owners of everything.
local: Kʋlʋ amʋ na lagɩ a ta tɩn, kʋ nyɩ dɩ bu na wʋ́ ba o joŋi o ko sɔŋɔ o taa te te tɩn mʋ. Wʋntʋ ta na yɩ bu maŋa kalʋ tɩn, nɔɔna mʋ yǝni ba nii o baŋa nɩ, o ta ba te o tɩtɩ, yɩ ba nan ye nɩ wʋntʋ mʋ wʋ́ ba o taa te o ko wʋm wǝǝnu tɩm maama. O na yɩ bu kʋntʋ tɩn, nɔɔna mʋ wʋra ba na nii o wǝǝnu tɩm baŋa nɩ ba pa-o, sɩ kʋ taa ve maŋa kam o ko wʋm na pɛ ni sɩ o taa te o wǝǝnu tɩm tɩn.

eng: In the same way, when we were minors, we were also enslaved by this worlds system.
local: Kʋ nan yɩ bɩdwɩ mʋ dɩ dɩbam dɩ. Dɩ́ dɛɛn ta na wʋ lwarɩ Wɛ cɩga kam na yɩ te tɩn, lʋgʋ baŋa wo-yɔɔrʋ mʋ te dɩbam nɩ dɩ́ yɩ gambɛ mʋ te.

eng: But when the fulfillment of the time came, God sent his Son, born through a woman, and born under the Law.
local: Kʋ daarɩ, maŋa kam dɩ́ Ko Wɛ na lagɩ tɩn na sɩɩnɩ ka yi tɩn, DƖ tʋŋɩ DƖ tɩtɩ Bu mʋ yɩ o ba lʋgʋ baŋa. O na tu tɩn, kʋ yɩ kaanɩ mʋ lʋg-o, yɩ o ba o sɛ o tɔgɩ Wɛ cullu tɩm.

eng: This was so he could redeem those under the Law so that we could be adopted.
local: sɩ o wanɩ o vrɩ nɔɔna balʋ cullu tɩm na te tɩn. O ma ŋwɩ dɩ́ lwarɩm jɩnɩ sɩ kʋ pa dɩ́ wanɩ dɩ́ ji Wɛ biǝ.

eng: Because you are sons and daughters, God sent the Spirit of his Son into our hearts, crying, Abba, Father.
local: Á nan na sɩɩnɩ á ji Wɛ biǝ tɩn, DƖ laan tʋŋɩ DƖ Bu wʋm Joro mʋ sɩ kʋ ba kʋ taa wʋ á bɩcara nɩ, yɩ kʋ paɩ dɩ́ bǝ Wɛ nɩ dɩ́ Ko Baba.

eng: Therefore, you are no longer a slave but a son or daughter, and if you are his child, then you are also an heir through God.
local: Kʋntʋ maa brɩ nɩ dɩ́ daa daɩ gambɛ, sɩ dɩ́ laan yɩ Wɛ biǝ mʋ. Dɩ́ nan na yɩ Wɛ biǝ kʋntʋ tɩn, Wɛ wʋ́ pa dɩ́ taá te wo-laarʋ tɩlʋ maama DƖ na tiŋi sɩ DƖ pa DƖ biǝ bam tɩn.

eng: At the time, when you didnt know God, you were enslaved by things that arent gods by nature.
local: Faŋa faŋa tɩn, abam dɛɛn ya yǝri Wɛ, yɩ á pa lʋgʋ baŋa wo-yɔɔrʋ te abam nɩ á yɩ gambɛ mʋ te. Abam dɛɛn paɩ tɩ yɩ wa mʋ, yɩ tɩ yagɩ tɩ daɩ kʋlʋkʋlʋ.

eng: But now, after knowing God , how can you turn back again to the weak and worthless world system? Do you want to be slaves to it again?.
local: Kʋ daarɩ lele kʋntʋ abam laan tu á lwarɩ Wɛ. Kʋ nan na yɩ cɩga, Wɛ lwarɩ abam. Bɛɛ nan mʋ yɩ á laan bʋŋɩ sɩ á daa joori á taá zuli lʋgʋ baŋa wo-yɔɔrʋ tɩlʋ na ba jɩgɩ dam yɩ tɩ ba jɩgɩ kuri dɩ tɩn? Bɛŋwaanɩ mʋ á lagɩ sɩ á joori á ba á taá yɩ tɩ gambɛ?.

eng: You observe religious days and months and seasons and years.
local: Abam yǝni á kuri da yadonnǝ sɩ á taá zuli-ya, dɩ canɩ sɩdonnǝ dɩ mɩmɛ sɩdonnǝ bɩnɩ wʋnɩ dɩ bɩna yadonnǝ dɩ.

eng: Im afraid for you! Perhaps my hard work for you has been for nothing.
local: Amʋ jɩgɩ liǝ mʋ abam ŋwaanɩ, sɩ dɛdoŋ amʋ tɩtʋŋa yam maama a na tʋŋɩ abam tee nɩ tɩn wʋ́ ji kafɛ.

eng: I beg you to be like me, brothers and sisters, because I have become like you! You havent wronged me.
local: A ko-biǝ-ba, a loori abam sɩ á taá lwǝni amʋ á tɔgɩ Wɛ nɩ amʋ na tɔgɩ-DƖ te tɩn, bɛŋwaanɩ amʋ dɩ yɩ nɩ abam na yɩ te tɩn mʋ. A dɛɛn na wʋ abam tee nɩ tɩn, á wʋ kɩ-nɩ kʋlʋkʋlʋ á cɔgɩ.

eng: You know that I first preached the gospel to you because of an illness.
local: Á wʋ́ wanɩ á guli nɩ, kʋ yɩ amʋ yawɩʋ kʋm ŋwaanɩ mʋ pɛ a maŋɩ abam tee nɩ a puli a tɔɔlɩ Wɛ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam a brɩ abam.

eng: Though my poor health burdened you, you didnt look down on me or reject me, but you welcomed me as if I were an angel from God, or as if I were Christ Jesus!.
local: Dɩ kʋntʋ dɩ, a yawɩʋ kʋm na tiini kʋ yaarɩ abam te tɩn, á wʋ sɛ sɩ á yáalɩ-nɩ, á nan wʋ yagɩ-nɩ. Abam nan kɩ-nɩ lanyɩranɩ nɩ Wɛ malɛka mʋ te, yɩ á joŋi-nɩ lanyɩranɩ nɩ Zezi Krisi tɩtɩ mʋ te.

eng: Where then is the great attitude that you had? I swear that, if possible, you would have dug out your eyes and given them to me.
local: Abam dɛɛn jɩgɩ wʋpolo dɩ amʋ. A ye lanyɩranɩ nɩ, á na jɩgɩ wʋpolo dɩ amʋ te tɩn, á ya na waɩ á yiǝ tɩtɩ dɩ á lǝnǝ, á ya wʋ́ lǝni-ya á pa-nɩ. Bɛɛ nan mʋ kɩa yɩ á wʋpolo kʋm kʋntʋ je?.

eng: So then, have I become your enemy by telling you the truth?.
local: Amʋ nan na tagɩ cɩga dɩ abam tɩn laan mʋ pɛ a ji á dʋm na?.

eng: They are so concerned about you, though not with good intentions. Rather, they want to shut you out so that you would run after them.
local: Kʋ nan na yɩ nɔɔna balʋ na pipiri Wɛ cɩga kam yɩ a maŋɩ a ta ba taanɩ tɩn, bantʋ kwaanɩ sɩ ba pa á wʋbʋŋa taa tɔgɩ-ba mʋ, yɩ kʋ nan ba zǝni abam. Ba lagɩ sɩ ba cɔgɩ amʋ dɩ abam mʋ daanɩ, sɩ á daarɩ á taá tɔgɩ bantʋ.

eng: However, its always good to have people concerned about you with good intentions, and not just when Im there with you.
local: Nɔɔnʋ na kwaanɩ o tɔgɩ wʋlʋ na tɔgɩ cɩga lanyɩranɩ tɩn kwaga, kʋntʋ lana. Kʋ lana sɩ á taá tɔg-o kʋntʋ maŋa maama mʋ, sɩ kʋ wʋ maŋɩ sɩ kʋ taa yɩ maŋa kalʋ yɩranɩ amʋ na wʋ́ ta wʋ abam tee nɩ tɩn.

eng: My little children, Im going through labor pains again until Christ is formed in you.
local: A biǝ-ba, amʋ daa ta tiini a jɩgɩ yaara abam ŋwaanɩ, nɩ kaanɩ na vri pugǝ te tɩn mʋ. Amʋ nan wʋ́ ta jɩgɩ liǝ kʋntʋ dɩ abam, sɩ kʋ vu kʋ yi maŋa kam á na wʋ́ ta ŋwɩ nɩ Zezi Krisi na lagɩ te tɩn.

eng: But I wish I could be with you now and change how I sound, because Im at a loss about you.
local: Amʋ ya tiini a lagɩ sɩ a taa wʋ abam tee nɩ mʋ lele kʋntʋ, sɩ a wanɩ a fɔgɩ a ŋɔɔnɩ wǝǝnu tɩm kʋntʋ a brɩ abam, sɩ kʋ zǝni abam. Bɛŋwaanɩ amʋ daa yǝri kʋlʋ a na wʋ́ ta a brɩ abam tɩn.

eng: Tell me—those of you who want to be under the Law—dont you listen to the Law?.
local: Abam balʋ na lagɩ sɩ á sɛ Wɛ cullu tɩm, á daa ta wʋ lwarɩ Wɛ cullu tɔnɔ kʋm na brɩ te tɩn.

eng: Its written that Abraham had two sons, one by the slave woman and one by the free woman.
local: Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm brɩ dɩbam nɩ dɩ́ nabaarʋ Abraham dɛɛn jɩgɩ bǝkǝri sɩle mʋ. O lʋgɩ dɩdʋa kam dɩ gamba-kana na wʋ o sɔŋɔ nɩ tɩn. Kʋ daarɩ o tɩtɩ kaanɩ wʋm dɩ ma lʋ bǝkǝrǝ o wǝli da. O tɩtɩ kaanɩ wʋm yɩrɩ mʋ Sara, kʋ daarɩ wʋlʋ na yɩ gambaa tɩn yɩrɩ mʋ Agaarɩ.

eng: The son by the slave woman was conceived the normal way, but the son by the free woman was conceived through a promise.
local: Bǝkǝrǝ kalʋ gamba-kana kam na lʋgɩ tɩn lʋra kam dɛ nabiinǝ lʋra cwǝŋǝ na yɩ te tɩn mʋ. Kʋ daarɩ bǝkǝrǝ kalʋ o tɩtɩ kaanɩ wʋm na lʋgɩ tɩn, kʋ yɩ Wɛ na goni ni DƖ pa-o nɩ oó lʋ tɩn ŋwaanɩ mʋ o lʋga.

eng: These things are an allegory: the women are two covenants. One is from Mount Sinai, which gives birth to slave children; this is Hagar.
local: Kʋ maa yɩ nyɩnyʋgʋ mʋ dɩ kaana bam kʋntʋ bale, sɩ kʋ brɩ dɩbam cwe sɩle tɔgɩm na yɩ te tɩn. Kaana bale bam kʋntʋ ta brɩ dɩbam Wɛ na goni DƖ ni DƖ pa DƖ nɔɔna bam kuni bɩle te tɩn mʋ. Agaarɩ mʋ nyɩ dɩ cullu tɩlʋ Wɛ na pɛ Zwifǝ bam Sinayi piu kʋm yuu nɩ tɩn. Balʋ na tɔgɩ cullu tɩm kʋntʋ tɩn nyɩ dɩ gambɛ mʋ, nɩ Agaarɩ dɩ o biǝ na yɩ gambɛ te tɩn.

eng: Hagar is Mount Sinai in Arabia, and she corresponds to the present-day Jerusalem, because the city is in slavery with her children.
local: Agaarɩ mʋ nyɩ dɩ Sinayi piu kʋm, kʋ na wʋ Arabi nɩ tɩn. Zwifǝ bam dɩ nan tɔgɩ cullu tɩlʋ Wɛ na pɛ dáanɩ tɩn mʋ. Kʋntʋ tɩn, Zeruzalɛm na wʋra zɩm dɩ kʋ nɔn-biǝ bam maama tɩn, ba dɩ yɩ gambɛ mʋ, cullu tɩm na te-ba tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: But the Jerusalem that is above is free, and she is our mother.
local: Kʋ nan na yɩ Wɛ tɩtɩ tɩʋ Zeruzalɛm kʋlʋ na wʋ wɛyuu nɩ tɩn, kʋntʋ yɩ tɩʋ kʋlʋ dɩbam na yɩ kʋ nɔn-biǝ tɩn mʋ. Kʋ maa nyɩ dɩ dɩbam nu wʋlʋ na lʋgɩ dɩbam yɩ dɩ́ daɩ gambɛ, nɩ Sara dɛɛn na lʋgɩ o bu wʋm yɩ o daɩ gambaa te tɩn.

eng: Its written: Rejoice, barren woman, you who have not given birth . Break out with a shout, you who have not suffered labor pains; because the woman who has been deserted will have many more children than the woman who has a husband .
local: Kʋ pʋpʋnɩ Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm wʋnɩ kʋ wɩ: «Nmʋ wʋlʋ na yɩ ka-dʋgʋ yɩ n wʋ jaanɩ pugǝ n lʋ tɩn, ta n kɩ wʋpolo sɩ n ta n caka, nmʋ na wʋ́ di ywǝǝni tɩn ŋwaanɩ. Bɛŋwaanɩ kaanɩ wʋlʋ barʋ ya na yag-o tɩn laan wʋ́ ba o taa jɩgɩ biǝ zanzan o dwǝni kaanɩ wʋlʋ na jɩgɩ barʋ tɩn.».

eng: Brothers and sisters, you are children of the promise like Isaac.
local: A ko-biǝ-ba, kʋ na yɩ abam, á laan jigi Wɛ tɩtɩ biǝ mʋ DƖ ni-gonim dɩm ŋwaanɩ, nɩnɛɛnɩ Sara bu Yizakɩ lʋra kam na dɛ te tɩn.

eng: But just as it was then, so it is now also: the one who was conceived the normal way harassed the one who was conceived by the Spirit.
local: Faŋa faŋa tɩn, Abraham bu wʋlʋ lʋra kam na dɛ nabiinǝ lʋra na tɔgɩ te tɩn mʋ bɛɛsɩ o bu wʋlʋ lʋra na tɔgɩ Wɛ Joro kʋm wʋbʋŋa na yɩ te tɩn. Dɩ zɩm maama dɩ, Wɛ tɩtɩ biǝ bam ta naɩ bɛɛsa kʋntʋ doŋ mʋ.

eng: But what does the scripture say? Throw out the slave woman and her son, because the slave womans son wont share the inheritance with the free womans son .
local: Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm nan brɩ dɩbam kʋ wɩ: «Zǝli kaanɩ wʋlʋ na yɩ gambaa tɩn dɩ o bu wʋm, sɩ ba nuŋi n sɔŋɔ nɩ. Bɛŋwaanɩ kʋ wʋ maŋɩ sɩ bu wʋm kʋntʋ tɔgɩ dɩ n tɩtɩ kaanɩ wʋm bu wʋm o taa te nmʋ wǝǝnu tɩm.».

eng: Therefore, brothers and sisters, we arent the slave womans children, but we are the free womans children.
local: Kʋntʋ, a ko-biǝ-ba, dɩ́ na yɩ Wɛ biǝ tɩn, kʋ brɩ nɩ dɩ́ yɩ Abraham tɩtɩ kaanɩ wʋm biǝ mʋ, yɩ dɩ́ te dɩ́ tɩtɩ, sɩ dɩ́ daɩ gambaa kam biǝ.

eng: Christ has set us free for freedom. Therefore, stand firm and dont submit to the bondage of slavery again.
local: Zezi Krisi na vrɩ dɩbam o yagɩ tɩn, kʋ yɩ sɩ dɩ́ taá te dɩ́ tɩtɩ mʋ. Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ á fɔgɩ á cɩ á tɩtɩ, sɩ á daa yɩ sɛ á tɔgɩ cwǝŋǝ kalʋ na wʋ́ pa á joori á ji gambɛ tɩn.

eng: Look, I, Paul, am telling you that if you have yourselves circumcised, having Christ wont help you.
local: Nan cǝgi-na amʋ Pooli na lagɩ a ta kʋlʋ dɩ abam tɩn. Abam na sɛ sɩ ba go abam nɩ Zwifǝ bam cullu tɩm na brɩ sɩ ba go ba bǝkǝri te tɩn, á daa ba jɩgɩ nyɔɔrɩ Zezi Krisi tee nɩ.

eng: Again I swear to every man who has himself circumcised that he is required to do the whole Law.
local: A ta lagɩ a ta a brɩ abam jaja nɩ, abam wʋlʋ maama na sɛ sɩ ba go-o tɩn, kʋntʋ tu maŋɩ sɩ o sɛ Zwifǝ bam cullu tɩm maama mʋ.

eng: You people who are trying to be made righteous by the Law have been estranged from Christ. You have fallen away from grace!.
local: Abam balʋ na bʋŋɩ sɩ á na cɩga Wɛ tee nɩ cullu tɩm tɔgɩm ŋwaanɩ tɩn, abam pɔɔrɩ mʋ dɩ Zezi Krisi, yɩ o zaanɩ dɩm daa tǝri á tee nɩ.

eng: We eagerly wait for the hope of righteousness through the Spirit by faith.
local: Kʋ daarɩ Wɛ Joro kʋm nan wʋ dɩbam balʋ na kɩ dɩ́ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Zezi tɩn tee nɩ, yɩ dɩ́ jɩgɩ tɩɩna lanyɩranɩ nɩ dɩ́ wʋ́ na cɩga Wɛ tee nɩ.

eng: Being circumcised or not being circumcised doesnt matter in Christ Jesus, but faith working through love does matter.
local: Dɩ́ na ŋwɩ dɩ Zezi Krisi tɩn, dɩ́ na goni dɩ́ bǝkǝri naa dɩ́ zɩ wʋ goni dɩ, kʋ daɩ kʋlʋkʋlʋ. Woŋo kʋlʋ nan na jɩgɩ kuri tɩn mʋ yɩ sɩ dɩ́ taá jɩgɩ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Zezi, sɩ kʋ pa dɩ́ taá soe daanɩ lanyɩranɩ.

eng: You were running well—who stopped you from obeying the truth?.
local: Abam dɛɛn yɔɔrɩ á tɔgɩ Wɛ cwǝŋǝ lanyɩranɩ mʋ. Wɔɔ nan mʋ cɩgɩ á cwǝŋǝ sɩ á daa yɩ sɛ Wɛ cɩga kam?.

eng: This line of reasoning doesnt come from the one who calls you.
local: Wʋlʋ na brɩ abam kʋntʋ tɩn, kʋ daɩ Wɛ dɩlʋ na bǝŋi abam sɩ á taá tɔgɩ-DƖ tɩn.

eng: A little yeast works through the whole lump of dough.
local: Kʋ nyɩ nɩ dɩ́ na yǝni dɩ́ tɛ te dɩ́ wɩ: «Dabɩlɩ fɩnfɩɩn na wʋ dɩpɛ mun-lɛɛrɩ wʋnɩ, kʋʋ́ pa dɩ maama fʋlɩ mʋ.».

eng: Im convinced about you in the Lord that you wont think any other way. But the one who is confusing you will pay the penalty, whoever that may be.
local: Dɩbam maama na ŋwɩ dɩ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi Krisi tɩn, amʋ ye nɩ dɩ́ wʋ́ ta jɩgɩ wʋbʋŋ-dɩdʋa mʋ. Wʋlʋ nan na jɩgɩ abam wʋbʋŋa o vugimi tɩn, Wɛ wʋ́ cɔgɩ kʋntʋ tu o kǝm-balɔrɔ kʋm ŋwaanɩ, dɩ o na maŋɩ o yɩ te dɩ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, if Im still preaching circumcision, why am I still being harassed? In that case, the offense of the cross would be canceled.
local: A ko-biǝ-ba, amʋ ba brɩ nɩ, nɔɔnʋ na tɔgɩ Wɛ, o maŋɩ sɩ o go. A ya na brɩ kʋntʋ doŋ, nɔɔna bá bɛɛsɩ-nɩ a zaasɩm dɩm ŋwaanɩ, bɛŋwaanɩ a na brɩ Zezi na tɩgɩ te tʋʋn-dagara kam baŋa nɩ tɩn ya bá ta yɩ ta-lɔŋɔ dɩ nɔɔna.

eng: I wish that the ones who are upsetting you would castrate themselves!.
local: Amʋ nan na bʋŋɩ te tɩn, kʋ yaá ta lana sɩ balʋ na jɩgɩ abam ba yaara dɩ gwǝŋǝ kam tɩn lɛ ba lwɩ ba tɩtɩ ba wǝli da, sɩ kʋ ta daɩ ba bǝkǝri gonim yɩranɩ.

eng: You were called to freedom, brothers and sisters; only dont let this freedom be an opportunity to indulge your selfish impulses, but serve each other through love.
local: A ko-biǝ-ba, Wɛ na bǝŋi abam sɩ á taá tɔgɩ-DƖ tɩn, kʋ yɩ sɩ á laan taá te á tɩtɩ mʋ. Á nan na sɩɩnɩ á te á tɩtɩ kʋntʋ tɩn, kʋ daɩ nɩ á wʋ́ ta kɩ wo-yɔɔrʋ tɩlʋ maama á wʋbʋŋa na lagɩ tɩn. Á nan taá tiini á zǝni daanɩ dɩ sono.

eng: All the Law has been fulfilled in a single statement: Love your neighbor as yourself .
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ Wɛ niǝ yam maama brɩ woŋo dɩdʋa mʋ, nɩ nɔɔnʋ maŋɩ sɩ o taa soe o doŋ nɩ o na soe o tɩtɩ te tɩn.

eng: But if you bite and devour each other, be careful that you dont get eaten up by each other!.
local: Abam nan na jɩgɩ daanɩ nɩ vara na yǝni ba jɩgɩ daanɩ yɩ ba dʋnɩ daanɩ te tɩn, á taá ye sɩ á wʋ́ ba á cɔgɩ daanɩ dɩdʋa dɩdʋa á ti.

eng: I say be guided by the Spirit and you wont carry out your selfish desires.
local: Nan cǝgi-na kʋlʋ kʋm a na lagɩ a ta tɩn. Pa-na Wɛ Joro kʋm taa vaɩ abam á ŋwɩa maama wʋnɩ, sɩ á yɩ taá sɛ á tɔgɩ wo-yɔɔrʋ tɩlʋ á fra na zʋʋrɩ tɩn.

eng: A persons selfish desires are set against the Spirit, and the Spirit is set against ones selfish desires. They are opposed to each other, so you shouldnt do whatever you want to do.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ nabiinǝ wʋbʋŋa na lagɩ kʋlʋ tɩn ba jɩgɩ fra dɩ Wɛ Joro kʋm. Wɛ Joro kʋm dɩ fra na zʋʋrɩ kʋlʋ tɩn dɩ nan ba jɩgɩ fra dɩ nabiinǝ. Kʋ maa brɩ nɩ wǝǝnu tɩm kʋntʋ tɩle wʋbʋŋa warɩ ya maŋɩ daanɩ. Kʋ ma pa á daa warɩ á wʋbʋŋa wǝǝnu á kɩ.

eng: But if you are being led by the Spirit, you arent under the Law.
local: Wɛ Joro kʋm nan na vaŋɩ abam, cullu tɩm daa wʋ maŋɩ sɩ tɩ taa te abam.

eng: The actions that are produced by selfish motives are obvious, since they include sexual immorality, moral corruption, doing whatever feels good.
local: Nabiinǝ wʋbʋŋa na lagɩ sɩ ba taa kɩ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ tɩn mʋ tɩntʋ, tɩ yɩ jaja mʋ: kʋ yɩ boorim dwi maama, dɩ wo-digiru tɩtʋŋa, dɩ wo-zɔɔna kǝnǝ dwi maama.

eng: idolatry, drug use and casting spells, hate, fighting, obsession, losing your temper, competitive opposition, conflict, selfishness, group rivalry.
local: dɩ jwǝnǝ kaanɩm, dɩ liri dim, dɩ ka culi daanɩ, dɩ ka ja daanɩ, dɩ wʋ-gʋʋ, dɩ ban-zɔŋɔ, dɩ ka beeri ka yɩratʋ zǝnǝ, dɩ ka yɩ sɛ daanɩ, dɩ ka pɔɔrɩ daanɩ.

eng: jealousy, drunkenness, partying, and other things like that. I warn you as I have already warned you, that those who do these kinds of things wont inherit Gods kingdom.
local: dɩ wo-swǝnǝ, dɩ sa-nyɔrɩ, dɩ nɔn-kwǝlim, dɩ ka kɩ wo-yɔɔrʋ tɩdonnǝ. A nan ta wʋ́ fɔgɩ a kaanɩ abam a wǝli da nɩ, balʋ na yǝni ba kɩ wǝǝnu tɩm kʋntʋ dwi tɩn, ba bá tɔgɩ ba zʋ Wɛ paarɩ dɩm wʋnɩ.

eng: But the fruit of the Spirit is love, joy, peace, patience, kindness, goodness, faithfulness.
local: Kʋ daarɩ Wɛ Joro kʋm na paɩ nɔɔna yɩ te tɩn mʋ tɩntʋ: Kʋ paɩ nɔɔna jɩgɩ sono mʋ, dɩ wʋpolo, dɩ wʋ-zuru, dɩ ban-pʋnʋ, dɩ da-zulǝ, dɩ lanyɩranɩ kǝm, dɩ cɩga tɔgɩm.

eng: gentleness, and self-control. There is no law against things like this.
local: dɩ wʋ-bono, dɩ ka ja n tɩtɩ. Culu nan tǝrǝ kʋ na vɩn wo-laarʋ tɩntʋ.

eng: Those who belong to Christ Jesus have crucified the self with its passions and its desires.
local: Kʋ na yɩ dɩbam balʋ na yɩ Zezi Krisi nɔɔna tɩn, dɩ́ lɩ dɩ́ wʋbʋŋ-doorǝ yam dɩ́ yagɩ, yɩ ya daa ba te dɩbam sɩ dɩ́ taá kɩ wo-yɔɔrʋ tɩlʋ dɩ́ fra na zʋʋrɩ tɩn.

eng: If we live by the Spirit, lets follow the Spirit.
local: Wɛ Joro kʋm na pɛ dɩ́ na ŋwɩ-dʋŋa tɩn, dɩ́ pa-na kʋ taa vaŋɩ dɩbam dɩ́ ŋwɩa maama wʋnɩ.

eng: Lets not become arrogant, make each other angry, or be jealous of each other.
local: Dɩ́ nan yɩ kɩ kamunni da-yɩranɩ sɩ dɩ́ pa da-wʋrʋ zaŋɩ naa dɩ́ taa jɩgɩ wʋ-gʋʋ daanɩ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, if a person is caught doing something wrong, you who are spiritual should restore someone like this with a spirit of gentleness. Watch out for yourselves so you wont be tempted too.
local: A ko-biǝ-ba, á na nɛ nɩ nɔɔnʋ kɩ kǝm o tusi, abam balʋ Wɛ Joro kʋm na vaŋɩ tɩn maŋɩ sɩ á zuri á yɩra mʋ á brɩ-o dɩ wʋ-bono, sɩ o joori o tɔgɩ cɩga cwǝŋǝ. Á nan taá yɩrɩ á tɩtɩ, sɩ kʋ yɩ zaŋɩ kʋ pa abam dɩ daa tusi.

eng: Carry each others burdens and so you will fulfill the law of Christ.
local: Á taá zǝni daanɩ á cana wʋnɩ, sɩ á na kɩ kʋntʋ mʋ á sɛ Zezi Krisi ni dɩm o na pɛ tɩn.

eng: If anyone thinks they are important when they arent, theyre fooling themselves.
local: Abam wʋlʋ na bʋŋɩ o paɩ o yɩ kamunu yɩ o yagɩ o daɩ kʋlʋkʋlʋ tɩn, kʋntʋ tu ganɩ o tɩtɩ mʋ.

eng: Each person should test their own work and be happy with doing a good job and not compare themselves with others.
local: Nɔɔnʋ maama maŋɩ sɩ o taa nii o tɩtɩ tɩtʋŋa na yɩ te tɩn mʋ. Kʋntʋ tu nan na nɛ nɩ o tɩtʋŋa yam lana, o laan wʋ́ wanɩ o taa jɩgɩ wʋpolo dɩ o tɩtɩ na kɩ kʋlʋ tɩn má, kʋ daɩ sɩ o kwe o maŋɩ dɩ o doŋ tɩtʋŋa na yɩ te tɩn.

eng: Each person will have to carry their own load.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ nɔɔnʋ maama maŋɩ sɩ o tʋŋɩ tɩtʋŋɩ dɩlʋ Wɛ na pɛ-o tɩn mʋ.

eng: Those who are taught the word should share all good things with their teacher.
local: Nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ ba na zaas-o Wɛ taanɩ tɩn maŋɩ sɩ o kɩ o na jɩgɩ kʋlʋ tɩn mʋ o pa wʋlʋ na zaas-o tɩn.

eng: Make no mistake, God is not mocked. A person will harvest what they plant.
local: Á yɩ zaŋɩ á ganɩ á tɩtɩ, sɩ nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ bá wanɩ o sǝgi o na kɩ kʋlʋ tɩn Wɛ yigǝ nɩ. Nɔɔnʋ tɩtʋŋa na wʋ́ pa o na nyɔɔrɩ dɩlʋ tɩn nyɩ dɩ valʋ na dugi o kara yɩ o maŋɩ sɩ o joori o ba o zagɩ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ dwi o na dugi tɩn mʋ.

eng: Those who plant only for their own benefit will harvest devastation from their selfishness, but those who plant for the benefit of the Spirit will harvest eternal life from the Spirit.
local: Nɔɔnʋ nan na tʋŋɩ wo-yɔɔrʋ tɩlʋ o tɩtɩ wʋbʋŋa na lagɩ tɩn, o nyɔɔrɩ mʋ wʋ́ ba taa yɩ tʋʋnɩ. Kʋ daarɩ nɔɔnʋ nan na tʋŋɩ tɩtʋŋa yalʋ Wɛ Joro kʋm wʋbʋŋa na lagɩ tɩn, kʋntʋ tu nyɔɔrɩ mʋ wʋ́ ta yɩ Wɛ ŋwɩ-dʋŋa kalʋ na ba tiǝ DƖ Joro kʋm na wʋ́ pa-o tɩn.

eng: Lets not get tired of doing good, because in time well have a harvest if we dont give up.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ, dɩ́ nan yɩ pa yawɔrɔ zʋ dɩbam sɩ dɩ́ yagɩ lanyɩranɩ kǝm. Dɩ́ na fɔgɩ dɩ́ zɩgɩ kǝŋkǝŋ, dɩ́ laan wʋ́ ba dɩ́ na nyɔɔrɩ dɩlʋ na lana tɩn.

eng: So then, lets work for the good of all whenever we have an opportunity, and especially for those in the household of faith.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ, dɩ́ na nɛ pwǝlǝ maŋa dɩ maŋa, dɩ́ maŋɩ sɩ dɩ́ taá kɩ lanyɩranɩ dɩ nɔɔna maama, kʋ na dwe dɩdɩ dɩ dɩ́ ko-biǝ balʋ dɩ na jɩgɩ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Zezi Krisi tɩn.

eng: Look at the large letters Im making with my own handwriting!.
local: Nii-na, amʋ tɩtɩ laan mʋ mɛ a jɩŋa a pʋpʋnɩ pʋpʋn-bu-kamunǝ yantʋ sɩ a pa abam.

eng: Whoever wants to look good by human standards will try to get you to be circumcised, but only so they wont be harassed for the cross of Christ.
local: Kʋ na yɩ nɔɔna balʋ na kwaanɩ sɩ ba fɩn abam sɩ á taá gonǝ Zwifǝ bam cullu tɩm ŋwaanɩ tɩn, bantʋ yɩ balʋ na lagɩ sɩ ba na yɩrɩ mʋ nɔɔna tee nɩ dɩ ba na kɩ ba tɩtɩ te tɩn. Ba nan ba lagɩ sɩ nɔɔna taa bɛɛsɩ-ba. Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ ba bá sɛ sɩ ba brɩ nɔɔna nɩ Wɛ wʋ́ vrɩ-ba lwarɩm wʋnɩ Zezi Krisi na tɩgɩ tʋʋn-dagara kam baŋa nɩ tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: Those who are circumcised dont observe the Law themselves, but they want you to be circumcised, so they can boast about your physical body.
local: Balʋ bam ba na sɛ sɩ ba taa goni tɩn tɩtɩ nan ba tɔgɩ Wɛ cullu tɩm cɩga cɩga. Ba nan lagɩ sɩ ba pa abam dɩ sɛ gwǝŋǝ kam mʋ, sɩ kʋ pa ba na cwǝŋǝ ba taa ŋɔɔnɩ ba magɩ ba nyɔɔna nɩ abam sɛ á go nɩ bantʋ te.

eng: But as for me, God forbid that I should boast about anything except for the cross of our Lord Jesus Christ. The world has been crucified to me through him, and I have been crucified to the world.
local: Kʋ nan na yɩ amʋ, woŋo kʋlʋ yɩranɩ amʋ na wʋ́ ta jɩgɩ a ŋɔɔnɩ dɩ wʋpolo tɩn yɩ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi Krisi na tɩgɩ tʋʋn-dagara kam baŋa nɩ o ma vrɩ nɔɔna te tɩn mʋ. Kʋ nan yɩ Zezi Krisi tʋʋn-dagara kam ŋwaanɩ lʋgʋ kʋntʋ wǝǝnu tɩm nyɩ nɩ tɩ tɩgɩ mʋ, tɩ daa ba jɩgɩ kuri dɩ amʋ, yɩ a dɩ nyɩ dɩ tʋ mʋ dɩ wǝǝnu tɩntʋ.

eng: Being circumcised or not being circumcised doesnt mean anything. What matters is a new creation.
