local: Nmʋ na gonǝ, naa n na wʋ goni dɩ, kʋntʋ daɩ kʋlʋkʋlʋ. Woŋo kʋlʋ nan na jɩgɩ kuri tɩn mʋ yɩ sɩ n na ŋwɩ-dʋŋa Wɛ tee nɩ.

eng: May peace and mercy be on whoever follows this rule and on Gods Israel.
local: Kʋ nan na yɩ balʋ na sɛ kwiǝ yam kʋntʋ tɩn, Wɛ wʋ́ pa-ba wʋ-zuru yɩ DƖ duri ba ŋwaŋa lanyɩranɩ, kʋ wǝli dɩ balʋ maama na yɩ DƖ tɩtɩ nɔɔna cɩga cɩga tɩn.

eng: From now on, no one should bother me because I bear the marks of Jesus on my body.
local: A daa ba lagɩ sɩ nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ joori o yaarɩ-nɩ, bɛŋwaanɩ amʋ na maŋɩ a jɩgɩ ŋwandaala yalʋ a yɩra nɩ tɩn brɩ nɩ Zezi mʋ te-nɩ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, may the grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with your spirit. Amen.
local: A ko-biǝ-ba, dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi Krisi wʋ́ pa abam yu-yoŋo. Amina.

eng: From Paul, an apostle of Christ Jesus by Gods will. To the holy and faithful people in Christ Jesus in Ephesus.
local: Amʋ Pooli wʋlʋ Wɛ na kuri dɩ DƖ tɩtɩ wʋbʋŋa sɩ a taa yɩ Zezi Krisi tɩntʋŋnʋ tɩn mʋ pʋpʋnɩ tɔnɔ kʋntʋ. A pʋpʋnɩ sɩ a pa abam balʋ na yɩ Wɛ nɔɔna yɩ á zʋʋrɩ Efɛɛzɩ nɩ tɩn, abam balʋ na kɩ á wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Zezi Krisi tɩn.

eng: Grace and peace to you from God our Father and our Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Dɩ́ Ko Wɛ dɩ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi Krisi wʋ́ pa abam yazurǝ dɩ yu-yoŋo.

eng: Bless the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ! He has blessed us in Christ with every spiritual blessing that comes from heaven.
local: Dɩ́ zuli-na Wɛ dɩlʋ na yɩ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi Krisi Ko tɩn. Dɩbam na ŋwɩ dɩ Zezi Krisi tɩn mʋ pɛ Wɛ kɩ dɩbam lanyɩranɩ. DƖ ma pa dɩbam wo-ŋʋnnʋ tɩlʋ maama na yɩ DƖ Joro kʋm nyɩm yɩ tɩ nuŋi DƖ sɔŋɔ kʋm nɩ tɩn.

eng: God chose us in Christ to be holy and blameless in Gods presence before the creation of the world.
local: Kʋ na loori sɩ Wɛ kɩ lʋgʋ baŋa tɩn, DƖ maŋɩ DƖ da yigǝ DƖ kuri dɩbam mʋ sɩ dɩ́ taá yɩ DƖ nɔɔna Zezi Krisi ŋwaanɩ, sɩ dɩ́ taá jɩgɩ wʋ-poŋo DƖ yigǝ nɩ, sɩ dɩ́ yɩ tusi.

eng: God destined us to be his adopted children through Jesus Christ because of his love. This was according to his goodwill and plan.
local: Wɛ na soe dɩbam tɩn ŋwaanɩ mʋ DƖ wuuri DƖ kɩ DƖ wʋbʋŋa nɩ, sɩ DƖ pa dɩ́ tɔgɩ dɩ́ ji DƖ biǝ Zezi Krisi ŋwaanɩ.

eng: and to honor his glorious grace that he has given to us freely through the Son whom he loves.
local: Kʋntʋ, dɩ́ zuli-na Wɛ, DƖ pɛɛrɩ dɩm na yɩ kamunu yɩ dɩ ba jɩgɩ doŋ tɩn ŋwaanɩ. DƖ kwe-dɩ DƖ pa dɩbam zaanɩ, DƖ Bu-sono Zezi na vrɩ dɩbam lwarɩm wʋnɩ tɩn ŋwaanɩ mʋ.

eng: We have been ransomed through his Sons blood, and we have forgiveness for our failures based on his overflowing grace.
local: Kʋ yɩ Zezi Krisi na tɩga yɩ o jana nuŋi tɩn ŋwaanɩ mʋ o mɛ o ŋwɩ dɩ́ lwarɩm dɩm jɩnɩ, sɩ kʋ pa Wɛ yagɩ dɩ́ lwarɩm DƖ ma cɛ dɩbam. Mʋ Wɛ na kɩ te DƖ brɩ DƖ zaanɩ dɩm na tiini dɩ dagɩ te.

eng: which he poured over us with wisdom and understanding.
local: yɩ DƖ ma-dɩ DƖ zǝni dɩbam kʋ ja gaalɩ. DƖ ma pa dɩ́ na swan dwi maama dɩ wʋbʋŋ-ŋʋna lanyɩranɩ.

eng: God revealed his hidden design to us, which is according to his goodwill and the plan that he intended to accomplish through his Son.
local: DƖ ma pa dɩ́ lwarɩ DƖ cɩga kalʋ dɛɛn na sǝgi tɩn. Mʋ woŋo kʋlʋ DƖ na maŋɩ DƖ lɩ wʋbʋŋa sɩ DƖ tɔgɩ Zezi Krisi ŋwaanɩ DƖ kɩ tɩn.

eng: This is what God planned for the climax of all times: to bring all things together in Christ, the things in heaven along with the things on earth.
local: Wɛ nan bʋŋɩ sɩ, maŋa kam DƖ na lagɩ tɩn na yi ka ti, DƖ wʋ́ pa DƖ wʋbʋŋa sɩɩnɩ ya kɩ, sɩ wǝǝnu maama la daanɩ sɩ Zezi Krisi taa yɩ tɩ yuutu, kʋ na yɩ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ na wʋ wɛyuu nɩ dɩ tɩga baŋa nɩ tɩn maama.

eng: We have also received an inheritance in Christ. We were destined by the plan of God, who accomplishes everything according to his design.
local: Kʋ yɩ Zezi Krisi ŋwaanɩ mʋ Wɛ kuri dɩbam sɩ dɩ́ taá yɩ DƖ nɔɔna. Kʋntʋ mʋ yɩ kʋlʋ Wɛ na maŋɩ DƖ kɩ DƖ wʋbʋŋa nɩ sɩ DƖ kɩ DƖ pa dɩbam tɩn. Dɩntʋ mʋ yɩ dɩlʋ na paɩ wǝǝnu maama sɩɩnɩ tɩ kɩ yɩ tɩ tɔgɩ DƖ wʋbʋŋa na lagɩ te tɩn.

eng: We are called to be an honor to Gods glory because we were the first to hope in Christ.
local: Kʋ nan yɩ dɩbam balʋ na dɛ yigǝ dɩ́ jɩgɩ tɩɩna dɩ Zezi Krisi tɩn mʋ Wɛ dɛɛn kuri, sɩ dɩ́ taá ŋwɩ te na wʋ́ pa DƖ na zulǝ DƖ zaanɩ kamunu kʋm ŋwaanɩ tɩn.

eng: You too heard the word of truth in Christ, which is the good news of your salvation. You were sealed with the promised Holy Spirit because you believed in Christ.
local: Kʋntʋ, abam balʋ dɩ laan na tu á sɛ Wɛ cɩga kam tɩn, abam ni Wɛ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kalʋ na pɛ á na vrɩm lwarɩm wʋnɩ tɩn, yɩ á kɩ á wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Zezi Krisi. Á na ŋwɩ dɩd-o kʋntʋ tɩn, Wɛ ma kɩ DƖ Joro kʋm á bɩcara nɩ, nɩnɛɛnɩ DƖ na maŋɩ DƖ go ni sɩ DƖ kɩ te tɩn, sɩ kʋ taa yɩ nyɩnyʋgʋ kʋlʋ na brɩ nɩ á yɩ DƖ nɔɔna tɩn.

eng: The Holy Spirit is the down payment on our inheritance, which is applied toward our redemption as Gods own people, resulting in the honor of Gods glory.
local: Wɛ na pɛ dɩbam DƖ Joro kʋm tɩn, kʋ pɛ dɩ́ lwarɩ nɩ dɩ́ laan wʋ́ ba dɩ́ na wo-laarʋ tɩlʋ maama Wɛ na bʋŋɩ sɩ DƖ pa dɩbam tɩn, sɩ dɩ́ taá cǝgi sɩ kʋ vu kʋ yi maŋa kam Wɛ na wʋ́ ba DƖ joŋi dɩbam balʋ maama na yɩ DƖ nɔɔna tɩn, yɩ kʋ maama wʋ́ pa Wɛ na zulǝ zanzan.

eng: Since I heard about your faith in the Lord Jesus and your love for all Gods people, this is the reason that.
local: Wɛ na kɩ te maama DƖ pa abam tɩn ŋwaanɩ mʋ, a kɩ DƖ le abam ŋwaanɩ maŋa maama. A ni abam ŋwa nɩ á tɔgɩ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi dɩ á wʋ-dɩdʋa, yɩ á kwǝri á soe Wɛ nɔɔna bam maama.

eng: I dont stop giving thanks to God for you when I remember you in my prayers.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ a yǝni a kɩ Wɛ le, yɩ a kwǝri a loori-DƖ a pa abam.

eng: I pray that the God of our Lord Jesus Christ, the Father of glory, will give you a spirit of wisdom and revelation that makes God known to you.
local: A loori dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi Krisi Ko Wɛ dɩlʋ na jɩgɩ paarɩ-zulǝ tɩn, sɩ DƖ pa DƖ Joro kʋm zǝni abam sɩ á taá jɩgɩ wʋbʋŋ-ŋʋna, sɩ DƖ vɩɩrɩ abam sɩ á wanɩ á lwarɩ DƖ na yɩ wʋlʋ tɩn.

eng: I pray that the eyes of your heart will have enough light to see what is the hope of Gods call, what is the richness of Gods glorious inheritance among believers.
local: Amʋ loori Wɛ sɩ DƖ pa á wʋ vɩɩrɩ, sɩ á wanɩ á lwarɩ DƖ na kuri abam sɩ á taá jɩgɩ tɩɩna yalʋ DƖ tee nɩ tɩn, sɩ á daarɩ á lwarɩ DƖ wo-laarʋ tɩm na tiini tɩ daga yɩ tɩ ba jɩgɩ doŋ te. DƖ tiŋi-tɩ sɩ DƖ ba DƖ kwe DƖ pa balʋ na yɩ DƖ nɔɔna tɩn mʋ.

eng: and what is the overwhelming greatness of Gods power that is working among us believers. This power is conferred by the energy of Gods powerful strength.
local: Amʋ ta loori Wɛ sɩ DƖ pa á lwarɩ DƖ dam dɩm na daga dɩ ja gaalɩ te, yɩ DƖ ma-dɩ DƖ zǝni dɩbam balʋ maama na sɛ-DƖ tɩn. DƖ dam-fɔrɔ kʋm kʋntʋ mʋ DƖ mɛ DƖ tʋŋɩ tɩtʋŋ-kamunǝ yam.

eng: Gods power was at work in Christ when God raised him from the dead and sat him at Gods right side in the heavens.
local: Dam dɩm kʋntʋ mʋ DƖ mɛ DƖ bi Zezi Krisi DƖ pa o yagɩ tʋʋnɩ, yɩ DƖ daarɩ DƖ ma-dɩ DƖ zǝŋ-o DƖ pa o jǝni DƖ jazɩm nɩ DƖ sɔŋɔ nɩ.

eng: far above every ruler and authority and power and angelic power, any power that might be named not only now but in the future.
local: Kʋntʋ, Zezi Krisi laan mʋ te wǝǝnu tɩlʋ maama na jɩgɩ dam nabiinǝ baŋa nɩ tɩn. Kʋ na yɩ pwa dɩ dɩdɛɛra maama dɩ wɔnɔ tiinǝ maama, o dam dɩm dwe tɩ maama. Kʋ na yɩ zɩm wǝǝnu tɩm dam, naa jwa wǝǝnu tɩlʋ na lagɩ tɩ ba tɩn dɩ, Zezi yɩrɩ dɩm mʋ dwe yɩra yalʋ maama ba na bǝ tɩn.

eng: God put everything under Christs feet and made him head of everything in the church.
local: Wɛ ma kwe wǝǝnu maama DƖ kɩ Zezi Krisi dam kuri nɩ, yɩ DƖ daarɩ DƖ tiŋ-o sɩ o taa yɩ o nɔn-kɔgɔ kʋm yuutu, sɩ o taa te woŋo maama.

eng: which is his body. His body, the church, is the fullness of Christ, who fills everything in every way.
local: Zezi kɔgɔ kʋm mʋ nyɩ dɩ o yɩra yam, kʋ yɩ wʋntʋ mʋ ŋwɩ ba wʋnɩ, yɩ wʋntʋ mʋ paɩ woŋo maama wʋra wɛyuu dɩ tɩga baŋa je maama nɩ.

eng: At one time you were like a dead person because of the things you did wrong and your offenses against God.
local: Abam dɛɛn yɩ nɔɔna balʋ na ba jɩgɩ ŋwɩa kalʋ na nuŋi Wɛ te, á na vɩn Wɛ ni yɩ á kɩ lwarɩm tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: You used to live like people of this world. You followed the rule of a destructive spiritual power. This is the spirit of disobedience to Gods will that is now at work in persons whose lives are characterized by disobedience.
local: Á dɛɛn ma tɔgɩ cwe sɩlʋ na yɩ lʋgʋ baŋa wo-yɔɔrʋ cwe tɩn, yɩ á daarɩ á tɔgɩ sʋtaana-pɛ wʋlʋ na te wɛyuu tɩlampolo ciciri sɩm tɩn. Wʋntʋ mʋ yɩ sʋtaanɩ dɩlʋ laan na te balʋ na vɩn Wɛ ni tɩn.

eng: At one time you were like those persons. All of you used to do whatever felt good and whatever you thought you wanted so that you were children headed for punishment just like everyone else.
local: Dɩbam maama dɛɛn tɔgɩ nɔɔna bam kʋntʋ cwe sɩm mʋ, yɩ dɩ́ kɩ wo-zɔɔna yalʋ dɩ́ fra na zʋʋrɩ tɩn. Dɩ́ ma yǝni dɩ́ kɩ wo-zɔɔna nɩ dɩ́ wʋbʋŋa dɩ dɩ́ yɩra na lagɩ te tɩn. Dɩbam dɛɛn na yɩ te tɩn mʋ brɩ nɩ Wɛ ban-zɔŋɔ kʋm ya maŋɩ sɩ kʋ ba dɩbam baŋa, nɩnɛɛnɩ nɔɔna maama dɩ te.

eng: However, God is rich in mercy. He brought us to life with Christ while we were dead as a result of those things that we did wrong. He did this because of the great love that he has for us. You are saved by Gods grace!.
local: Kʋ daarɩ Wɛ nan tiini DƖ jɩgɩ nɔɔna ŋwaŋa kʋ gaalɩ. DƖ maa soe dɩbam zanzan.

eng: However, God is rich in mercy. He brought us to life with Christ while we were dead as a result of those things that we did wrong. He did this because of the great love that he has for us. You are saved by Gods grace!.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ DƖ pɛ dɩbam maama DƖ ŋwɩ-dʋŋa kam Zezi Krisi ŋwaanɩ. Wɛ na zǝni dɩbam kʋntʋ tɩn, kʋ yɩ maŋa kalʋ dɩbam dɛɛn na je dɩ́ lwarɩm dɩm wʋnɩ tɩn mʋ. Wɛ vrɩ dɩbam DƖ yagɩ zaanɩ mʋ.

eng: And God raised us up and seated us in the heavens with Christ Jesus.
local: Wɛ pɛ dɩ́ tɔgɩ dɩ Zezi dɩ́ bi dɩ́ na DƖ ŋwɩ-dʋŋa kam, yɩ DƖ daarɩ DƖ zǝŋi dɩbam sɩ dɩ́ tɔgɩ dɩd-o dɩ́ na jǝŋǝ je DƖ sɔŋɔ kʋm nɩ.

eng: God did this to show future generations the greatness of his grace by the goodness that God has shown us in Christ Jesus.
local: Wɛ na kɩ dɩbam lanyɩranɩ Zezi ŋwaanɩ kʋntʋ tɩn, kʋ yɩ sɩ kʋ taa brɩ nɔɔna maŋa kalʋ na bɩɩnɩ tɩn nɩ DƖ zaanɩ dɩm tiini dɩ daga mʋ.

eng: You are saved by Gods grace because of your faith. This salvation is Gods gift. Its not something you possessed.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ Wɛ vrɩ abam lwarɩm wʋnɩ zaanɩ mʋ, á na kɩ á wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Zezi tɩn ŋwaanɩ. Kʋ daɩ abam tɩtɩ dam, kʋ yɩ Wɛ pɛɛrɩ mʋ.

eng: Its not something you did that you can be proud of.
local: Kʋ daɩ abam tɩtʋŋ-ŋʋna ŋwaanɩ, sɩ nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ yɩ zaŋɩ o ba o tee o tɩtɩ Wɛ yigǝ nɩ.

eng: Instead, we are Gods accomplishment, created in Christ Jesus to do good things. God planned for these good things to be the way that we live our lives.
local: Wɛ mʋ mɔɔnɩ dɩbam. DƖ ma pa dɩbam DƖ ŋwɩ-dʋŋa kam Zezi Krisi ŋwaanɩ, sɩ dɩ́ taá kɩ kǝm-laarʋ tɩlʋ DƖ na maŋɩ DƖ tiŋi DƖ pa dɩbam sɩ dɩ́ kɩ tɩn.

eng: So remember that once you were Gentiles by physical descent, who were called uncircumcised by Jews who are physically circumcised.
local: Abam nan maŋɩ sɩ á guli á dɛɛn na yɩ te yɩ Wɛ ya ta wʋ vrɩ abam lwarɩm wʋnɩ tɩn. Ba wʋ lʋgɩ abam Zwifǝ bam wʋnɩ. Á yɩ dwi-gɛ tiinǝ mʋ, yɩ Zwifǝ bam na brɩ ba tɩtɩ nɩ ba yɩ Wɛ nɔɔna yɩ ba goni ba bǝkǝri tɩn mʋ yáalɩ abam dɩ á na yǝri á bǝkǝri gonim tɩn. Bantʋ na goni ba bǝkǝri te tɩn, kʋ yɩ nyɩnyʋgʋ kʋlʋ nabiinǝ na kɩ tɩn mʋ.

eng: At that time you were without Christ. You were aliens rather than citizens of Israel, and strangers to the covenants of Gods promise. In this world you had no hope and no God.
local: Kantʋ maŋa kam nɩ, abam dɛɛn yǝri Zezi Krisi. Á dɛɛn tɔgɩ á tǝri Yisɩrayɛlɩ dwi tiinǝ balʋ Wɛ na kuri tɩn wʋnɩ. Abam yigǝ dɛɛn tɔgɩ ka tǝrǝ dɩ Wɛ cullu tɩlʋ DƖ na mɛ DƖ go ni dɩ DƖ nɔɔna bam tɩn wʋnɩ. Á dɛɛn na ŋwɩ ŋwɩa kalʋ lʋgʋ baŋa nɩ tɩn, Wɛ tǝri á tee nɩ, yɩ á ba jɩgɩ tɩɩna dɩ kʋlʋkʋlʋ.

eng: But now, thanks to Christ Jesus, you who once were so far away have been brought near by the blood of Christ.
local: Kʋ daarɩ lele kʋntʋ abam na ŋwɩ dɩ Zezi Krisi tɩn, kʋ yɩ wʋntʋ na tɩgɩ yɩ o jana kam nuŋi tɩn ŋwaanɩ mʋ pɛ á twɛ dɩ Baŋa-Wɛ, yɩ abam dɛɛn ya baŋwɛ dɩ DƖ.

eng: Christ is our peace. He made both Jews and Gentiles into one group. With his body, he broke down the barrier of hatred that divided us.
local: Zezi Krisi mʋ pɛ dɩbam wʋ-zuru, yɩ o paɩ ywǝǝni wʋ dɩbam tɩtarɩ nɩ. Wʋntʋ mʋ pɛ Zwifǝ bam dɩ dwi-gɛ tiinǝ bam maama ji dwi dɩdʋa. O ma saarɩ sisǝni dɩlʋ ya na pwɛ-ba yɩ ba culi daanɩ tɩn.

eng: He canceled the detailed rules of the Law so that he could create one new person out of the two groups, making peace.
local: O na sɛ o pa o tɩtɩ sɩ ba gʋ-o tɩn mʋ pɛ Zwifǝ bam cullu tɩm dɩ tɩ na brɩ kʋlʋ maama tɩn ji kafɛ. Kʋntʋ mʋ o fɔgɩ Zwifǝ bam dɩ dwi-gɛ tiinǝ bam o kɩ daanɩ, sɩ ba maama ji dwi dɩdʋa ba na ŋwɩ dɩd-o tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: He reconciled them both as one body to God by the cross, which ended the hostility to God.
local: Ba maama laan na jigi dwi dɩdʋa kʋntʋ tɩn, o ma kwɛ ba dɩ Wɛ daanɩ, o na tɩgɩ tʋʋn-dagara kam baŋa nɩ tɩn ŋwaanɩ. O tʋʋnɩ dɩm ŋwaanɩ mʋ o pɛ ba daa ba culi daanɩ.

eng: When he came, he announced the good news of peace to you who were far away from God and to those who were near.
local: Zezi Krisi mʋ tu o tɔɔlɩ Wɛ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam sɩ dɩbam maama dɩ Wɛ fɔgɩ daanɩ, kʋ na yɩ abam dwi-gɛ tiinǝ balʋ dɛɛn na baŋwɛ dɩ DƖ tɩn, naa dɩbam Zwifǝ balʋ na maŋɩ dɩ́ batwarɩ dɩ DƖ tɩn.

eng: We both have access to the Father through Christ by the one Spirit.
local: Zezi Krisi ŋwaanɩ mʋ, dɩbam maama jɩgɩ cwǝŋǝ sɩ dɩ́ twɛ dɩ́ Ko Wɛ te, Wɛ Joro kʋm na yɩ dɩdʋa yɩ kʋ wʋ dɩ́ maama tee nɩ tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: So now you are no longer strangers and aliens. Rather, you are fellow citizens with Gods people, and you belong to Gods household.
local: Kʋntʋ, abam balʋ na yɩ dwi-gɛ tiinǝ tɩn, á daa daɩ vǝrǝ, á nan daɩ dwi-gɛ tiinǝ daga. Abam laan yɩ dwi dɩdʋa mʋ dɩ Wɛ nɔɔna bam, yɩ á tɔgɩ á yɩ DƖ sɔŋɔ kʋm biǝ.

eng: As Gods household, you are built on the foundation of the apostles and prophets with Christ Jesus himself as the cornerstone.
local: Abam tɔgɩ á yɩ Wɛ kɔgɔ kʋm nɔɔna mʋ, yɩ kɔgɔ kʋm kʋntʋ nyɩ dɩ digǝ mʋ te. Zezi tɩntʋŋna bam dɩ Wɛ nijoŋnǝ bam mʋ cwi digǝ kam kʋntʋ kuri. Zezi Krisi mʋ yɩ kandwɛ dɩlʋ na paɩ digǝ kam zɩga lana tɩn.

eng: The whole building is joined together in him, and it grows up into a temple that is dedicated to the Lord.
local: O maa pa digǝ kam lɔɔm maama tɔgɩ daanɩ lanyɩranɩ, yɩ o pa ka puli ka daga, sɩ ka taa yɩ dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm nyɩm o nɔɔna bam na wʋ́ ta zul-o da tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: Christ is building you into a place where God lives through the Spirit.
local: Abam dɩ tɔgɩ á wǝli Wɛ nɔɔna bam wʋnɩ mʋ á na ŋwɩ dɩ Zezi tɩn ŋwaanɩ. Kʋntʋ, abam nyɩ dɩ Wɛ digǝ kalʋ DƖ na wʋra DƖ lɔa, sɩ DƖ taa zʋʋrɩ ka wʋnɩ dɩ DƖ Joro kʋm tɩn mʋ.

eng: This is why I, Paul, am a prisoner of Christ for you Gentiles.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ amʋ Pooli yǝni a loori Wɛ a pa abam. A na tɔɔlɩ Zezi Krisi kwǝrǝ kam a brɩ abam dwi-gɛ tiinǝ tɩn mʋ pɛ ba kɩ-nɩ pɩɩna digǝ nɩ.

eng: Youve heard, of course, about the responsibility to distribute Gods grace, which God gave to me for you, right?.
local: Abam nan ni nɩ, tɩtʋŋɩ dɩlʋ Wɛ na pɛ-nɩ sɩ a tʋŋɩ abam ŋwaanɩ tɩn, kʋ yɩ sɩ a tɔɔlɩ DƖ zaanɩ kwǝrǝ kam mʋ a brɩ abam.

eng: God showed me his secret plan in a revelation, as I mentioned briefly before .
local: Kʋ yɩ Wɛ mʋ vɩɩrɩ amʋ sɩ a wanɩ a lwarɩ DƖ cɩga kalʋ na sǝgi tɩn. Kʋntʋ mʋ amʋ maŋɩ a pʋpʋnɩ cɩga kam kʋntʋ taanɩ fɩnfɩɩn a brɩ abam.

eng: when you read this, youll understand my insight into the secret plan about Christ.
local: Abam nan na karɩmɩ amʋ na pʋpʋnɩ kʋlʋ tɩn, á wʋ́ lwarɩ nɩ amʋ ni Zezi Krisi cɩga kalʋ na sǝgi tɩn kuri lanyɩranɩ.

eng: Earlier generations didnt know this hidden plan that God has now revealed to his holy apostles and prophets through the Spirit.
local: Faŋa faŋa tɩn Wɛ wʋ pɛ nabiinǝ lwarɩ DƖ cɩga kam kʋntʋ. DƖ laan nan mɛ DƖ Joro kʋm mʋ DƖ vɩɩrɩ Zezi tɩntʋŋna bam dɩ DƖ nijoŋnǝ bam sɩ ba lwarɩ-ka.

eng: This plan is that the Gentiles would be coheirs and parts of the same body, and that they would share with the Jews in the promises of God in Christ Jesus through the gospel.
local: Cɩga kam kʋntʋ mʋ yɩ sɩ DƖ pa dwi-gɛ tiinǝ balʋ na ŋwɩ dɩ Zezi Krisi tɩn tɔgɩ ba na wo-laarʋ tɩlʋ DƖ na lagɩ DƖ pa Zwifǝ balʋ na sɛ DƖ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam tɩn, sɩ ba dɩ tɔgɩ ba ji dwi dɩdʋa dɩ Zwifǝ bam, sɩ ba laan joŋi kʋlʋ Wɛ na goni ni sɩ DƖ pa DƖ nɔɔna bam tɩn.

eng: I became a servant of the gospel because of the grace that God showed me through the exercise of his power.
local: Kʋ yɩ yu-yoŋo mʋ yɩ Wɛ kuri-nɩ sɩ a ji DƖ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam tɩntʋŋnʋ, yɩ DƖ pa-nɩ dam DƖ tɩtʋŋɩ dɩm ŋwaanɩ.

eng: God gave his grace to me, the least of all Gods people, to preach the good news about the immeasurable riches of Christ to the Gentiles.
local: Amʋ nan mʋ yɩ wʋlʋ na tiini a muri Wɛ nɔɔna bam maama wʋnɩ tɩn, yɩ Wɛ daa ta pa-nɩ tɩtʋŋ-ŋʋm dɩm kʋntʋ, sɩ a taa ve dwi-gɛ tiinǝ te a brɩ-ba DƖ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam, sɩ ba lwarɩ Zezi Krisi wo-laarʋ tɩm na tiini tɩ dagɩ te, yɩ nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ bá wanɩ o lwarɩ-tɩ o ti.

eng: God sent me to reveal the secret plan that had been hidden since the beginning of time by God, who created everything.
local: Amʋ nan maŋɩ sɩ a pa nabiinǝ mʋ lwarɩ Wɛ cɩga kam na tɔgɩ cwe sɩlʋ tɩn. Kʋ na zɩgɩ pulim nɩ tɩn, Wɛ dɩlʋ na kɩ wǝǝnu maama tɩn mʋ pɛ cɩga kam kʋntʋ sǝgi, kʋ ba kʋ yi zɩm.

eng: Gods purpose is now to show the rulers and powers in the heavens the many different varieties of his wisdom through the church.
local: DƖ laan ma tɔgɩ Zezi kɔgɔ kʋm ŋwaanɩ DƖ pa dɩdɛɛra dɩ pwa balʋ maama na jɩgɩ dam wɛyuu tɩlampolo kʋm nɩ tɩn lwarɩ DƖ swan yam dwi tǝri tǝri na yɩ te.

eng: This was consistent with the plan he had from the beginning of time that he accomplished through Christ Jesus our Lord.
local: Wɛ tagɩ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi Krisi ŋwaanɩ mʋ DƖ kɩ kʋntʋ, nɩ DƖ na maŋɩ DƖ lɩ wʋbʋŋa sɩ DƖ kɩ kʋlʋ pulim nɩ tɩn.

eng: In Christ we have bold and confident access to God through faith in him.
local: Dɩ́ na ŋwɩ dɩ Zezi Krisi tɩn, o maa paɩ dɩ́ jɩgɩ baarɩ yɩ o pa dɩbam cwǝŋǝ sɩ dɩ́ wanɩ dɩ́ twɛ Wɛ te sɩ dɩ́ yɩ taá kwarɩ fʋʋnɩ, dɩ́ na kɩ dɩ́ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩd-o tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: So then, I ask you not to become discouraged by what Im suffering for you, which is your glory.
local: Abam nan yɩ pa á wʋrʋ cɔgɩ sɩ á ga baarɩ dɩ amʋ na yaarɩ te abam ŋwaanɩ tɩn, sɩ kʋ yɩ abam yuu zǝŋim ŋwaanɩ mʋ.

eng: This is why I kneel before the Father.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ amʋ yǝni a kuni doonǝ dɩ́ Ko Wɛ yigǝ nɩ a loori-DƖ abam ŋwaanɩ.

eng: Every ethnic group in heaven or on earth is recognized by him.
local: Kʋ na yɩ wɛyuu nɩ naa lʋgʋ baŋa nɩ, balʋ maama nɔɔna na jɩgɩ-ba ba bǝ nɩ ba kwǝ tɩn kuri nuŋi Wɛ na yɩ dɩbam Ko tɩn te mʋ.

eng: I ask that he will strengthen you in your inner selves from the riches of his glory through the Spirit.
local: Amʋ yǝni a loori Wɛ mʋ, sɩ DƖ pa DƖ Joro kʋm pa á bɩcara na dam, DƖ paarɩ-zulǝ na dagɩ tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: I ask that Christ will live in your hearts through faith. As a result of having strong roots in love.
local: sɩ Zezi Krisi taa tigi á wʋbʋŋa nɩ, dɩ á na kɩ á wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩd-o tɩn ŋwaanɩ. Amʋ ta loori-DƖ mʋ sɩ DƖ pa á taá ŋwɩ sono wʋnɩ, sɩ á zɩgɩ kǝŋkǝŋ nɩ tiu nɛ na kwaarɩ tɩga nɩ te tɩn.

eng: I ask that youll have the power to grasp loves width and length, height and depth, together with all believers.
local: sɩ á wanɩ á wǝli dɩ Wɛ nɔɔna bam maama á lwarɩ Zezi Krisi sono kʋm na maɩ te tɩn. Zezi Krisi sono kʋm na tiini kʋ dagɩ te tɩn nyɩ dɩ woŋo na tiini kʋ yalma kʋ dwarma kʋ yɩ baŋa baŋa yɩ kʋ luunǝ zanzan tɩn mʋ.

eng: Therefore, as a prisoner for the Lord, I encourage you to live as people worthy of the call you received from God.
local: Amʋ na wʋ pɩɩna digǝ nɩ dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm ŋwaanɩ tɩn, a loori abam sɩ á taá tɔgɩ cwǝ-laa sɩ kʋ maŋɩ dɩ Wɛ na bǝŋi abam sɩ á taá tɔgɩ te tɩn.

eng: I ask that youll know the love of Christ that is beyond knowledge so that you will be filled entirely with the fullness of God.
local: O sono kʋm nan dwe sɩ nabiinǝ lwarɩ kʋ na yɩ te tɩn. Wɛ nan wʋ́ pa abam lwarɩ-kʋ, sɩ DƖ ŋwɩa kam laan su á bɩcara maama.

eng: Conduct yourselves with all humility, gentleness, and patience. Accept each other with love.
local: Kʋ maŋɩ sɩ á tu á tɩtɩ mʋ, sɩ á taá jɩgɩ wʋ-bono maŋa maama, sɩ á daarɩ á taá jɩgɩ wʋ-zuru, sɩ á taá wǝli daanɩ dɩ sono.

eng: Glory to God, who is able to do far beyond all that we could ask or imagine by his power at work within us.
local: Pa-na dɩ́ zuli Wɛ dɩlʋ na waɩ woŋo maama DƖ kɩ tɩn, dɩ DƖ na yǝni DƖ zǝni dɩbam dɩ DƖ dam dɩm, yɩ kʋ tiini kʋ dwe kʋlʋ maama dɩbam na wʋ́ wanɩ dɩ́ bʋŋɩ naa dɩ́ loori-DƖ tɩn.

eng: and make an effort to preserve the unity of the Spirit with the peace that ties you together.
local: Kwaanɩ-na sɩ á taá jɩgɩ wʋbʋŋ-dɩdwɩ nɩ Wɛ Joro kʋm na pɛ abam te, sɩ á wǝli daanɩ sɩ yazurǝ taa wʋ á tɩtarɩ nɩ.

eng: glory to him in the church and in Christ Jesus for all generations, forever and always. Amen.
local: Baŋa-Wɛ maŋɩ sɩ DƖ na zulǝ DƖ nɔn-kɔgɔ kʋm maama tee nɩ Zezi Krisi ŋwaanɩ, sɩ kʋ taa ve maŋa kalʋ na ba ti tɩn. Amina.

eng: You are one body and one spirit, just as God also called you in one hope.
local: Zezi kɔgɔ kʋm yɩ dwi dɩdʋa mʋ, Wɛ Joro kʋm dɩ yɩ dɩdʋa mʋ, nɩ Wɛ na bǝŋi abam sɩ á taá tɔgɩ-DƖ yɩ á jɩgɩ tɩɩna dɩdʋa dɩ DƖ te tɩn.

eng: There is one Lord, one faith, one baptism.
local: Dɩbam maama jɩgɩ Yuutu dɩdʋa mʋ, dɩ́ na kɩ dɩ́ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩd-o te tɩn dɩ yɩ bɩdwɩ mʋ. Dɩ́ na miisi na wʋnɩ tɩn dɩ yɩ woŋo dɩdʋa mʋ.

eng: and one God and Father of all, who is over all, through all, and in all.
local: Wɛ yɩ dɩdʋa mʋ, DƖ maa yɩ dɩbam maama Ko. Dɩntʋ mʋ yɩ dɩbam maama Yuutu, yɩ DƖ wʋ dɩbam maama tee nɩ, yɩ DƖ kwǝri DƖ wʋ dɩbam maama wʋnɩ.

eng: God has given his grace to each one of us measured out by the gift that is given by Christ.
local: Dɩbam dɩdʋa dɩdʋa joŋi pɛɛrɩ dwi tǝri tǝri mʋ, kʋ maŋɩ dɩ Zezi Krisi na lagɩ sɩ o pa dɩbam te tɩn.

eng: Thats why scripture says, When he climbed up to the heights, he captured prisoners, and he gave gifts to people .
local: nɩ kʋ na pʋpʋnɩ Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm wʋnɩ kʋ wɩ: «O na diini wɛyuu tɩn, o kalɩ o dʋna bam o pɩ, yɩ o daarɩ o maŋɩ o pɛɛra yam o pa nɔɔna.».

eng: What does the phrase he climbed up mean if it doesnt mean that he had first gone down into the lower regions, the earth?.
local: Kʋ na pʋpʋnɩ kʋ wɩ, o diini tɩn, kʋ kuri mʋ bɛɛ? Kʋ lagɩ kʋ ta nɩ o dɛ yigǝ o tu tɩga baŋa yɩ o tu o kwaarɩ ka kuri mʋ.

eng: The one who went down is the same one who climbed up above all the heavens so that he might fill everything.
local: Wʋlʋ na tu tɩga baŋa kʋntʋ tɩn daa ta mʋ diini wɛyuu, o kɛ Wɛ-sɔŋɔ wǝǝnu tɩm maama yigǝ, sɩ o pa wǝǝnu tɩlʋ maama na wʋra tɩn taa jɩgɩ kuri.

eng: He gave some apostles, some prophets, some evangelists, and some pastors and teachers.
local: Kʋ yɩ wʋntʋ mʋ pɛ o nɔɔna bam pɛɛra dwi tǝri tǝri, o pɛ ba badaara yɩ o tɩntʋŋna, badaara maa yɩ Wɛ nijoŋnǝ, badonnǝ maa tɔɔlɩ Wɛ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam, babam maa nii o nɔɔna bam baŋa nɩ, yɩ badonnǝ brɩ o nɔɔna bam Wɛ cɩga kam.

eng: His purpose was to equip Gods people for the work of serving and building up the body of Christ.
local: Zezi Krisi nan pɛ pɛɛra yam kʋntʋ, sɩ o nɔɔna bam wanɩ ba na dam mʋ ba taa tʋŋɩ ba zǝni daanɩ, sɩ kʋ pa o kɔgɔ kʋm maama fɔgɩ kʋ kɩ daanɩ sɩ kʋ puli.

eng: until we all reach the unity of faith and knowledge of Gods Son. Gods goal is for us to become mature adults—to be fully grown, measured by the standard of the fullness of Christ.
local: sɩ kʋ pa dɩ́ maama laan ji woŋo dɩdʋa dɩ́ na lwarɩ Wɛ Bu wʋm yɩ dɩ́ kɩ dɩ́ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩd-o tɩn ŋwaanɩ. Dɩ́ wʋbʋŋa laan wʋ́ tiini ya bɩ lanyɩranɩ, sɩ dɩ́ maŋɩ lanyɩranɩ nɩ Zezi Krisi na maŋɩ fasɩ te tɩn.

eng: As a result, we arent supposed to be infants any longer who can be tossed and blown around by every wind that comes from teaching with deceitful scheming and the tricks people play to deliberately mislead others.
local: Kʋntʋ, dɩ́ wʋbʋŋa laan wʋ́ bɩ, ya daa bá ta ve yigǝ dɩ kwaga nɩ bu-balwa wʋbʋŋa na yɩ te tɩn, yɩ dɩ́ daa bá joŋi nɔɔna zaasɩm mwalɩ mwalɩ nɩ viu na fuli wǝǝnu kʋ yagɩ yigǝ dɩ kwaga te tɩn. Dɩ́ daa bá sɛ sɩ dɩ́ tɔgɩ nɔɔna balʋ na kɩ sɩsɩɩna ba ganɩ ba donnǝ sɩ ba tusi tɩn.

eng: Instead, by speaking the truth with love, lets grow in every way into Christ.
local: Dɩ́ nan wʋ́ ta brɩ Wɛ cɩga kam dɩ sono mʋ, sɩ kʋ pa dɩ́ tiini dɩ́ bɩ woŋo maama wʋnɩ, sɩ dɩ́ taá ŋwɩ dɩ Zezi Krisi wʋlʋ na yɩ dɩbam Yuutu tɩn.

eng: who is the head. The whole body grows from him, as it is joined and held together by all the supporting ligaments. The body makes itself grow in that it builds itself up with love as each one does its part.
local: Zezi kɔgɔ kʋm nyɩ dɩ o yɩra mʋ, yɩ wʋntʋ mʋ paɩ o yɩra yam je sɩm maama tʋŋɩ sɩ wǝli daanɩ. Sɩ nan yɩ tǝri tǝri mʋ, yɩ sɩ maama wǝli daanɩ sɩ tʋŋa. Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ, wʋlʋ maama na yɩ Zezi kɔgɔ kʋm nɔɔnʋ tɩn na tʋŋɩ tɩtʋŋɩ dɩlʋ Zezi na pɛ-o tɩn, kʋʋ́ pa o kɔgɔ kʋm maama bɩ yɩ kʋ puli dɩ sono.

eng: So Im telling you this, and I insist on it in the Lord: you shouldnt live your life like the Gentiles anymore. They base their lives on pointless thinking.
local: Amʋ nan lagɩ a kaanɩ abam dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi ŋwaanɩ, sɩ á daa yɩ taá tɔgɩ cwe sɩlʋ balʋ na yǝri Wɛ tɩn na tɔgɩ dɩ ba wʋbʋŋ-yɔɔrʋ tɩm tɩn.

eng: and they are in the dark in their reasoning. They are disconnected from Gods life because of their ignorance and their closed hearts.
local: Bantʋ wʋbʋŋa yɩ lim mʋ, yɩ ba ŋwɩa kam ba tɔgɩ Wɛ ŋwɩa na yɩ te tɩn, bɛŋwaanɩ ba wʋ lwarɩ Wɛ cɩga kam ba wʋbʋŋa na tɩgɩ tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: They are people who lack all sense of right and wrong, and who have turned themselves over to doing whatever feels good and to practicing every sort of corruption along with greed.
local: Ba maa ba kwarɩ cavɩɩra, yɩ ba tiini ba kɩ lwarɩm dwi maama dɩ digiru wo-zɔɔna kǝnǝ yalʋ maama ba wʋbʋŋa na zʋa kʋ ja gaalɩ tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: But you didnt learn that sort of thing from Christ.
local: Abam na lwarɩ Zezi Krisi cɩga kam tɩn, kʋ daɩ sɩ á taá kɩ kikiǝ yantʋ doŋ.

eng: Since you really listened to him and you were taught how the truth is in Jesus.
local: Abam nan na ni Zezi taanɩ dɩm, yɩ ba sɩɩnɩ ba brɩ abam o cɩga kam tɩn.

eng: change the former way of life that was part of the person you once were, corrupted by deceitful desires.
local: ba brɩ abam sɩ á yagɩ á ŋwɩ-doŋǝ kam mʋ dɩ ka na pɛ á yɩ te tɩn. Á ŋwɩ-doŋǝ kam kʋntʋ mʋ lagɩ ka cɔgɩ abam, dɩ ka na ganɩ abam sɩ á fra taa zʋʋrɩ wo-yɔɔrʋ tɩlʋ na ba jɩgɩ kuri tɩn.

eng: Instead, renew the thinking in your mind by the Spirit.
local: Á wʋbʋŋa maama nan maŋɩ sɩ ya lǝni ya ji wʋbʋŋ-dʋʋra mʋ.

eng: and clothe yourself with the new person created according to Gods image in justice and true holiness.
local: sɩ á daarɩ á taá ŋwɩ Wɛ ŋwɩ-dʋŋa kalʋ DƖ na pɛ abam tɩn. Ŋwɩ-dʋŋa kam kʋntʋ yɩ Wɛ tɩtɩ ŋwɩa mʋ, yɩ ka paɩ á tɔgɩ cɩga dɩ wʋ-poŋo cwǝŋǝ.

eng: Therefore, after you have gotten rid of lying, Each of you must tell the truth to your neighbor because we are parts of each other in the same body.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ, pa-na dɩ́ yagɩ vwan fɔm, sɩ dɩ́ daarɩ dɩ́ taá tɛ cɩga dɩ́ brɩ daanɩ, dɩ́ maama na yɩ dwi dɩdwɩ tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: Be angry without sinning. Dont let the sun set on your anger.
local: Abam wʋlʋ na jɩgɩ ban-zɔŋɔ dɩ o doŋ, o yɩ sɛ sɩ kʋ pa o kɩ wo-balɔrɔ, sɩ o daarɩ o lɩ-kʋ o wʋnɩ lɩla kʋ loori wɛ na wʋ́ zʋ tɩn.

eng: Dont provide an opportunity for the devil.
local: Á yɩ zaŋɩ á pa sʋtaanɩ na laŋa dɩ wanɩ abam.

eng: Thieves should no longer steal. Instead, they should go to work, using their hands to do good so that they will have something to share with whoever is in need.
local: Wʋlʋ ya na ŋɔnɩ tɩn daa yɩ taa ŋɔna. O nan maŋɩ sɩ o kwaanɩ o tʋŋɩ o pa o tɩtɩ mʋ dɩ cɩga, sɩ o daarɩ o wanɩ o zǝni balʋ yinigǝ na jɩgɩ-ba tɩn dɩ.

eng: Dont let any foul words come out of your mouth. Only say what is helpful when it is needed for building up the community so that it benefits those who hear what you say.
local: Á yɩ pa á ni-taanɩ taa jɩgɩ lwarɩm. Nan taá ŋɔɔnɩ-na taanɩ dɩlʋ na wʋ́ pa nɔɔna na dam Wɛ cwǝŋǝ kam wʋnɩ, yɩ dɩ daarɩ dɩ zǝni-ba lanyɩranɩ nɩ ba na lagɩ zǝnǝ te tɩn.

eng: Dont make the Holy Spirit of God unhappy—you were sealed by him for the day of redemption.
local: Á yɩ pa Wɛ Joro kʋm wʋ cɔgɩ dɩ á na kɩ kʋlʋ tɩn, bɛŋwaanɩ kʋntʋ mʋ yɩ nyɩnyʋgʋ kʋlʋ Wɛ na pɛ abam sɩ kʋ brɩ nɩ á yɩ DƖ nɔɔna tɩn, sɩ DƖ sarɩya dɛ dɩm na yiǝ, sɩ DƖ laan ba DƖ vrɩ abam lwarɩm dwi maama wʋnɩ.

eng: Put aside all bitterness, losing your temper, anger, shouting, and slander, along with every other evil.
local: Yagɩ-na pu-sɩŋa dɩ ka-culi-daanɩ dɩ ban-zɔŋɔ, sɩ á daarɩ á yagɩ kantɔgɔ dɩ trʋ dɩ wʋ-lʋŋʋ dwi maama.

eng: Be kind, compassionate, and forgiving to each other, in the same way God forgave you in Christ.
local: Taá nɩgɩ-na daanɩ, sɩ á daarɩ á taá jɩgɩ da-ŋwaŋa. Taá yagɩ-na á ma cɛ daanɩ, nɩ Wɛ na yagɩ DƖ ma cɛ abam Zezi Krisi ŋwaanɩ te tɩn.

eng: Therefore, imitate God like dearly loved children.
local: Abam na yɩ Wɛ bu-sonnu tɩn, á taá kɩ nɩ Wɛ na kɩ te tɩn.

eng: Live your life with love, following the example of Christ, who loved us and gave himself for us. He was a sacrificial offering that smelled sweet to God.
local: Taá soe-na daanɩ nɩ Zezi Krisi na soe dɩbam te tɩn. Wʋntʋ mʋ sɛ sɩ o lǝni dɩbam yuu nɩ o tɩ dɩ́ lwarɩm ŋwaanɩ. O ma ma o tɩtɩ o kɩ kaanɩm dɩlʋ na poli Wɛ wʋ yɩ dɩ lwǝm ywǝmmǝ dɩ DƖ tɩn.

eng: Sexual immorality, and any kind of impurity or greed, shouldnt even be mentioned among you, which is right for holy persons.
local: Abam yɩ Wɛ nɔɔna mʋ. Kʋntʋ, kʋ wʋ maŋɩ sɩ á pa wo-zɔɔna kikiǝ dɩ boorim dwi maama taa wʋ á wʋnɩ, naa á taá yɩ wo-swǝn-nyɩna. Á brɩ á yɩ pa ba ni wǝǝnu tɩm kʋntʋ taanɩ abam tɩtarɩ nɩ.

eng: Obscene language, silly talk, or vulgar jokes arent acceptable for believers. Instead, there should be thanksgiving.
local: Kʋ na yɩ cɔgɩm-ŋwɛ dɩ bɩtar-jwǝǝru dɩ bɩtar-digiru dwi maama, tɩntʋ wʋ maŋɩ dɩ abam. Á nan maŋɩ sɩ á taá kɩ Wɛ le mʋ maŋa maama.

eng: Because you know for sure that persons who are sexually immoral, impure, or greedy—which happens when things become gods—those persons wont inherit the kingdom of Christ and God.
local: Nan taá ye-na nɩ, nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ maama na kɩ wo-zɔɔna naa boorim, naa wʋlʋ na yɩ wo-swǝn-nyɩm tɩn, kʋntʋ tu bá fɔgɩ o na kʋlʋkʋlʋ Zezi Krisi dɩ Baŋa-Wɛ paarɩ dɩm wʋnɩ. Nɔɔnʋ na yɩ wo-swǝn-nyɩm, kʋ brɩ nɩ o pa tɩntʋ mʋ zulǝ, yɩ o daarɩ Wɛ o yagɩ.

eng: Nobody should deceive you with stupid ideas. Gods anger comes down on those who are disobedient because of this kind of thing.
local: Nan yɩ pa-na nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ ganɩ abam dɩ bɩtar-yɔɔrʋ. Kǝm-balwaarʋ tɩm kʋntʋ doŋ mʋ lagɩ tɩ pa Wɛ ban-zɔŋɔ kʋm sɩɩnɩ kʋ ba kʋ cɔgɩ balʋ na vɩn DƖ ni tɩn.

eng: So you shouldnt have anything to do with them.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ ja-na á tɩtɩ dɩ balʋ na kɩ kʋntʋ doŋ tɩn.

eng: You were once darkness, but now you are light in the Lord, so live your life as children of light.
local: Abam dɛɛn ya yǝri Wɛ, yɩ kʋ pa á wʋ lim wʋnɩ. Abam nan na tu á ŋwɩ dɩ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi Krisi tɩn, kʋ pɛ pooni laan wʋ á tee nɩ. Á taá ŋwɩ-na sɩ kʋ maŋɩ dɩ balʋ na ve pooni wʋnɩ tɩn na ŋwɩ te tɩn.

eng: Light produces fruit that consists of every sort of goodness, justice, and truth.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ kǝnǝ yalʋ maama na yɩ pooni nyɩm tɩn mʋ yɩ lanyɩranɩ, dɩ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ maama na jɩgɩ cɩga tɩn.

eng: Therefore, test everything to see whats pleasing to the Lord.
local: Á nan kwaanɩ sɩ á lwarɩ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ maama na sui dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi wʋbʋŋa tɩn.

eng: and dont participate in the unfruitful actions of darkness. Instead, you should reveal the truth about them.
local: Ja-na á tɩtɩ sɩ á yɩ tɔgɩ wo-yɔɔrʋ tɩlʋ na yɩ lim nyɩm tɩn, sɩ á daarɩ á pa nɔɔna lwarɩ jaja nɩ wǝǝnu tɩm kʋntʋ ba lana.

eng: Its embarrassing to even talk about what certain persons do in secret.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ, wǝǝnu tɩlʋ nɔɔna bam kʋntʋ na yǝni ba sǝgi ba kɩ tɩn tiini tɩ jɩgɩ cavɩɩra sɩ dɩ́ ŋɔɔnɩ-tɩ.

eng: But everything exposed to the light is revealed by the light.
local: Abam nan na pɛ Wɛ pooni dɩm brɩ woŋo maama kuri jaja, nɔɔna laan wʋ́ lwarɩ nɩ tɩ yɩ balɔrɔ.

eng: Everything that is revealed by the light is light. Therefore, it says, Wake up, sleeper! Get up from the dead, and Christ will shine on you. .
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ woŋo kʋlʋ maama kuri na lwarɩ jaja tɩn laan wʋ pooni yigǝ nɩ mʋ. Kʋntʋ mʋ kʋ tagɩ kʋ wɩ: «Wʋlʋ na dɔ tɩn zaŋɩ wɛɛnɩ, sɩ n bi n yagɩ tʋʋnɩ, sɩ Zezi Krisi ŋwɩa kam pooni taa wʋ nmʋ tee nɩ.».

eng: So be careful to live your life wisely, not foolishly.
local: Á nan fɔgɩ á cɩ á tɩtɩ dɩ á na tɔgɩ cwǝŋǝ kalʋ tɩn, sɩ á taá jɩgɩ wʋbʋŋ-ŋʋna, sɩ á yɩ taá yɩ nɩnɛɛnɩ balʋ na wʋ lwarɩ Wɛ cɩga kam tɩn te.

eng: Take advantage of every opportunity because these are evil times.
local: Dɩbam na ŋwɩ maŋa kalʋ wʋnɩ zɩm tɩn jɩgɩ kǝm-balwaarʋ zanzan. Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ, Wɛ na pɛ abam pwǝlǝ sɩ á tʋŋɩ kʋlʋ tɩn, kɩ-na-kʋ lanyɩranɩ.

eng: Because of this, dont be ignorant, but understand the Lords will.
local: Á yɩ taá tɔgɩ-na jwǝrim cwǝŋǝ, á nan kwaanɩ á lwarɩ kʋlʋ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi na lagɩ sɩ á taá kɩ tɩn.

eng: Dont get drunk on wine, which produces depravity. Instead, be filled with the Spirit in the following ways.
local: Yɩ taá yɩ nɔɔna balʋ na nyɔ sana ba su ba bugi tɩn, sɩ kʋntʋ paɩ á ŋwɩa cɔgɩ mʋ. Á nan za pa-na Wɛ Joro kʋm su á bɩcara lanyɩranɩ.

eng: speak to each other with psalms, hymns, and spiritual songs; sing and make music to the Lord in your hearts.
local: Á taá leeni Wɛ lǝŋ-ŋwɩ dɩ Wɛ tiǝ le dɩ Wɛ Joro kʋm na pɛ abam le sɩlʋ tɩn á brɩ daanɩ. Taá leeni-na zulǝ le sɩm kʋntʋ á pa dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi Krisi dɩ á wʋ maama.

eng: always give thanks to God the Father for everything in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ.
local: sɩ á taá kɩ dɩ́ Ko Wɛ le maŋa maama dɩ woŋo kʋlʋ maama DƖ na pɛ abam tɩn dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi Krisi yɩrɩ ŋwaanɩ.

eng: and submit to each other out of respect for Christ.
local: Á taá sɛ daanɩ á na kwarɩ Zezi Krisi tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: For example, wives should submit to their husbands as if to the Lord.
local: Kaana maŋɩ sɩ ba taa sɛ ba banna, nɩ ba na sɛ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi te tɩn.

eng: A husband is the head of his wife like Christ is head of the church, that is, the savior of the body.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ kaanɩ barʋ mʋ yɩ o yuutu, nɩ Zezi Krisi dɩ na yɩ o kɔgɔ kʋm Yuutu te tɩn. O kɔgɔ kʋm nyɩ dɩ o yɩra mʋ, yɩ wʋntʋ mʋ vrɩ-ba lwarɩm wʋnɩ.

eng: So wives submit to their husbands in everything like the church submits to Christ.
local: Kʋntʋ, kaana dɩ maŋɩ sɩ ba sɛ ba banna mʋ woŋo maama wʋnɩ, nɩ Zezi kɔgɔ kʋm nɔɔna bam na sɛ o ni te tɩn.

eng: As for husbands, love your wives just like Christ loved the church and gave himself for her.
local: Kʋ daarɩ abam banna-ba, á maŋɩ sɩ á taá soe á kaana, nɩ Zezi Krisi dɩ na soe o kɔgɔ kʋm nɔɔna bam yɩ o sɛ o tɩ ba ŋwaanɩ te tɩn.

eng: He did this to make her holy by washing her in a bath of water with the word.
local: O nan tɩgɩ sɩ o pa ba taa yɩ Wɛ nɔɔna mʋ. O ma kwɛ-ba dɩ o taanɩ dɩm sɩ ba ji lanyɩranɩ nɩnɛɛnɩ ba na zarɩ woŋo dɩ na te tɩn.

eng: He did this to present himself with a splendid church, one without any sort of stain or wrinkle on her clothes, but rather one that is holy and blameless.
local: O fɔgɩ o kwɛ-ba kʋntʋ, sɩ o laan pa o kɔgɔ kʋm wanɩ kʋ ba kʋ zɩgɩ o yigǝ nɩ dɩ paarɩ-zulǝ mʋ, sɩ kʋ taa jɩgɩ lam, yɩ digiru dɩ cɔgɩm tǝri kʋ tee nɩ dɩ fɩnfɩɩn dɩ. Kʋntʋ tɩn, o nɔɔna bam wʋ́ ta jɩgɩ wʋ-poŋo o yigǝ nɩ, yɩ tusim tǝrǝ.

eng: Thats how husbands ought to love their wives—in the same way as they do their own bodies. Anyone who loves his wife loves himself.
local: Kʋntʋ, kan-banna maŋɩ sɩ ba taa soe ba kaana, nɩnɛɛnɩ ba na soe ba tɩtɩ yɩra yam te tɩn. Nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ na soe o kaanɩ tɩn soe o tɩtɩ mʋ.

eng: No one ever hates his own body, but feeds it and takes care of it just like Christ does for the church.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ nɔɔnʋ tǝrǝ o na vaɩ o yɩra kwɛɛm. O nan nii o yɩra yam baŋa nɩ mʋ, yɩ o di wʋdiu o ma kɔnɩ-ya. Kʋ nan yɩ bɩdwɩ mʋ dɩ Zezi Krisi na nii dɩbam balʋ na yɩ o kɔgɔ kʋm baŋa nɩ te tɩn.

eng: because we are parts of his body.
local: dɩ́ na nyɩ dɩ o yɩra yam tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: This is why a man will leave his father and mother and be united with his wife, and the two of them will be one body .
local: Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm nan tagɩ kʋ wɩ: «Nɔɔnʋ na di kaanɩ, o maŋɩ sɩ o pɔɔrɩ o tɩtɩ o ko dɩ o nu tee nɩ, sɩ o daarɩ o jǝni dɩ o kaanɩ wʋm, sɩ ba laan ji nɔɔnʋ dɩdʋa.».

eng: Marriage is a significant allegory, and Im applying it to Christ and the church.
local: Taanɩ dɩm kʋntʋ yɩ ta-ŋʋm mʋ, yɩ dɩ kuri ya sǝgi. Amʋ nan kwe-dɩ a ma maŋɩ Zezi Krisi dɩ o kɔgɔ kʋm woŋo mʋ.

eng: In any case, as for you individually, each one of you should love his wife as himself, and wives should respect their husbands.
local: Kʋ nan yɩ cɩga mʋ dɩ abam dɩ, kan-barʋ maama maŋɩ sɩ o taa soe o kaanɩ nɩ o na soe o tɩtɩ te tɩn. Kaanɩ maama dɩ maŋɩ sɩ o taa zuli o barʋ mʋ.

eng: As for children, obey your parents in the Lord, because it is right.
local: Biǝ-ba, abam na sɛ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi tɩn, kʋ maŋɩ sɩ á taá sɛ á tiinǝ ni, sɩ kʋ maŋɩ kʋntʋ mʋ.

eng: The commandment Honor your father and mother is the first one with a promise attached.
local: «Ta n zuli n ko dɩ n nu.» Wɛ niǝ yam maama wʋnɩ, mʋ dayigǝ ni dɩlʋ DƖ na goni ni DƖ wǝli da DƖ wɩ:.

eng: so that things will go well for you, and you will live for a long time in the land .
local: «Nmʋ na zuli n ko dɩ n nu, nń na ywǝǝni dɩ mʋmwɛ-dɛɛrɩ lʋgʋ baŋa nɩ.».

eng: As for parents, dont provoke your children to anger, but raise them with discipline and instruction about the Lord.
local: Kʋ daarɩ abam balʋ na yɩ biǝ kwǝ tɩn, sɩ á yɩ taá tiini á fɩ-ba á paɩ ba bana zaŋɩ. Nan taá kɔnɩ á biǝ bam lanyɩranɩ, sɩ á taá kwe-ba nɩ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi cɩga kam na brɩ te tɩn.

eng: As for slaves, obey your human masters with fear and trembling and with sincere devotion to Christ.
local: Kʋ na yɩ abam balʋ na yɩ gambɛ tɩn, á taá tʋŋɩ á tɔgɩ á yum tiinǝ wʋbʋŋa. Taá kwarɩ-na-ba sɩ á tʋŋɩ dɩ yawala, nɩnɛɛnɩ á na wʋ́ tʋŋɩ á pa dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi te tɩn.

eng: Dont work to make yourself look good and try to flatter people, but act like slaves of Christ carrying out Gods will from the heart.
local: Kʋ nan daɩ ba na zɩgɩ ba nii abam maŋa kalʋ tɩn yɩranɩ mʋ á wʋ́ ta tʋŋɩ kʋntʋ sɩ ba tee abam. Taá tʋŋɩ-na dɩ á wʋ maama, sɩ á taá tɔgɩ Wɛ wʋbʋŋa na lagɩ te tɩn nɩnɛɛnɩ á yɩ Zezi Krisi tɩtɩ gambɛ mʋ te.

eng: Serve your owners enthusiastically, as though you were serving the Lord and not human beings.
local: Taá tʋŋɩ-na dɩ wʋpolo nɩnɛɛnɩ á tʋŋɩ dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm ŋwaanɩ mʋ te, sɩ kʋ daɩ nabiinǝ ŋwaanɩ.

eng: You know that the Lord will reward every person who does what is right, whether that person is a slave or a free person.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ abam ye nɩ nɔɔnʋ maama wʋ́ na ŋwɩɩrʋ dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm tee nɩ dɩ kǝm-laarʋ tɩlʋ maama o na kɩ tɩn, kʋ na yɩ gambaa naa nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ na te o tɩtɩ tɩn dɩ.

eng: As for masters, treat your slaves in the same way. Stop threatening them, because you know that both you and your slaves have a master in heaven. He doesnt distinguish between people on the basis of status.
local: Kʋ daarɩ abam balʋ na yɩ gambɛ sɩm yum tiinǝ tɩn, á taá kɩ á gambɛ sɩm lanyɩranɩ dɩ kʋntʋ doŋ, sɩ á yɩ taá fugi-ba, bɛŋwaanɩ abam ye nɩ á maama jɩgɩ Yuutu dɩdʋa mʋ o na wʋ Wɛ-sɔŋɔ nɩ, yɩ wʋntʋ mʋ te abam dɩ á gambɛ sɩm maama. Wʋntʋ nan tɔgɩ cɩga mʋ, o ba kuri nɔɔna daanɩ.

eng: Finally, be strengthened by the Lord and his powerful strength.
local: Amʋ na lagɩ a ta kʋlʋ a ma a kweeli tɩn mʋ yɩ sɩ á taá zɩgɩ kǝŋkǝŋ dɩ á na ŋwɩ dɩ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi tɩn, sɩ á joŋi o dam-fɔrɔ kʋm.

eng: Put on Gods armor so that you can make a stand against the tricks of the devil.
local: Kwaanɩ-na á joŋi Wɛ zǝnǝ yam maama nɩnɛɛnɩ jara zɩla te, sɩ á wanɩ á fɔgɩ á cɩ á tɩtɩ, sɩ sʋtaanɩ yɩ wanɩ abam dɩ dɩ sɩsɩɩna yam maama.

eng: We arent fighting against human enemies but against rulers, authorities, forces of cosmic darkness, and spiritual powers of evil in the heavens.
local: Jara yam kʋntʋ nan daɩ dɩbam dɩ nabiinǝ jara. Kʋ yɩ dɩdaanɩ ciciri sɩlʋ maama na jɩgɩ dam wɛyuu tɩlampolo nɩ tɩn mʋ. Sɩntʋ mʋ yɩ sʋtaanɩ jɩŋa dɩdɛɛra, yɩ sɩ jɩgɩ dam lʋgʋ kʋntʋ na yɩ lim tɩn baŋa nɩ.

eng: Therefore, pick up the full armor of God so that you can stand your ground on the evil day and after you have done everything possible to still stand.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ, joŋi-na Wɛ zǝnǝ yam maama á ma fɔgɩ á cɩ á tɩtɩ, sɩ á wanɩ á vɩn sʋtaanɩ sɩ á zɩgɩ dɩ baarɩ maŋa kalʋ na cana tɩn wʋnɩ, sɩ á na wanɩ jara yam, sɩ á ta taá zɩgɩ kǝŋkǝŋ á zɩga kam je nɩ.

eng: So stand with the belt of truth around your waist, justice as your breastplate.
local: Nan fɔgɩ-na á zɩgɩ dɩ baarɩ, sɩ á taá jɩgɩ Wɛ cɩga kam, nɩ á na vɔgɩ á gwaarʋ dɩ kili te tɩn, sɩ á daarɩ á taá kɩ lanyɩranɩ Wɛ yigǝ nɩ, sɩ kʋ wanɩ kʋ cɩ abam dɩ wo-lwaanʋ, nɩnɛɛnɩ á na zʋ luguru gwaarʋ á ma kwǝli á nyɔɔna jara wʋnɩ te tɩn.

eng: and put shoes on your feet so that you are ready to spread the good news of peace.
local: Á nan maŋɩ sɩ á kwaanɩ á tɔɔlɩ Wɛ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kalʋ na paɩ nɔɔna dɩ Wɛ fɔgɩ daanɩ tɩn, nɩnɛɛnɩ á na zʋ natra sɩ kʋ zǝni á vǝŋǝ jara wʋnɩ te tɩn.

eng: Above all, carry the shield of faith so that you can extinguish the flaming arrows of the evil one.
local: Á taá jɩgɩ-na wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ maŋa maama, nɩnɛɛnɩ á na ze tɔn-tɩʋ kʋm ba na ma kɔŋɩ cɩna tɩn, sɩ á cɩ á tɩtɩ dɩ wo-lwaanʋ tu sʋtaanɩ cɩ-dɛɛra yam ya na jɩgɩ minǝ tɩn, sɩ á wanɩ á pa ya maama dwe.

eng: Take the helmet of salvation and the sword of the Spirit, which is Gods word.
local: Ma-na Wɛ na vrɩ abam ŋwɩa te tɩn á ma cɩ á tɩtɩ, nɩ luguru yu-kwǝli mʋ á pugǝ á yuu nɩ jara wʋnɩ te. Á ma-na Wɛ taanɩ dɩm á ma wǝli á tɩtɩ, nɩ sʋ-zɔɔ te, Wɛ Joro kʋm na kɩ abam jɩŋa nɩ tɩn.

eng: Offer prayers and petitions in the Spirit all the time. Stay alert by hanging in there and praying for all believers.
local: Á kɩ-na wǝǝnu tɩm kʋntʋ maama dɩ Wɛ-loro sɩ Wɛ zǝni abam. Á taá warɩ Wɛ maŋa maama nɩ DƖ Joro kʋm na pɛ abam dam te tɩn. Taá jɩgɩ-na á tɩtɩ, sɩ á vɔ á wʋ lanyɩranɩ, sɩ á taá loori Wɛ DƖ nɔɔna bam maama ŋwaanɩ.

eng: As for me, pray that when I open my mouth, Ill get a message that confidently makes this secret plan of the gospel known.
local: Taá loori-na Wɛ á pa amʋ dɩ, sɩ a na puri a ni sɩ a ta taanɩ, sɩ DƖ pa-nɩ taanɩ dɩlʋ a na wʋ́ ŋɔɔnɩ tɩn, sɩ a daarɩ a na baarɩ a brɩ nɔɔna DƖ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam, sɩ a pa ba lwarɩ DƖ cɩga kalʋ ya na sǝgi tɩn.

eng: Im an ambassador in chains for the sake of the gospel. Pray so that the Lord will give me the confidence to say what I have to say.
local: Kʋ yɩ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ Wɛ tʋŋɩ-nɩ sɩ a taa brɩ nɔɔna. Ba nan kɩ-nɩ pɩɩna digǝ nɩ a na brɩ-ka tɩn ŋwaanɩ mʋ. Nan taá loori-na Wɛ sɩ DƖ zǝni-nɩ, sɩ a taa waɩ a tɔɔlɩ-ka dɩ baarɩ nɩ kʋ na maŋɩ sɩ a taa kɩ te tɩn.

eng: Tychicus, my loved brother and faithful servant of the Lord, can inform you about my situation and what Im doing.
local: Amʋ nan lagɩ sɩ abam lwarɩ amʋ labaarɩ dɩ a na wʋra a kɩ kʋlʋ tɩn mʋ. Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ a lagɩ a tʋŋɩ dɩ́ ko-bu-sono Tisiki sɩ o ba abam te, sɩ o fɔgɩ o ta amʋ labaarɩ maama dɩ abam. Wʋntʋ tʋŋɩ o pa dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi dɩ yawala mʋ.

eng: Ive sent him for this reason—so that you will know about us. He can reassure you.
local: Amʋ lagɩ sɩ o pa abam lwarɩ dɩbam labaarɩ, sɩ kʋ pa á bɩcara pǝni tɩga nɩ.

eng: May there be peace with the brothers and sisters as well as love with the faith that comes from God the Father and the Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Dɩ́ Ko Wɛ dɩ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi Krisi wʋ́ pa dɩ́ ko-biǝ bam maama yazurǝ, sɩ ba taa jɩgɩ da-sono dɩ wʋ-dɩdʋa.

eng: May grace be with all those who love our Lord Jesus Christ forever.
local: Wɛ wʋ́ pa balʋ maama na jɩgɩ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi Krisi sono kʋlʋ na ba ti tɩn yu-yoŋo.

eng: From Paul and Timothy, slaves of Christ Jesus. To all those in Philippi who are Gods people in Christ Jesus, along with your supervisors and servants.
local: Amʋ Pooli mʋ pʋpʋnɩ tɔnɔ kʋntʋ yɩ Timoti wʋ a tee nɩ. Dɩbam yɩ Zezi Krisi tɩntʋŋna mʋ. Dɩ́ pʋpʋnɩ sɩ dɩ́ pa abam balʋ maama na wʋ Filipi nɩ yɩ á tɔgɩ Zezi Krisi ŋwaanɩ á ji Wɛ nɔɔna tɩn, dɩ á kɔgɔ kʋm yigǝ tiinǝ bam dɩ ba zǝnzǝnnǝ bam dɩ.

eng: May the grace and peace from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ be with you.
local: Dɩ́ Ko Wɛ dɩ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi Krisi wʋ́ pa abam yazurǝ dɩ yu-yoŋo.

eng: I thank my God every time I mention you in my prayers.
local: Maŋa maama amʋ na guli abam gulǝ, a yǝni a kɩ a Tu Wɛ le mʋ abam ŋwaanɩ.

eng: Im thankful for all of you every time I pray, and its always a prayer full of joy.
local: Maŋa maama a na loori Wɛ a pa abam maama, a jɩgɩ wʋpolo mʋ.

eng: Im glad because of the way you have been my partners in the ministry of the gospel from the time you first believed it until now.
local: dɩ abam na tɔgɩ á wǝli-nɩ dɩ Wɛ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam tɩtʋŋa yam kʋ zɩgɩ pulim nɩ kʋ ba kʋ yi zɩm tɩn.

eng: Im sure about this: the one who started a good work in you will stay with you to complete the job by the day of Christ Jesus.
local: Amʋ ye lanyɩranɩ nɩ, Wɛ dɩlʋ na maŋɩ DƖ puli tɩtʋŋ-ŋʋna yam kʋntʋ abam bɩcara nɩ tɩn, dɩntʋ daa ta wʋ́ pa ya vu ya guri dɛ dɩm Zezi Krisi na wʋ́ joori o ba tɩn.

eng: I have good reason to think this way about all of you because I keep you in my heart. You are all my partners in Gods grace, both during my time in prison and in the defense and support of the gospel.
local: Amʋ tiini a soe abam dɩ a bɩcarɩ maama. Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ paɩ kʋ maŋɩ sɩ amʋ taa jɩgɩ á wʋbʋŋa a wʋnɩ kʋntʋ doŋ. Bɛŋwaanɩ abam maama tɔgɩ á na yu-yoŋo kʋm nɩ amʋ dɩ na nɛ te tɩn, lele kʋntʋ ba na kɩ-nɩ pɩɩna digǝ nɩ tɩn, dɩ maŋa kalʋ a ya na kaagɩ a beeri je maama a ŋɔɔnɩ cɩga a pa Wɛ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam jɩgɩ kuri tɩn.

eng: God is my witness that I feel affection for all of you with the compassion of Christ Jesus.
local: Abam fra jɩgɩ amʋ, nɩ Zezi Krisi tɩtɩ na soe abam te tɩn mʋ. Wɛ tɩtɩ ye nɩ a na tagɩ kʋlʋ tɩn yɩ cɩga mʋ.

eng: This is my prayer: that your love might become even more and more rich with knowledge and all kinds of insight.
local: A na loori Wɛ a pa abam kʋlʋ ŋwaanɩ tɩn yɩ sɩ abam sono kʋm mʋ fɔgɩ kʋ puli zanzan, kʋ wǝli dɩ yǝno sɩ kʋ pa á taá waɩ á lwarɩ kʋlʋ maama na yɩ cɩga tɩn.

eng: I pray this so that you will be able to decide what really matters and so you will be sincere and blameless on the day of Christ.
local: Kʋntʋ mʋ á wʋ́ wanɩ á kuri kʋlʋ na lamma tɩn á kɩ, sɩ Zezi Krisi dɛ dɩm na yiǝ, sɩ digiru yɩ taa wʋ á bɩcara nɩ, sɩ nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ yɩ zaŋɩ o na á wo-lɔŋɔ o ta.

eng: I pray that you will then be filled with the fruit of righteousness, which comes from Jesus Christ, in order to give glory and praise to God.
local: Kʋlʋ na wǝli da tɩn, á pa á kǝm maama taa tɔgɩ cɩga lanyɩranɩ nɩ Zezi Krisi na zǝni abam te tɩn. Kʋntʋ wʋ́ pa Wɛ na zulǝ dɩ tiǝ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, I want you to know that the things that have happened to me have actually advanced the gospel.
local: A ko-biǝ-ba, a lagɩ sɩ á lwarɩ nɩ yaara yalʋ na yi amʋ tɩn nan pɛ Wɛ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam jagɩ ka yi yigǝ mʋ.

eng: The whole Praetorian Guard and everyone else knows that Im in prison for Christ.
local: Kʋ na kɩ amʋ te tɩn pɛ pamaŋna balʋ na nii pɛ wʋm sɔŋɔ kʋm tɩn dɩ balʋ maama na wʋra tɩn lwarɩ nɩ, kʋ yɩ amʋ na tɔgɩ Zezi Krisi tɩn ŋwaanɩ mʋ ba kɩ-nɩ pɩɩna digǝ nɩ.

eng: Most of the brothers and sisters have had more confidence through the Lord to speak the word boldly and bravely because of my jail time.
local: Kʋlʋ na wǝli da tɩn, amʋ na wʋ pɩɩna digǝ nɩ tɩn pɛ dɩ́ ko-biǝ bam zanzan tiini ba kɩ ba wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm, kʋ pa ba jɩgɩ baarɩ zanzan ba maa brɩ Wɛ taanɩ dɩm yɩ ba ba kwarɩ fʋʋnɩ.

eng: Some certainly preach Christ with jealous and competitive motives, but others preach with good motives.
local: Kʋ yɩ cɩga mʋ sɩ nɔɔna badaara tɔɔlɩ Zezi Krisi kwǝrǝ kam dɩ wʋ-gʋʋ dɩ kantɔgɔ mʋ amʋ ŋwaanɩ. Kʋ daarɩ badaara nan tɔɔlɩ-ka dɩ ba wʋbʋŋ-laarʋ mʋ.

eng: They are motivated by love, because they know that Im put here to give a defense of the gospel.
local: Bantʋ tɔɔlɩ dɩ sono mʋ, bɛŋwaanɩ ba ye nɩ Wɛ mʋ pɛ-nɩ ni sɩ a ŋɔɔnɩ cɩga a pa DƖ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam ja kuri.

eng: the others preach Christ because of their selfish ambition. They are insincere, hoping to cause me more pain while Im in prison.
local: Badonnǝ bam nan tɔɔlɩ Zezi kwǝrǝ kam sɩ kʋ pa ba tɩtɩ mʋ kamunni, sɩ ba ba jɩgɩ wʋ-poŋo. Ba nan bʋŋɩ sɩ ba pa amʋ yaara yam mʋ tiini ya puli, a na wʋ pɩɩna digǝ nɩ tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: What do I think about this? Just this: since Christ is proclaimed in every possible way, whether from dishonest or true motives, Im glad and Ill continue to be glad.
local: Kʋ nan ba cɔga. A ta jɩgɩ wʋpolo dɩ ba maama na jɩgɩ Zezi Krisi kwǝrǝ kam ba tɔɔlɩ ba brɩ nɔɔna te tɩn. Ba na tɔɔlɩ-ka dɩ wʋbʋŋ-laarʋ naa wʋbʋŋ-balwaarʋ dɩ, kʋ yɩ Zezi kwǝrǝ kam mʋ ba tɔɔla. Amʋ nan ta tiini a jɩgɩ wʋpolo.

eng: Im glad because I know that this will result in my release through your prayers and the help of the Spirit of Jesus Christ.
local: bɛŋwaanɩ amʋ ye nɩ Wɛ wʋ́ joŋi-nɩ DƖ yagɩ, abam na loori-DƖ á pa-nɩ yɩ Zezi Krisi Joro kʋm dɩ zǝni-nɩ tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: It is my expectation and hope that I wont be put to shame in anything. Rather, I hope with daring courage that Christs greatness will be seen in my body, now as always, whether I live or die.
local: Amʋ nan tiini a jɩgɩ tɩɩna nɩ a bá kɩ woŋo kʋlʋ na wʋ́ pa a na a cavɩɩra tɩn. Kʋ na yɩ lele kʋntʋ dɩ maŋa maama, aá ta jɩgɩ pu-dɩa, sɩ a na ŋwɩ naa a na tɩga, sɩ Zezi Krisi na zulǝ a ŋwɩa kam maama wʋnɩ.

eng: Because for me, living serves Christ and dying is even better.
local: Kʋ na yɩ amʋ, a ŋwɩ Zezi Krisi ŋwaanɩ mʋ. A nan na tɩgɩ dɩ, kʋʋ́ ta jɩgɩ nyɔɔrɩ kʋ pa-nɩ.

eng: If I continue to live in this world, I get results from my work.
local: Amʋ nan ta na ŋwɩ lʋgʋ baŋa nɩ, a tɩtʋŋɩ dɩm wʋ́ wanɩ dɩ wǝli nɔɔna lanyɩranɩ. Kʋntʋ tɩn, a yǝri a na wʋ́ twǝri kʋlʋ sɩ a daarɩ kʋlʋ.

eng: But I dont know what I prefer. Im torn between the two because I want to leave this life and be with Christ, which is far better.
local: Wǝǝnu tɩntʋ tɩle mʋ jɩgɩ-nɩ tɩ pa a yǝri a na wʋ́ lɩ kʋlʋ tɩn. Kʋlʋ na jɩgɩ fra kʋ pa-nɩ tɩn mʋ yɩ sɩ a yagɩ lʋgʋ baŋa, sɩ a daarɩ a vu Zezi Krisi te a taa wʋra. Kʋntʋ wʋ́ tiini kʋ taa lana.

eng: However, its more important for me to stay in this world for your sake.
local: Kʋ daarɩ, a ta na wʋ lʋgʋ baŋa nɩ, kʋʋ́ ta jɩgɩ zǝnǝ zanzan kʋ pa abam.

eng: Im sure of this: I will stay alive and remain with all of you to help your progress and the joy of your faith.
local: A ye nɩ kʋntʋ yɩ cɩga mʋ, yɩ kʋ pɛ a lwarɩ nɩ kʋ maŋɩ sɩ a ta wʋ lʋgʋ baŋa nɩ. Amʋ wʋ́ ta wʋ abam maama tee nɩ, sɩ kʋ pa á fɔgɩ á tɔgɩ Wɛ cɩga kam, sɩ á taá jɩgɩ wʋpolo ka ŋwaanɩ.

eng: and to increase your pride in Christ Jesus through my presence when I visit you again.
local: Kʋntʋ tɩn, amʋ na joori a ba a wʋ abam tee nɩ, kʋʋ́ pa á tiini á taá zuli Zezi Krisi dɩ wʋpolo amʋ yagɩm dɩm ŋwaanɩ.

eng: Most important, live together in a manner worthy of Christs gospel. Do this, whether I come and see you or Im absent and hear about you. Do this so that you stand firm, united in one spirit and mind as you struggle together to remain faithful to the gospel.
local: Woŋo kʋlʋ yɩranɩ na jɩgɩ kuri tɩn mʋ yɩ sɩ á pa á tɩtʋŋa maama taa tɔgɩ dɩ Zezi Krisi kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam na brɩ te tɩn. Kʋntʋ, amʋ na nɛ cwǝŋǝ sɩ a ba abam te, naa a na wʋ nɛ, a ta wʋ́ lwarɩ nɩ abam zɩgɩ kǝŋkǝŋ dɩ wʋbʋŋ-dɩdwɩ, yɩ á wǝli daanɩ á kwaana á tʋŋa, sɩ kʋ pa nɔɔna kɩ ba wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam.

eng: That way, you wont be afraid of anything your enemies do. Your faithfulness and courage are a sign of their coming destruction and your salvation, which is from God.
local: Á yɩ sɛ sɩ á dʋna bam pa fʋʋnɩ zʋ abam dɩ fɩnfɩɩn dɩ. Á na jɩgɩ baarɩ, kʋʋ́ brɩ nɩ bantʋ wʋ́ ba ba cɔgɩ yɩ abam na vrɩm. Wɛ tɩtɩ mʋ wʋ́ pa kʋ kɩ kʋntʋ.

eng: God has generously granted you the privilege, not only of believing in Christ but also of suffering for Christs sake.
local: Wɛ na pɛ abam yu-yoŋo kʋlʋ tɩn, kʋ daɩ sɩ á sɛ Zezi Krisi dɩ á wʋ-dɩdʋa yɩranɩ má, kʋ yɩ sɩ á kwǝri á na yaara dɩ mʋ o ŋwaanɩ.

eng: You are having the same struggle that you saw me face and now hear that Im still facing.
local: Abam dɛɛn nɛ amʋ na yǝni a yaarɩ te a tʋŋɩ Wɛ ŋwaanɩ, yɩ á ta kwǝri á ni nɩ kʋ yɩ kʋntʋ mʋ dɩ zɩm maama. Abam dɩ laan nan wǝli dɩ amʋ á wʋ yantʋ yaara yam wʋnɩ mʋ.

eng: Therefore, if there is any encouragement in Christ, any comfort in love, any sharing in the Spirit, any sympathy.
local: Abam na ŋwɩ dɩ Zezi Krisi tɩn mʋ paɩ á jɩgɩ baarɩ. O sono kʋm maa paɩ á jɩgɩ wʋ-zuru. Wɛ Joro kʋm mʋ wʋ abam wʋnɩ, nɩ kʋ na wʋ Zezi nɔɔna bam maama wʋnɩ te tɩn. Á maa jɩgɩ da-ŋwaŋa dɩ sono.

eng: complete my joy by thinking the same way, having the same love, being united, and agreeing with each other.
local: Kʋ na sɩɩnɩ kʋ yɩ kʋntʋ tɩn, a loori abam sɩ á taá jɩgɩ wʋbʋŋ-dɩdwɩ mʋ daanɩ dɩ sono dɩdʋa, sɩ á daarɩ á taá jɩgɩ ni-dɩdʋa dɩ wʋ-dɩdʋa. Abam na kɩ kʋntʋ, kʋʋ́ pa a taa tiini a jɩgɩ wʋpolo.

eng: Dont do anything for selfish purposes, but with humility think of others as better than yourselves.
local: Á yɩ zaŋɩ á kɩ kʋlʋkʋlʋ dɩ kamunni sɩ kʋ pa á tɩtɩ na zulǝ. Nan tu-na á tɩtɩ á pa daanɩ, sɩ á taá nii nɩ nɔɔnʋ maama dwe abam.

eng: Instead of each person watching out for their own good, watch out for what is better for others.
local: Nɔɔnʋ maama maŋɩ sɩ o bʋŋɩ o na wʋ́ zǝni o doŋ te tɩn mʋ, kʋ daɩ sɩ o taa beeri o tɩtɩ zǝnǝ yɩranɩ.

eng: Adopt the attitude that was in Christ Jesus.
local: Á wʋbʋŋa yam maŋɩ sɩ ya taa yɩ nɩnɛɛnɩ Zezi Krisi wʋbʋŋa yam mʋ.

eng: Though he was in the form of God, he did not consider being equal with God something to exploit.
local: Wʋntʋ nan maŋɩ o jɩgɩ Wɛ nyɩnyʋgʋ mʋ. O dɩdaanɩ Baŋa-Wɛ yɩ bɩdwɩ mʋ, yɩ o wʋ bʋŋɩ nɩ kʋntʋ yɩ woŋo kʋlʋ o na maŋɩ sɩ o ja-kʋ kǝŋkǝŋ sɩ o dɩ Wɛ taa maɩ daanɩ tɩn.

eng: But he emptied himself by taking the form of a slave and by becoming like human beings. When he found himself in the form of a human.
local: O nan tiŋi wǝǝnu tɩntʋ maama daa nɩ mʋ, yɩ o daarɩ o ba o ji nabiinu. O yɩ tɩntʋŋnʋ.

eng: he humbled himself by becoming obedient to the point of death, even death on a cross.
local: O na tu o ŋwɩ dɩ nabiinǝ kʋntʋ tɩn, o dɛɛn tu o tɩtɩ yɩ o sɛ Wɛ ni o ba o tɩ. Kʋ nan daɩ tʋʋnɩ dɩ tʋʋnɩ, kʋ yɩ ba pag-o tʋʋn-dagara baŋa nɩ mʋ ba gʋ.

eng: Therefore, God highly honored him and gave him a name above all names.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ Wɛ laan pɛ Zezi yuu tiini kʋ zaŋɩ wɛɛnɩ dɩ zulǝ, yɩ DƖ daarɩ DƖ pa-o yɩrɩ dɩlʋ na dwe yɩra maama tɩn.

eng: so that at the name of Jesus everyone in heaven, on earth, and under the earth might bow.
local: Mʋ kʋ kuri maŋa wʋ́ ba, yɩ balʋ maama na wʋ wɛyuu nɩ naa tɩga baŋa nɩ naa tɩga kuri nɩ tɩn maŋɩ sɩ ba kuni doonǝ ba zuli Zezi o yɩrɩ dɩm ŋwaanɩ.

eng: and every tongue confess that Jesus Christ is Lord, to the glory of God the Father.
local: Ba maama wʋ́ ta dɩ ba niǝ jaja nɩ, Zezi Krisi mʋ yɩ ba Yuutu. Kʋntʋ wʋ́ pa o Ko Wɛ na zulǝ lanyɩranɩ.

eng: Therefore, my loved ones, just as you always obey me, not just when I am present but now even more while I am away, carry out your own salvation with fear and trembling.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ, a cilon-sonnu-ba, abam dɛɛn na maŋɩ á sɛ amʋ zaasɩm dɩm maŋa kalʋ amʋ ya na wʋ á tee nɩ tɩn, á nan ta maŋɩ sɩ á sɛ á dwǝni lele kʋntʋ a daa na tǝri abam tee nɩ dɩ tɩn. Taá kwarɩ-na Wɛ lanyɩranɩ dɩ ya-sɩʋ, sɩ á kwaanɩ á tʋŋɩ á pa vrɩm dɩlʋ á na nɛ tɩn ja kuri.

eng: God is the one who enables you both to want and to actually live out his good purposes.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ Wɛ mʋ yǝni DƖ tʋŋɩ abam bɩcara nɩ, DƖ pa á beeri kǝnǝ yalʋ na wʋ́ poli DƖ wʋ, yɩ DƖ pa á wanɩ-ya á kɩ.

eng: Do everything without grumbling and arguing.
local: Woŋo kʋlʋ maama á na lagɩ á kɩ tɩn, sɩ á yɩ taá pʋʋna naa á magɩ kantɔgɔ kʋ baŋa nɩ.

eng: so that you may be blameless and pure, innocent children of God surrounded by people who are crooked and corrupt. Among these people you shine like stars in the world.
local: Kʋntʋ mʋ á wʋ́ ta jɩgɩ cɩga Wɛ tee nɩ, yɩ á jɩgɩ wʋ-poŋo. Á wʋ́ ta yɩ Wɛ biǝ balʋ na ba jɩgɩ wo-lɔŋɔ, yɩ á zʋʋrɩ nɔn-balwaarʋ tɩlʋ wʋbʋŋa na ba tɔgɩ cwǝŋǝ tɩn tɩtarɩ nɩ. Á wʋ́ ta yɩ nɩ pooni á pa lʋgʋ baŋa nɔɔna nɩ calɩcwɩ te.

eng: because you hold on to the word of life. This will allow me to say on the day of Christ that I havent run for nothing or worked for nothing.
local: dɩ á na ŋɔɔnɩ Wɛ taanɩ dɩlʋ na paɩ ŋwɩa á brɩ nɔɔna tɩn. Á na kɩ kʋntʋ doŋ, kʋʋ́ brɩ nɩ a na cɛ a tʋŋɩ Wɛ tɩtʋŋa yam abam ŋwaanɩ te tɩn wʋ jigi kafɛ, yɩ aá ta jɩgɩ wʋpolo dɩ abam dɛ dɩm Zezi Krisi na wʋ́ joori o ba tɩn.

eng: But even if I am poured out like a drink offering upon the altar of service for your faith, I am glad. Im glad with all of you.
local: Abam na kɩ á wʋ-dɩdʋa á sɛ Zezi tɩn nyɩ dɩ á kwe woŋo mʋ á ma kaanɩ Baŋa-Wɛ yɩ kʋ poli DƖ wʋ. Amʋ na maŋɩ a lagɩ a ga a ŋwɩa mʋ dɩ, aá sɛ sɩ ka wǝli abam kaanɩm dɩm nɩ Wɛ yigǝ nɩ. Dɩ kʋ dɩ, aá ta jɩgɩ wʋpolo, yɩ abam dɩ wʋ́ wǝli dɩ amʋ á taá jɩgɩ wʋpolo.

eng: You should be glad about this in the same way. Be glad with me!.
local: Kʋntʋ, kʋ maŋɩ sɩ abam dɩ ta jɩgɩ wʋpolo lanyɩranɩ, sɩ amʋ dɩ wǝli dɩ abam a kɩ wʋpolo.

eng: I hope in the Lord Jesus to send Timothy to see you soon so that I may be encouraged by hearing about you.
local: Dɩbam Yuutu Zezi na sɛ, amʋ bʋŋɩ sɩ a tʋŋɩ Timoti sɩ o ba abam te lele. Kʋntʋ, o na joori o ba amʋ te, oó pa-nɩ abam labaarɩ sɩ a daa yɩ ta jɩgɩ liǝ.

eng: I have no one like him. He is a person who genuinely cares about your well-being.
local: Nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ daa tǝri amʋ tee nɩ, o na jɩgɩ a wʋbʋŋa yam doŋ, sɩ o sɩɩnɩ o taa ye abam zǝnǝ ni nɩ, kʋ na daɩ Timoti yɩranɩ.

eng: All the others put their own business ahead of Jesus Christs business.
local: Balʋ maama na daarɩ tɩn beeri ba tɩtɩ wǝǝnu yɩranɩ mʋ, yɩ ba yigǝ tǝrǝ dɩ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ na yɩ Zezi Krisi nyɩm tɩn.

eng: You know his character, how he labors with me for the gospel like a son works with his father.
local: Kʋ nan na yɩ Timoti, abam maŋɩ á ye o wʋ na tɔgɩ cɩga te tɩn. O dɛɛn tɔgɩ dɩ amʋ o tɔɔlɩ Wɛ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam, nɩnɛɛnɩ bu na tɔgɩ dɩ o ko o tʋŋɩ te tɩn.

eng: So he is the one that I hope to send as soon as I find out how things turn out here for me.
local: Kʋntʋ mʋ a bʋŋɩ sɩ a tʋŋ-o abam tee nɩ maŋa kalʋ a na wʋ́ lwarɩ ba na wʋ́ di a taanɩ dɩm te tɩn.

eng: I trust in the Lord that I also will visit you soon.
local: Amʋ nan jɩgɩ tɩɩna dɩ dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm nɩ baá pʋrɩ-nɩ ba yagɩ lele, yɩ a laan ba abam te.

eng: I think it is also necessary to send Epaphroditus to you. He is my brother, coworker, and fellow soldier; and he is your representative who serves my needs.
local: Amʋ bʋŋɩ nɩ kʋ maŋɩ sɩ a tʋŋɩ dɩ́ ko-bu Epafroditi sɩ o joori o ba abam te. O tɔgɩ dɩ amʋ yɩ dɩ́ tʋŋɩ Wɛ tɩtʋŋa, yɩ dɩ́ kwǝri dɩ́ na cam ya baŋa nɩ. Wʋntʋ mʋ yɩ abam tɩntʋŋnʋ wʋlʋ á na lɩ sɩ o ja zǝnǝ o ba o pa-nɩ a yaara yam wʋnɩ tɩn.

eng: He misses you all, and he was upset because you heard he was sick.
local: Abam fra maa jɩg-o yɩ o lagɩ sɩ o daa na abam. O wʋ ya cɔgɩ dɩ á na ni nɩ o ya ba jɩgɩ yazurǝ tɩn.

eng: In fact, he was so sick that he nearly died. But God had mercy on him—and not just on him but also on me, because his death would have caused me great sorrow.
local: Kʋ yɩ cɩga mʋ nɩ o ya ba jɩgɩ yazurǝ, yɩ o ga fɩɩn sɩ o tɩ. Wɛ nan duri o ŋwaŋa. Kʋ nan daɩ wʋntʋ yɩranɩ ŋwaŋa mʋ DƖ duri. Wɛ duri amʋ dɩ ŋwaŋa, dɩ DƖ na pɛ o wǝri yɩ a wʋ daa wʋ cɔgɩ zanzan tɩn.

eng: Therefore, I am sending him immediately so that when you see him again you can be glad and I wont worry.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ a tiini a kwaanɩ a lagɩ sɩ o yi abam te lɩla, sɩ á taá jɩgɩ wʋpolo dɩ á na wʋ́ joori á na-o tɩn, sɩ amʋ dɩ liǝ yam laan ti.

eng: So welcome him in the Lord with great joy and show great respect for people like him.
local: O na tuǝ, sɩ á jeer-o lanyɩranɩ dɩ wʋpolo zanzan, o na yɩ dɩ́ ko-bu dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi ŋwaanɩ tɩn. Kʋ maŋɩ sɩ á taá zuli nɔɔna balʋ na nyɩ nɩnɛɛnɩ wʋntʋ te tɩn.

eng: He risked his life and almost died for the work of Christ, and he did this to make up for the help you couldnt give me.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ o ya gɛ fɩɩn mʋ sɩ o tɩ Zezi Krisi tɩtʋŋa yam ŋwaanɩ. O dɛɛn lagɩ o ga o ŋwɩa dɩ o na lǝni abam yuu nɩ sɩ o taa tʋŋɩ o wǝli-nɩ tɩn ŋwaanɩ mʋ.

eng: So then, my brothers and sisters, be glad in the Lord. Its no trouble for me to repeat the same things to you because they will help keep you on track.
local: A ko-biǝ-ba, kʋlʋ na daarɩ sɩ a ta a wǝli da tɩn, á taá jɩgɩ wʋpolo dɩ á na ŋwɩ dɩ dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm tɩn. A na maŋɩ a pʋpʋnɩ kʋlʋ a ma brɩ abam tɩn, kʋ ba camma sɩ a ta joori a brɩ-kʋ abam, sɩ kʋ wanɩ kʋ cɩ abam wo-lwaanʋ wʋnɩ.

eng: Watch out for the dogs. Watch out for people who do evil things. Watch out for those who insist on circumcision, which is really mutilation.
local: Fɔgɩ-na á cɩ á tɩtɩ dɩ kǝm-balwaarʋ tiinǝ balʋ na kwaanɩ sɩ ba taa goni nɔɔna yɩra ba yagɩ tɩn. Bantʋ nyɩ dɩ kakuri mʋ.

eng: We are the circumcision. We are the ones who serve by Gods Spirit and who boast in Christ Jesus. We dont put our confidence in rituals performed on the body.
local: Dɩbam nan mʋ yɩ balʋ na yɩ Wɛ nɔɔna cɩga cɩga, yɩ kʋ daɩ nɩ dɩ́ na goni dɩ́ bǝkǝri tɩn ŋwaanɩ, nɩ bantʋ na brɩ te tɩn. Dɩbam maɩ Wɛ Joro kʋm dam mʋ dɩ́ zuli Wɛ, yɩ dɩ́ jɩgɩ wʋpolo dɩ Zezi Krisi na kɩ kʋlʋ o pa dɩbam tɩn, yɩ dɩ́ bá tɩɩgɩ cullu tɩlʋ na brɩ nɩ nɔɔna yɩra gonim mʋ jɩgɩ kuri kʋ pa Wɛ tɩn.

eng: though I have good reason to have this kind of confidence. If anyone else has reason to put their confidence in physical advantages, I have even more.
local: Lʋgʋ baŋa cullu tɩm ya na jɩgɩ kuri, amʋ tɩtɩ ya wʋ́ wanɩ a tɩɩgɩ-tɩ. Nɔɔnʋ nan na bʋŋɩ nɩ o jɩgɩ bʋra sɩ o tɩɩgɩ lʋgʋ baŋa cullu tɩm, amʋ ya jɩgɩ bʋra a dwe.

eng: I was circumcised on the eighth day. I am from the people of Israel and the tribe of Benjamin. I am a Hebrew of the Hebrews. With respect to observing the Law, Im a Pharisee.
local: Amʋ dɛɛn na yi da nana tɩn, mʋ ba goni-nɩ nɩ dɩbam Zwifǝ cullu tɩm na brɩ te tɩn. A yɩ Yisɩrayɛlɩ tu mʋ, yɩ a nuŋi Bɛnzamɛn dwi dɩm wʋnɩ. Amʋ sɩɩnɩ a yɩ Zwifu mʋ. Zwifǝ bam mʋ lʋgɩ-nɩ. Kʋ nan na yɩ Wɛ cullu tɩm tɔgɩm, amʋ dɛɛn wʋ Farizɩan tiinǝ kɔgɔ kʋm wʋnɩ mʋ.

eng: With respect to devotion to the faith, I harassed the church. With respect to righteousness under the Law, Im blameless.
local: Kʋ na yɩ Wɛ tɩtʋŋa yam laŋa nɩ, amʋ dɛɛn kwaanɩ a tʋŋɩ lanyɩranɩ dɩ a na bɛɛsɩ Zezi kɔgɔ kʋm nɔɔna bam te tɩn. Kʋ nan daa na yɩ Wɛ cullu tɩm sɛɛm, a dɛɛn sɛ-tɩ dɩ cɩga yɩ tusim tǝrǝ.

eng: These things were my assets, but I wrote them off as a loss for the sake of Christ.
local: A dɛɛn paɩ wǝǝnu tɩm kʋntʋ maama jɩgɩ kuri mʋ tɩ pa-nɩ. A laan nan bʋŋɩ a lwarɩ nɩ tɩ yɩ kafɛ mʋ a yigǝ nɩ, dɩ a na sɛ Zezi Krisi tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: But even beyond that, I consider everything a loss in comparison with the superior value of knowing Christ Jesus my Lord. I have lost everything for him, but what I lost I think of as sewer trash, so that I might gain Christ.
local: Kʋ sɩɩnɩ kʋ yɩ cɩga, woŋo kʋlʋ maama a na jɩgɩ tɩn, a nii-kʋ nɩ kʋ yɩ kafɛ mʋ a yigǝ nɩ, a laan na lwarɩ Zezi Krisi wʋlʋ na yɩ a Yuutu tɩn ŋwaanɩ. Kʋntʋ tiini kʋ jɩgɩ kuri kʋ pa-nɩ kʋ dwe woŋo maama. Wʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ a kwe woŋo maama a yagɩ daa nɩ. A nii tɩ maama nɩ weeru mʋ a yigǝ nɩ, sɩ a wanɩ a sɛ Zezi Krisi sɩ a taa tɔg-o dɩ a wʋ maama, sɩ kʋ pa a taa yɩ o nɔɔnʋ.

eng: and be found in him. In Christ I have a righteousness that is not my own and that does not come from the Law but rather from the faithfulness of Christ. It is the righteousness of God that is based on faith.
local: Kʋntʋ tɩn, amʋ wʋ́ na cɩga Wɛ tee nɩ a na kɩ a wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Zezi Krisi tɩn ŋwaanɩ, kʋ daa daɩ a tɩtɩ tɩtʋŋa dɩ a na tɔgɩ Wɛ cullu tɩm tɩn ŋwaanɩ. Kʋ nan yɩ Wɛ tɩtɩ mʋ paɩ a jɩgɩ cɩga dɩ a na kɩ a wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Zezi tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: The righteousness that I have comes from knowing Christ, the power of his resurrection, and the participation in his sufferings. It includes being conformed to his death.
local: Woŋo kʋlʋ amʋ na tiini a lagɩ tɩn yɩ sɩ a lwarɩ Zezi Krisi mʋ, sɩ a kwǝri a lwarɩ dam-fɔrɔ kʋlʋ Wɛ na mɛ DƖ bi-o DƖ pa o yagɩ tʋʋnɩ tɩn, sɩ a daarɩ a tɔgɩ a na o yaara yam doŋ, sɩ a taa nyɩ dɩd-o o na sɛ o tɩ nabiinǝ ŋwaanɩ tɩn.

eng: so that I may perhaps reach the goal of the resurrection of the dead.
local: Kʋntʋ tɩn, amʋ dɩ jɩgɩ tɩɩna sɩ Wɛ wʋ́ pa a bi a yagɩ tʋʋnɩ.

eng: Its not that I have already reached this goal or have already been perfected, but I pursue it, so that I may grab hold of it because Christ grabbed hold of me for just this purpose.
local: Kʋ nan daɩ nɩ a maŋɩ a yi wǝǝnu tɩlʋ a na lagɩ sɩ a yi tɩn. Kʋ nan daɩ nɩ a bɩcarɩ fɔgɩ dɩ kwɛ fasɩ yɩ lwarɩm daa tǝrǝ. Amʋ nan kwaanɩ a jaŋɩ mʋ a ve yigǝ, sɩ a laan wanɩ a joŋi pɛɛrɩ Zezi Krisi tee nɩ. Kʋ yɩ kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ o joŋi-nɩ sɩ a taa yɩ o nɔɔnʋ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, I myself dont think Ive reached it, but I do this one thing: I forget about the things behind me and reach out for the things ahead of me.
local: A ko-biǝ-ba, a ba bʋŋɩ nɩ a maŋɩ a yi sɩ a joŋi pɛɛrɩ dɩm. A nan na kɩ kʋlʋ tɩn, a yǝni a lɩ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ na maŋɩ tɩ kɛ tɩn mʋ a wʋbʋŋa nɩ, yɩ a daarɩ a kwaanɩ sɩ a vu a yi wǝǝnu tɩlʋ na wʋ a yigǝ nɩ tɩn.

eng: The goal I pursue is the prize of Gods upward call in Christ Jesus.
local: Kʋntʋ, amʋ kwaana sɩ a yɔɔrɩ a duri a vu a yi kweelim je mʋ, sɩ a joŋi pɛɛrɩ dɩm Wɛ tee nɩ. Pɛɛrɩ dɩm kʋntʋ mʋ yɩ ŋwɩa kalʋ Wɛ na bǝŋi-nɩ sɩ a ba a joŋi DƖ sɔŋɔ nɩ Zezi Krisi ŋwaanɩ tɩn.

eng: So all of us who are spiritually mature should think this way, and if anyone thinks differently, God will reveal it to him or her.
local: Kʋ na yɩ dɩbam balʋ wʋbʋŋa na bɩgɩ dɩ Wɛ cwǝŋǝ tɔgɩm tɩn, kʋ maŋɩ sɩ dɩbam maama sɛ nɩ amʋ na tagɩ te tɩn yɩ cɩga mʋ. Abam badaara wʋbʋŋa nan na daɩ kʋntʋ doŋ, Wɛ wʋ́ pa á lwarɩ woŋo kʋlʋ na yɩ cɩga tɩn.

eng: Only lets live in a way that is consistent with whatever level we have reached.
local: Dɩ kʋ dɩ, kʋ maŋɩ sɩ dɩ́ yɔɔrɩ dɩ́ taá tɔgɩ cwǝŋǝ kalʋ dɩ́ na maŋɩ dɩ́ lwarɩ nɩ ka yɩ cɩga tɩn mʋ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, become imitators of me and watch those who live this way—you can use us as models.
local: A ko-biǝ-ba, kʋ maŋɩ sɩ á taá lwǝni amʋ na kɩ te tɩn mʋ, sɩ á fɔgɩ á nii balʋ na tɔgɩ cwǝ-laa nɩnɛɛnɩ dɩ́ na brɩ abam sɩ á taá tɔgɩ te tɩn.

eng: As I have told you many times and now say with deep sadness, many people live as enemies of the cross.
local: A lagɩ sɩ a joori a brɩ abam wǝǝnu tɩlʋ a na maŋɩ a ta dɩ abam kuni zanzan tɩn mʋ. Kʋ maa paɩ a yi-na nuŋǝ dɩ liǝ yalʋ a na jɩgɩ abam ŋwaanɩ tɩn. Kʋ yɩ nɩ nɔɔna zanzan mʋ wʋ abam wʋnɩ ba tɩtʋŋa na brɩ nɩ ba culi Zezi Krisi tʋʋn-dagara kam mʋ.

eng: Their lives end with destruction. Their god is their stomach, and they take pride in their disgrace because their thoughts focus on earthly things.
local: Ba yǝni ba lagɩ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ fra na jɩgɩ-ba tɩn mʋ kʋ dwe Wɛ. Ba maa jɩgɩ wʋpolo dɩ kʋlʋ na yɩ ba cavɩɩra tɩn, yɩ lʋgʋ baŋa wo-yɔɔrʋ wʋbʋŋa jɩgɩ-ba. Ba kweelim je nɩ Wɛ wʋ́ cɔgɩ-ba mʋ.

eng: Our citizenship is in heaven. We look forward to a savior that comes from there—the Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Kʋ nan na yɩ dɩbam, dɩ́ kugu je wʋ Wɛ-sɔŋɔ nɩ mʋ. Dɩbam cǝgi dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi Krisi sɩ o nuŋi dáanɩ mʋ o ba. Wʋntʋ mʋ vrɩ dɩbam lwarɩm wʋnɩ.

eng: He will transform our humble bodies so that they are like his glorious body, by the power that also makes him able to subject all things to himself.
local: O na tuǝ, o laan wʋ́ pa dɩbam lʋgʋ baŋa yɩra yalʋ na bwǝmmǝ tɩn lǝni ya taa nyɩ dɩ o tɩtɩ yɩra yam te. Yantʋ yɩ Wɛ-sɔŋɔ nyɩm mʋ, yɩ ya jɩgɩ paarɩ-zulǝ. Oó ma o dam-fɔrɔ kʋlʋ na paɩ o waɩ woŋo maama tɩn o ma kɩ kʋntʋ.

eng: Therefore, my brothers and sisters whom I love and miss, who are my joy and crown, stand firm in the Lord. Loved ones.
local: A ko-biǝ-ba, a soe abam lanyɩranɩ yɩ á fra jɩgɩ-nɩ. Abam paɩ a jɩgɩ wʋpolo, yɩ á ta wʋ́ pa a yuu zǝŋi Wɛ yigǝ nɩ. A cilon-sonnu-ba, kwaanɩ-na á zɩgɩ kǝŋkǝŋ dɩ́ Yuutu tɔgɩm dɩm wʋnɩ.

eng: I urge Euodia and I urge Syntyche to come to an agreement in the Lord.
local: A nan loori Evodi dɩ Sintisi lanyɩranɩ, sɩ á taá jɩgɩ wʋbʋŋ-dɩdwɩ á na sɛ dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: Yes, and Im also asking you, loyal friend, to help these women who have struggled together with me in the ministry of the gospel, along with Clement and the rest of my coworkers whose names are in the scroll of life.
local: A loori nmʋ dɩ, wʋlʋ na yɩ a doŋ tɩntʋŋnʋ cɩga cɩga tɩn, sɩ n zǝni kaana bantʋ sɩ ba taa sɛ daanɩ, bɛŋwaanɩ ba dɛɛn tɔgɩ dɩ amʋ yɩ dɩ́ tiini dɩ́ tʋŋɩ dɩ́ tɔɔlɩ Wɛ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam, dɩ Klɩman dɩ balʋ maama na tɔgɩ dɩ amʋ ba tʋŋɩ tɩn. Wɛ maŋɩ DƖ pʋpʋnɩ bantʋ yɩra DƖ ŋwɩa tɔnɔ kʋm wʋnɩ.

eng: Be glad in the Lord always! Again I say, be glad!.
local: Taá kɩ-na wʋpolo maŋa maama á na ŋwɩ dɩ dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm tɩn ŋwaanɩ. A ta lagɩ a joori a ta nɩ, á taá kɩ wʋpolo.

eng: Let your gentleness show in your treatment of all people. The Lord is near.
local: Pa-na nɔɔna maama lwarɩ á lanyɩranɩ wʋm ni nɩ, sɩ dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm maa bɩɩnɩ lele.

eng: Dont be anxious about anything; rather, bring up all of your requests to God in your prayers and petitions, along with giving thanks.
local: Yɩ zaŋɩ-na á taá liǝ dɩ kʋlʋkʋlʋ. Woŋo maama wʋnɩ sɩ á taá warɩ Wɛ, á brɩ-DƖ kʋlʋ á na lagɩ tɩn sɩ DƖ zǝni abam, sɩ á kwǝri á taá kɩ DƖ le maŋa maama.

eng: Then the peace of God that exceeds all understanding will keep your hearts and minds safe in Christ Jesus.
local: Kʋntʋ mʋ Wɛ wʋ́ pa á bɩcara taa zurǝ, sɩ kʋ dwǝni nabiinǝ na wʋ́ wanɩ kʋlʋ ba lwarɩ tɩn. Kʋ maa pa kʋlʋkʋlʋ bá wanɩ kʋ cɔgɩ á bɩcara dɩ á wʋbʋŋa maama, abam na ŋwɩ dɩ Zezi Krisi tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: From now on, brothers and sisters, if anything is excellent and if anything is admirable, focus your thoughts on these things: all that is true, all that is holy, all that is just, all that is pure, all that is lovely, and all that is worthy of praise.
local: A ko-biǝ-ba, kʋlʋ a na lagɩ a ma a guri tɩn, á taá jɩgɩ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ na lana yɩ tɩ maŋɩ dɩ zulǝ tɩn wʋbʋŋa: kʋ na yɩ woŋo kʋlʋ maama na yɩ cɩga tɩn, naa woŋo kʋlʋ na jɩgɩ zulǝ tɩn, naa woŋo kʋlʋ na maŋɩ tɩn, naa woŋo kʋlʋ na ba jɩgɩ tusim tɩn, naa woŋo kʋlʋ na poli nɔɔna wʋrʋ tɩn, naa woŋo kʋlʋ na jɩgɩ tiǝ nɔɔna tee nɩ tɩn, sɩ á taá jɩgɩ-na wǝǝnu tɩm kʋntʋ wʋbʋŋa.

eng: Practice these things: whatever you learned, received, heard, or saw in us. The God of peace will be with you.
local: Á taá kɩ-na wǝǝnu tɩlʋ amʋ na brɩ abam yɩ á sɛ-tɩ tɩn, kʋ na yɩ á na ni kʋlʋ a na taga, yɩ á na kʋlʋ a na kɩ tɩn. Á na sɩɩnɩ á kɩ kʋntʋ, Wʋ-zuru Tu Baŋa-Wɛ wʋ́ ta wʋ á tee nɩ.

eng: I was very glad in the Lord because now at last you have shown concern for me again.
local: A na ŋwɩ dɩ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi tɩn, amʋ tiini a jɩgɩ wʋpolo, bɛŋwaanɩ kʋ daanɩ zanzan yɩ abam daa wʋ guli a gulǝ sɩ á wǝli-nɩ, yɩ lele kʋntʋ á laan zǝni-nɩ. Kʋ nan daɩ nɩ abam ba jɩgɩ a wʋbʋŋa mʋ ya, kʋ yɩ á wʋ nɛ cwǝŋǝ mʋ sɩ á wǝli-nɩ.

eng: Im not saying this because I need anything, for I have learned how to be content in any circumstance.
local: A na tagɩ kʋntʋ doŋ tɩn, kʋ daɩ nɩ a na gɛ woŋo tɩn ŋwaanɩ. Woŋo maama wʋnɩ, amʋ mɩ sɩ a taa jɩgɩ wʋpolo dɩ kʋlʋ a na jɩgɩ tɩn.

eng: I know the experience of being in need and of having more than enough; I have learned the secret to being content in any and every circumstance, whether full or hungry or whether having plenty or being poor.
local: Yinigǝ na jɩgɩ-nɩ, amʋ ye a na wʋ́ ja a tɩtɩ te. A jɩjɩgɩrʋ nan na daga dɩ, a ta ye a na wʋ́ kɩ te. Woŋo maama wʋnɩ, amʋ ye a na wʋ́ kɩ te sɩ a taa jɩgɩ wʋpolo. A na jɩgɩ a di a wʋbʋŋa naa kana na jɩgɩ-nɩ, a jɩjɩgɩrʋ na daga naa tɩ na muri, amʋ ta ye a na wʋ́ kɩ te sɩ a taa jɩgɩ wʋpolo.

eng: I can endure all these things through the power of the one who gives me strength.
local: Amʋ waɩ wǝǝnu tɩm kʋntʋ maama a kɩa, Zezi Krisi na pa-nɩ dam tɩn ŋwaanɩ mʋ.

eng: Still, you have done well to share my distress.
local: Dɩ kʋntʋ dɩ, á kɩ lanyɩranɩ dɩ á na zǝni-nɩ a yaara yam wʋnɩ tɩn.

eng: You Philippians know from the time of my first mission work in Macedonia how no church shared in supporting my ministry except you.
local: Abam Filipi tiinǝ tɩtɩ dɩ ye lanyɩranɩ nɩ, maŋa kalʋ a na puli a wʋra a tɔɔlɩ Wɛ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam a brɩ abam yɩ a laan nuŋi Masɩdʋanɩ nɩ tɩn, kʋ yɩ abam yɩranɩ mʋ wǝli-nɩ. Zezi kɔgɔ kʋdoŋ daa tǝrǝ kʋ dɩ na pɛ amʋ woŋo, kʋ na daɩ abam yɩranɩ.

eng: You sent contributions repeatedly to take care of my needs even while I was in Thessalonica.
local: A dɛɛn na wʋ Tesaloniki nɩ tɩn, abam tʋŋɩ a na lagɩ zǝnǝ yalʋ tɩn á pa-nɩ, yɩ kʋ daɩ kuni bɩdwɩ yɩranɩ.

eng: Im not hoping for a gift, but I am hoping for a profit that accumulates in your account.
local: Kʋ nan daɩ nɩ amʋ lagɩ sɩ a taa joŋi abam pɛɛra yam má mʋ, kʋ yɩ nyɔɔrɩ dɩlʋ abam na wʋ́ na Wɛ tee nɩ ya ŋwaanɩ tɩn mʋ pɛ a jɩgɩ wʋpolo.

eng: I now have plenty and it is more than enough. I am full to overflowing because I received the gifts that you sent from Epaphroditus. Those gifts give off a fragrant aroma, an acceptable sacrifice that pleases God.
local: Amʋ joŋi pɛɛra yalʋ maama abam na pɛ amʋ tɩn kʋ ja gaalɩ. A joŋi pɛɛra yalʋ á na kɩ Epafroditi jɩŋa nɩ sɩ o ja ba o pa-nɩ tɩn, yɩ kʋlʋkʋlʋ daa wʋ muri-nɩ. Abam pɛɛra yam nyɩ dɩ woŋo kʋlʋ á na mɛ á kaanɩ Baŋa-Wɛ yɩ kʋ lwǝm ywǝmmǝ tɩn mʋ. Wɛ nan joŋi á kaanɩm dɩm dɩ wʋpolo.

eng: My God will meet your every need out of his riches in the glory that is found in Christ Jesus.
local: Amʋ Tu Wɛ wʋ́ pa abam kʋlʋ maama á na gɛ tɩn Zezi yɩrɩ ŋwaanɩ, DƖ na jɩgɩ wo-laarʋ tɩlʋ na tiini tɩ dagɩ yɩ tɩ jɩgɩ paarɩ-zulǝ tɩn.

eng: Let glory be given to God our Father forever and always. Amen.
local: Wɛ dɩlʋ na yɩ dɩbam Ko tɩn maŋɩ dɩ zulǝ mʋ maŋa maama. Amina.

eng: Greet all Gods people in Christ Jesus. The brothers and sisters with me send you their greeting.
local: Jɔɔnɩ-na Wɛ nɔɔna balʋ na ŋwɩ dɩ Zezi Krisi tɩn maama á pa-nɩ. Dɩ́ ko-biǝ balʋ na wʋ amʋ tee nɩ tɩn dɩ jɔɔnɩ abam.

eng: All Gods people here, especially those in Caesars household, send you their greeting.
local: Wɛ nɔɔna bam maama jɔɔnɩ abam, kʋ na fɔgɩ kʋ dwe dɩdɩ balʋ na zʋʋrɩ Rom Pa-farʋ wʋm sɔŋɔ nɩ tɩn.

eng: The grace of the Lord Jesus Christ be with your spirits.
local: Dɩbam Yuutu Zezi Krisi wʋ́ pa abam maama yu-yoŋo.

eng: From Paul, an apostle of Christ Jesus by Gods will, and Timothy our brother.
local: Amʋ Pooli wʋlʋ Wɛ na kuri dɩ DƖ tɩtɩ wʋbʋŋa sɩ a taa yɩ Zezi Krisi tɩntʋŋnʋ tɩn mʋ pʋpʋnɩ tɔnɔ kʋntʋ, yɩ dɩ́ ko-bu Timoti tɔgɩ o wǝli-nɩ.

eng: To the holy and faithful brothers and sisters in Christ in Colossae. Grace and peace to you from God our Father.
local: Dɩ́ pʋpʋnɩ sɩ dɩ́ pa abam balʋ na yɩ Wɛ nɔɔna yɩ á zʋʋrɩ Kolɔsɩ nɩ tɩn. Abam mʋ yɩ dɩ́ ko-biǝ balʋ na kɩ á wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Zezi Krisi tɩn. Dɩ́ Ko Wɛ wʋ́ pa abam yazurǝ dɩ yu-yoŋo.

eng: We always give thanks to God, the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, when we pray for you.
local: Maŋa maama dɩbam na yǝni dɩ́ loori Wɛ dɩ́ pa abam, dɩ́ taá kɩ DƖ le mʋ abam ŋwaanɩ. Dɩntʋ mʋ yɩ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi Krisi Ko.

eng: Weve done this since we heard of your faith in Christ Jesus and your love for all Gods people.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ dɩbam ni abam na jɩgɩ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Zezi yɩ á kwǝri á soe Wɛ nɔɔna bam maama te tɩn.

eng: You have this faith and love because of the hope reserved for you in heaven. You previously heard about this hope through the true message, the good news.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ, abam na dɛ yigǝ á ni Wɛ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam tɩn mʋ pɛ á jɩgɩ tɩɩna nɩ á wʋ́ na wǝǝnu tɩlʋ Wɛ na tiŋi DƖ sɔŋɔ nɩ abam ŋwaanɩ tɩn. Wɛ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam kʋntʋ mʋ yɩ kalʋ na sɩɩnɩ ka yɩ cɩga tɩn.

eng: which has come to you. This message has been bearing fruit and growing among you since the day you heard and truly understood Gods grace, in the same way that it is bearing fruit and growing in the whole world.
local: DƖ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam kʋntʋ laan jagɩ ka yi lʋgʋ baŋa je maama yɩ ka kwɛ nɔɔna lanyɩranɩ, nɩ ka na jagɩ ka yi abam te yɩ ka kwɛ abam te tɩn. Kʋ zɩgɩ maŋa kalʋ á na puli á ni Wɛ kwǝrǝ kam yɩ á lwarɩ Wɛ zaanɩ dɩm na sɩɩnɩ dɩ yɩ cɩga te tɩn.

eng: You learned it from Epaphras, who is the fellow slave we love and Christs faithful minister for your sake.
local: Kʋ yɩ Epafrasɩ dɛɛn mʋ brɩ abam Wɛ cɩga kam kʋntʋ. Wʋntʋ mʋ yɩ dɩbam ko-bu-sono, yɩ o tɔgɩ dɩ dɩbam o tʋŋɩ dɩ o wʋ maama o pa Zezi Krisi abam ŋwaanɩ.

eng: He informed us of your love in the Spirit.
local: Wʋntʋ ta mʋ tagɩ o brɩ dɩbam Wɛ Joro kʋm na pɛ abam jɩgɩ da-sono te tɩn.

eng: Because of this, since the day we heard about you, we havent stopped praying for you and asking for you to be filled with the knowledge of Gods will, with all wisdom and spiritual understanding.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ dɩ́ yǝni dɩ́ warɩ Wɛ maŋa maama dɩ́ pa abam, kʋ na puli maŋa kam dɩ́ na ni á woŋo kʋntʋ tɩn. Dɩ́ loori-DƖ sɩ DƖ pa á taá ye DƖ wʋbʋŋa na lagɩ kʋlʋ tɩn, sɩ DƖ daarɩ DƖ pa á na swan dɩ yǝno maama nɩ DƖ Joro kʋm na paɩ te tɩn.

eng: Were praying this so that you can live lives that are worthy of the Lord and pleasing to him in every way: by producing fruit in every good work and growing in the knowledge of God.
local: Kʋntʋ, abam laan wʋ́ wanɩ á tɔgɩ cwǝŋǝ sɩ kʋ maŋɩ dɩ dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm na lagɩ te tɩn, sɩ kʋ pa o wʋ poli á tɩtʋŋa maama ŋwaanɩ. Dɩ́ loori Wɛ sɩ DƖ wǝli abam sɩ á taá kɩ tɩtʋŋ-ŋʋna dwi tǝri tǝri lanyɩranɩ, sɩ á fɔgɩ á lwarɩ Wɛ á wǝli da.

eng: by being strengthened through his glorious might so that you endure everything and have patience.
local: Dɩ́ nan ta loori Wɛ, sɩ DƖ ma DƖ dam-fɔrɔ kʋlʋ na dwe maama tɩn DƖ wǝli abam sɩ á wanɩ á fɔgɩ á zɩgɩ kǝŋkǝŋ, sɩ á kwǝri á taá jɩgɩ wʋ-zuru, sɩ á taá kwaanɩ á ve yigǝ woŋo maama wʋnɩ.

eng: and by giving thanks with joy to the Father. He made it so you could take part in the inheritance, in light granted to Gods holy people.
local: Á taá kɩ dɩ́ Ko Wɛ le dɩ wʋpolo, bɛŋwaanɩ dɩntʋ mʋ pɛ abam cwǝŋǝ, sɩ á tɔgɩ á na wo-laarʋ tɩlʋ DƖ na tiŋi sɩ DƖ pa DƖ nɔɔna bam tɩn jǝgǝ kalʋ na yɩ pooni tɩn wʋnɩ.

eng: He rescued us from the control of darkness and transferred us into the kingdom of the Son he loves.
local: Dɩ́ Ko Wɛ mʋ lɩ dɩbam lim wʋnɩ, sɩ wo-lwaanʋ daa yɩ taa waɩ dɩbam. DƖ ma daarɩ DƖ pa dɩ́ zʋ DƖ tɩtɩ Bu-sono kʋm paarɩ dɩm wʋ.

eng: He set us free through the Son and forgave our sins.
local: Kʋ nan yɩ DƖ Bu Zezi mʋ kwe o ŋwɩa o ma ŋwɩ dɩ́ lwarɩm jɩnɩ, o pa Wɛ yagɩ-dɩ DƖ ma cɛ dɩbam.

eng: The Son is the image of the invisible God, the one who is first over all creation.
local: Zezi yɩ Baŋa-Wɛ dɩlʋ nabiinǝ na ba naɩ tɩn nyɩnyʋgʋ mʋ. O yɩ Wɛ Bu-dʋa mʋ. Wʋntʋ maŋɩ o wʋra mʋ kʋ loori wǝǝnu tɩlʋ maama Wɛ na kɩ tɩn.

eng: Because all things were created by him: both in the heavens and on the earth, the things that are visible and the things that are invisible. Whether they are thrones or powers, or rulers or authorities, all things were created through him and for him.
local: Wɛ dɛ wʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ DƖ kɩ wǝǝnu maama, wǝǝnu tɩlʋ maama na wʋ wɛyuu nɩ dɩ tɩga baŋa nɩ tɩn, tɩlʋ nɔɔna na naɩ dɩ tɩlʋ ba na warɩ ba naɩ tɩn, kʋ na yɩ malɛsɩ dɩ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ maama na jɩgɩ dam yɩ tɩ di paarɩ nabiinǝ baŋa nɩ tɩn. Wɛ dɛ Zezi ŋwaanɩ mʋ DƖ kɩ tɩ maama, sɩ kʋ pa o na zulǝ tɩ baŋa nɩ.

eng: He existed before all things, and all things are held together in him.
local: Zezi maŋɩ o wʋra mʋ pulim nɩ yɩ kʋlʋkʋlʋ daa ta tǝrǝ. Kʋ yɩ wʋntʋ mʋ paɩ woŋo maama zɩgɩ kʋ jǝgǝ nɩ lanyɩranɩ.

eng: He is the head of the body, the church, who is the beginning, the one who is firstborn from among the dead so that he might occupy the first place in everything.
local: Wʋntʋ mʋ yɩ o nɔɔna bam yuutu, yɩ ba kɔgɔ kʋm nyɩ dɩ o yɩra yam. Wʋm mʋ puli o kɔgɔ kʋm kuri. Kʋ yɩ Zezi mʋ dɛ yigǝ o bi o yagɩ tʋʋnɩ. Kʋ ma pa o yɩ yigǝ tu woŋo maama wʋnɩ.

eng: Because all the fullness of God was pleased to live in him.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ kʋ yɩ Wɛ tɩtɩ wʋbʋŋa mʋ lagɩ sɩ DƖ Bu Zezi taa nyɩ dɩ DƖ tɩtɩ fasɩ.

eng: and he reconciled all things to himself through him— whether things on earth or in the heavens. He brought peace through the blood of his cross.
local: Wɛ lɩ wʋbʋŋa mʋ, sɩ DƖ da DƖ Bu wʋm ŋwaanɩ DƖ pa wǝǝnu maama joori tɩ fɔgɩ daanɩ dɩ DƖ. DƖ Bu Zezi na tɩgɩ tʋʋn-dagara kam baŋa nɩ yɩ o jana nuŋi tɩn mʋ pɛ wǝǝnu maama joori tɩ fɔgɩ daanɩ dɩ Wɛ, kʋ na yɩ lʋgʋ baŋa wǝǝnu dɩ wɛyuu wǝǝnu maama.

eng: Once you were alienated from God and you were enemies with him in your minds, which was shown by your evil actions.
