local: Kʋ nan na yɩ abam, abam dɛɛn baŋwɛ dɩ Wɛ, á yɩ Wɛ dʋna mʋ. Abam wʋbʋŋa dɩ á tɩtʋŋa maama dɛɛn lagɩ wo-lwaanʋ yɩranɩ mʋ sɩ á taá kɩa.

eng: But now he has reconciled you by his physical body through death, to present you before God as a people who are holy, faultless, and without blame.
local: Kʋ daarɩ lele kʋntʋ, Wɛ laan pɛ á fɔgɩ daanɩ dɩ DƖ, DƖ Bu wʋm na jigi nabiinu yɩ o daarɩ o tɩ tɩn ŋwaanɩ. Wɛ kɩ kʋntʋ sɩ á wanɩ á ba á zɩgɩ DƖ yigǝ nɩ dɩ wʋ-poŋo mʋ, sɩ á taá yɩ nɔn-ŋʋna balʋ na ba jɩgɩ wo-lɔŋɔ tɩn.

eng: But you need to remain well established and rooted in faith and not shift away from the hope given in the good news that you heard. This message has been preached throughout all creation under heaven. And I, Paul, became a servant of this good news.
local: Abam nan maŋɩ sɩ á taá tɔgɩ Wɛ cɩga kam dɩ á wʋ-dɩdʋa, sɩ á zɩgɩ kǝŋkǝŋ. Á wʋ maŋɩ sɩ á pa á wʋbʋŋa lǝni dɩ tɩɩna yalʋ á na jɩgɩ Wɛ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam ŋwaanɩ tɩn. DƖ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam kʋntʋ mʋ yɩ kwǝrǝ kalʋ abam na maŋɩ á ni yɩ ba tɔɔlɩ-ka ba brɩ lʋgʋ baŋa nɔɔna maama tɩn. Amʋ Pooli nan yɩ Wɛ tɩntʋŋnʋ sɩ a taa tɔɔlɩ DƖ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam kʋntʋ mʋ.

eng: Now Im happy to be suffering for you. Im completing what is missing from Christs sufferings with my own body. Im doing this for the sake of his body, which is the church.
local: Amʋ jɩgɩ wʋpolo dɩ a na yaarɩ te abam ŋwaanɩ tɩn. Kʋ na cɛ a yɩra nɩ te tɩn, kʋ nyɩ nɩ Zezi Krisi na yaarɩ te tɩn mʋ. A yaarɩ yaara yalʋ na daarɩ sɩ dɩ́ yaarɩ Zezi tɩtʋŋa yam ŋwaanɩ tɩn mʋ, sɩ kʋ zǝni o nɔn-kɔgɔ kʋm na nyɩ dɩ o yɩra yam tɩn lanyɩranɩ.

eng: I became a servant of the church by Gods commission, which was given to me for you, in order to complete Gods word.
local: Wɛ tʋŋɩ-nɩ sɩ a taa tʋŋa a pa-ba mʋ. Tɩtʋŋɩ dɩm kʋntʋ mʋ yɩ sɩ a kwaanɩ a tɔɔlɩ Wɛ kwǝrǝ kam maama a brɩ abam.

eng: Im completing it with a secret plan that has been hidden for ages and generations but which has now been revealed to his holy people.
local: Kʋ na zɩgɩ pulim nɩ tɩn, Wɛ cɩga kam kʋntʋ dɛɛn sǝgi mʋ nabiinǝ tee nɩ, yɩ Wɛ laan pa balʋ na yɩ DƖ nɔɔna tɩn ba ba lwarɩ-ka.

eng: God wanted to make the glorious riches of this secret plan known among the Gentiles, which is Christ living in you, the hope of glory.
local: Kʋ yɩ Wɛ tɩtɩ wʋbʋŋa mʋ lagɩ sɩ DƖ pa ba lwarɩ DƖ cɩga kam kʋntʋ. DƖ lagɩ sɩ lʋgʋ baŋa dwi maama tiinǝ mʋ lwarɩ DƖ cɩga kam na tiini ka jɩgɩ lam dɩ zulǝ te tɩn. Wɛ cɩga kalʋ dɛɛn na sǝgi yɩ ka laan ba ka lwarɩ jaja tɩn mʋ yɩ sɩ Zezi Krisi wʋ abam bɩcara nɩ, yɩ kʋ pa á jɩgɩ tɩɩna nɩ á wʋ́ na paarɩ-zulǝ Wɛ tee nɩ.

eng: This is what we preach as we warn and teach every person with all wisdom so that we might present each one mature in Christ.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ dɩbam yǝni dɩ́ tɔɔlɩ Zezi Krisi kwǝrǝ mʋ dɩ́ brɩ nɔɔna maama, yɩ dɩ́ kaanɩ-ba dɩ swan yalʋ Wɛ na pɛ dɩbam tɩn, sɩ dɩ́ pa ba maama laan wanɩ ba ba ba zɩgɩ Wɛ yigǝ nɩ, nɩ balʋ wʋbʋŋa na bɩga dɩ Zezi Krisi tɔgɩm dɩm tɩn.

eng: I work hard and struggle for this goal with his energy, which works in me powerfully.
local: Kʋntʋ mʋ amʋ nan tiini a kwaanɩ a tʋŋa. Kʋ nan yɩ Zezi dam-fɔrɔ kʋm o na pɛ-nɩ tɩn mʋ paɩ a jɩgɩ dam a ma a tʋŋɩ kʋntʋ.

eng: I want you to know how much I struggle for you, for those in Laodicea, and for all who havent known me personally.
local: Amʋ lagɩ sɩ abam lwarɩ a na tiini a tʋŋɩ te abam ŋwaanɩ, kʋ wǝli dɩ Wɛ nɔɔna balʋ na wʋ Lawodise nɩ, dɩ nɔɔna zanzan balʋ yi ta na wʋ nɛ amʋ tɩn dɩ ŋwaanɩ.

eng: My goal is that their hearts would be encouraged and united together in love so that they might have all the riches of assurance that come with understanding, so that they might have the knowledge of the secret plan of God, namely Christ.
local: Amʋ tiini a kwaanɩ kʋntʋ, sɩ kʋ pa Wɛ nɔɔna bam maama wanɩ ba taa jɩgɩ baarɩ mʋ, sɩ ba daarɩ ba taa ŋwɩ daanɩ dɩ sono. Kʋntʋ wʋ́ pa ba zɩgɩ lanyɩranɩ dɩ ba na tiini ba lwarɩ Wɛ cɩga kam te tɩn, sɩ ba lwarɩ Wɛ cɩga kalʋ ya na sǝgi tɩn, yɩ cɩga kam kʋntʋ mʋ yɩ Zezi Krisi tɩtɩ.

eng: All the treasures of wisdom and knowledge are hidden in him.
local: Wʋntʋ mʋ yɩ wʋlʋ na paɩ nɔɔna lwarɩ swan dɩ yǝno kʋlʋ maama na yɩ Wɛ nyɩm, tɩ na jɩgɩ kuri zanzan yɩ tɩ sǝgi tɩn.

eng: Im telling you this so that no one deceives you with convincing arguments.
local: A nan tagɩ kʋntʋ a brɩ abam, sɩ á yɩ pa nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ ganɩ abam, dɩ o na maŋɩ o ŋɔɔnɩ swan taanɩ te maama dɩ.

eng: because even though I am absent physically, Im with you in spirit. Im happy to see the discipline and stability of your faith in Christ.
local: Kʋ nan na yɩ amʋ na tǝri abam tee nɩ tɩn dɩ, a wʋbʋŋa maama wʋra dɩ abam. Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ kʋ pɛ-nɩ wʋpolo dɩ a na lwarɩ nɩ á tɔgɩ cwǝŋǝ yɩ á zɩgɩ kǝŋkǝŋ, á na jɩgɩ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Zezi Krisi tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: So live in Christ Jesus the Lord in the same way as you received him.
local: Abam nan na sɛ sɩ Zezi Krisi taa yɩ abam Yuutu tɩn, kʋ maŋɩ sɩ á taá ŋwɩ dɩd-o mʋ.

eng: Be rooted and built up in him, be established in faith, and overflow with thanksgiving just as you were taught.
local: Nan fɔgɩ-na á zɩgɩ kǝŋkǝŋ nɩ tiu bʋnnʋ na zʋ tɩga te tɩn, sɩ á daarɩ á kwaanɩ á taá jɩgɩ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩd-o nɩ ba na maŋɩ ba zaasɩ abam te tɩn, sɩ á taá kɩ Wɛ le zanzan maŋa maama.

eng: See to it that nobody enslaves you with philosophy and foolish deception, which conform to human traditions and the way the world thinks and acts rather than Christ.
local: Á nan cʋ á tɩtɩ, sɩ á yɩ pa nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ ganɩ abam dɩ o swan yalʋ na ba jɩgɩ kuri tɩn. Yantʋ yɩ nabiinǝ wʋbʋŋa yalʋ na tɔgɩ ba nabaara mɩʋ tɩn mʋ. Ya yɩ lʋgʋ baŋa nyɩm mʋ, sɩ ya daɩ Krisi nyɩm.

eng: All the fullness of deity lives in Christs body.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ, Baŋa-Wɛ na yɩ tɩte maama tɩn, Zezi Krisi dɩ yɩ kʋntʋ doŋ mʋ fasɩ.

eng: And you have been filled by him, who is the head of every ruler and authority.
local: Abam na ŋwɩ dɩ Zezi tɩn, á maŋɩ á na Wɛ wo-laarʋ tɩm maama á joŋi o tee nɩ. Wʋntʋ mʋ te woŋo kʋlʋ maama na jɩgɩ dam nabiinǝ baŋa nɩ tɩn.

eng: In him you were also circumcised with a circumcision not administered by human hands. The circumcision of Christ is realized in the stripping away of the whole self dominated by sin.
local: Abam na ŋwɩ dɩ Zezi Krisi tɩn, o lɩ á wʋbʋŋ-lwaanʋ tɩm maama mʋ, sɩ tɩ daa yɩ taa jɩgɩ dam á baŋa nɩ. O na fɔgɩ o kwɛ abam kʋntʋ tɩn, kʋ nyɩ dɩ ba na goni bǝkǝri te tɩn mʋ. Kʋ nan daɩ nɩ nabiinǝ na goni te tɩn, kʋ yɩ Zezi Krisi ŋwaanɩ mʋ.

eng: You were buried with him through baptism and raised with him through faith in the power of God, who raised him from the dead.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ, ba na miisi abam na wʋnɩ tɩn, kʋ brɩ nɩ ba ya kɩ abam dɩ, nɩnɛɛnɩ Zezi Krisi na tɩgɩ yɩ ba kɩ-o te tɩn mʋ. Kʋ kwǝri kʋ brɩ nɩ á joori á bi á na Wɛ ŋwɩ-dʋŋa kam, bɛŋwaanɩ á jɩgɩ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ na mɛ DƖ dam dɩm DƖ bi Zezi DƖ pa o yagɩ tʋʋnɩ tɩn.

eng: When you were dead because of the things you had done wrong and because your body wasnt circumcised, God made you alive with Christ and forgave all the things you had done wrong.
local: Abam dɛɛn ya ba jɩgɩ ŋwɩa Wɛ tee nɩ á na kɩ kǝm-balwaarʋ tɩn ŋwaanɩ. Abam dɛɛn ya tɔgɩ á daɩ Wɛ nɔɔna á na daɩ Zwifǝ tɩn ŋwaanɩ. Wɛ laan nan pɛ á na DƖ ŋwɩ-dʋŋa kam á na ŋwɩ dɩ Zezi tɩn ŋwaanɩ. Wɛ nan yagɩ dɩbam lwarɩm maama DƖ ma cɛ dɩbam.

eng: He destroyed the record of the debt we owed, with its requirements that worked against us. He canceled it by nailing it to the cross.
local: Ba na pagɩ Zezi Krisi tʋʋn-dagara baŋa nɩ tɩn, kʋ yɩ nɩnɛɛnɩ ba pagɩ cullu tɔnɔ kʋlʋ na brɩ nɩ dɩbam kɩ dɩ́ cɔgɩ tɩn mʋ. Wɛ brɩ nɩ tɔnɔ kʋm kʋntʋ daa ba jɩgɩ kuri, yɩ dɩbam lwarɩm dɩm maama ti.

eng: When he disarmed the rulers and authorities, he exposed them to public disgrace by leading them in a triumphal parade.
local: Zezi mʋ wanɩ woŋo kʋlʋ maama na jɩgɩ dam nabiinǝ baŋa nɩ tɩn, yɩ o cɔgɩ tɩ maama dam. O tʋʋnɩ dagara kam baŋa nɩ mʋ Wɛ mɛ DƖ brɩ nɔɔna jaja nɩ o jɩgɩ dam wǝǝnu tɩm kʋntʋ maama baŋa nɩ, nɩ nɔɔnʋ na wanɩ o dʋna yɩ o ja-ba o vɔ te tɩn.

eng: So dont let anyone judge you about eating or drinking or about a festival, a new moon observance, or sabbaths.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ, abam yɩ sɛ sɩ nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ pa abam culu dɩ á na di kʋlʋ naa á na nyɔ kʋlʋ tɩn. Á yɩ pa nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ brɩ abam á na wʋ́ lɩ da yalʋ sɩ ya taa yɩ candiǝ da naa can-dʋŋa dɛ naa siun dɛ ŋwaanɩ tɩn.

eng: These religious practices are only a shadow of what was coming—the body that cast the shadow is Christ.
local: Cullu tɩm kʋntʋ daa ba jɩgɩ kuri. Tɩ dɛɛn yɩ luluŋu mʋ, sɩ tɩ brɩ cɩga kalʋ na lagɩ ka ba tɩn. Cɩga kam kʋntʋ nan mʋ yɩ Zezi Krisi.

eng: Dont let anyone who wants to practice harsh self-denial and worship angels rob you of the prize. They go into detail about what they have seen in visions and have become unjustifiably arrogant by their selfish way of thinking.
local: Á yɩ sɛ á pa nɔɔna balʋ na yaarɩ ba tɩtɩ yɩ ba zuli malɛsɩ dɩ vwan tu-n-tɩtɩ tɩn ganɩ abam. Ba yǝni ba tɛ ba wɩ, Wɛ mʋ brɩ-ba kʋntʋ woŋo, yɩ ba wʋbʋŋa nan daɩ Wɛ nyɩm. Kʋ yɩ ba zǝŋi-n-tɩtɩ wʋbʋŋ-kamunǝ mʋ ba jɩga, kʋ nan yɩ kafɛ mʋ.

eng: They dont stay connected to the head. The head nourishes and supports the whole body through the joints and ligaments, so the body grows with a growth that is from God.
local: Bantʋ nan daa ba ŋwɩ dɩ Zezi. Wʋntʋ mʋ yɩ dɩbam Yuutu, yɩ dɩ́ ŋwɩ dɩd-o nɩnɛɛnɩ nɔɔnʋ yɩra na toŋi dɩ o yuu te tɩn. Zezi ŋwaanɩ mʋ dɩ́ wǝli daanɩ dɩ́ tʋŋa, nɩ nɔɔnʋ yɩra na jɩgɩ pɔɔrɩm dwi tǝri tǝri yɩ ya tʋŋɩ tɩtʋŋɩ dɩdʋa te tɩn. Wʋntʋ mʋ zǝni dɩbam yɩ dɩ́ ve yigǝ Wɛ cwǝŋǝ kam wʋnɩ nɩ Wɛ na lagɩ te tɩn.

eng: If you died with Christ to the way the world thinks and acts, why do you submit to rules and regulations as though you were living in the world?.
local: Abam na sɛ Zezi Krisi tɩn, kʋ nyɩ dɩ á tɔgɩ dɩd-o á tɩ mʋ te. Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ lʋgʋ baŋa wʋbʋŋ-yɔɔrʋ tɩm daa ba jɩgɩ dam abam baŋa nɩ. Bɛɛ mʋ yɩ á nan ta kɩ nɩnɛɛnɩ á yɩ lʋgʋ baŋa nyɩm mʋ te?.

eng: Dont handle! Dont taste! Dont touch.
local: Bɛɛ mʋ yɩ á sɛ cullu tɩlʋ na brɩ nɩ yɩ kwe kʋntʋ naa yɩ ta n di kʋntʋ naa yɩ dwe kʋntʋ tɩn?.

eng: All these things cease to exist when they are used. Such rules are human commandments and teachings.
local: Cullu tɩm kʋntʋ nan wʋra wǝǝnu tɩlʋ na wʋ́ ba tɩ cɔgɩ tɩn ŋwaanɩ mʋ. Cullu tɩlʋ ba na brɩ abam kʋntʋ doŋ tɩn yɩ nabiinǝ wʋbʋŋa mʋ. Tɩ wʋ nuŋi Wɛ te.

eng: They look like they are wise with this self-made religion and their self-denial by the harsh treatment of the body, but they are no help against indulging in selfish immoral behavior.
local: Wǝǝnu tɩm kʋntʋ nyɩ nɩ swan mʋ ba na maɩ ba tɩtɩ wʋbʋŋa ba ma zuli-tɩ. Ba ma tu ba tɩtɩ yɩ ba bɛɛsɩ ba yɩra. Cullu tɩm kʋntʋ yɩ nɩnɛɛnɩ tɩ jɩgɩ kuri mʋ te, tɩ nan yɩ kafɛ mʋ. Tɩ warɩ tɩ wǝli nɔɔna sɩ ba ja ba tɩtɩ dɩ wo-zɔɔna yalʋ ba fra na zʋʋrɩ tɩn.

eng: Therefore, if you were raised with Christ, look for the things that are above where Christ is sitting at Gods right side.
local: Abam na nɛ Wɛ ŋwɩ-dʋŋa kam tɩn, kʋ nyɩ dɩ á tɔgɩ dɩ Zezi Krisi mʋ á joori á bi á yagɩ tʋʋnɩ. Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ, pa-na Wɛ-sɔŋɔ wǝǝnu tɩm taa jɩgɩ fra dɩ abam, sɩ dáanɩ mʋ Zezi Krisi je Baŋa-Wɛ jazɩm nɩ.

eng: Think about the things above and not things on earth.
local: Pa-na á wʋbʋŋa tiini ya zʋ Wɛ-sɔŋɔ wo-laarʋ tɩm, sɩ kʋ yɩ taa yɩ lʋgʋ baŋa wo-yɔɔrʋ tɩm.

eng: You died, and your life is hidden with Christ in God.
local: Abam na yagɩ lwarɩm cwǝŋǝ tɩn, kʋ nyɩ dɩ á tɩgɩ mʋ te, yɩ á laan na ŋwɩ-dʋŋa dɩ Zezi Krisi, yɩ á ŋwɩa kam sǝgi Wɛ tee nɩ.

eng: When Christ, who is your life, is revealed, then you also will be revealed with him in glory.
local: Abam ŋwɩa kam cɩga cɩga mʋ yɩ Zezi Krisi. Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ, o na joori o ba o brɩ o tɩtɩ jaja dɩ o paarɩ-zulǝ yam, abam dɩ wʋ́ tɔgɩ dɩd-o á na paarɩ-zulǝ.

eng: So put to death the parts of your life that belong to the earth, such as sexual immorality, moral corruption, lust, evil desire, and greed .
local: Abam nan maŋɩ sɩ á lɩ lʋgʋ baŋa wʋbʋŋ-lwaanʋ tɩm mʋ á bɩcara nɩ, sɩ á yɩ zaŋɩ á sɛ-tɩ. Kʋ na yɩ boorim naa wo-zɔɔna kikiǝ naa ka-laga, naa kʋ na yɩ á fra na zʋʋrɩ wo-yɔɔrʋ tɩlʋ tɩn, naa á na pa á yi sui wǝǝnu tɩlʋ tɩn, á yɩ sɛ wʋbʋŋa yam kʋntʋ doŋ. Nmʋ na paɩ n yi sui wǝǝnu, kʋ brɩ nɩ n paɩ tɩntʋ mʋ zulǝ yɩ n daarɩ Wɛ n yagɩ.

eng: The wrath of God is coming upon disobedient people because of these things.
local: Wo-balwaarʋ tɩntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ Wɛ banɩ wʋ́ zaŋɩ dɩ nabiinǝ balʋ maama na vɩn DƖ ni tɩn.

eng: You used to live this way, when you were alive to these things.
local: Abam dɩ ŋwɩa kam maama dɛɛn yɩ kʋntʋ mʋ.

eng: But now set aside these things, such as anger, rage, malice, slander, and obscene language.
local: Kʋ daarɩ lele kʋntʋ, á maŋɩ sɩ á lɩ wo-balwaarʋ tɩm kʋntʋ maama mʋ á bɩcara nɩ. Kʋ na yɩ ban-zɔŋɔ dɩ ka-culi-daanɩ dɩ pu-sɩŋa. Á yɩ taá twɩ nɔɔna. Á yɩ taá maɩ á niǝ á ŋɔɔnɩ wo-zɔɔna ŋwɛ.

eng: Dont lie to each other. Take off the old human nature with its practices.
local: Á yɩ zaŋɩ á fɔ vwan á pa daanɩ. Bɛŋwaanɩ abam yagɩ á ŋwɩ-doŋǝ kam dɩ ka kikiǝ maama.

eng: and put on the new nature, which is renewed in knowledge by conforming to the image of the one who created it.
local: yɩ á laan daarɩ á jɩgɩ ŋwɩ-dʋŋa mʋ. Wɛ mʋ pɛ abam ŋwɩ-dʋŋa kam kʋntʋ. DƖ maa kwɛ-ka sɩ ka taa nyɩ dɩ DƖ tɩtɩ ŋwɩa, sɩ á wanɩ á fɔgɩ á lwarɩ DƖ na yɩ te tɩn.

eng: In this image there is neither Greek nor Jew, circumcised nor uncircumcised, barbarian, Scythian, slave nor free, but Christ is all things and in all people.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ, balʋ na jɩgɩ Wɛ ŋwɩ-dʋŋa kam tɩn, kampwara daa tǝri ba wʋnɩ. Zwifǝ dɩ dwi-gɛ tiinǝ maama yɩ bɩdwɩ mʋ. Balʋ na goni ba bǝkǝri dɩ balʋ na wʋ goni tɩn maama yɩ bɩdwɩ mʋ. Balʋ yi na wʋ pʋʋrɩ dɩ balʋ ba na ba nɩgɩ tɩn, kʋ wǝli dɩ gambɛ dɩ balʋ na te ba tɩtɩ tɩn maama yɩ bɩdwɩ mʋ. Ba maama wʋra Zezi Krisi ŋwaanɩ mʋ, yɩ o ŋwɩ dɩ ba maama.

eng: Therefore, as Gods choice, holy and loved, put on compassion, kindness, humility, gentleness, and patience.
local: Wɛ mʋ kuri abam sɩ á taá yɩ DƖ nɔɔna, yɩ DƖ soe abam. Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ, taá jɩgɩ-na da-ŋwaŋa, sɩ á taá kɩ-da lanyɩranɩ. Taá tu-na á tɩtɩ da-tee nɩ, sɩ á taá jɩgɩ wʋ-bono dɩ wʋ-zuru.

eng: Be tolerant with each other and, if someone has a complaint against anyone, forgive each other. As the Lord forgave you, so also forgive each other.
local: Á taá jɩgɩ-na wʋ-zuru da-ŋwaanɩ. Abam wʋlʋ na jɩgɩ jʋʋ dɩ o doŋ, sɩ á yagɩ á ma cɛ daanɩ, nɩ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi na yagɩ á lwarɩm o ma cɛ abam te tɩn.

eng: And over all these things put on love, which is the perfect bond of unity.
local: Kʋlʋ na dwe maama tɩn, taá soe-na daanɩ, sɩ kʋ pa á wanɩ á taá jɩgɩ ni dɩdʋa lanyɩranɩ.

eng: The peace of Christ must control your hearts—a peace into which you were called in one body. And be thankful people.
local: Pa-na wʋ-zuru kʋlʋ Zezi Krisi na pɛ abam tɩn taa te á wʋbʋŋa maama. Bɛŋwaanɩ Wɛ kuri abam sɩ á ji woŋo dɩdʋa mʋ, sɩ á taá jɩgɩ wʋ-zuru kʋntʋ doŋ. Maŋa maama sɩ á taá kɩ Wɛ le.

eng: The word of Christ must live in you richly. Teach and warn each other with all wisdom by singing psalms, hymns, and spiritual songs. Sing to God with gratitude in your hearts.
local: Pa-na Zezi Krisi taanɩ dɩm tiini dɩ zʋ á bɩcara, sɩ á taá maɩ swan yalʋ Wɛ na pɛ abam tɩn á kwe daanɩ, sɩ á daarɩ á taá kaanɩ daanɩ. Taá leeni-na Wɛ lǝŋ-ŋwɩ dɩ Wɛ tiǝ le dɩ Wɛ Joro kʋm na pɛ abam le sɩlʋ tɩn. Á taá leeni kʋntʋ á zuli Wɛ, sɩ á taá kɩ DƖ le.

eng: Whatever you do, whether in speech or action, do it all in the name of the Lord Jesus and give thanks to God the Father through him.
local: Woŋo kʋlʋ maama abam na wʋ́ kɩ tɩn, kʋ na yɩ á ni-ŋwaŋa naa á jɩŋa tɩtʋŋɩ, sɩ á pa kʋ taa yɩ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi yɩrɩ ŋwaanɩ, sɩ á daarɩ á taá kɩ dɩ́ Ko Wɛ le Zezi Krisi ŋwaanɩ.

eng: Wives, submit to your husbands in a way that is appropriate in the Lord.
local: Kaana-ba, á maŋɩ sɩ á taá sɛ á banna, bɛŋwaanɩ kʋntʋ yɩ woŋo kʋlʋ na maŋɩ dɩ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi wʋbʋŋa tɩn mʋ.

eng: Husbands, love your wives and dont be harsh with them.
local: Kʋ daarɩ kan-banna-ba, á dɩ maŋɩ sɩ á taá soe á kaana, sɩ á yɩ taá kɩ cɩa dɩ ba.

eng: Children, obey your parents in everything, because this pleases the Lord.
local: Biǝ-ba, á na sɛ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi tɩn, kʋ maŋɩ sɩ á sɛ á tiinǝ ni woŋo maama wʋnɩ, sɩ kʋntʋ mʋ yɩ woŋo kʋlʋ na poli Wɛ wʋ tɩn.

eng: Parents, dont provoke your children in a way that ends up discouraging them.
local: Kʋ daarɩ abam balʋ na yɩ biǝ kwǝ tɩn, á yɩ taá tiini á fɩ-ba, sɩ kʋntʋ wʋ́ pa ba wʋrʋ cɔgɩ yɩ ba ga baarɩ.

eng: Slaves, obey your masters on earth in everything. Dont just obey like people pleasers when they are watching. Instead, obey with the single motivation of fearing the Lord.
local: Kʋ na yɩ abam balʋ na yɩ gambɛ tɩn, á taá tʋŋɩ á tɔgɩ á yum tiinǝ wʋbʋŋa woŋo maama wʋnɩ. Kʋ nan daɩ ba na zɩgɩ ba nii abam maŋa kalʋ yɩranɩ tɩn mʋ á wʋ́ kɩ kʋntʋ sɩ ba tee abam. Nan taá tʋŋɩ-na dɩ á wʋ maama, á na kwarɩ dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: Whatever you do, do it from the heart for the Lord and not for people.
local: Woŋo kʋlʋ maama á na wʋ́ tʋŋɩ tɩn, á taá tʋŋɩ dɩ á wʋ maama. Pa-na á na kɩ te tɩn taa yɩ dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm ŋwaanɩ, sɩ kʋ taa daɩ nabiinǝ ŋwaanɩ.

eng: You know that you will receive an inheritance as a reward. You serve the Lord Christ.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ abam ye nɩ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi Krisi wʋ́ pa abam pɛɛrɩ dɩlʋ o na tiŋi sɩ o pa o nɔɔna bam Wɛ-sɔŋɔ nɩ tɩn. Wʋntʋ mʋ yɩ á yuutu wʋlʋ á na tʋŋɩ á pa-o tɩn.

eng: But evildoers will receive their reward for their evil actions. There is no discrimination.
local: Kʋ daarɩ wʋlʋ maama na kɩ balɔrɔ tɩn wʋ́ joŋi balɔrɔ ŋwɩɩrʋ mʋ, sɩ kʋ maŋɩ dɩ o tɩtʋŋa yam na yɩ te tɩn. Wɛ nan tɔgɩ cɩga mʋ DƖ maɩ DƖ di nabiinǝ taanɩ, sɩ DƖ ba kuri nɔɔna daanɩ.

eng: Masters, be just and fair to your slaves, knowing that you yourselves have a master in heaven.
local: Kʋ daarɩ abam balʋ na yɩ gambɛ sɩm yum tiinǝ tɩn, á taá kɩ cɩga dɩ kʋlʋ na maŋɩ tɩn dɩ ba. Á nan taá ye nɩ abam dɩ jɩgɩ yuutu o na te abam Wɛ-sɔŋɔ nɩ.

eng: Keep on praying and guard your prayers with thanksgiving.
local: Á tiini á kwaanɩ á taá loori Wɛ, sɩ á cɩ á tɩtɩ lanyɩranɩ, sɩ á taá kɩ DƖ le.

eng: At the same time, pray for us also. Pray that God would open a door for the word so we can preach the secret plan of Christ—which is why Im in chains.
local: Á nan taá loori Wɛ á pa dɩbam dɩ, sɩ DƖ pa dɩ́ na cwǝŋǝ dɩ́ taá tɔɔlɩ Zezi Krisi cɩga kalʋ na sǝgi tɩn kwǝrǝ dɩ́ brɩ nɔɔna. Kʋ nan yɩ amʋ na tɔɔlɩ Zezi kwǝrǝ kam tɩn ŋwaanɩ mʋ pɛ a wʋ pɩɩna digǝ nɩ.

eng: Pray that I might be able to make it as clear as I ought to when I preach.
local: Loori-na Wɛ á pa-nɩ, sɩ a wanɩ a pa nɔɔna lwarɩ cɩga kam kʋntʋ maama fasɩ. Mʋ tɩtʋŋɩ dɩlʋ Wɛ na pɛ amʋ sɩ a tʋŋɩ tɩn.

eng: Act wisely toward outsiders, making the most of the opportunity.
local: Á cʋ-na á tɩtɩ dɩ á na ŋwɩ te dɩ balʋ na ba tɔgɩ Zezi tɩn tɩtarɩ nɩ, á taá kɩ lanyɩranɩ sɩ ba yɩ na á wo-lɔŋɔ. Wɛ na pɛ abam pwǝlǝ sɩ á kɩ kʋlʋ, sɩ á pa kʋ ja kuri lanyɩranɩ.

eng: Your speech should always be gracious and sprinkled with insight so that you may know how to respond to every person.
local: Pa-na á ni-taanɩ taa lana, sɩ dɩ taa jɩgɩ ywǝǝni, sɩ á daarɩ á taá ye á na wʋ́ lǝri nɔɔnʋ maama taanɩ te tɩn.

eng: Tychicus, our dearly loved brother, faithful minister, and fellow slave in the Lord, will inform you about everything that has happened to me.
local: A lagɩ a tʋŋɩ dɩ́ ko-bu-sono Tisiki sɩ o ba abam te. Wʋntʋ mʋ yɩ wʋlʋ na tʋŋɩ o pa dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi dɩ cɩga tɩn. Dɩbam maama wǝli daanɩ mʋ dɩ́ tʋŋɩ dɩ́ paɩ dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm.

eng: This is why I sent him to you, so that youll know all about us and so he can encourage your hearts.
local: Amʋ yɔɔrɩ a tʋŋ-o sɩ o ba o ta amʋ labaarɩ maama na yɩ te tɩn o brɩ abam, sɩ á bɩcara pǝni tɩga nɩ dɩ á na wʋ́ lwarɩ dɩbam woŋo na yɩ te tɩn.

eng: I sent him with Onesimus, our faithful and dearly loved brother, who is one of you. They will let you know about everything here.
local: Dɩbam ko-bu-sono Onisim dɩ wʋ́ tɔgɩ o ba. Wʋntʋ nuŋi abam kɔgɔ kʋm wʋnɩ mʋ, yɩ o tɔgɩ Zezi dɩ cɩga. Bantʋ bale mʋ wʋ́ ta woŋo kʋlʋ maama na wʋra kʋ kɩ yo seeni tɩn ba brɩ abam.

eng: Aristarchus, my fellow prisoner, says hello to you. So does Mark, Barnabas cousin .
local: Arisarɩkɩ wʋlʋ na tɔgɩ o wʋ pɩɩna digǝ nɩ dɩ amʋ tɩn jɔɔnɩ abam. Marɩkɩ wʋlʋ na yɩ Banabasɩ cʋrʋ tɩn dɩ jɔɔnɩ abam. Abam maŋɩ á joŋi ni nɩ, o na tuǝ, á wʋ́ jeer-o lanyɩranɩ.

eng: Jesus, called Justus, also says hello. These are my only fellow workers for Gods kingdom who are Jewish converts. They have been an encouragement to me.
local: Zusitu wʋlʋ yɩrɩ dɩdoŋ na yɩ Zezi tɩn dɩ jɔɔnɩ abam. Kʋ na yɩ Zwifǝ balʋ na tu ba sɛ Zezi tɩn, nɔɔna bantʋ batɔ yɩranɩ mʋ yɩ balʋ na tɔgɩ ba tʋŋɩ Wɛ paarɩ dɩm tɩtʋŋa ba wǝli amʋ tɩn. Ba tiini ba paɩ a wʋ zurǝ.

eng: Epaphras, who is one of you, says hello. Hes a slave of Christ Jesus who always wrestles for you in prayers so that you will stand firm and be fully mature and complete in the entire will of God.
local: Epafrasɩ wʋlʋ na nuŋi abam kɔgɔ kʋm wʋnɩ yɩ o tʋŋɩ o pa Zezi Krisi tɩn dɩ jɔɔnɩ abam. O kwaanɩ o loori Wɛ mʋ maŋa maama o pa abam, sɩ á wanɩ á zɩgɩ kǝŋkǝŋ dɩ baarɩ, sɩ á wʋbʋŋa bɩ dɩ Wɛ cwǝŋǝ kam tɔgɩm, sɩ á taá kɩ DƖ wʋbʋŋa na lagɩ kʋlʋ maama tɩn.

eng: I can vouch for him that he has worked hard for you and for those in Laodicea and Hierapolis.
local: Amʋ tɩtɩ wʋ́ wanɩ a ta a brɩ abam nɩ o sɩɩnɩ o tiini o tʋŋɩ o wǝli abam, kʋ wǝli dɩ nɔɔna balʋ na zʋʋrɩ Lawodise dɩ Yɩrapolisi nɩ tɩn.

eng: Luke, the dearly loved physician, and Demas say hello.
local: Dɩbam badoŋ-sono Luki wʋlʋ na yɩ dɔgɩta tu tɩn dɩdaanɩ Demasɩ dɩ jɔɔnɩ abam.

eng: Say hello to the brothers and sisters in Laodicea, along with Nympha and the church that meets in her house.
local: Jɔɔnɩ-na dɩ́ ko-biǝ balʋ na tɔgɩ Zezi yɩ ba zʋʋrɩ Lawodise nɩ tɩn á pa dɩbam, kʋ wǝli dɩ Nimfa dɩ Zezi kɔgɔ kʋlʋ na yǝni kʋ jeeri daanɩ o sɔŋɔ nɩ tɩn.

eng: After this letter has been read to you publicly, make sure that the church in Laodicea reads it and that you read the one from Laodicea.
local: Abam na joŋi amʋ tɔnɔ kʋm yɩ á na karɩmɩ á ti, sɩ á laan pa-kʋ Zezi kɔgɔ kʋlʋ na zʋʋrɩ Lawodise nɩ tɩn, sɩ ba dɩ karɩmɩ. Kʋ daarɩ sɩ abam dɩ joŋi amʋ tɔnɔ kʋdoŋ bantʋ dɩ tee nɩ á dɩ karɩmɩ.

eng: And tell Archippus, See to it that you complete the ministry that you received in the Lord.
local: Ta-na á brɩ Arisipi sɩ o kwaanɩ o tʋŋɩ tɩtʋŋɩ dɩlʋ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi na pɛ-o sɩ o tʋŋɩ tɩn o ti.

eng: I, Paul, am writing this greeting personally. Remember that Im in prison. Grace be with you.
local: Amʋ Pooli mʋ jɔɔnɩ abam. A tɩtɩ laan mʋ pʋpʋnɩ tɩntʋ dɩ a jɩŋa. Á yɩ zaŋɩ á swe a na wʋ pɩɩna digǝ nɩ tɩn ni nɩ. Wɛ wʋ́ pa abam yu-yoŋo.

eng: From Paul, Silvanus, and Timothy. To the Thessalonians church that is in God the Father and the Lord Jesus Christ. Grace and peace to all of you.
local: Amʋ Pooli dɩdaanɩ Silasɩ dɩ Timoti mʋ pʋpʋnɩ tɔnɔ kʋntʋ sɩ dɩ́ pa abam Wɛ nɔɔna balʋ na wʋ Tesaloniki nɩ yɩ á yɩ dɩ́ Ko Baŋa-Wɛ dɩ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi Krisi nɔɔna tɩn. Wɛ wʋ́ pa abam yazurǝ dɩ yu-yoŋo.

eng: We always thank God for all of you when we mention you constantly in our prayers.
local: Maŋa maama dɩ́ yǝni dɩ́ kɩ Wɛ le mʋ abam maama ŋwaanɩ, yɩ dɩ́ kwǝri dɩ́ loori-DƖ dɩ́ pa abam.

eng: This is because we remember your work that comes from faith, your effort that comes from love, and your perseverance that comes from hope in our Lord Jesus Christ in the presence of our God and Father.
local: Dɩ́ na wʋ dɩ́ Ko Wɛ yigǝ nɩ, dɩ́ yǝni dɩ́ guli abam na kɩ á wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Zezi Krisi yɩ kʋ paɩ á tʋŋɩ lanyɩranɩ te tɩn mʋ, dɩ́ guli abam sono kʋm na paɩ á tiini á tʋŋɩ te tɩn. Á na jɩgɩ tɩɩna dɩ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi Krisi tɩn mʋ paɩ á zɩgɩ kǝŋkǝŋ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, you are loved by God, and we know that he has chosen you.
local: Dɩ́ ko-biǝ-ba, dɩ́ ye nɩ Wɛ mʋ soe abam yɩ DƖ kuri abam sɩ á taá yɩ DƖ nɔɔna.

eng: We know this because our good news didnt come to you just in speech but also with power and the Holy Spirit and with deep conviction. You know as well as we do what kind of people we were when we were with you, which was for your sake.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ, dɩbam dɛɛn na tu dɩ́ tɔɔlɩ Wɛ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam dɩ́ brɩ abam tɩn, kʋ daɩ dɩ ni-taanɩ má. Wɛ dam dɩm mʋ wʋ dɩbam tee nɩ dɩ DƖ Joro kʋm, yɩ dɩ́ brɩ Wɛ cɩga kam dɩ dɩ́ wʋ maama. Dɩbam dɛɛn na wʋ á tee nɩ tɩn, á nɛ dɩbam na yɩ tɩte sɩ kʋ ma zǝni abam.

eng: You became imitators of us and of the Lord when you accepted the message that came from the Holy Spirit with joy in spite of great suffering.
local: Abam lwǝni dɩbam dɩ dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm na kɩ te tɩn. Á na joŋi Wɛ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam tɩn, kʋ pɛ á na yaara zanzan. Á nan ta joŋi-ka dɩ wʋpolo Wɛ Joro kʋm na zǝni abam tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: As a result you became an example to all the believers in Macedonia and Achaia.
local: Kʋ ma pa á jɩgɩ nyɩnyʋgʋ kʋlʋ na lamma tɩn, sɩ Zezi nɔɔna balʋ maama na zʋʋrɩ Masɩdʋanɩ tɩɩnɩ dɩm nɩ dɩ Akayi tɩɩnɩ dɩm nɩ tɩn dɩ lwǝni abam.

eng: The message about the Lord rang out from you, not only in Macedonia and Achaia but in every place. The news about your faithfulness to God has spread so that we dont even need to mention it.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ, abam na tɔɔlɩ dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm kwǝrǝ kam á brɩ nɔɔna te tɩn, ka jagɩ Masɩdʋanɩ dɩ Akayi nɩ ka gaalɩ ka kɛ ka yi je maama, yɩ nɔɔna maama lwarɩ á na kɩ á wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ te. Mʋ kʋ kuri kʋ daa daɩ fɩfɩʋn sɩ dɩ́ ta kʋlʋkʋlʋ kantʋ laŋa nɩ.

eng: People tell us about what sort of welcome we had from you and how you turned to God from idols. As a result, you are serving the living and true God.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ nɔɔna bam maama tɛ á na jeeri dɩbam lanyɩranɩ te maŋa kalʋ dɩ́ na tu abam te tɩn, dɩ á na yagɩ jwǝnǝ kaanɩm yɩ á daarɩ á tɔgɩ Wɛ, sɩ á laan taá tʋŋɩ á pa Wɛ dɩlʋ na yɩ cɩga tu dɩ ŋwɩa tu te tɩn.

eng: and you are waiting for his Son from heaven. His Son is Jesus, who is the one he raised from the dead and who is the one who will rescue us from the coming wrath.
local: yɩ á kwǝri á cǝgi DƖ Bu wʋm tum dɩm. Wɛ bi-o DƖ pa o yagɩ tʋʋnɩ mʋ, yɩ oó zɩgɩ Wɛ-sɔŋɔ nɩ o ba lʋgʋ baŋa. Wʋntʋ mʋ yɩ Zezi wʋlʋ na wʋ́ vrɩ dɩbam Wɛ ban-zɔŋɔ kʋlʋ na wʋ́ ba nɔɔna baŋa nɩ ba lwarɩm ŋwaanɩ tɩn wʋnɩ.

eng: As you yourselves know, brothers and sisters, our visit with you wasnt a waste of time.
local: Dɩ́ ko-biǝ-ba, abam tɩtɩ ye lanyɩranɩ nɩ, dɩ́ na tu abam te tɩn, kʋ daɩ kafɛ.

eng: On the contrary, we had the courage through God to speak Gods good news in spite of a lot of opposition, although we had already suffered and were publicly insulted in Philippi, as you know.
local: Abam ye ba na maŋɩ ba bɛɛsɩ dɩbam yɩ ba twɩ dɩbam te Filipi nɩ yɩ dɩ́ laan ba abam te tɩn. Nɔɔna dɛɛn kwaanɩ sɩ ba cɩ dɩbam cwǝŋǝ. Nan dɩ kʋ dɩ, dɩ́ Tu Wɛ pɛ dɩbam pu-dɩa sɩ dɩ́ tɔɔlɩ DƖ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam dɩ́ brɩ abam dɩ baarɩ.

eng: Our appeal isnt based on false information, the wrong motives, or deception.
local: Kwiǝ yalʋ dɩ́ na yǝni dɩ́ kwe abam tɩn, kʋ daɩ dɩ tusim, naa dɩ́ jɩgɩ wʋbʋŋ-balwaarʋ mʋ. Kʋ nan daɩ swan mʋ dɩ́ kɩa, sɩ dɩ́ ma dɩ́ ganɩ abam.

eng: Rather, we have been examined and approved by God to be trusted with the good news, and thats exactly how we speak. We arent trying to please people, but we are trying to please God, who continues to examine our hearts.
local: Awo. Dɩbam yǝni dɩ́ ŋɔɔnɩ nɩ Wɛ na lagɩ te tɩn mʋ, bɛŋwaanɩ dɩntʋ mʋ kuri dɩbam yɩ DƖ kwe DƖ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam DƖ kɩ dɩ́ jɩŋa nɩ. Dɩbam na ŋɔɔnɩ te tɩn, kʋ daɩ sɩ dɩ́ ma dɩ́ poli nabiinǝ wʋrʋ, kʋ yɩ sɩ dɩ́ pa Wɛ dɩlʋ na maŋɩ dɩbam bɩcara DƖ nii tɩn wʋ mʋ poli.

eng: As you know, we never used flattery, and God is our witness that we didnt have greedy motives.
local: Á ye lanyɩranɩ nɩ dɩ́ wʋ tu dɩ́ ŋɔɔnɩ ni-sʋŋɩ ŋwaŋa dɩ abam. Dɩ́ nan wʋ ŋɔɔnɩ bɩtar-kamunǝ sɩ dɩ́ ma pri nɔɔna swan, sɩ dɩ́ joŋi wǝǝnu ba tee nɩ. Wɛ ye nɩ dɩbam na tagɩ kʋlʋ tɩn yɩ cɩga mʋ.

eng: We didnt ask for special treatment from people—not from you or from others.
local: Kʋ na yɩ abam naa nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ maama dɩ, dɩ́ wʋ kɩ dɩ́ wʋbʋŋa nɩ sɩ nabiinǝ taa zuli dɩbam.

eng: although we could have thrown our weight around as Christs apostles. Instead, we were gentle with you like a nursing mother caring for her own children.
local: Dɩ́ na yɩ Zezi Krisi tɩntʋŋna tɩn, dɩ́ ya jɩgɩ cwǝŋǝ sɩ dɩ́ pa á taá nii dɩbam nɩ nɔn-kamunǝ te. Dɩ́ nan wʋ kɩ kʋntʋ. Dɩ́ dɛɛn tu dɩ́ tɩtɩ mʋ nɩ biǝ te, yɩ dɩ́ laan nii abam lanyɩranɩ nɩ kaanɩ na jɩgɩ o biǝ o nii te tɩn.

eng: We were glad to share not only Gods good news with you but also our very lives because we cared for you so much.
local: Dɩ́ na tiini dɩ́ soe abam tɩn, dɩ́ sɛ sɩ dɩ́ kwe Wɛ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam dɩ́ maŋɩ dɩ́ brɩ abam, yɩ dɩ́ kwe dɩ́ ŋwɩa maama dɩ mʋ dɩ́ wǝli da dɩ́ pa abam, á na tiini á tigi dɩ́ wʋbʋŋa nɩ tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: You remember, brothers and sisters, our efforts and hard work. We preached Gods good news to you, while we worked night and day so we wouldnt be a burden on any of you.
local: Dɩ́ ko-biǝ-ba, abam wʋ́ wanɩ á guli dɩbam dɛɛn na tʋŋɩ dɩ́ bwǝni zanzan abam ŋwaanɩ te maŋa kalʋ dɩ́ na wʋra dɩ́ tɔɔlɩ Wɛ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam dɩ́ brɩ abam tɩn. Dɩ́ dɛɛn ba lagɩ sɩ dɩ́ yaarɩ abam dɩ fɩnfɩɩn dɩ. Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ dɩ́ ta yǝni dɩ́ tiini dɩ́ tʋŋɩ wɩa dɩ tɩtɩɩ maama sɩ dɩ́ ma na dɩ́ ni-wʋdiu.

eng: You and God are witnesses of how holy, just, and blameless we were toward you believers.
local: Dɩ́ dɛɛn tɔgɩ cwǝŋǝ mʋ dɩ wʋ-poŋo abam balʋ na sɛ Zezi Krisi tɩn tɩtarɩ nɩ, yɩ dɩ́ tɩtʋŋa maama jɩgɩ cɩga, yɩ dɩ́ wʋ jaanɩ kʋlʋkʋlʋ dɩ́ cɔgɩ. Abam wʋ́ wanɩ á ta nɩ kʋ yɩ cɩga mʋ. Wɛ dɩ nan ye nɩ kʋ yɩ cɩga mʋ.

eng: Likewise, you know how we treated each of you like a father treats his own children.
local: Á ye nɩ dɩ́ dɛɛn jɩgɩ abam maama dɩ jɩ sɩle mʋ, nɩ ko na yǝni o jɩgɩ o biǝ te tɩn.

eng: We appealed to you, encouraged you, and pleaded with you to live lives worthy of the God who is calling you into his own kingdom and glory.
local: Dɩ́ kwe abam dɩ kwiǝ yalʋ na paɩ á bɩcara zurǝ tɩn mʋ. Dɩ́ ma daarɩ dɩ́ tiini dɩ́ kaanɩ abam, sɩ á taá tɔgɩ Wɛ cwǝŋǝ sɩ kʋ maŋɩ dɩ Wɛ na lagɩ te tɩn. Bɛŋwaanɩ Wɛ mʋ kuri abam sɩ á zʋ DƖ paarɩ dɩm wʋ sɩ á na paarɩ-zulǝ DƖ tee nɩ.

eng: We also thank God constantly for this: when you accepted Gods word that you heard from us, you welcomed it for what it truly is. Instead of accepting it as a human message, you accepted it as Gods message, and it continues to work in you who are believers.
local: Dɩ́ na jaanɩ Wɛ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam dɩ́ ba dɩ́ tɔɔlɩ dɩ́ brɩ abam tɩn, á sɛ yɩ á joŋi-ka lanyɩranɩ. Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ dɩ́ kɩ Wɛ le maŋa maama abam ŋwaanɩ. Á sɛ nɩ kʋ yɩ Wɛ kwǝrǝ mʋ sɩ kʋ daɩ nabiinǝ nyɩm. Kʋ yɩ cɩga, kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam sɩɩnɩ ka yɩ Wɛ kwǝrǝ mʋ, yɩ ka zǝni abam balʋ na sɛ Zezi tɩn wʋbʋŋa dɩ dam.

eng: Brothers and sisters, you became imitators of the churches of God in Judea, which are in Christ Jesus. This was because you also suffered the same things from your own people as they did from the Jews.
local: Dɩ́ ko-biǝ-ba, abam na nɛ yaara yalʋ tɩn, Zezi kɔgɔ kʋlʋ na wʋ Zude tɩɩnɩ dɩm nɩ tɩn dɩ nɛ yaara yantʋ doŋ mʋ. Abam dwi tiinǝ bam yaarɩ abam nɩnɛɛnɩ Zwifǝ bam dɩ na yaarɩ Zwifǝ balʋ na sɛ Zezi te tɩn mʋ.

eng: They killed both the Lord Jesus and the prophets and drove us out. They dont please God, and they are hostile to the entire human race.
local: Kʋ nan yɩ Zwifǝ bam kʋntʋ mʋ gʋ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi dɩ faŋa faŋa Wɛ nijoŋnǝ bam, yɩ ba kwǝri ba bɛɛsɩ dɩbam dɩ. Ba maa paɩ Wɛ wʋ cɔgɩ dɩ ba, yɩ ba yɩ nɔɔna maama dʋna.

eng: when they try to stop us from speaking to the Gentiles so they can be saved. Their sins are constantly pushing the limit. Gods wrath has caught up with them in the end.
local: Ba dɛɛn kwaanɩ sɩ ba cɩ dɩbam, sɩ dɩ́ yɩ tɔɔlɩ Wɛ kwǝrǝ kam dɩ́ brɩ dwi-gɛ tiinǝ sɩ ba na vrɩm ba lwarɩm wʋnɩ. Ba na vɩn Wɛ kwǝrǝ kam kʋntʋ tɩn, kʋ ma pa ba na kɩ kǝm-balwaarʋ tɩlʋ maŋa maama tɩn fɔgɩ tɩ puli tɩ wǝli da. Wɛ ban-zɔŋɔ kʋm laan nan tu ba baŋa.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we were separated from you for a while physically but not in our hearts. We made every effort in our desire to see you again face-to-face.
local: Dɩ́ ko-biǝ-ba, dɩ́ na pɔɔrɩ dɩ abam maŋa fɩnfɩɩn yɩranɩ tɩn, kʋ daɩ nɩ dɩ́ wʋbʋŋa mʋ pɔɔrɩ daanɩ, kʋ yɩ dɩ́ yiǝ na warɩ ya na daanɩ tɩn mʋ. Abam fra tiini ya jɩgɩ dɩbam, yɩ dɩ́ kwaanɩ sɩ dɩ́ joori dɩ́ na abam.

eng: We wanted to come to you—I, Paul, tried over and over again—and Satan stopped us.
local: Dɩ́ ma lagɩ sɩ dɩ́ ba abam te. Amʋ Pooli ya kwaanɩ sɩ a ba abam te, kʋ daɩ kuni bɩdwɩ yɩranɩ. Kʋ nan yɩ sʋtaanɩ mʋ cɩgɩ dɩbam.

eng: What is our hope, joy, or crown that we can brag about in front of our Lord Jesus when he comes? Isnt it all of you?.
local: Kʋ yɩ abam wʋbʋŋa mʋ tiini ya jɩgɩ dɩbam. Kʋ yɩ abam ŋwaanɩ mʋ dɩ́ jɩgɩ tɩɩna Wɛ tee nɩ dɩ wʋpolo. Dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi na joori o ba, dɩ́ wʋ́ taa jɩgɩ wʋpolo dɩ́ na wʋ́ wanɩ dɩ́ brɩ nɩ abam dɛ dɩbam jɩŋa á na vrɩm tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: You are our glory and joy!.
local: Kʋ yɩ cɩga mʋ, abam mʋ sɩɩnɩ á paɩ dɩbam na zulǝ dɩ wʋpolo.

eng: So when we couldnt stand it any longer, we thought it was a good idea to stay on in Athens by ourselves.
local: Dɩbam na warɩ sɩ dɩ́ na daanɩ yɩ abam fra tiini ya jɩgɩ dɩbam kʋ ja gaalɩ tɩn mʋ pɛ dɩbam lɩ wʋbʋŋa sɩ dɩ́ tʋŋɩ dɩ́ ko-bu Timoti sɩ o ba abam te, sɩ dɩbam tɩtɩ daarɩ dɩ́ maŋɩ Atɛɛnɩ nɩ. Wʋntʋ mʋ yɩ wʋlʋ na tɔgɩ dɩ dɩbam o tʋŋɩ Wɛ tɩtʋŋa yam yɩ o tɔɔlɩ Zezi Krisi kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam tɩn. Dɩ́ tʋŋ-o abam tee nɩ sɩ o ba o wǝli abam, sɩ á na dam dɩ baarɩ á taá tɔgɩ Zezi dɩ á wʋ maama.

eng: We didnt want any of you to be shaken by these problems. You know very well that we were meant to go through this.
local: sɩ yaara yalʋ á na nɛ tɩn yɩ pa á wʋlʋwʋlʋ joori kwaga. Abam tɩtɩ maŋɩ á ye nɩ dɩbam maŋɩ sɩ dɩ́ na yaara yam kʋntʋ doŋ mʋ.

eng: In fact, when we were with you, we kept on predicting that we were going to face problems exactly like what happened, as you know.
local: Dɩbam dɛɛn ta na wʋ abam tee nɩ maŋa kalʋ tɩn, dɩ́ maŋɩ dɩ́ ta dɩ́ brɩ abam nɩ nɔɔna wʋ́ bɛɛsɩ dɩbam. Kʋ nan sɩɩnɩ kʋ kɩ nɩ abam na maŋɩ á ye kʋ ni nɩ te tɩn.

eng: Thats why I sent Timothy to find out about your faithfulness when I couldnt stand it anymore. I was worried that the tempter might have tempted you so that our work would have been a waste of time.
local: Abam liǝ na tiini ya jɩgɩ-nɩ tɩn mʋ pɛ a tʋŋɩ Timoti abam tee nɩ, sɩ o ba o nii á daa ta tɔgɩ Zezi dɩ á wʋ maama na, a na kwarɩ fʋʋnɩ sɩ sʋtaanɩ wʋ́ zɩgɩ dɩ ba dɩ ganɩ abam sɩ á ywǝri Wɛ cwǝŋǝ nɩ sɩ kʋ pa dɩ́ tɩtʋŋa yam maama ji kafɛ tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: Now Timothy has returned to us from you and has given us good news about your faithfulness and love! He says that you always have good memories about us and that you want to see us as much as we want to see you.
local: Lele kʋntʋ, Timoti laan joori o ba dɩbam te, yɩ o pa dɩ́ wʋbʋŋa pǝni tɩga nɩ. O tagɩ o wɩ, á ta tɔgɩ Zezi dɩ á wʋ maama dɩ sono. O daa ta tagɩ o wɩ, á tiini á jɩgɩ dɩbam wʋbʋŋa dɩ wʋpolo, yɩ á lagɩ sɩ á na dɩbam nɩ dɩbam dɩ na lagɩ sɩ dɩ́ na abam te tɩn.

eng: Because of this, brothers and sisters, we were encouraged in all our distress and trouble through your faithfulness.
local: Dɩ́ ko-biǝ-ba, dɩ́ na ni nɩ á tɔgɩ Zezi dɩ á wʋ maama tɩn, kʋ pɛ dɩ́ bɩcara pǝni tɩga nɩ, yɩ dɩ́ na baarɩ dɩ́ yaara dɩ dɩ́ cana yam maama wʋnɩ.

eng: For now we are alive if you are standing your ground in the Lord.
local: Lele kʋntʋ, dɩ́ laan ŋwɩ dɩ wʋpolo á na zɩgɩ kǝŋkǝŋ dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm tɔgɩm dɩm wʋnɩ tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: How can we thank God enough for you, given all the joy we have because of you before our God?.
local: Dɩ́ bá wanɩ dɩ́ kɩ dɩ́ Tu Wɛ le dɩ́ ti abam ŋwaanɩ, dɩdaanɩ dɩ́ na nɛ wʋpolo kʋlʋ zanzan DƖ yigǝ nɩ abam ŋwaanɩ tɩn.

eng: Night and day, we pray more than ever to see all of you in person and to complete whatever you still need for your faith.
local: Maŋa maama wɩa dɩ tɩtɩɩ dɩ́ yǝni dɩ́ loori Wɛ dɩ dɩ́ wʋ maama mʋ, sɩ DƖ pa dɩ́ wanɩ dɩ́ na daanɩ, sɩ dɩ́ fɔgɩ dɩ́ brɩ kʋlʋ daa ta na muri abam tɩn, sɩ á wanɩ á fɔgɩ á taá tɔgɩ Zezi dɩ á wʋ maama.

eng: Now may our God and Father himself and our Lord Jesus guide us on our way back to you.
local: Dɩ́ Ko Wɛ dɩ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi nan wʋ́ pa dɩbam cwǝŋǝ sɩ dɩ́ ba dɩ́ na abam.

eng: May the Lord cause you to increase and enrich your love for each other and for everyone in the same way as we also love you.
local: Dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm wʋ́ pa á sono kʋm puli zanzan kʋ ja gaalɩ, sɩ á taá soe á donnǝ dɩ nɔɔna maama lanyɩranɩ, nɩ dɩbam dɩ na soe abam te tɩn.

eng: May the love cause your hearts to be strengthened, to be blameless in holiness before our God and Father when our Lord Jesus comes with all his people. Amen.
local: Kʋntʋ, oó pa á bɩcara kɩ dam, sɩ á taá jɩgɩ wʋ-poŋo fasɩ dɩ́ Ko Wɛ yigǝ nɩ maŋa kalʋ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi na wʋ́ joori o ba dɩ o kɔgɔ kʋm maama tɩn.

eng: So then, brothers and sisters, we ask and encourage you in the Lord Jesus to keep living the way you already are and even do better in how you live and please God—just as you learned from us.
local: Dɩ́ ko-biǝ-ba, kʋlʋ na daarɩ tɩn, dɩ́ loori abam dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi ŋwaanɩ sɩ á da cwǝŋǝ sɩ kʋ poli Wɛ wʋ. Dɩ́ maŋɩ dɩ́ brɩ abam cwǝŋǝ kam kʋntʋ, yɩ á tɔgɩ-ka dɩ zɩm maama. Dɩ́ nan ta tiini dɩ́ loori abam sɩ á kwaanɩ sɩ kʋ dwǝni á na maŋɩ á kɩ te tɩn.

eng: You know the instructions we gave you through the Lord Jesus.
local: Abam ye wǝǝnu tɩlʋ dɩ́ na brɩ abam yɩ tɩ yɩ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi nyɩm tɩn.

eng: Gods will is that your lives are dedicated to him. This means that you stay away from sexual immorality.
local: Wɛ na lagɩ sɩ á taá yɩ te tɩn mʋ tɩntʋ: DƖ lagɩ sɩ á taá jɩgɩ wʋ-poŋo mʋ DƖ yigǝ nɩ, sɩ á yɩ taá boorǝ.

eng: and learn how to control your own body in a pure and respectable way.
local: Abam nɔɔnʋ maama maŋɩ sɩ o lwarɩ, o na wʋ́ ja o tɩtɩ te sɩ o ma di o kaanɩ sɩ kʋ taa jɩgɩ zulǝ yɩ digiru tǝri kʋ wʋnɩ tɩn.

eng: Dont be controlled by your sexual urges like the Gentiles who dont know God.
local: Á nan yɩ pa boorim wʋbʋŋa wanɩ abam, nɩ nɔɔna balʋ na yǝri Wɛ tɩn.

eng: No one should mistreat or take advantage of their brother or sister in this issue. The Lord punishes people for all these things, as we told you before and sternly warned you.
local: Kadiri laŋa nɩ, nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ yɩ zaŋɩ o kɩ kʋlʋ na wʋ́ cɔgɩ o ko-bu wʋ tɩn, naa o joŋi kʋlʋ na yɩ o ko-bu nyɩm tɩn. Dɩ́ maŋɩ dɩ́ kaanɩ abam lanyɩranɩ nɩ, nɔɔnʋ na kɩ wo-zɔɔna yantʋ doŋ, dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm wʋ́ pa o na cam.

eng: God didnt call us to be immoral but to be dedicated to him.
local: Wɛ na kuri dɩbam sɩ dɩ́ taá tɔgɩ-DƖ tɩn, kʋ daɩ sɩ dɩ́ taá kɩ wo-zɔɔna. DƖ nan kuri dɩbam sɩ dɩ́ taá jɩgɩ wʋ-poŋo mʋ DƖ yigǝ nɩ.

eng: Therefore, whoever rejects these instructions isnt rejecting a human authority. They are rejecting God, who gives his Holy Spirit to you.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ, nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ na vɩn dɩ́ na brɩ kʋlʋ tɩn, kʋ daɩ nabiinǝ mʋ o vɩa, kʋ yɩ Wɛ dɩlʋ na kɩ DƖ Joro kʋm abam bɩcara nɩ tɩn mʋ o vɩa.

eng: You dont need us to write about loving your brothers and sisters because God has already taught you to love each other.
local: Kʋ nan na yɩ á na wʋ́ ta soe á ko-biǝ te tɩn, kʋ daa daɩ fɩfɩʋn sɩ dɩ́ pʋpʋnɩ dɩ́ brɩ abam. Wɛ tɩtɩ maŋɩ DƖ brɩ abam á na wʋ́ ta soe daanɩ te.

eng: In fact, you are doing loving deeds for all the brothers and sisters throughout Macedonia. Now we encourage you, brothers and sisters, to do so even more.
local: Kʋ yɩ cɩga mʋ, á sɩɩnɩ á soe á ko-biǝ balʋ maama na zʋʋrɩ Masɩdʋanɩ tɩɩnɩ dɩm nɩ tɩn. Dɩ́ ko-biǝ-ba, dɩ́ nan ta loori abam sɩ á tiini á taá soe daanɩ kʋ dwǝni faŋa.

eng: Aim to live quietly, mind your own business, and earn your own living, just as I told you.
local: Kwaanɩ-na sɩ á taá zʋʋrɩ daanɩ dɩ wʋ-zuru. Á taá nii á tɩtɩ baŋa nɩ. Nɔɔnʋ maama kwaanɩ o tʋŋɩ sɩ o na o ni-wʋdiu, nɩ dɩ́ na maŋɩ dɩ́ ta abam te tɩn.

eng: That way youll behave appropriately toward outsiders, and you wont be in need.
local: Kʋntʋ mʋ wʋ́ pa balʋ na daɩ Zezi kɔgɔ kʋm nɔɔna tɩn taa nɩgɩ abam lanyɩranɩ, yɩ kʋʋ́ pa á daa bá tɩɩgɩ nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we want you to know about people who have died so that you wont mourn like others who dont have any hope.
local: Dɩ́ ko-biǝ-ba, kʋ na yɩ nɔɔna balʋ na tɩgɩ tɩn, dɩ́ lagɩ sɩ á lwarɩ cɩga mʋ sɩ á daa yɩ taá bwɛa, sɩ á wʋ daa yɩ cɔgɩ tʋʋnɩ ŋwaanɩ, nɩ balʋ na yǝri Wɛ tɩn na ba jɩgɩ tɩɩna te tɩn.

eng: Since we believe that Jesus died and rose, so we also believe that God will bring with him those who have died in Jesus.
local: Dɩbam sɛ nɩ Zezi tɩgɩ mʋ, yɩ o laan joori o bi o yagɩ tʋʋnɩ. Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ, kʋ na yɩ balʋ na sɛ-o yɩ ba tɩ tɩn, dɩ́ ye nɩ Wɛ wʋ́ pa ba taa wʋ Zezi tee nɩ.

eng: What we are saying is a message from the Lord: we who are alive and still around at the Lords coming definitely wont go ahead of those who have died.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ dɩ́ na brɩ abam kʋlʋ tɩn yɩ dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm kwǝrǝ mʋ. Dɛ dɩm dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi na wʋ́ joori o ba tɩn, dɩbam balʋ na daarɩ lʋgʋ baŋa nɩ yɩ dɩ́ ta ŋwɩ tɩn bá loori balʋ na maŋɩ ba tɩ tɩn Wɛ tee nɩ.

eng: This is because the Lord himself will come down from heaven with the signal of a shout by the head angel and a blast on Gods trumpet. First, those who are dead in Christ will rise.
local: Dɩ́ wʋ́ ba dɩ́ ni kwǝrǝ na bagɩ wɛyuu nɩ, dɩ malɛsɩ pɛ wʋm kwǝrǝ, dɩdaanɩ Wɛ nabɔn-zɔŋɔ kʋm wum, yɩ dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm tɩtɩ zɩgɩ wɛyuu nɩ o tu. Balʋ na sɛ Zezi Krisi yɩ ba tɩ tɩn wʋ́ da yigǝ ba bi ba yagɩ tʋʋnɩ.

eng: Then, we who are living and still around will be taken up together with them in the clouds to meet with the Lord in the air. That way we will always be with the Lord.
local: Wɛ laan wʋ́ pa dɩbam balʋ na daarɩ yɩ dɩ́ daa ta ŋwɩ tɩn la daanɩ dɩ bantʋ, yɩ DƖ zǝŋi dɩbam kunkwǝǝnu wʋnɩ sɩ dɩ́ vu dɩ́ jeeri dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm wɛyuu nɩ. Kʋntʋ, dɩ́ wʋ́ ta wʋ dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm tee nɩ maŋa maama.

eng: So encourage each other with these words.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ, á taá maɩ cɩga kam kʋntʋ á kwe daanɩ, sɩ á bɩcara taa tigi jǝgǝ dɩdʋa.

eng: We dont need to write to you about the timing and dates, brothers and sisters.
local: Dɩ́ ko-biǝ-ba, abam daa ba taá lagɩ sɩ dɩ́ pʋpʋnɩ dɩ́ ta dɩ́ brɩ abam maŋa kalʋ wǝǝnu tɩntʋ na wʋ́ kɩ tɩn.

eng: You know very well that the day of the Lord is going to come like a thief in the night.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ abam tɩtɩ maŋɩ á ye lanyɩranɩ nɩ dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm dɛ dɩm lagɩ dɩ ba dɩ darɩ nɔɔna mʋ, nɩ ŋwɩɩnʋ na yǝni o ba tɩtɩɩ nɩ te tɩn.

eng: When they are saying, There is peace and security, at that time sudden destruction will attack them, like labor pains start with a pregnant woman, and they definitely wont escape.
local: Maŋa kalʋ nɔɔna na tɛ ba wɩ yazurǝ wʋra yɩ ywǝǝni wʋra tɩn, kantʋ maŋa kam nɩ mʋ cam wʋ́ da dɩ ba ba baŋa, yɩ ba bá lu. Kʋʋ́ ta nyɩ dɩ kaanɩ pugǝ na dɛ ka vri yɩ ka wɔɛ te tɩn mʋ.

eng: But you arent in darkness, brothers and sisters, so the day wont catch you by surprise like a thief.
local: Dɩ́ ko-biǝ-ba, abam nan daa tǝri lim wʋnɩ. Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm dɛ dɩm bá ba dɩ darɩ abam nɩ ŋwɩɩnʋ te.

eng: All of you are children of light and children of the day. We dont belong to night or darkness.
local: Abam maama wʋ Wɛ pooni wʋnɩ mʋ, yɩ á tɩtʋŋa maama kɩ wɩa nɩ jaja. Dɩbam daɩ tɩtɩɩ nɔɔna, dɩ́ tɩtʋŋa dɩ nan daɩ lim tɩtʋŋa.

eng: So then, lets not sleep like the others, but lets stay awake and stay sober.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ, dɩ́ yɩ pa dɔɔm taa jɩgɩ dɩbam nɩ balʋ na yǝri Wɛ tɩn. Pa-na dɩ́ fɔgɩ dɩ́ cɩ dɩ́ tɩtɩ sɩ dɩ́ yiǝ waarɩ.

eng: People who sleep sleep at night, and people who get drunk get drunk at night.
local: Tɩtɩɩ nɩ mʋ nɔɔna yǝni ba dɔa, yɩ badonnǝ nyɔ ba bugǝ.

eng: Since we belong to the day, lets stay sober, wearing faithfulness and love as a piece of armor that protects our body and the hope of salvation as a helmet.
local: Dɩbam nan yɩ wɩa nɔɔna mʋ. Kʋ maŋɩ sɩ dɩ́ taá cʋ dɩ́ tɩtɩ. Pa-na dɩ́ taá jɩgɩ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Zezi, sɩ dɩ́ taá soe daanɩ. Kʋntʋ mʋ wʋ́ cɩ dɩbam lwarɩm wʋnɩ, nɩ nɔɔnʋ na maa ve jara yɩ o kwe luguru gɔrɔ o lɛ o ma cɩ o nyɔɔnɩ te tɩn. Pa-na dɩ́ taá jɩgɩ tɩɩna nɩ Wɛ wʋ́ vrɩ dɩbam ŋwɩa, nɩnɛɛnɩ nɔɔnʋ na kwe luguru yu-kwǝli o pu sɩ o ma kwǝli o yuu jara wʋnɩ te tɩn.

eng: God didnt intend for us to suffer his wrath but rather to possess salvation through our Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Wɛ na kuri dɩbam sɩ dɩ́ taá yɩ DƖ nɔɔna tɩn, kʋ daɩ sɩ DƖ ban-zɔŋɔ kʋm ba kʋ cɔgɩ dɩbam. Kʋ nan yɩ sɩ DƖ vrɩ dɩbam ŋwɩa mʋ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi Krisi ŋwaanɩ.

eng: Jesus died for us so that, whether we are awake or asleep, we will live together with him.
local: Wʋntʋ mʋ tɩgɩ dɩbam ŋwaanɩ, sɩ dɩ́ wanɩ dɩ́ tɔgɩ dɩd-o dɩ́ na ŋwɩa Wɛ tee nɩ. O na joori o ba, yɩ dɩ́ na ŋwɩ naa dɩ́ na tɩga, dɩ́ ta wʋ́ na ŋwɩa dɩd-o Wɛ tee nɩ.

eng: So continue encouraging each other and building each other up, just like you are doing already.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ, á taá kwe daanɩ sɩ kʋ pa á bɩcara taa tigi jǝgǝ dɩdʋa, sɩ á fɔgɩ á zǝni daanɩ dɩ baarɩ nɩ á na maŋɩ á kɩ te tɩn.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we ask you to respect those who are working with you, leading you, and instructing you.
local: Dɩ́ ko-biǝ-ba, dɩ́ nan loori abam sɩ á taá nɩgɩ nɔɔna balʋ na tʋŋɩ dɩ abam yɩ ba nii abam baŋa nɩ yɩ ba kwe abam dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi cwǝŋǝ kam wʋnɩ tɩn.

eng: Think of them highly with love because of their work. Live in peace with each other.
local: Á taá zuli-ba lanyɩranɩ dɩ sono ba tɩtʋŋa yam ŋwaanɩ. Á pa ywǝǝni ta wʋ á tɩtarɩ nɩ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we urge you to warn those who are disorderly. Comfort the discouraged. Help the weak. Be patient with everyone.
local: Dɩ́ ko-biǝ-ba, dɩ́ loori abam sɩ á taá kaanɩ yawɔrɩ-nyɩna, sɩ á pa balʋ na kwarɩ fʋʋnɩ tɩn na baarɩ, sɩ á taá zǝni nabwǝnǝ, sɩ á taá jɩgɩ wʋ-zuru dɩ nɔɔna maama.

eng: Make sure no one repays a wrong with a wrong, but always pursue the good for each other and everyone else.
local: Á taá yɩrɩ á tɩtɩ, sɩ nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ yɩ ma lwarɩm o joori o ma o ŋwɩ o doŋ lwarɩm. Maŋa maama sɩ á kwaanɩ á taá kɩ lanyɩranɩ dɩ á ko-biǝ dɩ nɔɔna maama.

eng: Rejoice always.
local: Á taá jɩgɩ wʋpolo maŋa maama.

eng: Pray continually.
local: Á taá loori Wɛ maŋa maama.

eng: Give thanks in every situation because this is Gods will for you in Christ Jesus.
local: Kʋlʋ maama na kɩa, sɩ á taá kɩ Wɛ le. Mʋ Wɛ na lagɩ sɩ á taá kɩ te, á na ŋwɩ dɩ Zezi Krisi tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: Dont suppress the Spirit.
local: Yɩ cʋ-na Wɛ Joro kʋm tɩtʋŋa.

eng: Dont brush off Spirit-inspired messages.
local: Wɛ Joro kʋm na pɛ nɔɔnʋ ŋɔɔnɩ yiyiu-ŋwɛ, á yɩ zaŋɩ á gooni-sɩ.

eng: but examine everything carefully and hang on to what is good.
local: Á nan maanɩ-na woŋo maama á nii. Kʋlʋ na lana tɩn sɩ á sɛ-kʋ.

eng: Avoid every kind of evil.
local: Á nan fɔgɩ á cɩ á tɩtɩ dɩ wo-balwaarʋ dwi maama.

eng: Now, may the God of peace himself cause you to be completely dedicated to him; and may your spirit, soul, and body be kept intact and blameless at our Lord Jesus Christs coming.
local: Baŋa-Wɛ dɩlʋ na paɩ nɔɔna wʋ-zuru tɩn wʋ́ pa á taá yɩ DƖ tɩtɩ nɔɔna, sɩ á taá jɩgɩ wʋ-poŋo fasɩ, sɩ á ŋwɩa maama taa jɩgɩ cɩga, kʋ na yɩ á yɩra dɩ á jwǝǝru dɩ á wʋbʋŋa maama. Kʋntʋ tɩn, dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi Krisi na tuǝ, á bá ta jɩgɩ digiru Wɛ yigǝ nɩ dɩ fɩnfɩɩn dɩ.

eng: The one who is calling you is faithful and will do this.
local: Wɛ dɩlʋ na bǝŋi abam sɩ á taá yɩ DƖ nɔɔna tɩn yɩ cɩga tu mʋ. DƖ nan wʋ́ sɩɩnɩ DƖ zǝni abam kʋntʋ mʋ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, pray for us.
local: Dɩ́ ko-biǝ-ba, á taá loori Wɛ á pa dɩbam dɩ.

eng: Greet all the brothers and sisters with a holy kiss.
local: Jɔɔnɩ-na dɩ́ ko-biǝ bam maama lanyɩranɩ dɩ sono.

eng: By the Lords authority, I order all of you to have this letter read aloud to all the brothers and sisters.
local: A nan lagɩ a loori abam dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm yɩrɩ ŋwaanɩ sɩ á karɩmɩ tɔnɔ kʋntʋ á brɩ dɩ́ ko-biǝ bam maama.

eng: The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with all of you.
local: Dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi Krisi wʋ́ pa abam yu-yoŋo.

eng: From Paul, Silvanus, and Timothy: To the church of the Thessalonians, which is in God our Father, and in the Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Amʋ Pooli dɩdaanɩ Silasɩ dɩ Timoti mʋ pʋpʋnɩ tɔnɔ kʋntʋ sɩ dɩ́ pa abam Wɛ nɔɔna balʋ na wʋ Tesaloniki nɩ yɩ á yɩ dɩ́ Ko Baŋa-Wɛ dɩ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi Krisi nɔɔna tɩn.

eng: Grace and peace to all of you from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Dɩ́ Ko Wɛ dɩ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi Krisi wʋ́ pa abam yazurǝ dɩ yu-yoŋo.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we must always thank God for you. This is only right because your faithfulness is growing by leaps and bounds, and the love that all of you have for each other is increasing.
local: Dɩ́ ko-biǝ-ba, dɩ́ maŋɩ sɩ dɩ́ kɩ Wɛ le maŋa maama abam ŋwaanɩ nɩnɛɛnɩ kʋ na maŋɩ te tɩn, bɛŋwaanɩ á kɩ á wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Zezi kʋ ja gaalɩ, yɩ á maama tiini á soe daanɩ lanyɩranɩ, yɩ á sono kʋm wʋra kʋ puli zanzan.

eng: Thats why we ourselves are bragging about you in Gods churches. We tell about your endurance and faithfulness in all the harassments and trouble that you have put up with.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ dɩ́ yǝni dɩ́ tɛ á taanɩ dɩ́ brɩ Zezi kɔgɔ kʋm na wʋ jǝgǝ kalʋ maama nɩ tɩn, yɩ dɩ́ jɩgɩ wʋpolo abam ŋwaanɩ. Dɩ́ tɛ dɩ ba nɩ, nɔɔna bɛɛsɩ abam yɩ ba yaarɩ abam zanzan, yɩ á daa ta zɩgɩ lanyɩranɩ dɩ pu-dɩa, yɩ á kwǝri á tɔgɩ Zezi dɩ wʋ-dɩdʋa.

eng: This shows that Gods judgment is right, and that you will be considered worthy of Gods kingdom for which you are suffering.
local: Kʋntʋ mʋ pɛ dɩ́ lwarɩ jaja nɩ, Wɛ wʋ́ di nabiinǝ sarɩya dɩ cɩga mʋ. DƖ wʋ́ pa á na cɩga, yɩ á maŋɩ sɩ á tɔgɩ á wǝli DƖ paarɩ dɩm wʋnɩ, bɛŋwaanɩ abam sɩɩnɩ á na yaara Wɛ paarɩ dɩm kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ.

eng: After all, its right for God to pay back the ones making trouble for you with trouble.
local: Wɛ nan wʋ́ kɩ abam cɩga, yɩ DƖ wʋ́ pa balʋ na yaarɩ abam tɩn joori ba na cam.

eng: and to pay back you who are having trouble with relief along with us. This payback will come when the Lord Jesus is revealed from heaven with his powerful angels.
local: DƖ ma wʋ́ daarɩ DƖ pa abam balʋ na yaarɩ tɩn dɩ dɩbam maama na siun, maŋa kalʋ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi na wʋ́ joori o ba sɩ nabiinǝ maama na-o tɩn. Wʋntʋ wʋ́ nuŋi Wɛ-sɔŋɔ dɩ o malɛsɩ dɩdɛɛra bam.

eng: He will give justice with blazing fire to those who dont recognize God and dont obey the good news of our Lord Jesus.
local: yɩ min-vwɩ zaŋɩ sɩ kaagɩ-ba. Dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi wʋ́ pa balʋ na vɩn Wɛ yɩ ba wʋ sɛ wʋm kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam tɩn na cam.

eng: They will pay the penalty of eternal destruction away from the Lords presence and away from his mighty glory.
local: Nɔɔna bam kʋntʋ wʋ́ na cam nɩ kʋ na maŋɩ dɩ ba te tɩn. Baá na lɛɛrʋ tɩlʋ na ba ti tɩn. Baá pɔɔrɩ-ba ba yɩra, yɩ ba taa baŋwɛ dɩ dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm, yɩ ba daa bá na o paarɩ dam-fɔrɔ zulǝ yam.

eng: This will happen when he comes on that day to receive honor from his holy people and to be admired by everyone who has believed—and our testimony to you was believed.
local: Kʋntʋ maama wʋ́ ba kʋ kɩ maŋa kalʋ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi na wʋ́ joori o ba tɩn. Dɛ dɩm kʋntʋ nɩ, oó na zulǝ o tɩtɩ nɔɔna bam tee nɩ. Balʋ maama na kɩ ba wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩd-o tɩn wʋ́ pa-o tiǝ zanzan. Abam nan wʋ́ ta wʋ bantʋ wʋnɩ dɩ á na sɛ Wɛ cɩga kalʋ dɩ́ na brɩ abam tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: We are constantly praying for you for this: that our God will make you worthy of his calling and accomplish every good desire and faithful work by his power.
local: Kʋ yɩ kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ dɩ́ yǝni dɩ́ loori dɩ́ Tu Wɛ maŋa maama dɩ́ pa abam, sɩ DƖ pa á maŋɩ dɩ DƖ cwǝŋǝ kam tɔgɩm, nɩ DƖ na kuri abam sɩ á taá yɩ te tɩn. Dɩ́ loori-DƖ sɩ DƖ pa abam dam, sɩ á wanɩ á kɩ lanyɩranɩ nɩnɛɛnɩ á wʋbʋŋa na lagɩ te tɩn maama, sɩ á taá kɩ tɩtʋŋa yalʋ maama na lana tɩn, á na kɩ á wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ DƖ tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: Then the name of our Lord Jesus will be honored by you, and you will be honored by him, consistent with the grace of our God and the Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Kʋntʋ mʋ wʋ́ pa dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi taa naɩ zulǝ abam tee nɩ, yɩ abam dɩ wʋ́ na zulǝ, dɩ́ Tu Baŋa-Wɛ dɩ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi Krisi na pɛ abam yu-yoŋo tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we have a request for you concerning our Lord Jesus Christs coming and when we are gathered together to be with him.
local: Dɩ́ ko-biǝ-ba, á ye nɩ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi Krisi wʋ́ joori o ba, yɩ Wɛ wʋ́ la dɩbam sɩ dɩ́ taá wʋ o tee nɩ. Dɩ́ nan lagɩ dɩ́ loori abam sɩ á yɩ pa á bɩcara taa di kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ.

eng: We dont want you to be easily confused in your mind or upset if you hear that the day of the Lord is already here, whether you hear it through some spirit, a message, or a letter supposedly from us.
local: Á yɩ zaŋɩ á pa á wʋbʋŋa vugimi, dɩ nɔɔna balʋ na tɛ ba wɩ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi dɛ dɩm maŋɩ dɩ yi tɩn. Nɔɔna na tɛ dɩ abam ba wɩ, Wɛ Joro kʋm mʋ brɩ kʋntʋ, naa ba na wɩ kʋ yɩ dɩbam taanɩ mʋ, naa ba na pɛ abam tɔnɔ yɩ ba wɩ kʋ nuŋi dɩbam tee mʋ.

eng: Dont let anyone deceive you in any way. That day wont come unless the rebellion comes first and the person who is lawless is revealed, who is headed for destruction.
local: sɩ á yɩ sɛ á pa nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ ganɩ abam dɩ wǝǝnu tɩm kʋntʋ dwi. Bɛŋwaanɩ maŋa kalʋ nɔɔna zanzan na wʋ́ ba ba ywǝri Wɛ cwǝŋǝ kam wʋnɩ tɩn wʋ́ da yigǝ kʋ kɩ mʋ, sɩ dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm dɛ dɩm laan ba dɩ yi. Kʋlʋ na wǝli da tɩn, kǝm-balwaarʋ tu wʋm wʋ́ da yigǝ mʋ o ba. Wʋntʋ gurim je nan wʋ́ ta yɩ cɔgɩm mʋ.

eng: He is the opponent of every so-called god or object of worship and promotes himself over them. So he sits in Gods temple, displaying himself to show that he is God.
local: Oó brɩ nɩ wʋm dwe wǝǝnu tɩlʋ maama nɔɔna na zuli dɩ kʋlʋ maama ba na bǝ nɩ ba wa tɩn, yɩ oó dʋnɩ wǝǝnu tɩm kʋntʋ maama. O ma wʋ́ vu o zʋ o jǝni Baŋa-Wɛ tɩtɩ digǝ kam wʋnɩ, yɩ o brɩ nɩ wʋm tɩtɩ mʋ yɩ Wɛ.

eng: You remember that I used to tell you these things while I was with you, dont you?.
local: A ya na wʋ abam tee nɩ maŋa kalʋ tɩn, a maŋɩ a brɩ abam wǝǝnu tɩm kʋntʋ. Á nan wʋ guli-tɩ na?.

eng: Now you know what holds him back so that he can be revealed when his time comes.
local: Woŋo kʋdoŋ nan mʋ cɩgɩ wǝǝnu tɩm kʋntʋ cwǝŋǝ sɩ tɩ ta yɩ kɩ lele, yɩ á ye kʋ ni nɩ. Kʋ daarɩ maŋa kam na sɩɩnɩ ka yi, kǝm-balwaarʋ tu wʋm laan wʋ́ ba sɩ nabiinǝ lwar-o jaja.

eng: The hidden plan to live without any law is at work now, but it will be secret only until the one who is holding it back is out of the way.
local: Kǝm-lwaanʋ dam dɩlʋ na sǝgi nɔɔna yiǝ nɩ tɩn maŋɩ dɩ wʋra dɩ cɔgɩ nabiinǝ. Kʋ nan na yɩ wʋlʋ na wʋra o cʋ kǝm-lwaanʋ tɩm cwǝŋǝ lele sɩ tɩ yɩ kɩ tɩn, kʋntʋ tu wʋ́ ba o viiri.

eng: Then the person who is lawless will be revealed. The Lord Jesus will destroy him with the breath from his mouth. When the Lord comes, his appearance will put an end to him.
local: Maŋa kam kʋntʋ nɩ mʋ, kǝm-balwaarʋ tu wʋm laan wʋ́ brɩ o tɩtɩ jaja. Dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi na wʋ́ joori o ba maŋa kalʋ tɩn, o laan wʋ́ ma o ni-viu o cɔgɩ wʋntʋ fasɩ. Zezi na wʋ́ joori o ba dɩ dam-fɔrɔ tɩn, mʋ o laan wʋ́ cɔgɩ kǝm-balwaarʋ tu wʋm.

eng: When the person who is lawless comes, it will happen through Satans effort, with all kinds of fake power, signs, and wonders.
local: Maŋa kam kǝm-balwaarʋ tu wʋm na wʋ́ ba tɩn, oó joŋi dam-fɔrɔ sʋtaanɩ tee nɩ o ma kɩ wo-kɩnkagɩla dwi tǝri tǝri ya na daɩ cɩga tɩn.

eng: It will happen with every sort of wicked deception of those who are heading toward destruction because they have refused to love the truth that would allow them to be saved.
local: O ma wʋ́ kɩ kǝm-balwaarʋ dwi maama o ma ganɩ balʋ na wʋ́ ga ba ŋwɩa Wɛ tee nɩ tɩn. Kʋʋ́ kɩ-ba kʋntʋ, bɛŋwaanɩ ba ba sɛ sɩ ba joŋi Wɛ cɩga kam dɩ sono, sɩ kʋ pa DƖ vrɩ-ba ba lwarɩm wʋnɩ.

eng: This is why God will send them an influence that will mislead them so that they will believe the lie.
local: Ba na vɩn Wɛ cɩga kam tɩn ŋwaanɩ, DƖ laan wʋ́ pa ba wʋbʋŋa daa yǝri cɩga, yɩ ba sɛ ba tɔgɩ kʋlʋ na yɩ vwan tɩn.

eng: The result will be that everyone will be judged who is not convinced by the truth but is happy with injustice.
local: Balʋ maama na wʋ sɛ DƖ cɩga kam yɩ ba daarɩ ba soe kǝm-balwaarʋ tɩn, Wɛ wʋ́ di ba taanɩ yɩ ba na cam.

eng: But we always must thank God for you, brothers and sisters who are loved by God. This is because he chose you from the beginning to be the first crop of the harvest. This brought salvation, through your dedication to God by the Spirit and through your belief in the truth.
local: Dɩ́ ko-biǝ-ba, dɩ́ maŋɩ sɩ dɩ́ kɩ Wɛ le maŋa maama abam ŋwaanɩ, á na yɩ balʋ dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm na soe tɩn. Kʋ zɩgɩ pulim nɩ mʋ Wɛ kuri abam sɩ DƖ vrɩ abam DƖ yagɩ. DƖ mɛ DƖ Joro kʋm dam mʋ DƖ pa á ji DƖ tɩtɩ nɔɔna, dɩ á na kɩ á wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ DƖ cɩga kam tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: God called all of you through our good news so you could possess the honor of our Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Wɛ na bǝŋi abam sɩ á taá yɩ kʋntʋ tɩn, kʋ dɛ dɩ DƖ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam dɩ́ na tɔɔlɩ dɩ́ brɩ abam tɩn ŋwaanɩ mʋ, sɩ DƖ pa á tɔgɩ dɩ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi Krisi á na zulǝ.

eng: So then, brothers and sisters, stand firm and hold on to the traditions we taught you, whether we taught you in person or through our letter.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ, dɩ́ ko-biǝ-ba, fɔgɩ-na á zɩgɩ kǝŋkǝŋ, sɩ á yɩ yagɩ cɩga kalʋ dɩ́ na maŋɩ dɩ́ brɩ abam tɩn, kʋ na yɩ dɩ́ na maŋɩ dɩ́ wʋ abam tee nɩ yɩ dɩ́ ŋɔɔnɩ kʋlʋ tɩn, dɩ dɩ́ na pʋpʋnɩ tɔnɔ kʋlʋ dɩ́ pa abam tɩn dɩ.

eng: Our Lord Jesus Christ himself and God our Father loved us and through grace gave us eternal comfort and a good hope.
local: Dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi Krisi dɩdaanɩ dɩ́ Ko Wɛ soe dɩbam yɩ DƖ pa dɩbam yu-yoŋo, dɩ DƖ na pɛ dɩ́ jɩgɩ baarɩ dɩlʋ na bá fɔgɩ dɩ ti tɩn, dɩdaanɩ tɩɩna yalʋ na yɩ cɩga tɩn.

eng: May he encourage your hearts and give you strength in every good thing you do or say.
local: Dɩntʋ wʋ́ zǝni abam dɩ wʋbʋŋ-ŋʋna sɩ á taá jɩgɩ dam, sɩ á wanɩ á taá kɩ lanyɩranɩ á tɩtʋŋa dɩ á ni-taanɩ maama wʋnɩ.

eng: Finally, brothers and sisters, pray for us so that the Lords message will spread quickly and be honored, just like it happened with you.
local: Dɩ́ ko-biǝ-ba, kʋlʋ na daarɩ tɩn, á taá loori Wɛ á pa dɩbam, sɩ dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam jagɩ ka yi je maama, sɩ nɔɔna sɛ-ka lanyɩranɩ nɩ abam dɩ na sɛ-ka te tɩn.

eng: Pray too that we will be rescued from inappropriate and evil people since everyone that we meet wont respond with faith.
local: Loori-na Wɛ sɩ DƖ joŋi dɩbam nɔn-balwaarʋ jɩa nɩ, bɛŋwaanɩ kʋ daɩ nɔɔna bam maama mʋ sɛ Wɛ kwǝrǝ kam.

eng: But the Lord is faithful and will give you strength and protect you from the evil one.
local: Dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm nan yɩ cɩga tu mʋ, oó wǝli abam dɩ dam, yɩ o cɩ abam sʋtaanɩ jɩŋa nɩ sɩ dɩ yɩ cɔgɩ abam.

eng: We are confident about you in the Lord—that you are doing and will keep doing what we tell you to do.
local: Á na yɩ dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm nɔɔna tɩn mʋ dɩ́ jɩgɩ abam cɩga sɩ á tɔgɩ dɩ́ na maŋɩ dɩ́ brɩ abam kʋlʋ tɩn, yɩ á ta wʋ́ ta kɩ kʋntʋ nɩ dɩ́ na maŋɩ dɩ́ ta te tɩn.

eng: May the Lord lead your hearts to express Gods love and Christs endurance.
local: Dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm wʋ́ pa á wʋbʋŋa tiini ya zʋ Wɛ sono kʋm, yɩ o daarɩ o pa á zɩgɩ lanyɩranɩ dɩ pu-dɩa nɩ Zezi Krisi tɩtɩ na zɩgɩ te tɩn.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we command you in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ to stay away from every brother or sister who lives an undisciplined life that is not in line with the traditions that you received from us.
local: Dɩ́ ko-biǝ-ba, dɩ́ kaanɩ abam dɩ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi Krisi yɩrɩ mʋ, sɩ á cɩ á tɩtɩ dɩ á ko-bu wʋlʋ maama na yɩ yawɔrɩ-nyɩm yɩ o ba tɔgɩ zaasɩm dɩlʋ dɩ́ na brɩ abam tɩn.

eng: You yourselves know how you need to imitate us because we were not undisciplined when we were with you.
local: Abam nan ye lanyɩranɩ nɩ á maŋɩ sɩ á lwǝni dɩbam tɩtʋŋa na yɩ te tɩn mʋ. Dɩ́ dɛɛn na wʋ á tee nɩ tɩn, dɩ́ ba jɩgɩ yawɔrɔ.

eng: We didnt eat anyones food without paying for it. Instead, we worked night and day with effort and hard work so that we would not impose on you.
local: Dɩ́ wʋ joŋi wʋdiu nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ tee nɩ kafɛ. Dɩ́ nan tiini dɩ́ tʋŋɩ mʋ yɩ kʋ cɛ dɩ́ yɩra wɩa dɩ tɩtɩɩ, sɩ dɩ́ yɩ yaarɩ abam wʋlʋwʋlʋ wʋdiu ŋwaanɩ.

eng: We did this to give you an example to imitate, not because we didnt have a right to insist on financial support.
local: Kʋ nan daɩ nɩ dɩ́ ya ba jɩgɩ cwǝŋǝ sɩ dɩ́ joŋi zǝnǝ abam tee nɩ. Dɩ́ dɛɛn nan kɩ kʋntʋ sɩ kʋ pa á wanɩ á lwǝni dɩbam na kɩ te tɩn mʋ.

eng: Even when we were with you we were giving you this command: If anyone doesnt want to work, they shouldnt eat.
local: Dɩ́ na wʋ abam tee nɩ maŋa kalʋ tɩn, dɩ́ pɛ abam ni nɩ, nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ na ba lagɩ tɩtʋŋa tɩn, kʋntʋ tu wʋ maŋɩ sɩ o di wʋdiu dɩ.

eng: We hear that some of you are living an undisciplined life. They arent working, but they are meddling in other peoples business.
local: Dɩ́ tagɩ kʋntʋ, bɛŋwaanɩ dɩ́ ni nɩ abam badonnǝ yɩ yawɔrɩ-nyɩna mʋ. Ba ba lagɩ tɩtʋŋa, yɩ ba karɩ je maama ba kɩkarɩ ba donnǝ yiǝ.

eng: By the Lord Jesus Christ, we command and encourage such people to work quietly and put their own food on the table.
local: Dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi Krisi yɩrɩ ŋwaanɩ mʋ dɩ́ tɛ nɔɔna bam kʋntʋ, yɩ dɩ́ kaanɩ-ba sɩ ba ja ba tɩtɩ cɩm ba tʋŋɩ, sɩ ba wanɩ ba nii ba tɩtɩ baŋa nɩ dɩ ba ni-wʋdiu.

eng: Brothers and sisters, dont get discouraged in doing what is right.
local: Dɩ́ ko-biǝ-ba, abam tɩtɩ nan yɩ zaŋɩ á bwǝni dɩ lanyɩranɩ kǝm.

eng: Take note of anyone who doesnt obey what we have said in this letter. Dont associate with them so they will be ashamed of themselves.
local: Abam wʋlʋ na wʋ sɛ dɩ́ na pʋpʋnɩ te tɔnɔ kʋntʋ wʋnɩ dɩ́ brɩ abam tɩn, sɩ á taá ye kʋntʋ tu, sɩ á wanɩ á ja á tɩtɩ dɩd-o, sɩ kʋ pa cavɩɩra ja-o.

eng: Dont treat them like enemies, but warn them like you would do for a brother or sister.
local: Á nan yɩ pa o ji á dʋm. Á taá kaan-o nɩ á ko-bu te.

eng: May the Lord of peace himself give you peace always in every way. The Lord be with all of you.
local: Dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm yɩ wʋ-zuru tu mʋ, yɩ oó pa abam taá jɩgɩ wʋ-zuru maŋa maama woŋo maama wʋnɩ. Dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm wʋ́ ta wʋra dɩ abam maama.

eng: I, Paul, am writing this greeting with my own hand. This verifies that the letter is from me, as in every letter of mine. This is how I write.
local: Amʋ Pooli mʋ jɔɔnɩ abam. A tɩtɩ laan mʋ pʋpʋnɩ tɩntʋ dɩ a jɩŋa. A yǝni a kɩ kʋntʋ mʋ a twaanʋ tɩm maama wʋnɩ, sɩ á lwarɩ nɩ kʋ yɩ amʋ mʋ pʋpʋnɩ. A yǝni a pʋpʋnɩ tɩntʋ mʋ.

eng: The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with all of you.
local: Dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi Krisi wʋ́ pa abam maama yu-yoŋo.

eng: From Paul, who is an apostle of Jesus Christ by the command of God our savior and of Christ Jesus our hope.
local: Amʋ Pooli wʋlʋ na yɩ Zezi Krisi tɩntʋŋnʋ tɩn mʋ pʋpʋnɩ tɔnɔ kʋntʋ sɩ a pa nmʋ Timoti. Baŋa-Wɛ dɩlʋ na yɩ dɩbam Vɩrnʋ dɩ Zezi Krisi wʋlʋ dɩbam na jɩgɩ o tɩɩna tɩn mʋ pɛ-nɩ ni sɩ a taa yɩ o tɩntʋŋnʋ.

eng: To Timothy, my true child in the faith. Grace, mercy, and peace from God the Father and from Christ Jesus our Lord.
local: Nmʋ yɩ nɩnɛɛnɩ amʋ tɩtɩ bu mʋ te, n na sɛ Zezi Krisi tɩn ŋwaanɩ. Dɩ́ Ko Wɛ dɩ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi Krisi wʋ́ pa nmʋ yazurǝ dɩ yu-yoŋo, yɩ o daarɩ o duri nmʋ ŋwaŋa.

eng: When I left for Macedonia, I asked you to stay behind in Ephesus so that you could instruct certain individuals not to spread wrong teaching.
local: Maŋa kam amʋ dɛɛn na maa ve Masɩdʋanɩ tɩn, a loori nmʋ sɩ n maŋɩ Efɛɛzɩ nɩ sɩ n kaanɩ nɔɔna balʋ na brɩ kʋlʋ na daɩ cɩga tɩn sɩ ba yagɩ.

eng: They shouldnt pay attention to myths and endless genealogies. Their teaching only causes useless guessing games instead of faithfulness to Gods way of doing things.
local: Nmʋ maŋɩ sɩ n ta-ba sɩ ba yagɩ ba wʋbʋŋa sɩnswalɩ sɩlʋ na daɩ cɩga tɩn, sɩ ba daarɩ ba yagɩ ba kwǝ dwi natɔga kalʋ na ba jɩgɩ gurim je tɩn. Bɛŋwaanɩ wǝǝnu tɩm kʋntʋ paɩ nɔɔna magɩ kantɔgɔ mʋ kafɛ. Tɩ ba wǝli nɔɔna sɩ ba kɩ ba wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ sɩ ba taa tɔgɩ-DƖ.

eng: The goal of instruction is love from a pure heart, a good conscience, and a sincere faith.
local: Nmʋ maŋɩ sɩ n kaanɩ-ba mʋ dɩdaanɩ wǝǝnu tɩm kʋntʋ sɩ ba yagɩ-tɩ, sɩ ba taa jɩgɩ sono kʋlʋ na yɩ cɩga cɩga na nuŋi bɩcarɩ-ŋʋna wʋnɩ tɩn, yɩ ba na kɩ kʋlʋ maama ba na ye nɩ kʋ lamma tɩn, yɩ ba na sɩɩnɩ ba kɩ ba wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ, kʋʋ́ pa ba taa jɩgɩ sono kʋm kʋntʋ.

eng: Because they missed this goal, some people have been distracted by talk that doesnt mean anything.
local: Nɔɔna bam kʋntʋ nan ywǝri cɩga kam kʋntʋ wʋnɩ mʋ, yɩ ba daarɩ ba ŋɔɔnɩ bɩtarɩ sɩlʋ na ba jɩgɩ kuri tɩn.

eng: They want to be teachers of Law without understanding either what they are saying or what they are talking about with such confidence.
local: Ba lagɩ sɩ ba taa yɩ Wɛ cullu tɩm karanyɩna tiinǝ mʋ. Ba tɩtɩ nan ba ni ba na tɛ kʋlʋ tɩn kuri, yɩ ba yǝri ba na ŋɔɔnɩ kʋlʋ dɩ ba wʋ maama tɩn dɩ.

eng: Now we know that the Law is good if used appropriately.
local: Dɩ́ ye nɩ Wɛ cullu tɩm lana dɩ wʋlʋ na ni tɩ kuri nɩ kʋ na maŋɩ te tɩn.

eng: We understand this: the Law isnt established for a righteous person but for people who live without laws and without obeying any authority. They are the ungodly and the sinners. They are people who are not spiritual, and nothing is sacred to them. They kill their fathers and mothers, and murder others.
local: Dɩbam nan ye nɩ, Wɛ na pɛ DƖ cullu tɩm tɩn, DƖ wʋ pɛ-tɩ nɔn-ŋʋna ŋwaanɩ. DƖ nan pɛ-tɩ balʋ na yɩ cullu cɔgɩna tɩn ŋwaanɩ mʋ, dɩdaanɩ vɩnvɩɩna dɩ balʋ yigǝ na tǝrǝ dɩ DƖ tɩn, dɩ wo-lwaanʋ kǝrǝ dɩ nɔn-balwaarʋ, dɩ balʋ na ba nɩgɩ-DƖ tɩn, dɩ balʋ dɩ na gʋ ba kwǝ naa ba niinǝ naa ba donnǝ tɩn mʋ.

eng: They are people who are sexually unfaithful, and people who have intercourse with the same sex. They are kidnappers, liars, individuals who give false testimonies in court, and those who do anything else that is opposed to sound teaching.
local: dɩ balʋ na boori tɩn, dɩ baara balʋ na maɩ ba donnǝ ba jiri kaana tɩn, dɩdaanɩ balʋ na cʋ ba jaanɩ nɔɔna dɩ dam ba yǝgi tɩn, dɩdaanɩ balʋ na fɔ vwan tɩn, dɩ balʋ na du dɩ Wɛ yɩ kʋ yagɩ kʋ daɩ cɩga tɩn. DƖ nan pɛ DƖ cullu tɩm balʋ maama na cɔgɩ zaasɩm dɩlʋ na yɩ cɩga yɩ dɩ tɔgɩ Wɛ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam na brɩ te tɩn dɩ mʋ.

eng: Sound teaching agrees with the glorious gospel of the blessed God that has been trusted to me.
local: Kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam kʋntʋ nuŋi Wʋpolo Tu Baŋa-Wɛ dɩlʋ na jɩgɩ paarɩ-zulǝ tɩn te mʋ, yɩ dɩntʋ kɩ-ka amʋ jɩŋa nɩ sɩ a taa tɛa.

eng: I thank Christ Jesus our Lord, who has given me strength because he considered me faithful. So he appointed me to ministry.
local: Dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi Krisi mʋ pɛ amʋ dam sɩ a taa tʋŋɩ a pa-o. A kɩ o le dɩdaanɩ o na nɛ nɩ amʋ jɩgɩ wʋ-dɩdʋa yɩ o lɩ-nɩ sɩ a taa tʋŋɩ a pa-o tɩn.

eng: even though I used to speak against him, attack his people, and I was proud. But I was shown mercy because I acted in ignorance and without faith.
local: Faŋa tɩn, a dɛɛn yǝni a ŋɔɔnɩ a cɔgɩ Zezi yɩrɩ, yɩ a kwǝri a twɩ-o, yɩ a ta yaarɩ o nɔɔna bam. Dɩ kʋntʋ dɩ, o nan ta duri a ŋwaŋa, bɛŋwaanɩ amʋ ya wʋ sɛ-o yɩ kʋ pa a yǝri woŋo kʋlʋ a na jɩgɩ a kɩ tɩn.

eng: Our Lords favor poured all over me along with the faithfulness and love that are in Christ Jesus.
local: Nan dɩ kʋ dɩ, dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi mʋ kɩ-nɩ yu-yoŋo zanzan kʋ ja gaalɩ, yɩ o daarɩ o pa a taa jɩgɩ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩd-o dɩ sono, a na ŋwɩ dɩd-o tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: This saying is reliable and deserves full acceptance: Christ Jesus came into the world to save sinners—and Im the biggest sinner of all.
local: Taanɩ dɩntʋ yɩ cɩga yɩ dɩ maŋɩ sɩ nɔɔna maama sɛ-dɩ mʋ: «Zezi Krisi tu lʋgʋ baŋa sɩ o vrɩ nɔn-cɩcɔgɩrʋ mʋ ba lwarɩm wʋnɩ.» Amʋ nan mʋ kɩ lwarɩm a dwǝni nɔɔna maama.

eng: But this is why I was shown mercy, so that Christ Jesus could show his endless patience to me first of all. So Im an example for those who are going to believe in him for eternal life.
local: yɩ Wɛ ta duri a ŋwaŋa sɩ kʋ pa Zezi Krisi brɩ o wʋ-zuru kʋm na yɩ te dɩ amʋ. O na tiini o kɩ wʋ-zuru dɩ amʋ wʋlʋ na yɩ nɔn-cɩcɔgɩrʋ tɩm yigǝ tu tɩn, kʋ yɩ maana mʋ kʋ paɩ nɔɔna balʋ na wʋ́ da a kwaga ba ba ba sɛ-o, sɩ ba daarɩ ba na ŋwɩa kalʋ na ba ti tɩn Wɛ tee nɩ.

eng: Now to the king of the ages, to the immortal, invisible, and only God, may honor and glory be given to him forever and always! Amen.
local: Baŋa-Wɛ yɩ pɛ wʋlʋ paarɩ na bá ti maŋa dɩ maŋa tɩn mʋ. DƖ yɩ ŋwɩa tu mʋ, ba ba na-DƖ dɩ yiǝ, yɩ DƖ ba jɩgɩ doŋ. Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ zulǝ dɩ tiǝ taa wʋ DƖ tee nɩ sɩ kʋ taa ve maŋa kalʋ na ba ti tɩn. Amina.

eng: Timothy, my child, Im giving you these instructions based on the prophecies that were once made about you. So if you follow them, you can wage a good war.
local: A bu Timoti, a lagɩ a ta dɩ nmʋ sɩ n ta n tʋŋɩ n pa Wɛ, nɩ Wɛ nijoŋnǝ bam dɛɛn na tagɩ nmʋ taanɩ te tɩn. Kʋntʋ tɩn, kwaanɩ n guli ba na tagɩ te tɩn sɩ n tʋŋɩ Wɛ tɩtʋŋa lanyɩranɩ, nɩnɛɛnɩ n na lagɩ n magɩ jara cɩga cɩga te tɩn.

eng: because you have faith and a good conscience. Some people have ruined their faith because they refused to listen to their conscience.
local: Ta n jɩgɩ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ, sɩ n daarɩ n ta n kɩ kʋlʋ maama n na ye n bɩcarɩ nɩ nɩ kʋ lamma tɩn. Nɔɔna badonnǝ wʋra, ba ba sɛ sɩ ba taa kɩ kʋlʋ ba na ye nɩ kʋ lamma tɩn. Kʋntʋ ma pa ba daa warɩ ba da Wɛ cwǝŋǝ kam.

eng: such as Hymenaeus and Alexander. Ive handed them over to Satan so that they can be taught not to speak against God.
local: Yimene dɩ Alɛsandrɩ mʋ tɔgɩ ba wʋ nɔɔna bam kʋntʋ wʋnɩ. Amʋ nan yagɩ-ba sʋtaanɩ jɩŋa nɩ sɩ ba na cam, sɩ ba daa yɩ ŋɔɔnɩ ba cɔgɩ Wɛ yɩrɩ.

eng: First of all, then, I ask that requests, prayers, petitions, and thanksgiving be made for all people.
local: Woŋo kʋlʋ a na lagɩ a da yigǝ a ta tɩn mʋ tɩntʋ. Á maŋɩ sɩ á taá loori Wɛ á pa nɔɔna maama. Loori-na Wɛ sɩ DƖ taa nii ba baŋa nɩ, sɩ á daarɩ á taá kɩ DƖ le ba ŋwaanɩ.

eng: Pray for kings and everyone who is in authority so that we can live a quiet and peaceful life in complete godliness and dignity.
local: Á taá loori Wɛ á paɩ pwa dɩdaanɩ dɩdɛɛra balʋ maama na jɩgɩ dam nɔɔna baŋa nɩ tɩn, sɩ kʋ pa dɩ́ taá zʋʋrɩ dɩ yazurǝ dɩ ni-ywǝm, sɩ dɩ́ wanɩ dɩ́ taá tɔgɩ Wɛ lanyɩranɩ, sɩ dɩ́ taá ŋwɩ nɩ kʋ na maŋɩ te tɩn.

eng: This is right and it pleases God our savior.
local: Kʋntʋ mʋ yɩ woŋo kʋlʋ na lamma yɩ kʋ poli Wɛ dɩlʋ na yɩ dɩ́ Vɩrnʋ tɩn wʋ.

eng: who wants all people to be saved and to come to a knowledge of the truth.
local: Dɩntʋ mʋ lagɩ sɩ nɔɔna maama na vrɩm, sɩ ba kwǝri ba lwarɩ kʋlʋ na yɩ cɩga tɩn.

eng: There is one God and one mediator between God and humanity, the human Christ Jesus.
local: Wɛ dɩdʋa yɩranɩ mʋ wʋra. Wʋlʋ dɩ na fɔgɩ nabiinǝ dɩ Wɛ daanɩ tɩn dɩ yɩ dɩdʋa yɩranɩ mʋ. Wʋntʋ mʋ yɩ Zezi Krisi wʋlʋ na yɩ nabiinu tɩn.

eng: who gave himself as a payment to set all people free. This was a testimony that was given at the right time.
local: Wʋm mʋ sɛ o tɩ o ma ŋwɩ nɔɔna maama lwarɩm jɩnɩ, yɩ ba pa o maana maŋa kalʋ Wɛ na lɩ tɩn.

eng: I was appointed to be a preacher and apostle of this testimony—Im telling the truth and Im not lying! Im a teacher of the Gentiles in faith and truth.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ Wɛ pɛ a ji DƖ tɩntʋŋnʋ, sɩ a tɔɔlɩ DƖ kwǝrǝ kam a brɩ nɔɔna. Cɩga mʋ a ŋɔɔna, sɩ kʋ daɩ vwan. Wɛ sɩɩnɩ DƖ tʋŋɩ-nɩ mʋ sɩ a taa brɩ dwi-gɛ tiinǝ, sɩ ba sɛ DƖ cɩga kam ba kɩ ba wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ DƖ.

eng: Therefore, I want men to pray everywhere by lifting up hands that are holy, without anger or argument.
local: Amʋ lagɩ sɩ jǝgǝ maama baara taa warɩ Wɛ. Ba na zǝŋi ba jɩa wɛɛnɩ sɩ ba warɩ Wɛ, sɩ ba taa jɩgɩ wʋ-poŋo mʋ, sɩ ba yɩ taa jɩgɩ ban-zɔŋɔ naa kantɔgɔ dɩ nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ.

eng: In the same way, I want women to enhance their appearance with clothing that is modest and sensible, not with elaborate hairstyles, gold, pearls, or expensive clothes.
local: Amʋ nan ta lagɩ sɩ kaana dɩ ja ba tɩtɩ dɩ ba gwaarʋ vɔɔm, sɩ ba taa kwarɩ cavɩɩra ba zʋʋrɩ gwaarʋ tɩlʋ na maŋɩ dɩ ba tɩn. Ba wʋ maŋɩ sɩ ba tiini ba kwɛ ba yum ba ja gaalɩ, naa ba zuli ba tɩtɩ dɩ nɩnwaŋa wǝǝnu, kʋ na yɩ sǝbu-sɩŋa naa kandwa-ŋʋna naa gwaarʋ tɩlʋ sǝbiǝ na damma tɩn.

eng: They should make themselves attractive by doing good, which is appropriate for women who claim to honor God.
local: Ba nan maŋɩ sɩ ba taa kɩ kǝm-laarʋ mʋ, sɩ kʋ brɩ nɩ ba yɩ kaana balʋ na sɛ Wɛ cɩga cɩga tɩn.

eng: A wife should learn quietly with complete submission.
local: Kaana maŋɩ sɩ ba taa je cɩm mʋ ba cǝgi balʋ na brɩ-ba Wɛ cwǝŋǝ tɩn, sɩ ba daarɩ ba taa sɛ-ba.

eng: I dont allow a wife to teach or to control her husband. Instead, she should be a quiet listener.
local: Amʋ wʋ sɛ sɩ kaana taa brɩ baara naa ba taa te-ba. Ba maŋɩ sɩ ba taa je cɩm mʋ.

eng: Adam was formed first, and then Eve.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ, Wɛ dɛɛn na kɩ nabiinǝ tɩn, DƖ kɩ Adam mʋ yigǝ, yɩ DƖ laan daarɩ DƖ kɩ Awa.

eng: Adam wasnt deceived, but rather his wife became the one who stepped over the line because she was completely deceived.
local: Kʋ dɛɛn daɩ Adam mʋ sʋtaanɩ ganɩ, kʋ yɩ kaanɩ wʋm mʋ dɩ ganɩ dɩ pa o vɩn Wɛ ni.

eng: But a wife will be brought safely through childbirth, if they both continue in faith, love, and holiness, together with self-control.
local: Kʋntʋ mʋ te kaana lʋrɩ dɩ cam, Wɛ nan wʋ́ vrɩ-ba, dɩ ba na sɛ ba tɔgɩ Wɛ dɩ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ sono dɩ wʋ-poŋo yɩ ba jɩgɩ ba tɩtɩ tɩn.

eng: This saying is reliable: if anyone has a goal to be a supervisor in the church, they want a good thing.
local: Taanɩ dɩntʋ sɩɩnɩ dɩ yɩ cɩga mʋ: «Nɔɔnʋ na lagɩ sɩ o ji Zezi kɔgɔ kʋm yigǝ tu, kʋntʋ tu lagɩ tɩtʋŋ-ŋʋm mʋ.».

eng: So the churchs supervisor must be without fault. They should be faithful to their spouse, sober, modest, and honest. They should show hospitality and be skilled at teaching.
local: Kʋntʋ, Zezi kɔgɔ kʋm yigǝ tu maŋɩ sɩ o taa yɩ nɔn-ŋʋm mʋ nɔɔna maama tee nɩ. O nan maŋɩ sɩ o taa jɩgɩ kaanɩ dɩdʋa yɩranɩ mʋ. O ta maŋɩ sɩ o taa yɩrɩ o tɩtɩ, sɩ o taa waɩ o tɩtɩ o jaana nɩ kʋ na maŋɩ te tɩn. O maŋɩ sɩ o taa jeeri vǝrǝ lanyɩranɩ o sɔŋɔ nɩ. O maŋɩ sɩ o taa ye nɔɔna zaasɩm.

eng: They shouldnt be addicted to alcohol or be a bully. Instead, they should be gentle, peaceable, and not greedy.
local: O nan wʋ maŋɩ sɩ o taa yɩ sa-nyɔrʋ naa najajarʋ naa nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ banɩ na lʋmma tɩn. Kʋ maŋɩ sɩ o taa yɩ nɔn-yoŋo mʋ dɩ nɔɔnʋ maama. O nan wʋ maŋɩ sɩ o taa yɩ sǝbu-swǝn-nyɩm.

eng: They should manage their own household well—they should see that their children are obedient with complete respect.
local: O maŋɩ sɩ o taa waɩ o nii o sɔŋɔ tiinǝ baŋa nɩ mʋ lanyɩranɩ, sɩ o daarɩ o pa o biǝ sɛ-o dɩ zulǝ yalʋ na maŋɩ tɩn.

eng: because if they dont know how to manage their own household, how can they take care of Gods church?.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ, nɔɔnʋ na warɩ o nii o tɩtɩ sɔŋɔ tiinǝ baŋa nɩ, oó kɩ ta mʋ o nii Zezi kɔgɔ kʋm baŋa nɩ?.

eng: They shouldnt be new believers so that they wont become proud and fall under the devils spell.
local: Kʋ wʋ maŋɩ sɩ o taa yɩ wʋlʋ na yɩ nɔn-dʋʋrʋ Wɛ cwǝŋǝ kam wʋnɩ tɩn, sɩ o yɩ zaŋɩ o ba o zǝŋi o tɩtɩ, sɩ Wɛ di o taanɩ nɩnɛɛnɩ DƖ na di sʋtaanɩ taanɩ te tɩn.

eng: They should also have a good reputation with those outside the church so that they wont be embarrassed and fall into the devils trap.
local: Zezi kɔgɔ kʋm yigǝ tu maŋɩ sɩ o taa yɩ nɔn-ŋʋm mʋ dɩ balʋ na ba tɔgɩ Wɛ tɩn dɩ. Kʋ na daɩ kʋntʋ, nɔɔna wʋ́ goon-o yɩ o na cavɩɩra, yɩ o tʋ sʋtaanɩ cɩgɩrʋ tɩm wʋnɩ.

eng: In the same way, servants in the church should be dignified, not two-faced, heavy drinkers, or greedy for money.
local: Zezi kɔgɔ kʋm zǝnzǝnnǝ bam dɩ maŋɩ sɩ ba taa yɩ balʋ nɔɔna na nɩgɩ tɩn mʋ. Ba wʋ maŋɩ sɩ ba taa yɩ niǝ yale yale tiinǝ, naa ba taa yɩ sa-nyɔra, naa ba taa kɩ kampinǝ sɩ ba ma na wǝǝnu.

eng: They should hold on to the faith that has been revealed with a clear conscience.
local: Ba nan maŋɩ sɩ ba taa tɔgɩ cɩga kalʋ ya na sǝgi yɩ Wɛ laan vɩɩrɩ-ba DƖ taanɩ dɩm wʋnɩ tɩn, ba na ye ba bɩcarɩ nɩ nɩ kʋ lamma tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: They should also be tested and then serve if they are without fault.
local: Nɔɔnʋ na lagɩ sɩ o ji Zezi kɔgɔ kʋm zǝnzǝnnu, ba maŋɩ sɩ ba da yigǝ ba maan-o mʋ ba nii, o na ba jɩgɩ wo-lɔŋɔ, sɩ ba laan pa o puli o tɩtʋŋa.

eng: In the same way, women who are servants in the church should be dignified and not gossip. They should be sober and faithful in everything they do.
local: Kʋ maŋɩ sɩ ba kaana dɩ taa yɩ balʋ nɔɔna na nɩgɩ tɩn mʋ, sɩ ba yɩ taa yɩ bɩbarɩ-nyɩna. Ba maŋɩ sɩ ba taa yɩrɩ ba tɩtɩ mʋ, sɩ nɔɔna taa jɩgɩ ba cɩga woŋo maama baŋa nɩ.

eng: Servants must be faithful to their spouse and manage their children and their own households well.
local: Zezi kɔgɔ kʋm zǝnzǝnnu maŋɩ sɩ o taa jɩgɩ kaanɩ dɩdʋa yɩranɩ mʋ, sɩ o daarɩ o taa waɩ o nii o biǝ dɩ o sɔŋɔ tiinǝ maama baŋa nɩ lanyɩranɩ.

eng: Those who have served well gain a good standing and considerable confidence in the faith that is in Christ Jesus.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ zǝnzǝnnu wʋlʋ maama na tʋŋɩ o tɩtʋŋa lanyɩranɩ tɩn wʋ́ na zulǝ zanzan nɔɔna tee nɩ, yɩ o daarɩ o na baarɩ dɩ wʋpolo o na kɩ o wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Zezi Krisi tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: I hope to come to you quickly. But Im writing these things to you so that.
local: Amʋ bʋŋɩ sɩ a ba nmʋ te lele. A nan pʋpʋnɩ tɔnɔ kʋntʋ a pa nmʋ sɩ.

eng: if Im delayed, youll know how you should behave in Gods household. It is the church of the living God and the backbone and support of the truth.
local: a na daanɩ fɩnfɩɩn, sɩ n wanɩ n lwarɩ n na wʋ́ ja Baŋa-Wɛ nɔɔna bam te. Bantʋ mʋ yɩ Zezi nɔɔna yɩ ba tɔgɩ Ŋwɩa Tu Baŋa-Wɛ. Bantʋ mʋ yɩ balʋ na kwaanɩ ba wǝli ba nii zaasɩm dɩlʋ na yɩ cɩga tɩn baŋa nɩ, nɩnɛɛnɩ ywǝ na wǝli digǝ sɩ ka yɩ vi te tɩn.

eng: Without question, the mystery of godliness is great: he was revealed as a human, declared righteous by the Spirit, seen by angels, preached throughout the nations, believed in around the world, and taken up in glory.
local: Dɩ́ lwarɩ nɩ Wɛ tɔgɩm yɩ wo-kamunu mʋ. Wɛ cɩga kam kʋntʋ dɛɛn ya sǝgi mʋ, yɩ DƖ laan pa dɩ́ lwarɩ wʋlʋ wʋm DƖ na tʋŋɩ tɩn: Wʋntʋ mʋ jigi nabiinu o ba lʋgʋ baŋa. Wɛ Joro kʋm ma brɩ nɩ o yɩ cɩga tu. Wɛ malɛsɩ sɩm ma na o zulǝ. Nɔɔna ma ja o kwǝrǝ ba zʋ dwi maama wʋ ba tɔɔlɩ. Lʋgʋ baŋa nabiinǝ ma sɛ-o. O ma zaŋɩ dɩ zulǝ o di Wɛ-sɔŋɔ.

eng: The Spirit clearly says that in latter times some people will turn away from the faith. They will pay attention to spirits that deceive and to the teaching of demons.
local: Wɛ Joro kʋm brɩ dɩbam fasɩ nɩ, maŋa tiim nɩ nɔɔna badaara wʋ́ zaŋɩ ba yagɩ Wɛ cwǝŋǝ tɔgɩm. Pipiri-nyɩna balʋ na fɔ vwan tɩn mʋ wʋ́ ganɩ-ba ba pa ba yagɩ zaasɩm dɩlʋ na yɩ cɩga tɩn. Bantʋ wʋbʋŋa mʋ tɩga, kʋ pa ba yǝri nɩ ba na kɩ kʋlʋ tɩn ba lamma. Baá pa nɔɔna sɛ vwan yam ciciri na fɔɛ tɩn, yɩ ba daarɩ ba taa tɔgɩ sʋtaanɩ zaasɩm na yɩ te tɩn.

eng: They will prohibit marriage and eating foods that God created—and he intended them to be accepted with thanksgiving by those who are faithful and have come to know the truth.
local: Nɔɔna bam kʋntʋ mʋ yǝni ba brɩ nɩ kʋ culǝ sɩ baarʋ di kaanɩ naa kaanɩ zʋ barʋ. Wʋdiiru tɩdonnǝ dɩ maa wʋra ba na brɩ nɩ kʋ culǝ sɩ nɔɔna di-tɩ. Nmʋ nan ye nɩ Wɛ mʋ kɩ wʋdiiru tɩm kʋntʋ, sɩ dɩbam balʋ na tɔgɩ-DƖ yɩ dɩ́ lwarɩ DƖ cɩga kam tɩn taá kɩ DƖ le tɩ ŋwaanɩ, sɩ dɩ́ daarɩ dɩ́ taá di-tɩ.

eng: Everything that has been created by God is good, and nothing that is received with thanksgiving should be rejected.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ maama Wɛ na kɩ tɩn lamma. Woŋo kʋlʋ Wɛ na pɛ dɩbam tɩn, dɩ́ maŋɩ sɩ dɩ́ kɩ DƖ le mʋ kʋ ŋwaanɩ, dɩ́ wʋ maŋɩ sɩ dɩ́ culi-kʋ.

eng: These things are made holy by Gods word and prayer.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ Wɛ taanɩ dɩm dɩ dɩbam Wɛ-loro kʋm mʋ kwɛ woŋo maama kʋ pa kʋ lana Wɛ yigǝ nɩ.

eng: If you point these things out to the believers, you will be a good servant of Christ Jesus who has been trained by the words of faith and the good teaching that youve carefully followed.
local: Nmʋ maŋɩ sɩ n ta wǝǝnu tɩntʋ mʋ n brɩ n ko-biǝ bam. N na kɩ kʋntʋ, kʋʋ́ pa n ta n yɩ Zezi Krisi tɩntʋŋ-ŋʋm. N na sɩɩnɩ n sɛ Wɛ cɩga kam taanɩ dɩm dɩ zaasɩm dɩlʋ na yɩ cɩga yɩ n maŋɩ n tɔgɩ-dɩ tɩn, nń bɩ Wɛ cwǝŋǝ kam wʋnɩ.

eng: But stay away from the godless myths that are passed down from the older women. Train yourself for a holy life!.
local: Yɩ zaŋɩ n cǝgi sɩnswalɩ sɩlʋ na ba jɩgɩ kuri yɩ sɩ ba wǝli Wɛ cwǝŋǝ kam tɩn. Nan tiini n kwaanɩ n ta n tɔgɩ Wɛ cwǝŋǝ.

eng: While physical training has some value, training in holy living is useful for everything. It has promise for this life now and the life to come.
local: Dɩ́ ye nɩ, n na waarɩ n yɩra, kʋ jɩgɩ zǝnǝ fɩnfɩɩn. Kʋ daarɩ, n nan na kwaanɩ n tɔgɩ Wɛ cwǝŋǝ, kʋntʋ mʋ tiini kʋ jɩgɩ zǝnǝ woŋo maama wʋnɩ. Bɛŋwaanɩ kʋʋ́ pa n na zǝnǝ zɩm ŋwɩa kam wʋnɩ, yɩ n daarɩ n na ŋwɩa kalʋ na lagɩ ka ba tɩn Wɛ tee nɩ.

eng: This saying is reliable and deserves complete acceptance.
local: Taanɩ dɩntʋ yɩ cɩga yɩ dɩ maŋɩ sɩ nɔɔna sɛ-dɩ mʋ.

eng: We work and struggle for this: Our hope is set on the living God, who is the savior of all people, especially those who believe.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ paɩ dɩ́ kwaanɩ dɩ́ tʋŋa, bɛŋwaanɩ dɩbam jɩgɩ tɩɩna dɩ Ŋwɩa Tu Baŋa-Wɛ. Dɩntʋ mʋ yɩ nɔɔna maama Vɩrnʋ, kʋ na fɔgɩ kʋ dwe dɩdɩ balʋ na sɛ-DƖ tɩn.

eng: Command these things. Teach them.
local: Ta n brɩ nɔɔna bam wǝǝnu tɩm kʋntʋ sɩ n zaasɩ-ba.
