eng: Dont let anyone look down on you because you are young. Instead, set an example for the believers through your speech, behavior, love, faith, and by being sexually pure.
local: Yɩ zaŋɩ n pa nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ gooni-m n na yɩ bu tɩn ŋwaanɩ. N maŋɩ sɩ n ma n tɩtɩ mʋ n brɩ Zezi nɔɔna bam ba na wʋ́ ta kɩ te. Kʋ na yɩ nmʋ ni-ŋwaŋa dɩ n tɩtʋŋ-naga, dɩ n sono dɩ n na jɩgɩ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ te tɩn, dɩ n wʋ-poŋo maama mʋ n maŋɩ sɩ n ma n brɩ-ba.

eng: Until I arrive, pay attention to public reading, preaching, and teaching.
local: Ta n kwaanɩ n karɩmɩ Wɛ taanɩ dɩm dɩ nɔɔna bam, sɩ n daarɩ n brɩ-ba Wɛ cɩga kam, sɩ kʋ taa ve maŋa kam a na wʋ́ ba tɩn.

eng: Dont neglect the spiritual gift in you that was given through prophecy when the elders laid hands on you.
local: Yɩ zaŋɩ n yagɩ pɛɛrɩ dɩlʋ Wɛ na pɛ nmʋ, maŋa kalʋ DƖ nijoŋnǝ bam dɛɛn na tagɩ nmʋ taanɩ te yɩ Zezi kɔgɔ kʋm nakwa bam dɩ daŋɩ ba jɩa nmʋ baŋa nɩ ba warɩ Wɛ n ŋwaanɩ tɩn.

eng: Practice these things, and live by them so that your progress will be visible to all.
local: Kʋ maŋɩ sɩ n tiini n kwaanɩ n ta n tʋŋɩ tɩtʋŋɩ dɩm kʋntʋ dɩ n wʋ maama mʋ. Kʋntʋ mʋ wʋ́ pa nɔɔna maama taa naɩ nmʋ na ve yigǝ te tɩn.

eng: Focus on working on your own development and on what you teach. If you do this, you will save yourself and those who hear you.
local: Ta n yɩrɩ n tɩtɩ, sɩ n daarɩ n ta n yɩrɩ n zaasɩm dɩm na yɩ te tɩn dɩ. Kwaanɩ n zɩgɩ kǝŋkǝŋ wǝǝnu tɩm kʋntʋ wʋnɩ, sɩ nmʋ tɩtɩ wʋ́ na vrɩm, yɩ n ta wʋ́ pa balʋ na cǝgi-m tɩn dɩ na vrɩm.

eng: Dont correct an older man, but encourage him like hes your father; treat younger men like your brothers.
local: Yɩ zaŋɩ n bagɩ nankwɩan dɩ baarɩ. N maŋɩ sɩ n kwe-o nɩ n ko mʋ te. Kʋ na yɩ nɔn-dʋnnʋ, n maŋɩ sɩ n kwe-ba nɩ n nyaana mʋ te.

eng: treat older women like your mother, and treat younger women like your sisters with appropriate respect.
local: Kʋ na yɩ kazɩna, n maŋɩ sɩ n kwe-ba nɩ n niinǝ mʋ te. Kʋ na yɩ ka-bwǝnǝ, n maŋɩ sɩ n kwe-ba nɩ n nakwa mʋ te dɩ wʋ-poŋo.

eng: Take care of widows who are truly needy.
local: Ta n zuli kadǝnǝ balʋ na sɩɩnɩ ba ba jɩgɩ nɔɔnʋ tɩn, sɩ n ta n nii ba baŋa nɩ.

eng: But if a particular widow has children or grandchildren, they should first learn to respect their own family and repay their parents, because this pleases God.
local: Kʋ daarɩ, kadǝm na jɩgɩ biǝ naa naarʋ, bantʋ mʋ maŋɩ sɩ ba taa nii-o, ba na yɩ o tɩtɩ sɔŋɔ tiinǝ tɩn ŋwaanɩ. Mʋ Wɛ cwǝŋǝ zaasɩm dɩm na yɩ te tɩn. Kadǝm biǝ na zǝn-o kʋntʋ, kʋʋ́ pa ba joori ba ŋwɩ ba tiinǝ jɩnɩ dɩ ba na yaarɩ ba ŋwaanɩ te tɩn. Kʋntʋ nan mʋ poli Wɛ wʋ.

eng: A widow who is truly needy and all alone puts her hope in God and keeps on going with requests and prayers, night and day.
local: Kaanɩ wʋlʋ na sɩɩnɩ o yɩ kadǝm yɩ o ba jɩgɩ nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ sɩ o taa nii o baŋa nɩ tɩn tiŋi o tɩɩna Wɛ baŋa nɩ mʋ. Tɩtɩɩ dɩ wɩa maama o tiini o warɩ Wɛ mʋ yɩ o loori zǝnǝ DƖ tee nɩ.

eng: But a widow who tries to live a life of luxury is dead even while she is alive.
local: Kʋ daarɩ kadǝm wʋlʋ na lagɩ sɩ o taa ŋwɩ paweeni wʋnɩ tɩn maŋɩ o tɩ mʋ yɩ o ta beerǝ.

eng: Teach these things so that the families will be without fault.
local: Nan pa ba maama lwarɩ wǝǝnu tɩm kʋntʋ ni nɩ, sɩ nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ yɩ wanɩ o na ba wo-lɔŋɔ o ta.

eng: But if someone doesnt provide for their own family, and especially for a member of their household, they have denied the faith. They are worse than those who have no faith.
local: Nɔɔnʋ yigǝ na tǝrǝ dɩ o sɔŋɔ tiinǝ, kʋ na tiini kʋ dwe dɩdɩ dɩ o tɩtɩ digǝ tiinǝ, kʋntʋ tu yagɩ Wɛ cwǝŋǝ mʋ. O nan tiini o yɩ nɔn-balɔrɔ o dwe balʋ na maŋɩ ba ba tɔgɩ Wɛ tɩn dɩ.

eng: Put a widow on the list who is older than years old and who was faithful to her husband.
local: Yɩ zaŋɩ n pa ba pʋpʋnɩ kadǝm wʋlʋ na wʋ yi bɩna fusɩrdʋ tɩn n kɩ kadǝnǝ bam tɔnɔ kʋm wʋnɩ. Wʋlʋ na maŋɩ sɩ o wǝli da tɩn maŋɩ sɩ o ban-zʋrɩ taa yɩ bɩdwɩ yɩranɩ mʋ.

eng: She should have a reputation for doing good: raising children, providing hospitality to strangers, washing the feet of the saints, helping those in distress, and dedicating herself to every kind of good thing.
local: O maŋɩ sɩ nɔɔna taa ye o tɩtʋŋ-ŋʋna ni nɩ lanyɩranɩ. O na nii o biǝ baŋa nɩ lanyɩranɩ, naa o na jeeri vǝrǝ lanyɩranɩ, naa o na tu o tɩtɩ o zarɩ Wɛ nɔɔna bam nɛ, naa o na zǝni balʋ na wʋ cam wʋnɩ tɩn, yɩ o na kwaanɩ o tʋŋɩ tɩtʋŋ-ŋʋna dwi maama, abam waɩ á gar-o á wǝli da.

eng: But dont accept younger widows for the list. When their physical desires distract them from Christ, they will want to get married.
local: Kʋ daarɩ kadǝnǝ balʋ na yɩ ka-bwǝnǝ tɩn, abam wʋ maŋɩ sɩ á ga-ba á wǝli da. Bɛŋwaanɩ, bantʋ wʋbʋŋa daa na lǝni yɩ ba warɩ ba tɩtɩ ba ja, baá yagɩ ni dɩlʋ ba na goni dɩ Zezi Krisi tɩn, yɩ ba daarɩ ba daa zʋ banna.

eng: Then they will be judged for setting aside their earlier commitment.
local: Ba na kɩ kʋntʋ, ba bá na bʋra, bɛŋwaanɩ ba cɔgɩ ba dayigǝ ni dɩlʋ ba na goni dɩ Zezi Krisi tɩn mʋ.

eng: Also, they learn to be lazy by going from house to house. They are not only lazy, but they also become gossips and busybodies, talking about things they shouldnt.
local: Kʋlʋ na wǝli da tɩn, á na pʋpʋnɩ kadǝnǝ balʋ na yɩ ka-bwǝnǝ tɩn á wǝli da, baá ji yawɔrɩ-nyɩna yɩ ba ta tʋlɩ sam. Kʋ nan daɩ kʋntʋ yɩranɩ, baá ji bɩbarɩ-nyɩna dɩ ŋwaŋ-yɔɔrʋ tiinǝ, yɩ ba ŋɔɔnɩ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ na daɩ sɩ ba ya ŋɔɔnɩ tɩn.

eng: So I want younger widows to marry, have children, and manage their homes so that they wont give the enemy any reason to slander us. .
local: Mʋ kʋ kuri amʋ bʋŋɩ nɩ kʋʋ́ ta lamma sɩ kadǝnǝ balʋ na yɩ ka-bwǝnǝ tɩn taa zʋʋrɩ banna sɩ ba lʋ biǝ, sɩ ba daarɩ ba taa nii ba tɩtɩ sam baŋa nɩ. Ba na kɩ kʋntʋ, kʋʋ́ pa dɩbam dʋna daa bá na cwǝŋǝ sɩ ba ŋɔɔnɩ wo-lwaanʋ ba pa dɩbam.

eng: Some have already turned away to follow Satan.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ kadǝnǝ badaara maŋɩ ba ywǝri Wɛ cwǝŋǝ kam wʋnɩ, yɩ ba daarɩ ba tɔgɩ sʋtaanɩ.

eng: If any woman who is a believer has widows in her family, she should take care of them and not burden the church, so that it can help other widows who are truly needy.
local: Baarʋ naa kaanɩ wʋlʋ na tɔgɩ Wɛ cwǝŋǝ yɩ kadǝnǝ wʋ o sɔŋɔ nɩ tɩn, wʋntʋ mʋ maŋɩ sɩ o taa nii ba baŋa nɩ. Kʋ daɩ sɩ o yagɩ-ba o pa Zezi kɔgɔ kʋm. O na yagɩ-ba kʋntʋ, kʋʋ́ yaarɩ Zezi nɔɔna bam kʋ pa ba daa bá wanɩ ba nii kadǝnǝ balʋ na ba jɩgɩ nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ tɩn baŋa nɩ.

eng: Elders who lead well should be paid double, especially those who work with public speaking and teaching.
local: Kʋ daarɩ, kʋ na yɩ Zezi kɔgɔ kʋm nakwa balʋ na yɩ yigǝ tiinǝ yɩ ba nii Zezi nɔɔna bam baŋa nɩ lanyɩranɩ tɩn, ba maŋɩ sɩ ba na zulǝ kuni bɩle mʋ, kʋ na dwe dɩdɩ balʋ na kwaanɩ ba tɔɔlɩ Wɛ kwǝrǝ yɩ ba brɩ nɔɔna Wɛ cɩga kam tɩn.

eng: The scripture says, Dont put a muzzle on an ox while it treads grain , and Workers deserve their pay .
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ kʋ pʋpʋnɩ Wɛ tɔnɔ wʋnɩ kʋ wɩ: «Nmʋ na jɩgɩ nabɩa n ma n nwanɩ wo-vaalʋ, yɩ kɩ tampɔgɔ ka ni nɩ.» Kʋ ta tagɩ kʋ wɩ: «Tɩntʋŋnʋ maŋɩ sɩ o taa joŋi o ŋwɩɩrʋ mʋ.».

eng: Dont accept an accusation made against an elder unless it is confirmed by two or three witnesses.
local: Nɔɔnʋ na tagɩ Zezi kɔgɔ kʋm nakwa bam wʋ nɔɔnʋ bɩtar-lwaŋa dɩ nmʋ, yɩ zaŋɩ n sɛ, kʋ na daɩ nɩ nɔɔna bale naa batɔ yi mʋ nɛ o kǝm-balwaarʋ tɩm.

eng: Discipline those who are sinning in front of everyone so that all the others will be afraid.
local: Kʋ daarɩ nakwa balʋ na sɩɩnɩ ba kɩ kǝm-balwaarʋ tɩn, sɩ n kaanɩ-ba ba maama yigǝ nɩ. Kʋntʋ mʋ wʋ́ pa fʋʋnɩ ja badaara bam dɩ.

eng: I charge you before God and Christ Jesus and the elect angels to follow these practices without bias, and without playing favorites.
local: A nan lagɩ a kaanɩ-m mʋ Wɛ yigǝ nɩ dɩ Zezi Krisi yigǝ nɩ dɩ Wɛ tɩtɩ malɛsɩ sɩm yigǝ nɩ, sɩ n yɔɔrɩ n sɛ kʋlʋ a na tagɩ tɩn. Yɩ kuri nɔɔna daanɩ, kɩ nɔɔnʋ maama te na maŋɩ tɩn.

eng: Dont rush to commission anyone to leadership, and dont participate in the sins of others. Keep yourself morally pure.
local: Yɩ lɔgɩrɩ n daŋɩ n jɩa nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ baŋa nɩ sɩ n pa o ji Wɛ tɩntʋŋnʋ. Yɩ zaŋɩ n pa nɔɔna kǝm-lwaanʋ loŋi-m. Fɔgɩ n ja n tɩtɩ dɩ wʋ-poŋo.

eng: Dont drink water anymore, but use a little wine because of your stomach problems and your frequent illnesses.
local: A lagɩ a ta dɩ nmʋ sɩ, n wʋ kʋm na yǝni kʋ wɔɛ tɩn ŋwaanɩ, sɩ n ta n nyɔ sana fɩnfɩɩn sɩ kʋ wanɩ kʋ zǝni-m, sɩ n yɩ ta n nyɔ na yɩranɩ.

eng: The sins of some people are obvious, and the sins are judged before the people must face judgment, but the sins of other people show up later.
local: Nɔɔna badaara wo-lwaanʋ tiini tɩ naɩ dɩ yi mʋ jaja, yɩ ba daa ta wʋ di bantʋ taanɩ. Kʋ daarɩ babam wo-lwaanʋ nan wʋ́ ba tɩ na kʋ kwaga nɩ mʋ.

eng: In the same way, the good that people do is also obvious and cant be hidden.
local: Kʋ nan ta yɩ bɩdwɩ mʋ dɩ kǝm-laarʋ dɩ. Tɩ dɩ yɔɔrɩ tɩ naɩ dɩ yi mʋ jaja. Nan dɩ kʋ dɩ, tɩlʋ na ba naɩ lanyɩranɩ tɩn dɩ bá wanɩ tɩ sǝgi.

eng: Those who are under the bondage of slavery should consider their own masters as worthy of full respect so that Gods name and our teaching wont get a bad reputation.
local: Balʋ maama na yɩ gambɛ yɩ ba tɔgɩ Wɛ cwǝŋǝ tɩn maŋɩ sɩ ba taa paɩ ba yum tiinǝ bam zulǝ zanzan mʋ. Kʋntʋ wʋ́ pa nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ bá wanɩ o ŋɔɔnɩ o cɔgɩ Wɛ yɩrɩ dɩdaanɩ dɩbam zaasɩm dɩm.

eng: And those who have masters who are believers shouldnt look down on them because they are brothers. Instead, they should serve them more faithfully, because the people who benefit from your good service are believers who are loved. Teach and encourage these things.
local: Gambɛ sɩlʋ na tʋŋɩ ba paɩ ba yum tiinǝ balʋ dɩ na tɔgɩ Wɛ tɩn, kʋ wʋ maŋɩ sɩ ba taa gooni-ba ba na yɩ ba ko-biǝ Wɛ cwǝŋǝ wʋnɩ tɩn ŋwaanɩ. Ba nan maŋɩ sɩ ba taa tʋŋɩ lanyɩranɩ mʋ ba pa-ba, bɛŋwaanɩ ba yum tiinǝ balʋ ba na tʋŋɩ ba paɩ tɩn dɩ yɩ ba ko-bu-sonnu mʋ ba na tɔgɩ Zezi tɩn ŋwaanɩ, yɩ ba nii ba baŋa nɩ lanyɩranɩ. Nii wǝǝnu tɩlʋ n na maŋɩ sɩ n brɩ nɔɔna bam sɩ ba taa kɩ tɩn.

eng: If anyone teaches anything different and doesnt agree with sound teaching about our Lord Jesus Christ and teaching that is consistent with godliness.
local: Nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ maama na brɩ zaasɩm dɩdoŋ, yɩ o wʋ sɛ sɩ o tɔgɩ dɩbam Yuutu Zezi Krisi kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam dɩdaanɩ Wɛ cwǝ-laa zaasɩm dɩm.

eng: that person is conceited. They dont understand anything but have a sick obsession with debates and arguments. This creates jealousy, conflict, verbal abuse, and evil suspicions.
local: kʋntʋ tu kɩ fɔŋɔ mʋ yɩ o yǝri kʋlʋkʋlʋ. Wʋntʋ doŋ tiini o lagɩ sɩ o taa magɩ kantɔgɔ mʋ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ na ba jɩgɩ kuri tɩn baŋa nɩ. Kǝm dɩm kʋntʋ dwi mʋ pa nɔɔna wʋrʋ gwɩɩna dɩ ba donnǝ, yɩ kʋ pa nɔɔna jaanɩ daanɩ yɩ ba twɩ daanɩ, yɩ ba ta bʋŋɩ lwarɩm ba pa daanɩ.

eng: There is constant bickering between people whose minds are ruined and who have been robbed of the truth. They think that godliness is a way to make money!.
local: yɩ ba niǝ dɩ ba maŋɩ daanɩ. Ba yǝni ba kɩ kʋntʋ, bɛŋwaanɩ ba jɩgɩ wʋbʋŋ-balwaarʋ mʋ, yɩ ba daa ba tɔgɩ cɩga cwǝŋǝ. Kʋ maa paɩ ba bʋŋɩ nɩ Wɛ cwǝŋǝ tɔgɩm yɩ woŋo kʋlʋ ba na wʋ́ na nadunni ka wʋnɩ tɩn mʋ.

eng: Actually, godliness is a great source of profit when it is combined with being happy with what you already have.
local: Kʋ nan sɩɩnɩ kʋ yɩ cɩga mʋ, Wɛ cwǝŋǝ tɔgɩm jɩgɩ nadunni zanzan kʋ paɩ balʋ na kɩ wʋpolo dɩ kʋlʋ ba na jɩgɩ tɩn.

eng: We didnt bring anything into the world and so we cant take anything out of it.
local: Ba na lʋgɩ dɩbam tɩn, dɩ́ wʋ jaanɩ kʋlʋkʋlʋ dɩ́ ba lʋgʋ baŋa. Dɩ́ nan ta bá wanɩ dɩ́ ja kʋlʋkʋlʋ dɩ dɩ́ viiri.

eng: well be happy with food and clothing.
local: Kʋntʋ tɩn, dɩ́ na jɩgɩ dɩ́ ni-wʋdiu dɩ́ di yɩ dɩ́ jɩgɩ gwaarʋ dɩ́ zʋʋra, kʋ maŋɩ sɩ dɩ́ taa jɩgɩ wʋpolo sɩ tɩntʋ maŋɩ dɩbam.

eng: But people who are trying to get rich fall into temptation. They are trapped by many stupid and harmful passions that plunge people into ruin and destruction.
local: Kʋ daarɩ balʋ na lagɩ sɩ ba ji nadunǝ tɩn, sǝbu-laga mʋ yǝni ka ganɩ-ba kʋ pa ba tʋ maŋɩm wʋnɩ. Kʋ maa paɩ ba fra zʋʋrɩ wo-yɔɔrʋ zanzan tɩlʋ na wʋ́ cɔgɩ-ba tɩn. Kǝm dɩm kʋntʋ mʋ yǝni kʋ paɩ ba yáalɩ ba cɔgɩ.

eng: The love of money is the root of all kinds of evil. Some have wandered away from the faith and have impaled themselves with a lot of pain because they made money their goal.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ sǝbu-swǝnǝ mʋ yɩ lwarɩm dwi maama pulim je. Nɔɔna badaara wʋra ba na pɛ ba wʋbʋŋa zʋ sǝbu-lagɩ yɩ ba yagɩ Wɛ cɩga kam, kʋ pa ba jɩgɩ ba tɩtɩ ba yaarɩ zanzan.

eng: But as for you, man of God, run away from all these things. Instead, pursue righteousness, holy living, faithfulness, love, endurance, and gentleness.
local: Kʋ daarɩ nmʋ Timoti na yɩ Wɛ nɔɔnʋ tɩn, n maŋɩ sɩ n ja n tɩtɩ mʋ dɩdaanɩ wǝǝnu tɩm kʋntʋ. Kɩ n tɩtɩ n kɩ daanɩ sɩ n ta n tɔgɩ cɩga, sɩ n sɛ Wɛ ni, sɩ n kɩ n wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ, sɩ n ta n jɩgɩ sono dɩ pu-dɩa dɩ wʋ-bono.

eng: Compete in the good fight of faith. Grab hold of eternal life—you were called to it, and you made a good confession of it in the presence of many witnesses.
local: Pʋʋrɩ n yɩra n ta n tɔgɩ Wɛ cwǝŋǝ lanyɩranɩ. Kʋntʋ mʋ nmʋ wʋ́ joŋi ŋwɩa kalʋ na ba ti tɩn Wɛ tee nɩ. Ŋwɩa kam kʋntʋ mʋ Wɛ bǝŋi-m sɩ n ba n joŋi, dɩ nmʋ dɛɛn na zaŋɩ n zɩgɩ nɔn-kɔgɔ kʋm yigǝ nɩ n pa ba lwarɩ nɩ nmʋ tɔgɩ cɩga cwǝŋǝ kam tɩn.

eng: I command you in the presence of God, who gives life to all things, and Christ Jesus, who made the good confession when testifying before Pontius Pilate.
local: Zezi Krisi tɩtɩ dɛɛn zɩgɩ Pɔnsɩ Pilatɩ yigǝ nɩ o pa o lwarɩ nɩ wʋm tɔgɩ cɩga cwǝŋǝ kam mʋ. A nan lagɩ a ta dɩ nmʋ Zezi yigǝ nɩ, dɩdaanɩ Wɛ dɩlʋ na paɩ woŋo dwi maama ŋwɩa tɩn yigǝ nɩ.

eng: Obey this order without fault or failure until the appearance of our Lord Jesus Christ.
local: nɩ n maŋɩ sɩ n sɛ cɩga kam kʋntʋ sɩ n yɩ yagɩ-ka dɩ fɩnfɩɩn dɩ, sɩ nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ yɩ wanɩ o na n wo-lɔŋɔ o ta, sɩ kʋ vu kʋ yi dɛ dɩm dɩbam Yuutu Zezi Krisi na wʋ́ joori o ba tɩn.

eng: The timing of this appearance is revealed by God alone, who is the blessed and only master, the King of kings and Lord of lords.
local: Maŋa kalʋ na maŋɩ tɩn na yiǝ, Wʋpolo Tu Baŋa-Wɛ dɩlʋ yɩranɩ na yɩ dam-fɔrɔ tu tɩn laan wʋ́ pa Zezi Krisi joori o ba. Wɛ mʋ yɩ pwa maama Pɛ dɩ yum tiinǝ maama Yuutu.

eng: He alone has immortality and lives in light that no one can come near. No human being has ever seen or is able to see him. Honor and eternal power belong to him. Amen.
local: Dɩntʋ yɩranɩ mʋ ŋwɩ maŋa kalʋ na ba jɩgɩ pulim dɩ gurim tɩn. DƖ nan zʋʋrɩ pooni dɩlʋ na tiini dɩ daga tɩn wʋnɩ mʋ, yɩ nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ bá wanɩ o twɛ da. Nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ tǝrǝ o na nɛ-DƖ, yɩ nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ nan daa ta bá wanɩ o na-DƖ. Dɩntʋ mʋ maŋɩ tiǝ dɩ zulǝ dɩ dam dɩlʋ na ba ti tɩn. Amina.

eng: Tell people who are rich at this time not to become egotistical and not to place their hope on their finances, which are uncertain. Instead, they need to hope in God, who richly provides everything for our enjoyment.
local: Kʋ na yɩ balʋ na yɩ nadunǝ lʋgʋ kʋntʋ baŋa nɩ tɩn, n maŋɩ sɩ n kaanɩ-ba sɩ ba yɩ taa bʋŋɩ kamunni ba pa ba tɩtɩ. Ba wʋ maŋɩ sɩ ba tɩɩgɩ ba jɩjɩgɩrʋ tɩm, bɛŋwaanɩ tɩ nyɩ dɩ viu mʋ. Ba nan maŋɩ sɩ ba kwe ba wʋbʋŋa maama ba pa Wɛ mʋ, bɛŋwaanɩ dɩntʋ mʋ yǝni DƖ pa dɩbam woŋo maama yɩ kʋ yi dɩbam, sɩ dɩ́ taá jɩgɩ wʋpolo dɩ́ di ywǝǝni.

eng: Tell them to do good, to be rich in the good things they do, to be generous, and to share with others.
local: Kaanɩ-ba sɩ ba taa kɩ lanyɩranɩ, sɩ ba tɩtʋŋ-ŋʋna ji ba nadunni, sɩ ba taa jɩgɩ wʋ-yoŋo sɩ ba taa ma ba wǝǝnu tɩm ba zǝni daanɩ.

eng: When they do these things, they will save a treasure for themselves that is a good foundation for the future. That way they can take hold of what is truly life.
local: Ba na kɩ kʋntʋ, kʋ brɩ nɩ ba tiŋi ba nadunni cɩga cɩga mʋ ba pa ba tɩtɩ jwa ŋwaanɩ, yɩ kʋʋ́ pa ba na ŋwɩa kalʋ na yɩ cɩga tɩn Wɛ tee nɩ.

eng: Timothy, protect what has been given to you in trust. Avoid godless and pointless discussions and the contradictory claims of so-called knowledge.
local: A bu Timoti, fɔgɩ n ta n nii kʋlʋ maama Wɛ na kwe DƖ kɩ nmʋ jɩŋa nɩ tɩn baŋa nɩ. Ja n tɩtɩ dɩdaanɩ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ nɔɔna na bʋŋɩ nɩ tɩ yɩ yi-pʋrʋ yɩ tɩ daɩ tɩn. Tɩntʋ mʋ yɩ bɩtar-yɔɔrʋ tɩlʋ na ba wǝli Wɛ cwǝŋǝ tɩn dɩdaanɩ taana yalʋ na ba jɩgɩ kuri tɩn.

eng: When some people adopted this false knowledge, they missed the goal of faith. May grace be with you all.
local: Nɔɔna badaara mʋ wʋra ba na paɩ ba jɩgɩ yi-pʋrʋ kʋm kʋntʋ, yɩ kʋ laan pa ba ywǝri Wɛ cwǝŋǝ kam wʋnɩ. Wɛ wʋ́ pa abam yu-yoŋo.

eng: From Paul, an apostle of Christ Jesus by Gods will, to promote the promise of life that is in Christ Jesus.
local: Amʋ Pooli na yɩ Zezi Krisi tɩntʋŋnʋ tɩn mʋ pʋpʋnɩ tɔnɔ kʋntʋ a pa nmʋ Timoti. Wɛ tɩtɩ mʋ kuri-nɩ dɩ DƖ wʋbʋŋa sɩ a taa yɩ DƖ tɩntʋŋnʋ, sɩ a pa nɔɔna lwarɩ nɩ Wɛ goni ni sɩ DƖ pa-ba ŋwɩa, ba na ŋwɩ dɩ Zezi Krisi tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: To Timothy, my dear child. Grace, mercy, and peace from God the Father and Christ Jesus our Lord.
local: Nmʋ Timoti yɩ a bu-sono mʋ. Dɩ́ Ko Wɛ dɩ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi Krisi wʋ́ pa nmʋ yazurǝ dɩ yu-yoŋo, yɩ DƖ daarɩ DƖ duri nmʋ ŋwaŋa.

eng: Im grateful to God, whom I serve with a good conscience as my ancestors did. I constantly remember you in my prayers day and night.
local: Amʋ nan kɩ Wɛ dɩlʋ a na tʋŋɩ a pa-DƖ yɩ a ye a bɩcarɩ nɩ nɩ kʋ lamma tɩn le, nɩ a nabaara bam dɩ dɛɛn na tʋŋɩ ba pa-DƖ te tɩn. A maa yǝni a loori-DƖ maŋa maama wɩa dɩ tɩtɩɩ, yɩ a guli nmʋ gulǝ a Wɛ-loro kʋm wʋnɩ.

eng: When I remember your tears, I long to see you so that I can be filled with happiness.
local: A guli nmʋ yi-na bam woŋo dɩbam na pwɛ da-tee nɩ maŋa kalʋ tɩn. Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ a tiini a lagɩ sɩ a joori a ba a na nmʋ, sɩ a wanɩ a taa jɩgɩ wʋpolo lanyɩranɩ.

eng: Im reminded of your authentic faith, which first lived in your grandmother Lois and your mother Eunice. Im sure that this faith is also inside you.
local: Amʋ wʋ swe nɩ n kɩ n wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Zezi cɩga cɩga, nɩ n nu-nakwɩ Loyisi dɩ n nu Yunisi dɩ dɛɛn na jɩgɩ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Zezi te tɩn. A ye lanyɩranɩ nɩ nmʋ dɩ yɩ kʋntʋ mʋ.

eng: Because of this, Im reminding you to revive Gods gift that is in you through the laying on of my hands.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ a lagɩ sɩ n guli a dɛɛn na daŋɩ a jɩa nmʋ baŋa nɩ yɩ Wɛ pa nmʋ zǝnǝ yalʋ tɩn. Nan fɔgɩ n nii pɛɛrɩ dɩm kʋntʋ baŋa nɩ, sɩ n ta n ma n tʋŋɩ Wɛ tɩtʋŋa yam lanyɩranɩ.

eng: God didnt give us a spirit that is timid but one that is powerful, loving, and self-controlled.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ dɩ́ daa bá ta kwarɩ fʋʋnɩ, Wɛ na zǝni dɩbam dɩ DƖ Joro kʋm tɩn ŋwaanɩ. Kʋntʋ mʋ paɩ dɩ́ jɩgɩ baarɩ dɩ sono, yɩ dɩ́ waɩ dɩ́ tɩtɩ dɩ́ jaana.

eng: So dont be ashamed of the testimony about the Lord or of me, his prisoner. Instead, share the suffering for the good news, depending on Gods power.
local: Yɩ ta n kwarɩ cavɩɩra sɩ n ta dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi cɩga kam n brɩ nɔɔna. Yɩ pa fʋʋnɩ zʋ-m dɩ ba na kɩ amʋ pɩɩna digǝ nɩ Zezi cɩga kam ŋwaanɩ tɩn. Kʋ nan maŋɩ sɩ n dɩ sɛ yaara mʋ Wɛ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam zaasɩm dɩm ŋwaanɩ. Wɛ wʋ́ pa-m baarɩ yaara yam wʋnɩ.

eng: God is the one who saved and called us with a holy calling. This wasnt based on what we have done, but it was based on his own purpose and grace that he gave us in Christ Jesus before time began.
local: Dɩntʋ mʋ vrɩ dɩbam yɩ DƖ bǝŋi dɩbam sɩ dɩ́ taá yɩ DƖ nɔɔna, sɩ kʋ daɩ dɩbam tɩtʋŋ-ŋʋna ŋwaanɩ. Kʋ yɩ DƖ tɩtɩ mʋ maŋɩ DƖ lɩ wʋbʋŋa kʋ loori lʋgʋ pulim, sɩ DƖ pa dɩ́ tɔgɩ Zezi Krisi ŋwaanɩ dɩ́ na vrɩm zaanɩ.

eng: Now his grace is revealed through the appearance of our savior, Christ Jesus. He destroyed death and brought life and immortality into clear focus through the good news.
local: Wɛ laan mʋ nan pɛ dɩ́ na DƖ zaanɩ dɩm kʋntʋ dɩ́ Vɩrnʋ Zezi Krisi na tu lʋgʋ baŋa tɩn ŋwaanɩ. Wʋntʋ mʋ cɔgɩ tʋʋnɩ dam, yɩ o daarɩ o tɔgɩ Wɛ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam ŋwaanɩ o pa dɩ́ lwarɩ nɩ dɩ́ wʋ́ na ŋwɩa kalʋ na bá ti tɩn Wɛ tee nɩ.

eng: I was appointed a messenger, apostle, and teacher of this good news.
local: Wɛ nan mʋ pɛ a ji DƖ tɩntʋŋnʋ sɩ a taa tɔɔlɩ DƖ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam kʋntʋ, sɩ a brɩ nɔɔna DƖ cɩga kam.

eng: This is also why Im suffering the way I do, but Im not ashamed. I know the one in whom Ive placed my trust. Im convinced that God is powerful enough to protect what he has placed in my trust until that day.
local: Kʋ yɩ kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ a nɛ yaara yam kʋntʋ. A nan ba kwarɩ cavɩɩra. Bɛŋwaanɩ amʋ ye nɩ a kɩ a wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Zezi mʋ, yɩ a ye nɩ wʋntʋ wʋ́ wanɩ o nii kʋlʋ maama Wɛ na kwe DƖ kɩ a jɩŋa nɩ tɩn baŋa nɩ, sɩ kʋ taa ve dɛ dɩm o na wʋ́ joori o ba tɩn.

eng: Hold on to the pattern of sound teaching that you heard from me with the faith and love that are in Christ Jesus.
local: Nan fɔgɩ n ta n tɔgɩ cɩga kalʋ a na maŋɩ a brɩ nmʋ tɩn sɩ n ma n zaasɩ nɔɔna, sɩ n kwǝri n ta n jɩgɩ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ sono n na ŋwɩ dɩ Zezi Krisi tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: Protect this good thing that has been placed in your trust through the Holy Spirit who lives in us.
local: Fɔgɩ n ta n nii cɩga kalʋ Wɛ na kwe DƖ kɩ nmʋ jɩŋa nɩ tɩn baŋa nɩ dɩ Wɛ Joro kʋlʋ na ŋwɩ dɩbam wʋnɩ tɩn dam, sɩ nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ yɩ cɔgɩ-ka.

eng: You know that everyone in Asia has turned away from me, including Phygelus and Hermogenes.
local: Nmʋ maŋɩ n ye nɩ Wɛ nɔɔna balʋ maama na zʋʋrɩ Azi tɩɩnɩ dɩm nɩ tɩn joori amʋ kwaga nɩ, kʋ wǝli dɩ Fizɛɛlɩ dɩ Ɛrmɔzɛnɩ.

eng: May the Lord show mercy to Onesiphorus household, because he supported me many times and he wasnt ashamed of my imprisonment.
local: Wɛ nan wʋ́ duri Onisifɔɔrɩ dɩ o sɔŋɔ tiinǝ maama ŋwaŋa, bɛŋwaanɩ wʋntʋ mʋ yǝni o paɩ a jɩgɩ wʋ-zuru. Ba na kɩ-nɩ pɩɩna digǝ nɩ tɩn, o wʋ kwarɩ cavɩɩra sɩ o zǝni-nɩ.

eng: After I arrived in Rome, he quickly looked for me and found me.
local: O nan na tu o yi Rom maŋa kalʋ tɩn, o tiini o kwaanɩ o beeri amʋ je mʋ taan, yɩ o laan ba o na-nɩ.

eng: May the Lord allow him to find his mercy on that day .
local: Wɛ nan wʋ́ duri o ŋwaŋa sarɩya dɛ dɩm nɩ. Nmʋ maŋɩ n ye lanyɩranɩ Onisifɔɔrɩ na tiini o zǝni amʋ te Efɛɛzɩ nɩ tɩn.

eng: Understand that the last days will be dangerous times.
local: Ta n ye nɩ lʋgʋ tiim maŋa nɩ lɛɛrʋ zanzan wʋ́ ba lʋgʋ baŋa.

eng: People will be selfish and love money. They will be the kind of people who brag and who are proud. They will slander others, and they will be disobedient to their parents. They will be ungrateful, unholy.
local: Kantʋ maŋa kam nɩ nɔɔna wʋ́ ta wʋra ba na lagɩ wǝǝnu ba tɩtɩ zǝnǝ yɩranɩ má ŋwaanɩ, yɩ baá ta yɩ sǝbu-swǝn-nyɩna dɩ kamun-nyɩna, yɩ baá ta tee ba tɩtɩ. Nɔɔna wʋ́ ta twɩ daanɩ yɩ ba ba sɛ ba tiinǝ niǝ, yɩ ba bá zuli balʋ na kɩ-ba lanyɩranɩ tɩn. Baá ta yɩ nɔn-balwaarʋ yɩ ba ba nɩgɩ woŋo kʋlʋ na yɩ Wɛ nyɩm.

eng: unloving, contrary, and critical. They will be without self-control and brutal, and they wont love what is good.
local: Nɔɔna bá ta soe daanɩ, yɩ ba bá ta jɩgɩ da-ŋwaŋa. Baá ta yɩ bɩbarɩ-nyɩna yɩ ba ba lagɩ sɩ ba ja ba tɩtɩ, baá ta yɩ wʋ-lʋn-nyɩna, yɩ baá ta culi wǝǝnu tɩlʋ na lamma tɩn.

eng: They will be people who are disloyal, reckless, and conceited. They will love pleasure instead of loving God.
local: Nɔɔna wʋ́ ta tusi ba cilonnǝ, yɩ ba bá ta zuri ba yɩra dɩ lwarɩm kǝm. Baá ta magɩ ba nyɔɔna ba brɩ ba tɩtɩ kamunni. Baá ta soe ba wʋbʋŋa wǝǝnu ba dwe Baŋa-Wɛ.

eng: They will look like they are religious but deny Gods power. Avoid people like this.
local: Nɔɔna bam kʋntʋ wʋ́ ta kɩ nɩ ba tɔgɩ Wɛ cɩga kam mʋ te, yɩ Wɛ dam nan tǝri ba tee nɩ. Fɔgɩ n cɩ n tɩtɩ dɩ nɔɔna bam kʋntʋ.

eng: Some will slither into households and control immature women who are burdened with sins and driven by all kinds of desires.
local: Nɔɔna bam kʋntʋ badaara yǝni ba sǝgi ba zʋʋrɩ sam mʋ ba ganɩ kaana balʋ na yɩ ka-kayɛ tɩn ba pa ba wʋbʋŋa cɔga. Kaana bam kʋntʋ wʋ cɔgɩ dɩ ba kǝm-balwaarʋ zanzan, yɩ ba wʋbʋŋa paɩ ba tɔgɩ woŋo kʋlʋ maama ba fra na zʋ tɩn.

eng: These women are always learning, but they can never arrive at an understanding of the truth.
local: Kaana bam kʋntʋ tiini ba kwaanɩ ba zaasɩ mʋ maŋa maama, yɩ ba nan ba fɔgɩ ba lwarɩ cɩga.

eng: These people oppose the truth in the same way that Jannes and Jambres opposed Moses. Their minds are corrupt and their faith is counterfeit.
local: Nɔɔna bam kʋntʋ kǝm dɩm nyɩ dɩ Zanɛsɩ dɩ Zambrɛsɩ dɛɛn na vɩn Moyisi ni faŋa faŋa te tɩn mʋ. Ba dɩ vɩn Wɛ cɩga kam mʋ. Ba jɩgɩ wʋbʋŋ-balwaarʋ mʋ, yɩ ba Wɛ tɔgɩm dɩm yɩ kafɛ.

eng: But they wont get very far. Their foolishness will become obvious to everyone like those others.
local: Ba nan daa bá wanɩ ba vu yigǝ dɩ ba gana yam. Bɛŋwaanɩ nɔɔna maama wʋ́ ba lwarɩ ba jwǝrim dɩm jaja, nɩnɛɛnɩ kʋ dɛɛn na kɩ Zanɛsɩ dɩ Zambrɛsɩ te tɩn.

eng: But you have paid attention to my teaching, conduct, purpose, faithfulness, patience, love, and endurance.
local: Kʋ nan na yɩ nmʋ Timoti, n maŋɩ n ye amʋ zaasɩm dɩm dɩ a ŋwɩa dɩ a wʋbʋŋa na yɩ te tɩn. Nmʋ nan ta ye a na jɩgɩ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ te tɩn, yɩ n ta ye a na jɩgɩ wʋ-zuru dɩ sono dɩ pu-dɩa dɩ te tɩn.

eng: You have seen me experience physical abuse and ordeals in places such as Antioch, Iconium, and Lystra. I put up with all sorts of abuse, and the Lord rescued me from it all!.
local: Nmʋ nan ta ye nɔɔna na bɛɛsɩ-nɩ yɩ a yaarɩ te tɩn. Nmʋ ye wǝǝnu tɩlʋ maama na kɩ amʋ Antɩɔsɩ nɩ dɩ Yikon dɩ Lisitri nɩ, yɩ dɩ kʋ dɩ, a ta wʋ yagɩ Wɛ cɩga kam. Dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm nan mʋ vrɩ-nɩ yaara yam kʋntʋ maama wʋnɩ.

eng: In fact, anyone who wants to live a holy life in Christ Jesus will be harassed.
local: Kʋntʋ, balʋ maama na lagɩ sɩ ba taa tɔgɩ Zezi Krisi dɩ cɩga tɩn dɩ wʋ́ na bɛɛsɩm.

eng: But evil people and swindlers will grow even worse, as they deceive others while being deceived themselves.
local: Kʋ daarɩ, kʋ na yɩ nɔn-balwaarʋ dɩ kampin-nyɩna bam, bantʋ lwarɩm dɩm wʋ́ tiini dɩ puli kʋ ja gaalɩ. Baá ta ganɩ nɔɔna, yɩ baá ganɩ ba tɩtɩ dɩ.

eng: But you must continue with the things you have learned and found convincing. You know who taught you.
local: Kʋ daarɩ kʋ na yɩ nmʋ, yɔɔrɩ n ta n tɔgɩ cɩga kalʋ nmʋ na maŋɩ n lwarɩ yɩ n kɩ n wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ ka tɩn, bɛŋwaanɩ nmʋ ye balʋ dɛɛn na brɩ-m wǝǝnu tɩm kʋntʋ tɩn wʋ lanyɩranɩ.

eng: Since childhood you have known the holy scriptures that help you to be wise in a way that leads to salvation through faith that is in Christ Jesus.
local: N biini nɩ mʋ n maŋɩ n ye Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm na brɩ kʋlʋ tɩn. Zaasɩm dɩm kʋntʋ wʋ́ wanɩ dɩ vɩɩrɩ-m yɩ n na swan yalʋ na wʋ́ pa n na vrɩm, n na kɩ n wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Zezi Krisi tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: Every scripture is inspired by God and is useful for teaching, for showing mistakes, for correcting, and for training character.
local: Kʋlʋ maama na pʋpʋnɩ Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm wʋnɩ tɩn, kʋ yɩ Wɛ Joro mʋ pɛ dɩbam yɩ kʋ jɩgɩ kuri kʋ pa dɩbam, sɩ kʋ taa brɩ nɔɔna cɩga, naa kʋ brɩ-ba nɩ ba tusi, naa kʋ kwe-ba sɩ ba da cwǝŋǝ, naa kʋ zaasɩ-ba ba na wʋ́ ta tɔgɩ cɩga cwǝŋǝ te tɩn.

eng: so that the person who belongs to God can be equipped to do everything that is good.
local: sɩ dɩbam balʋ na yɩ Wɛ nɔɔna tɩn laan yɔɔrɩ dɩ́ maŋɩ fasɩ, sɩ dɩ́ taá tʋŋɩ tɩtʋŋ-ŋʋna dwi maama.

eng: Im giving you this commission in the presence of God and of Christ Jesus, who is coming to judge the living and the dead, and by his appearance and his kingdom.
local: Timoti, a lagɩ a ta nmʋ Wɛ dɩ Zezi Krisi yigǝ nɩ, sɩ n kwaanɩ n ta n tɔɔlɩ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam. Zezi mʋ yɩ wʋlʋ na wʋ́ ba o di naŋʋna dɩ twa maama sarɩya tɩn. Oó joori o ba o di paarɩ nɔɔna tɩtarɩ nɩ.

eng: Preach the word. Be ready to do it whether it is convenient or inconvenient. Correct, confront, and encourage with patience and instruction.
local: Kʋntʋ, n maŋɩ sɩ n ta n tɔɔlɩ Wɛ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam. Nɔɔna na cǝgi naa ba zɩ ba cǝgi dɩ, sɩ n ta n kwaanɩ n brɩ-ba Wɛ cɩga kam. Nan pa ba lwarɩ nɩ ba tusi mʋ sɩ ba joori ba tɔgɩ cwǝŋǝ, sɩ n kaanɩ-ba, sɩ n daarɩ n pa ba taa jɩgɩ baarɩ, sɩ n ta n brɩ-ba lanyɩranɩ dɩ wʋ-zuru zanzan.

eng: There will come a time when people will not tolerate sound teaching. They will collect teachers who say what they want to hear because they are self-centered.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ maŋa wʋ́ ba, yɩ nɔɔna daa bá sɛ ba taa cǝgi zaasɩm dɩlʋ na yɩ cɩga tɩn. Ba laan wʋ́ daarɩ ba taa tɔgɩ ba tɩtɩ wʋbʋŋa na lagɩ te tɩn mʋ, yɩ baá kikili vwan karanyɩna tiinǝ zanzan sɩ ba taa brɩ-ba wǝǝnu tɩlʋ maama ba na lagɩ sɩ ba taa ni tɩn.

eng: They will turn their back on the truth and turn to myths.
local: Ba laan wʋ́ sɩn ba zwa sɩ ba yɩ taa cǝgi Wɛ cɩga kam, yɩ ba daarɩ ba sɛ nabiinǝ sɩnswalɩ sɩlʋ na ba jɩgɩ kuri tɩn.

eng: But you must keep control of yourself in all circumstances. Endure suffering, do the work of a preacher of the good news, and carry out your service fully.
local: Kʋ daarɩ nmʋ nan maŋɩ sɩ n ja n tɩtɩ mʋ wǝǝnu maama wʋnɩ. Vɔ n wʋ yaara wʋnɩ. Kwaanɩ n ta n tʋŋɩ sɩ n pa nɔɔna lwarɩ Wɛ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam. Tɩtʋŋɩ dɩlʋ maama Wɛ na kɩ nmʋ jɩŋa nɩ tɩn, sɩ n tʋŋɩ-dɩ lanyɩranɩ.

eng: Im already being poured out like a sacrifice to God, and the time of my death is near.
local: Kʋ nan na yɩ amʋ, amʋ ŋwɩa kam nyɩ nɩ ba na logi mun-na ba ma kɩ kaanɩm te tɩn mʋ. Kʋ lagɩ kʋ ta nɩ maŋa kam yiǝ sɩ a vu Wɛ te.

eng: I have fought the good fight, finished the race, and kept the faith.
local: A na tʋŋɩ a pa Wɛ te tɩn nyɩ dɩ a kwaanɩ a duri sɩ a di yigǝ mʋ te. Amʋ kwaanɩ mʋ a pɩɩnɩ a tɩtɩ a duri taan a vu a yi kweelim je, yɩ a daa ta wʋ yagɩ Wɛ cɩga kam.

eng: At last the champions wreath that is awarded for righteousness is waiting for me. The Lord, who is the righteous judge, is going to give it to me on that day. Hes giving it not only to me but also to all those who have set their heart on waiting for his appearance.
local: Kʋntʋ tɩn, amʋ pɛɛrɩ laan tigi Wɛ tee nɩ dɩ cǝgi-nɩ. Dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi mʋ yɩ wʋlʋ na wʋ́ tɔgɩ cɩga o ma di nabiinǝ taanɩ tɩn. O ma wʋ́ kwe a pɛɛrɩ dɩm kʋntʋ o pa-nɩ sarɩya dɛ dɩm nɩ. Kʋ nan daɩ amʋ yɩranɩ mʋ oó pa pɛɛrɩ dɩm kʋntʋ. Oó pa balʋ maama dɩ na so-o yɩ ba jɩgɩ tɩɩna nɩ oó joori o ba tɩn mʋ.

eng: Do your best to come to me quickly.
local: Nan kwaanɩ lanyɩranɩ sɩ n ba amʋ te lɩla.

eng: Demas has fallen in love with the present world and has deserted me and has gone to Thessalonica. Crescens has gone to Galatia, and Titus has gone to Dalmatia.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ Demasɩ yagɩ amʋ, o fra na tiini ya zʋ zɩm lʋgʋ baŋa wo-yɔɔrʋ tɩm tɩn ŋwaanɩ, yɩ o daarɩ o vu Tesaloniki mʋ. Kresan ma kɛ Galatɩ. Titi dɩ ma kɛ Dalɩmatɩ.

eng: Only Luke is with me. Get Mark, and bring him with you. He has been a big help to me in the ministry.
local: Luki yɩranɩ mʋ wʋ a tee nɩ. Nmʋ nan na maa n bɩɩna, sɩ n pa Marɩkɩ tɔgɩ o ba, bɛŋwaanɩ wʋntʋ wʋ́ wanɩ o wǝli-nɩ dɩ Wɛ tɩtʋŋa yam.

eng: I sent Tychicus to Ephesus.
local: Kʋ daarɩ amʋ tʋŋɩ Tisiki Efɛɛzɩ nɩ mʋ.

eng: When you come, bring along the coat I left with Carpus in Troas. Also bring the scrolls and especially the parchments.
local: Nmʋ na maa n bɩɩna, sɩ n kwe a gɔrɔ kʋm a na yagɩ Trʋasɩ nɩ Karɩpusi tee nɩ tɩn n ja n ba, dɩdaanɩ twaanʋ tɩm dɩ, kʋ na dwe dɩdɩ vara twaanʋ tɩlʋ ba na pʋpʋnɩ tɩ wʋnɩ ba pri tɩn.

eng: Alexander, the craftsman who works with metal, has really hurt me. The Lord will pay him back for what he has done.
local: Alɛsandrɩ wʋlʋ na yɩ yarʋ tɩn tiini o kɩ amʋ lwarɩm kʋ ja gaalɩ. Dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm nan wʋ́ pa o na cam o kǝnǝ yam kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ.

eng: But watch out for him, because he opposes our teaching.
local: N dɩ nan cʋ n tɩtɩ dɩd-o, bɛŋwaanɩ o kwaanɩ sɩ o cɔgɩ dɩbam na yǝni dɩ́ brɩ cɩga kalʋ tɩn mʋ.

eng: No one took my side at my first court hearing. Everyone deserted me. I hope that God doesnt hold it against them!.
local: Maŋa kalʋ a na puli sɩ a tʋlɩ a taanɩ dɩm sarɩya yam jǝgǝ kam nɩ tɩn, nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ wʋ tu o zɩgɩ amʋ kwaga nɩ. Ba maama duri mʋ ba daarɩ amʋ yɩranɩ. Wɛ nan yɩ kwe ba taalɩ kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ.

eng: But the Lord stood by me and gave me strength, so that the entire message would be preached through me and so all the nations could hear it. I was also rescued from the lions mouth!.
local: Dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm nan mʋ zǝni-nɩ, yɩ o pa-nɩ dam yɩ a ma wanɩ a tɔɔlɩ Wɛ kwǝrǝ kam, yɩ dwi-gɛ tiinǝ maama ni-ka. Kʋntʋ tɩn, Wɛ mʋ vrɩ amʋ tʋʋnɩ jɩŋa nɩ DƖ yagɩ.

eng: The Lord will rescue me from every evil action and will save me for his heavenly kingdom. To him be the glory forever and always. Amen.
local: Dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm nan wʋ́ vrɩ amʋ wo-lwaanʋ maama wʋnɩ, yɩ o daarɩ o ja-nɩ o vu o zʋ Wɛ paarɩ dɩm wʋnɩ dɩ yazurǝ. Wʋntʋ mʋ maŋɩ dɩ zulǝ maŋa maama. Amina.

eng: Say hello to Prisca and Aquila and the household of Onesiphorus.
local: Jɔɔnɩ Prisili dɩ Akwila n pa-nɩ, dɩdaanɩ Onisifɔɔrɩ dɩ o sɔŋɔ tiinǝ bam maama.

eng: Erastus stayed in Corinth, and I left Trophimus in Miletus because of his illness.
local: Erasɩtɩ maŋɩ Korɛntɩ nɩ mʋ. Kʋ daarɩ amʋ yagɩ Trofim Mileti nɩ, o na ba jɩgɩ yazurǝ tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: Try hard to come to me before winter. Eubulus, Pudens, Linus, Claudia, and all the brothers and sisters say hello.
local: Kwaanɩ n kɩ lɩla n ba kʋ loori waarʋ mɩmaŋa. Yubulusi dɩ Pudan dɩ Linusi dɩ Kloodɩa dɩ dɩ́ ko-biǝ bam maama jɔɔnɩ-m lanyɩranɩ.

eng: The Lord be with your spirit. Grace be with you all.
local: Dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm wʋ́ ta wʋra dɩ nmʋ. Wɛ wʋ́ pa abam yu-yoŋo.

eng: But you should talk in a way that is consistent with sound teaching.
local: Kʋ daarɩ kʋ na yɩ nmʋ Titi, ta n brɩ nɔɔna bam kʋlʋ na maŋɩ dɩ cɩga zaasɩm dɩm tɩn.

eng: Tell the older men to be sober, dignified, sensible, and healthy in respect to their faith, love, and patience.
local: Nmʋ maŋɩ sɩ n brɩ nankwɩn sɩ ba taa yɩrɩ ba tɩtɩ mʋ, sɩ ba kwǝri ba taa yɩ balʋ nɔɔna na nɩgɩ-ba tɩn, sɩ ba taa cʋ ba tɩtɩ, sɩ ba yɔɔrɩ ba sɛ Zezi dɩ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ sono dɩ pu-dɩa.

eng: Likewise, tell the older women to be reverent in their behavior, teaching what is good, rather than being gossips or addicted to heavy drinking.
local: Nan brɩ kazɩna sɩ ba taa jɩgɩ ba tɩtɩ sɩ kʋ pa Wɛ na zulǝ ba tee nɩ, sɩ ba yɩ taa yɩ bɩbarɩ-nyɩna naa sa-nyɔra. Ba nan maŋɩ sɩ ba taa kwe nɔɔna kwiǝ yalʋ na lana tɩn mʋ.

eng: That way they can mentor young women to love their husbands and children.
local: Kʋntʋ mʋ baá wanɩ ba brɩ ka-bwǝnǝ ba na wʋ́ ta soe ba banna dɩ ba biǝ te tɩn.

eng: and to be sensible, morally pure, working at home, kind and submissive to their own husbands, so that Gods word wont be ridiculed.
local: sɩ ba daarɩ ba taa cʋ ba tɩtɩ, sɩ ba yɩ taa kɩ digiru, sɩ ba kwǝri ba taa yɩ ka-yʋʋrʋ tɩlʋ na tʋŋɩ sɔŋɔ tɩtʋŋa lanyɩranɩ yɩ ba sɛ ba banna ni tɩn. Kʋntʋ, nɔɔna daa bá wanɩ ba yáalɩ Wɛ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam.

eng: Likewise, encourage the younger men to be sensible.
local: Kʋ zɩ na yɩ nɔn-dʋnnʋ, sɩ n kwe-ba sɩ ba dɩ taa cʋ ba tɩtɩ woŋo maama wʋnɩ.

eng: in every way. Offer yourself as a role model of good actions. Show integrity, seriousness.
local: Kʋ nan na yɩ nmʋ tɩtɩ, kʋ maŋɩ sɩ n tʋŋɩ tɩtʋŋ-ŋʋna yalʋ na wʋ́ brɩ nɔɔna sɩ ba dɩ tɔgɩ cwǝŋǝ lanyɩranɩ tɩn, sɩ n daarɩ n brɩ-ba Wɛ kwǝrǝ kam lanyɩranɩ dɩ cɩga.

eng: and a sound message that is above criticism when you teach, so that any opponent will be ashamed because they wont find anything bad to say about us.
local: Pa n ni-taanɩ taa jɩgɩ cɩga, sɩ nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ yɩ wanɩ o yáalɩ-dɩ. Kʋntʋ wʋ́ pa dɩbam dʋna na cavɩɩra, ba daa na bá na woŋo sɩ ba maa ŋɔɔnɩ ba cɔgɩ dɩbam tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: Tell slaves to submit to their own masters and please them in everything they do. They shouldnt talk back.
local: N daarɩ n kwe gambɛ nɩ kʋ maŋɩ sɩ ba sɛ ba tiinǝ woŋo maama wʋnɩ, sɩ kʋ pa ba tiinǝ bam wʋ poli. Ba yɩ vɩn ba tiinǝ bam ni.

eng: or steal. Instead, they should show that they are completely reliable in everything so that they might make the teaching about God our savior attractive in every way.
local: Ba nan wʋ maŋɩ sɩ ba ŋɔ-ba. Ba maŋɩ sɩ ba tʋŋɩ lanyɩranɩ dɩ cɩga mʋ woŋo maama wʋnɩ, sɩ kʋ pa nɔɔna lwarɩ nɩ dɩbam Wɛ dɩlʋ na yɩ dɩ́ Vɩrnʋ tɩn zaasɩm dɩm lamma.

eng: The grace of God has appeared, bringing salvation to all people.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ, Wɛ pɛ dɩ́ lwarɩ DƖ sono kʋm na dagɩ zanzan te, sɩ kʋ pa nɔɔna maama wanɩ ba na vrɩm DƖ tee nɩ.

eng: It educates us so that we can live sensible, ethical, and godly lives right now by rejecting ungodly lives and the desires of this world.
local: DƖ ma daarɩ DƖ brɩ dɩbam nɩ kʋ maŋɩ sɩ dɩ́ yagɩ lwarɩm tɩtʋŋa maama dɩ lʋgʋ wo-yɔɔrʋ tɩlʋ dɩ́ fra na zʋʋrɩ tɩn, sɩ dɩ́ taá cʋ dɩ́ tɩtɩ, sɩ dɩ́ taá tɔgɩ cɩga cwǝŋǝ, sɩ dɩ́ daarɩ dɩ́ taá kwarɩ Wɛ lanyɩranɩ lʋgʋ baŋa nɩ.

eng: At the same time we wait for the blessed hope and the glorious appearance of our great God and savior Jesus Christ.
local: Kʋ nan maŋɩ sɩ dɩ́ taá yɩ kʋntʋ mʋ, sɩ dɩ́ taá jɩgɩ tɩɩna dɩ wʋpolo, sɩ dɩ́ cǝgi Zezi Krisi sɩ o joori o ba dɩ paarɩ zulǝ. Wʋntʋ mʋ yɩ dɩbam Wɛ dɩlʋ na yɩ kamunu yɩ o yɩ dɩ́ Vɩrnʋ tɩn.

eng: He gave himself for us in order to rescue us from every kind of lawless behavior, and cleanse a special people for himself who are eager to do good actions.
local: Wʋntʋ mʋ sɛ o tɩ dɩbam ŋwaanɩ, sɩ o ma vrɩ dɩbam lwarɩm dwi maama wʋnɩ, sɩ o daarɩ o fɔgɩ o kwɛ dɩ́ bɩcara sɩ dɩ́ taá yɩ o tɩtɩ nɔɔna, sɩ dɩ́ taá kwaanɩ dɩ́ tʋŋɩ tɩtʋŋ-ŋʋna.

eng: Talk about these things. Encourage and correct with complete authority. Dont let anyone disrespect you.
local: Nan ta n brɩ nɔɔna wǝǝnu tɩm kʋntʋ, sɩ n daarɩ n kwe-ba, sɩ n kwǝri n kaanɩ-ba, nɩ Wɛ na pɛ nmʋ ni sɩ n kɩ te tɩn. Nan yɩ sɛ sɩ nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ gooni-m.

eng: So, my child, draw your strength from the grace that is in Christ Jesus.
local: A bu Timoti, ta n zɩgɩ kǝŋkǝŋ Zezi Krisi na pɛ nmʋ yu-yoŋo yɩ n ŋwɩ dɩd-o tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: Take the things you heard me say in front of many other witnesses and pass them on to faithful people who are also capable of teaching others.
local: Cɩga kalʋ maama a na yǝni a brɩ nmʋ nɔn-kɔgɔ kʋm maama yigǝ nɩ tɩn, n dɩ ma-ka n brɩ nɔɔna balʋ na tɔgɩ cɩga tɩn, sɩ ba dɩ daa wanɩ ba maa brɩ nɔɔna badonnǝ ba wǝli da.

eng: Accept your share of suffering like a good soldier of Christ Jesus.
local: Nmʋ na tʋŋɩ n pa Zezi Krisi tɩn, n maŋɩ sɩ n dɩ sɛ yaara mʋ, nɩnɛɛnɩ pamaŋ-ŋʋm na sɛ yaara te tɩn.

eng: Nobody who serves in the military gets tied up with civilian matters, so that they can please the one who recruited them.
local: Nɔɔnʋ na yɩ pamaŋnʋ yɩ o lagɩ sɩ o poli o yuutu wʋ, o daa wʋ maŋɩ sɩ o taa kɩ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ na daɩ pamaŋna tɩtʋŋa tɩn.

eng: Also in the same way, athletes dont win unless they follow the rules.
local: Kʋ ta nyɩ dɩ nɔɔnʋ na kwaanɩ o duri o di yigǝ te tɩn mʋ. O na maŋɩ o duri o di yɩ o wʋ dɛ durim dɩm cwǝŋǝ cɩga cɩga, ba bá pa-o yigǝ tu pɛɛrɩ dɩm.

eng: A hardworking farmer should get the first share of the crop.
local: Kʋ ta nyɩ dɩ nɔɔnʋ na yɩ valʋ yɩ o tiini o tʋŋɩ te tɩn mʋ. Wʋntʋ mʋ maŋɩ sɩ o da yigǝ o na o wo-vaalʋ tɩm biǝ.

eng: Think about what Im saying; the Lord will give you understanding about everything.
local: Bʋŋɩ n nii a na tɛ kʋlʋ tɩn. Dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi wʋ́ pa n lwarɩ woŋo maama kuri n ti.

eng: Remember Jesus Christ, who was raised from the dead and descended from David. This is my good news.
local: Ta n guli Zezi Krisi na yɩ Pɛ Davidi dwi tu tɩn gulǝ. Wʋntʋ mʋ bi o yagɩ tʋʋnɩ, nɩ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kalʋ a na yǝni a tɔɔlɩ tɩn na brɩ te tɩn.

eng: This is the reason Im suffering to the point that Im in prison like a common criminal. But Gods word cannot be imprisoned.
local: Amʋ na tɔɔlɩ Wɛ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam kʋntʋ tɩn mʋ pɛ a wʋ yaara wʋnɩ, yɩ ba vɔ-nɩ dɩ capʋnnʋ nɩ a yɩ ŋwɩɩnʋ mʋ te. Ba nan bá wanɩ ba cɩ Wɛ kwǝrǝ kam sɩ ka yɩ jagɩ.

eng: This is why I endure everything for the sake of those who are chosen by God so that they too may experience salvation in Christ Jesus with eternal glory.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ a sɛ yaara dwi maama, sɩ kʋ wanɩ kʋ wǝli nɔɔna balʋ Wɛ na kuri sɩ ba taa yɩ DƖ nɔɔna tɩn, sɩ ba tɔgɩ Zezi Krisi ŋwaanɩ ba na vrɩm dɩ zulǝ yalʋ na bá ti tɩn.

eng: This saying is reliable: If we have died together, we will also live together.
local: Taanɩ dɩlʋ a na lagɩ a ta tɩn yɩ cɩga mʋ: Dɩ́ na tɔgɩ dɩ Zezi dɩ́ tɩ, dɩ́ ta wʋ́ tɔgɩ dɩd-o dɩ́ na ŋwɩa.

eng: If we endure, we will also rule together. If we deny him, he will also deny us.
local: Dɩ́ na fɔgɩ dɩ́ zɩgɩ kǝŋkǝŋ cam wʋnɩ, dɩ́ wʋ́ tɔgɩ dɩd-o dɩ́ di paarɩ. Dɩ́ nan na vɩ-o, o dɩ wʋ́ vɩn dɩbam mʋ.

eng: If we are disloyal, he stays faithful because he cant be anything else than what he is.
local: Dɩbam nan na maŋɩ dɩ́ ba jɩgɩ cɩga, wʋntʋ ta yɩ cɩga tu mʋ, bɛŋwaanɩ wʋm ba joori o kwanɩ o ni.

eng: Remind them of these things and warn them in the sight of God not to engage in battles over words that arent helpful and only destroy those who hear them.
local: Ta n guli amʋ zaasɩm dɩm n brɩ Zezi nɔɔna bam, sɩ n daarɩ n kaanɩ-ba lanyɩranɩ dɩ Wɛ yɩrɩ, sɩ ba yɩ taa magɩ kantɔgɔ kʋlʋ na ba jɩgɩ kuri tɩn bɩtarɩ baŋa nɩ, sɩ kʋ cɔgɩ balʋ dɩ na cǝgi tɩn wʋbʋŋa mʋ.

eng: Make an effort to present yourself to God as a tried-and-true worker, who doesnt need to be ashamed but is one who interprets the message of truth correctly.
local: Kwaanɩ n tʋŋɩ dɩ yawala sɩ kʋ poli Wɛ wʋ, sɩ cavɩɩra yɩ ja-m DƖ yigǝ nɩ dɩ kʋlʋ n na tʋŋɩ tɩn, sɩ n kwaanɩ n ta n brɩ nɔɔna Wɛ cɩga kam lanyɩranɩ.

eng: Avoid their godless discussions, because they will lead many people into ungodly behavior.
local: Ja n tɩtɩ dɩ bɩtar-yɔɔrʋ tɩlʋ na ba wǝli Wɛ cwǝŋǝ tɩn. Balʋ na ŋɔɔnɩ-sɩ tɩn paɩ nɔɔna fɔgɩ ba joori ba maŋɩ kwaga nɩ mʋ Wɛ cwǝŋǝ kam wʋnɩ.

eng: and their ideas will spread like an infection. This includes Hymenaeus and Philetus.
local: Ba na karɩ ba brɩ wo-yɔɔrʋ tɩm kʋntʋ tɩn, tɩ wʋ́ loŋi tɩ jagɩ je maama, nɩnɛɛnɩ nɔɔnʋ na jɩgɩ nasɩncɔgɔ yɩ kʋ woori kʋ wǝli da te tɩn. Yimene dɩ Filɛtɩ mʋ tɔgɩ ba wʋ nɔɔna bam kʋntʋ wʋnɩ.

eng: who have deviated from the truth by claiming that the resurrection has already happened. This has undermined some peoples faith.
local: Ba tusi cɩga cwǝŋǝ kam wʋnɩ yɩ ba tɛ ba wɩ, Wɛ daa bá bi nɔɔna DƖ pa ba yagɩ tʋʋnɩ, sɩ twa biim maŋɩ kʋ kɛ. Ba zaasɩm dɩm kʋntʋ ma pa balʋ na sɛ Wɛ tɩn badonnǝ wʋbʋŋa joori ya lǝni.

eng: Gods solid foundation is still standing with this sign: The Lord knows the people who belong to him, and Everyone who confesses the Lords name must avoid wickedness. .
local: Kʋ daarɩ balʋ na yɔɔrɩ ba tɔgɩ Wɛ cɩga kam tɩn wʋbʋŋa ba zaɩ. Bantʋ nyɩ dɩ digǝ kuri mʋ Wɛ na fɔgɩ DƖ cwi lanyɩranɩ. Kuri dɩm kʋntʋ ba gɔɛ, yɩ kʋ pʋpʋnɩ da kʋ wɩ: «Dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm ye balʋ na yɩ o nɔɔna tɩn.» Kʋ ta pʋpʋnɩ kʋ wɩ: «Wʋlʋ maama na sɛ nɩ o yɩ dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm nɔɔnʋ tɩn maŋɩ sɩ o yagɩ kǝm-balwaarʋ mʋ.».

eng: In a mansion, there arent just gold and silver bowls but also some bowls that are made of wood and clay. Some are meant for special uses, some for garbage.
local: Kʋ nyɩ dɩ sɔ-fɔrɔ wʋnɩ kabǝli dɩ zwɩ dwi tǝri tǝri na wʋra te tɩn mʋ. Sɩdonnǝ yɩ can-na mʋ ba mɛ ba kɩ, dɩ sǝbu-sɩŋa. Sɩntʋ yɩ lʋnnɩ nyɩm mʋ. Sɩdonnǝ maa yɩ dɛ naa dɔgɔ mʋ ba mɛ ba kɩ, yɩ ba maɩ sɩntʋ mʋ ba tʋŋa.

eng: So if anyone washes filth off themselves, they will be set apart as a special bowl. They will be useful to the owner of the mansion for every sort of good work.
local: Kʋ brɩ nɩ, nɔɔnʋ na jɩgɩ o tɩtɩ dɩ wo-yɔɔrʋ tɩm kʋntʋ, kʋ tu wʋ́ ta yɩ lʋnnɩ nyɩm mʋ Wɛ tee nɩ. O yɩ wʋlʋ na kwe o tɩtɩ o kɩ o yuutu wʋm jɩŋa nɩ yɩ o jɩgɩ kuri o pa-o tɩn mʋ. O maŋɩ sɩ o taa tʋŋɩ tɩtʋŋ-ŋʋna yalʋ maama o yuutu wʋm na lagɩ tɩn mʋ.

eng: Run away from adolescent cravings. Instead, pursue righteousness, faith, love, and peace together with those who confess the Lord with a clean heart.
local: Kʋntʋ tɩn, cʋ n tɩtɩ dɩ kǝm-yɔɔrʋ tɩlʋ nɔn-dʋnnʋ wʋbʋŋa na yǝni ya zʋʋrɩ tɩn, sɩ n daarɩ n kwaanɩ n tɔgɩ cɩga cwǝŋǝ dɩ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ sono dɩ wʋ-zuru, sɩ n ta n tɔgɩ dɩ balʋ bɩcara na lana yɩ ba sɛ nɩ ba yɩ dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm nɔɔna tɩn.

eng: Avoid foolish and thoughtless discussions, since you know that they produce conflicts.
local: Fɔgɩ n cɩ n tɩtɩ dɩ jwǝri kantɔgɔ kʋlʋ na ba jɩgɩ kuri tɩn. Bɛŋwaanɩ nmʋ ye nɩ kʋ tui kʋ guri dɩ najara mʋ.

eng: Gods slave shouldnt be argumentative but should be kind toward all people, able to teach, patient.
local: Nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ nan na yɩ dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm tɩntʋŋnʋ tɩn wʋ maŋɩ sɩ o taa yɩ najajarʋ. O maŋɩ sɩ o taa nɩgɩ nɔɔna maama lanyɩranɩ, sɩ o daarɩ o brɩ-ba cɩga dɩ wʋ-zuru.

eng: and should correct opponents with gentleness. Perhaps God will change their mind and give them a knowledge of the truth.
local: O nan maŋɩ sɩ o zaasɩ balʋ na vɩn Wɛ cɩga kam tɩn dɩ wʋ-bono mʋ, sɩ kʋ waɩ kʋ kɩ sɩ Wɛ pa ba lǝni ba wʋbʋŋa sɩ ba joori ba sɛ DƖ cɩga kam.

eng: They may come to their senses and escape from the devils trap that holds them captive to do his will.
local: Kʋntʋ tɩn, ba swan laan wʋ́ joori yɩ ba wanɩ ba vrɩ ba tɩtɩ sʋtaanɩ jɩŋa nɩ, dɩ ya na jaanɩ-ba nɩ cɩkʋ te yɩ dɩ pa ba kɩ dɩ wʋbʋŋa na lagɩ te tɩn.

eng: From Paul, a slave of God and an apostle of Jesus Christ. Im sent to bring about the faith of Gods chosen people and a knowledge of the truth that agrees with godliness.
local: Amʋ Pooli wʋlʋ na yɩ Wɛ gamba-sono dɩ Zezi Krisi tɩntʋŋnʋ tɩn mʋ pʋpʋnɩ tɔnɔ kʋntʋ sɩ a pa nmʋ Titi. Wɛ mʋ pɛ sɩ a pa balʋ DƖ na kuri sɩ ba taa yɩ DƖ nɔɔna tɩn taa jɩgɩ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ DƖ, sɩ ba kwǝri ba lwarɩ DƖ cɩga kam. Cɩga kam kʋntʋ nan mʋ paɩ nɔɔna ŋwɩ nɩ Wɛ na lagɩ te tɩn.

eng: Their faith and this knowledge are based on the hope of eternal life that God, who doesnt lie, promised before time began.
local: sɩ ba wanɩ ba taa jɩgɩ tɩɩna nɩ baá na ŋwɩa kalʋ na ba ti tɩn Wɛ tee nɩ. Kʋ na loori lʋgʋ pulim tɩn, mʋ Wɛ maŋɩ DƖ go ni sɩ DƖ pa dɩbam ŋwɩa kam kʋntʋ, yɩ DƖ bá kwanɩ DƖ ni.

eng: God revealed his message at the appropriate time through preaching, and I was trusted with preaching this message by the command of God our savior.
local: Kʋ daarɩ ka maŋa kam na yi tɩn, Wɛ ma pa dɩ́ lwarɩ DƖ taanɩ dɩm kʋntʋ kuri jaja. Kʋ yɩ kwǝrǝ kam kʋntʋ mʋ Wɛ na yɩ dɩbam Vɩrnʋ tɩn pɛ amʋ ni sɩ a taa tɔɔlɩ a brɩ nɔɔna.

eng: To Titus, my true child in a common faith. Grace and peace from God the Father and Christ Jesus our savior.
local: Nmʋ Titi yɩ nɩnɛɛnɩ amʋ tɩtɩ bu mʋ te, dɩ́ maama na jɩgɩ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Zezi tɩn ŋwaanɩ. Dɩ́ Ko Wɛ dɩ dɩ́ Vɩrnʋ Zezi Krisi wʋ́ pa nmʋ yazurǝ dɩ yu-yoŋo.

eng: The reason I left you behind in Crete was to organize whatever needs to be done and to appoint elders in each city, as I told you.
local: Amʋ dɛɛn na yagɩ nmʋ Krɛtɩ nɩ tɩn, kʋ yɩ sɩ n kwaanɩ n kɩ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ na daarɩ sɩ n kɩ tɩn mʋ. Zezi nɔɔna bam na wʋ tɩʋ kʋlʋ maama nɩ tɩn, sɩ n lɩ nakwa tiinǝ da, nɩnɛɛnɩ a na maŋɩ a ta dɩ nmʋ te tɩn.

eng: Elders should be without fault. They should be faithful to their spouse, and have faithful children who cant be accused of self-indulgence or rebelliousness.
local: Nmʋ na lɩ nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ tɩn, o maŋɩ sɩ o taa yɩ wʋlʋ nɔɔna na bá ta jɩgɩ o yɩra taanɩ tɩn mʋ. O nan maŋɩ sɩ o taa jɩgɩ kaanɩ dɩdʋa yɩranɩ mʋ. Kʋ maŋɩ sɩ o biǝ dɩ sɛ Wɛ, sɩ ba yɩ taa yɩ nɔn-kayɛ dɩ banɩ-nyɩna.

eng: This is because supervisors should be without fault as Gods managers: they shouldnt be stubborn, irritable, addicted to alcohol, a bully, or greedy.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ kʋ maŋɩ sɩ wʋlʋ na nii Zezi nɔɔna bam tɩn taa yɩ wʋlʋ nɔɔna na bá ta jɩgɩ o yɩra taanɩ tɩn mʋ, Wɛ na kɩ DƖ nɔɔna bam wʋntʋ jɩŋa nɩ tɩn ŋwaanɩ. O wʋ maŋɩ sɩ o taa yɩ bɩyɩrɩ-nyɩm, naa nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ banɩ na lʋmma tɩn, naa sa-nyɔrʋ naa najajarʋ, naa wʋlʋ na kɩ kampinǝ sɩ o ma na wǝǝnu tɩn.

eng: Instead, they should show hospitality, love what is good, and be reasonable, ethical, godly, and self-controlled.
local: Kʋ nan maŋɩ sɩ o taa yɩ nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ na jeeri vǝrǝ lanyɩranɩ tɩn. O maŋɩ sɩ o taa yɩ nɔn-ŋʋm wʋlʋ na cʋ o tɩtɩ yɩ o tɔgɩ Wɛ dɩ cɩga yɩ o waɩ o tɩtɩ o jaana tɩn.

eng: They must pay attention to the reliable message as it has been taught to them so that they can encourage people with healthy instruction and refute those who speak against it.
local: O maŋɩ sɩ o yɔɔrɩ o taa tɔgɩ taanɩ dɩlʋ na yɩ cɩga, nɩ dɩbam na maŋɩ dɩ́ brɩ abam te tɩn. Kʋntʋ, oó wanɩ o brɩ nɔɔna badonnǝ sɩ ba taa tɔgɩ Wɛ cɩga kam kʋntʋ, yɩ o daarɩ o pa balʋ na vɩn Wɛ cɩga kam tɩn lwarɩ nɩ ba tusi mʋ.

eng: In fact, there are many who are rebellious people, loudmouths, and deceivers, especially some of those who are Jewish believers.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ banɩ-nyɩna zanzan mʋ wʋ abam tee nɩ, ba na yǝni ba ŋɔɔnɩ bɩtarɩ sɩlʋ na ba jɩgɩ kuri tɩn ba ma ganɩ nɔɔna. Ba zanzan mʋ yɩ balʋ na tiini ba sɛ ba Zwifǝ bam cullu tɩm tɩn.

eng: They must be silenced because they upset entire households. They teach what they shouldnt to make money dishonestly.
local: Abam nan maŋɩ sɩ á pa ba pu ba niǝ mʋ dɩ ba zaasɩm dɩm kʋntʋ, bɛŋwaanɩ ba zaasɩm dɩm yǝni dɩ paɩ nɔɔna dɩ ba sɔŋɔ tiinǝ maama mʋ tusi Wɛ cwǝŋǝ kam wʋnɩ. Ba yǝni ba brɩ kʋlʋ na wʋ maŋɩ sɩ ba brɩ nɔɔna tɩn mʋ, ba ma ganɩ-ba ba joŋi sǝbu.

eng: Someone who is one of their own prophets said, People from Crete are always liars, wild animals, and lazy gluttons.
local: Krɛtɩ tiinǝ bam tɩtɩ yiyǝn-yeenu dɛɛn mʋ tagɩ o wɩ: «Krɛtɩ tiinǝ yǝni ba fɔ vwan mʋ maŋa maama. Ba nyɩ dɩ varɩ-balwaarʋ mʋ te, yɩ ba ta yɩ yawɔrɩ-nyɩna dɩ nɔn-kwǝǝlu dɩ.».

eng: This statement is true. Because of this, correct them firmly, so that they can be healthy in their faith.
local: O nan na tagɩ kʋntʋ tɩn, kʋ yɩ cɩga mʋ o taga. Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ n maŋɩ sɩ n tiini n kaanɩ Krɛtɩ tiinǝ bam, sɩ kʋ pa ba yɔɔrɩ ba taa tɔgɩ Wɛ cɩga kam lanyɩranɩ.

eng: They shouldnt pay attention to Jewish myths and commands from people who reject the truth.
local: sɩ ba daa yɩ sɛ Zwifǝ bam sɩnswalɩ sɩlʋ na ba jɩgɩ kuri tɩn, naa ba sɛ nabiinǝ tɩtɩ wʋbʋŋa cullu tɩm ba na yagɩ cɩga kam yɩ ba daarɩ ba tɔgɩ tɩn.

eng: Everything is clean to those who are clean, but nothing is clean to those who are corrupt and without faith. Instead, their mind and conscience are corrupted.
local: Wʋlʋ maama na jɩgɩ wʋ-poŋo tɩn, kʋlʋkʋlʋ ba jɩgɩ digiru wʋntʋ tee nɩ. Kʋ daarɩ wʋlʋ na vɩn Wɛ yɩ o ba jɩgɩ wʋ-poŋo tɩn, kʋlʋkʋlʋ tǝrǝ kʋ na lana wʋntʋ tee nɩ. Kʋntʋ tu wʋbʋŋa cɔgɩ mʋ, yɩ o daa yǝri kʋlʋ na maŋɩ tɩn.

eng: They claim to know God, but they deny God by the things that they do. They are detestable, disobedient, and disqualified to do anything good.
local: Nɔɔna bam kʋntʋ donnǝ nan tɛ ba wɩ, ba ye Wɛ mʋ, yɩ ba tɩtʋŋa laan yagɩ ya ba tɔgɩ Wɛ wʋbʋŋa. Ba yɩ banɩ-nyɩna mʋ, yɩ ba tiini ba kɩ lwarɩm kʋ ja gaalɩ. Ba warɩ kʋlʋ na lana tɩn ba kɩ.

eng: Remind them to submit to rulers and authorities. They should be obedient and ready to do every good thing.
local: Guli n brɩ nɔɔna bam nɩ ba maŋɩ sɩ ba taa nɩgɩ ba tɩʋ kʋm yigǝ tiinǝ dɩ balʋ na yɩ dɩdɛɛra tɩn, sɩ ba taa sɛ ba ni. Ba nan maŋɩ sɩ ba taa tʋŋɩ tɩtʋŋ-ŋʋna dwi maama mʋ.

eng: They shouldnt speak disrespectfully about anyone, but they should be peaceful, kind, and show complete courtesy toward everyone.
local: Ba nan yɩ zaŋɩ ba twɩ nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ, naa ba taa yɩ najajara. Kʋ maŋɩ sɩ ba taa zuli nɔɔna mʋ, sɩ ba daarɩ ba taa jɩgɩ wʋ-bono dɩ nɔɔna maama.

eng: We were once foolish, disobedient, deceived, and slaves to our desires and various pleasures too. We were spending our lives in evil behavior and jealousy. We were disgusting, and we hated other people.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ dɩbam maama dɛɛn yɩ nayǝri-nyɩna mʋ, yɩ dɩ́ tusi, yɩ dɩ́ vɩn Wɛ ni. Dɩbam fra dɛɛn mʋ te dɩbam, yɩ dɩ́ tɔgɩ wo-yɔɔrʋ tɩlʋ maama dɩ́ wʋbʋŋa na lagɩ tɩn. Dɩ́ maa yǝni dɩ́ jɩgɩ pu-sɩŋa dɩ wʋ-gʋʋ yɩ dɩ́ culi daanɩ.

eng: But when God our saviors kindness and love appeared.
local: Nan dɩ kʋ dɩ, Wɛ dɩlʋ na yɩ dɩbam Vɩrnʋ tɩn brɩ jaja nɩ DƖ soe nabiinǝ lanyɩranɩ, yɩ DƖ vrɩ dɩbam lwarɩm wʋnɩ DƖ yagɩ.

eng: he saved us because of his mercy, not because of righteous things we had done. He did it through the washing of new birth and the renewing by the Holy Spirit.
local: Kʋ nan daɩ dɩbam na kɩ kǝm-laarʋ tɩn ŋwaanɩ, kʋ yɩ Wɛ na yɩ ŋwaŋa tu tɩn ŋwaanɩ mʋ. DƖ ma pa DƖ Joro kʋm zarɩ wo-digiru tɩlʋ na wʋ dɩ́ bɩcara nɩ tɩn, yɩ DƖ daarɩ DƖ pa dɩbam wʋbʋŋ-dʋʋra, sɩ dɩ́ na ŋwɩ-dʋŋa DƖ tee nɩ.

eng: which God poured out upon us generously through Jesus Christ our savior.
local: Kʋ maa yɩ dɩbam Vɩrnʋ Zezi Krisi ŋwaanɩ mʋ Wɛ tʋŋɩ DƖ Joro kʋm DƖ pa dɩbam zaanɩ.

eng: So, since we have been made righteous by his grace, we can inherit the hope for eternal life.
local: sɩ dɩ́ wanɩ dɩ́ na cɩga DƖ tee nɩ DƖ zaanɩ dɩm ŋwaanɩ, sɩ dɩ́ daarɩ dɩ́ na Wɛ wo-laarʋ tɩm dɩ́ na yɩ DƖ biǝ yɩ dɩ́ jɩgɩ tɩɩna nɩ dɩ́ wʋ́ na ŋwɩa kalʋ na ba ti DƖ tee nɩ tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: This saying is reliable. And I want you to insist on these things, so that those who have come to believe in God might give careful attention to doing good. These things are good and useful for everyone.
local: A na tagɩ taanɩ dɩlʋ tɩn yɩ cɩga mʋ. Kʋntʋ, a lagɩ sɩ n kwaanɩ n brɩ wǝǝnu tɩm kʋntʋ lanyɩranɩ, sɩ kʋ pa balʋ na sɛ Wɛ tɩn tiini ba taa kɩ kǝm-laarʋ. Kʋntʋ mʋ lana yɩ kʋ jɩgɩ kuri kʋ paɩ nɔɔna maama.

eng: Avoid stupid controversies, genealogies, and fights about the Law, because they are useless and worthless.
local: Kʋ daarɩ n maŋɩ sɩ n cɩ n tɩtɩ dɩ kantɔgɔ dwi maama, kʋ na yɩ bɩtar-yɔɔrʋ baŋa nɩ dɩ dɩ́ kwǝ dwi natɔga kam baŋa nɩ dɩ Zwifǝ bam cullu tɩm baŋa nɩ, sɩ tɩ ba jɩgɩ nyɔɔrɩ tɩ yɩ kafɛ mʋ.

eng: After a first and second warning, have nothing more to do with a person who causes conflict.
local: Nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ na jaanɩ kampwara o tui nɔɔna tɩtarɩ nɩ tɩn, sɩ n kaanɩ kʋntʋ tu nɩnɛɛnɩ kuni bɩle te. O ta na wʋ sɛ nmʋ taanɩ dɩm, sɩ á cɩ á tɩtɩ dɩd-o.

eng: because you know that someone like this is twisted and sinful—so they condemn themselves.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ nmʋ ye nɩ, nɔɔnʋ na yɩ kʋntʋ doŋ, o daa ba lagɩ sɩ o tɔgɩ cwǝŋǝ. O tusim dɩm mʋ brɩ nɩ o bá na bʋra Wɛ tee nɩ.

eng: When I send Artemas or Tychicus to you, try to come to me in Nicopolis, because Ive decided to spend the winter there.
local: A lagɩ a tʋŋɩ Aritimasɩ naa Tisiki mʋ nmʋ tee nɩ. Ba wʋlʋ na yi nmʋ te tɩn, sɩ n kwaanɩ n ba amʋ te lɩla Nikopolisi nɩ, bɛŋwaanɩ a lɩ wʋbʋŋa sɩ a maŋɩ dáanɩ mʋ sɩ waarʋ tɩm maŋa kɛ.

eng: Help Zenas the lawyer and Apollos on their journey with enthusiasm so that they wont need anything.
local: Nan kwaanɩ n wǝli Zenasɩ wʋlʋ na yɩ bɩtar-yeenu tɩn dɩ Apolɔsɩ ba cwǝŋǝ kam vǝŋǝ ŋwaanɩ, sɩ n pa-ba kʋlʋ maama na muri-ba tɩn.

eng: But our people should also learn to devote themselves to doing good in order to meet pressing needs so they arent unproductive.
local: Pa dɩ́ ko-biǝ bam taa ye nɩ kʋ maŋɩ sɩ ba tiini ba kwaanɩ ba taa kɩ kǝm-laarʋ mʋ, sɩ ba wanɩ ba zǝni balʋ na maŋɩ zǝnǝ tɩn. Kʋntʋ mʋ wʋ́ pa ba ŋwɩa taa jɩgɩ kuri nɔɔna maama tee nɩ.

eng: Everyone with me greets you; greet those who love us faithfully. Grace be with all of you.
local: Dɩ́ ko-biǝ balʋ na wʋ amʋ tee nɩ tɩn maama jɔɔnɩ nmʋ. Jɔɔnɩ balʋ maama na sɛ Zezi yɩ ba yɩ dɩbam cilon-sonnu tɩn n pa dɩbam. Wɛ wʋ́ pa abam maama yu-yoŋo.

eng: From Paul, who is a prisoner for the cause of Christ Jesus, and our brother Timothy. To Philemon our dearly loved coworker.
local: Amʋ Pooli wʋlʋ na wʋ pɩɩna digǝ nɩ Zezi Krisi cɩga kam ŋwaanɩ tɩn mʋ pʋpʋnɩ tɔnɔ kʋntʋ, yɩ dɩ́ ko-bu Timoti wʋ amʋ tee nɩ. Dɩ́ pʋpʋnɩ dɩ́ pa nmʋ Filimɔn, n na yɩ dɩbam ciloŋ-sono yɩ n tɔgɩ dɩ dɩbam n tʋŋɩ Wɛ tɩtʋŋa tɩn mʋ.

eng: Apphia our sister, Archippus our fellow soldier, and the church that meets in your house.
local: Dɩ́ jɔɔnɩ-m, yɩ dɩ́ daarɩ dɩ́ jɔɔnɩ dɩ́ ko-bu-kana Apɩa, dɩ Arisipi wʋlʋ na wǝli dɩ dɩbam o na cam Wɛ tɩtʋŋa yam ŋwaanɩ tɩn. Dɩ́ daarɩ dɩ́ jɔɔnɩ Zezi kɔgɔ kʋlʋ na yǝni kʋ jeeri daanɩ nmʋ sɔŋɔ nɩ tɩn maama.

eng: May the grace and peace from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ be with you.
local: Dɩ́ Ko Wɛ dɩ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi Krisi wʋ́ pa abam yazurǝ dɩ yu-yoŋo.

eng: Philemon, I thank my God every time I mention you in my prayers.
local: Maŋa maama amʋ na yǝni a loori Wɛ, a guli nmʋ gulǝ DƖ yigǝ nɩ, yɩ a kɩ DƖ le nmʋ ŋwaanɩ.

eng: because Ive heard of your love and faithfulness, which you have both for the Lord Jesus and for all Gods people.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ amʋ ni nɩ n jɩgɩ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi yɩ n soe Wɛ nɔɔna bam maama lanyɩranɩ.

eng: I pray that your partnership in the faith might become effective by an understanding of all that is good among us in Christ.
local: Wɛ wʋ́ pa nmʋ na jɩgɩ wǝl-dɔnɔ kʋlʋ dɩ dɩbam n na kɩ n wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Zezi Krisi tɩn pa n wanɩ n lwarɩ wo-laarʋ tɩlʋ maama Wɛ na kɩ DƖ pa dɩbam Zezi Krisi ŋwaanɩ tɩn.

eng: I have great joy and encouragement because of your love, since the hearts of Gods people are refreshed by your actions, my brother.
local: A ko-bu-sono, nmʋ na soe Wɛ nɔɔna bam te tɩn mʋ paɩ a wʋ poli zanzan, yɩ kʋ pa a jɩgɩ baarɩ, bɛŋwaanɩ n wǝli Wɛ nɔɔna bam yɩ n pa ba na baarɩ dɩ wʋpolo.

eng: Therefore, though I have enough confidence in Christ to command you to do the right thing.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ amʋ lagɩ a loori nmʋ sɩ n kɩ kʋlʋ na maŋɩ sɩ n kɩ tɩn mʋ. Amʋ ya jɩgɩ cwǝŋǝ sɩ a da Zezi Krisi ŋwaanɩ a pa nmʋ ni, sɩ n lwarɩ n na wʋ́ kɩ kʋlʋ tɩn.

eng: I would rather appeal to you through love. I, Paul—an old man, and now also a prisoner for Christ Jesus.
local: A nan lagɩ sɩ a loori-m dɩ sono mʋ. Amʋ Pooli wʋlʋ na yɩ nankwɩan yɩ ba kɩ-nɩ pɩɩna digǝ nɩ lele kʋntʋ Zezi Krisi cɩga kam ŋwaanɩ tɩn.

eng: appeal to you for my child Onesimus. I became his father in the faith during my time in prison.
local: a lagɩ a loori-m nmʋ gambaa Onisim ŋwaanɩ mʋ. A na wʋ pɩɩna digǝ nɩ tɩn, o tu amʋ te, yɩ a brɩ-o Wɛ cɩga kam yɩ o sɛ. Kʋntʋ tɩn, wʋntʋ laan nyɩ nɩ a tɩtɩ bu mʋ te.

eng: He was useless to you before, but now he is useful to both of us.
local: O dɛɛn na tʋŋɩ o pa nmʋ maŋa kalʋ tɩn, o wʋ pɛ n na nyɔɔrɩ. Kʋ daarɩ lele kʋntʋ, o laan jɩgɩ nyɔɔrɩ o pa amʋ dɩ nmʋ maama.

eng: Im sending him back to you, which is like sending you my own heart.
local: A lagɩ a tʋŋ-o sɩ o joori o ba nmʋ te, wʋntʋ yɩ a tɩtɩ bɩcarɩ mʋ.

eng: I considered keeping him with me so that he might serve me in your place during my time in prison because of the gospel.
local: Amʋ na wʋ pɩɩna digǝ nɩ Wɛ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam ŋwaanɩ tɩn, a yaá ta lagɩ sɩ o maŋɩ a tee nɩ mʋ, sɩ o lǝni nmʋ yuu nɩ o taa tʋŋɩ o pa-nɩ.

eng: However, I didnt want to do anything without your consent so that your act of kindness would occur willingly and not under pressure.
local: A nan ba lagɩ sɩ a kɩ kʋlʋkʋlʋ yɩ nmʋ na wʋ sɛ. A na kɩ kʋntʋ, kʋʋ́ ta yɩ nɩ a fɩn nmʋ sɩ n wǝli-nɩ, sɩ kʋ daɩ n tɩtɩ wʋbʋŋa.

eng: Maybe this is the reason that Onesimus was separated from you for a while so that you might have him back forever.
local: Onisim na duri o yagɩ nmʋ tɩn, dɛ doŋ kʋ yɩ sɩ o pɔɔrɩ dɩ nmʋ maŋa fɩnfɩɩn yɩranɩ mʋ, sɩ o laan joori o ba o taa wʋ nmʋ tee nɩ maŋa maama.

eng: no longer as a slave but more than a slave—that is, as a dearly loved brother. He is especially a dearly loved brother to me. How much more can he become a brother to you, personally and spiritually in the Lord!.
local: O na duri o yagɩ nmʋ tɩn, o dɛɛn yɩ gambaa mʋ. O na joori o ba, yɩ zaŋɩ n nii-o nɩ gambaa te, sɩ o laan dwe gambaa o na jigi nmʋ ko-bu dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm ŋwaanɩ tɩn. Amʋ tiini a so-o. Nmʋ dɩ nan wʋ́ ta n tiini n so-o kʋ ja gaalɩ, o na yɩ n gambaa yɩ o kwǝri o yɩ n ko-bu dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm ŋwaanɩ tɩn.

eng: So, if you really consider me a partner, welcome Onesimus as if you were welcoming me.
local: Nmʋ na sɛ nɩ dɩbam sɩɩnɩ dɩ́ yɩ ciloŋo daanɩ, sɩ n kwaanɩ n jeeri Onisim lanyɩranɩ nɩnɛɛnɩ amʋ tɩtɩ te.

eng: If he has harmed you in any way or owes you money, charge it to my account.
local: O dɛɛn na maŋɩ o kɩ woŋo kʋlʋ o cɔgɩ dɩ, naa o na jɩgɩ nmʋ jɩnɩ, sɩ n yagɩ kʋ maama dɩ amʋ.

eng: I, Paul, will pay it back to you . Of course, I wont mention that you owe me your life.
local: Amʋ Pooli tɩtɩ mʋ mɛ a jɩŋa a pʋpʋnɩ tɩntʋ nɩ: Amʋ wʋ́ ŋwɩ jɩnɩ dɩm.

eng: Yes, brother, I want this favor from you in the Lord! Refresh my heart in Christ.
local: A ko-bu, kʋ yɩ cɩga mʋ, a lagɩ sɩ n kɩ woŋo kʋlʋ a na loori-m tɩn mʋ dɩ́ Yuutu sono kʋm ŋwaanɩ, sɩ n pa a taa jɩgɩ wʋpolo Zezi Krisi ŋwaanɩ.

eng: Im writing to you, confident of your obedience and knowing that you will do more than what I ask.
local: Amʋ na pʋpʋnɩ tɔnɔ kʋntʋ a pa nmʋ tɩn, a ye lanyɩranɩ nɩ nmʋ wʋ́ sɛ a wʋbʋŋa yam. A ta ye nɩ nmʋ wʋ́ kɩ n dwǝni a na loori kʋlʋ tɩn.

eng: Also, one more thing—prepare a guest room for me. I hope that I will be released from prison to be with you because of your prayers.
local: Kʋlʋ na wǝli da tɩn, a loori-m sɩ n kwaanɩ n lagɩ digǝ, sɩ a na tuǝ, sɩ a taa tigi da. Bɛŋwaanɩ a jɩgɩ tɩɩna nɩ Wɛ wʋ́ sɛ abam na loori-DƖ amʋ ŋwaanɩ te tɩn, yɩ DƖ wʋ́ pʋrɩ cwǝŋǝ sɩ a joori a ba abam te.

eng: Epaphras, who is in prison with me for the cause of Christ Jesus, greets you.
local: Epafrasɩ dɩ jɔɔnɩ-m. Wʋntʋ dɩdaanɩ amʋ mʋ wʋ pɩɩna digǝ nɩ Zezi Krisi cɩga kam ŋwaanɩ.

eng: as well as my coworkers Mark, Aristarchus, Demas, and Luke.
local: Marɩkɩ dɩ Arisarɩkɩ dɩ Demasɩ dɩ Luki maama dɩ jɔɔnɩ-m. Bantʋ dɩ amʋ mʋ tɔgɩ daanɩ dɩ́ tʋŋɩ Wɛ tɩtʋŋa yam.

eng: May the grace of the Lord Jesus Christ be with your spirit.
local: Dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi Krisi wʋ́ pa abam yu-yoŋo.

eng: In the past, God spoke through the prophets to our ancestors in many times and many ways.
local: Faŋa faŋa tɩn, Wɛ dɛɛn ŋɔɔnɩ dɩ dɩbam nabaara bam kuni zanzan mʋ. DƖ dɛɛn yǝni DƖ pa DƖ nijoŋnǝ bam mʋ ŋɔɔnɩ wǝǝnu dwi tǝri tǝri dɩ ba.

eng: In these final days, though, he spoke to us through a Son. God made his Son the heir of everything and created the world through him.
local: Kʋ daarɩ lele kʋntʋ na yɩ lʋgʋ baŋa kweelim maŋa tɩn, Wɛ laan pɛ DƖ Bu mʋ ba o ŋɔɔnɩ DƖ taanɩ dɩ dɩbam. Wɛ dɛ wʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ DƖ kɩ lʋgʋ baŋa dɩ wɛyuu wǝǝnu maama, yɩ DƖ pa-o ni sɩ o ba o taa te wǝǝnu maama.

eng: The Son is the light of Gods glory and the imprint of Gods being. He maintains everything with his powerful message. After he carried out the cleansing of people from their sins, he sat down at the right side of the highest majesty.
local: Wɛ Bu wʋm mʋ jɩgɩ pooni dɩlʋ na brɩ Wɛ paarɩ-zulǝ yam na yɩ te tɩn. O maa jɩgɩ o Ko Wɛ nyɩnyʋgʋ fasɩ. O ni-taanɩ maa jɩgɩ dam yɩ dɩ paɩ wǝǝnu maama fɔgɩ tɩ zɩga. O ma ba o saarɩ nɔɔna lwarɩm o fɔgɩ-ba o pa ba ji lanyɩranɩ, yɩ o laan joori o di Baŋa-Wɛ te o vu o jǝni DƖ jazɩm nɩ.

eng: And the Son became so much greater than the other messengers, such as angels, that he received a more important title than theirs.
local: Kʋntʋ tɩn, Baŋa-Wɛ Bu dwe Wɛ malɛsɩ sɩm, dɩ Wɛ na pɛ-o yɩrɩ dɩlʋ na daga dɩ dwe sɩntʋ na jɩgɩ yɩra yalʋ tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: After all, when did God ever say to any of the angels: You are my Son. Today I have become your Father? Or, even, I will be his Father, and he will be my Son? .
local: Kʋ na yɩ malɛsɩ sɩm, Wɛ wʋ fɔgɩ DƖ ta dɩ malɛka DƖ wɩ: «Nmʋ mʋ yɩ amʋ Bu, yɩ zɩm amʋ dɩ jigi nmʋ Ko.» Wɛ nan wʋ tagɩ malɛka kalʋkalʋ taanɩ DƖ wɩ: «Amʋ wʋ́ ta yɩ ka Ko, sɩ ka dɩ taa yɩ amʋ bu.».

eng: But then, when he brought his firstborn into the world, he said, All of Gods angels must worship him. .
local: Kʋ daarɩ maŋa kalʋ Wɛ na lagɩ DƖ tʋŋɩ DƖ Bu-dʋa kam sɩ o ba lʋgʋ baŋa tɩn, DƖ tagɩ DƖ wɩ: «Malɛsɩ sɩm maama maŋɩ sɩ sɩ kuni doonǝ mʋ sɩ zul-o.».

eng: He talks about the angels: Hes the one who uses the spirits for his messengers and who uses flames of fire as ministers. .
local: Kʋ nan na yɩ malɛsɩ sɩm, Wɛ tagɩ sɩ taanɩ DƖ wɩ: Sɩ yɩ dɩntʋ tɩntʋŋna mʋ, yɩ DƖ pa sɩ nyɩ nɩ viu dɩ min-vwɩ te, sɩ sɩ taa tʋŋɩ sɩ pa-DƖ.

eng: But he says to his Son, God, your throne is forever and your kingdoms scepter is a rod of justice. .
local: Kʋ daarɩ kʋ na yɩ Wɛ Bu wʋm, DƖ tagɩ o taanɩ DƖ wɩ: «Nmʋ yɩ Wɛ mʋ, n paarɩ dɩm wʋ́ ta wʋra sɩ kʋ taa ve maŋa kalʋ na ba ti tɩn. Nmʋ wʋ́ ta n te n nɔɔna bam dɩ cɩga.

eng: You loved righteousness and hated lawless behavior. That is why God, your God, has anointed you more than your companions with the oil of joy. .
local: Nmʋ soe cɩga cwǝŋǝ, yɩ n daarɩ n culi balɔrɔ. Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ n Ko Baŋa-Wɛ pɛ nmʋ na wʋpolo lanyɩranɩ dɩ zulǝ n dwǝni balʋ maama na wʋra dɩ nmʋ tɩn.».

eng: And he says, You, Lord, laid the earths foundations in the beginning, and the heavens are made by your hands. .
local: Wɛ ta tagɩ DƖ wɩ: «Nmʋ wʋlʋ na yɩ wǝǝnu maama Yuutu tɩn mʋ kɩ lʋgʋ baŋa pulim nɩ, yɩ n ta kwǝri n ma n jɩa n kɩ wɛyuu wǝǝnu maama.

eng: They will pass away, but you remain. They will all wear out like old clothes. .
local: Wǝǝnu tɩm kʋntʋ maama wʋ́ ba tɩ cɔgɩ, kʋ daarɩ nmʋ nan wʋra mʋ maŋa maama. Wǝǝnu tɩm kʋntʋ maama wʋ́ ba tɩ doori nɩ gɔrɔ na yǝni kʋ doori te tɩn.

eng: You will fold them up like a coat. They will be changed like a person changes clothes, but you stay the same, and the years of your life wont come to an end. .
local: Tɩ wʋ́ ba tɩ lɩɩrɩ, yɩ n kukuli-tɩ n tiŋi nɩ n na kukuli gwar-doŋo n tiŋi yɩ n daarɩ n lǝni gwar-dʋŋʋ n zʋ te tɩn. Nmʋ nan ta wʋ́ ta n yɩ nɩ n na maŋɩ n yɩ te tɩn mʋ. N ŋwɩa bá fɔgɩ ka ti.».

eng: When has he ever said to any of the angels, Sit at my right side until I put your enemies under your feet like a footstool? .
local: Wɛ dɛɛn wʋ fɔgɩ DƖ ta dɩ DƖ malɛsɩ sɩm kalʋkalʋ DƖ wɩ: «Ba n jǝni a jazɩm nɩ, sɩ a kɩ n dʋna maama n nɛ kuri nɩ sɩ n nɔ-ba nɩ tɩga te.» Kʋ yɩ DƖ Bu wʋm yɩranɩ mʋ DƖ tagɩ kʋntʋ.

eng: Arent all the angels ministering spirits who are sent to serve those who are going to inherit salvation?.
local: Malɛsɩ sɩm laŋa nan yɩ ta mʋ? Sɩ nyɩ nɩ jwǝǝru mʋ te, sɩ ba jɩgɩ yɩra nɩ nabiinǝ te. Sɩntʋ yɩ sɩlʋ na tʋŋɩ sɩ pa Wɛ tɩn mʋ. Wɛ maa yǝni DƖ tʋŋɩ-sɩ, yɩ sɩ ve sɩ zǝni balʋ na wʋ́ na vrɩm tɩn.

eng: This is why its necessary for us to pay more attention to what we have heard, or else we may drift away from it.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ kʋ maŋɩ sɩ dɩ́ kwaanɩ dɩ́ taá jɩgɩ Wɛ kwǝrǝ kalʋ dɩ́ na ni tɩn lanyɩranɩ, sɩ dɩ́ yɩ ywǝri Wɛ cwǝŋǝ kam wʋnɩ.

eng: If the message that was spoken by angels was reliable, and every offense and act of disobedience received an appropriate consequence.
local: Wɛ na tɔgɩ DƖ malɛsɩ sɩm jɩŋa DƖ pa dɩ́ nabaara bam kwǝrǝ kalʋ tɩn jɩgɩ kuri lanyɩranɩ. Nɔɔnʋ na wʋ sɛ-ka yɩ o na cɔgɩ DƖ niǝ yam, kʋntʋ tu maŋɩ sɩ o na cam mʋ kʋ maŋɩ dɩ o na kɩ te tɩn.

eng: how will we escape if we ignore such a great salvation? It was first announced through the Lord, and then it was confirmed by those who heard him.
local: Kʋ laan nan na yɩ dɩbam balʋ Wɛ na dɛ DƖ Bu wʋm ŋwaanɩ DƖ pa dɩ́ lwarɩ DƖ kwǝrǝ kam tɩn, dɩ́ yigǝ na tǝrǝ dɩ o vrɩm dɩm kʋntʋ dɩ na dwe malɛsɩ sɩm na brɩ kʋlʋ tɩn, dɩ́ wʋ́ wanɩ dɩ́ lu na? Dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi mʋ dɛ yigǝ o ŋɔɔnɩ Wɛ vrɩm dɩm kʋntʋ taanɩ o brɩ nɔɔna. Balʋ na ni-dɩ kʋntʋ tɩn laan ma daarɩ ba ta ba brɩ dɩbam nɩ kʋ yɩ cɩga mʋ.

eng: God also vouched for their message with signs, amazing things, various miracles, and gifts from the Holy Spirit, which were handed out the way he wanted.
local: Wɛ tɩtɩ dɩ ma brɩ nɩ kʋ yɩ cɩga, dɩ DƖ na pɛ ba kɩ wo-kɩnkagɩla dwi tǝri tǝri dɩ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ na brɩ DƖ dam tɩn. DƖ ma daarɩ DƖ pa ba maama DƖ Joro kʋm dam, sɩ ba ma tʋŋɩ te dɩ te DƖ wʋbʋŋa na lagɩ tɩn.

eng: God didnt put the world that is coming under the angels control.
local: Lʋ-dʋŋʋ kʋlʋ na maa bɩɩnɩ yɩ dɩ́ tɛ kʋ taanɩ tɩn, kʋ daɩ nɩ malɛsɩ sɩm mʋ Wɛ pɛ dam sɩ sɩ taa te-kʋ.

eng: Instead, someone declared somewhere, What is humanity that you think about them? Or what are human beings that you care about them? .
local: Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm wʋnɩ nɔɔnʋ wʋdoŋ tagɩ o wɩ: «Nabiinu yɩ bɛɛ mʋ, yɩ nmʋ Baŋa-Wɛ guli o gulǝ? Nabiinu bu yɩ bɛɛ mʋ, yɩ nmʋ nii o baŋa nɩ kʋntʋ?.

eng: For a while you made them lower than angels. You crowned human beings with glory and honor. .
local: Nmʋ pɛ o ba maɩ dɩ malɛsɩ sɩm maŋa fɩnfɩɩn wʋnɩ mʋ, yɩ n laan pa o di paarɩ yɩ o na zulǝ.

eng: You put everything under their control. When he puts everything under their control, he doesnt leave anything out of control. But right now, we dont see everything under their control yet.
local: N ma n daarɩ n kɩ wǝǝnu maama o nɛ kuri nɩ.» Kʋ na tagɩ kʋ wɩ, «Wɛ kɩ wǝǝnu maama o dam kuri nɩ» tɩn, kʋ lagɩ kʋ ta nɩ kʋlʋkʋlʋ tǝrǝ o na ba te-kʋ. Kʋ nan yɩ cɩga mʋ nɩ, lele kʋntʋ dɩ́ daa ta wʋ nɛ nɩ wǝǝnu maama wʋ nabiinǝ dam kuri nɩ.

eng: However, we do see the one who was made lower in order than the angels for a little while—its Jesus! Hes the one who is now crowned with glory and honor because of the suffering of his death. He suffered death so that he could taste death for everyone through Gods grace.
local: Dɩ́ nan ye nɩ, kʋ yɩ Zezi mʋ Wɛ pɛ o tu o tɩtɩ o wʋ yi malɛsɩ sɩm maŋa fɩnfɩɩn wʋnɩ mʋ, yɩ o laan ba o na paarɩ-zulǝ dɩ tiǝ, o na sɛ o yaarɩ o tɩ tɩn ŋwaanɩ. Kʋntʋ mʋ Wɛ tɔgɩ DƖ zaanɩ dɩm ŋwaanɩ DƖ pa Zezi lǝni nabiinǝ maama yuu nɩ o tɩ ba vrɩm ŋwaanɩ.

eng: It was appropriate for God, for whom and through whom everything exists, to use experiences of suffering to make perfect the pioneer of salvation. This salvation belongs to many sons and daughters whom hes leading to glory.
local: Kʋ maŋɩ dɩ Wɛ dɩlʋ na kɩ woŋo maama DƖ tɩtɩ ŋwaanɩ tɩn wʋbʋŋa mʋ, sɩ DƖ pa Zezi na yaara, sɩ o laan wanɩ o vrɩ nabiinǝ zanzan sɩ ba ji Wɛ biǝ, sɩ ba daarɩ ba na paarɩ-zulǝ. Kʋ yɩ Zezi mʋ paɩ nɔɔna na vrɩm Wɛ tee nɩ.

eng: This is because the one who makes people holy and the people who are being made holy all come from one source. That is why Jesus isnt ashamed to call them brothers and sisters when he says.
local: Zezi ta mʋ yɩ wʋlʋ na paɩ nabiinǝ jɩgɩ wʋ-poŋo Wɛ yigǝ nɩ tɩn. Wʋntʋ dɩ o na pɛ balʋ maama jɩgɩ wʋ-poŋo tɩn yɩ ko dɩdʋa biǝ mʋ. Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ o bǝ-ba nɩ o ko-biǝ, yɩ kʋ ba jɩgɩ cavɩɩra dɩd-o.

eng: I will publicly announce your name to my brothers and sisters. I will praise you in the middle of the assembly. .
local: Mʋ kʋ kuri o tagɩ dɩ Wɛ o wɩ: «Amʋ wʋ́ pa nmʋ yɩrɩ zaŋɩ a ko-biǝ bam tɩtarɩ nɩ, yɩ a zɩgɩ ba wʋnɩ a leeni a zuli nmʋ.».

eng: He also says, I will rely on him. And also, Here I am with the children whom God has given to me. .
local: O daa ta maa wɩ: «Amʋ wʋ́ kwe a wʋ maama a pa Wɛ.» O ma daa ta ta o wɩ: «Nii-na amʋ dɩ biǝ balʋ Wɛ na kɩ amʋ jɩŋa nɩ tɩn.».

eng: Therefore, since the children share in flesh and blood, he also shared the same things in the same way. He did this to destroy the one who holds the power over death—the devil—by dying.
local: Balʋ nan na yɩ Wɛ biǝ tɩn yɩ nabiinǝ mʋ, yɩ ba jɩgɩ yɩra dɩ jana. Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ Zezi dɩ dɛɛn tɔgɩ o ji nabiinu, sɩ o wanɩ o tɔgɩ o tʋʋnɩ dɩm ŋwaanɩ o cɔgɩ wʋlʋ na paɩ tʋʋnɩ jaanɩ nɔɔna tɩn. Wʋntʋ mʋ yɩ sʋtaanɩ.

eng: He set free those who were held in slavery their entire lives by their fear of death.
local: Zezi na wanɩ tʋʋnɩ kʋntʋ tɩn, kʋ pɛ o wanɩ o vrɩ balʋ na fʋna dɩ tʋʋnɩ tɩn o yagɩ. Bantʋ ŋwɩa kam maama wʋnɩ ba yɩ nɩ gambɛ mʋ te, ba na kwarɩ tʋʋnɩ tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: Of course, he isnt trying to help angels, but rather hes helping Abrahams descendants.
local: Dɩ́ laan nan lwarɩ nɩ kʋ daɩ malɛsɩ sɩm mʋ o tu sɩ o zǝni. O tu sɩ o zǝni Abraham dwi tiinǝ bam mʋ.

eng: Therefore, he had to be made like his brothers and sisters in every way. This was so that he could become a merciful and faithful high priest in things relating to God, in order to wipe away the sins of the people.
local: Mʋ kʋ kuri o jigi nabiinu yɩ o sɩɩnɩ o nyɩ dɩ o ko-biǝ bam woŋo maama wʋnɩ. Kʋntʋ mʋ pɛ-o cwǝŋǝ, sɩ o taa yɩ Wɛ kaanɩm yuutu wʋlʋ na jɩgɩ ba ŋwaŋa lanyɩranɩ yɩ o tʋŋɩ o pa Wɛ dɩ cɩga ba ŋwaanɩ tɩn. Kʋntʋ mʋ pɛ o waɩ o saarɩ ba lwarɩm yɩ o pa ba fɔgɩ dɩ Wɛ.

eng: Hes able to help those who are being tempted, since he himself experienced suffering when he was tempted.
local: Kʋntʋ, Zezi tɩtɩ na nɛ maŋɩm dɩ yaara tɩn, o laan wʋ́ wanɩ o zǝni balʋ na wʋ yaara dɩ maŋɩm wʋnɩ tɩn sɩ ba taa jɩgɩ pu-dɩa.

eng: Therefore, brothers and sisters who are partners in the heavenly calling, think about Jesus, the apostle and high priest of our confession.
local: A ko-biǝ-ba, abam yɩ Wɛ nɔɔna mʋ. DƖ ma bǝŋi abam sɩ á tɔgɩ á na ywǝǝni DƖ sɔŋɔ nɩ. Nan lwarɩ-na nɩ Zezi mʋ yɩ wʋlʋ Wɛ na tʋŋɩ, sɩ o ba o ji DƖ kaanɩm yuutu dɩbam Wɛ cwǝŋǝ tɔgɩm dɩm ŋwaanɩ.

eng: Jesus was faithful to the one who appointed him just like Moses was faithful in Gods house.
local: Wɛ mʋ pɛ-o tɩtʋŋɩ dɩm kʋntʋ. O maa tʋŋɩ o pa Wɛ dɩ cɩga. Kʋ nan yɩ bɩdwɩ mʋ dɩ Moyisi dɩ dɛɛn na nii Wɛ nɔɔna bam baŋa nɩ dɩ cɩga te tɩn.

eng: But he deserves greater glory than Moses in the same way that the builder of the house deserves more honor than the house itself.
local: Zezi nan sɩɩnɩ o maŋɩ sɩ o na zulǝ o dwǝni Moyisi, bɛŋwaanɩ nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ na lɔgɩ sɔŋɔ tɩn mʋ na zulǝ o dwe sɔŋɔ kʋm tɩtɩ.

eng: Every house is built by someone, but God is the builder of everything.
local: Sɔŋɔ nan tǝrǝ yɩ kʋ daɩ nɔɔnʋ mʋ lɔgɩ-kʋ. Wɛ nan mʋ yɩ wʋlʋ na kɩ woŋo maama tɩn.

eng: Moses was faithful in all Gods house as a servant in order to affirm the things that would be spoken later.
local: Moyisi dɛɛn yɩ tɩntʋŋnʋ mʋ, yɩ o tʋŋɩ dɩ cɩga Wɛ nɔɔna bam ŋwaanɩ. O ma da yigǝ o brɩ-ba Wɛ cɩga kalʋ na wʋ́ ba ka lwarɩ jaja tɩn.

eng: But Jesus was faithful over Gods house as a Son. We are his house if we hold on to the confidence and the pride that our hope gives us.
local: Kʋ daarɩ Zezi Krisi mʋ yɩ sɔŋɔ kʋm tɩtɩ bu cɩga cɩga, yɩ o te sɔŋɔ kʋm. Dɩbam mʋ yɩ sɔŋɔ kʋm kʋntʋ, dɩ dɩ́ na zɩgɩ kǝŋkǝŋ dɩ pu-dɩa yɩ dɩ́ brɩ dɩ wʋpolo nɩ dɩ́ jɩgɩ tɩɩna Wɛ tee nɩ.

eng: So, as the Holy Spirit says, Today, if you hear his voice, .
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ sɛ-na Wɛ Joro kʋm na tagɩ te kʋ wɩ: «Abam zɩm na ni Wɛ kwǝrǝ kam.

eng: dont have stubborn hearts as they did in the rebellion, on the day when they tested me in the desert. .
local: á yɩ zaŋɩ á digili á bɩcara, nɩ á nabaara bam dɛɛn na vɩn Wɛ ni, yɩ ba kwǝri ba maŋɩ-DƖ ba nii te maŋa kalʋ ba na wʋ kagʋa kam wʋnɩ tɩn.».

eng: That is where your ancestors challenged and tested me, though they had seen my work for forty years. .
local: Wɛ maa wɩ: «Abam nabaara bam dɛɛn nɛ amʋ na kɩ kʋlʋ maama dɩ ba bɩna fiinna tɩn, yɩ ba daa ta tiini ba kwaanɩ ba maŋɩ amʋ sɩ ba nii.

eng: So I was angry with them. I said, Their hearts always go off course, and they dont know my ways. .
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ amʋ banɩ zaŋɩ dɩ nɔɔna bam kʋntʋ, yɩ a ta a wɩ: ‹Kʋ yɩ ba paalɩ ba ywǝri mʋ maŋa maama, yɩ ba vɩn sɩ ba tɔgɩ amʋ cwe sɩm.›.

eng: Because of my anger I swore: They will never enter my rest! .
local: Amʋ ban-zɔŋɔ kʋm ma pa a ta a du dɩ ba a wɩ: ‹Amʋ brɩ a bá pa-ba cwǝŋǝ sɩ ba zʋ amʋ woro kʋm wʋ ba na siun.› ».

eng: Watch out, brothers and sisters, so that none of you have an evil, unfaithful heart that abandons the living God.
local: A ko-biǝ-ba, cʋ-na á tɩtɩ sɩ abam wʋlʋwʋlʋ yɩ taá jɩgɩ wʋbʋŋ-lwaanʋ o bɩcarɩ nɩ, sɩ kʋ pa o yɩ kɩ o wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Ŋwɩa Tu Wɛ, sɩ o daarɩ o yagɩ Wɛ cwǝŋǝ tɔgɩm.

eng: Instead, encourage each other every day, as long as its called today, so that none of you become insensitive to God because of sins deception.
local: Nan taá zǝni-na daanɩ maŋa maama, sɩ kʋ pa á taá jɩgɩ pu-dɩa, nɩ Wɛ kwǝrǝ kam ta na ŋɔɔnɩ dɩ dɩbam zɩm te tɩn, sɩ abam wʋlʋwʋlʋ yɩ pa lwarɩm gan-o sɩ o pa o bɩcarɩ digili dɩ Wɛ.

eng: We are partners with Christ, but only if we hold on to the confidence we had in the beginning until the end.
local: Dɩbam nan tɔgɩ dɩ Zezi Krisi dɩ́ ji Wɛ biǝ mʋ, dɩ dɩ́ na zɩgɩ kǝŋkǝŋ, nɩ dɩ́ na puli dɩ́ kɩ dɩ́ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ te tɩn, sɩ kʋ vu kʋ yi kweelim.

eng: When it says, Today, if you hear his voice, dont have stubborn hearts as they did in the rebellion. .
local: Kʋ yɩ nɩ Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm na tagɩ te kʋ wɩ: «Abam zɩm na ni Wɛ kwǝrǝ kam, á yɩ zaŋɩ á digili á bɩcara, nɩ á nabaara bam dɛɛn na vɩn Wɛ ni te tɩn.».

eng: Who was it who rebelled when they heard his voice? Wasnt it all of those who were brought out of Egypt by Moses?.
local: Balʋ dɛɛn na ni Wɛ kwǝrǝ kam yɩ ba vɩn DƖ ni tɩn yɩ bra mʋ? Ba yɩ balʋ maama Moyisi dɛɛn na tɔgɩ ba yigǝ o ja-ba o nuŋi Ezipi tɩʋ kʋm wʋnɩ tɩn mʋ.

eng: And with whom was God angry for forty years? Wasnt it with the ones who sinned, whose bodies fell in the desert?.
local: Wɛ banɩ dɛɛn zaŋɩ dɩ bra mʋ bɩna fiinna tɩn? Kʋ yɩ nɔɔna balʋ na kɩ lwarɩm kagʋa kam wʋnɩ yɩ Wɛ pa ba tɩ da tɩn mʋ.

eng: And against whom did he swear that they would never enter his rest, if not against the ones who were disobedient?.
local: Wɛ na dugi DƖ wɩ, dɩntʋ brɩ DƖ bá pa-ba cwǝŋǝ sɩ ba zʋ DƖ woro kʋm wʋ ba na siun tɩn, kʋ yɩ bra mʋ DƖ tɛa? Kʋ yɩ balʋ na wʋ sɛ DƖ ni tɩn mʋ.

eng: We see that they couldnt enter because of their lack of faith.
local: Kʋntʋ mʋ pɛ dɩ́ lwarɩ nɩ, Wɛ na wʋ pɛ-ba cwǝŋǝ sɩ ba zʋ DƖ woro kʋm wʋ tɩn, kʋ yɩ ba na wʋ kɩ ba wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ DƖ tɩn ŋwaanɩ mʋ.

eng: Therefore, since the promise that we can enter into rest is still open, lets be careful so that none of you will appear to miss it.
local: Wɛ na goni DƖ ni sɩ DƖ pa nɔɔna zʋ DƖ woro kʋm wʋ ba na siun tɩn daa ta wʋra. Dɩbam nan maŋɩ sɩ dɩ́ taá yɩrɩ dɩ́ tɩtɩ mʋ, sɩ nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ yɩ zaŋɩ o ba o darɩ nɩ o wʋ zʋ Wɛ woro kʋm kʋntʋ wʋ.

eng: We also had the good news preached to us, just as the Israelites did. However, the message they heard didnt help them because they werent united in faith with the ones who listened to it.
local: Dɩbam maŋɩ dɩ́ ni Wɛ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam, nɩnɛɛnɩ dɩ́ nabaara bam dɛɛn dɩ na ni-ka te tɩn. Bantʋ nan na ni-ka tɩn, ba wʋ pɛ ka ja kuri dɩ ba, bɛŋwaanɩ ba wʋ kɩ ba wʋ-dɩdʋa sɩ ba tɔgɩ Wɛ na tagɩ kʋlʋ tɩn.

eng: We who have faith are entering the rest. As God said, And because of my anger I swore: They will never enter into my rest! And yet Gods works were completed at the foundation of the world.
local: Dɩbam balʋ na kɩ dɩ́ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ tɩn mʋ wʋ́ ba dɩ́ na siun DƖ woro kʋm wʋnɩ. Bɛŋwaanɩ Wɛ tagɩ bantʋ taanɩ DƖ wɩ: «Amʋ ban-zɔŋɔ kʋm pɛ a ta a du dɩ ba a wɩ: ‹Amʋ brɩ a bá pa-ba cwǝŋǝ sɩ ba zʋ amʋ woro kʋm wʋ ba na siun.› » Wɛ na tagɩ kʋntʋ tɩn, kʋ daɩ nɩ DƖ ba jɩgɩ siun jǝgǝ mʋ ba ŋwaanɩ. Kʋ zɩgɩ maŋa kalʋ Wɛ na kɩ lʋgʋ baŋa yɩ DƖ kɩ DƖ tɩtʋŋa yam maama DƖ ti tɩn, mʋ DƖ daarɩ DƖ sin.

eng: Then somewhere he said this about the seventh day of creation: God rested on the seventh day from all his works. .
local: Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm tagɩ da yarpɛ dɛ dɩm taanɩ kʋ wɩ: «Da yarpɛ dɛ nɩ mʋ Wɛ sin dɩ DƖ tɩtʋŋa yam maama.».

eng: But again, in the passage above, God said, They will never enter my rest! .
local: Wɛ nan tagɩ DƖ siun kʋm taanɩ DƖ wɩ: «Amʋ brɩ a bá pa-ba cwǝŋǝ sɩ ba zʋ amʋ woro kʋm wʋ ba sin.».

eng: Therefore, its left open for some to enter it, and the ones who had the good news preached to them before didnt enter because of disobedience.
local: Kʋntʋ tɩn, dɩ́ nabaara balʋ na dɛ yigǝ ba ni Wɛ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam tɩn wʋ wanɩ ba zʋ DƖ woro kʋm wʋ ba sin, ba na vɩn DƖ ni tɩn ŋwaanɩ. Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ kʋ laan daarɩ sɩ nɔɔna badaara mʋ na cwǝŋǝ ba zʋ.

eng: Just as it says in the passage above, God designates a certain day as today, when he says through David much later, Today, if you hear his voice, dont have stubborn hearts. .
local: Mʋ kʋ kuri Wɛ daa ta tiŋi dɛ dɩdoŋ, kʋ na lagɩ kʋ ta nɩ zɩm, sɩ nɔɔna wanɩ ba zʋ DƖ woro kʋm wʋ ba sin. Kʋntʋ, bɩna zanzan na kɛ tɩn, Wɛ dɛɛn ta pɛ Davidi mʋ ta kʋlʋ dɩbam na maŋɩ dɩ́ ni tɩn o wɩ: «Abam zɩm na ni Wɛ kwǝrǝ kam, á yɩ zaŋɩ á digili á bɩcara.».

eng: If Joshua gave the Israelites rest, God wouldnt have spoken about another day later on.
local: Zozwe dɛɛn ya na sɩɩnɩ o ja dɩ́ nabaara bam o vu o zʋ Wɛ woro kʋm wʋ sɩ ba sin, Wɛ ya daa bá ŋɔɔnɩ siun dɛ dɩdoŋ taanɩ daga.

eng: So you see that a sabbath rest is left open for Gods people.
local: Kʋntʋ mʋ dɩ́ ye nɩ cwǝŋǝ daa ta wʋra zɩm, sɩ Wɛ nɔɔna na siun, nɩ DƖ tɩtɩ na sin da yarpɛ dɛ dɩm nɩ te tɩn.

eng: The one who entered Gods rest also rested from his works, just as God rested from his own.
local: Wʋlʋ maama na zʋ Wɛ woro kʋm wʋ tɩn, wʋntʋ wʋ́ sɩɩnɩ o na siun dɩ o tɩtʋŋa yam, nɩ Wɛ dɩ dɛɛn na sin dɩ DƖ tɩtʋŋa yam te tɩn.

eng: Therefore, lets make every effort to enter that rest so that no one will fall by following the same example of disobedience.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ kwaanɩ-na á pa dɩ́ zʋ Wɛ woro kʋm wʋ sɩ dɩ́ na siun. Nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ yɩ zaŋɩ o vɩn Wɛ ni sɩ o joori Wɛ kwaga nɩ, nɩ dɩ́ nabaara bam dɛɛn na kɩ te tɩn.

eng: because Gods word is living, active, and sharper than any two-edged sword. It penetrates to the point that it separates the soul from the spirit and the joints from the marrow. Its able to judge the hearts thoughts and intentions.
local: Wɛ taanɩ dɩm jɩgɩ ŋwɩa yɩ dɩ dana lanyɩranɩ. Dɩ jɩgɩ ni dɩ dwe sʋ-lɔŋɔ kʋlʋ na jɩgɩ niǝ yale tɩn. Dɩ maa waɩ dɩ zʋʋrɩ nɔɔnʋ wʋ dɩ pɔɔrɩ o joro dɩ o bɩcarɩ wǝǝnu maama daanɩ, yɩ dɩ daarɩ dɩ ye o swan dɩ o wʋbʋŋa maama na yɩ te tɩn.

eng: No creature is hidden from it, but rather everything is naked and exposed to the eyes of the one to whom we have to give an answer.
local: Kʋlʋkʋlʋ bá wanɩ kʋ sǝgi Wɛ yigǝ nɩ. Woŋo kʋlʋ maama na wʋra tɩn yɩ jaja mʋ DƖ yigǝ nɩ. Kʋ yɩ dɩntʋ mʋ dɩ́ maŋɩ sɩ dɩ́ ba dɩ́ zɩgɩ DƖ yigǝ nɩ dɩ́ ta kʋlʋ maama dɩ́ na kɩ tɩn.

eng: Also, lets hold on to the confession since we have a great high priest who passed through the heavens, who is Jesus, Gods Son.
local: Dɩbam nan jɩgɩ Wɛ kaanɩm yuutu o na yɩ kamunu o diini o vu o yi Wɛ-sɔŋɔ. Wʋm mʋ yɩ Wɛ Bu Zezi. Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ, pa-na dɩ́ sɛ Wɛ cwǝŋǝ tɔgɩm lanyɩranɩ dɩ́ zɩgɩ kǝŋkǝŋ.

eng: because we dont have a high priest who cant sympathize with our weaknesses but instead one who was tempted in every way that we are, except without sin.
