local: Wɛ kaanɩm yuutu wʋm kʋntʋ nan daɩ wʋlʋ na ba jɩgɩ dɩbam balʋ na bwǝnǝ tɩn ŋwaŋa. O tɩtɩ dɩ nan nɛ yaara dɩ maŋɩm woŋo maama wʋnɩ, nɩ dɩbam dɩ na nɛ maŋɩm te tɩn. Nan dɩ kʋntʋ dɩ, o ta wʋ kɩ lwarɩm.

eng: Finally, lets draw near to the throne of favor with confidence so that we can receive mercy and find grace when we need help.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ, pa-na dɩ́ taá jɩgɩ baarɩ sɩ dɩ́ wanɩ dɩ́ yi Dam-fɔrɔ Tu Wɛ jǝŋǝ je, sɩ dɩ́ joŋi DƖ zaanɩ dɩm. Kʋntʋ mʋ Wɛ wʋ́ duri dɩ́ ŋwaŋa yɩ DƖ pa dɩbam zaanɩ, sɩ kʋ wanɩ kʋ zǝni dɩbam maŋa kalʋ dɩ́ na lagɩ tɩn.

eng: Every high priest is taken from the people and put in charge of things that relate to God for their sake, in order to offer gifts and sacrifices for sins.
local: Wɛ kaanɩm yuutu maama yɩ ba yǝni ba lɩ-o o donnǝ nabiinǝ wʋnɩ mʋ, sɩ o taa tʋŋɩ o pa Wɛ ba ŋwaanɩ. O nan maŋɩ sɩ o taa maɩ pɛɛra dɩ vara mʋ o kaanɩ Baŋa-Wɛ, sɩ DƖ yagɩ ba lwarɩm DƖ ma cɛ-ba.

eng: The high priest is able to deal gently with the ignorant and those who are misled since he himself is prone to weakness.
local: O tɩtɩ dɩ nan na bwǝnǝ tɩn, o waɩ o jaanɩ o bɩcarɩ dɩ balʋ na yǝri Wɛ cɩga kam lanyɩranɩ yɩ ba tusi tɩn.

eng: Because of his weakness, he must offer sacrifices for his own sins as well as for the people.
local: O nan na bwǝnǝ kʋntʋ tɩn, kʋ fɩn mʋ sɩ o kaanɩ Baŋa-Wɛ o tɩtɩ lwarɩm ŋwaanɩ, dɩ nɔɔna bam dɩ lwarɩm ŋwaanɩ.

eng: No one takes this honor for themselves but takes it only when they are called by God, just like Aaron.
local: Nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ nan bá wanɩ o lɩ o tɩtɩ sɩ o taa yɩ Wɛ kaanɩm yuutu. Kʋ yɩ Wɛ mʋ wʋ́ kur-o, nɩnɛɛnɩ DƖ dɛɛn na puli DƖ kuri Aarɔn te tɩn.

eng: In the same way Christ also didnt promote himself to become high priest. Instead, it was the one who said to him, You are my Son. Today I have become your Father .
local: Kʋ nan yɩ bɩdwɩ mʋ dɩ Zezi Krisi dɩ na yɩ Wɛ kaanɩm yuutu te tɩn. Kʋ daɩ nɩ wʋm mʋ beeri zulǝ yam kʋntʋ o pa o tɩtɩ. Wɛ nan mʋ tagɩ dɩd-o DƖ wɩ: «Nmʋ mʋ yɩ amʋ Bu, yɩ zɩm amʋ dɩ jigi nmʋ Ko.».

eng: as he also says in another place, You are a priest forever, according to the order of Melchizedek. .
local: Wɛ daa ta tagɩ DƖ tɔnɔ kʋm wʋnɩ jǝgǝ kadoŋ nɩ DƖ wɩ: «Nmʋ wʋ́ ta n yɩ amʋ kaanɩm tu sɩ kʋ taa ve maŋa kalʋ na ba ti tɩn, nɩ Mɛlɩkisedɛkɩ dɛɛn na yɩ te tɩn.».

eng: During his days on earth, Christ offered prayers and requests with loud cries and tears as his sacrifices to the one who was able to save him from death. He was heard because of his godly devotion.
local: Zezi na wʋ lʋgʋ baŋa nɩ maŋa kalʋ tɩn, o tiini o loori Wɛ dɩ baarɩ yɩ o yi-na nuŋǝ, o na ye nɩ Wɛ wʋ́ wanɩ DƖ joŋ-o tʋʋnɩ wʋnɩ tɩn ŋwaanɩ. Wɛ ma sɛ o loro kʋm, o na tu o tɩtɩ yɩ o sɛ-DƖ lanyɩranɩ tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: Although he was a Son, he learned obedience from what he suffered.
local: Nan dɩ o na maŋɩ o yɩ Wɛ Bu tɩn dɩ, o na yaarɩ te tɩn mʋ pɛ o lwarɩ Wɛ ni sɛɛm na yɩ te tɩn.

eng: After he had been made perfect, he became the source of eternal salvation for everyone who obeys him.
local: O nan na kɩ kʋlʋ maama Wɛ na lagɩ o ti tɩn, o laan waɩ o vrɩ balʋ maama na sɛ o ni tɩn o pa ba na ŋwɩa kalʋ na ba ti tɩn Wɛ tee nɩ.

eng: He was appointed by God to be a high priest according to the order of Melchizedek.
local: Wɛ ma brɩ nɩ o sɩɩnɩ o yɩ DƖ kaanɩm yuutu, nɩ Mɛlɩkisedɛkɩ dɛɛn na yɩ te tɩn.

eng: We have a lot to say about this topic, and its difficult to explain, because you have been lazy and you havent been listening.
local: Amʋ ya jɩgɩ wǝǝnu zanzan mʋ sɩ a ta a brɩ abam kʋntʋ laŋa nɩ, kʋ nan tiini kʋ cana sɩ a pa á ni kʋ kuri, bɛŋwaanɩ abam laan jɩgɩ yawɔrɔ mʋ yɩ á bá wanɩ á ni kʋ kuri lɩla.

eng: Although you should have been teachers by now, you need someone to teach you an introduction to the basics about Gods message. You have come to the place where you need milk instead of solid food.
local: Kʋ na daɩ kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ, kantʋ maŋa kam nɩ abam laan ya wʋ́ ta yɩ balʋ na maŋɩ sɩ á taá jɩgɩ Wɛ nɔɔna á zaasɩ tɩn mʋ. Kʋ nan na yɩ cɩga, kʋ fɩn mʋ sɩ nɔɔna mʋ joori ba brɩ abam Wɛ taanɩ dɩm dayigǝ wo-mwaalʋ tɩm. Abam nyɩ dɩ biǝ balʋ ta na wʋ yi sɩ ba di wʋdiu kʋlʋ na duunǝ tɩn, yɩ á maŋɩ sɩ á taá ŋɔgɩ yɩla mʋ nɩ bu-balɛ te.

eng: Everyone who lives on milk is not used to the word of righteousness, because they are babies.
local: Balʋ na jɩgɩ bu-balɛ wʋbʋŋa kʋntʋ tɩn, kʋ brɩ nɩ ba ta yǝri kʋlʋ na maŋɩ dɩ kʋlʋ na wʋ maŋɩ tɩn daanɩ.

eng: But solid food is for the mature, whose senses are trained by practice to distinguish between good and evil.
local: Kʋ daarɩ balʋ wʋbʋŋa na bɩgɩ dɩ Wɛ cɩga kam tɩn mʋ di wʋdiu kʋlʋ na duunǝ tɩn. Bantʋ mʋ yǝni ba tɔgɩ Wɛ cɩga kam, yɩ ba waɩ ba kuri wǝǝnu tɩlʋ na lana yɩ tɩ maŋɩ sɩ ba kɩ tɩn, ba daarɩ tɩlʋ na wʋ maŋɩ tɩn.

eng: So lets press on to maturity, by moving on from the basics about Christs word. Lets not lay a foundation of turning away from dead works, of faith in God.
local: Nan pa-na dɩ́ kɛ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ ba na maŋɩ ba da yigǝ ba brɩ abam Zezi Krisi cwǝŋǝ kam wʋnɩ tɩn, sɩ dɩ́ daarɩ dɩ́ zaasɩ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ na wʋ́ pa dɩ́ wʋbʋŋa bɩ Wɛ cɩga kam wʋnɩ tɩn. Abam daa wʋ maŋɩ sɩ á joori á puli Wɛ taanɩ dɩm zaasɩm, bɛŋwaanɩ á maŋɩ á zaasɩ á na wʋ́ lǝni á wʋ á yagɩ kǝm-balwaarʋ tɩlʋ na jɩgɩ abam tɩ ve tʋʋnɩ wʋnɩ tɩn, dɩ á na wʋ́ kɩ á wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ te tɩn.

eng: of teaching about ritual ways to wash with water, laying on of hands, the resurrection from the dead, and eternal judgment—all over again.
local: Á maŋɩ á zaasɩ ba na wʋ́ miisi nɔɔna na wʋnɩ te tɩn woŋo, kʋ wǝli dɩ ba na wʋ́ zi ba jɩa nɔɔna baŋa nɩ ba warɩ Wɛ ba ŋwaanɩ te tɩn, yɩ á kwǝri á zaasɩ twa na wʋ́ bi te tɩn, kʋ wǝli dɩ Wɛ na wʋ́ ba DƖ di nabiinǝ sarɩya DƖ ma kweeli te tɩn.

eng: Were going to press on, if God allows it.
local: Á nan pa-na dɩ́ gaalɩ wǝǝnu tɩm kʋntʋ dɩ́ kɛ, sɩ dɩ́ daarɩ dɩ́ kwaanɩ dɩ́ vu yigǝ, sɩ Wɛ wʋ́ zǝni dɩbam yɩ dɩ́ wanɩ dɩ́ vu yigǝ.

eng: Because its impossible to restore people to changed hearts and lives who turn away once they have seen the light, tasted the heavenly gift, become partners with the Holy Spirit.
local: Kʋ na yɩ balʋ na maŋɩ ba sɛ Wɛ cɩga kam tɩn, ba na paalɩ ba yagɩ Wɛ cwǝŋǝ tɔgɩm, nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ daa bá wanɩ o joori o dɩ-ba ka wʋnɩ. Bantʋ maŋɩ ba na Wɛ pooni dɩm, yɩ ba lwarɩ ŋwɩ-dʋŋa kalʋ Wɛ na pɛ tɩn na yɩ te tɩn. Ba maŋɩ ba na Wɛ Joro kʋm dam.

eng: and tasted Gods good word and the powers of the coming age.
local: Ba maŋɩ ba lwarɩ Wɛ taanɩ dɩm na ywǝmmǝ te tɩn, yɩ ba nɛ Wɛ paarɩ dɩlʋ na lagɩ dɩ ba tɩn dam na yɩ te tɩn.

eng: They are crucifying Gods Son all over again and exposing him to public shame.
local: Nɔɔna bantʋ dwi na yagɩ Wɛ cwǝŋǝ tɔgɩm, nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ daa bá wanɩ o pa ba lǝni ba wʋ ba daa ta tɔgɩ Wɛ, bɛŋwaanɩ kʋ nyɩ nɩnɛɛnɩ bam tɩtɩ mʋ joori ba pa Wɛ Bu Zezi tʋʋn-dagara kam yuu nɩ ba gʋ yɩ ba paɩ nɔɔna mwan-o te.

eng: The ground receives a blessing from God when it drinks up the rain that regularly comes and falls on it and yields a useful crop for those people for whom it is being farmed.
local: Kʋ nyɩ dɩ dʋa na nɩa lanyɩranɩ nɔɔnʋ kara nɩ te tɩn mʋ. Tɩga kam na nyɔgɩ dʋ-na bam yɩ ka daarɩ ka kɩ wʋdiiru lanyɩranɩ ka pa balʋ na dugi ka baŋa nɩ tɩn, Wɛ wʋ́ kɩ tɩga kam kʋntʋ lanyɩranɩ.

eng: But if it produces thorns and thistles, its useless and close to being cursed. It ends up being burned.
local: Kʋ daarɩ tɩga kam na nuŋi sabarɩ dɩ wo-kʋrrʋ yɩranɩ mʋ, kʋ brɩ nɩ ka yɩ kafɛ mʋ, yɩ fɩnfɩɩn na wǝli da Wɛ wʋ́ cɔgɩ-ka DƖ yagɩ, yɩ kʋ tiim nɩ baá zwɛ-ka dɩ mini mʋ.

eng: But we are convinced of better things in your case, brothers and sisters, even though we are talking this way—things that go together with salvation.
local: A badon-sonnu-ba, dɩbam na maŋɩ dɩ́ ŋɔɔnɩ kʋntʋ dɩ, dɩ́ jɩgɩ abam cɩga nɩ á tɔgɩ cwǝ-ŋʋŋa kalʋ na wʋ́ pa á na vrɩm tɩn.

eng: God isnt unjust so that he forgets your efforts and the love you have shown for his names sake when you served and continue to serve Gods holy people.
local: Wɛ yɩ cɩga tu mʋ. DƖ nan bá swe á na maŋɩ á tʋŋɩ tɩtʋŋ-ŋʋna yalʋ tɩn. DƖ ta bá swe á na soe-DƖ lanyɩranɩ yɩ á tʋŋɩ á wǝli DƖ nɔɔna bam kʋ ba kʋ yi zɩm maama tɩn.

eng: But we desperately want each of you to show the same effort to make your hope sure until the end.
local: Amʋ nan na tiini a lagɩ kʋlʋ tɩn mʋ yɩ sɩ abam maama kwaanɩ á tɔgɩ Wɛ lanyɩranɩ kʋ vu kʋ yi kweelim, sɩ á laan na kʋlʋ maama á na jɩgɩ tɩɩna sɩ á na Wɛ tee nɩ tɩn.

eng: This is so you wont be lazy but follow the example of the ones who inherit the promises through faith and patience.
local: Á nan yɩ pa yawɔrɔ zʋ abam. Á lwǝni-na balʋ na fɔgɩ ba zɩgɩ dɩ pu-dɩa yɩ ba jɩgɩ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ tɩn. Bantʋ laan mʋ wʋ́ ba ba joŋi wo-laarʋ tɩlʋ Wɛ na goni ni sɩ DƖ pa-ba tɩn.

eng: When God gave Abraham his promise, he swore by himself since he couldnt swear by anyone greater.
local: Wɛ dɛɛn na goni DƖ ni dɩm dɩ Abraham tɩn, kʋ yɩ DƖ dugi dɩ DƖ tɩtɩ mʋ, bɛŋwaanɩ woŋo daa tǝrǝ kʋ na dwe-DƖ sɩ DƖ du dɩ kʋ.

eng: He said, I will certainly bless you and multiply your descendants. .
local: Wɛ goni DƖ ni dɩm dɩd-o DƖ wɩ: «Amʋ wʋ́ kɩ nmʋ lanyɩranɩ, yɩ aá pa n dwi puli zanzan.».

eng: So Abraham obtained the promise by showing patience.
local: Wɛ na dugi kʋntʋ tɩn, Abraham dɛɛn ma vɔ pu-dɩa o cǝgi taan, yɩ o laan ba o na Wɛ na goni DƖ ni dɩm sɩ DƖ pa-o kʋlʋ tɩn.

eng: People pledge by something greater than themselves. A solemn pledge guarantees what they say and shuts down any argument.
local: Kʋ na yɩ nabiinǝ na yǝni ba du durǝ, baá ma kʋlʋ na dwe-ba tɩn yɩrɩ mʋ ba du, sɩ kʋ brɩ nɩ ba taanɩ dɩm yɩ cɩga, sɩ bʋbwɛa daa ta tǝrǝ.

eng: When God wanted to further demonstrate to the heirs of the promise that his purpose doesnt change, he guaranteed it with a solemn pledge.
local: Kʋ nan na yɩ Wɛ na goni DƖ ni dɩm dɩ balʋ tɩn, DƖ dɩ lagɩ sɩ ba lwarɩ lanyɩranɩ nɩ DƖ bá fɔgɩ DƖ yiri DƖ ni dɩm. Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ DƖ dugi durǝ DƖ wǝli dɩ DƖ ni-gonim dɩm.

eng: So these are two things that dont change, because its impossible for God to lie. He did this so that we, who have taken refuge in him, can be encouraged to grasp the hope that is lying in front of us.
local: Wɛ na ba fɔɛ vwan tɩn ŋwaanɩ, wǝǝnu tɩm kʋntʋ tɩle bá wanɩ tɩ lǝni. Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ dɩbam balʋ na kɩ dɩ́ tɩtɩ Wɛ jɩŋa nɩ tɩn wʋ́ tiini dɩ́ zɩgɩ kǝŋkǝŋ dɩ pu-dɩa, sɩ dɩ́ taá jɩgɩ tɩɩna nɩ dɩ́ wʋ́ na kʋlʋ Wɛ na tiŋi sɩ DƖ pa dɩbam tɩn.

eng: This hope, which is a safe and secure anchor for our whole being, enters the sanctuary behind the curtain.
local: Tɩɩna yam dɩ́ na jɩgɩ Wɛ tee nɩ kʋntʋ tɩn tiini ya dana, yɩ ya bá wanɩ ya cɔgɩ. Ya maa paɩ dɩ́ wʋbʋŋa tigi jǝgǝ dɩdʋa, yɩ ya paɩ dɩ́ yi Wɛ tɩtɩ jǝŋǝ je mɛ na cɩgɩ dɩ gɔrɔ sɩ nabiinǝ yɩ zʋ tɩn.

eng: Thats where Jesus went in advance and entered for us, since he became a high priest according to the order of Melchizedek.
local: Zezi nan mʋ maŋɩ o da yigǝ o zʋ jǝgǝ kam kʋntʋ dɩbam ŋwaanɩ. Wʋntʋ mʋ jigi Wɛ kaanɩm yuutu sɩ kʋ taa ve maŋa kalʋ na ba ti tɩn, nɩ Mɛlɩkisedɛkɩ dɛɛn na yɩ te tɩn.

eng: This Melchizedek, who was king of Salem and priest of the Most High God, met Abraham as he returned from the defeat of the kings, and Melchizedek blessed him.
local: A laan lagɩ a ŋɔɔnɩ Mɛlɩkisedɛkɩ woŋo mʋ a brɩ abam. Wʋntʋ dɛɛn yɩ Salɛm tiinǝ pɛ mʋ, yɩ o kwǝri o yɩ Yuutu Baŋa-Wɛ kaanɩm tu. Abraham na kɩ jara o wanɩ pwa yɩ o laan ma joori maŋa kalʋ tɩn, mʋ Mɛlɩkisedɛkɩ jeer-o cwǝŋǝ nɩ o sɔɔlɩ Wɛ o pa-o.

eng: Abraham gave a tenth of everything to him. His name means first king of righteousness, and then king of Salem, that is, king of peace.
local: Abraham laan ma kwe wǝǝnu tɩlʋ maama o na nɛ jara yam je nɩ tɩn o cɛ kuni fugǝ, o kwe kuni bɩdwɩ dɩm o pa Mɛlɩkisedɛkɩ. Mɛlɩkisedɛkɩ yɩrɩ dɩm kuri mʋ yɩ pɛ wʋlʋ na yɩ Cɩga Tu tɩn. Kʋ wǝli da, o na yɩ Salɛm pɛ tɩn, kʋ dɩ kuri mʋ yɩ Yazurǝ Pɛ.

eng: He is without father or mother or any family. He has no beginning or end of life, but hes like Gods Son and remains a priest for all time.
local: Dɩbam nan wʋ ni Mɛlɩkisedɛkɩ ko dɩ o nu ŋwa, yɩ dɩ́ yǝri o kuri na puli mɛ tɩn. Dɩ́ nan yǝri o lʋra dɛ dɩ o tʋʋnɩ maŋa. Kʋntʋ mʋ pɛ o nyɩ dɩ Wɛ Bu Zezi, yɩ o yɩ Wɛ kaanɩm tu sɩ kʋ taa ve maŋa kalʋ na ba ti tɩn.

eng: See how great Melchizedek was! Abraham, the father of the people, gave him a tenth of everything he captured.
local: Bʋŋɩ-na á nii Mɛlɩkisedɛkɩ dɛɛn na yɩ kamunu te tɩn. Dɩbam nabaarʋ Abraham dɛɛn ma cɛ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ o na nɛ jara yam je nɩ tɩn kuni fugǝ, yɩ o lɩ kuni bɩdwɩ o pa-o.

eng: The descendants of Levi who receive the office of priest have a commandment under the Law to collect a tenth of everything from the people who are their brothers and sisters, though they also are descended from Abraham.
local: Kʋ na yɩ balʋ na nuŋi Leevi dwi dɩm wʋnɩ yɩ ba yɩ Wɛ kaanɩm tiinǝ tɩn, Wɛ ni dɩm pɛ-ba cwǝŋǝ sɩ ba joŋi kuni kuri fugǝ wʋnɩ kuni bɩdwɩ dɩm ba donnǝ Yisɩrayɛlɩ tiinǝ bam tee nɩ woŋo maama wʋnɩ, yɩ bantʋ dɩ nan yɩ Abraham dwi tiinǝ mʋ.

eng: But Melchizedek, who isnt related to them, received a tenth of everything from Abraham and blessed the one who had received the promises.
local: Mɛlɩkisedɛkɩ nan wʋ nuŋi Leevi dwi dɩm wʋnɩ. Nan dɩ kʋntʋ dɩ, o ta joŋi o wǝǝnu tǝri Abraham tee nɩ. O ma daarɩ o sɔɔlɩ Wɛ o pa Abraham, yɩ Abraham nan ya mʋ yɩ wʋlʋ Wɛ na goni DƖ ni dɩd-o tɩn.

eng: Without question, the less important person is blessed by the more important person.
local: Kʋ nan ba jɩgɩ bʋbwɛa nɩ, nɔɔnʋ na sɔɔlɩ Wɛ o pa o doŋ, wʋntʋ mʋ yɩ kamunu o dwe o na sɔɔlɩ o pa wʋlʋ tɩn.

eng: In addition, in one case a tenth is received by people who die, and in the other case, the tenth is received by someone who continues to live, according to the record.
local: Wɛ kaanɩm tiinǝ balʋ na nuŋi Leevi dwi dɩm wʋnɩ tɩn dɛɛn yǝni ba joŋi ba wǝǝnu tǝri mʋ, bantʋ nan yɩ balʋ na tʋ tɩn mʋ. Kʋ daarɩ kʋ nan na yɩ Mɛlɩkisedɛkɩ, wʋntʋ ŋwɩ mʋ taan, nɩ Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm na tagɩ te tɩn.

eng: It could be said that Levi, who received a tenth, paid a tenth through Abraham.
local: Abraham na cɛ o wǝǝnu yɩ o pa Mɛlɩkisedɛkɩ o tǝri tɩn, ba ta wʋ lʋgɩ Leevi, yɩ o nan wʋ o nabaarʋ Abraham jana kam wʋnɩ. Leevi nan mʋ yɩ wʋlʋ dwi tiinǝ na jɩgɩ cwǝŋǝ sɩ ba joŋi ba wǝǝnu tǝri ba donnǝ Yisɩrayɛlɩ tiinǝ bam tee nɩ tɩn. Nan dɩ kʋntʋ dɩ, kʋ nyɩ dɩ Leevi tɔgɩ Abraham ŋwaanɩ mʋ o pa Mɛlɩkisedɛkɩ o tǝri.

eng: So if perfection came through the levitical office of priest , why was there still a need to speak about raising up another priest according to the order of Melchizedek rather than one according to the order of Aaron?.
local: Wɛ dɛɛn tɔgɩ Leevi dwi tiinǝ kaanɩm dɩm ŋwaanɩ mʋ DƖ pa DƖ cullu tɩm Yisɩrayɛlɩ tiinǝ. Bantʋ nan na yǝni ba kaanɩ Baŋa-Wɛ te tɩn ya na maŋɩ fasɩ, Wɛ ya daa bá kuri kaanɩm tu wʋdoŋ wʋlʋ na daɩ Leevi dwi tu tɩn. Wɛ nan kuri wʋlʋ na yɩ kaanɩm tu nɩ Mɛlɩkisedɛkɩ dɛɛn na yɩ te tɩn, yɩ o wʋ nuŋi Aarɔn dwi dɩm wʋnɩ.

eng: When the order of the priest changes, there has to be a change in the Law as well.
local: Kʋntʋ, Wɛ na lǝni DƖ kaanɩm tu dwi dɩdoŋ wʋnɩ tɩn, kʋ maŋɩ sɩ DƖ cullu tɩm dɩ tɔgɩ tɩ lǝni mʋ.

eng: The person we are talking about belongs to another tribe, and no one ever served at the altar from that tribe.
local: Taanɩ dɩntʋ maama nan brɩ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi Krisi woŋo mʋ. Wʋntʋ daɩ Leevi dwi tu. Dɩ́ ye nɩ ba lʋg-o Zuda dwi dɩm wʋnɩ mʋ. Dwi dɩm kʋntʋ wʋnɩ nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ nan wʋ fɔgɩ o ji Wɛ kaanɩm tu. Kʋ na yɩ Wɛ cullu tɩlʋ DƖ na kɩ Moyisi jɩŋa nɩ tɩn, tɩ wʋ pɛ Zuda dwi tiinǝ cwǝŋǝ sɩ ba ji Wɛ kaanɩm tiinǝ.

eng: And its even clearer if another priest appears who is like Melchizedek.
local: Dɩ́ nan sɩɩnɩ dɩ́ lwarɩ jaja nɩ Wɛ lǝni kaanɩm tu wʋdoŋ mʋ, o na nyɩ dɩ Mɛlɩkisedɛkɩ dɛɛn na yɩ te tɩn.

eng: He has become a priest by the power of a life that cant be destroyed, rather than a legal requirement about physical descent.
local: Zezi na jigi Wɛ kaanɩm tu te tɩn wʋ tɔgɩ dwi dɩm cullu tɩm ŋwaanɩ, kʋ tɔgɩ o ŋwɩa kalʋ tʋʋnɩ na ba jɩgɩ dam ka baŋa nɩ tɩn ŋwaanɩ mʋ.

eng: This is confirmed: You are a priest forever, according to the order of Melchizedek. .
local: Wɛ nan tagɩ o taanɩ DƖ wɩ: «Nmʋ mʋ wʋ́ ta n yɩ amʋ kaanɩm tu sɩ kʋ taa ve maŋa kalʋ na ba ti tɩn, nɩ Mɛlɩkisedɛkɩ dɛɛn na yɩ te tɩn.».

eng: On the one hand, an earlier command is set aside because it was weak and useless.
local: Kʋ ma brɩ nɩ Wɛ yagɩ cwǝ-doŋǝ kam mʋ, ka na bwǝnǝ yɩ ka ba zǝni nɔɔna tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: . On the other hand, a better hope is introduced, through which we draw near to God.
local: Cullu tɩlʋ Wɛ na kɩ Moyisi jɩŋa nɩ tɩn warɩ tɩ pa nɔɔna maŋɩ fasɩ Wɛ yigǝ nɩ. Kʋ daarɩ lele kʋntʋ, dɩ́ laan jɩgɩ tɩɩna lanyɩranɩ dɩ Wɛ na tiŋi cwǝ-laa kalʋ DƖ pa dɩbam sɩ dɩ́ ma wanɩ dɩ́ tɔgɩ-ka dɩ́ vu dɩ́ yi DƖ te tɩn.

eng: And this was not done without a solemn pledge! The others have become priests without a solemn pledge.
local: Wɛ nan dugi durǝ mʋ DƖ wǝli da. Leevi dwi tiinǝ bam dɛɛn nan na jigi Wɛ kaanɩm tiinǝ tɩn, DƖ wʋ dugi durǝ kam kʋntʋ doŋ dɩ ba.

eng: but this priest was affirmed with a solemn pledge by the one who said, The Lord has made a solemn pledge and will not change his mind: You are a priest forever. .
local: Kʋ daarɩ, Zezi nan na jigi Wɛ kaanɩm tu tɩn, Wɛ dugi durǝ mʋ dɩd-o DƖ wɩ: «Amʋ Yuutu Baŋa-Wɛ mʋ dugi a durǝ, yɩ a bá fɔgɩ a za a ni. Nmʋ wʋ́ ta n yɩ amʋ kaanɩm tu sɩ kʋ taa ve maŋa kalʋ na ba ti tɩn.».

eng: As a result, Jesus has become the guarantee of a better covenant.
local: Wɛ na dugi DƖ durǝ kam kʋntʋ tɩn, kʋ brɩ nɩ Zezi ŋwaanɩ mʋ DƖ tiŋi cwǝ-laa DƖ pa dɩbam, yɩ kantʋ garɩ cwǝ-doŋǝ kam.

eng: The others who became priests are numerous because death prevented them from continuing to serve.
local: Kʋ na yɩ Leevi dwi tiinǝ balʋ dɛɛn na yɩ Wɛ kaanɩm tiinǝ tɩn, ba yɩ zanzan, tʋʋnɩ na yǝni dɩ jaanɩ-ba yɩ ba lǝni daanɩ tɩn ŋwaanɩ mʋ.

eng: In contrast, he holds the office of priest permanently because he continues to serve forever.
local: Kʋ daarɩ Zezi mʋ yɩ wʋlʋ na jɩgɩ ŋwɩa sɩ kʋ taa ve maŋa kalʋ na ba ti tɩn. Nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ nan daa bá lǝni o yuu nɩ o ji Wɛ kaanɩm tu.

eng: This is why he can completely save those who are approaching God through him, because he always lives to speak with God for them.
local: Kʋntʋ tɩn, o waɩ o vrɩ balʋ na tɔgɩ o ŋwaanɩ ba yi Wɛ te tɩn maŋa maama, o na jɩgɩ ŋwɩa kalʋ na ba ti yɩ o loori Wɛ o pa-ba tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: Its appropriate for us to have this kind of high priest: holy, innocent, incorrupt, separate from sinners, and raised high above the heavens.
local: Zezi nan mʋ yɩ Wɛ kaanɩm yuutu wʋlʋ na maŋɩ tɩn dɩbam ŋwaanɩ. O jɩgɩ wʋ-poŋo, o yɩ nɔn-ŋʋm Wɛ yigǝ nɩ, o ba jɩgɩ lwarɩm. Wɛ ma lɩ-o nɔn-balwaarʋ tɩtarɩ nɩ, yɩ DƖ zǝŋ-o DƖ ja DƖ di wɛyuu DƖ sɔŋɔ nɩ.

eng: He doesnt need to offer sacrifices every day like the other high priests, first for their own sins and then for the sins of the people. He did this once for all when he offered himself.
local: Kʋ na yɩ Wɛ kaanɩm yuu tiinǝ bam dɛɛn na yɩ te tɩn, dɛ maama ba yǝni ba kaanɩ Baŋa-Wɛ mʋ sɩ DƖ yagɩ ba tɩtɩ lwarɩm DƖ ma cɛ-ba, yɩ ba laan daarɩ ba kaanɩ Wɛ ba donnǝ bam dɩ lwarɩm ŋwaanɩ. Kʋ nan na yɩ Zezi, wʋntʋ kwe o tɩtɩ mʋ o ma kaanɩ Wɛ kuni bɩdwɩ yɩranɩ, yɩ kʋntʋ jɩgɩ kuri sɩ kʋ taa ve maŋa kalʋ na ba ti tɩn.

eng: The Law appoints people who are prone to weakness as high priests, but the content of the solemn pledge, which came after the Law, appointed a Son who has been made perfect forever.
local: Cullu tɩlʋ Wɛ na kɩ Moyisi jɩŋa nɩ tɩn pa nabiinǝ jiri Wɛ kaanɩm yuu tiinǝ yɩ ba daa ta bwǝnǝ mʋ. Kʋ nan na yɩ Wɛ ni-gonim dɩlʋ DƖ na dugi durǝ dɩ ŋwaanɩ tɩn, dɩntʋ laan mʋ lǝni Moyisi cullu tɩm yuu nɩ, yɩ dɩ pa Wɛ tɩtɩ Bu wʋm ji DƖ kaanɩm yuutu wʋlʋ na maŋɩ fasɩ sɩ kʋ taa ve maŋa kalʋ na ba ti tɩn.

eng: Now the main point of what we are saying is this: We have this kind of high priest. He sat down at the right side of the throne of the majesty in the heavens.
local: Taana yantʋ maama wʋnɩ taanɩ dɩlʋ na yɩ kamunu tɩn mʋ yɩ sɩ dɩbam jɩgɩ Wɛ kaanɩm yuutu wʋm kʋntʋ doŋ. Wʋntʋ mʋ je Wɛ-sɔŋɔ nɩ, Dam-Paŋwa Tu Wɛ paarɩ jangɔŋɔ kʋm jazɩm nɩ.

eng: Hes serving as a priest in the holy place, which is the true meeting tent that God, not any human being, set up.
local: O maa wʋ Wɛ di-laa cɩga cɩga wʋnɩ o tʋŋɩ o pa-DƖ. Jǝgǝ kam kʋntʋ yɩ Yuutu Baŋa-Wɛ tɩtɩ sɔŋɔ mʋ, kʋ daɩ lʋgʋ baŋa vwe dɩlʋ nabiinǝ na pugi sɩ ba taa zuli-DƖ da tɩn.

eng: Every high priest is appointed to offer gifts and sacrifices. So its necessary for this high priest also to have something to offer.
local: Wʋlʋ maama na yɩ Wɛ kaanɩm yuutu tɩn tɩtʋŋɩ yɩ sɩ o taa maɩ pɛɛra dɩ vara mʋ o kaanɩ Baŋa-Wɛ. Dɩbam Wɛ kaanɩm yuutu Zezi dɩ nan maŋɩ sɩ o taa jɩgɩ kʋlʋ o na wʋ́ pa Wɛ tɩn.

eng: If he was located on earth, he wouldnt be a priest because there are already others who offer gifts based on the Law.
local: Zezi nan ya ta na wʋ lʋgʋ baŋa nɩ, o bá ta yɩ Wɛ kaanɩm tu. Bɛŋwaanɩ Wɛ kaanɩm tiinǝ maŋɩ ba wʋ lʋgʋ baŋa nɩ, yɩ ba yǝni ba maɩ pɛɛra ba ma kaanɩ Wɛ, kʋ maŋɩ dɩ Moyisi cullu tɩm na brɩ te tɩn.

eng: They serve in a place that is a copy and shadow of the heavenly meeting tent. This is indicated when Moses was warned by God when he was about to set up the meeting tent: See that you follow the pattern that I showed you on the mountain in every detail .
local: Bantʋ na yǝni ba tʋŋɩ ba pa Wɛ te tɩn yɩ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ na wʋ Wɛ-sɔŋɔ nɩ tɩn nyɩnyʋgʋ dɩ tɩ luluŋu mʋ. Moyisi dɛɛn na lagɩ o pu vwe dɩlʋ nɔɔna na wʋ́ ta paɩ Wɛ zulǝ dɩ wʋnɩ tɩn, Wɛ dɛɛn brɩ-o o na wʋ́ kɩ te, yɩ DƖ ta DƖ wɩ: «Kwaanɩ n kɩ wǝǝnu tɩm maama sɩ tɩ taa nyɩ nɩ amʋ na maŋɩ a brɩ-m piu kʋm yuu nɩ te tɩn.».

eng: But now, Jesus has received a superior priestly service just as he arranged a better covenant that is enacted with better promises.
local: Kʋ daarɩ lele kʋntʋ, Zezi na tʋŋɩ o pa Wɛ te tɩn tiini kʋ jɩgɩ kuri lanyɩranɩ kʋ dwe kaanɩm tiinǝ bam tɩtʋŋa yam maama, nɩ ni-dʋʋrɩ dɩlʋ Wɛ na tɔgɩ Zezi ŋwaanɩ DƖ go DƖ pa dɩbam tɩn na lana dɩ dwe dayigǝ ni-gonim dɩm na yɩ te tɩn. Bɛŋwaanɩ Wɛ na goni ni-dʋʋrɩ dɩm sɩ DƖ pa dɩbam kʋlʋ tɩn tiini kʋ lana kʋ dwe DƖ ni-doori dɩm.

eng: If the first covenant had been without fault, it wouldnt have made sense to expect a second.
local: Dayigǝ ni dɩlʋ Wɛ na goni DƖ pa DƖ nɔɔna bam tɩn ya na maŋɩ fasɩ, DƖ ya daa bá go ni dɩdoŋ DƖ lǝni dɩntʋ yuu nɩ.

eng: But God did find fault with them, since he says, Look, the days are coming, says the Lord, when I will make a covenant with the house of Israel, and I will make a new covenant with the house of Judah. .
local: Wɛ dɛɛn nan brɩ nɩ DƖ nɔɔna bam kɩ ba tusi mʋ. Kʋntʋ mʋ DƖ tagɩ DƖ wɩ: «Maŋa maa bɩɩna, yɩ amʋ wʋ́ go ni-dʋʋrɩ a pa a nɔɔna bam, kʋ nan yɩ Yisɩrayɛlɩ dwi tiinǝ dɩ Zuda dwi tiinǝ bam maama mʋ.

eng: It will not be like the covenant that I made with their ancestors on the day I took them by the hand to lead them out of the land of Egypt, because they did not continue to keep my covenant, and I lost interest in them, says the Lord. .
local: Ni-dʋʋrɩ dɩntʋ bá ta nyɩ dɩ dayigǝ ni dɩlʋ amʋ na goni a pa ba nabaara bam maŋa kalʋ a na jaanɩ ba jɩŋa a pa ba nuŋi Ezipi tɩʋ kʋm wʋnɩ tɩn. Bantʋ dɛɛn wʋ sɛ ba tɔgɩ ni dɩlʋ amʋ na goni dɩ ba tɩn. Kʋntʋ mʋ pa a yigǝ daa tǝri ba wʋnɩ.» Mʋ Yuutu Baŋa-Wɛ na tagɩ kʋlʋ tɩn. DƖ daa ta ma ta DƖ wɩ:.

eng: This is the covenant that I will make with the house of Israel after those days, says the Lord. I will place my laws in their minds, and write them on their hearts. I will be their God, and they will be my people. .
local: «Kantʋ maŋa kam na kɛ, amʋ wʋ́ go ni a pa Yisɩrayɛlɩ dwi tiinǝ bam nɩ: ‹Amʋ wʋ́ pa a ni-taana yam zʋ ba wʋbʋŋa, yɩ a pa ya pǝni ba bɩcara nɩ. Amʋ wʋ́ ta yɩ ba Tu Wɛ, yɩ ba dɩ wʋ́ ta yɩ amʋ nɔɔna.

eng: And each person wont ever teach a neighbor or their brother or sister, saying, Know the Lord, because they will all know me, from the least important of them to the most important; .
local: Bantʋ nabwǝnǝ dɩ ba dɩdɛɛra maama wʋ́ lwarɩ amʋ na yɩ wʋlʋ tɩn. Ba wʋlʋwʋlʋ daa wʋ maŋɩ sɩ o brɩ o doŋ nɩ amʋ mʋ yɩ ba Yuutu.

eng: because I will be lenient toward their unjust actions, and I wont remember their sins anymore. .
local: Maŋa kam kʋntʋ nɩ amʋ wʋ́ duri ba ŋwaŋa dɩ ba lwarɩm dɩm, yɩ a daa bá guli ba kǝm-balwaarʋ tɩm.› ».

eng: When it says new, it makes the first obsolete. And if something is old and outdated, its close to disappearing.
local: Wɛ na ŋɔɔnɩ DƖ ni-dʋʋrɩ dɩm taanɩ kʋntʋ doŋ tɩn, kʋ brɩ nɩ DƖ dayigǝ ni dɩm laan jigi ni-doori mʋ. Woŋo kʋlʋ nan na doori yɩ kʋ wʋra kʋ cɔgɩ tɩn lagɩ kʋ kɛ lele mʋ.

eng: So then the first covenant had regulations for the priests service and the holy place on earth.
local: A lagɩ a ta dayigǝ ni-gonim dɩm dɩ nɔɔna na tɔgɩ dɩ ŋwaanɩ ba zuli Wɛ te tɩn woŋo mʋ. Kʋ yɩ nabiinǝ mʋ pugi vwe lʋgʋ baŋa nɩ sɩ ba taa zuli Wɛ da, yɩ cullu brɩ ba na wʋ́ ta zuli-DƖ te tɩn.

eng: They pitched the first tent called the holy place. It contained the lampstand, the table, and the loaves of bread presented to God.
local: Vwe dɩm kʋntʋ wʋ nan cɛ di sɩle mʋ. Dɩ kwaga digǝ kam yɩrɩ mʋ Wɛ-di-laa, yɩ ka jɩgɩ min-zwǝn-kamunu. Taabʋlʋ maa zɩgɩ da, yɩ dɩpɛ dɩlʋ na yɩ Wɛ nyɩm tɩn tigi kʋ baŋa nɩ.

eng: There was a tent behind the second curtain called the holy of holies.
local: Yigǝ digǝ dɩ maa wʋra, ka yɩrɩ mʋ Wɛ-di-laa cɩga cɩga, yɩ ba lǝ gar-jalɩ ba ma cɩ-ka.

eng: It had the gold altar for incense and the chest containing the covenant, which was covered with gold on all sides. In the chest there was a gold jar containing manna, Aarons rod that budded, and the stone tablets of the covenant.
local: Kaanɩm bimbim maa zɩgɩ da, dɩ yɩ sǝbu-sɩŋa mʋ ba mɛ ba zi, dáanɩ mʋ ba zwɛ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ lwǝm na ywǝmmǝ tɩn ba pa-DƖ. Wɛ ni-gonim daka kam dɩ maa wʋra ba na mɛ sǝbu-sɩŋa ba ma zi-ka. Ka wʋ kʋm maa jɩgɩ sǝbu-sɩŋa zʋŋa, ka dɩ wʋ na jɩgɩ wʋdiu kʋlʋ yɩrɩ na yɩ Maanɩ tɩn. Nacǝgǝ kalʋ na yɩ Aarɔn nyɩm yɩ ka dɛɛn puli vɔɔrʋ tɩn dɩ maa wʋ daka kam wʋnɩ, kʋ wǝli dɩ kandwa-pɩlɛ sɩle Wɛ cullu tɩm na pʋpʋnɩ sɩ baŋa nɩ tɩn.

eng: Above the chest there were magnificent winged creatures casting their shadow over the seat of the chest, where sin is taken care of. Right now we cant talk about these things in detail.
local: Ba dɛɛn ma kɩ malɛsɩ sɩle nyɩnyʋgʋ ba zɩgɩ da, yɩ sɩ vwana yam kwǝli daka kam baŋa, mʋ jǝgǝ kalʋ Wɛ na saarɩ nabiinǝ lwarɩm da tɩn. Malɛsɩ sɩm nyɩnyʋgʋ kʋm brɩ nɩ Baŋa-Wɛ mʋ wʋ jǝgǝ kam kʋntʋ nɩ dɩ DƖ paarɩ-zulǝ yam. Kʋ nan daɩ lele kʋntʋ mʋ a lagɩ sɩ a ŋɔɔnɩ wǝǝnu tɩm kʋntʋ taanɩ zanzan a brɩ abam.

eng: When these things have been prepared in this way, priests enter the first tent all the time as they perform their service.
local: Vwe dɩm dɩ dɩ wʋ wǝǝnu tɩm na fɔgɩ tɩ kwɛ kʋntʋ tɩn, Wɛ kaanɩm tiinǝ bam yǝni ba zʋʋrɩ kwaga digǝ kam wʋ dɛ maama mʋ ba tʋŋɩ ba paɩ Wɛ.

eng: But only the high priest enters the second tent once a year. He never does this without blood, which he offers for himself and for the sins the people committed in ignorance.
local: Kʋ nan na yɩ yigǝ digǝ kam, Wɛ kaanɩm yuutu wʋm yɩranɩ mʋ jɩgɩ cwǝŋǝ sɩ o zʋ ka wʋ bɩdwɩ bɩm maama wʋnɩ. Wʋntʋ nan na lagɩ o zʋ, o maŋɩ sɩ o ja varɩm jana mʋ o zʋ o ma kaanɩ Baŋa-Wɛ o tɩtɩ tusim dɩ nɔɔna bam dɩ tusim ŋwaanɩ, sɩ Wɛ yagɩ DƖ ma cɛ-ba.

eng: With this, the Holy Spirit is showing that the way into the holy place hadnt been revealed yet while the first tent was standing.
local: Kʋntʋ, Wɛ Joro kʋm laan brɩ dɩbam nɩ, maŋa kalʋ dayigǝ vwe dɩm ya ta na zɩgɩ tɩn, cwǝŋǝ dɛɛn ya tǝrǝ sɩ nɔɔna wanɩ ba zʋ Wɛ-di-laa cɩga cɩga kam wʋnɩ.

eng: This is a symbol for the present time. It shows that the gifts and sacrifices that are being offered cant perfect the conscience of the one who is serving.
local: Kʋ maa yɩ nyɩnyʋgʋ mʋ kʋ na brɩ dɩbam zɩm wǝǝnu tɩm na yɩ te tɩn. Kʋ brɩ nɩ pɛɛra dɩ vara balʋ maama nabiinǝ na kwe ba ma kaanɩ Wɛ tɩn bá wanɩ ya pa wʋlʋ na mɛ-ya o ma zuli Wɛ tɩn bɩcarɩ kwɛ fasɩ dɩ Wɛ.

eng: These are superficial regulations that are only about food, drink, and various ritual ways to wash with water. They are regulations that have been imposed until the time of the new order.
local: Ba zaasɩ-ba wǝǝnu tɩlʋ ba na wʋ́ di yɩ ba nyɔ tɩn, dɩ n na wʋ́ kɩ te sɩ n ta n yɩ lanyɩranɩ tɩn cullu mʋ. Tɩ maama nan yɩ lʋgʋ baŋa wǝǝnu cullu mʋ, yɩ tɩ jɩgɩ kuri sɩ kʋ taa ve maŋa kam Wɛ na wʋ́ fɔgɩ DƖ tiŋi DƖ cwǝ-dʋŋa kam tɩn yɩranɩ má mʋ.

eng: But Christ has appeared as the high priest of the good things that have happened. He passed through the greater and more perfect meeting tent, which isnt made by human hands .
local: Zezi Krisi laan mʋ nan tu o ji kaanɩm yuutu dɩbam ŋwaanɩ. Kʋ ma pa dɩ́ joŋi o ŋwɩ-dʋŋa wo-laarʋ tɩlʋ na maŋɩ tɩ wʋra tɩn. Zezi na zʋ Wɛ te dɩbam ŋwaanɩ tɩn, kʋ yɩ Wɛ-sɔŋɔ cɩga cɩga mʋ o zʋa, yɩ kʋntʋ tiini kʋ lana kʋ dwe lʋgʋ baŋa vwe dɩm. O na zʋ mɛ tɩn daɩ vwe dɩlʋ nabiinǝ na pugi tɩn.

eng: He entered the holy of holies once for all by his own blood, not by the blood of goats or calves, securing our deliverance for all time.
local: O ma vu o zʋ Wɛ-di-laa kʋm wʋnɩ. Kʋ yɩ bɩdwɩ yɩranɩ mʋ o zʋa, maŋa kalʋ na ba ti tɩn ŋwaanɩ. O nan wʋ mɛ bʋbalɩ naa nabalɩ jana o zʋ o ma kaanɩ Baŋa-Wɛ. Kʋ yɩ o tɩtɩ jana mʋ o mɛ o ŋwɩ dɩbam lwarɩm jɩnɩ, yɩ o vrɩ dɩbam lwarɩm wʋnɩ sɩ kʋ taa ve maŋa kalʋ na ba ti tɩn.

eng: If the blood of goats and bulls and the sprinkled ashes of cows made spiritually contaminated people holy and clean.
local: Wɛ ni-doori dɩm brɩ nɩ nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ na cɔgɩ culu tɩn, ba maŋɩ sɩ ba ma bʋnɩ dɩ nabɛ jana mʋ dɩ na-pwala kalʋ ba na zwɛ tɩn tɩntwarɩm ba misi nɔɔnʋ wʋm yɩra nɩ. Ba na kɩ kʋntʋ mʋ, kʋʋ́ kwɛ nɔɔnʋ wʋm sɩ kʋ maŋɩ dɩ cullu tɩm na brɩ te tɩn.

eng: how much more will the blood of Jesus wash our consciences clean from dead works in order to serve the living God? He offered himself to God through the eternal Spirit as a sacrifice without any flaw.
local: Vara jana na waɩ nɔɔna ka kwɛ tɩn, Zezi na tɩgɩ yɩ o jana kam nuŋi tɩn, kʋ bá tiini kʋ fɔgɩ nɔɔna kʋ kwɛ dɩ Wɛ kʋ dwǝni na? Zezi tɔgɩ Wɛ Joro kʋlʋ na wʋra sɩ kʋ taa ve maŋa kalʋ na ba ti tɩn ŋwaanɩ o ji kaanɩm dɩlʋ na lana fasɩ tɩn Wɛ yigǝ nɩ. O na kaanɩ Baŋa-Wɛ dɩbam ŋwaanɩ kʋntʋ tɩn, kʋ ma pa dɩ́ bɩcara kwɛ fasɩ dɩ kǝm-balwaarʋ tɩlʋ ya na jɩgɩ dɩbam tɩ ve tʋʋnɩ wʋnɩ tɩn, yɩ dɩ́ daarɩ dɩ́ zuli Ŋwɩa Tu Baŋa-Wɛ.

eng: This is why hes the mediator of a new covenant : so that those who are called might receive the promise of the eternal inheritance on the basis of his death. His death occurred to set them free from the offenses committed under the first covenant.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ Zezi mʋ yɩ wʋlʋ Wɛ na dɛ o ŋwaanɩ DƖ tiŋi DƖ ni-dʋʋrɩ dɩm dɩ nabiinǝ tɩn. O na sɛ o tɩ o ma ŋwɩ ba lwarɩm jɩnɩ tɩn, o waɩ o vrɩ-ba dɩ ba na kɩ kʋlʋ ba cɔgɩ Wɛ dayigǝ ni-gonim dɩm tɩn. Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ balʋ maama Wɛ na kuri sɩ ba taa yɩ DƖ biǝ tɩn waɩ ba joŋi DƖ wo-laarʋ tɩlʋ na ba ti tɩn, nɩ DƖ na goni ni sɩ DƖ pa-ba te tɩn.

eng: When there is a will, you need to confirm the death of the one who made the will.
local: Kʋ nyɩ dɩ nɔɔnʋ na pɛ ni nɩ, o na tɩga o daarɩ, ba na wʋ́ cɛ o wǝǝnu te tɩn mʋ. Maŋa kalʋ o ta na ŋwɩ tɩn, o ni dɩm kʋntʋ ba jɩgɩ kuri. Kʋ daarɩ o nan na tɩga, ba laan wʋ́ cɛ o wǝǝnu tɩm sɩ kʋ maŋɩ dɩ o ni dɩm na tagɩ te tɩn.

eng: So not even the first covenant was put into effect without blood.
local: Kʋntʋ, Wɛ na goni DƖ dayigǝ ni dɩm DƖ pa DƖ nɔɔna bam tɩn, ba mɛ vara jana mʋ ba ma brɩ nɩ DƖ ni-gonim dɩm jɩgɩ kuri.

eng: Moses took the blood of calves and goats, along with water, scarlet wool, and hyssop, and sprinkled both the Law scroll itself and all the people after he had proclaimed every command of the Law to all the people.
local: Moyisi dɛɛn tɔɔlɩ Wɛ niǝ yam maama na yɩ te tɩn mʋ o brɩ Yisɩrayɛlɩ tiinǝ bam. O laan ma kwe nabalɩ dɩ bʋbalɩ jana o wǝli dɩ na, yɩ o kwe daa, ka yɩrɩ mʋ Yisopi, o vɔ gungun-sʋŋʋ ka ni nɩ o lu jana kam wʋnɩ o ma misi tɔnɔ kʋlʋ Wɛ niǝ yam na pʋpʋnɩ kʋ wʋnɩ tɩn baŋa nɩ, yɩ o daarɩ o misi Yisɩrayɛlɩ tiinǝ bam maama yɩra nɩ.

eng: While he did it, he said, This is the blood of the covenant that God established for you. .
local: O dɛɛn na kɩ kʋntʋ tɩn, o ma ta dɩ ba o wɩ: «Jana kantʋ brɩ nɩ Wɛ ni-gonim dɩm jɩgɩ kuri sɩ á taá tɔgɩ-dɩ.».

eng: And in the same way he sprinkled the meeting tent and also all the equipment that would be used in the priests service with blood.
local: Moyisi daa ta ma kwe jana kam o ma misi vwe dɩm dɩ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ maama na wʋ dɩ wʋnɩ yɩ ba ma zuli Wɛ tɩn.

eng: Almost everything is cleansed by blood, according to the Laws regulations, and there is no forgiveness without blood being shed.
local: Kʋ yɩ cɩga mʋ, Wɛ cullu tɩm brɩ nɩ nɔɔna maŋɩ sɩ ba ma vara jana mʋ ba ma fɔgɩ ba kwɛ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ maama na jɩgɩ digiru Wɛ yigǝ nɩ tɩn. Wǝǝnu tɩlʋ ba na ba maɩ jana ba kwɛ tɩn yɩ fɩnfɩɩn yɩranɩ mʋ. Jana nan ya na wʋ nuŋi, Wɛ bá yagɩ nɔɔna lwarɩm DƖ ma cɛ-ba.

eng: So it was necessary for the copies of the heavenly things to be cleansed with these sacrifices, but the heavenly things had to be cleansed with better sacrifices than these.
local: Lʋgʋ baŋa vwe dɩm wǝǝnu yɩ Wɛ-sɔŋɔ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ na yɩ cɩga tɩn nyɩnyʋgʋ mʋ, yɩ tɩ maŋɩ sɩ tɩ fɔgɩ tɩ kwɛ dɩ jana kʋntʋ doŋ mʋ. Kʋ daarɩ Wɛ-sɔŋɔ wǝǝnu tɩm tɩtɩ na wʋ́ fɔgɩ tɩ kwɛ te tɩn, kʋ fɩn mʋ sɩ ba kɩ kaanɩm dɩlʋ na wʋ́ ta dwe faŋa nyɩm dɩm tɩn ba pa Wɛ.

eng: Christ didnt enter the holy place made by human hands, but into heaven itself, so that he now appears in Gods presence for us.
local: Zezi Krisi nan na zʋ Wɛ te tɩn, kʋ daɩ vwe dɩlʋ nabiinǝ na pugi yɩ dɩ lwǝni Wɛ-sɔŋɔ na yɩ te cɩga cɩga tɩn mʋ o zʋa. O nan sɩɩnɩ o zʋ Wɛ te DƖ sɔŋɔ nɩ mʋ, yɩ o zɩgɩ Wɛ yigǝ nɩ dɩbam zǝnǝ ŋwaanɩ.

eng: He didnt enter to offer himself over and over again, like the high priest enters the earthly holy place every year with blood that isnt his.
local: Zwifǝ kaanɩm yuutu wʋm dɛɛn yǝni o maɩ vara jana mʋ o zʋ Wɛ-di-laa kʋm wʋ bɩnɩ maama o ma kaanɩ Baŋa-Wɛ. Kʋ nan na yɩ Zezi, wʋntʋ na zʋ Wɛ te tɩn, o mɛ o tɩtɩ mʋ o kɩ kaanɩm kuni bɩdwɩ o pa-DƖ.

eng: If that were so, then Jesus would have to suffer many times since the foundation of the world. Instead, he has now appeared once at the end of the ages to get rid of sin by sacrificing himself.
local: Kʋ ya na daɩ kʋntʋ, Zezi ya wʋ́ ta yaarɩ o tʋ kuni zanzan mʋ, kʋ na zɩgɩ lʋgʋ baŋa pulim nɩ sɩ kʋ ba kʋ yi zɩm. Kʋ nan na yɩ te tɩn, o laan tu lʋgʋ baŋa kweelim maŋa nɩ mʋ. O tu bɩdwɩ mʋ, yɩ o ba o tɩ o kaanɩ Baŋa-Wɛ sɩ kʋ pa nabiinǝ lwarɩm saarɩ sɩ kʋ taa ve maŋa kalʋ na ba ti tɩn.

eng: People are destined to die once and then face judgment.
local: Nɔɔnʋ maama maŋɩ sɩ o tɩ kuni bɩdwɩ mʋ, sɩ Wɛ laan di o sarɩya.

eng: In the same way, Christ was also offered once to take on himself the sins of many people. He will appear a second time, not to take away sin but to save those who are eagerly waiting for him.
local: Kʋntʋ, Zezi Krisi dɩ nan tu o tɩ bɩdwɩ mʋ o ma kaanɩ Baŋa-Wɛ, sɩ o lɩ nɔɔna zanzan lwarɩm o yagɩ. O nan ta wʋ́ joori o ba lʋgʋ baŋa. Kʋ nan daa daɩ nɔɔna lwarɩm saarɩm ŋwaanɩ, kʋ laan yɩ sɩ o joŋi balʋ na jɩgɩ tɩɩna sɩ o joori o ba tɩn ŋwaanɩ mʋ.

eng: The Law is a shadow of the good things that are coming, not the real things themselves. It never can perfect the ones who are trying to draw near to God through the same sacrifices that are offered continually every year.
local: Kʋ na yɩ Wɛ cullu tɩlʋ DƖ na kɩ Moyisi jɩŋa nɩ tɩn, tɩ lagɩ tɩ brɩ wo-laarʋ tɩm dɩ́ na wʋ́ ba dɩ́ joŋi Wɛ tee nɩ tɩn na yɩ te tɩn mʋ. Tɩ nan yɩ lulunnu mʋ, tɩ daɩ nɩ Wɛ-sɔŋɔ wǝǝnu tɩm tɩtɩ na yɩ te tɩn. Tɩ paɩ nɔɔna joori ba kaanɩ Baŋa-Wɛ mʋ bɩm maama taan taan. Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ tɩ bá wanɩ tɩ pa balʋ na tɔgɩ tɩ ŋwaanɩ ba zuli Wɛ tɩn bɩcara kwɛ fasɩ.

eng: Otherwise, wouldnt they have stopped being offered? If the people carrying out their religious duties had been completely cleansed once, no one would have been aware of sin anymore.
local: Wɛ cullu tɩm ya na waɩ tɩ paɩ balʋ na zuli-DƖ tɩn lwarɩm saarɩ dɩ tiǝ, ba ya daa bá bʋŋɩ nɩ ba lwarɩm ta wʋ ba yuu nɩ, yɩ ba ya daa bá ta kaana.

eng: Instead, these sacrifices are a reminder of sin every year.
local: Ba nan na kaanɩ Wɛ bɩm maama wʋnɩ tɩn, kʋ paɩ ba joori ba guli nɩ ba lwarɩm dɩm ta wʋ ba yuu nɩ mʋ.

eng: because its impossible for the blood of bulls and goats to take away sins.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ nabiinǝ lwarɩm bá wanɩ dɩ saarɩ dɩ nabalɩ dɩ bʋbalɩ jana.

eng: Therefore, when he comes into the world he says, You didnt want a sacrifice or an offering, but you prepared a body for me; .
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ Zezi dɛɛn na lagɩ o ba lʋgʋ baŋa maŋa kalʋ tɩn, o tagɩ dɩ o Ko Wɛ o wɩ: «Nmʋ ba lagɩ nabiinǝ na maɩ vara dɩ pɛɛra ba kaanɩ-m te tɩn. Nmʋ nan pɛ amʋ nabiinu yɩra mʋ, sɩ a ma-ya a kɩ nmʋ wʋbʋŋa lʋgʋ baŋa nɩ.

eng: you werent pleased with entirely burned offerings or a sin offering. .
local: Kʋ na yɩ nɔɔna na yǝni ba gʋ vara ba zwɛ ba ma kaanɩ-m te tɩn, naa ba na kaanɩ te sɩ kʋ ma saarɩ ba lwarɩm tɩn, kikiǝ yam kʋntʋ maama ba poli nmʋ wʋ.

eng: So then I said, Look, Ive come to do your will, God. This has been written about me in the scroll. .
local: Amʋ maa wɩ: ‹A Ko Wɛ, nii amʋ da, sɩ a kɩ nmʋ wʋbʋŋa na lagɩ te tɩn, nɩ kʋ na pʋpʋnɩ amʋ taanɩ nmʋ tɔnɔ kʋm wʋnɩ faŋa faŋa te tɩn.› ».

eng: He says above, You didnt want and you werent pleased with a sacrifice or an offering or with entirely burned offerings or a purification offering, which are offered because the Law requires them.
local: Zezi maŋɩ o da yigǝ o ta o wɩ: «Nmʋ ba lagɩ sɩ nabiinǝ ma vara dɩ pɛɛra ba ma kaanɩ nmʋ, naa ba gʋ vara ba zwɛ ba ma kaanɩ nmʋ, naa ba kaanɩ sɩ kʋ ma saarɩ ba lwarɩm. Wǝǝnu tɩntʋ maama ba poli nmʋ wʋ.» Nan dɩ tɩ na maŋɩ tɩ tɔgɩ Wɛ cullu tɩm na brɩ te tɩn dɩ.

eng: Then he said, Look, Ive come to do your will . He puts an end to the first to establish the second.
local: O laan ma daarɩ o ta o wɩ: «Nii amʋ da, sɩ a kɩ nmʋ wʋbʋŋa na lagɩ te tɩn.» Kʋntʋ brɩ nɩ Wɛ saarɩ DƖ dayigǝ kaanɩm ni dɩm DƖ yagɩ, yɩ DƖ daarɩ DƖ lǝni kaanɩm dɩdoŋ mʋ.

eng: We have been made holy by Gods will through the offering of Jesus Christs body once for all.
local: Dɩntʋ mʋ yɩ Zezi Krisi na kɩ o Ko Wɛ wʋbʋŋa na lagɩ te tɩn maama, yɩ o ma o tɩtɩ yɩra o ma kaanɩ kuni bɩdwɩ, yɩ kʋ jɩgɩ kuri sɩ kʋ taa ve maŋa kalʋ na ba ti tɩn, sɩ kʋ pa dɩ́ taá jɩgɩ wʋ-poŋo Wɛ yigǝ nɩ.

eng: Every priest stands every day serving and offering the same sacrifices over and over, sacrifices that can never take away sins.
local: Lʋgʋ baŋa kaanɩm tiinǝ yǝni ba zɩgɩ wɛɛnɩ mʋ ba tʋŋɩ dɛ maama, ba gʋ vara ba ma kaana maŋa maama, yɩ ba kaanɩm dɩm kʋntʋ nan warɩ lwarɩm dɩ saara.

eng: But when this priest offered one sacrifice for sins for all time, he sat down at the right side of God.
local: Kʋ nan na yɩ Zezi, wʋntʋ kwe o tɩtɩ o ma kaanɩ Baŋa-Wɛ bɩdwɩ yɩranɩ má mʋ, yɩ kʋ saarɩ nabiinǝ lwarɩm sɩ kʋ taa ve maŋa kalʋ na ba ti tɩn. O na kɩ kʋntʋ o ti tɩn, o ma vu o jǝni Baŋa-Wɛ jazɩm nɩ.

eng: Since then, hes waiting until his enemies are made into a footstool for his feet.
local: yɩ o laan cǝgi maŋa kalʋ Wɛ na wʋ́ kɩ o dʋna maama o nɛ kuri nɩ sɩ o nɔ-ba nɩ tɩga te tɩn.

eng: because he perfected the people who are being made holy with one offering for all time.
local: Kʋntʋ, o kaanɩ Wɛ kuni bɩdwɩ mʋ, sɩ kʋ pa nɔɔna taa jɩgɩ wʋ-poŋo sɩ ba bɩcara kwɛ fasɩ sɩ kʋ taa ve maŋa kalʋ na ba ti tɩn.

eng: The Holy Spirit affirms this when saying.
local: Wɛ Joro kʋm dɩ nan brɩ dɩbam jaja nɩ wǝǝnu tɩm kʋntʋ yɩ cɩga mʋ. Kʋ dɛ yigǝ kʋ ta kʋ wɩ:.

eng: This is the covenant that I will make with them. After these days, says the Lord, I will place my laws in their hearts and write them on their minds. .
local: «Amʋ Yuutu Baŋa-Wɛ tagɩ a wɩ: ‹Kantʋ maŋa kam na kɛ, amʋ wʋ́ go ni a pa a nɔɔna bam nɩ: Amʋ wʋ́ pa a ni-taana yam zʋ ba bɩcara, yɩ a pa ya pǝni ba wʋbʋŋa nɩ.› ».

eng: And I wont remember their sins and their lawless behavior anymore. .
local: DƖ daa ta ma ta DƖ wɩ: «Amʋ daa bá guli ba lwarɩm dɩ ba kǝm-balwaarʋ tɩm.».

eng: When there is forgiveness for these things, there is no longer an offering for sin.
local: Wɛ nan na yagɩ nabiinǝ kǝm-balwaarʋ tɩm DƖ ma cɛ-ba tɩn, kʋ daa wʋ maŋɩ sɩ ba gʋ vara ba ma kaanɩ-DƖ ba lwarɩm saarɩm ŋwaanɩ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we have confidence that we can enter the holy of holies by means of Jesus blood.
local: A ko-biǝ-ba, dɩ́ laan jɩgɩ ni sɩ dɩ́ zʋ Wɛ-di-laa cɩga cɩga kam wʋnɩ, Zezi Krisi na tɩga yɩ o jana nuŋi tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: through a new and living way that he opened up for us through the curtain, which is his body.
local: Wʋntʋ nan mʋ pʋrɩ cwǝ-dʋŋa o pa dɩbam, yɩ kantʋ mʋ paɩ ŋwɩa. O maa kaarɩ gar-jalɩ dɩm dɩ ya na wʋ dɩbam dɩ Wɛ laŋa nɩ tɩn, dɩ o na kwe o yɩra yam o kaanɩ Baŋa-Wɛ tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: and we have a great high priest over Gods house.
local: Kʋntʋ, dɩbam jɩgɩ Wɛ kaanɩm tu cɩga cɩga o na nii Wɛ tɩtɩ nɔɔna bam baŋa nɩ.

eng: Therefore, lets draw near with a genuine heart with the certainty that our faith gives us, since our hearts are sprinkled clean from an evil conscience and our bodies are washed with pure water.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ, pa-na dɩ́ fʋfɔ dɩ́ twɛ Wɛ te dɩ wʋbʋŋ-ŋʋna dɩ baarɩ dɩlʋ na brɩ nɩ dɩ́ jɩgɩ wʋ-dɩdʋa fasɩ dɩ Wɛ tɩn. Wɛ kwɛ dɩ́ bɩcara kʋ pa dɩ́ daa ba bʋŋɩ nɩ dɩ́ lwarɩm ta wʋ dɩ́ yuu nɩ, yɩ DƖ zarɩ dɩbam dɩ na-ŋʋna.

eng: Lets hold on to the confession of our hope without wavering, because the one who made the promises is reliable.
local: Pa-na dɩ́ brɩ nɩ dɩ́ jɩgɩ tɩɩna Wɛ tee nɩ yɩ bʋbwɛa tǝrǝ, DƖ na goni ni DƖ pa dɩbam yɩ DƖ bá fɔgɩ DƖ kwanɩ-dɩ tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: And let us consider each other carefully for the purpose of sparking love and good deeds.
local: Pa-na dɩ́ taá ye da-ni nɩ, sɩ dɩ́ taá zǝni daanɩ, sɩ dɩ́ taá soe daanɩ, sɩ dɩ́ taá kɩ kǝm-laarʋ.

eng: Dont stop meeting together with other believers, which some people have gotten into the habit of doing. Instead, encourage each other, especially as you see the day drawing near.
local: Á yɩ pa dɩ́ yagɩ da-kikilim Wɛ zulǝ ŋwaanɩ nɩ badaara na yagɩ te tɩn. Nan kwaanɩ-na á tiini á taá wǝli daanɩ kʋntʋ, sɩ kʋ pa á na baarɩ, á na lwarɩ nɩ dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm dɛ dɩm twɛ tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: If we make the decision to sin after we receive the knowledge of the truth, there isnt a sacrifice for sins left any longer.
local: Nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ na lwarɩ Wɛ cɩga kam tɩn, o ta na paalɩ o kɩ lwarɩm, kaanɩm daa tǝrǝ dɩ na wʋ́ pa o lwarɩm dɩm saarɩ.

eng: Theres only a scary expectation of judgment and of a burning fire thats going to devour Gods opponents.
local: Kʋ laan nan daarɩ sɩ fʋʋnɩ mʋ taa jɩgɩ kʋntʋ tu dɩ Wɛ na wʋ́ kɩ-o te tɩn. Wɛ na di o sarɩya, DƖ laan wʋ́ pa o zʋ min-fɔrɔ kʋlʋ na wʋ́ cɔgɩ balʋ maama na vɩn Wɛ tɩn wʋ.

eng: When someone rejected the Law from Moses, they were put to death without mercy on the basis of the testimony of two or three witnesses.
local: Kʋ na yɩ Wɛ cullu tɩlʋ DƖ na kɩ Moyisi jɩŋa nɩ tɩn, nɔɔnʋ na cɔgɩ-tɩ, yɩ nɔɔna bale naa batɔ na yɩ maana tiinǝ, baá gʋ kʋntʋ tu mʋ o kǝm-lɔŋɔ kʋm ŋwaanɩ yɩ ŋwaŋa bá ta wʋra.

eng: How much worse punishment do you think is deserved by the person who walks all over Gods Son, who acts as if the blood of the covenant that made us holy is just ordinary blood, and who insults the Spirit of grace?.
local: Kʋ daarɩ nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ nan na yáalɩ Wɛ tɩtɩ Bu wʋm tɩn, kʋntʋ tu bá tiini o na cɔgɩm kʋ gaalɩ Wɛ tee nɩ na? Kʋntʋ tu paɩ Zezi jana kam Wɛ na dɛ ka ŋwaanɩ DƖ tiŋi DƖ ni-dʋʋrɩ dɩm tɩn yɩ kafɛ mʋ, yɩ kʋ nan yɩ jana kam kʋntʋ mʋ Wɛ mɛ DƖ fɔgɩ DƖ kwɛ nɔɔnʋ wʋm kʋntʋ bɩcarɩ. Kʋntʋ tu daa ta twɩ Wɛ Joro kʋm kʋ na paɩ nɔɔna Wɛ zaanɩ dɩm tɩn mʋ. Kʋntʋ tɩn, o bá tiini o na cam na?.

eng: We know the one who said, Judgment is mine; I will pay people back. And he also said, The Lord will judge his people. .
local: Dɩbam nan maŋɩ dɩ́ ye wʋlʋ wʋm o na tagɩ o wɩ: «Amʋ mʋ yɩ wʋlʋ na wʋ́ cɔgɩ nɔɔna dɩ ba kǝm-balwaarʋ tɩn. Amʋ wʋ́ pa ba joori ba na kʋlʋ na maŋɩ dɩ ba tɩn.» Kʋ ta pʋpʋnɩ nɩ: «Baŋa-Wɛ wʋ́ di DƖ nɔɔna sarɩya.».

eng: Its scary to fall into the hands of the living God!.
local: Kʋ nan wʋ́ ta tiini kʋ yɩ lɛɛrʋ dɩ wʋlʋ na kɩ o cɔgɩ yɩ Ŋwɩa Tu Baŋa-Wɛ jɩŋa zʋ-o sɩ DƖ pa o na cam tɩn.

eng: But remember the earlier days, after you saw the light. You stood your ground while you were suffering from an enormous amount of pressure.
local: Nan guli-na abam dɛɛn na dɛ yigǝ á na Wɛ pooni dɩm cɩga cɩga yɩ á yaarɩ zanzan te tɩn. Cam dɩm nan wʋ wanɩ abam á na vɔgɩ pu-dɩa tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: Sometimes you were exposed to insults and abuse in public. Other times you became partners with those who were treated that way.
local: Maŋa kadoŋ nɩ ba yǝni ba twɩ abam yɩ ba bɛɛsɩ abam nɔn-kɔgɔ yigǝ nɩ. Maŋa kadoŋ nɩ dɩ, á yǝni á sɛ sɩ á tɔgɩ á wǝli balʋ dɩ na nɛ abam yaara yam doŋ tɩn.

eng: You even showed sympathy toward people in prison and accepted the confiscation of your possessions with joy, since you knew that you had better and lasting possessions.
local: kʋ pɛ á tɔgɩ á na yaara dɩ balʋ na wʋ pɩɩna digǝ nɩ tɩn. Nɔɔna maa yǝni ba vrɩ abam wǝǝnu yɩ á cɩm dɩ wʋpolo, bɛŋwaanɩ á ye nɩ á maŋɩ á jɩgɩ kʋlʋ na tiini kʋ lana kʋ dwe, yɩ kʋʋ́ ta wʋ abam tee nɩ sɩ kʋ taa ve maŋa kalʋ na ba ti tɩn.

eng: So dont throw away your confidence—it brings a great reward.
local: Á yɩ yagɩ á na jɩgɩ baarɩ te tɩn, sɩ kʋʋ́ pa á na nyɔɔrɩ zanzan Wɛ tee nɩ.

eng: You need to endure so that you can receive the promises after you do Gods will.
local: Á nan maŋɩ sɩ á taá jɩgɩ pu-dɩa, sɩ á taá ma kɩ Wɛ wʋbʋŋa na lagɩ te tɩn, sɩ á daarɩ á joŋi wo-laarʋ tɩlʋ DƖ na goni ni sɩ DƖ pa abam tɩn.

eng: In a little while longer, the one who is coming will come and wont delay; .
local: Kʋ nan pʋpʋnɩ Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm wʋnɩ kʋ wɩ: «Kʋ daarɩ fɩɩn mʋ sɩ wʋlʋ na lagɩ o ba tɩn laan ba. O bá daanɩ.

eng: but my righteous one will live by faith, and my whole being wont be pleased with anyone who shrinks back. .
local: Wʋlʋ maama na jɩgɩ cɩga amʋ Baŋa-Wɛ tee nɩ tɩn mʋ yɩ wʋlʋ na kɩ o wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ amʋ tɩn, oó na ŋwɩa cɩga cɩga. O nan na joori kwaga, amʋ bá ta jɩgɩ wʋpolo dɩd-o.».

eng: But we arent the sort of people who timidly draw back and end up being destroyed. Were the sort of people who have faith so that our whole beings are preserved.
local: Dɩbam nan daɩ balʋ na joori kwaga yɩ ba ga ŋwɩa Wɛ tee nɩ tɩn. Dɩ́ yɩ balʋ na kɩ dɩ́ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ yɩ dɩ́ wʋ́ na ŋwɩa DƖ tee nɩ tɩn mʋ.

eng: Faith is the reality of what we hope for, the proof of what we dont see.
local: Nmʋ na jɩgɩ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ, kʋ kuri mʋ n ye lanyɩranɩ nɩ nmʋ wʋ́ sɩɩnɩ n na wǝǝnu tɩlʋ n na tɩɩnɩ tɩn. Kʋ kuri mʋ n ta n jɩgɩ cɩga nɩ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ n na ba naɩ dɩ n yiǝ tɩn sɩɩnɩ tɩ wʋra.

eng: The elders in the past were approved because they showed faith.
local: Nɔɔna balʋ na dɛ Wɛ cwǝŋǝ faŋa faŋa tɩn, kʋ yɩ ba na kɩ ba wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ tɩn ŋwaanɩ mʋ pɛ ba yɩrɩ zaŋɩ.

eng: By faith we understand that the universe has been created by a word from God so that the visible came into existence from the invisible.
local: Kʋ yɩ dɩbam dɩ na kɩ dɩ́ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ tɩn ŋwaanɩ mʋ paɩ dɩ́ lwarɩ nɩ, Wɛ mɛ DƖ ni-taanɩ mʋ DƖ kɩ lʋgʋ baŋa dɩ wɛyuu maama. Kʋntʋ mʋ dɩ́ sɛ nɩ Wɛ kwe wǝǝnu tɩlʋ na ba naɩ dɩ yiǝ tɩn mʋ DƖ ma kɩ tɩlʋ dɩ́ na waɩ dɩ́ naɩ dɩ yiǝ tɩn.

eng: By faith Abel offered a better sacrifice to God than Cain, which showed that he was righteous, since God gave approval to him for his gift. Though he died, hes still speaking through faith.
local: Abɛlɩ dɛɛn na jɩgɩ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ tɩn ŋwaanɩ mʋ pɛ o kaanɩm dɩm ja kuri dɩ dwǝni Kayin nyɩm dɩm. O wʋ-dɩdʋa kam mʋ pɛ Wɛ wɩ, o yɩ cɩga tu, Wɛ na sɛ o pɛɛra yam tɩn ŋwaanɩ. O daa tǝrǝ yɩ o wʋ-dɩdʋa kam ŋwaanɩ nan paɩ o taanɩ ta wʋra.

eng: By faith Enoch was taken up so that he didnt see death, and he wasnt found because God took him up. He was given approval for having pleased God before he was taken up.
local: Enɔkɩ dɩ na jɩgɩ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ tɩn ŋwaanɩ mʋ pɛ DƖ kwe-o DƖ ja DƖ di DƖ sɔŋɔ, yɩ tʋʋnɩ wʋ jaan-o. Wɛ na kwe-o kʋntʋ tɩn, nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ daa wʋ nɛ o je. Kʋ nan na wʋ́ loori kʋntʋ tɩn, kʋ maŋɩ kʋ ta Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm wʋnɩ kʋ wɩ, o poli Wɛ wʋ.

eng: Its impossible to please God without faith because the one who draws near to God must believe that he exists and that he rewards people who try to find him.
local: Nɔɔnʋ nan na ba jɩgɩ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ, o bá wanɩ o pa Wɛ wʋ poli. Wʋlʋ maama na twɛ Wɛ tɩn, kʋ fɩn mʋ sɩ kʋntʋ tu taa jɩgɩ wʋ-dɩdʋa o sɛ nɩ Wɛ sɩɩnɩ DƖ wʋra yɩ DƖ kɩ balʋ na lagɩ sɩ ba yi DƖ te tɩn lanyɩranɩ.

eng: By faith Noah responded with godly fear when he was warned about events he hadnt seen yet. He built an ark to deliver his household. With his faith, he criticized the world and became an heir of the righteousness that comes from faith.
local: Nowe dɩ dɛɛn na jɩgɩ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ tɩn mʋ pɛ o sɛ DƖ ni. Wɛ dɛɛn tagɩ dɩd-o kʋlʋ na lagɩ kʋ ba kʋ kɩ yɩ nabiinǝ yiǝ ta wʋ nɛ-kʋ tɩn. O ma sɛ Wɛ ni yɩ o pa naboro kamunu, yɩ o dɩ o sɔŋɔ tiinǝ zʋ kʋ wʋ, yɩ Wɛ pa ba lu na-fara bam. O kǝm dɩm kʋntʋ ma brɩ nɩ lʋgʋ baŋa nɔɔna balʋ na wʋ sɛ Wɛ ni tɩn ba jɩgɩ bʋra. Wɛ ma pa o na cɩga DƖ tee nɩ o na kɩ o wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: By faith Abraham obeyed when he was called to go out to a place that he was going to receive as an inheritance. He went out without knowing where he was going.
local: Abraham dɛɛn na jɩgɩ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ tɩn mʋ pɛ o nuŋi o tɩtɩ tɩʋ kʋm nɩ, o vu jǝgǝ kalʋ Wɛ na goni ni nɩ DƖ wʋ́ pa-o sɩ o dwi tiinǝ taa te tɩn. Wɛ na bǝŋ-o nɩ o nuŋi kʋntʋ tɩn, o sɩɩnɩ o sɛ o maa ve, yɩ o maŋɩ o yǝri je sɩm o na ve tɩn.

eng: By faith he lived in the land he had been promised as a stranger. He lived in tents along with Isaac and Jacob, who were coheirs of the same promise.
local: O na jɩgɩ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ tɩn ŋwaanɩ mʋ pɛ o vu o zʋʋrɩ tɩʋ kʋm Wɛ ya na maŋɩ DƖ go ni sɩ DƖ wʋ́ pa-o tɩn wʋnɩ nɩ vǝru te. O dɛɛn zʋʋrɩ vwe wʋnɩ mʋ. Yizakɩ dɩ Zakɔbɩ balʋ Wɛ na goni DƖ ni dɩm kʋntʋ dɩ ba dɩ tɩn dɩ zʋʋrɩ vwǝ wʋnɩ mʋ.

eng: He was looking forward to a city that has foundations, whose architect and builder is God.
local: Kʋ brɩ nɩ Abraham dɛɛn cǝgi sɩ o zʋ tɩʋ kʋlʋ kuri na fɔgɩ kʋ cwi lanyɩranɩ tɩn mʋ. Kʋ yɩ Wɛ tɩtɩ mʋ bǝgi kʋ kuri, yɩ dɩntʋ mʋ yɩ kʋ lwarʋ.

eng: By faith even Sarah received the ability to have a child, though she herself was barren and past the age for having children, because she believed that the one who promised was faithful.
local: Abraham kaanɩ Sara dɛɛn yɩ ka-dʋgʋ mʋ yɩ o kɛ lʋra. Dɩ kʋntʋ dɩ, o na jɩgɩ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ tɩn mʋ pɛ o sɛ nɩ Wɛ bá kwanɩ DƖ ni dɩm DƖ na goni tɩn yɩ o wanɩ o lʋ bu.

eng: So descendants were born from one man . They were as many as the number of the stars in the sky and as countless as the grains of sand on the seashore.
local: Kʋntʋ, kʋ zɩgɩ nɔn-dʋa kalʋ na yɩ Abraham yɩ o tiini o kwɩn zanzan tɩn yɩra nɩ mʋ Wɛ pɛ o lʋ dwi tiinǝ kɔgɔ kɔgɔ, nɩ calɩcwɩ na dagɩ wɛyuu nɩ naa nɩnɩʋ ni kasʋlʋ-wɩa na dagɩ yɩ kʋ warɩ kʋ ga te tɩn.

eng: All these people died in faith without receiving the promises, but they saw the promises from a distance and welcomed them. They confessed that they were strangers and immigrants on earth.
local: Nɔɔna balʋ dɛɛn na kɩ ba wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ kʋntʋ tɩn nan tɩgɩ yɩ ba wʋ nɛ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ Wɛ na goni ni sɩ DƖ pa-ba tɩn. Ba dɛɛn maŋɩ ba maanɩ nɩ wǝǝnu tɩm dɛ wʋ́ daanɩ yɩ tɩ laan ba, yɩ ba nan ya ta jɩgɩ wʋpolo kʋ ŋwaanɩ. Ba ma ta jaja nɩ ba yɩ vǝrǝ mʋ, ba kugu je tǝri lʋgʋ baŋa nɩ.

eng: People who say this kind of thing make it clear that they are looking for a homeland.
local: Balʋ maama na tɛ kʋntʋ doŋ tɩn brɩ nɩ ba daa ta jɩgɩ tɩɩna, sɩ baá na tɩʋ kʋlʋ na wʋ́ ta yɩ ba kugu je tɩn mʋ.

eng: If they had been thinking about the country that they had left, they would have had the opportunity to return to it.
local: Ba daa ba jɩgɩ tɩʋ kʋlʋ ba na nuŋi kʋ wʋnɩ tɩn wʋbʋŋa ba yuu nɩ. Ba ya na jɩgɩ kʋ wʋbʋŋa, ba ya wʋ́ wanɩ ba na cwǝŋǝ sɩ ba joori.

eng: But at this point in time, they are longing for a better country, that is, a heavenly one. Therefore, God isnt ashamed to be called their God—he has prepared a city for them.
local: Kʋ nan na yɩ te tɩn, ba wʋbʋŋa tiini ya zʋ tɩʋ kʋlʋ na lana kʋ ja gaalɩ tɩn. Kʋntʋ mʋ yɩ Wɛ tɩtɩ sɔŋɔ kʋm. Kʋ ma pa Baŋa-Wɛ jɩgɩ wʋpolo dɩ ba na bǝ-DƖ nɩ ba Tu Wɛ tɩn. DƖ nan maŋɩ DƖ jɩgɩ tɩʋ kʋlʋ DƖ na ti kʋ yigǝ sɩ DƖ pa-ba tɩn.

eng: By faith Abraham offered Isaac when he was tested. The one who received the promises was offering his only son.
local: Kʋ yɩ Abraham na kɩ o wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ te tɩn mʋ pɛ o dɛɛn sɛ o kwe o bu Yizakɩ sɩ o ma kaanɩ Baŋa-Wɛ maŋa kam DƖ na maŋ-o sɩ DƖ nii tɩn. Wɛ nan maŋɩ DƖ go ni DƖ pa-o nɩ: «Kʋʋ́ zɩgɩ Yizakɩ yɩra nɩ mʋ sɩ n dwi tiinǝ ma puli.» Dɩ kʋntʋ dɩ, o dɛɛn ta sɛ sɩ o ya ma o bu-dʋa kam o kaanɩ Wɛ, nɩ Wɛ na brɩ-o te tɩn.

eng: He figured that God could even raise him from the dead. So in a way he did receive him back from the dead.
local: O dɛɛn jɩgɩ cɩga nɩ Wɛ wʋ́ wanɩ DƖ bi Yizakɩ DƖ pa o yagɩ tʋʋnɩ. Kʋ nan na sɩɩnɩ kʋ kɩ te tɩn nyɩ dɩ DƖ bi-o tʋʋnɩ wʋnɩ mʋ.

eng: By faith Isaac also blessed Jacob and Esau concerning their future.
local: Yizakɩ dɩ na jɩgɩ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ tɩn mʋ pɛ o sɔɔlɩ Wɛ o pa o biǝ Zakɔbɩ dɩ Ezayu wǝǝnu tɩlʋ na lagɩ tɩ ba tɩ kɩ tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: By faith Jacob blessed each of Josephs sons as he was dying and bowed in worship over the head of his staff. .
local: Zakɔbɩ dɩ na tu o ga fɩɩn sɩ o tɩ tɩn, o na jɩgɩ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ tɩn mʋ pɛ o sɔɔlɩ Wɛ o pa o bu Zʋzɛfʋ biǝ bam maama bale. O dɛɛn ma zi o nacǝgǝ o zaŋɩ yɩ o zuli Wɛ.

eng: By faith Joseph recalled the exodus of the Israelites at the end of his life, and gave instructions about burying his bones.
local: Zʋzɛfʋ dɩ maŋa na twɛ sɩ o tɩ tɩn, o na jɩgɩ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ tɩn mʋ pɛ o ta dɩ Yisɩrayɛlɩ tiinǝ bam nɩ baá nuŋi Ezipi tɩʋ nɩ. O ma pa-ba ni nɩ, ba na ma nuŋǝ, sɩ ba guri o kwi sɩm Ezipi nɩ ba ja vu ba tɩtɩ tɩʋ.

eng: By faith Moses was hidden by his parents for three months when he was born, because they saw that the child was beautiful and they werent afraid of the kings orders.
local: Moyisi ko dɩ o nu dɩ dɛɛn na jɩgɩ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ tɩn mʋ pɛ ba kwe-o ba sǝgi canɩ sɩtɔ ba na lʋg-o maŋa kalʋ tɩn. Ba ma na nɩ bu wʋm yɩ bu-laa, yɩ ba wʋ kwarɩ fʋʋnɩ sɩ ba vɩn pa-farʋ wʋm ni.

eng: By faith Moses refused to be called the son of Pharaohs daughter when he was grown up.
local: Moyisi dɛɛn na kɩ nɔɔnʋ tɩn, kʋ yɩ o na jɩgɩ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ tɩn ŋwaanɩ mʋ pɛ o wʋ sɛ sɩ ba taa bǝ-o nɩ Pa-farʋ wʋm bukɔ bu.

eng: He chose to be mistreated with Gods people instead of having the temporary pleasures of sin.
local: O dɛɛn maa bʋŋɩ nɩ, o na tɔgɩ dɩ Wɛ nɔɔna bam o na yaara, kʋʋ́ ta garɩ o na yagɩ Wɛ cwǝŋǝ yɩ o daarɩ o di ywǝǝni dɩlʋ na bá daanɩ tɩn.

eng: He thought that the abuses he suffered for Christ were more valuable than the treasures of Egypt, since he was looking forward to the reward.
local: O nan bʋŋɩ nɩ, nɔɔna na goon-o nɩ ba na wʋ́ gooni Krisi wʋm Wɛ na lagɩ DƖ tʋŋɩ tɩn, kʋ garɩ o na nɛ jɩjɩgɩrʋ zanzan Ezipi nɩ, bɛŋwaanɩ o wʋbʋŋa dɛɛn tigi pɛɛrɩ dɩlʋ o na wʋ́ ba o joŋi Wɛ tee nɩ tɩn baŋa nɩ mʋ.

eng: By faith he left Egypt without being afraid of the kings anger. He kept on going as if he could see what is invisible.
local: Moyisi na jɩgɩ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ tɩn ŋwaanɩ mʋ pɛ o nuŋi Ezipi nɩ yɩ o wʋ kwarɩ pa-farʋ wʋm ban-zɔŋɔ kʋm. O maa jɩgɩ baarɩ yɩ o wʋ sɛ sɩ o joori kwaga, bɛŋwaanɩ o ye nɩ Wɛ dɩlʋ na ba naɩ dɩ yiǝ tɩn wʋ o yigǝ nɩ.

eng: By faith he kept the Passover and the sprinkling of blood, in order that the destroyer could not touch their firstborn children.
local: O na jɩgɩ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ tɩn mʋ pɛ o pa Yisɩrayɛlɩ tiinǝ bam di Pakɩ candiǝ ba sam nɩ. O ma pa ba kɩ jana ba misi ba di sɩm niǝ nɩ, sɩ tʋʋnɩ malɛka kalʋ na wʋ́ ba sɩ ka gʋ bǝkǝri-kwɩn sɩm maama tɩn daa yɩ kɩ ba tɩtɩ biǝ bam kʋlʋkʋlʋ.

eng: By faith they crossed the Red Sea as if they were on dry land, but when the Egyptians tried it, they were drowned.
local: Yisɩrayɛlɩ tiinǝ bam na kɩ ba wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ tɩn mʋ pɛ nɩnɩʋ kʋlʋ ba na bǝi nɩ Bu-sɩŋa tɩn na bam pɔɔrɩ bɩle ba daarɩ tɩ-kʋra, yɩ Yisɩrayɛlɩ tiinǝ bam tɔgɩ da ba bɛ. Ezipi tiinǝ bam na kwaanɩ sɩ ba tɔgɩ ba kwaga ba bɛ tɩn, na bam ma joori ba tʋ ba naagɩ daanɩ, yɩ kʋ pa ba maama li na ba tɩ.

eng: By faith Jerichos walls fell after the people marched around them for seven days.
local: Wɛ nɔɔna bam na jɩgɩ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ tɩn mʋ pɛ ba vu ba kaagɩ Zeriko tɩʋ kʋm da yarpɛ, yɩ kʋ kǝbri sɩm laan tʋ tɩga nɩ.

eng: By faith Rahab the prostitute wasnt killed with the disobedient because she welcomed the spies in peace.
local: Kʋ nan daa ta na yɩ Rahabɩ wʋlʋ ya na yɩ ka-boro yɩ o zʋʋrɩ Zeriko nɩ tɩn, o na kɩ o wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ tɩn mʋ pɛ o dɛɛn jeeri Yisɩrayɛlɩ nɔɔna balʋ na ve sɩ ba daanɩ tɩʋ kʋm ba nii tɩn lanyɩranɩ. Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ pɛ ba wʋ gʋ-o ba wǝli dɩ balʋ na vɩn Wɛ tɩn.

eng: What more can I say? I would run out of time if I told you about Gideon, Barak, Samson, Jephthah, David, Samuel, and the prophets.
local: Amʋ ya jɩgɩ taanɩ zanzan sɩ a ta a wǝli da, yɩ pwǝlǝ daa tǝrǝ sɩ a ŋɔɔnɩ nɔɔna badaara taanɩ a wǝli da. Amʋ ya wʋ́ maŋɩ Zidɩɔn dɩ Barakɩ dɩ Samsɔn dɩ Zefite dɩ Davidi dɩ Samʋwɛlɩ dɩ faŋa faŋa Wɛ nijoŋnǝ bam maama na yɩ te tɩn.

eng: Through faith they conquered kingdoms, brought about justice, realized promises, shut the mouths of lions.
local: Bantʋ maama dɛɛn jɩgɩ wʋ-dɩdʋa mʋ dɩ Wɛ, yɩ ba magɩ jara ba wanɩ tɩɩnɩ zanzan. Ba ma kwǝri ba kɩ kʋlʋ na yɩ cɩga tɩn, yɩ ba daarɩ ba joŋi kʋlʋ Wɛ na goni ni sɩ DƖ pa-ba tɩn. Ba ma pa nywǝǝnu niǝ pu yɩ tɩ daa wʋ jaanɩ-ba.

eng: put out raging fires, escaped from the edge of the sword, found strength in weakness, were mighty in war, and routed foreign armies.
local: Ba ma pa min-vʋrʋ dwe yɩ tɩ daa wʋ di-ba, yɩ ba wanɩ ba lu nɔɔna jɩa nɩ kʋ pa ba daa wʋ gʋ-ba dɩ sʋ-lwaanʋ. Ba ya bwǝnǝ mʋ yɩ ba na dam. Ba ma tiini ba na baarɩ, yɩ ba magɩ jara ba wanɩ ba zǝli dwi-gɛ tiinǝ balʋ na yɩ ba dʋna tɩn ba pa ba viiri.

eng: Women received back their dead by resurrection. Others were tortured and refused to be released so they could gain a better resurrection.
local: Kaana dɩ ma na ba nɔɔna balʋ ya na tɩga tɩn na joori ba bi. Nɔɔna badonnǝ ma wʋ sɛ sɩ ba vrɩ ba tɩtɩ nɔɔna balʋ na jɩgɩ-ba ba yaarɩ tɩn jɩŋa nɩ. Ba sɛ sɩ ba tɩ, sɩ ba joori ba bi ba na ŋwɩa kalʋ na lana ka dwe tɩn Wɛ tee nɩ.

eng: But others experienced public shame by being taunted and whipped; they were even put in chains and in prison.
local: Ba ma yáalɩ Wɛ nɔɔna badaara dɩ ba na mwanɩ-ba yɩ ba daarɩ ba magɩ-ba te tɩn. Ba ma vɔ nɔɔna badonnǝ dɩ capʋnnʋ yɩ ba kɩ-ba pɩɩna digǝ nɩ.

eng: They were stoned to death, they were cut in two, and they died by being murdered with swords. They went around wearing the skins of sheep and goats, needy, oppressed, and mistreated.
local: Ba ma dʋlɩ ba badonnǝ dɩ kandwa ba gʋ. Ba ma sɩɩrɩ badaara yɩra kuni bɩle. Ba ma kwe sʋ-lwaanʋ ba ma gʋ ba badonnǝ. Wɛ nɔɔna badonnǝ maa beerǝ jǝgǝ maama, yɩ ba zʋ peeni dɩ bʋnɩ tankwaalʋ yɩranɩ. Zʋrɩ dɩ cam ma jɩgɩ-ba, yɩ nɔɔna dɩ bɛɛsɩ-ba.

eng: The world didnt deserve them. They wandered around in deserts, mountains, caves, and holes in the ground.
local: Wɛ nɔɔna bam dɛɛn beeri kagʋa yuu nɩ dɩ pweeru yum nɩ mʋ, yɩ ba zʋʋrɩ ba tigi pweeru gugwǝǝru nɩ dɩ bɔɔna wʋnɩ. Lʋgʋ baŋa nan ya wʋ maŋɩ sɩ kʋ taa jɩgɩ nɔn-ŋʋna bam kʋntʋ dwi doŋ.

eng: All these people didnt receive what was promised, though they were given approval for their faith.
local: Nɔɔna bam kʋntʋ maama yɩrɩ dɛɛn zaŋɩ ba na kɩ ba wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ tɩn ŋwaanɩ mʋ. Nan dɩ kʋntʋ dɩ, ba wʋ nɛ Wɛ ya na goni ni sɩ DƖ kɩ-ba lanyɩranɩ te tɩn.

eng: God provided something better for us so they wouldnt be made perfect without us.
local: Wɛ dɛɛn nan bʋŋɩ sɩ DƖ kɩ kʋlʋ na tiini kʋ lana tɩn mʋ dɩbam ŋwaanɩ, DƖ na lagɩ sɩ DƖ pa dɩ́ maama tɔgɩ daanɩ dɩ́ ji lanyɩranɩ fasɩ DƖ yigǝ nɩ tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: So then, with endurance, lets also run the race that is laid out in front of us, since we have such a great cloud of witnesses surrounding us. Lets throw off any extra baggage, get rid of the sin that trips us up.
local: Dɩbam nan lwarɩ nɩ faŋa faŋa Wɛ nɔn-kɔgɔ kʋm kʋntʋ ba na brɩ nɩ ba jɩgɩ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ tɩn gilimi dɩbam ba brɩ cwǝŋǝ. Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ, pa-na dɩ́ yagɩ wo-yɔɔrʋ tɩlʋ maama na cʋ dɩbam tɩ pa dɩ́ warɩ dɩ́ tɔgɩ Wɛ lanyɩranɩ tɩn, dɩ lwarɩm dɩlʋ na jɩgɩ dɩbam tɩn, sɩ dɩ́ daarɩ dɩ́ kwaanɩ dɩ́ duri dɩ pu-dɩa cwǝŋǝ kalʋ Wɛ na pɛ dɩbam tɩn wʋnɩ.

eng: and fix our eyes on Jesus, faiths pioneer and perfecter. He endured the cross, ignoring the shame, for the sake of the joy that was laid out in front of him, and sat down at the right side of Gods throne.
local: Pa-na dɩ́ yɔɔrɩ dɩ́ taá nii Zezi. Wʋntʋ mʋ pɛ dɩbam puli dɩ́ kɩ dɩ́ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ, yɩ o ta wʋ́ pa dɩ́ taá jɩgɩ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ sɩ kʋ vu kʋ yi gurim. O dɛɛn ma vɔ pu-dɩa yɩ o yaarɩ o tɩ tʋʋn-dagara baŋa nɩ. O wʋ kwarɩ cavɩɩra sɩ o tɩ tʋʋnɩ dɩm kʋntʋ dwi, bɛŋwaanɩ o nɛ nɩ Wɛ tiŋi ywǝǝni mʋ sɩ DƖ pa-o. O laan ma daarɩ o vu o jǝni Baŋa-Wɛ paarɩ jangɔŋɔ kʋm jazɩm nɩ.

eng: Think about the one who endured such opposition from sinners so that you wont be discouraged and you wont give up.
local: Nan bʋŋɩ-na á nii Zezi na tiini o vɔ pu-dɩa dɩ nɔn-balwaarʋ na cul-o yɩ ba yaar-o te tɩn. Á nan yɩ zaŋɩ á ga baarɩ sɩ á yagɩ Wɛ cwǝŋǝ tɔgɩm.

eng: In your struggle against sin, you havent resisted yet to the point of shedding blood.
local: Abam na yǝni á kwaanɩ sɩ á jaŋɩ á cɔgɩ lwarɩm dam te tɩn, á wʋ nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ daa ta wʋ tɩgɩ kʋ ŋwaanɩ.

eng: and you have forgotten the encouragement that addresses you as sons and daughters: My child, dont make light of the Lords discipline or give up when you are corrected by him, .
local: Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm nan jɩgɩ taanɩ dɩlʋ na wʋ́ wanɩ kʋ pa abam na baarɩ tɩn, á na yɩ Wɛ biǝ tɩn ŋwaanɩ. Nan guli-na kʋ na brɩ abam te kʋ wɩ: «Amʋ bu, n Yuutu Wɛ na vaŋɩ nmʋ zwɛ, sɩ n yɩ zaŋɩ n kwe-kʋ n ma n ji kafɛ. Wɛ na kaanɩ-m, sɩ n yɩ pa n wʋ cɔgɩ.

eng: because the Lord disciplines whomever he loves, and he punishes every son or daughter whom he accepts. .
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ Baŋa-Wɛ na soe balʋ tɩn mʋ DƖ yǝni DƖ vaŋɩ ba zwa sɩ DƖ pa ba kʋrɩsɩ. Wʋlʋ maama Wɛ na joŋi sɩ o taa yɩ DƖ bu tɩn, DƖ yǝni DƖ ma cam mʋ DƖ kwe-o.».

eng: Bear hardship for the sake of discipline. God is treating you like sons and daughters! What child isnt disciplined by his or her father?.
local: Á na nɛ yaara, kʋ yɩ sɩ kʋ ma kwe abam mʋ. Á na yɩ Wɛ biǝ tɩn mʋ paɩ DƖ kwe abam kʋntʋ doŋ. Bu tǝrǝ o ko na ba vaŋɩ o zwɛ sɩ o kʋrɩsɩ.

eng: But if you dont experience discipline, which happens to all children, then you are illegitimate and not real sons and daughters.
local: Wɛ nan ya na wʋ vaŋɩ abam zwa nɩ DƖ na kɩ DƖ biǝ bam maama te tɩn, kʋ brɩ nɩ abam daɩ DƖ biǝ cɩga cɩga mʋ, á yɩ bu-tampirǝ mʋ.

eng: Whats more, we had human parents who disciplined us, and we respected them for it. How much more should we submit to the Father of spirits and live?.
local: Dɩbam kwǝ bam lʋgʋ baŋa nɩ tɩn yǝni ba vaŋɩ dɩ́ zwa mʋ, yɩ dɩ́ nɩgɩ-ba. Kʋ nan na yɩ dɩ́ Ko Wɛ dɩlʋ na te dɩ́ jwǝǝru tɩn, kʋ maŋɩ sɩ dɩ́ tiini dɩ́ sɛ DƖ ni, sɩ dɩ́ laan na ŋwɩa DƖ tee nɩ.

eng: Our human parents disciplined us for a little while, as it seemed best to them, but God does it for our benefit so that we can share his holiness.
local: Dɩ́ kwǝ bam lʋgʋ baŋa nɩ tɩn yǝni ba vaŋɩ dɩ́ zwa bɩna fɩnfɩɩn yɩranɩ mʋ, sɩ kʋ maŋɩ dɩ ba wʋbʋŋa na lagɩ te tɩn. Dɩ́ Ko Wɛ tɩtɩ nan kɩ kʋntʋ sɩ kʋ wǝli dɩbam mʋ, sɩ dɩ́ wanɩ dɩ́ tɔgɩ dɩ́ na dɩntʋ wʋ-poŋo kʋm doŋ.

eng: No discipline is fun while it lasts, but it seems painful at the time. Later, however, it yields the peaceful fruit of righteousness for those who have been trained by it.
local: Maŋa kalʋ ba na yǝni ba vaŋɩ dɩ́ zwa tɩn, kʋ yǝni kʋ pa dɩ́ wʋ cɔgɩ mʋ yɩ dɩ́ ba jɩgɩ wʋpolo. Kʋntʋ kwaga nɩ, zwa vaŋɩm dɩm laan wʋ́ zǝni balʋ dɩ na kwe-ba tɩn dɩ pa ba na nyɔɔrɩ, dɩ ba ŋwɩa na tɔgɩ cɩga yɩ ba jɩgɩ bɩcarɩ-zuru tɩn.

eng: So strengthen your drooping hands and weak knees!.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ, na-na dam dɩ baarɩ sɩ á taá tɔgɩ Wɛ cwǝŋǝ.

eng: Make straight paths for your feet so that if any part is lame, it will be healed rather than injured more seriously.
local: Á taá ve cwǝŋǝ kalʋ na yɔɔrɩ tɩn wʋnɩ, sɩ balʋ na ve yɩ ba duǝ tɩn yɩ saarɩ ba tʋ ba wǝli da, sɩ kʋ wanɩ kʋ pa ba nɛ sɩm je.

eng: Pursue the goal of peace along with everyone—and holiness as well, because no one will see the Lord without it.
local: Kwaanɩ-na sɩ á taá zʋʋra, sɩ ywǝǝni taa wʋ á dɩ nɔɔnʋ maama tɩtarɩ nɩ, sɩ á kwǝri á taá jɩgɩ wʋ-poŋo Wɛ yigǝ nɩ, bɛŋwaanɩ nɔɔnʋ na ba jɩgɩ wʋ-poŋo, o bá wanɩ o na Yuutu Baŋa-Wɛ.

eng: Make sure that no one misses out on Gods grace. Make sure that no root of bitterness grows up that might cause trouble and pollute many people.
local: Fɔgɩ-na á cɩ á tɩtɩ sɩ nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ yɩ ga Wɛ zaanɩ dɩm, sɩ nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ bɩcarɩ yɩ zaŋɩ dɩ ji nɩ vɩan na cana te tɩn, sɩ kʋ pa kʋ loŋi nɔɔna zanzan sɩ kʋ cɔgɩ-ba Wɛ cwǝŋǝ kam wʋnɩ.

eng: Make sure that no one becomes sexually immoral or ungodly like Esau. He sold his inheritance as the oldest son for one meal.
local: Á yɩ pa á wʋlʋwʋlʋ tɔgɩ boorim kikiǝ, naa o taa gooni wǝǝnu tɩlʋ na yɩ Wɛ nyɩm nɩ Ezayu dɛɛn na yɩ te tɩn. Wʋntʋ yigǝ tǝrǝ dɩ o na yɩ o ko bu-kwɩan tɩn. O kana maa wɔɛ, yɩ o kwe o nakwɩɩm dɩm o ma lǝni o nyaanɩ wʋm zʋŋa wʋdiu o di.

eng: You know that afterward, when he wanted to inherit the blessing, he was rejected because he couldnt find a way to change his heart and life, though he looked for it with tears.
local: Abam nan maŋɩ á ye kʋlʋ na kɩ-o kʋ kwaga seeni tɩn. O joori o ba o lagɩ sɩ o ko wʋm sɔɔlɩ Wɛ o pa-o, o na yɩ o bu-kwɩan tɩn ŋwaanɩ. O ma kwaanɩ o loori o ko wʋm dɩ yi-na. O ma wʋ nɛ cwǝŋǝ, bɛŋwaanɩ o daa warɩ o joori o kwanɩ o kǝm dɩm.

eng: You havent drawn near to something that can be touched: a burning fire, darkness, shadow, a whirlwind.
local: Abam na twɛ Wɛ te tɩn daɩ nɩnɛɛnɩ Yisɩrayɛlɩ tiinǝ bam dɛɛn na zɩgɩ piu kʋlʋ tǝŋǝ nɩ yɩ ba yiǝ na-kʋ yɩ ba kwǝri ba waɩ ba dwe-kʋ dɩ ba jɩa te tɩn. Min-fɔrɔ dɩ lim dɛɛn mʋ wʋra, dʋa ma mumunǝ kʋ yuu nɩ.

eng: a blast of a trumpet, and a sound of words that made the ones who heard it beg that there wouldnt be one more word.
local: Ba ma ni nabɔnɔ wum dɩ kwǝrǝ na ŋɔɔnɩ. Balʋ na ni kwǝrǝ kam kʋntʋ tɩn ma loori sɩ ka daa yɩ ŋɔɔnɩ ka wǝli da.

eng: They couldnt stand the command, If even a wild animal touches the mountain, it must be stoned. .
local: bɛŋwaanɩ ka na maŋɩ ka kaanɩ-ba te tɩn tiini kʋ dana kʋ pa-ba, dɩ ka na tagɩ dɩ ba ka wɩ: «Wʋlʋ maama na dwe piu kʋm tɩn, kʋ zɩ na yɩ varɩm mʋ dɩ, sɩ á dʋl-o dɩ kandwa á gʋ.».

eng: The sight was so frightening that Moses said, Im terrified and shaking.
local: Wǝǝnu tɩlʋ ba na nɛ tɩn ma tiini kʋ sɔɔrɩ ba yɩra, yɩ Moyisi tɩtɩ ta o wɩ: «Fʋʋnɩ tiini dɩ zʋ-nɩ yɩ a yɩra saɩ.».

eng: But you have drawn near to Mount Zion, the city of the living God, heavenly Jerusalem, to countless angels in a festival gathering.
local: Kʋ nan daɩ kʋntʋ abam tee nɩ. Abam laan twɛ piu kʋlʋ yɩrɩ na yɩ Siyɔn tɩn mʋ. Kʋ maa yɩ Ŋwɩa Tu Baŋa-Wɛ tʋ-kamunu Zeruzalɛm kʋlʋ na wʋ Wɛ-sɔŋɔ nɩ tɩn. Wɛ malɛsɩ kɔgɔ kɔgɔ ma jeeri daanɩ jǝgǝ kam kʋntʋ nɩ.

eng: to the assembly of Gods firstborn children who are registered in heaven, to God the judge of all, to the spirits of the righteous who have been made perfect.
local: Abam nan tu á wǝli Wɛ kɔgɔ kʋm wʋnɩ mʋ. Kʋ yɩ DƖ bu-kwɩn sɩm kɔgɔ kʋm ba yɩra na pʋpʋnɩ ya tiŋi Wɛ-sɔŋɔ tɔnɔ kʋm wʋnɩ tɩn candiǝ mʋ. Kʋ yɩ Wɛ dɩlʋ na wʋ́ di nabiinǝ maama sarɩya tɩn te mʋ á tu á yi. Kʋ maa yɩ balʋ na nɛ cɩga DƖ yigǝ nɩ yɩ DƖ laan pa ba bɩcara fɔgɩ ya kwɛ fasɩ tɩn jwǝǝru tɩm na wʋ mɛ tɩn mʋ á yiǝ.

eng: to Jesus the mediator of the new covenant, and to the sprinkled blood that speaks better than Abels blood.
local: Kʋ nan yɩ Zezi wʋlʋ Wɛ na dɛ o ŋwaanɩ DƖ go DƖ ni-dʋʋrɩ dɩm tɩn te mʋ á yiǝ. Kʋ yɩ Zezi jana kam ŋwaanɩ mʋ pɛ á fɔgɩ dɩ Wɛ. O jana kam nan brɩ dɩbam woŋo kʋlʋ na lana kʋ dwe kʋlʋ Abɛlɩ jana kam na brɩ tɩn.

eng: See to it that you dont resist the one who is speaking. If the people didnt escape when they refused to listen to the one who warned them on earth, how will we escape if we reject the one who is warning from heaven?.
local: Á taá ye sɩ á yɩ zaŋɩ á vɩn taanɩ dɩm Zezi na ŋɔɔnɩ dɩ abam tɩn. Nɔɔna balʋ dɛɛn na vɩn wʋlʋ na brɩ-ba Wɛ kwǝrǝ lʋgʋ baŋa nɩ tɩn, ba wʋ lugi cam wʋnɩ. Dɩbam dɩ nan na vɩn Zezi, o na wʋ Wɛ-sɔŋɔ nɩ yɩ o ŋɔɔnɩ dɩ dɩbam tɩn, dɩ́ wʋ́ wanɩ dɩ́ lu na?.

eng: His voice shook the earth then, but now he has made a promise: Still once more I will shake not only the earth but heaven also .
local: Faŋa faŋa tɩn, Wɛ kwǝrǝ dɛɛn pɛ tɩga baŋa sisiŋi, yɩ DƖ laan go DƖ ni DƖ wɩ: «Amʋ daa ta wʋ́ joori a pa tɩga baŋa sisiŋi bɩdwɩ, yɩ kʋ daɩ kantʋ yɩranɩ, kʋ laan wʋ́ wǝli dɩ wɛyuu maama mʋ.».

eng: The words still once more reveal the removal of what is shaken—the things that are part of this creation—so that what isnt shaken will remain.
local: Wɛ na tagɩ DƖ wɩ, DƖ ta wʋ́ joori DƖ kɩ kʋntʋ doŋ bɩdwɩ tɩn, kʋ brɩ nɩ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ DƖ na kɩ tɩn mʋ DƖ laan lagɩ DƖ sisiŋi-tɩ DƖ lɩ tɩ zɩga je nɩ, sɩ tɩ daa yɩ taa wʋra. Wǝǝnu tɩlʋ na bá wanɩ tɩ sisiŋi tɩn yɩranɩ laan mʋ wʋ́ daarɩ.

eng: Therefore, since we are receiving a kingdom that cant be shaken, lets continue to express our gratitude. With this gratitude, lets serve in a way that is pleasing to God with respect and awe.
local: Wɛ nan pɛ dɩ́ tɔgɩ dɩ́ di paarɩ dɩlʋ na bá wanɩ dɩ sisiŋi sɩ dɩ cɔgɩ tɩn mʋ. Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ dɩ́ wʋ́ kɩ Wɛ le, yɩ dɩ́ daarɩ dɩ́ pa-DƖ zulǝ yalʋ na tɔgɩ DƖ wʋbʋŋa tɩn, sɩ dɩ́ tʋŋɩ dɩ́ pa-DƖ, sɩ dɩ́ taá kwarɩ-DƖ lanyɩranɩ.

eng: because our God really is a consuming fire.
local: bɛŋwaanɩ dɩbam Tu Wɛ nyɩ dɩ min-fɔrɔ mʋ, yɩ dɩ di wǝǝnu tɩlʋ maama na ba tɔgɩ DƖ wʋbʋŋa tɩn.

eng: Keep loving each other like family.
local: Yɩ zaŋɩ á yagɩ da-sono á na yɩ da-ko-biǝ Zezi ŋwaanɩ tɩn.

eng: Dont neglect to open up your homes to guests, because by doing this some have been hosts to angels without knowing it.
local: Taá ye-na sɩ á taá kɩ vǝrǝ voro. Nɔɔna badonnǝ dɛɛn na kɩ kʋntʋ tɩn, kʋ pɛ ba jeeri Wɛ malɛsɩ mʋ ba sam nɩ, yɩ ba wʋ lwarɩ ba na yɩ balʋ tɩn.

eng: Remember prisoners as if you were in prison with them, and people who are mistreated as if you were in their place.
local: Guli-na balʋ na wʋ pɩɩna digǝ nɩ tɩn woŋo, nɩnɛɛnɩ abam dɩ tɔgɩ á wʋ pɩɩna digǝ nɩ mʋ te, sɩ á zǝni-ba. Guli-na balʋ nɔɔna na bɛɛsɩ-ba tɩn dɩ woŋo, nɩnɛɛnɩ abam dɩ tɔgɩ á yaarɩ mʋ te.

eng: Marriage must be honored in every respect, with no cheating on the relationship, because God will judge the sexually immoral person and the person who commits adultery.
local: Baarʋ dɩ o kaanɩ maama maŋɩ sɩ ba taa zʋʋrɩ daanɩ mʋ dɩ sono dɩ zulǝ. Barʋ wʋm dɩ kaanɩ wʋm maama maŋɩ sɩ ba taa jɩgɩ cɩga mʋ da-tee nɩ. Wɛ nan wʋ́ di balʋ maama na kɩ wo-zɔɔna dɩ boorim kikiǝ tɩn sarɩya.

eng: Your way of life should be free from the love of money, and you should be content with what you have. After all, he has said, I will never leave you or abandon you .
local: Á yɩ pa á ŋwɩa taa tɔgɩ sǝbu-lagɩ. Taá jɩgɩ-na wʋpolo dɩ á na jɩgɩ kʋlʋ tɩn. Bɛŋwaanɩ Wɛ maŋɩ DƖ ta DƖ wɩ: «Amʋ bá fɔgɩ a yagɩ abam maŋa dɩ maŋa.».

eng: This is why we can confidently say, The Lord is my helper, and I wont be afraid. What can people do to me? .
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ dɩbam wʋ́ ta jɩgɩ baarɩ sɩ dɩ́ taá wɩ: «Baŋa-Wɛ mʋ yɩ dɩ́ zǝnnu, dɩ́ bá ta kwarɩ fʋʋnɩ. Nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ bá wanɩ o kɩ dɩbam kʋlʋkʋlʋ.».

eng: Remember your leaders who spoke Gods word to you. Imitate their faith as you consider the way their lives turned out.
local: Taá guli-na nɔɔna balʋ na yɩ á yigǝ tiinǝ yɩ ba dɛɛn tɔɔlɩ Wɛ kwǝrǝ kam ba brɩ abam tɩn woŋo. Maanɩ-na á nii ba ŋwɩa dɛɛn na yɩ te sɩ kʋ vu kʋ yi ba tʋʋnɩ tɩn, sɩ á daarɩ á lwǝni ba na kɩ ba wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Zezi te tɩn.

eng: Jesus Christ is the same yesterday, today, and forever!.
local: Maŋa maama Zezi Krisi yɩ nɩ o na maŋɩ o yɩ te tɩn mʋ, diin dɩ zɩm maama sɩ kʋ taa ve maŋa kalʋ na ba ti tɩn.

eng: Dont be misled by the many strange teachings out there. Its a good thing for the heart to be strengthened by grace rather than by food. Food doesnt help those who live in this context.
local: Yɩ pa-na nɔɔna ma zaasɩm-gɛ ba ganɩ abam dɩ wǝǝnu dwi tǝri tǝri sɩ kʋ pa á ywǝri Wɛ cwǝŋǝ nɩ. Kʋ yɩ Wɛ zaanɩ dɩm ŋwaanɩ mʋ paɩ dɩ́ na baarɩ Wɛ cwǝŋǝ kam wʋnɩ, sɩ kʋ daɩ wʋdiiru culim ŋwaanɩ. Balʋ na tɔgɩ wʋdiiru culim cwǝŋǝ tɩn nan wʋ nɛ zǝnǝ kʋ ŋwaanɩ.

eng: We have an altar, and those who serve as priests in the meeting tent dont have the right to eat from it.
local: Zezi Krisi na kwe o tɩtɩ o ma kaanɩ Baŋa-Wɛ dɩbam ŋwaanɩ te tɩn daɩ kaanɩm dɩlʋ doŋ nɔɔna na wʋ́ di dɩ nwana yam tɩn. Balʋ na tʋŋɩ Wɛ vwe dɩm wʋnɩ ba pa-DƖ tɩn, ba ba jɩgɩ cwǝŋǝ sɩ ba twǝri kaanɩm dɩm kʋntʋ wǝǝnu ba di.

eng: The blood of the animals is carried into the holy of holies by the high priest as an offering for sin, and their bodies are burned outside the camp.
local: Kʋ na kɩ te tɩn, Wɛ kaanɩm yuutu wʋm yǝni o gʋ vara mʋ, yɩ o ja ba jana kam o zʋ Wɛ-di-laa kʋm wʋ o ma saarɩ nɔɔna bam lwarɩm. Kʋ daarɩ vara bam tɩtɩ, baá ja nuŋi tɩʋ kʋm daa mʋ ba zwɛ maama.

eng: And so Jesus also suffered outside the city gate to make the people holy with his own blood.
local: Zezi tʋʋnɩ dɩm dɩ nan dɛ kʋntʋ doŋ mʋ. O yaarɩ mʋ o tɩ tɩʋ kʋm daa nɩ, yɩ o ma o tɩtɩ jana kam o saarɩ nɔɔna bam lwarɩm.

eng: So now, lets go to him outside the camp, bearing his shame.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ, pa-na dɩ́ nuŋi dɩ́ vu o te tɩʋ kʋm daa nɩ, sɩ dɩ́ tɔgɩ dɩ́ sɛ o goonǝ yam doŋ.

eng: We dont have a permanent city here, but rather we are looking for the city that is still to come.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ, lʋgʋ baŋa yo seeni dɩbam ba jɩgɩ tɩʋ kʋlʋ na wʋ́ ta yɩ dɩ́ kugu je maŋa maama tɩn, dɩ́ nan tɩɩnɩ tɩʋ kʋlʋ na lagɩ kʋ ba tɩn mʋ.

eng: So lets continually offer up a sacrifice of praise through him, which is the fruit from our lips that confess his name.
local: Pa-na dɩ́ tɔgɩ Zezi ŋwaanɩ dɩ́ taá zuli Wɛ maŋa maama. Kʋntʋ mʋ yɩ kʋlʋ dɩ́ na wʋ́ kwe dɩ́ ma kaanɩ-DƖ tɩn. Dɩ́ ni-taanɩ na brɩ Wɛ dam te tɩn mʋ yɩ pɛɛra yalʋ dɩ́ na wʋ́ pa-DƖ tɩn.

eng: Dont forget to do good and to share what you have because God is pleased with these kinds of sacrifices.
local: Á yɩ swe sɩ á taá kɩ kǝm-laarʋ, sɩ á daarɩ á taá zǝni daanɩ, sɩ kʋntʋ mʋ yɩ kaanɩm dɩlʋ na poli Wɛ wʋ tɩn.

eng: Rely on your leaders and defer to them, because they watch over your whole being as people who are going to be held responsible for you. They need to be able to do this with pleasure and not with complaints about you, because that wouldnt help you.
local: Taá nɩgɩ-na á yigǝ tiinǝ, sɩ á daarɩ á taá sɛ ba ni, sɩ bantʋ mʋ nii abam na wʋ́ ta ŋwɩ dɩ Wɛ te tɩn baŋa nɩ, yɩ baá ba ba zɩgɩ Wɛ yigǝ nɩ sɩ ba brɩ ba na tʋŋɩ kʋlʋ abam ŋwaanɩ tɩn. Nan taá nɩgɩ-ba sɩ ba wanɩ ba tʋŋɩ dɩ wʋpolo. Kʋ na daɩ kʋntʋ, kʋʋ́ pa ba wʋ cɔgɩ, yɩ kʋ daa bá ta jɩgɩ zǝnǝ kʋ pa abam.

eng: Pray for us. Were sure that we have a good conscience, and we want to do the right thing in every way.
local: Taá loori-na Wɛ á pa dɩbam. Dɩbam ye dɩ́ bɩcara nɩ, nɩ dɩ́ wʋ kɩ kʋlʋ na yɩ balɔrɔ tɩn, yɩ dɩ́ lagɩ sɩ dɩ́ taá kɩ kʋlʋ na lana tɩn mʋ maŋa maama.

eng: Im particularly asking you to do this so that I can be returned to you quickly.
local: Amʋ nan tiini a loori abam sɩ á taá warɩ Wɛ á pa-nɩ, sɩ kʋ pa a na cwǝŋǝ a joori abam te lele.

eng: May the God of peace, who brought back the great shepherd of the sheep, our Lord Jesus, from the dead by the blood of the eternal covenant.
local: Wʋ-zuru Tu Baŋa-Wɛ mʋ bi dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi DƖ pa o yagɩ tʋʋnɩ, yɩ DƖ pa o yɩ nayɩr-ŋʋm cɩga cɩga, sɩ o taa nii dɩbam balʋ na nyɩ dɩ o peeni te tɩn baŋa nɩ, dɩ o na tɩgɩ dɩbam ŋwaanɩ tɩn. Wɛ ma da o jana kam ŋwaanɩ DƖ go ni dɩlʋ na wʋ́ ta wʋra sɩ kʋ taa ve maŋa kalʋ na ba ti tɩn.

eng: equip you with every good thing to do his will, by developing in us what pleases him through Jesus Christ. To him be the glory forever and always. Amen.
local: Wɛ wʋ́ zǝni abam sɩ á wanɩ á kɩ wo-laarʋ tɩlʋ maama na tɔgɩ DƖ wʋbʋŋa tɩn, yɩ DƖ wʋ́ tɔgɩ Zezi Krisi ŋwaanɩ DƖ kwɛ dɩbam nɩ kʋ na wʋ́ poli DƖ wʋ te tɩn. Zezi mʋ maŋɩ dɩ zulǝ sɩ kʋ taa ve maŋa kalʋ na ba ti tɩn. Amina.

eng: I urge you, brothers and sisters, to put up with this message of encouragement, since Ive only written a short letter to you!.
local: A ko-biǝ-ba, a loori abam sɩ á zuri á yɩra á cǝgi amʋ na pʋpʋnɩ kʋlʋ sɩ a ma pa á na baarɩ tɩn. Amʋ na pʋpʋnɩ taanɩ dɩlʋ tɩn nan ba dwara.

eng: You should know that our brother Timothy has been set free. If he comes soon, we will travel together to see you.
local: Amʋ lagɩ sɩ a pa abam lwarɩ nɩ ba yagɩ dɩ́ ko-bu Timoti yɩ o nuŋi pɩɩna digǝ nɩ. O nan na tu amʋ te lɩla, a laan wʋ́ pa dɩ́ tɔgɩ daanɩ dɩ́ ba dɩ́ na abam.

eng: Greet your leaders and all of Gods holy people. The group from Italy greets you.
local: Jɔɔnɩ-na á yigǝ tiinǝ bam dɩ Wɛ nɔɔna bam maama á pa dɩbam. Yitali tiinǝ bam dɩ jɔɔnɩ abam.

eng: May grace be with all of you.
local: Wɛ wʋ́ pa abam maama yu-yoŋo.

eng: From James, a slave of God and of the Lord Jesus Christ. To the twelve tribes who are scattered outside the land of Israel. Greetings!.
local: Amʋ Zakɩ wʋlʋ na yɩ Wɛ tɩntʋŋnʋ dɩ dɩbam Yuutu Zezi Krisi tɩntʋŋnʋ tɩn mʋ pʋpʋnɩ tɔnɔ kʋntʋ. A jɔɔnɩ abam balʋ maama na yɩ Wɛ nɔɔna yɩ á jagɩ á wʋ lʋgʋ baŋa je maama nɩ tɩn.

eng: My brothers and sisters, think of the various tests you encounter as occasions for joy.
local: A ko-biǝ-ba, maŋa kalʋ maama cam na tu abam baŋa tɩn, sɩ á taá jɩgɩ-na wʋpolo lanyɩranɩ, bɛŋwaanɩ abam ye nɩ yaara dwi tǝri tǝri na tui abam te, kʋ yɩ sɩ ya maŋɩ abam mʋ ya nii á na kɩ á wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ te tɩn. Kʋntʋ kwaga nɩ, kʋ laan wʋ́ pa á taá zɩgɩ kǝŋkǝŋ dɩ pu-dɩa.

eng: Let this endurance complete its work so that you may be fully mature, complete, and lacking in nothing.
local: Kwaanɩ-na á tiini á zɩgɩ kǝŋkǝŋ dɩ pu-dɩa sɩ á yɩ joori kwaga, sɩ kʋ laan wʋ́ pa á ji nɔn-ŋʋna yɩ á wʋbʋŋa bɩ fasɩ dɩ Wɛ tɔgɩm, sɩ á yɩ ga kʋlʋkʋlʋ.

eng: But anyone who needs wisdom should ask God, whose very nature is to give to everyone without a second thought, without keeping score. Wisdom will certainly be given to those who ask.
local: Abam wʋlʋ maama nan na yǝri kʋlʋ na lana sɩ o kɩ tɩn, kʋntʋ tu maŋɩ sɩ o loori swan mʋ Wɛ tee nɩ. Wɛ yǝni DƖ paɩ nɔɔna maama dɩ wʋpolo mʋ, yɩ DƖ ba vɩn nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ. Nmʋ na loori swan DƖ tee nɩ, DƖ wʋ́ pa-m.

eng: Whoever asks shouldnt hesitate. They should ask in faith, without doubting. Whoever doubts is like the surf of the sea, tossed and turned by the wind.
local: Nmʋ nan na loori woŋo Wɛ tee nɩ, sɩ n ta n kɩ n wʋ-dɩdʋa nɩ nń na-kʋ. Yɩ ta n jɩgɩ bʋbwɛa kʋ baŋa nɩ, bɛŋwaanɩ bʋbwɛa tu nyɩ nɩ viu na fuli na kʋ pa ba ve yigǝ dɩ kwaga te tɩn mʋ.

eng: People like that should never imagine that they will receive anything from the Lord.
local: Kʋntʋ tu jɩgɩ wʋrʋ tɩle mʋ, yɩ o za o wʋbʋŋa dɩ kʋlʋ maama o na bʋŋɩ sɩ o kɩ tɩn. Nɔɔnʋ wʋm kʋntʋ doŋ yɩ taa bʋŋɩ nɩ oó na woŋo dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm tee nɩ.

eng: Brothers and sisters who are poor should find satisfaction in their high status.
local: Nmʋ wʋlʋ na tɔgɩ Zezi yɩ yinigǝ jɩgɩ-m tɩn, sɩ n ta n jɩgɩ wʋpolo dɩ Wɛ na pɛ n jɩgɩ yɩrɩ DƖ tee nɩ tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: Those who are wealthy should find satisfaction in their low status, because they will die off like wildflowers.
local: Nmʋ wʋlʋ nan na yɩ nadum tɩn, sɩ n dɩ ta n jɩgɩ wʋpolo dɩ Wɛ na pɛ n tu n tɩtɩ DƖ tee nɩ tɩn ŋwaanɩ. Nabiinǝ ba daanɩ yɩ ba tʋa, ba na maŋɩ ba yɩ nadunǝ te dɩ. Kʋ nyɩ nɩ gaarʋ na kɩ punnu yɩ tɩ lamma te tɩn mʋ.

eng: The sun rises with its scorching heat and dries up the grass so that its flowers fall and its beauty is lost. Just like that, in the midst of their daily lives, the wealthy will waste away.
local: Wɩa nan na bɩga, tɩ wʋ́ kwaarɩ mʋ tɩ siiri tɩ tɩ, yɩ tɩ lam dɩm je. Kʋ nan yɩ bɩdwɩ mʋ dɩ nadunǝ na wʋ́ ba ba tɩ ba jɩjɩgɩrʋ tɩm lagɩm wʋnɩ te tɩn.

eng: Those who stand firm during testing are blessed. They are tried and true. They will receive the life God has promised to those who love him as their reward.
local: Nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ na wʋ cam wʋnɩ yɩ o zɩgɩ kǝŋkǝŋ dɩ pu-dɩa sɩ kʋ vu kʋ yi kweelim tɩn mʋ jɩgɩ yu-yoŋo. Bɛŋwaanɩ, cam dɩm na kɛ, o laan wʋ́ na pɛɛrɩ dɩlʋ na yɩ ŋwɩa cɩga cɩga tɩn Wɛ tee nɩ. Ŋwɩa kam kʋntʋ mʋ Wɛ goni ni sɩ DƖ pa balʋ maama na so-DƖ tɩn.

eng: No one who is tested should say, God is tempting me! This is because God is not tempted by any form of evil, nor does he tempt anyone.
local: Nɔɔnʋ na nɛ maŋɩm, o yɩ zaŋɩ o ta nɩ Wɛ mʋ maŋ-o, sɩ kʋlʋkʋlʋ tǝrǝ kʋ na wʋ́ wanɩ kʋ maŋɩ Wɛ sɩ DƖ tusi, yɩ Wɛ tɩtɩ bá maŋɩ nɔɔnʋ sɩ o tusi.

eng: Everyone is tempted by their own cravings; they are lured away and enticed by them.
local: Woŋo kʋlʋ na maŋɩ nɔɔnʋ tɩn yɩ o tɩtɩ wʋbʋŋa mʋ. Yantʋ mʋ paɩ o fra zʋʋrɩ wo-balwaarʋ, yɩ ya gan-o ya paɩ o tʋɩ cɩgɩrʋ wʋnɩ.

eng: Once those cravings conceive, they give birth to sin; and when sin grows up, it gives birth to death.
