local: Nmʋ na sɛ n tɔgɩ n wʋbʋŋ-balwaarʋ tɩm, tɩ laan wʋ́ pa n kɩ wo-lwaanʋ mʋ, yɩ wo-lwaanʋ tɩm na puli tɩ daga, tɩ laan wʋ́ ja-m tɩ zʋ tʋʋnɩ wʋnɩ mʋ.

eng: Dont be misled, my dear brothers and sisters.
local: A ko-bu-sonnu-ba, á yɩ zaŋɩ á ganɩ á tɩtɩ.

eng: Every good gift, every perfect gift, comes from above. These gifts come down from the Father, the creator of the heavenly lights, in whose character there is no change at all.
local: Pɛɛrɩ dɩlʋ maama na lana dɩ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ na maŋɩ fasɩ tɩn nuŋi dɩ́ Ko Wɛ tee nɩ mʋ. Dɩntʋ mʋ kɩ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ maama na wʋ wɛyuu nɩ yɩ tɩ paɩ pooni tɩn. Wǝǝnu tɩm kʋntʋ mʋ yǝni tɩ waɩ tɩ pipiri wɩa dɩ tɩtɩɩ. Wɛ nan ba jɩgɩ lim dɩ fɩnfɩɩn dɩ, DƖ ba lǝni nɩ tɩntʋ wǝǝnu tɩm te.

eng: He chose to give us birth by his true word, and here is the result: we are like the first crop from the harvest of everything he created.
local: Wɛ tɩtɩ mʋ lɩ wʋbʋŋa DƖ tɔgɩ DƖ cɩga kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam ŋwaanɩ DƖ pa dɩ́ na DƖ ŋwɩ-dʋŋa kam, sɩ dɩ́ taá yɩ balʋ na yɩ dayigǝ tiinǝ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ maama DƖ na kɩ tɩn wʋnɩ.

eng: Know this, my dear brothers and sisters: everyone should be quick to listen, slow to speak, and slow to grow angry.
local: A ko-bu-sonnu-ba, á ye nɩ a na tɛ kʋlʋ dɩ abam tɩn yɩ cɩga mʋ. Nɔɔnʋ maama maŋɩ sɩ o zuri o yɩra mʋ o taa cǝgi o doŋ taanɩ, sɩ o yɩ taa garɩ o lǝrǝ. O maŋɩ sɩ o ja o banɩ mʋ.

eng: This is because an angry person doesnt produce Gods righteousness.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ bam na zaŋɩ tɩn bá wanɩ o kɩ wo-laarʋ tɩlʋ na sui Wɛ wʋ tɩn.

eng: Therefore, with humility, set aside all moral filth and the growth of wickedness, and welcome the word planted deep inside you—the very word that is able to save you.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ, lɩ-na wo-digiru tɩlʋ maama na wʋ á wʋnɩ tɩn á yagɩ, sɩ á cɩ á tɩtɩ dɩ tɩtʋŋ-balwaarʋ dwi maama kǝm. Wɛ maŋɩ DƖ kwe DƖ taanɩ dɩm DƖ kɩ abam bɩcara nɩ. Nan tu-na á tɩtɩ á sɛ-dɩ lanyɩranɩ, sɩ dɩ wʋ́ wanɩ dɩ vrɩ abam dɩ yagɩ.

eng: You must be doers of the word and not only hearers who mislead themselves.
local: Á nan taá kɩ-na Wɛ taanɩ dɩm na wɩ te tɩn, sɩ kʋ ta daɩ cǝgim yɩranɩ. Nɔɔnʋ na cǝgi Wɛ taanɩ dɩm yɩ o ba kɩ dɩ na brɩ te tɩn, o ganɩ o tɩtɩ mʋ. O nyɩ nɩ nɔɔnʋ na kwe niu o ma nii o tɩtɩ te tɩn mʋ.

eng: They look at themselves, walk away, and immediately forget what they were like.
local: O na nii o yibiyǝ na yɩ te tɩn yɩ o laan viiri, o da swe o yibiyǝ kam na yɩ te tɩn.

eng: But there are those who study the perfect law, the law of freedom, and continue to do it. They dont listen and then forget, but they put it into practice in their lives. They will be blessed in whatever they do.
local: Kʋ nan na yɩ Wɛ taanɩ dɩm, dɩntʋ lana fasɩ yɩ dɩ waɩ dɩ joŋi nɔɔna dɩ pa ba na ba tɩtɩ. Nɔɔnʋ na zaasɩ-dɩ yɩ o jɩgɩ-dɩ o yuu nɩ maŋa maama, o bá ta nyɩ dɩ wʋlʋ na garɩ o swe cɩga kalʋ o na lwarɩ tɩn. Kʋntʋ tu yɩ wʋlʋ na sɩɩnɩ o kɩ Wɛ cɩga kam na brɩ te tɩn mʋ, yɩ oó na wʋpolo lanyɩranɩ o tɩtʋŋa maama baŋa nɩ.

eng: If those who claim devotion to God dont control what they say, they mislead themselves. Their devotion is worthless.
local: Abam wʋlʋ na bʋŋɩ nɩ o tɔgɩ Wɛ yɩ o warɩ o ni-taanɩ o ja, kʋntʋ tu ganɩ o tɩtɩ mʋ yɩ o Wɛ tɔgɩm dɩm yɩ kafɛ mʋ.

eng: True devotion, the kind that is pure and faultless before God the Father, is this: to care for orphans and widows in their difficulties and to keep the world from contaminating us.
local: Dɩ́ Ko Wɛ nan na lagɩ sɩ dɩ́ sɛ-DƖ te tɩn mʋ yɩ sɩ dɩ́ taá zǝni bɩtara dɩ kadǝnǝ balʋ na yaarɩ tɩn, sɩ dɩ́ kwaanɩ dɩ́ cɩ dɩ́ tɩtɩ dɩ lʋgʋ baŋa wo-yɔɔrʋ tɩm. Wɛ tɔgɩm dɩm kʋntʋ doŋ mʋ tiini kʋ lamma yɩ tusim tǝri kʋ wʋnɩ.

eng: My brothers and sisters, when you show favoritism you deny the faithfulness of our Lord Jesus Christ, who has been resurrected in glory.
local: A ko-biǝ-ba, abam yɩ balʋ na sɩɩnɩ á sɛ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi Krisi wʋlʋ na jɩgɩ paarɩ zulǝ tɩn mʋ. Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ, kʋ wʋ maŋɩ sɩ á taá kuri nɔɔna daanɩ dɩ á na zuli-ba te tɩn.

eng: Imagine two people coming into your meeting. One has a gold ring and fine clothes, while the other is poor, dressed in filthy rags.
local: Abam na jeeri daanɩ sɩ á warɩ Wɛ, kʋ ba dwe sɩ nɔɔna bale ba abam te. Dɩdʋa maa yɩ nadum o zʋ gwar-ŋʋnnʋ, yɩ o kɩ sǝbu-sɩŋa jafʋlɩ o jɩŋa nɩ. O doŋ wʋm maa yɩ yinigǝ tu, yɩ o zʋ gan-zwaanʋ.

eng: Then suppose that you were to take special notice of the one wearing fine clothes, saying, Heres an excellent place. Sit here. But to the poor person you say, Stand over there; or, Here, sit at my feet.
local: Kʋ waɩ sɩ á jeeri nadum wʋm lanyɩranɩ yɩ á pa-o jǝŋǝ je, á daarɩ á ta dɩ yinigǝ tu wʋm nɩ, o taa zɩgɩ daa nɩ, naa o jǝni tɩga nɩ á nɛ niǝ nɩ.

eng: Wouldnt you have shown favoritism among yourselves and become evil-minded judges?.
local: Á na pɔɔrɩ-ba daanɩ kʋntʋ doŋ, kʋ brɩ nɩ á kuri nɔɔna daanɩ mʋ. Kʋ nan yɩ wʋbʋŋ-lwaanʋ mʋ paɩ á pɔɔrɩ nɔɔna daanɩ kʋntʋ.

eng: My dear brothers and sisters, listen! Hasnt God chosen those who are poor by worldly standards to be rich in terms of faith? Hasnt God chosen the poor as heirs of the kingdom he has promised to those who love him?.
local: A ko-bu-sonnu-ba, fɔgɩ-na á cǝgi. Wɛ mʋ sɩɩnɩ DƖ kuri balʋ na yɩ yinigǝ tiinǝ nabiinǝ yibiyǝ nɩ tɩn, sɩ ba taa yɩ nadunǝ DƖ tee nɩ ba na kɩ ba wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Zezi tɩn ŋwaanɩ, sɩ ba tɔgɩ ba wǝli DƖ paarɩ dɩlʋ DƖ na maŋɩ DƖ go ni sɩ DƖ pa balʋ na so-DƖ tɩn wʋnɩ.

eng: But you have dishonored the poor. Dont the wealthy make life difficult for you? Arent they the ones who drag you into court?.
local: Kʋ nan na yɩ kʋntʋ tɩn, bɛɛ mʋ kɩa yɩ á gooni yinigǝ tiinǝ bam? Kʋ daɩ nadunǝ bam mʋ jɩgɩ abam ba bɛɛsɩ na? Bantʋ mʋ yǝni ba ja abam dɩ dam ba ja vu ba saŋɩ sarɩya dim je nɩ.

eng: Arent they the ones who insult the good name spoken over you at your baptism?.
local: Bantʋ mʋ jɩgɩ Zezi yɩr-ŋʋm dɩlʋ ba na bǝ abam nɩ o biǝ tɩn ba twɩa.

eng: You do well when you really fulfill the royal law found in scripture, Love your neighbor as yourself. .
local: Abam na sɛ Baŋa-Wɛ ni dɩlʋ na pʋpʋnɩ Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm wʋnɩ dɩ wɩ: «Ta n soe n doŋ nɩ n tɩtɩ te» tɩn, á kɩ lanyɩranɩ.

eng: But when you show favoritism, you are committing a sin, and by that same law you are exposed as a lawbreaker.
local: Kʋ daarɩ, á na pɔɔrɩ nɔɔna daanɩ dɩ á na zuli-ba te tɩn, kʋ brɩ nɩ á kɩ lwarɩm mʋ, yɩ Wɛ niǝ yam brɩ nɩ á kɩ á cɔgɩ mʋ.

eng: Anyone who tries to keep all of the Law but fails at one point is guilty of failing to keep all of it.
local: Nɔɔnʋ na sɛ Wɛ niǝ yam maama yɩ o daarɩ o cɔgɩ ya dɩdʋa yɩranɩ, kʋ brɩ nɩ o cɔgɩ ya maama mʋ.

eng: The one who said, Dont commit adultery , also said, Dont commit murder . So if you dont commit adultery but do commit murder, you are a lawbreaker.
local: Wɛ mʋ pɛ DƖ ni DƖ wɩ: «Yɩ zaŋɩ n kɩ boorim.» Dɩntʋ nan ta mʋ wɩ: «Yɩ gʋ nɔɔnʋ.» Mʋ kʋ kuri, n na maŋɩ n wʋ kɩ boorim, yɩ n na gʋ nɔɔnʋ, kʋ brɩ nɩ n ta cɔgɩ Wɛ ni mʋ.

eng: In every way, then, speak and act as people who will be judged by the law of freedom.
local: Taá pa-na á ni-taanɩ dɩ á kikiǝ maama taa tɔgɩ Wɛ ni, sɩ dɩntʋ mʋ waɩ dɩ vrɩ nɔɔna dɩ pa ba naɩ ba tɩtɩ, sɩ Wɛ wʋ́ tɔgɩ DƖ ni dɩm kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ DƖ ma di dɩbam sarɩya.

eng: There will be no mercy in judgment for anyone who hasnt shown mercy. Mercy overrules judgment.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ, nɔɔnʋ na ba jɩgɩ o donnǝ ŋwaŋa, Wɛ na wʋ́ di kʋntʋ tu sarɩya maŋa kalʋ tɩn, DƖ bá duri o dɩ yibwǝnǝ. Wʋlʋ nan na jɩgɩ o donnǝ ŋwaŋa tɩn, Wɛ dɩ wʋ́ duri o yibwǝnǝ sɩ o yɩ na cam.

eng: My brothers and sisters, what good is it if people say they have faith but do nothing to show it? Claiming to have faith cant save anyone, can it?.
local: A ko-biǝ-ba, nɔɔnʋ na tɛ o wɩ, wʋm kɩ o wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ, yɩ o laan ba kɩ Wɛ na lagɩ te tɩn, kʋ jɩgɩ kuri na? O Wɛ tɔgɩm dɩm kʋntʋ wʋ́ wanɩ dɩ vrɩ-o dɩ yagɩ na?.

eng: Imagine a brother or sister who is naked and never has enough food to eat.
local: Dɛ dɩlʋ n ko-bu dɩdʋa na tu nmʋ te yɩ o ba jɩgɩ gɔrɔ sɩ o zʋ dɩ o ni-wʋdiu sɩ o di.

eng: What if one of you said, Go in peace! Stay warm! Have a nice meal!? What good is it if you dont actually give them what their body needs?.
local: yɩ nmʋ na tagɩ dɩd-o n wɩ, o ve sɩ Wɛ wʋ́ zǝn-o DƖ pa o na gɔrɔ dɩ o ni-wʋdiu, yɩ n laan daarɩ n wʋ pɛ-o kʋlʋ o na lagɩ tɩn, kʋ jɩgɩ kuri na?.

eng: My brothers and sisters, not many of you should become teachers, because we know that we teachers will be judged more strictly.
local: A ko-biǝ-ba, abam zanzan yɩ zaŋɩ á taá kwaana sɩ á ji karanyɩna tiinǝ. Bɛŋwaanɩ á ye nɩ, Wɛ sarɩya dɛ dɩm nɩ kʋʋ́ ta tiini kʋ cana kʋ pa dɩbam balʋ na yɩ karanyɩna tiinǝ tɩn kʋ dwe nɔɔnʋ maama.

eng: In the same way, faith is dead when it doesnt result in faithful activity.
local: Wɛ tɔgɩm dɩ yɩ kʋntʋ mʋ. Nmʋ na tɛ nɩ n kɩ n wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ, yɩ n laan daarɩ n ba kɩ kǝm-laarʋ, kʋ brɩ nɩ n Wɛ tɔgɩm dɩm yɩ kafɛ mʋ.

eng: We all make mistakes often, but those who dont make mistakes with their words have reached full maturity. Like a bridled horse, they can control themselves entirely.
local: Dɩbam maama yǝni dɩ́ kɩ dɩ́ tusǝ mʋ. Kʋ daarɩ nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ nan na ba kɩ o tusǝ o ni-taanɩ wʋnɩ tɩn yɩ nɔn-ŋʋm mʋ, yɩ o waɩ o tɩtɩ o jaanɩ lanyɩranɩ.

eng: Someone might claim, You have faith and I have action. But how can I see your faith apart from your actions? Instead, Ill show you my faith by putting it into practice in faithful action.
local: Nɔɔnʋ waɩ o tɛ nɩ, nɔɔna babam kɩ ba wʋ-dɩdʋa mʋ dɩ Wɛ, yɩ badaara kɩ kǝm-laarʋ. Amʋ nan na lǝri te tɩn mʋ tɩntʋ: «Nmʋ na ba kɩ kǝm-laarʋ tɩn, nń kɩ ta mʋ n brɩ nɩ n sɩɩnɩ n kɩ n wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ? Kʋ nan na yɩ amʋ, aá ma a kǝm-laarʋ tɩm mʋ a brɩ nɩ a sɩɩnɩ a kɩ a wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ.».

eng: When we bridle horses and put bits in their mouths to lead them wherever we want, we can control their whole bodies.
local: Nɔɔnʋ na yǝni o lagɩ o di sisǝŋǝ, oó kwe gara mʋ o kɩ ka ni nɩ, sɩ o wanɩ o pa ka vu mɛ dɩ mɛ o na lagɩ tɩn.

eng: Its good that you believe that God is one. Ha! Even the demons believe this, and they tremble with fear.
local: Nmʋ sɛ nɩ Wɛ yɩ dɩdʋa yɩranɩ mʋ na? N na sɛ kʋntʋ, kʋ lana. Ciciri tɩtɩ dɩ ye kʋntʋ, yɩ kʋ paɩ sɩ yɩra saɩ.

eng: Consider ships: They are so large that strong winds are needed to drive them. But pilots direct their ships wherever they want with a little rudder.
local: Nan bʋŋɩ-na á nii, naboro na yɩ kamunu te yɩ vu-dɩʋ ta yǝni kʋ jɩgɩ-kʋ kʋ maga, yɩ wʋlʋ na co-kʋ tɩn ta waɩ o ma nanyuŋ-balaŋa o maa paɩ kʋ ve o na lagɩ mɛ tɩn.

eng: Are you so slow? Do you need to be shown that faith without actions has no value at all?.
local: N ba jɩgɩ wʋbʋŋa mʋ na? N yǝri nɩ, n na wɩ n kɩ n wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ yɩ n ba kɩ kǝm-laarʋ, kʋ yɩ kafɛ mʋ na?.

eng: In the same way, even though the tongue is a small part of the body, it boasts wildly. Think about this: A small flame can set a whole forest on fire.
local: Kʋ nan ta yɩ bɩdwɩ mʋ dɩ nɔɔnʋ dindǝlimi na yɩ te tɩn. Dɩ yɩ balaŋ-laŋa mʋ, yɩ dɩ waɩ dɩ tɛ wo-kamunnu dɩ paɩ dɩ tɩtɩ. Nan ta bʋŋɩ-na á nii kagʋa na maɩ te, yɩ min-ciŋo na tʋ ka wʋnɩ, kʋʋ́ di ka maama mʋ.

eng: What about Abraham, our father? Wasnt he shown to be righteous through his actions when he offered his son Isaac on the altar?.
local: Nan guli-na dɩbam nabaarʋ Abraham dɛɛn na yɩ te tɩn. Kʋ kɩ ta mʋ yɩ o na cɩga Wɛ tee nɩ? Kʋ yɩ o tɩtʋŋa yam ŋwaanɩ mʋ, dɩ o na sɛ o kwe o bu Yizakɩ sɩ o ma kaanɩ Wɛ nɩ DƖ na tag-o te tɩn.

eng: The tongue is a small flame of fire, a world of evil at work in us. It contaminates our entire lives. Because of it, the circle of life is set on fire. The tongue itself is set on fire by the flames of hell.
local: Nɔɔnʋ dindǝlimi dɩ nan nyɩ dɩ mini mʋ, yɩ dɩ su dɩ lʋgʋ baŋa wo-lwaanʋ tɩm dwi maama. Dɩ yɩ yɩra yam daa dɩdʋa mʋ, yɩ dɩ wo-lwaanʋ tɩm laan waɩ tɩ loŋi yɩra yam maama. Dindǝlimi jɩgɩ mini mʋ dɩ maa zwɛ nɔɔnʋ dɩ o ŋwɩa maama dɩ pa ka ba lana. Mini dɩm kʋntʋ nan nuŋi sʋtaanɩ te mʋ.

eng: See, his faith was at work along with his actions. In fact, his faith was made complete by his faithful actions.
local: Kʋ brɩ nɩ o na kɩ o wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ te tɩn dɩdaanɩ o kǝm-laarʋ tɩm maama tɔgɩ daanɩ mʋ. O kǝm-laarʋ tɩm mʋ pɛ o Wɛ tɔgɩm dɩm ja kuri.

eng: People can tame and already have tamed every kind of animal, bird, reptile, and fish.
local: Nabiinu waɩ wǝǝnu dwi maama. Kʋ na yɩ ga-vara dɩ zunǝ dɩ tɩga wo-vǝǝlu dɩ kale, o sɩɩnɩ o wanɩ tɩ maama.

eng: So the scripture was fulfilled that says, Abraham believed God, and God regarded him as righteous . What is more, Abraham was called Gods friend.
local: Kʋntʋ mʋ, kʋlʋ na pʋpʋnɩ Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm wʋnɩ tɩn sɩɩnɩ kʋ kɩ dɩ kʋ na wɩ: «Abraham kɩ o wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ, yɩ DƖ pa o na cɩga kʋ ŋwaanɩ». Ba maa bǝ-o nɩ «Wɛ ciloŋ».

eng: No one can tame the tongue, though. It is a restless evil, full of deadly poison.
local: Kʋ nan na yɩ dindǝlimi, nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ tǝrǝ o na waɩ o dindǝlimi. Dɩ yɩ wo-lɔŋɔ kʋlʋ na warɩ kʋ cɩ tɩn mʋ, yɩ dɩ kwǝri dɩ jɩgɩ coŋo kʋlʋ na gʋɩ nɔɔna tɩn.

eng: So you see that a person is shown to be righteous through faithful actions and not through faith alone.
local: Kʋntʋ wʋ́ pa á lwarɩ nɩ, kʋ yɩ nɔɔnʋ tɩtʋŋa mʋ wǝli da kʋ paɩ o na cɩga Wɛ tee nɩ, sɩ kʋ daɩ o na kɩ o wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ tɩn yɩranɩ ŋwaanɩ.

eng: With it we both bless the Lord and Father and curse human beings made in Gods likeness.
local: Dɩ́ yǝni dɩ́ ma dɩntʋ mʋ dɩ́ maa tee Wɛ dɩlʋ na yɩ dɩ́ Yuutu dɩdaanɩ dɩ́ Ko tɩn, yɩ dɩntʋ mʋ dɩ́ ta maa sɔɔlɩ dɩ́ cɔgɩ dɩ́ donnǝ balʋ Wɛ na kɩ nɩ DƖ nyɩnyʋgʋ te tɩn.

eng: In the same way, wasnt Rahab the prostitute shown to be righteous when she received the messengers as her guests and then sent them on by another road?.
local: Kʋ dɛɛn nan kɩ kʋntʋ dɩ mʋ dɩ ka-tʋla kalʋ yɩrɩ na yɩ Rahabɩ tɩn. Yisɩrayɛlɩ tiinǝ bam dɛɛn na tʋŋɩ ba daan-daana bam yɩ ba da o te tɩn, o jeeri-ba lanyɩranɩ yɩ o brɩ-ba cwǝŋǝ sɩ ba tɔgɩ da ba ma lu ba dʋna bam jɩŋa nɩ. O tɩtʋŋa yam kʋntʋ mʋ pɛ o na cɩga Wɛ tee nɩ.

eng: Blessing and cursing come from the same mouth. My brothers and sisters, it just shouldnt be this way!.
local: Kʋntʋ tɩn, tiǝ dɩ cɔgɩm maama nuŋi ni dɩm kʋntʋ dɩdʋa wʋnɩ mʋ. A ko-biǝ-ba, kʋ wʋ maŋɩ sɩ kʋ taa yɩ kʋntʋ.

eng: As the lifeless body is dead, so faith without actions is dead.
local: Kʋntʋ maama brɩ nɩ, nɔɔnʋ na wɩ o kɩ o wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ yɩ o ba kɩ kǝm-laarʋ, kʋ yɩ kafɛ mʋ. Kʋ yɩ bɩdwɩ mʋ dɩ nɔɔnʋ yɩra na ba jɩgɩ joro, wʋntʋ yɩ tʋ mʋ.

eng: Both fresh water and salt water dont come from the same spring, do they?.
local: Buli-yi dɩdʋa bá wanɩ dɩ taa buri na-ywǝnǝ dɩ na-cɛɛra dɩ wʋnɩ.

eng: My brothers and sisters, can a fig tree produce olives? Can a grapevine produce figs? Of course not, and fresh water doesnt flow from a saltwater spring either.
local: A ko-biǝ-ba, kapʋrʋ bá wanɩ kʋ lǝ swan. Kakɔnɔ dɩ nan bá wanɩ kʋ lǝ mɔɔla. Kʋ nan yɩ bɩdwɩ mʋ dɩ n na bá wanɩ n mɔ na-ŋʋna bwǝru wʋnɩ te tɩn.

eng: Are any of you wise and understanding? Show that your actions are good with a humble lifestyle that comes from wisdom.
local: Nɔɔnʋ na wʋ abam wʋnɩ yɩ o jɩgɩ swan dɩ yǝno, kʋntʋ tu maŋɩ sɩ o taa tɔgɩ cwǝ-laa mʋ, sɩ o tu o tɩtɩ o kɩ kǝm-laarʋ, sɩ kʋ brɩ nɩ o jɩgɩ swan.

eng: However, if you have bitter jealousy and selfish ambition in your heart, then stop bragging and living in ways that deny the truth.
local: Abam nan na jɩgɩ wʋ-gʋʋ dɩ pu-sɩŋa yɩ á lagɩ á yɩranɩ zǝnǝ, sɩ á yɩ zaŋɩ á brɩ á tɩtɩ nɩ á jɩgɩ swan. Á na kɩ kʋntʋ, á fɔgɩ vwan mʋ sɩ kʋ daɩ cɩga.

eng: This is not the wisdom that comes down from above. Instead, it is from the earth, natural and demonic.
local: Swan yantʋ doŋ daɩ swan yalʋ na nuŋi Wɛ te tɩn. Ya yɩ lʋgʋ baŋa nyɩm mʋ. Ya maa yɩ nabiinǝ swan yalʋ na nuŋi sʋtaanɩ te tɩn mʋ.

eng: Wherever there is jealousy and selfish ambition, there is disorder and everything that is evil.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ, jǝgǝ kalʋ maama nɔɔna na lagɩ ba tɩtɩ yɩranɩ zǝnǝ yɩ ba jɩgɩ wʋ-gʋʋ dɩ ba donnǝ tɩn, dáanɩ mʋ vuvugǝ dɩ kǝm-lwaanʋ dwi maama wʋra.

eng: What of the wisdom from above? First, it is pure, and then peaceful, gentle, obedient, filled with mercy and good actions, fair, and genuine.
local: Kʋ daarɩ nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ na jɩgɩ swan yalʋ na nuŋi Wɛ te tɩn jɩgɩ wʋ-poŋo mʋ. O maa paɩ ywǝǝni wʋ nɔɔna tɩtarɩ nɩ, yɩ o jɩgɩ wʋ-bono, yɩ o nɩgɩ nɔɔna. O maa jɩgɩ o donnǝ ŋwaŋa lanyɩranɩ, yɩ o kɩ kǝm-laarʋ dɩ o wǝli da. O ba kuri nɔɔna daanɩ, o nan daɩ pipiri-nyɩm.

eng: Those who make peace sow the seeds of justice by their peaceful acts.
local: Balʋ na jɩgɩ wʋ-zuru yɩ ba paɩ ywǝǝni wʋ nɔɔna tɩtarɩ nɩ tɩn wʋ́ ta yɩ cɩga tiinǝ Wɛ yigǝ nɩ.

eng: Pay attention, you wealthy people! Weep and moan over the miseries coming upon you.
local: Kʋ daarɩ abam balʋ na yɩ nadunǝ tɩn, fɔgɩ á cǝgi-na. Taá keeri-na á coosǝ dɩ lɛɛrʋ tɩlʋ na lagɩ tɩ ba abam baŋa tɩn.

eng: Your riches have rotted. Moths have destroyed your clothes.
local: Abam jɩjɩgɩrʋ tɩm maama wʋ́ pɔ, yɩ cambʋrɩ dɩ wʋ́ di á gwaarʋ tɩm.

eng: Your gold and silver have rusted, and their rust will be evidence against you. It will eat your flesh like fire. Consider the treasure you have hoarded in the last days.
local: Abam sǝbu-sɩŋa kam dɩ á sǝbu kʋm maama wʋ́ sʋŋɩ. Sarɩya dɛ dɩm nɩ kʋ sʋŋɩm dɩm kʋntʋ mʋ wʋ́ brɩ nɩ á kɩ á tusi, yɩ dɩntʋ ta wʋ́ di abam yɩra yam nɩ mini te. Lʋgʋ baŋa tiim da yam nan twɛ, yɩ abam ta fɔgɩ á tiŋi á jɩjɩgɩrʋ tɩm mʋ.

eng: Listen! Hear the cries of the wages of your field hands. These are the wages you stole from those who harvested your fields. The cries of the harvesters have reached the ears of the Lord of heavenly forces.
local: Abam ta pini balʋ na tʋŋɩ á karɩ sɩm nɩ ba pa abam tɩn, á ba sɛ sɩ á ŋwɩ-ba. Cǝgi-na á nii ba na pʋʋna te tɩn. Balʋ na kɩ abam wʋdiiru tɩm ba kɩ digǝ nɩ tɩn kǝrǝ kam tʋ Yuutu Baŋa-Wɛ zwɛ nɩ.

eng: You have lived a self-satisfying life on this earth, a life of luxury. You have stuffed your hearts in preparation for the day of slaughter.
local: Á ŋwɩ lʋgʋ baŋa nɩ paarɩ wʋnɩ mʋ, yɩ á kɩ á wʋbʋŋa na lagɩ te. Á di á nuǝ nɩ ba na kɔnɩ varɩm sɩ ba gʋ te tɩn.

eng: You have condemned and murdered the righteous one, who doesnt oppose you.
local: Á ta kwǝri á paɩ balʋ na jɩgɩ cɩga tɩn ga bʋra, yɩ á daarɩ á gʋ-ba, yɩ ba nan warɩ á yigǝ ba cɩ.

eng: Therefore, brothers and sisters, you must be patient as you wait for the coming of the Lord. Consider the farmer who waits patiently for the coming of rain in the fall and spring, looking forward to the precious fruit of the earth.
local: A ko-biǝ-ba, taá jɩgɩ-na wʋ-zuru á maa nii maŋa kam dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm na wʋ́ joori o ba tɩn. Taá nii-na valʋ na yǝni o zuri o yɩra te o maa cǝgi maŋa kam o faa na wʋ́ ba kʋ bɩ lanyɩranɩ tɩn. O yǝni o zuri o yɩra mʋ o maa cǝgi duum dʋa dɩ fa-ni dʋa.

eng: You also must wait patiently, strengthening your resolve, because the coming of the Lord is near.
local: Kʋntʋ, kʋ maŋɩ sɩ abam dɩ taá jɩgɩ wʋ-zuru mʋ sɩ á vɔ á wʋ lanyɩranɩ, sɩ dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm bá daanɩ yɩ o ba.

eng: Dont complain about each other, brothers and sisters, so that you wont be judged. Look! The judge is standing at the door!.
local: A ko-biǝ-ba, á yɩ taá pʋʋnɩ daanɩ, sɩ kʋ pa á ga bʋra Wɛ tee nɩ. Nii-na, kʋ twɛ kʋ ti sɩ Wɛ di dɩbam taanɩ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, take the prophets who spoke in the name of the Lord as an example of patient resolve and steadfastness.
local: A ko-biǝ-ba, guli-na Wɛ nijoŋnǝ balʋ dɛɛn na tɔɔlɩ DƖ kwǝrǝ kam tɩn woŋo. Ba dɛɛn nɛ yaara zanzan yɩ ba vɔ ba wʋrʋ dɩ wʋ-zuru. Kʋntʋ tɩn, kʋ maŋɩ sɩ abam dɩ lwǝni bantʋ na kɩ te tɩn mʋ.

eng: Look at how we honor those who have practiced endurance. You have heard of the endurance of Job. And you have seen what the Lord has accomplished, for the Lord is full of compassion and mercy.
local: Kʋ na yɩ balʋ na jɩgɩ pu-dɩa kantʋ doŋ tɩn, dɩ́ ye nɩ ba nɛ wʋpolo Wɛ tee nɩ. Abam nan maŋɩ á ye Zobi dɛɛn na kɩ pu-dɩa o yaara yam wʋnɩ te, yɩ á kwǝri á ye Wɛ na pɛ-o kʋlʋ kʋ kweelim nɩ tɩn. A lagɩ a ta cɩga mʋ dɩ abam sɩ, dɩ́ Yuutu Wɛ tiini DƖ jɩgɩ dɩbam ŋwaŋa, yɩ DƖ duri dɩbam yibwǝnǝ lanyɩranɩ.

eng: Most important, my brothers and sisters, never make a solemn pledge—neither by heaven nor earth, nor by anything else. Instead, speak with a simple Yes or No, or else you may fall under judgment.
local: A ko-biǝ-ba, kʋ na dwe dɩdɩ, á yɩ taá tɛ á duǝ. Yɩ du-na dɩ Wɛ naa tɩga naa dɩ kʋlʋkʋlʋ dɩ. Á pa-na á ɛɛn taa yɩ ɛɛn, sɩ á awo taa yɩ awo, sɩ kʋ yɩ pa Wɛ di á sarɩya.

eng: If any of you are suffering, they should pray. If any of you are happy, they should sing.
local: Abam wʋlʋ na wʋ cam wʋnɩ, sɩ o loori Wɛ. Abam wʋlʋ nan na jɩgɩ wʋpolo, sɩ o taa leeni o zuli Wɛ.

eng: If any of you are sick, they should call for the elders of the church, and the elders should pray over them, anointing them with oil in the name of the Lord.
local: Abam wʋlʋ nan na ba jɩgɩ yazurǝ, sɩ o bǝŋi Zezi kɔgɔ kʋm nakwa bam, sɩ ba ba ba kɩ nugǝ o yuu nɩ ba loori Wɛ ba pa-o dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi yɩrɩ ŋwaanɩ.

eng: Prayer that comes from faith will heal the sick, for the Lord will restore them to health. And if they have sinned, they will be forgiven.
local: Ba na kɩ ba wʋ-dɩdʋa ba loori Wɛ kʋntʋ doŋ, nɔɔnʋ wʋm wʋ́ sɩɩnɩ o na yazurǝ. Dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm wʋ́ pa o wǝri, yɩ o na kɩ lwarɩm dɩlʋ maama tɩn, Wɛ wʋ́ yagɩ DƖ ma cɛ-o.

eng: For this reason, confess your sins to each other and pray for each other so that you may be healed. The prayer of the righteous person is powerful in what it can achieve.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ, kʋ maŋɩ sɩ á taá vɩɩrɩ á tɛ á lwarɩm mʋ á brɩ daanɩ, sɩ á daarɩ á taá loori Wɛ á pa daanɩ, sɩ Wɛ wʋ́ pa abam yazurǝ. Nɔn-ŋʋm Wɛ-loro tiini kʋ dana lanyɩranɩ, kʋ waɩ kʋ paɩ wo-kamunǝ kɩa.

eng: Elijah was a person just like us. When he earnestly prayed that it wouldnt rain, no rain fell for three and a half years.
local: Guli-na Eli dɛɛn na kɩ te tɩn. O dɩ yɩ nabiinu mʋ nɩ dɩbam te, yɩ o loori Wɛ dɩ o wʋ maama sɩ dʋa yɩ zaŋɩ ka nɩ, yɩ ka sɩɩnɩ ka wʋ nɩgɩ bɩna yatɔ dɩ canɩ sɩrdʋ.

eng: He prayed again, God sent rain, and the earth produced its fruit.
local: O daa ma joori o loori Wɛ, yɩ ka laan ba ka nɩ, yɩ tɩga baŋa wǝǝnu maama joori tɩ puli tɩ nuŋi tɩ kɩ lanyɩranɩ.

eng: My brothers and sisters, if any of you wander from the truth and someone turns back the wanderer.
local: A ko-biǝ-ba, abam wʋlʋ na ywǝri cɩga cwǝŋǝ kam wʋnɩ yɩ o doŋ na wanɩ o pa o joori o ba ka wʋnɩ, kʋ lana.

eng: recognize that whoever brings a sinner back from the wrong path will save them from death and will bring about the forgiveness of many sins.
local: Á nan taá ye nɩ, wʋlʋ na wanɩ o pa lwarɩm kǝru joori o ba cɩga cwǝŋǝ kam wʋ tɩn, nɔɔnʋ wʋm kʋntʋ vrɩ lwarɩm kǝru wʋm tʋʋnɩ jɩŋa nɩ, yɩ Wɛ yagɩ o wo-lwaanʋ tɩlʋ zanzan o na kɩ tɩn DƖ ma cɛ-o.

eng: Peter, an apostle of Jesus Christ, To Gods chosen strangers in the world of the diaspora, who live in Pontus, Galatia, Cappadocia, Asia, and Bithynia.
local: Amʋ Pɩyɛɛrɩ wʋlʋ na yɩ Zezi Krisi tɩntʋŋnʋ tɩn mʋ pʋpʋnɩ tɔnɔ kʋntʋ, sɩ a pa abam balʋ Wɛ na kuri sɩ á taá yɩ DƖ nɔɔna yɩ á jagɩ á vu á yɩ vǝrǝ yɩ á zʋʋrɩ Pɔn tɩ-niǝ yam wʋnɩ, dɩ Galatɩ dɩ Kapadɔsɩ dɩ Azi dɩ Bitini tɩ-niǝ yam maama wʋnɩ tɩn.

eng: God the Father chose you because of what he knew beforehand. He chose you through the Holy Spirits work of making you holy and because of the faithful obedience and sacrifice of Jesus Christ. May Gods grace and peace be multiplied to you.
local: Dɩ́ Ko Wɛ mʋ dɛ yigǝ DƖ kɩ DƖ wʋbʋŋa nɩ sɩ DƖ kuri abam kʋntʋ, yɩ DƖ tɔgɩ DƖ Joro kʋm ŋwaanɩ DƖ pa á ji nɔn-ŋʋna balʋ na yɩ DƖ nyɩm tɩn. Wɛ nan kɩ kʋntʋ sɩ kʋ pa á taá sɛ Zezi Krisi ni mʋ, sɩ DƖ fɔgɩ abam Zezi jana kam na nuŋi tɩn ŋwaanɩ. Wɛ wʋ́ pa abam yazurǝ dɩ yu-yoŋo kʋ ja gaalɩ.

eng: May the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ be blessed! On account of his vast mercy, he has given us new birth. You have been born anew into a living hope through the resurrection of Jesus Christ from the dead.
local: Pa-na dɩ́ taá kɩ Wɛ dɩlʋ na yɩ dɩbam Yuutu Zezi Krisi Ko tɩn le. Dɩntʋ mʋ tiini DƖ yɩ ŋwaŋa tu, yɩ DƖ pa dɩ́ jɩgɩ ŋwɩ-dʋŋa, dɩ DƖ na pɛ Zezi Krisi bi o yagɩ tʋʋnɩ tɩn, yɩ dɩ́ taá jɩgɩ tɩɩna DƖ tee nɩ maŋa maama.

eng: You have a pure and enduring inheritance that cannot perish—an inheritance that is presently kept safe in heaven for you.
local: Kʋntʋ mʋ dɩ́ ye nɩ dɩ́ wʋ́ ba dɩ́ joŋi wo-laarʋ tɩlʋ Wɛ na tiŋi sɩ DƖ pa DƖ biǝ tɩn. Wǝǝnu tɩm kʋntʋ nan ba pɔɛ, yɩ tɩ ba cɔga, tɩ nan ba lɩɩrɩ dɩ. Wɛ tiŋi tɩntʋ mʋ DƖ sɔŋɔ nɩ sɩ DƖ pa abam.

eng: Through his faithfulness, you are guarded by Gods power so that you can receive the salvation he is ready to reveal in the last time.
local: DƖ maa maɩ DƖ dam dɩm DƖ yɩrɩ abam, á na kɩ á wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ DƖ tɩn ŋwaanɩ, sɩ kʋ vu kʋ yi lʋgʋ baŋa tiim da yam, sɩ DƖ laan joŋi abam jaja.

eng: You now rejoice in this hope, even if its necessary for you to be distressed for a short time by various trials.
local: Kʋntʋ maa paɩ á jɩgɩ wʋpolo lanyɩranɩ, dɩ cam dwi tǝri tǝri ya zɩ maŋɩ abam zɩm yɩ kʋ pa á wʋ cɔgɩ maŋa fɩnfɩɩn yɩranɩ dɩ.

eng: This is necessary so that your faith may be found genuine. Your genuine faith will result in praise, glory, and honor for you when Jesus Christ is revealed.
local: Kʋ na yɩ cana yam kʋntʋ, kʋ yɩ sɩ ya maŋɩ abam mʋ ya nii á na kɩ á wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ te tɩn. Kʋ na yɩ sǝbu-sɩŋa, ba yǝni ba maɩ mini mʋ ba ma maŋɩ-ka sɩ ba nii ka lana na? Abam nan na kɩ á wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ te tɩn tiini kʋ dwe sǝbu-sɩŋa kalʋ na wʋ́ ba ka cɔgɩ tɩn. Kʋntʋ tɩn, cam na maŋɩ abam yɩ á ta na zɩgɩ kǝŋkǝŋ, kʋʋ́ pa á na zulǝ dɩ tiǝ Wɛ tee nɩ maŋa kalʋ Zezi Krisi na wʋ́ joori o ba tɩn.

eng: Although youve never seen him, you love him. Even though you dont see him now, you trust him and so rejoice with a glorious joy that is too much for words.
local: Abam yi ta wʋ nɛ-o, yɩ á nan so-o. Á maa kɩ á wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩd-o, yɩ á nan daa ta ba na-o lele kʋntʋ. Kʋ ma pa á tiini á jɩgɩ wʋpolo zanzan yɩ kʋ bá wanɩ kʋ ta dɩ nabiinǝ taanɩ.

eng: You are receiving the goal of your faith: your salvation.
local: Wɛ na vrɩ abam ŋwɩa yɩ kʋntʋ mʋ yɩ kʋlʋ á na maŋɩ á kɩ á wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ sɩ á na tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: The prophets, who long ago foretold the grace that youve received, searched and explored, inquiring carefully about this salvation.
local: Faŋa faŋa Wɛ nijoŋnǝ bam dɛɛn tiini ba kwaanɩ ba tɔgɩ kʋ nɛ lanyɩranɩ sɩ ba lwarɩ Wɛ na wʋ́ vrɩ DƖ nɔɔna bam te tɩn. Ba dɛɛn ma maŋɩ ba wuuri ba ta Wɛ na wʋ́ pa abam pɛɛrɩ dɩlʋ tɩn.

eng: They wondered what the Spirit of Christ within them was saying when he bore witness beforehand about the suffering that would happen to Christ and the glory that would follow. They wondered what sort of person or what sort of time they were speaking about.
local: Zezi Krisi Joro kʋm maa wʋ ba tee nɩ yɩ kʋ pa ba wuuri ba lwarɩ nɩ Krisi wʋm wʋ́ ba o na yaara sɩ o laan daarɩ o na paarɩ-zulǝ Wɛ tee nɩ. Ba maa tiini ba kwaanɩ sɩ ba lwarɩ maŋa kam kʋntʋ dɩ kʋ na wʋ́ kɩ te tɩn.

eng: It was revealed to them that in their search they were not serving themselves but you. These things, which even angels long to examine, have now been proclaimed to you by those who brought you the good news. They did this in the power of the Holy Spirit, who was sent from heaven.
local: Wɛ dɛɛn ma pa DƖ nijoŋnǝ bam lwarɩ nɩ, DƖ na pɛ-ba kwǝrǝ kalʋ tɩn, kʋ daɩ ba tɩtɩ ŋwaanɩ, kʋ yɩ abam ŋwaanɩ mʋ. Ba dɛɛn na brɩ cɩga kalʋ tɩn mʋ yɩ Zezi kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kalʋ o tɩntʋŋna bam laan na tɔɔlɩ ba brɩ abam zɩm tɩn. Baŋa-Wɛ mʋ pɛ DƖ Joro kʋm ba bantʋ te, yɩ ba wanɩ ba brɩ abam kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam kʋntʋ. Wɛ malɛsɩ sɩm dɩ nan lagɩ sɩ sɩ lwarɩ cɩga kam kʋntʋ kuri na yɩ te tɩn.

eng: Therefore, once you have your minds ready for action and you are thinking clearly, place your hope completely on the grace that will be brought to you when Jesus Christ is revealed.
local: Abam nan fɔgɩ á ja á wʋbʋŋa, sɩ á taá ma tʋŋɩ á pa Wɛ. Pɩɩnɩ-na á tɩtɩ sɩ á tiŋi á tɩɩna maama woŋo kʋlʋ Wɛ na wʋ́ ba DƖ pa abam zaanɩ tɩn baŋa nɩ, maŋa kalʋ Zezi Krisi na wʋ́ joori o ba tɩn.

eng: Dont be conformed to your former desires, those that shaped you when you were ignorant. But, as obedient children.
local: Taá sɛ-na á Ko Wɛ ni. Á daa yɩ taá ŋwɩ nɩ á dɛɛn na wʋ lwarɩ Wɛ cɩga kam yɩ á fra zʋʋrɩ wo-yɔɔrʋ tɩlʋ tɩn.

eng: you must be holy in every aspect of your lives, just as the one who called you is holy.
local: Á nan taá ŋwɩ dɩ wʋ-poŋo woŋo maama wʋnɩ, nɩ á Ko Wɛ dɩlʋ na bǝŋi abam sɩ á taá yɩ DƖ nɔɔna tɩn na jɩgɩ wʋ-poŋo te tɩn.

eng: It is written, You will be holy, because I am holy. .
local: Kʋ nan maŋɩ kʋ pʋpʋnɩ Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm wʋnɩ kʋ wɩ: «Á taá yɩ wʋ-poŋo tiinǝ, sɩ amʋ Baŋa-Wɛ yɩ wʋ-poŋo tu mʋ.».

eng: Since you call upon a Father who judges all people according to their actions without favoritism, you should conduct yourselves with reverence during the time of your dwelling in a strange land.
local: Abam na yǝni á loori Wɛ, á bǝ-DƖ nɩ á Ko mʋ, yɩ dɩntʋ nan mʋ wʋ́ di nabiinǝ maama sarɩya sɩ kʋ maŋɩ dɩ ba tɩtʋŋa na yɩ te tɩn, yɩ DƖ ba kuri nɔɔna daanɩ. Kʋntʋ, á ta na wʋ lʋgʋ baŋa nɩ maŋa kalʋ tɩn, kʋ maŋɩ sɩ á taá kwarɩ Wɛ kʋlʋ maama á na kɩ tɩn wʋnɩ.

eng: Live in this way, knowing that you were not liberated by perishable things like silver or gold from the empty lifestyle you inherited from your ancestors.
local: Á ye nɩ Wɛ vrɩ abam sɩ á daa yɩ taá tɔgɩ cullu tɩlʋ na nuŋi á nabaara bam jɩŋa nɩ tɩn mʋ. Wɛ na lɩ abam wo-yɔɔrʋ tɩm kʋntʋ wʋnɩ tɩn, kʋ daɩ lʋgʋ baŋa sǝbu naa sǝbu-sɩŋa, wǝǝnu tɩlʋ na waɩ tɩ cɔgɩ tɩn, mʋ DƖ mɛ DƖ ŋwɩ DƖ vrɩ abam.

eng: Instead, you were liberated by the precious blood of Christ, like that of a flawless, spotless lamb.
local: Wɛ nan mɛ Zezi Krisi jana kam mʋ DƖ ma vrɩ abam, yɩ kantʋ tiini ka jɩgɩ dam. Zezi na jigi kaanɩm kʋntʋ tɩn, o nyɩ dɩ pǝlbu wʋlʋ na tiini o lana fasɩ yɩ kʋlʋkʋlʋ tǝrǝ kʋ na yɩ balɔrɔ o yɩra nɩ tɩn mʋ.

eng: Christ was chosen before the creation of the world, but was only revealed at the end of time. This was done for you.
local: Wɛ maŋɩ DƖ kuri wʋntʋ mʋ kʋ loori lʋgʋ pulim, sɩ o vrɩ nɔɔna ba lwarɩm wʋnɩ. Kʋ daarɩ lʋgʋ baŋa kweelim maŋa kam laan nan na yi tɩn, Wɛ pɛ á lwar-o, sɩ o vrɩ abam.

eng: who through Christ are faithful to the God who raised him from the dead and gave him glory. So now, your faith and hope should rest in God.
local: Á nan dɛ Zezi ŋwaanɩ mʋ á kɩ á wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Wɛ. Dɩntʋ mʋ bi-o DƖ pa o yagɩ tʋʋnɩ, yɩ DƖ daarɩ DƖ pa o na paarɩ-zulǝ. Kʋ ma paɩ á sɩɩnɩ á jɩgɩ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ tɩɩna Wɛ tee nɩ.

eng: As you set yourselves apart by your obedience to the truth so that you might have genuine affection for your fellow believers, love each other deeply and earnestly.
local: Abam na sɛ Wɛ cɩga kam tɩn mʋ pɛ á bɩcara fɔgɩ ya kwɛ, kʋ pa á jɩgɩ sono cɩga cɩga dɩ á ko-biǝ balʋ na yɩ Wɛ nɔɔna tɩn. Kʋntʋ tɩn, á taá tiini á soe daanɩ dɩ á bɩcara maama.

eng: Do this because you have been given new birth—not from the type of seed that decays but from seed that doesnt. This seed is Gods life-giving and enduring word.
local: Abam na jɩgɩ Wɛ ŋwɩ-dʋŋa kam tɩn, ka kuri wʋ nuŋi nabiinǝ balʋ na tʋ tɩn te, ka nan ba cɔga. Kʋ yɩ Wɛ kwǝrǝ kam na paɩ ŋwɩa yɩ ka wʋra maŋa maama tɩn ŋwaanɩ mʋ á nɛ ŋwɩ-dʋŋa kam kʋntʋ.

eng: Thus, All human life on the earth is like grass, and all human glory is like a flower in a field. The grass dries up and its flower falls off, .
local: Kʋ nan pʋpʋnɩ Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm wʋnɩ kʋ wɩ: «Kʋ na yɩ nabiinǝ, bantʋ nyɩ dɩ gaa mʋ yɩ ba ba daanɩ ba tʋa. Ba nɩnwaŋa maa ba daanɩ ka kɛa, nɩnɛɛnɩ ga-punnu tɩm na yɩ te tɩn. Gaa kʋm na yǝni kʋ kwaarɩ, kʋ punnu tɩm wʋ́ siiri mʋ.

eng: but the Lords word endures forever. This is the word that was proclaimed to you as good news.
local: Kʋ nan na yɩ Wɛ kwǝrǝ kam, kantʋ wʋ́ ta wʋra sɩ kʋ taa ve maŋa kalʋ na ba ti tɩn.» Kwǝrǝ kam kʋntʋ mʋ yɩ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kalʋ ba na brɩ abam tɩn.

eng: What is the source of conflict among you? What is the source of your disputes? Dont they come from your cravings that are at war in your own lives?.
local: Bɛɛ mʋ paɩ jara dɩdaanɩ kantɔgɔ yǝni kʋ wʋ abam tɩtarɩ nɩ? Kʋ yɩ á fra na zʋʋrɩ wo-balwaarʋ tɩm mʋ te kʋ jɩgɩ á bɩcara kʋ yaara, yɩ kʋ paɩ jara wʋ á wʋnɩ.

eng: You long for something you dont have, so you commit murder. You are jealous for something you cant get, so you struggle and fight. You dont have because you dont ask.
local: Abam yǝni á paɩ á fra mʋ zʋʋrɩ wǝǝnu yɩ á nan ba na-tɩ. Kʋ ma pa á lagɩ sɩ á gʋ nɔɔna. Á yi tiini dɩ su wǝǝnu zanzan yɩ á warɩ-tɩ á na. Kʋntʋ mʋ paɩ kantɔgɔ dɩ jara tui. Á ba jɩgɩ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ á na lagɩ tɩn, bɛŋwaanɩ á wʋ loori Wɛ sɩ DƖ pa abam.

eng: You ask and dont have because you ask with evil intentions, to waste it on your own cravings.
local: Abam nan na maŋɩ á loori Wɛ dɩ, DƖ bá pa abam, bɛŋwaanɩ á ma wʋbʋŋ-lwaanʋ mʋ á loorǝ. Á loori sɩ á taá ma kɩ á fra na zʋʋrɩ wo-balwaarʋ tɩlʋ tɩn mʋ.

eng: You unfaithful people! Dont you know that friendship with the world means hostility toward God? So whoever wants to be the worlds friend becomes Gods enemy.
local: Abam ba tɔgɩ Wɛ dɩ cɩga. Á yǝri nɩ á fra na zʋ lʋgʋ baŋa wǝǝnu á yɩ Wɛ dʋna mʋ na? Wʋlʋ maama na pɛ o fra zʋ lʋgʋ baŋa wǝǝnu tɩm tɩn jigi Wɛ dʋm mʋ.

eng: Or do you suppose that scripture is meaningless? Doesnt God long for our faithfulness in the life he has given to us?.
local: Á yɩ taá bʋŋɩ nɩ kʋlʋ na pʋpʋnɩ Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm wʋnɩ tɩn yɩ kafɛ mʋ, dɩ kʋ na wɩ: «Joro kʋlʋ Wɛ na kɩ dɩ́ bɩcara nɩ tɩn lagɩ sɩ kʋ yɩranɩ mʋ taa te dɩbam.».

eng: But he gives us more grace. This is why it says, God stands against the proud, but favors the humble .
local: Wɛ nan mʋ kɩ dɩbam yu-yoŋo kʋ ja gaalɩ. Kʋ daa ta pʋpʋnɩ Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm wʋnɩ kʋ wɩ: «Wɛ vɩn balʋ na yɩ kamun-nyɩna tɩn, yɩ DƖ daarɩ DƖ zǝni balʋ na tu ba tɩtɩ tɩn.».

eng: Therefore, submit to God. Resist the devil, and he will run away from you.
local: Kʋntʋ tɩn, kwe-na á tɩtɩ á kɩ Wɛ jɩŋa nɩ, sɩ á daarɩ á vɩn sʋtaanɩ, sɩ dɩntʋ wʋ́ duri dɩ viiri á tee nɩ.

eng: Come near to God, and he will come near to you. Wash your hands, you sinners. Purify your hearts, you double-minded.
local: Fʋfɔ-na á twɛ Wɛ, sɩ DƖ dɩ wʋ́ twɛ abam. Abam lwarɩm-kǝrǝ-ba, lɩ-na á jɩa wo-lwaanʋ dwi maama baŋa nɩ. Abam pipiri-nyɩna-ba, zarɩ-na á bɩcara sɩ á daa yɩ taá jɩgɩ wʋrʋ tɩle.

eng: Cry out in sorrow, mourn, and weep! Let your laughter become mourning and your joy become sadness.
local: Á pa-na á wʋ cɔgɩ á lwarɩm dɩm ŋwaanɩ, sɩ á nywanɩ á yigǝ á taá keerǝ. Pa-na á mwaanʋ tɩm lǝni tɩ ji kǝrǝ, sɩ á wʋpolo kʋm lǝni kʋ ji wʋ-cɔgɔ.

eng: Humble yourselves before the Lord, and he will lift you up.
local: Tu-na á tɩtɩ dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm yigǝ nɩ, sɩ oó ja abam o pa á zaŋɩ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, dont say evil things about each other. Whoever insults or criticizes a brother or sister insults and criticizes the Law. If you find fault with the Law, you are not a doer of the Law but a judge over it.
local: A ko-biǝ-ba, á yɩ taá ŋɔɔnɩ wo-balwaarʋ da-yɩranɩ. Wʋlʋ maama na ŋɔɔnɩ wo-balɔrɔ o ko-bu yɩra nɩ naa o cog-o tɩn, kʋntʋ tu ŋɔɔnɩ o cɔgɩ Wɛ niǝ yam mʋ yɩ o yáalɩ-ya. Nmʋ nan na yáalɩ Wɛ niǝ yam, kʋ brɩ nɩ n daa n ba tɔgɩ-ya mʋ, yɩ n ta kwǝri n brɩ nɩ nmʋ mʋ yɩ sarɩya-diru.

eng: There is only one lawgiver and judge, and he is able to save and to destroy. But you who judge your neighbor, who are you?.
local: Wɛ yɩranɩ mʋ te DƖ niǝ yam, yɩ DƖ tɔgɩ-ya DƖ ma di nɔɔna taanɩ. Dɩntʋ yɩranɩ mʋ waɩ DƖ vrɩ nɔɔna DƖ yaga, naa DƖ cɔgɩ-ba ba vɩʋn ŋwaanɩ. Nmʋ nan bʋŋɩ nɩ n yɩ wɔɔ mʋ, sɩ n di n doŋ taanɩ?.

eng: Pay attention, you who say, Today or tomorrow we will go to such-and-such a town. We will stay there a year, buying and selling, and making a profit.
local: Fɔgɩ-na á cǝgi, abam balʋ na yǝni á tɛ á wɩ: «Zɩm naa jwaanɩ dɩ́ wʋ́ vu tɩʋ kʋdoŋ dɩ́ kɩ pipiu da bɩm dɩ́ na sǝbu» tɩn.

eng: You dont really know about tomorrow. What is your life? You are a mist that appears for only a short while before it vanishes.
local: Á yǝni á tɛ kʋntʋ doŋ yɩ á yǝri tɩga na wʋ́ pʋʋrɩ sɩ á ŋwɩa taa yɩ te. Á ŋwɩa kam nan nyɩ dɩ kunu na li yɩ kʋ bá daanɩ kʋ kɛ te tɩn mʋ.

eng: Heres what you ought to say: If the Lord wills, we will live and do this or that.
local: Kʋ ya maŋɩ sɩ á taá tɛ nɩ: «Dɩ́ Yuutu Wɛ na sɛ yɩ dɩ́ jwa ta ŋwɩ, dɩ́ wʋ́ kɩ kʋlʋ dɩ́ na bʋŋɩ tɩn.».

eng: But now you boast and brag, and all such boasting is evil.
local: Kʋ nan yɩ á pa á tɩtɩ kamunni mʋ dɩ á na wʋ́ kɩ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ tɩn. Kamunni dɩm kʋntʋ dwi maama nan ba lana.

eng: It is a sin when someone knows the right thing to do and doesnt do it.
local: Kʋntʋ tɩn, nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ na ye kʋlʋ na lana sɩ o kɩ tɩn, o na wʋ kɩ, kʋ tu kɩ lwarɩm mʋ.

eng: Therefore, get rid of all ill will and all deceit, pretense, envy, and slander.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ á ja á tɩtɩ dɩ pu-sɩŋa dwi maama dɩ sɩsɩɩna, sɩ á yɩ taá yɩ pipiri-nyɩna, naa á taá jɩgɩ wʋ-gʋʋ, naa á taá yɩ bɩbarɩ-nyɩna.

eng: Instead, like a newborn baby, desire the pure milk of the word. Nourished by it, you will grow into salvation.
local: Pa-na á fra taa zʋʋrɩ Wɛ kwǝrǝ kam yɩranɩ, nɩ bu-sɩsɩŋa fra na zʋʋrɩ o nu yɩlɩ te tɩn. Kʋntʋ mʋ wʋ́ pa á wʋbʋŋa bɩ dɩ Wɛ cɩga kam, sɩ á na vrɩm fasɩ.

eng: since you have tasted that the Lord is good.
local: Kʋ pʋpʋnɩ Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm wʋnɩ kʋ wɩ: «Abam maŋɩ á maanɩ dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm na tiini o yɩ lanyɩranɩ te tɩn.».

eng: Now you are coming to him as to a living stone. Even though this stone was rejected by humans, from Gods perspective it is chosen, valuable.
local: Nan twɛ-na dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi, sɩ wʋm mʋ yɩ ŋwɩa tu, yɩ o nyɩ dɩ kandwɛ dɩlʋ nabiinǝ na vɩn tɩn. Wɛ nan maŋɩ DƖ kuri wʋntʋ mʋ, yɩ o jɩgɩ kuri dɩ DƖ kʋ ja gaalɩ.

eng: You yourselves are being built like living stones into a spiritual temple. You are being made into a holy priesthood to offer up spiritual sacrifices that are acceptable to God through Jesus Christ.
local: Abam dɩ na jɩgɩ Wɛ ŋwɩ-dʋŋa kam tɩn, yagɩ-na sɩ Wɛ kwe abam nɩnɛɛnɩ kandwa yalʋ DƖ na wʋra DƖ maa lɔ DƖ digǝ kalʋ DƖ Joro kʋm na wʋ́ ta zʋʋrɩ ka wʋnɩ tɩn. Kʋntʋ, á laan wʋ́ ta yɩ Wɛ kaanɩm tiinǝ, yɩ á na wʋ́ ta kaanɩ-DƖ te tɩn mʋ yɩ sɩ á taá zuli-DƖ dɩ á bɩcara maama, yɩ kʋ poli DƖ wʋ á na ŋwɩ dɩ Zezi Krisi tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: Thus it is written in scripture, Look! I am laying a cornerstone in Zion, chosen, valuable. The person who believes in him will never be shamed. .
local: Kʋ maŋɩ kʋ pʋpʋnɩ Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm wʋnɩ kʋ wɩ: «Nii-na, amʋ Wɛ lagɩ a cwi kandwɛ dɩlʋ na tiini dɩ lana tɩn, sɩ a ma lɔ sɔŋɔ Siyɔn nɩ. Amʋ kuri kandwɛ dɩm kʋntʋ, yɩ dɩntʋ mʋ yɩ kandwɛ dɩlʋ na paɩ digǝ kam zɩga lana tɩn. Wʋlʋ nan na kɩ o wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ wʋlʋ na yɩ kandwɛ dɩm kʋntʋ tɩn, cavɩɩra bá fɔgɩ ya ja kʋntʋ tu.».

eng: So God honors you who believe. For those who refuse to believe, though, the stone the builders tossed aside has become the capstone.
local: Kʋ na yɩ abam balʋ na kɩ á wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩd-o tɩn, o jɩgɩ kuri zanzan dɩ abam. Kʋ daarɩ, kʋ na yɩ balʋ na vɩ-o tɩn, kʋ nyɩ dɩ kʋ na pʋpʋnɩ Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm wʋnɩ kʋ wɩ: «Kandwɛ dɩlʋ lwara na vɩn tɩn laan mʋ joori dɩ ba dɩ ji kandwɛ dɩlʋ na paɩ digǝ kam dana yɩ ka zɩga lana tɩn.».

eng: This is a stone that makes people stumble and a rock that makes them fall. Because they refuse to believe in the word, they stumble. Indeed, this is the end to which they were appointed.
local: Kʋ na yɩ balʋ na vɩ-o tɩn, kʋ pʋpʋnɩ kʋ wɩ: «O yɩ kandwɛ dɩlʋ ba na wʋ́ magɩ ba tɩtɩ dɩ dɩ ba tʋ tɩga nɩ tɩn.» Kʋ yɩ ba na wʋ sɛ Wɛ kwǝrǝ kam tɩn ŋwaanɩ mʋ baá tʋ kʋntʋ. Kʋ maa maŋɩ sɩ kʋ kɩ-ba kʋntʋ mʋ.

eng: But you are a chosen race, a royal priesthood, a holy nation, a people who are Gods own possession. You have become this people so that you may speak of the wonderful acts of the one who called you out of darkness into his amazing light.
local: Kʋ daarɩ kʋ na yɩ abam, abam yɩ dwi dɩlʋ Wɛ tɩtɩ na kuri tɩn. DƖ maa pa á yɩ DƖ kaanɩm tiinǝ balʋ na tʋŋɩ DƖ paarɩ dɩm ŋwaanɩ tɩn. Á maa kwǝri á yɩ dwi tiinǝ balʋ Wɛ tɩtɩ na lɩ sɩ á taá yɩ nɔɔna balʋ na yɩ DƖ nyɩm tɩn. Wɛ bǝŋi abam DƖ pa á nuŋi lim wʋnɩ, yɩ DƖ daarɩ DƖ pa á ŋwɩ DƖ pooni dɩlʋ na lana tɩn wʋnɩ, sɩ á laan wanɩ á pa nɔɔna lwarɩ wo-kamunǝ yalʋ DƖ na kɩ tɩn.

eng: Once you werent a people, but now you are Gods people. Once you hadnt received mercy, but now you have received mercy.
local: Abam dɛɛn ya daɩ Wɛ nɔɔna, yɩ á laan ba á ji DƖ nɔɔna. Abam dɛɛn ya daɩ balʋ Wɛ na jɩgɩ á ŋwaŋa tɩn, yɩ DƖ laan ba DƖ duri á ŋwaŋa.

eng: Dear friends, since you are immigrants and strangers in the world, I urge that you avoid worldly desires that wage war against your lives.
local: A badon-sonnu-ba, abam na yɩ vǝrǝ lʋgʋ baŋa nɩ yɩ á ba jɩgɩ kugu je tɩn, a loori abam sɩ á ja á tɩtɩ dɩ á fra na zʋʋrɩ lʋgʋ baŋa wo-yɔɔrʋ tɩlʋ tɩn. Tɩntʋ mʋ kwaanɩ sɩ tɩ cɔgɩ á ŋwɩa.

eng: Live honorably among the unbelievers. Today, they defame you, as if you were doing evil. But in the day when God visits to judge they will glorify him, because they have observed your honorable deeds.
local: Á pa-na á kikiǝ maama taa lana balʋ na ba tɔgɩ Wɛ tɩn tɩtarɩ nɩ. Kʋntʋ mʋ, ba na yáalɩ abam ba wɩ á yɩ wo-lwaanʋ kǝrǝ, ba laan wʋ́ ba ba lwarɩ á kǝm-laarʋ na yɩ te tɩn, yɩ ba daarɩ ba zuli Wɛ maŋa kalʋ DƖ na lagɩ DƖ ba tɩn.

eng: For the sake of the Lord submit to every human institution. Do this whether it means submitting to the emperor as supreme ruler.
local: Kʋ na yɩ nɔɔna balʋ maama na jɩgɩ ni sɩ ba taa te ba donnǝ tɩn, sɩ á taá sɛ ba ni á na tɔgɩ dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm tɩn ŋwaanɩ. Kʋ na yɩ Pa-farʋ wʋlʋ na te tɩʋ kʋm maama tɩn, dɩ o dɩdɛɛra balʋ o na pɛ-ba dam tɩn, sɩ á taá nɩgɩ ba maama. O tiŋi bantʋ sɩ ba taa vaŋɩ balʋ na kɩ balɔrɔ tɩn zwa mʋ, sɩ ba daarɩ ba taa tee balʋ na kɩ lanyɩranɩ tɩn.

eng: Submit to them because its Gods will that by doing good you will silence the ignorant talk of foolish people.
local: Wɛ wʋbʋŋa na lagɩ te tɩn mʋ yɩ sɩ á pa á kikiǝ taa lana, sɩ kʋ wanɩ kʋ pa nɔn-jwǝǝru pu ba niǝ dɩ ba bɩtar-yɔɔrʋ tɩlʋ ba na ŋɔɔnɩ abam baŋa nɩ tɩn.

eng: Do this as Gods slaves, and yet also as free people, not using your freedom as a cover-up for evil.
local: Abam yɩ balʋ na te á tɩtɩ tɩn mʋ, yɩ á ŋwɩa kam maŋɩ sɩ ka taa yɩ kʋntʋ doŋ mʋ. Á nan yɩ tɔgɩ kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ á bʋŋɩ nɩ á jɩgɩ cwǝŋǝ sɩ á kɩ kǝm-balwaarʋ. Á nan pa-na á kikiǝ taa lana, á na yɩ Wɛ tɩntʋŋna tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: Honor everyone. Love the family of believers. Have respectful fear of God. Honor the emperor.
local: Á taá zuli nɔɔna maama. Á taá soe balʋ maama na yɩ á ko-biǝ Zezi cwǝŋǝ kam wʋnɩ tɩn. Taá kwarɩ-na Wɛ. Á taá zuli-na Pa-farʋ wʋm.

eng: Household slaves, submit by accepting the authority of your masters with all respect. Do this not only to good and kind masters but also to those who are harsh.
local: Abam balʋ na yɩ tɩntʋŋna tɩn maŋɩ sɩ á taá sɛ á yum tiinǝ niǝ, sɩ á taá nɩgɩ-ba lanyɩranɩ, kʋ na yɩ balʋ na jɩgɩ wʋ-bono yɩ ba kɩ abam lanyɩranɩ, naa kʋ zɩ yɩ balʋ kǝm na cana dɩ abam tɩn dɩ.

eng: Now, it is commendable if, because of ones understanding of God, someone should endure pain through suffering unjustly.
local: Ba na yaarɩ abam vwan yaara á na sɛ Wɛ tɩn ŋwaanɩ yɩ á vɔ pu-dɩa, kʋntʋ yɩ kʋlʋ na lana tɩn Wɛ yigǝ nɩ.

eng: But what praise comes from enduring patiently when you have sinned and are beaten for it? But if you endure steadfastly when youve done good and suffer for it, this is commendable before God.
local: Abam nan na kɩ balɔrɔ yɩ ba vaŋɩ á zwɛ kʋ ŋwaanɩ, yɩ á na maŋɩ á vɔ á wʋ dɩ yaara yam kʋntʋ dɩ, kʋ jɩgɩ kuri na? Kʋ daarɩ á na kɩ lanyɩranɩ yɩ ba ta yaarɩ abam, yɩ á na vɔgɩ á wʋ, kʋntʋ lana Wɛ yigǝ nɩ.

eng: You were called to this kind of endurance, because Christ suffered on your behalf. He left you an example so that you might follow in his footsteps.
local: Wɛ na bǝŋi abam sɩ á taá tɔgɩ-DƖ tɩn, kʋ yɩ sɩ á vɔ á wʋ mʋ yaara wʋnɩ. Zezi Krisi tɩtɩ dɛɛn maŋɩ o yaarɩ abam ŋwaanɩ, sɩ kʋ pa á taá tɔgɩ o na-bwǝrǝ mʋ á lwǝni o dɛɛn na kɩ te tɩn:.

eng: He committed no sin, nor did he ever speak in ways meant to deceive.
local: Wʋntʋ nan wʋ kɩ lwarɩm dɩ fɩnfɩɩn dɩ, yɩ o ni-taanɩ ba jɩgɩ vwan.

eng: When he was insulted, he did not reply with insults. When he suffered, he did not threaten revenge. Instead, he entrusted himself to the one who judges justly.
local: Nɔɔna dɛɛn maa jɩg-o ba twɩa, yɩ o wʋ tɔgɩ o twɩ-ba. Ba ma kwǝri ba bɛɛs-o, yɩ o wʋ lǝri-ba balɔrɔ. O nan kɩ o tɩtɩ mʋ Wɛ jɩŋa nɩ, dɩntʋ mʋ yɩ dɩlʋ na tɔgɩ cɩga DƖ ma di nɔɔna sarɩya tɩn.

eng: He carried in his own body on the cross the sins we committed. He did this so that we might live in righteousness, having nothing to do with sin. By his wounds you were healed.
local: Zezi Krisi mʋ joŋi dɩbam lwarɩm o tɩ tʋʋn-daa yuu nɩ dɩbam ŋwaanɩ. O kɩ kʋntʋ sɩ kʋ pa lwarɩm daa mʋ yɩ taa te dɩbam. Kʋntʋ, kʋ na yɩ lwarɩm jǝgǝ nɩ, dɩbam nyɩ nɩ twa mʋ te, yɩ dɩ́ laan daarɩ dɩ́ taá jɩgɩ ŋwɩa kalʋ na tɔgɩ cɩga tɩn Wɛ yigǝ nɩ. Ba na pogili Zezi yɩra yam tʋʋn-dagara baŋa nɩ tɩn mʋ pɛ abam na yazurǝ.

eng: Though you were like straying sheep, you have now returned to the shepherd and guardian of your lives.
local: Abam ya nyɩ dɩ peeni sɩlʋ na je tɩn mʋ. Á laan ma joori á ba á kɩ á tɩtɩ Zezi jɩŋa nɩ, wʋlʋ na yɩ abam nayɩrʋ yɩ o nii abam baŋa nɩ tɩn.

eng: Wives, likewise, submit to your own husbands. Do this so that even if some of them refuse to believe the word, they may be won without a word by their wives way of life.
local: Abam balʋ na yɩ kaana tɩn, abam dɩ maŋɩ sɩ á taá sɛ á banna ni kʋntʋ, sɩ kʋ pa á banna bam badaara ya na vɩn Wɛ taanɩ dɩm, sɩ ba laan na á kǝm-laarʋ tɩm, sɩ kʋ pa ba ba ba sɛ Wɛ, dɩ á na maŋɩ á wʋ puri á ni dɩ.

eng: After all, they will have observed the reverent and holy manner of your lives.
local: Ba nan wʋ́ maanɩ ba lwarɩ nɩ á nɩgɩ-ba yɩ á sɩɩnɩ á tɔgɩ cɩga cwǝŋǝ.

eng: Dont try to make yourselves beautiful on the outside, with stylish hair or by wearing gold jewelry or fine clothes.
local: Abam yɩ zaŋɩ á kwe á wʋbʋŋa á tiŋi nɩnwaŋa zɩla baŋa nɩ, kʋ na yɩ á na wʋ́ kwɛ á yuni te, dɩ á na wʋ́ kɩ sǝbu-sɩŋa zwa-kwana dɩ sǝbu-sɩŋa wǝǝnu á yɩra nɩ te tɩn, dɩ á na wʋ́ ta zʋʋrɩ gwar-laarʋ te tɩn.

eng: Instead, make yourselves beautiful on the inside, in your hearts, with the enduring quality of a gentle, peaceful spirit. This type of beauty is very precious in Gods eyes.
local: Abam nan maŋɩ sɩ á kwɛ á bɩcara mʋ lanyɩranɩ, sɩ á taá jɩgɩ wʋ-bono dɩ wʋ-zuru. Á na fɔgɩ á kwɛ á bɩcara yɩ ya lamma kʋntʋ doŋ, ya lam dɩm daa bá cɔgɩ, yɩ kʋʋ́ ta jɩgɩ kuri lanyɩranɩ Wɛ tee nɩ.

eng: For it was in this way that holy women who trusted in God used to make themselves beautiful, accepting the authority of their own husbands.
local: Faŋa faŋa kaana balʋ ya na yɩ Wɛ nɔɔna yɩ ba jɩgɩ tɩɩna dɩ Wɛ tɩn dɩ dɛɛn kwɛ ba bɩcara kʋntʋ doŋ mʋ, dɩ ba na sɛ ba banna ni tɩn.

eng: For example, Sarah accepted Abrahams authority when she called him master . You have become her children when you do good and dont respond to threats with fear.
local: Sara dɛɛn kɩ kʋntʋ mʋ, yɩ o sɛ o barʋ Abraham ni, dɩ o na bǝ-o nɩ o yuutu tɩn. Abam dɩ nan yɩ wʋntʋ biǝ mʋ, dɩ á na kɩ kǝm-laarʋ yɩ á wʋ pɛ fʋʋnɩ zʋ abam dɩ kʋlʋkʋlʋ.

eng: Husbands, likewise, submit by living with your wife in ways that honor her, knowing that she is the weaker partner. Honor her all the more, as she is also a coheir of the gracious care of life. Do this so that your prayers wont be hindered.
local: Abam balʋ dɩ na yɩ kan-banna tɩn maŋɩ sɩ á taá nɩgɩ á kaana bam kʋntʋ doŋ mʋ. Á na zʋʋrɩ dɩ á kaana bam tɩn, á taá ye nɩ ba ba dana nɩ abam te. Ba nan wʋ́ wǝli dɩ abam ba na Wɛ ŋwɩ-dʋŋa kam dɩ DƖ zaanɩ dɩm. Kʋntʋ tɩn, taá zuli-na-ba, sɩ kʋlʋkʋlʋ yɩ cʋ abam Wɛ-loro.

eng: Finally, all of you be of one mind, sympathetic, lovers of your fellow believers, compassionate, and modest in your opinion of yourselves.
local: A na lagɩ a ta kʋlʋ a ma kweeli tɩn mʋ yɩ sɩ abam maama taá jɩgɩ wʋbʋŋ-dɩdwɩ, sɩ á taá jɩgɩ da-ŋwaŋa, sɩ á taá soe daanɩ á na yɩ da-ko-biǝ Zezi ŋwaanɩ tɩn. Á taá duri da-yibwǝnǝ, sɩ á daarɩ á taá tu á tɩtɩ da tee nɩ.

eng: Dont pay back evil for evil or insult for insult. Instead, give blessing in return. You were called to do this so that you might inherit a blessing.
local: Nɔɔnʋ na kɩ abam wo-lɔŋɔ, sɩ á dɩ daa yɩ joori á kɩ-o wo-lɔŋɔ á ma ŋwɩ. Nɔɔnʋ na twɩ abam, á dɩ daa yɩ tɔgɩ á twɩ-o, sɩ á daarɩ á loori Wɛ á pa-o sɩ DƖ kɩ-o lanyɩranɩ, sɩ kʋ yɩ kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ Wɛ bǝŋi abam sɩ á taá tɔgɩ-DƖ, yɩ abam dɩ wʋ́ ba á joŋi lanyɩranɩ Wɛ tee nɩ.

eng: For those who want to love life and see good days should keep their tongue from evil speaking and their lips from speaking lies. .
local: Kʋ pʋpʋnɩ Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm wʋnɩ kʋ wɩ: «Nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ maama na lagɩ sɩ o na o ŋwɩa ywǝǝni dɩ wʋpolo tɩn maŋɩ sɩ o ja o tɩtɩ dɩ wo-balwaarʋ taanɩ dɩ vwan fɔm mʋ.

eng: They should shun evil and do good; seek peace and chase after it. .
local: Kʋntʋ tu maŋɩ sɩ o yagɩ kǝm-balwaarʋ, sɩ o daarɩ o taa kɩ lanyɩranɩ, sɩ o kwaanɩ o taa jɩgɩ ywǝǝni dɩ nɔɔna maama.

eng: The Lords eyes are on the righteous and his ears are open to their prayers. But the Lord cannot tolerate those who do evil. .
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ dɩ́ Yuutu Baŋa-Wɛ nii balʋ na tɔgɩ cɩga tɩn baŋa nɩ mʋ, yɩ DƖ cǝgi ba loro. Kʋ nan na yɩ balʋ na kɩ kǝm-balwaarʋ tɩn, DƖ yigǝ tǝrǝ dɩ ba.».

eng: Who will harm you if you are zealous for good?.
local: Wɔɔ mʋ wʋ́ wanɩ o kɩ abam wo-lɔŋɔ dɩ á na tiini á kwaanɩ á kɩ lanyɩranɩ?.

eng: But happy are you, even if you suffer because of righteousness! Dont be terrified or upset by them.
local: Abam nan na maŋɩ á na yaara á na kɩ lanyɩranɩ tɩn ŋwaanɩ mʋ dɩ, á daa ta jɩgɩ yu-yoŋo. Á nan yɩ taá fʋna dɩ ba, naa á pa á wʋbʋŋa vugimi.

eng: Instead, regard Christ the Lord as holy in your hearts. Whenever anyone asks you to speak of your hope, be ready to defend it.
local: Taá zuli-na á Yuutu Zezi Krisi dɩ á bɩcara maama. Nan ti-na á yigǝ maŋa maama, sɩ á wanɩ á lǝri nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ maama na wʋ́ bwe abam sɩ o lwarɩ tɩɩna yalʋ á na jɩgɩ dɩ Wɛ tɩn na yɩ te tɩn.

eng: Yet do this with respectful humility, maintaining a good conscience. Act in this way so that those who malign your good lifestyle in Christ may be ashamed when they slander you.
local: Á nan lǝri kʋntʋ tu dɩ wʋ-bono dɩ zulǝ. Á taá kɩ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ á na ye á bɩcara nɩ nɩ tɩ lana tɩn, sɩ kʋ pa cavɩɩra ja balʋ na culi abam dɩ á kǝm-laarʋ tɩm Zezi Krisi ŋwaanɩ tɩn.

eng: It is better to suffer for doing good than for doing evil.
local: Á na kɩ lanyɩranɩ yɩ ba yaarɩ abam kʋ ŋwaanɩ yɩ kʋ yɩ Wɛ wʋbʋŋa, kʋ garɩ á na kɩ kǝm-balwaarʋ yɩ á yaarɩ tɩ ŋwaanɩ.

eng: Christ himself suffered on account of sins, once for all, the righteous one on behalf of the unrighteous. He did this in order to bring you into the presence of God. Christ was put to death as a human, but made alive by the Spirit.
local: Zezi Krisi dɛɛn nan tɩgɩ bɩdwɩ mʋ o ma saarɩ nabiinǝ lwarɩm. Kʋ maa yɩ nɔn-ŋʋm mʋ lǝri nɔn-balwaarʋ yuu nɩ o tɩ, yɩ o wanɩ o kɩ-ba Wɛ jɩŋa nɩ. Ba gʋ-o mʋ, yɩ Wɛ Joro kʋm joori kʋ pa-o ŋwɩa.

eng: And it was by the Spirit that he went to preach to the spirits in prison.
local: O laan ma tɔgɩ DƖ Joro kʋm kʋntʋ dam ŋwaanɩ o vu nɔɔna balʋ jwǝǝru ba dɛɛn na pɩ curu nɩ tɩn te, yɩ o tɔɔlɩ Wɛ kwǝrǝ kam o brɩ-ba.

eng: In the past, these spirits were disobedient—when God patiently waited during the time of Noah. Noah built an ark in which a few lives were rescued through water.
local: Kʋ yɩ nɔɔna balʋ dɛɛn na vɩn Wɛ ni tɩn jwǝǝru mʋ kʋntʋ. Kʋ yɩ maŋa kalʋ Wɛ na pɩɩnɩ DƖ banɩ yɩ Nowe wʋra o paɩ naboro kamunu kʋm sɩ o ma joŋi o ŋwɩa tɩn mʋ. Nɔɔna balʋ dɛɛn na zʋ naboro kʋm wʋ tɩn yɩ nana má má mʋ, yɩ Wɛ tɔgɩ na bam baŋa DƖ vrɩ ba ŋwɩa.

eng: Baptism is like that. It saves you now—not because it removes dirt from your body but because it is the mark of a good conscience toward God. Your salvation comes through the resurrection of Jesus Christ.
local: Kʋntʋ yɩ nyɩnyʋgʋ mʋ, kʋ na mɛ kʋ brɩ nɩ abam dɩ na pɛ ba miisi abam na wʋnɩ tɩn mʋ pɛ Wɛ vrɩ abam Zezi Krisi na bi o yagɩ tʋʋnɩ tɩn ŋwaanɩ. Ba na miisi abam na wʋnɩ tɩn, kʋ daɩ sɩ á ma swɛ á yɩra digiru. Kʋ nan yɩ á goni ni mʋ dɩ Wɛ, sɩ á taá tɔgɩ-DƖ dɩ wʋ-poŋo.

eng: who is at Gods right side. Now that he has gone into heaven, he rules over all angels, authorities, and powers.
local: Zezi Krisi mʋ diini Wɛ-sɔŋɔ o jǝni Wɛ jazɩm nɩ, yɩ malɛsɩ dɩ dɩdɛɛra dɩ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ maama na jɩgɩ dam tɩn wʋ o dam kuri nɩ.

eng: Therefore, since Christ suffered as a human, you should also arm yourselves with his way of thinking. This is because whoever suffers is finished with sin.
local: Kʋntʋ, abam maŋɩ á lwarɩ Zezi Krisi na nɛ yaara o yɩra wʋnɩ te tɩn. Kʋ maŋɩ sɩ abam dɩ taá jɩgɩ wʋntʋ wʋbʋŋa yam doŋ, sɩ á ma fɔgɩ á cɩ á tɩtɩ yaara wʋnɩ. Bɛŋwaanɩ, nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ na nɛ yaara o yɩra wʋnɩ tɩn, lwarɩm daa ba te kʋntʋ tu.

eng: As a result, they dont live the rest of their human lives in ways determined by human desires but in ways determined by Gods will.
local: Kʋntʋ, abam daa ta na jɩgɩ ŋwɩa lʋgʋ baŋa nɩ tɩn, á daa wʋ maŋɩ sɩ á taá tɔgɩ wo-yɔɔrʋ tɩlʋ nabiinǝ fra na zʋʋrɩ tɩn. Á maŋɩ sɩ á taá tɔgɩ Wɛ wʋbʋŋa na lagɩ kʋlʋ tɩn mʋ.

eng: You have wasted enough time doing what unbelievers desire—living in their unrestrained immorality and lust, their drunkenness and excessive feasting and wild parties, and their forbidden worship of idols.
local: Abam dɛɛn cɔgɩ á ŋwɩa kam maŋa zanzan, dɩ á na yǝni á tɔgɩ cwe sɩlʋ balʋ na yǝri Wɛ tɩn na lagɩ sɩ ba taa tɔgɩ tɩn. Abam dɛɛn yǝni á kɩ wo-digiru kikiǝ dɩ wo-yɔɔrʋ tɩlʋ maama á fra na zʋʋrɩ tɩn. Á dɛɛn maa yɩ sa-nyɔra, yɩ á yɩ nɔn-kwǝǝlu á nyɔ sana á bugǝ. Á maa kwǝri á tɔgɩ jwǝnǝ kaanɩm, mʋ kʋlʋ Wɛ wʋbʋŋa na vaɩ tɩn.

eng: They think its strange that you dont join in these activities with the same flood of unrestrained wickedness. So they slander you.
local: Kʋ daarɩ lele kʋntʋ, á daa na ba tɔgɩ dɩ balʋ na yǝri Wɛ á kɩ wo-zɔɔna kikiǝ kʋntʋ doŋ tɩn, kʋ kɩ-ba yǝǝu mʋ, kʋ pa ba jɩgɩ abam ba twɩa.

eng: They will have to reckon with the one who is ready to judge the living and the dead.
local: Bantʋ nan wʋ́ ba ba zɩgɩ Wɛ yigǝ nɩ yɩ ba tʋlɩ ba kwǝri. Dɩntʋ nan ti DƖ yigǝ sɩ DƖ di nabiinǝ sarɩya, kʋ na yɩ balʋ na ŋwɩ dɩ balʋ na maŋɩ ba tɩ tɩn dɩ.

eng: Indeed, this is the reason the good news was also preached to the dead. This happened so that, although they were judged as humans according to human standards, they could live by the Spirit according to divine standards.
local: Kʋ yɩ kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ ba dɛɛn tɔɔlɩ Wɛ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam ba brɩ balʋ na tɩgɩ tɩn dɩ. Bantʋ yɩra yam mʋ tɩga, nɩnɛɛnɩ nabiinǝ maama na maŋɩ sɩ ba tɩ ba lwarɩm ŋwaanɩ te tɩn. Ba nan na ni Wɛ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam tɩn, kʋ yɩ sɩ ba jwǝǝru tɩm laan mʋ na Wɛ ŋwɩ-dʋŋa kam.

eng: The end of everything has come. Therefore, be self-controlled and clearheaded so you can pray.
local: Lʋgʋ baŋa dɩ kʋ wǝǝnu maama tiim twɛ. Nan fɔgɩ-na á ja á wʋbʋŋa sɩ á taá jɩgɩ yawala dɩ Wɛ-loro.

eng: Above all, show sincere love to each other, because love brings about the forgiveness of many sins.
local: Kʋlʋ na dwe maama tɩn yɩ sɩ á taá soe daanɩ dɩ á wʋ maama. Bɛŋwaanɩ, á na soe daanɩ, kʋʋ́ pa á donnǝ na kɩ kǝm-balwaarʋ tɩlʋ zanzan tɩn daa bá ta wʋ á wʋbʋŋa nɩ.

eng: Open your homes to each other without complaining.
local: Taá kɩ-na vǝrǝ voro, sɩ pʋpʋna taa tǝri á tɩtarɩ nɩ.

eng: And serve each other according to the gift each person has received, as good managers of Gods diverse gifts.
local: Abam dɩdʋa dɩdʋa na joŋi pɛɛrɩ dɩlʋ Wɛ tee nɩ tɩn, á taá ma-dɩ á tʋŋɩ á wǝli daanɩ. Kʋntʋ, á taá yɩ tɩntʋŋ-ŋʋna balʋ na joŋi Wɛ pɛɛra yam dwi tǝri tǝri á ma tʋŋɩ DƖ na lagɩ te tɩn.

eng: Whoever speaks should do so as those who speak Gods word. Whoever serves should do so from the strength that God furnishes. Do this so that in everything God may be honored through Jesus Christ. To him be honor and power forever and always. Amen.
local: Abam wʋlʋ Wɛ na pɛ-o pɛɛrɩ sɩ o taa waɩ o ŋɔɔnɩ o brɩ nɔɔna tɩn maŋɩ sɩ o taa ŋɔɔnɩ Wɛ kwǝrǝ kam mʋ. Wʋlʋ Wɛ na pɛ sɩ o taa tʋŋɩ o wǝli o donnǝ tɩn dɩ maŋɩ sɩ o taa maɩ dam dɩlʋ Wɛ na pɛ-o tɩn mʋ o ma tʋŋa. Kʋntʋ wʋ́ pa nɔɔna taa zuli Wɛ woŋo maama wʋnɩ Zezi Krisi yɩrɩ ŋwaanɩ. Wʋntʋ nan mʋ te zulǝ dɩ dam sɩ kʋ taa ve maŋa kalʋ na ba ti tɩn. Amina.

eng: Dear friends, dont be surprised about the fiery trials that have come among you to test you. These are not strange happenings.
local: A badon-sonnu-ba, á yɩ pa kʋ sʋ abam dɩ can-kamunu na yi abam. Á nan yɩ pa kʋ sɔɔrɩ abam, nɩnɛɛnɩ kʋ yɩ wo-kɩnkagɩlɩ mʋ te.

eng: Instead, rejoice as you share Christs suffering. You share his suffering now so that you may also have overwhelming joy when his glory is revealed.
local: Taá kɩ-na wʋpolo dɩ abam na tɔgɩ á na Zezi Krisi yaara yam doŋ tɩn. Kʋntʋ, Zezi Krisi na joori o ba yɩ o paarɩ zulǝ yam na wʋ́ ba ya brɩ jaja maŋa kalʋ tɩn, á wʋpolo kʋm laan wʋ́ tiini kʋ gaalɩ.

eng: If you are mocked because of Christs name, you are blessed, for the Spirit of glory—indeed, the Spirit of God—rests on you.
local: Nɔɔna nan na twɩ abam á na yɩ Zezi Krisi nɔɔna tɩn ŋwaanɩ, á jɩgɩ yu-yoŋo, bɛŋwaanɩ Wɛ Joro kʋm na jɩgɩ paarɩ-zulǝ tɩn wʋ abam tee nɩ.

eng: Now none of you should suffer as a murderer or thief or evildoer or rebel.
local: Abam wʋlʋ na nɛ yaara, sɩ kʋ yɩ zaŋɩ kʋ taa yɩ nɔn-gʋra ŋwaanɩ, naa ŋwɩɩnɩ naa wo-balwaarʋ kǝm naa bɩbara ŋwaanɩ.

eng: But dont be ashamed if you suffer as one who belongs to Christ. Rather, honor God as you bear Christs name. Give honor to God.
local: Abam wʋlʋ nan na yaarɩ o na yɩ Zezi Krisi nɔɔnʋ tɩn ŋwaanɩ, o yɩ pa cavɩɩra taa jɩg-o kʋ ŋwaanɩ. Kʋntʋ tu nan maŋɩ sɩ o pa Wɛ zulǝ dɩ nɔɔna na bǝ-o nɩ Krisi bu tɩn.

eng: because its time for judgment to begin with Gods own household. But if judgment starts with us, what will happen to those who refuse to believe Gods good news?.
local: Maŋa kam yiǝ sɩ Wɛ di nabiinǝ sarɩya. Kʋ nan yɩ DƖ tɩtɩ nɔɔna bam baŋa nɩ mʋ DƖ lagɩ DƖ puli. Kʋ nan na wʋ́ puli dɩbam tee nɩ mʋ tɩn, kʋ laan na tu kʋ yi balʋ na vɩn Wɛ kwǝr-ywǝŋǝ kam tɩn, kʋʋ́ ta yɩ ta mʋ dɩ bantʋ? Kʋ bá tiini kʋ kɩ cam dɩ ba cɩga?.

eng: If the righteous are barely rescued, what will happen to the godless and sinful?.
local: Kʋ pʋpʋnɩ Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm wʋnɩ kʋ wɩ: «Kʋ na cɛ mʋ, yɩ nɔn-ŋʋna na ŋwɩa Wɛ tee nɩ tɩn, balʋ laan na vɩn Wɛ yɩ ba yɩ nɔn-balwaarʋ tɩn, kʋʋ́ kɩ-ba tɛ?».

eng: So then, those who suffer because they follow Gods will should commit their lives to a trustworthy creator by doing what is right.
local: Kʋntʋ, balʋ na nɛ yaara nɩ Wɛ wʋbʋŋa na lagɩ te tɩn maŋɩ sɩ ba taa kɩ lanyɩranɩ mʋ, sɩ ba kɩ ba tɩtɩ ba naanʋ Wɛ jɩŋa nɩ. DƖ bá kwanɩ DƖ ni dɩm DƖ na goni tɩn.

eng: Therefore, I have a request for the elders among you. I urge the elders.
local: Amʋ lagɩ a ŋɔɔnɩ dɩ balʋ na yɩ Zezi kɔgɔ kʋm nakwa abam tɩtarɩ nɩ tɩn mʋ. Amʋ dɩ yɩ nakwɩ mʋ. Amʋ yi dɛɛn nɛ Zezi Krisi na yaarɩ te o tɩ tɩn, yɩ a laan brɩ nɔɔna o cɩga kam. Amʋ nan wʋ́ tɔgɩ a na o paarɩ-zulǝ yam ya na wʋ́ ba ya brɩ jaja tɩn.

eng: Like shepherds, tend the flock of God among you. Watch over it. Dont shepherd because you must, but do it voluntarily for God. Dont shepherd greedily, but do it eagerly.
local: A nan loori abam balʋ na yɩ nakwa tɩn, sɩ á taá nii Wɛ nɔn-kɔgɔ kʋm DƖ na kɩ á jɩŋa nɩ tɩn baŋa nɩ, nɩ nayɩra na nii ba peeni baŋa nɩ te tɩn. Kʋ nan daɩ dɩ fɩfɩʋn mʋ á wʋ́ ta maa nii-ba, kʋ yɩ sɩ á wʋbʋŋa mʋ taa lagɩ tɩtʋŋɩ dɩm nɩ Wɛ na lagɩ te tɩn. Kʋ daɩ sɩ á taá tʋŋɩ sǝbu-lagɩ ŋwaanɩ. Á pa kʋ taa yɩ á na soe tɩtʋŋɩ dɩm tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: Dont shepherd by ruling over those entrusted to your care, but become examples to the flock.
local: Á yɩ taá kɩ dam dɩ balʋ á na nii ba baŋa nɩ tɩn, á nan taá jɩgɩ nyɩnyʋgʋ kʋlʋ na lana tɩn, sɩ ba wanɩ ba taa lwǝni abam na yɩ te tɩn.

eng: And when the chief shepherd appears, you will receive an unfading crown of glory.
local: Kʋntʋ tɩn, abam Nayɩrɩ-pɛ wʋm na joori o ba, o laan wʋ́ pa abam pɛɛrɩ dɩlʋ lam na bá fɔgɩ dɩ ti yɩ dɩ jɩgɩ paarɩ-zulǝ tɩn.

eng: In the same way, I urge you who are younger: accept the authority of the elders. And everyone, clothe yourselves with humility toward each other. God stands against the proud, but he gives favor to the humble.
local: Abam balʋ dɩ na yɩ nɔn-dʋnnʋ tɩn maŋɩ sɩ á taá sɛ á nakwa bam ni mʋ. Kʋ nan maŋɩ sɩ abam maama taá tu á tɩtɩ mʋ á pa daanɩ, sɩ á taá tʋŋɩ á wǝli daanɩ. Bɛŋwaanɩ kʋ pʋpʋnɩ Wɛ tɔnɔ kʋm wʋnɩ kʋ wɩ: «Wɛ culi balʋ na kɩ kamunni tɩn, yɩ DƖ daarɩ DƖ kɩ balʋ na tu ba tɩtɩ tɩn lanyɩranɩ.».

eng: Therefore, humble yourselves under Gods power so that he may raise you up in the last day.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ, taá tu-na á tɩtɩ, sɩ á daarɩ á kɩ á tɩtɩ Dam-Paŋwa Tu Wɛ jɩŋa nɩ, sɩ dɩntʋ maŋa kam na tu ka yi, DƖ laan wʋ́ zǝŋi abam DƖ pa á na zulǝ.

eng: Throw all your anxiety onto him, because he cares about you.
local: Liǝ yalʋ maama na jɩgɩ abam tɩn, á kwe-ya á pa Wɛ, sɩ dɩntʋ mʋ nii abam baŋa nɩ.

eng: Be clearheaded. Keep alert. Your accuser, the devil, is on the prowl like a roaring lion, seeking someone to devour.
local: Nan ja-na á wʋbʋŋa lanyɩranɩ, sɩ á fɔgɩ á cɩ á tɩtɩ, sɩ sʋtaanɩ na yɩ abam dʋm tɩn karɩ dɩ kaagɩ mʋ dɩ lagɩ cwǝŋǝ sɩ dɩ cɔgɩ abam, nɩnɛɛnɩ kana na jɩgɩ nyoŋo yɩ kʋ karɩ kʋ kaagɩ kʋ lagɩ varɩm sɩ kʋ zi te tɩn.

eng: Resist him, standing firm in the faith. Do so in the knowledge that your fellow believers are enduring the same suffering throughout the world.
local: Nan zɩgɩ-na kǝŋkǝŋ dɩ wʋ-dɩdʋa sɩ á vɩ-dɩ, sɩ á lwarɩ nɩ á ko-biǝ balʋ na wʋ lʋgʋ baŋa je sɩm maama nɩ tɩn dɩ jɩgɩ yaara yantʋ doŋ mʋ.

eng: After you have suffered for a little while, the God of all grace, the one who called you into his eternal glory in Christ Jesus, will himself restore, empower, strengthen, and establish you.
local: Abam nan na yaarɩ maŋa fɩnfɩɩn, Wɛ dɩlʋ na zǝni nabiinǝ dɩ DƖ zaanɩ dɩlʋ na daga tɩn laan wʋ́ pa á bɩcara fɔgɩ ya kwɛ. DƖ wʋ́ pa abam dam, sɩ á taá zɩgɩ kǝŋkǝŋ woŋo maama wʋnɩ. Dɩntʋ mʋ bǝŋi abam sɩ á tɔgɩ á na DƖ paarɩ-zulǝ yalʋ na ba ti tɩn, á na ŋwɩ dɩ Zezi Krisi tɩn ŋwaanɩ.

eng: To him be power forever and always. Amen.
local: Dɩntʋ mʋ jɩgɩ dam sɩ kʋ taa ve maŋa kalʋ na ba ti tɩn. Amina.

eng: I have written and sent these few lines to you by Silvanus. I consider him to be a faithful brother. In these lines I have urged and affirmed that this is the genuine grace of God. Stand firm in it.
local: Amʋ pɛ Silivɛn mʋ pʋpʋnɩ tɔnɔ kʋntʋ, sɩ a pa abam. Wʋntʋ mʋ yɩ dɩ́ ko-bu wʋlʋ amʋ na ye nɩ o yɩ cɩga tu Wɛ cwǝŋǝ kam wʋnɩ tɩn. A pʋpʋnɩ taanɩ dɩntʋ fɩnfɩɩn mʋ sɩ a ma pa abam na baarɩ, sɩ a daarɩ a pa á lwarɩ nɩ cɩga kalʋ á na sɛ tɩn mʋ yɩ Wɛ zaanɩ dɩm cɩga cɩga. Nan fɔgɩ-na á taá jɩgɩ cɩga kam kʋntʋ.

eng: The fellow-elect church in Babylon greets you, and so does my son Mark.
local: Wɛ kɔgɔ kʋlʋ na wʋ Babilɔnɩ nɩ yɩ Wɛ kuri-ba nɩ DƖ na kuri abam dɩ te tɩn jɔɔnɩ abam. Marɩkɩ wʋlʋ na yɩ amʋ bu Wɛ cwǝŋǝ kam ŋwaanɩ tɩn dɩ jɔɔnɩ abam.

eng: Greet each other with the kiss of love. Peace to you all who are in Christ.
local: Á na jeeri daanɩ, sɩ á taá jɔɔnɩ daanɩ dɩ sono. Abam balʋ maama na yɩ Zezi Krisi nɔɔna tɩn, Wɛ wʋ́ pa abam yazurǝ.

eng: From Simon Peter, a slave and apostle of Jesus Christ. To those who received a faith equal to ours through the justice of our God and savior Jesus Christ.
local: Amʋ Simɔn Pɩyɛɛrɩ mʋ pʋpʋnɩ tɔnɔ kʋntʋ. A yɩ Zezi Krisi gamba-sono mʋ, yɩ a kwǝri a yɩ o tɩntʋŋnʋ wʋlʋ o na kuri tɩn. Amʋ pʋpʋnɩ a pa abam balʋ Wɛ na pɛ á jɩgɩ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩ Zezi Krisi kʋ maŋɩ dɩ dɩbam dɩ na jɩgɩ wʋ-dɩdʋa dɩd-o te tɩn, o na yɩ cɩga tu tɩn ŋwaanɩ. Wʋntʋ mʋ yɩ dɩbam Tu Wɛ dɩ dɩ́ Vɩrnʋ.

eng: May you have more and more grace and peace through the knowledge of God and Jesus our Lord.
local: Wɛ wʋ́ pa abam yu-yoŋo dɩ yazurǝ kʋ ja gaalɩ, dɩ á na tu á lwarɩ-DƖ yɩ á ta kwǝri á lwarɩ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi tɩn.

eng: By his divine power the Lord has given us everything we need for life and godliness through the knowledge of the one who called us by his own honor and glory.
local: Wɛ dam tu Zezi Krisi pɛ dɩbam woŋo kʋlʋ maama na paɩ dɩ́ jɩgɩ ŋwɩa Wɛ tee nɩ yɩ dɩ́ daarɩ dɩ́ tɔgɩ DƖ cwǝŋǝ lanyɩranɩ tɩn, dɩ o na pɛ dɩ́ lwarɩ Baŋa-Wɛ dɩlʋ na kuri dɩbam sɩ dɩ́ tɔgɩ dɩ́ na DƖ paarɩ-zulǝ, sɩ dɩ́ taá kɩ lanyɩranɩ nɩ dɩntʋ na kɩ lanyɩranɩ te tɩn.

eng: Through his honor and glory he has given us his precious and wonderful promises, that you may share the divine nature and escape from the worlds immorality that sinful craving produces.
local: Kʋ tɔgɩ DƖ zǝnǝ yam kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ mʋ, yɩ DƖ pa dɩbam wo-laarʋ tɩlʋ na tiini tɩ jɩgɩ kuri yɩ DƖ ya go ni sɩ DƖ pa dɩbam tɩn. DƖ zǝni abam kʋntʋ, sɩ DƖ pa á wanɩ á lu lʋgʋ baŋa wo-yɔɔrʋ tɩlʋ fra na ganɩ nɔɔna kʋ paɩ ba wʋbʋŋa cɔgɩ tɩn mʋ, sɩ á daarɩ á taá jɩgɩ Wɛ ŋwɩa kam á bɩcara nɩ.

eng: This is why you must make every effort to add moral excellence to your faith; and to moral excellence, knowledge.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ, á tiini á kwaanɩ sɩ á pa lanyɩranɩ kǝm tɔgɩ dɩ wǝli á wʋ-dɩdʋa kam á na maŋɩ á kɩ dɩ Wɛ tɩn nɩ, sɩ á wǝli yǝno á lanyɩranɩ kǝm dɩm dɩ wʋnɩ.

eng: and to knowledge, self-control; and to self-control, endurance; and to endurance, godliness.
local: sɩ á daarɩ á ja á tɩtɩ á wǝli á yǝno kʋm wʋnɩ, sɩ á wǝli pu-dɩa á na jɩgɩ á tɩtɩ te tɩn wʋnɩ, sɩ á taá tɔgɩ Wɛ cwǝŋǝ lanyɩranɩ á wǝli á pu-dɩa kam dɩ wʋnɩ.

eng: and to godliness, affection for others; and to affection for others, love.
local: sɩ á taá jɩgɩ á ko-biǝ ŋwaŋa á wǝli á na tɔgɩ Wɛ cwǝŋǝ lanyɩranɩ te tɩn wʋnɩ, sɩ á taá soe nɔɔna á wǝli á na jɩgɩ da-ŋwaŋa te tɩn dɩ wʋnɩ.

eng: If all these are yours and they are growing in you, theyll keep you from becoming inactive and unfruitful in the knowledge of our Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Abam na sɩɩnɩ á jɩgɩ wo-laarʋ tɩm kʋntʋ kʋ ja gaalɩ, tɩ wʋ́ cɩ abam sɩ á yɩ taá yɩ yawɔrɩ-nyɩna, yɩ kʋʋ́ pa á fɔgɩ á tiini á lwarɩ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi Krisi á wǝli da.

eng: Whoever lacks these things is shortsighted and blind, forgetting that they were cleansed from their past sins.
local: Nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ nan na ba jɩgɩ wo-laarʋ tɩm kʋntʋ tɩn, kʋntʋ tu warɩ o lwarɩ Wɛ cɩga kam, o nyɩ dɩ lilwe mʋ te. O swe nɩ o dɛɛn na kɩ lwarma yalʋ tɩn maŋɩ ya saarɩ.

eng: Therefore, brothers and sisters, be eager to confirm your call and election. Do this and you will never ever be lost.
local: Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ, a ko-biǝ-ba, Wɛ na bǝŋi abam sɩ á taá tɔgɩ-DƖ yɩ DƖ kuri abam sɩ á taá yɩ DƖ nɔɔna tɩn, kwaanɩ-na á pa á na tɔgɩ-DƖ te tɩn tiini kʋ taa jɩgɩ kuri lanyɩranɩ. Á na kwaanɩ á kɩ kʋntʋ doŋ, á daa bá ywǝri Wɛ cwǝŋǝ kam wʋnɩ.

eng: In this way you will receive a rich welcome into the everlasting kingdom of our Lord and savior Jesus Christ.
local: Kʋntʋ, Wɛ wʋ́ yagɩ cwǝŋǝ DƖ pa abam fasɩ, sɩ á na jǝŋǝ je Zezi Krisi paarɩ dɩm wʋnɩ. Wʋntʋ mʋ yɩ dɩbam Yuutu dɩ dɩ́ Vɩrnʋ, yɩ o paarɩ dɩm ba jɩgɩ tiim maŋa dɩ maŋa.

eng: So Ill keep reminding you about these things, although you already know them and stand secure in the truth you have.
local: Mʋ kʋ kuri amʋ joori a paɩ á guli wo-laarʋ tɩm kʋntʋ woŋo maŋa maama. Abam nan maŋɩ á ye-tɩ, yɩ á sɩɩnɩ á tɔgɩ cɩga kalʋ á na lwarɩ tɩn.

eng: I think its right that I keep stirring up your memory, as long as Im alive.
local: A nan bʋŋɩ nɩ kʋ lana, sɩ amʋ ta na wʋ lʋgʋ baŋa nɩ tɩn, sɩ a taa guli abam kʋntʋ doŋ, sɩ kʋ pa á taá jɩgɩ tɩ wʋbʋŋa.

eng: After all, our Lord Jesus Christ has shown me that I am about to depart from this life.
local: A ye nɩ kʋ daa bá daanɩ sɩ a tɩ, nɩ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi na pɛ a lwarɩ te tɩn.

eng: Im eager for you always to remember these things after my death.
local: Amʋ nan wʋ́ kwaanɩ a kɩ woŋo kʋlʋ na wʋ́ pa á taá waɩ á guli wǝǝnu tɩm kʋntʋ gulǝ maŋa maama amʋ tʋʋnɩ kwaga nɩ tɩn.

eng: We didnt repeat crafty myths when we told you about the powerful coming of our Lord Jesus Christ. Quite the contrary, we witnessed his majesty with our own eyes.
local: Dɩbam dɛɛn pɛ á lwarɩ dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi na tu dɩ dam nabiinǝ tɩtarɩ nɩ te tɩn. Dɩ́ na pɛ á lwarɩ o cɩga kam kʋntʋ tɩn, kʋ daɩ sɩnswalɩ mʋ dɩ́ mɛ dɩ́ brɩ abam nɩ nɔɔna na maɩ ba tɩtɩ swan ba brɩ te tɩn. Dɩbam tɩtɩ yi nan mʋ nɛ o na jɩgɩ Wɛ paarɩ-zulǝ cɩga cɩga te tɩn.

eng: He received honor and glory from God the Father when a voice came to him from the magnificent glory, saying, This is my dearly loved Son, with whom I am well-pleased.
local: Dɩ́ ma na Zezi na joŋi tiǝ dɩ zulǝ o Ko Wɛ tee nɩ maŋa kalʋ o yibiyǝ na lǝni yɩ Paŋwa Baŋa-Wɛ ŋɔɔnɩ DƖ wɩ: «Amʋ Bu mʋ tɩntʋ, a so-o dɩ a wʋ maama. Amʋ tiini a jɩgɩ wʋpolo dɩd-o.».

eng: We ourselves heard this voice from heaven while we were with him on the holy mountain.
local: Dɩbam tɩtɩ ni kwǝrǝ kam kʋntʋ na ŋɔɔnɩ Wɛ-sɔŋɔ nɩ maŋa kalʋ dɩbam dɩ Zezi dɛɛn na wʋ piu kʋlʋ Wɛ na ŋɔɔnɩ kʋ yuu nɩ tɩn.

eng: In addition, we have a most reliable prophetic word, and you would do well to pay attention to it, just as you would to a lamp shining in a dark place, until the day dawns and the morning star rises in your hearts.
local: Kʋntʋ, dɩ́ nan ta ye fasɩ nɩ taanɩ dɩlʋ Wɛ nijoŋnǝ bam na brɩ faŋa faŋa tɩn sɩɩnɩ dɩ yɩ cɩga mʋ. Kʋ maŋɩ sɩ á taá maanɩ á nii dɩ na yɩ te tɩn. Taanɩ dɩntʋ nyɩ dɩ ba na tarɩgɩ kanɩa ba zɩgɩ lim je nɩ yɩ ka paɩ pooni wʋra sɩ kʋ vu kʋ yi tɩ-pʋra te tɩn mʋ. Zezi Krisi pooni dɩm laan wʋ́ ba dɩ taa wʋ á bɩcara nɩ, nɩ naŋɔgɔ na fuŋi yɩ pooni wʋra te tɩn.

eng: Most important, you must know that no prophecy of scripture represents the prophets own understanding of things.
local: Kʋlʋ na dwe dɩdɩ sɩ á lwarɩ tɩn mʋ tɩntʋ: Nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ bá wanɩ o ma o tɩtɩ wʋbʋŋa yɩranɩ o brɩ Wɛ kwǝrǝ kalʋ na pʋpʋnɩ DƖ tɔnɔ kʋm wʋnɩ tɩn kuri.

eng: because no prophecy ever came by human will. Instead, men and women led by the Holy Spirit spoke from God.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ Wɛ kwǝrǝ kam DƖ nijoŋnǝ bam dɛɛn na tɔɔlɩ tɩn wʋ nuŋi nabiinǝ wʋbʋŋa wʋnɩ. Kʋ nan yɩ Wɛ Joro kʋm mʋ pɛ nɔɔna jɩgɩ dam yɩ ba waɩ ba tɔɔlɩ Wɛ tɩtɩ kwǝrǝ kam.

eng: But false prophets also arose among the people. In the same way, false teachers will come among you. They will introduce destructive opinions and deny the master who bought them, bringing quick destruction on themselves.
local: Faŋa faŋa tɩn, nɔɔna dɛɛn mʋ wʋ Wɛ nɔɔna bam wʋnɩ ba na brɩ nɩ ba yɩ Wɛ nijoŋnǝ yɩ ba yagɩ ba daɩ. Vwan zaasɩm tiinǝ dɩ wʋ́ ŋɔ ba zʋ abam wʋnɩ kʋntʋ, yɩ ba kɩ swan ba brɩ abam zaasɩm dɩlʋ na daɩ Wɛ nyɩm yɩ dɩ cɔgɩ nɔɔna tɩn. Bantʋ mʋ vɩn ba Yuutu Zezi wʋlʋ na ŋwɩ ba lwarɩm jɩnɩ sɩ ba taa yɩ o nɔɔna tɩn. Kʋntʋ ŋwaanɩ ba kikiǝ yam wʋ́ pa Wɛ cɔgɩ-ba lɩla.

eng: Many will follow them in their unrestrained immorality, and because of these false teachers the way of truth will be slandered.
local: Nɔɔna zanzan nan wʋ́ sɛ ba tɔgɩ ba na brɩ kʋlʋ tɩn, yɩ ba dɩ kɩ ba wo-digiru kikiǝ yam kʋntʋ doŋ. Ba na kɩ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ tɩn wʋ́ pa nɔɔna taa yáalɩ Wɛ zaasɩm dɩlʋ na yɩ cɩga tɩn.

eng: In their greed they will take advantage of you with lies. The judgment pronounced against them long ago hasnt fallen idle, nor is their destruction sleeping.
local: Vwan zaasɩm tiinǝ bam kʋntʋ na yɩ wo-swǝn-nyɩna tɩn, baá kwaanɩ ba ma bɩtar-ywe ba ganɩ abam, sɩ ba ma na nyɔɔrɩ abam baŋa nɩ. Wɛ nan maŋɩ DƖ ti DƖ yigǝ faŋa faŋa sɩ DƖ di bantʋ sarɩya, yɩ cam wʋ́ ba ba baŋa lɩla.

eng: God didnt spare the angels when they sinned but cast them into the lowest level of the underworld and committed them to chains of darkness, keeping them there until the judgment.
local: Kʋ nan na yɩ malɛsɩ sɩlʋ dɛɛn na cɔgɩ tɩn dɩ, Wɛ wʋ yagɩ-sɩ. DƖ dɩ-sɩ DƖ yagɩ min-tɩʋ nɩ mʋ, mɛ ba na kwaarɩ-sɩ lim wʋnɩ, sɩ sɩ taa wʋra taan, sɩ kʋ vu kʋ yi DƖ sarɩya dɛ dɩm tɩn.

eng: And he didnt spare the ancient world when he brought a flood on the world of ungodly people, even though he protected Noah, a preacher of righteousness, along with seven others.
local: Wɛ dɛɛn wʋ yagɩ faŋa faŋa nɔɔna balʋ na wʋ lʋgʋ baŋa nɩ yɩ ba kɩ lwarɩm tɩn. Nowe mʋ Wɛ vrɩ DƖ wǝli dɩ nɔɔna barpɛ, dɩ wʋntʋ na tɔɔlɩ Wɛ cɩga kam o brɩ nɔɔna te tɩn. Wɛ ma daarɩ DƖ cɔgɩ balʋ na vɩn DƖ ni tɩn, DƖ pa dʋa tiini ka nɩ yɩ na li lʋgʋ baŋa, yɩ ba maama tɩ.

eng: God condemned the cities of Sodom and Gomorrah to total destruction, reducing them to ashes as a warning to ungodly people.
local: Kʋ daa ta na yɩ nɔɔna balʋ dɛɛn na zʋʋrɩ Sodɔm dɩ Gomɔɔrɩ nɩ tɩn, Wɛ pɛ mini mʋ di ba je sɩm kʋntʋ kʋ daarɩ tɩntwarɩm yɩranɩ, sɩ kʋ brɩ nɩ ba ba jɩgɩ bʋra. DƖ cɔgɩ-ba kʋntʋ sɩ kʋ taa yɩ maana mʋ kʋ paɩ balʋ maama na bʋŋɩ sɩ ba vɩn DƖ ni tɩn.

eng: And he rescued righteous Lot, who was made miserable by the unrestrained immorality of unruly people. .
local: DƖ ma daarɩ DƖ vrɩ Lɔtɩ ba wʋnɩ. Wʋntʋ dɛɛn mʋ sɛ Wɛ cɩga kam, yɩ o wʋ tiini kʋ cɔgɩ dɩ nɔn-balwaarʋ tɩm na kɩ wo-digiru kikiǝ te tɩn.

eng: While that righteous man lived among them he felt deep distress every day on account of the immoral actions he saw and heard.
local: O na yɩ nɔn-ŋʋm yɩ o zʋʋrɩ dɩ ba tɩn, o naɩ ba kǝm-lwaanʋ tɩm dɛ maama yɩ o ni ba niǝ-bɩtarɩ sɩm na yɩ te tɩn. Kʋ maa tiini kʋ jɩgɩ wʋ-cɔgɔ dɩd-o dɩ ba na tʋŋɩ ba cɔgɩ Wɛ cullu tɩm te tɩn.

eng: These things show that the Lord knows how to rescue the godly from their trials, and how to keep the unrighteous for punishment on the Judgment Day.
local: Kʋntʋ, dɩ́ Yuutu Baŋa-Wɛ waɩ DƖ vrɩ balʋ na tɔgɩ-DƖ tɩn sɩ ba yɩ cɔgɩ dɩ maŋɩm dɩlʋ na yi-ba tɩn. Kʋ nan na yɩ balʋ na vɩ-DƖ tɩn, DƖ waɩ DƖ pɩɩna yɩ DƖ cǝgi-ba sɩ kʋ vu kʋ yi DƖ sarɩya dɛ dɩm, sɩ DƖ laan pa ba na cam.

eng: This is especially true for those who follow after the corrupt cravings of the sinful nature and defy the Lords authority. These reckless, brash people arent afraid to insult the glorious ones.
local: Kʋ na dwe dɩdɩ balʋ na tɔgɩ wo-digiru kikiǝ yalʋ ba fra na zʋʋrɩ yɩ ba ba lagɩ sɩ ba sɛ wʋlʋ na jɩgɩ ni ba baŋa nɩ tɩn, Wɛ wʋ́ pa ba na cam kʋ ja gaalɩ. Vwan zaasɩm tiinǝ bam kʋntʋ ba kwarɩ cavɩɩra, ba nan ba nɩgɩ nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ dɩ. Ba maa ba kwarɩ fʋʋnɩ sɩ ba ŋɔɔnɩ ba twɩ dɩdɛɛra balʋ na wʋ wɛyuu tɩlampolo nɩ tɩn.

eng: yet angels, who are stronger and more powerful, dont use insults when pronouncing the Lords judgment on them.
local: Nan dɩ Wɛ malɛsɩ sɩm na tiini sɩ jɩgɩ dam sɩ dwe vwan zaasɩm tiinǝ bam kʋntʋ tɩn, sɩ ba sɛ sɩ twɩ dɩdɛɛra bam kʋntʋ sɩ ŋɔɔnɩ ba woŋo dɩ́ Yuutu wʋm yigǝ nɩ.

eng: These false teachers are like irrational animals, mere creatures of instinct, born to be captured and destroyed. They slander what they dont understand and, like animals, they will be destroyed.
local: Vwan zaasɩm tiinǝ bam yǝni ba ŋɔɔnɩ ba twɩ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ ba na yǝri tɩ kuri tɩn mʋ. Ba ma kɩ yɔɔ yɔɔ nɩ ga-vara na ba jɩgɩ wʋbʋŋa yɩ ba kɩ te tɩn. Ga-vara wʋra sɩ nɔɔna mʋ taa jaanɩ-ba ba gʋɩ. Nɔɔna bam kʋntʋ dɩ nan wʋ́ cɔgɩ nɩ ga-vara mʋ te.

eng: In this way, they will receive payment for their wrongdoing. They even enjoy unruly parties in broad daylight. They are blots and blemishes, taking delight in their seductive pleasures while feasting with you.
local: Wɛ wʋ́ pa ba na yaara sɩ kʋ maŋɩ dɩ ba dɩ na pɛ nɔɔna na yaara te tɩn. Ba ma kɩ wʋpolo dɩ wo-digiru tɩlʋ ba fra na zʋʋrɩ tɩn, yɩ ba kɩ-tɩ jaja wɩa tɩtarɩ nɩ. Ba kǝm dɩm yɩ digiru dɩ cavɩɩra mʋ abam tɩtarɩ nɩ, maŋa kalʋ á na yǝni á la daanɩ sɩ á di wʋdiu yɩ ba ta kɩ wʋpolo dɩ ba lwarɩm dɩm tɩn.

eng: They are always looking for someone with whom to commit adultery. They are always on the lookout for opportunities to sin. They ensnare people whose faith is weak. They have hearts trained in greed. They are under Gods curse.
local: Bantʋ wʋbʋŋa zʋ boorim kikiǝ yɩranɩ mʋ. Ba brɩ ba ba jɩgɩ siun dɩ wo-balwaarʋ kǝm, yɩ ba sʋgɩ balʋ wʋbʋŋa dɩ na bwǝnǝ tɩn ba paɩ ba tusǝ. Ba maa tiini ba yɩ wo-swǝn-nyɩna dɩ. Wɛ nan wʋ́ cɔgɩ-ba.

eng: Leaving the straight path, they have gone off course, following the way of Balaam son of Bosor, who loved the payment of doing wrong.
local: Bantʋ ma yagɩ cwǝ-laa tɔgɩm, yɩ ba ywǝri ba vu ba tɔgɩ Bozori bu Balam cwǝŋǝ kam. Wʋntʋ yi dɛɛn ma su sǝbu kʋlʋ o na wʋ́ na o kǝm-balɔrɔ kʋm ŋwaanɩ tɩn.

eng: But Balaam was rebuked for his wrongdoing. A donkey, which has no voice, spoke with a human voice and put a stop to the prophets madness.
local: O na vɩn Wɛ ni tɩn, DƖ ma pa varɩm na ba ŋɔɔnɩ tɩn ŋɔɔnɩ nɩ nabiinu te. O tɩtɩ bɩnaga mʋ ŋɔɔnɩ ka kaan-o, sɩ kʋ cɩ Balam na yɩ Wɛ nijoŋnu tɩn dɩ jwǝrim dɩlʋ o na lagɩ o kɩ tɩn.

eng: These false teachers are springs without water, mists driven by the wind. The underworld has been reserved for them.
local: Nɔɔna bam kʋntʋ nyɩ dɩ buli-yiǝ yalʋ na ba buri tɩn mʋ, yɩ ba ta nyɩ dɩ kunkwǝǝnu tɩlʋ vu-fɔrɔ na kalɩ kʋ pa tɩ jagɩ tɩn. Wɛ nan lɩ jǝgǝ kalʋ na tiini ka yɩ lim tɩn mʋ sɩ DƖ kɩ-ba da.

eng: With empty, self-important speech, they use sinful cravings and unrestrained immorality to ensnare people who have only just escaped life with those who have wandered from the truth.
local: Ba maa tiini ba ŋɔɔnɩ kamunni-bɩtarɩ sɩlʋ na ba jɩgɩ kuri tɩn, yɩ ba maɩ wo-yɔɔrʋ tɩlʋ nabiinǝ fra na zʋʋrɩ yɩ tɩ yɩ wo-digiru tɩn ba ma ganɩ balʋ laan na pɔɔrɩ ba tɩtɩ dɩ nɔɔna balʋ na yǝri Wɛ cwǝŋǝ tɩn.

eng: These false teachers promise freedom, but they themselves are slaves of immorality; whatever overpowers you, enslaves you.
local: Ba maa tɛ dɩ nɔɔna nɩ, ba na dɛ bam cwǝŋǝ kam, baá ta te ba tɩtɩ. Balʋ nan na tɛ kʋntʋ tɩn tɩtɩ yɩ gambɛ mʋ, dɩ ba kikiǝ yam na jɩgɩ-ba ya ve cɔgɩm wʋnɩ tɩn. Bɛŋwaanɩ, woŋo kʋlʋ maama nɔɔnʋ na paɩ kʋ te-o tɩn, o yɩ kʋ gambaa mʋ.

eng: If people escape the moral filth of this world through the knowledge of our Lord and savior Jesus Christ, then get tangled up in it again and are overcome by it, they are worse off than they were before.
local: Nɔɔna balʋ na lwarɩ Zezi Krisi wʋlʋ na yɩ dɩbam Yuutu dɩ dɩ́ Vɩrnʋ tɩn, ba lugi lʋgʋ baŋa wo-digiru tɩm mʋ. Ba laan nan na joori ba pipiri ba sɛ ba paɩ tɩ te-ba, ba kweelim je wʋ́ tiini kʋ taa yɩ lɛɛrʋ dɩ ba kʋ dwǝni pulim nɩ.

eng: It would be better for them never to have known the way of righteousness than, having come to know it, to turn back from the holy commandment entrusted to them.
local: Bɛŋwaanɩ, ba ya na wʋ lwarɩ Wɛ cɩga cwǝŋǝ kam, kʋ ya wʋ́ ta lana kʋ pa-ba kʋ dwe ba na lwarɩ-ka yɩ ba laan pipiri ba za ba wʋbʋŋa dɩ Wɛ ni dɩlʋ DƖ na pɛ-ba sɩ ba taa tɔgɩ tɩn.

eng: They demonstrate the truth of the proverb: A dog returns to its own vomit, and a washed sow wallows in the mud.
local: Bantʋ na kɩ te tɩn nyɩ dɩ bɩtar-dɩndɩa kalʋ na tagɩ cɩga ka wɩ: «Kakurǝ joori ka di ka tɩtwaanʋ.» Bɩtar-dɩndɩa kadoŋ dɩ ta wɩ: «Nmʋ na jaanɩ tǝru n swɛ o yɩra, o ta wʋ́ joori o bibili bwǝru wʋnɩ mʋ.».

eng: My dear friends, this is now my second letter to you. I have written both letters to stir up your sincere understanding with a reminder.
local: Amʋ badon-sonnu-ba, tɔnɔ kʋntʋ amʋ na pʋpʋnɩ a pa abam tɩn laan kɩ tɩle mʋ. Twaanʋ tɩm kʋntʋ maama wʋnɩ amʋ kwaanɩ sɩ a guli abam Wɛ cɩga kam na yɩ te tɩn, sɩ kʋ pa á taá jɩgɩ wʋbʋŋ-ŋʋna mʋ.

eng: I want you to recall what the holy prophets foretold as well as what the Lord and savior commanded through your apostles.
local: Kʋ yɩ sɩ a ma guli abam faŋa faŋa Wɛ nijoŋnǝ bam na maŋɩ ba brɩ kʋlʋ tɩn mʋ, sɩ á daarɩ á guli dɩ́ Yuutu dɩ dɩ́ Vɩrnʋ Zezi ni dɩm o tɩntʋŋna bam na brɩ abam tɩn.

eng: Most important, know this: in the last days scoffers will come, jeering, living by their own cravings.
local: Kʋlʋ na dwe dɩdɩ tɩn, á taá ye nɩ, lʋgʋ baŋa tiim da yam na yiǝ, nɔɔna badonnǝ wʋ́ ta wʋra ba na tɔgɩ wo-yɔɔrʋ tɩlʋ ba tɩtɩ fra na zʋʋrɩ tɩn, yɩ baá ta jɩgɩ abam ba mwana ba wɩ:.

eng: and saying, Where is the promise of his coming? After all, nothing has changed—not since the beginning of creation, nor even since the ancestors died.
local: «Wɛ goni ni nɩ DƖ Bu wʋm ta wʋ́ joori o ba lʋgʋ baŋa. Bɛɛ mʋ nan kɩa yɩ o ta wʋ tu? Dɩ́ kwǝ maŋɩ ba tɩ, yɩ wǝǝnu maama nan taa yɩ nɩ tɩ na maŋɩ tɩ yɩ te lʋgʋ baŋa pulim nɩ tɩn mʋ.».

eng: But they fail to notice that, by Gods word, heaven and earth were formed long ago out of water and by means of water.
local: Balʋ na ŋɔɔnɩ kʋntʋ tɩn paalɩ ba swe mʋ. Ba ba lagɩ sɩ ba sɛ nɩ wɛyuu dɩ tɩga baŋa maŋɩ tɩ wʋra faŋa faŋa mʋ, yɩ Wɛ ni dɩm mʋ pɛ tɩ wʋra kʋntʋ. Wɛ dɛɛn pɛ tɩga kam nuŋi na wʋnɩ mʋ, yɩ na bam ŋwaanɩ pa lʋgʋ baŋa ta wʋra.

eng: And it was through these that the world of that time was flooded and destroyed.
local: Kʋ nan ta yɩ na mʋ Wɛ dɛɛn mɛ DƖ cɔgɩ faŋa faŋa lʋgʋ kʋm, dɩ DƖ na pɛ dʋ-fara kam nɩ yɩ ka na bam li-kʋ tɩn.

eng: But by the same word, heaven and earth are now held in reserve for fire, kept for the Judgment Day and destruction of ungodly people.
local: Kʋ nan ta yɩ Wɛ ni dɩm kʋntʋ mʋ paɩ zɩm wɛyuu dɩ tɩga baŋa kam ta wʋra, sɩ kʋ taa ve maŋa kam DƖ na wʋ́ pa mini cɔgɩ-tɩ tɩn. Kʋntʋ, Wɛ tiŋi-tɩ sɩ kʋ vu kʋ yi dɛ dɩlʋ DƖ na wʋ́ di nabiinǝ sarɩya, yɩ DƖ daarɩ DƖ cɔgɩ balʋ na vɩ-DƖ tɩn mʋ.
