local: Lʋgʋ baŋa pipimpiinǝ bam dɩ wʋ́ ta keerǝ yɩ ba nywanɩ ba yigǝ tɩʋ kʋm cɔgɩm dɩm ŋwaanɩ, bɛŋwaanɩ nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ daa tǝrǝ sɩ ba taa yǝgi ba zɩla yam.

eng: cargoes of gold, silver, jewels, and pearls; fine linen, purple, silk, and scarlet; all those things made of scented wood, ivory, fine wood, bronze, iron, and marble.
local: Zɩla yalʋ ba na jɩgɩ ba yǝgi tɩn yɩ sǝbu-sɩŋa wǝǝnu dɩ can-na-poŋo wǝǝnu dɩ kandwa-ŋʋna, kʋ wǝli dɩ gwaarʋ dwi tǝri tǝri, kʋ na yɩ gwar-ŋʋnnʋ tɩlʋ na yɩ fɩfalɩ, dɩ gwaarʋ tɩlʋ na nyɩɩna, dɩ gwar-sʋnnʋ tɩlʋ na yɩ cwɛn cwɛn tɩn. Ba ta maa jɩgɩ da-ŋwɩ dwi maama, dɩ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ zanzan ba na mɛ tuu yǝlǝ dɩ da-laarʋ dɩ can-na dɩ luguru dɩ kandwa yalʋ kaana na pui ba jɩa nɩ ba kɩ tɩn.

eng: cinnamon, incense, fragrant ointment, and frankincense; wine, oil, fine flour, and wheat; cattle, sheep, horses, and carriages; and slaves, even human lives.
local: Ba ta maa kwǝri ba jɩgɩ tralɩ dwi maama, dɩ wǝǝnu tɩlʋ ba na zwɛ yɩ tɩ lwǝm ywǝnǝ tɩn, kʋ wǝli dɩ sana dɩ nugǝ dɩ dɩpɛ muni dɩ kamaana, kʋ wǝli dɩ naanɩ dɩ peeni dɩ sise dɩ sɩ trǝkooru. Ba ta jɩgɩ gambɛ dɩ ba yǝgǝ da.

eng: The fruit your whole being craved has gone from you. All your glitter and glamour are lost to you, never ever to be found again.
local: Ba laan ma wʋ́ ta dɩ tɩʋ kʋm ba wɩ: «Wo-laarʋ tɩlʋ maama nmʋ fra na zʋ tɩn daa tǝrǝ. Nmʋ jɩjɩgɩrʋ tɩm dɩ n nɩnwaŋa kam maama laan je. Nmʋ daa n bá na wǝǝnu tɩm kʋntʋ maŋa dɩ maŋa.».

eng: The merchants who sold these things, and got so rich by her, will stand a long way off because they fear the pain she suffers. They will weep and mourn, and say.
local: Pipimpiinǝ balʋ na tiini ba na nyɔɔrɩ tɩʋ kʋm baŋa nɩ tɩn wʋ́ ta zɩgɩ yigǝ yigǝ, ba na kwarɩ kʋ yaara yam tɩn ŋwaanɩ. Ba ma wʋ́ ta keerǝ.

eng: Oh, the horror! The great city that wore fine linen, purple, and scarlet, who glittered with gold, jewels, and pearls.
local: yɩ ba coosi ba wɩ: «Ei. Lɛɛrʋ, lɛɛrʋ! Tʋ-kamunu kʋntʋ tiini kʋ jɩgɩ nɩnwaŋa. Kʋ nɔɔna bam maa zʋʋrɩ gwaarʋ tɩlʋ na nyɩɩnɩ tɩn, dɩ tɩlʋ na yɩ nasʋnnʋ cwɛn cwɛn tɩn, yɩ ba pu sǝbu-sɩŋa wǝǝnu dɩ kandwa-ŋʋna ba yɩra nɩ.

eng: in just one hour such great wealth was destroyed. Every sea captain, every seafarer, sailors, and all who make their living on the sea stood a long way off.
local: Kʋ jɩjɩgɩrʋ tɩm maama laan ma ba tɩ cɔgɩ lɩla, maŋa fɩnfɩɩn má wʋnɩ.» Kʋ nan na yɩ balʋ maama na co nabwǝǝru tɩn dɩ ba yum tiinǝ, dɩ balʋ na tɔgɩ nabwǝǝru tɩm ba pipi tɩn, dɩ balʋ na zʋʋrɩ nabwǝǝru ba ve je tɩn, ba maama wʋ́ ta zɩgɩ yigǝ yigǝ mʋ ba nii tɩʋ kʋm.

eng: They cried out as they saw the smoke from her burning and said, What city was ever like the great city.
local: Bantʋ na nɛ nyʋa kam na zaŋɩ tɩʋ kʋm baŋa nɩ tɩn, baá ta dɩ kwǝr-dɩa ba wɩ: «Tʋ-kamunu kʋntʋ ya ba jɩgɩ doŋ.».

eng: They threw dust on their heads, and they cried out, weeping and mourning. They said, Oh, the horror! The great city, where all who have ships at sea became so rich by her prosperity—in just one hour she was destroyed.
local: Ba ma wʋ́ ta pɛ puuri ba lo ba yum nɩ, yɩ ba keeri ba coosi ba wɩ: «Ei. Lɛɛrʋ lɛɛrʋ! Tʋ-kamunu kʋntʋ jɩjɩgɩrʋ tɩm ŋwaanɩ mʋ pɛ balʋ maama na te nabwǝǝru tɩn ji nadunǝ. Kʋ nan cɔgɩ maŋa fɩnfɩɩn má wʋnɩ.».

eng: Rejoice over her, heaven—you saints, apostles, and prophets—because God has condemned her as she condemned you.
local: Abam balʋ na zʋʋrɩ Wɛ-sɔŋɔ nɩ tɩn taá kɩ-na wʋpolo tɩʋ kʋm cɔgɩm dɩm ŋwaanɩ. Abam balʋ na yɩ Wɛ nɔɔna tɩn, taá kɩ-na wʋpolo, kʋ wǝli dɩ Wɛ tɩntʋŋna bam dɩ DƖ nijoŋnǝ bam. Wɛ mʋ di tɩʋ kʋm sarɩya, yɩ DƖ pa abam bʋra.

eng: Then a powerful angel picked up a stone that was like a huge millstone and threw it into the sea, saying, With such violent force the great city of Babylon will be thrown down, and it wont be found anymore.
local: Wɛ malɛka kadoŋ kalʋ na tiini ka dana tɩn laan ma kwe kandwɛ kamunu nɩ nɔŋ-zɔŋɔ na yɩ te tɩn. Ka ma dʋlɩ-kʋ ka yagɩ na-fara bam wʋnɩ yɩ ka wɩ: «Baá kwe tʋ-kamunu Babilɔnɩ dɩ ba dʋlɩ ba yagɩ kʋntʋ doŋ mʋ, yɩ nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ daa bá na kʋ je.

eng: The sound of harpists and musicians, of pipers and trumpeters, will never be heard among you again. No craftsman of any kind will ever be found among you again. The sound of the hand mill will never be heard among you again.
local: Nɔɔna daa bá ta wʋ kʋ wʋnɩ sɩ ba taa magɩ kwaanʋ naa ba taa leenǝ, naa ba taa wui wi naa nabwaanʋ. Gɔgɔ naa tɩtʋŋɩ dwi maama dɩ daa bá ta wʋ kʋ wʋnɩ, yɩ nɔŋɔ kwǝri dɩ daa bá ta zaŋɩ kʋ wʋnɩ.

eng: The light of a lamp will never shine among you again. The sound of a bridegroom and bride will never be heard among you again because your merchants ran the world, because all the nations were deceived by the spell you cast, and because.
local: Min-zoŋo mini dɩ daa bá tarɩgɩ kʋ wʋnɩ. Kadiri sɔɔ dɩ daa bá kɩ kʋ wʋnɩ. Tʋ-kamunu Babilɔnɩ pipimpiinǝ bam dɛɛn mʋ yɩ lʋgʋ baŋa dɩdɛɛra yigǝ tiinǝ. Kʋ maa ma kʋ liri kikiǝ yam kʋ ganɩ lʋgʋ baŋa dwi tiinǝ maama.

eng: the blood of prophets, of saints, and of all who have been slaughtered on the earth was found among you.
local: Kʋ na yɩ Wɛ nijoŋnǝ dɩ Wɛ nɔɔna balʋ maama ba na gʋ tɩn, ba tʋʋnɩ dɩm zɩgɩ tɩʋ kʋm kʋntʋ yɩra nɩ mʋ. Balʋ maama ba na gʋ lʋgʋ baŋa nɩ tɩn caa wʋ́ jǝni tɩʋ kʋm kʋntʋ yuu nɩ mʋ.».

eng: After this I heard what sounded like a huge crowd in heaven. They said, Hallelujah! The salvation and glory and power of our God!.
local: Amʋ laan ma ni kwǝr-dɩa ka na nyɩ dɩ nɔn-kɔgɔ zanzan na ŋɔɔnɩ baŋa baŋa Wɛ-sɔŋɔ nɩ ba wɩ: «Aleluya. Vrɩm dɩ paarɩ-zulǝ dɩ dam yɩ dɩbam Tu Wɛ nyɩm mʋ.

eng: His judgments are true and just, because he judged the great prostitute, who ruined the earth by her whoring, and he exacted the penalty for the blood of his servants from her hand.
local: DƖ sarɩya yam yɔɔrɩ lanyɩranɩ, yɩ ya tɔgɩ cɩga. Kʋ na yɩ ka-bor-zɔŋɔ kʋm, Wɛ di kʋ sarɩya yɩ kʋ na cam, dɩ kʋ na pɛ kʋ boorim kikiǝ yam jagɩ je maama ya cɔgɩ lʋgʋ baŋa tɩn. Wɛ ma waarɩ-kʋ dɩ kʋ na gʋ DƖ tɩntʋŋna bam tɩn ŋwaanɩ.».

eng: Then they said a second time, Hallelujah! Smoke goes up from her forever and always.
local: Ba daa ma ta ba wɩ: «Aleluya. Mini na di-kʋ tɩn, kʋ nyʋa kam wʋ́ ta zaŋɩ mʋ taan, sɩ kʋ taa ve maŋa kalʋ na ba ti tɩn.».

eng: The twenty-four elders and the four living creatures fell down and worshipped God, who is seated on the throne, and they said, Amen. Hallelujah.
local: Nakwa fiinle-bana bam dɩ wǝǝnu tɩna tɩlʋ na ŋwɩ tɩn laan ma kuni doonǝ Wɛ yigǝ nɩ ba zuli-DƖ DƖ paarɩ jangɔŋɔ kʋm baŋa nɩ ba wɩ: «Kʋ yɩ cɩga mʋ. Aleluya.».

eng: Then a voice went out from the throne and said, Praise our God, all you his servants, and you who fear him, both small and great.
local: Kwǝrǝ kadoŋ laan ma ŋɔɔnɩ paarɩ jangɔŋɔ kʋm jǝgǝ kam nɩ ka wɩ: «Abam balʋ maama na yɩ Wɛ tɩntʋŋna tɩn, taá zuli-na dɩbam Tu Wɛ. Abam balʋ maama na kwarɩ-DƖ tɩn, kʋ na yɩ nɔn-kamunǝ dɩ nabwǝnǝ, á taá zuli-DƖ.».

eng: And I heard something that sounded like a huge crowd, like rushing water and powerful thunder. They said, Hallelujah! The Lord our God, the Almighty, exercised his royal power!.
local: Amʋ laan ma ni kwǝri sɩ na nyɩ dɩ nɔn-kɔgɔ zanzan na ŋɔɔnɩ baŋa baŋa, yɩ kʋ dwana nɩ na-fara mʋ wuurǝ yɩ dʋa baga te. Kʋ maa ŋɔɔnɩ kʋ wɩ: «Aleluya. Dɩbam Tu, Dam-fɔrɔ Tu Baŋa-Wɛ mʋ te paarɩ.

eng: Let us rejoice and celebrate, and give him the glory, for the wedding day of the Lamb has come, and his bride has made herself ready.
local: Pa-na dɩ́ taá kɩ wʋpolo dɩ́ cakɩ dɩ́ zuli Wɛ, Pǝlbu wʋm kadiri dɩm maŋa laan na yi tɩn ŋwaanɩ. O kaanɩ wʋm ti o yigǝ sɩ o zʋ-o.

eng: She was given fine, pure white linen to wear, for the fine linen is the saints acts of justice.
local: Ba kwe gwar-ŋʋnnʋ tɩlʋ na ba jɩgɩ digiru yɩ tɩ tiini tɩ nyɩɩna tɩn ba pa kaanɩ wʋm zʋ.» Gwaarʋ tɩm kʋntʋ nan mʋ brɩ Wɛ nɔɔna bam kǝm-laarʋ tɩm na yɩ te tɩn.

eng: Then the angel said to me, Write this: Favored are those who have been invited to the wedding banquet of the Lamb. He said to me, These are the true words of God.
local: Malɛka kam laan ma ta dɩ amʋ ka wɩ: «Pʋpʋnɩ tɩntʋ n tiŋi: Kʋ na yɩ balʋ ba na bǝŋi sɩ ba tɔgɩ ba di Pǝlbu wʋm kadiri candiǝ kam tɩn, bantʋ jɩgɩ yu-yoŋo.» Ka daa ma ta ka wɩ: «Nmʋ na ni kʋlʋ maama tɩn yɩ Wɛ kwǝrǝ mʋ, yɩ ka yɩ cɩga mʋ.».

eng: Then I fell at his feet to worship him. But he said, Dont do that! Im a servant just like you and your brothers and sisters who hold firmly to the witness of Jesus. Worship God! The witness of Jesus is the spirit of prophecy.
local: Amʋ ma kuni doonǝ ka yigǝ nɩ sɩ a zuli-ka. Ka ma ta ka wɩ: «Yɩ kɩ kʋntʋ. Amʋ dɩ yɩ Wɛ tɩntʋŋnʋ mʋ, nɩ nmʋ dɩ n ko-biǝ balʋ maama na brɩ nɩ ba tɔgɩ Zezi cɩga kam tɩn dɩ na yɩ te tɩn. N maŋɩ sɩ n zuli Wɛ mʋ.» Kʋ yɩ Zezi cɩga kam kʋntʋ mʋ paɩ Wɛ nijoŋnǝ bam tɔɔlɩ DƖ kwǝrǝ kam.

eng: Then I saw heaven opened, and there was a white horse. Its rider was called Faithful and True, and he judges and makes war justly.
local: Amʋ laan ma nii a na Wɛ-sɔŋɔ ni na pʋrɩ. A ma na sisǝŋ-pwǝŋǝ. Wʋlʋ na dɔgɩ ka baŋa nɩ tɩn yɩrɩ mʋ Wʋ-dɩdʋa Tu dɩ Cɩga Tu. O na di nɔɔna sarɩya dɩ o na kwǝri o jaanɩ jara te tɩn yɔɔrɩ kʋ tɔgɩ cɩga mʋ.

eng: His eyes were like a fiery flame, and on his head were many royal crowns. He has a name written on him that no one knows but he himself.
local: O yiǝ maa sɩɩnɩ nɩ min-vʋgʋ te. Sǝbu-sɩŋa yipwi zanzan ma pu o yuu nɩ. Yɩrɩ dɩdoŋ ma pʋpʋnɩ o yɩra nɩ, yɩ nɔɔn-nɔɔnʋ yǝri-dɩ, kʋ na daɩ o tɩtɩ yɩranɩ.

eng: He wore a robe dyed with blood, and his name was called the Word of God.
local: Gwar-dɩdɔrɔ kʋlʋ o na zʋ tɩn ma bugi dɩ jana. Ba maa bǝ-o nɩ Wɛ Bɩtara kam.

eng: Heavens armies, wearing fine linen that was white and pure, were following him on white horses.
local: Wɛ-sɔŋɔ pamaŋ-kɔgɔ kʋm ma pu o kwaga. Ba ma dɔgɩ sise-pwǝǝnu baŋa nɩ, yɩ ba zʋ gwar-pwǝǝnu tɩlʋ na lana yɩ tɩ ba jɩgɩ digiru tɩn.

eng: From his mouth comes a sharp sword that he will use to strike down the nations. He is the one who will rule them with an iron rod. And he is the one who will trample the winepress of the Almighty Gods passionate anger.
local: Sʋ-lɔŋɔ kʋlʋ na tiini kʋ jɩgɩ ni tɩn maa nuŋi o ni nɩ. O nan wʋ́ ma-kʋ o kɩ jara dɩ lʋgʋ baŋa dwi tiinǝ bam maama o wanɩ, yɩ o daarɩ o taa te-ba dɩ dam. O ma wʋ́ pa Dam-fɔrɔ Tu Baŋa-Wɛ ban-zɔŋɔ kʋm tiini kʋ ba ba baŋa, nɩnɛɛnɩ o kanɩ tiu-biǝ mʋ sɩ o ma kɩ sana te.

eng: He has a name written on his robe and on his thigh: King of kings and Lord of lords.
local: Yɩrɩ dɩdoŋ ma pʋpʋnɩ o gwar-dɩdɔrɔ kʋm yɩra nɩ dɩ o cwe nɩ dɩ wɩ: Pwa maama Pɛ, dɩ yum tiinǝ maama Yuutu.

eng: Then I saw an angel standing in the sun, and he called out with a loud voice and said to all the birds flying high overhead, Come and gather for Gods great supper.
local: Amʋ laan ma na malɛka kadoŋ ka na zɩgɩ wɩa kam tɩtarɩ nɩ. Ka ma tɔɔlɩ dɩ kwǝr-dɩa ka ta dɩ duurǝ dɩ kalwǝǝnu dɩ zunǝ balʋ maama na di nwana tɩn ka wɩ: «Ba-na á la daanɩ á di Wɛ candi-fara kam.

eng: Come and eat the flesh of kings, the flesh of generals, the flesh of the powerful, and the flesh of horses and their riders. Come and eat the flesh of all, both free and slave, both small and great.
local: Ba-na á di pwa ya-nwana, dɩ pamaŋ-dɩdɛɛra dɩ nɔn-bɩbɛ kʋ wǝli dɩ sise dɩ sɩ diinǝ bam dɩ nwana, dɩ nɔɔna dwi maama, kʋ na yɩ gambɛ dɩ balʋ na te ba tɩtɩ tɩn dɩ, kʋ wǝli dɩ nɔn-kamunǝ dɩ nabwǝnǝ dɩ nwana.».

eng: Then I saw that the beast and the kings of the earth and their armies had gathered to make war against the rider on the horse and his army.
local: Amʋ ma daarɩ a na varɩm wʋm dɩ lʋgʋ baŋa pwa bam maama dɩ ba pamaŋ-kɔgɔ kʋm na lagɩ daanɩ, sɩ ba kɩ jara dɩ wʋlʋ na dɔgɩ sisǝŋǝ kam baŋa nɩ tɩn dɩ o pamaŋ-kɔgɔ kʋm.

eng: But the beast was seized, along with the false prophet who had done signs in the beasts presence. The two of them were thrown alive into the fiery lake that burns with sulfur.
local: Ba ma ja varɩm wʋm ba vɔ, dɩ wʋlʋ na brɩ nɩ o yɩ Wɛ nijoŋnu yɩ o yagɩ o daɩ tɩn. Wʋntʋ ya mʋ kɩ wo-kɩnkagɩla dayigǝ varɩm wʋm yigǝ nɩ o ma o ganɩ balʋ na jɩgɩ varɩm wʋm nyɩnyʋgʋ yɩ ba zuli o kamɔgɔ kʋm tɩn. Ba ma kwe bantʋ bale ŋʋnnɩ ba ja vu ba dɩ min-nɩnɩʋ wʋnɩ. Kʋ yɩ ciribi mim mʋ.

eng: The rest were killed by the sword that comes from the mouth of the rider on the horse, and all the birds ate their fill of their flesh.
local: Wʋlʋ na dɔgɩ sisǝŋǝ kam yuu nɩ tɩn maa ma sʋ-lɔŋɔ kʋlʋ na nuŋi o ni nɩ tɩn o gʋ pamaŋ-kɔgɔ kʋlʋ maama na daarɩ tɩn. Zunǝ balʋ maama na di nwana tɩn ma ba ba di ba ya-nwana yam ba su.

eng: Then I saw an angel coming down from heaven, holding in his hand the key to the abyss and a huge chain.
local: Amʋ laan ma na malɛka kadoŋ ka na nuŋi Wɛ-sɔŋɔ ka maa tu lʋgʋ baŋa. Ka maa ze borbu sɩ ka ma pʋrɩ goŋ-canluŋu kʋm ni dɩm, yɩ ka kwǝri ka ze capʋn-zɔŋɔ.

eng: He seized the dragon, the old snake, who is the devil and Satan, and bound him for a thousand years.
local: Ka ma ja prǝnyoŋ-kɩnkagɩlɩ dɩm ka vɔ, sɩ ka ja vu ka dɩ goŋ-canluŋu kʋm wʋnɩ, sɩ kʋ taa wʋ dáanɩ bɩna mʋrʋ. Prǝnyoŋo kʋm kʋntʋ mʋ yɩ bɩsankwɩa kalʋ na maŋɩ ka wʋra faŋa faŋa tɩn. Kantʋ kam mʋ yɩ vwa-nyɩna pɛ, yɩ ka kwǝri ka yɩ sʋtaanɩ tɩtɩ.

eng: He threw him into the abyss, then locked and sealed it over him. This was to keep him from continuing to deceive the nations until the thousand years were over. After this he must be released for a little while.
local: Malɛka kam ma dɩ-kʋ goŋ-canluŋu kʋm wʋnɩ ka pɩ. Ka ma daarɩ ka kwǝni bɔɔnɩ dɩm ni, sɩ kʋ yɩ wanɩ kʋ nuŋi kʋ daa ganɩ lʋgʋ baŋa dwi tiinǝ bam, sɩ kʋ vu kʋ yi bɩna mʋrʋ kʋm na wʋ́ ti tɩn. Maŋa kam kʋntʋ na kɛ, kʋ maŋɩ sɩ ba bwǝli-kʋ ba yagɩ maŋa fɩnfɩɩn yɩranɩ.

eng: Then I saw thrones, and people took their seats on them, and judgment was given in their favor. They were the ones who had been beheaded for their witness to Jesus and Gods word, and those who hadnt worshipped the beast or its image, who hadnt received the mark on their forehead or hand. They came to life and ruled with Christ for one thousand years.
local: Amʋ ma daarɩ a na paarɩ jangwaanʋ yɩ nɔɔna je tɩ baŋa nɩ. Wɛ ma pa-ba dam sɩ ba di nɔɔna taanɩ. A ma daarɩ a na ba na goni balʋ yuni Zezi cɩga kam dɩ Wɛ kwǝrǝ kam tɔɔlɩm ŋwaanɩ tɩn jwǝǝru Wɛ tee nɩ. Bantʋ mʋ yɩ balʋ na wʋ sɛ ba zuli varɩm wʋm naa o kamɔgɔ kʋm tɩn. Ba nan wʋ sɛ ba kɩ varɩm wʋm nyɩnyʋgʋ kʋm ba trǝ nɩ naa ba jɩa nɩ. Ba ma joori ba bi ba na ŋwɩa, yɩ ba tɔgɩ ba di paarɩ dɩ Zezi Krisi sɩ kʋ yi bɩna mʋrʋ.

eng: The rest of the dead didnt come to life until the thousand years were over. This is the first resurrection.
local: Twa biim dɩm kʋntʋ mʋ yɩ dɩlʋ na dɛ yigǝ dɩ kɩ tɩn.

eng: Favored and holy are those who have a share in the first resurrection. The second death has no power over them, but they will be priests of God and of Christ, and will rule with him for one thousand years.
local: Balʋ maama na tɔgɩ ba wǝli dayigǝ twa biim dɩm wʋnɩ tɩn jɩgɩ yu-yoŋo, yɩ baá ta yɩ Wɛ tɩtɩ nɔɔna. Tʋʋnɩ dɩlʋ na lagɩ dɩ kɩ bɩle tɩn daa bá ja-ba. Bantʋ wʋ́ ta zɩgɩ Wɛ dɩ Zezi Krisi yigǝ nɩ mʋ ba zuli-ba, yɩ baá tɔgɩ dɩ Zezi ba di paarɩ sɩ kʋ yi bɩna mʋrʋ kʋm.

eng: When the thousand years are over, Satan will be released from his prison.
local: Bɩna mʋrʋ kʋm na tu kʋ kɛ, ba laan wʋ́ bwǝli sʋtaanɩ ba yagɩ, sɩ dɩ nuŋi goŋ-canluŋu kʋm ba na pɩ-dɩ da tɩn wʋnɩ.

eng: He will go out to deceive the nations that are at the four corners of the earth—Gog and Magog. He will gather them for battle. Their number is like the sand of the sea.
local: Dɩ ma wʋ́ vu dɩ ganɩ dwi tiinǝ balʋ na wʋ lʋgʋ baŋa je sɩm maama nɩ tɩn. Tɩɩnɩ dɩm kʋntʋ yɩra mʋ yɩ Gɔgɩ dɩ Magɔgɩ. Sʋtaanɩ ma wʋ́ pa ba la daanɩ sɩ ba kɩ jara, yɩ ba kɔgɔ kʋm nɔn-biǝ wʋ́ ta dagɩ nɩ bugǝ ni kasʋllʋ na yɩ te tɩn.

eng: They came up across the whole earth and surrounded the saints camp, the city that God loves. But fire came down from heaven and consumed them.
local: Ba ma wʋ́ nuŋi lʋgʋ baŋa je maama nɩ ba vu ba gilimi Wɛ nɔɔna bam kɔgɔ kʋm na lagɩ daanɩ mɛ tɩn. Tɩʋ kʋm kʋntʋ mʋ yɩ kʋlʋ Wɛ na soe zanzan tɩn. Mini laan ma nuŋi wɛyuu nɩ dɩ ba dɩ cɔgɩ Wɛ dʋna bam kɔgɔ kʋm maama.

eng: Then the devil, who had deceived them, was thrown into the lake of fire and sulfur, where the beast and the false prophet also were. There painful suffering will be inflicted upon them day and night, forever and always.
local: Ba ma daarɩ ba dʋlɩ sʋtaanɩ na ganɩ-ba tɩn ba dɩ min-nɩnɩʋ kʋlʋ na jɩgɩ ciribi tɩn wʋnɩ. Kʋntʋ mʋ yɩ min-nɩnɩʋ kʋlʋ ba na maŋɩ ba dɩ varɩm wʋm dɩ wʋlʋ na brɩ nɩ o yɩ Wɛ nijoŋnu yɩ o yagɩ o daɩ tɩn ba yagɩ kʋ wʋnɩ tɩn. Ba maama wʋ́ ta wʋ mini dɩm wʋnɩ ba yaarɩ wɩa dɩ tɩtɩɩ maama mʋ, sɩ kʋ taa ve maŋa kalʋ na ba ti tɩn.

eng: Then I saw a great white throne and the one who is seated on it. Before his face both earth and heaven fled away, and no place was found for them.
local: Amʋ daa ma na paarɩ jangɔŋ-kamunu kʋlʋ na yɩ napoŋo tɩn dɩ wʋlʋ na je kʋ baŋa nɩ tɩn. Tɩga baŋa dɩ wɛyuu maama ma duri tɩ kɛ o yigǝ nɩ, yɩ tɩ daa tǝrǝ.

eng: I saw the dead, the great and the small, standing before the throne, and scrolls were opened. Another scroll was opened too; this is the scroll of life. And the dead were judged on the basis of what was written in the scrolls about what they had done.
local: Amʋ ma na balʋ na tɩgɩ tɩn, dɩdɛɛra dɩ nabwǝnǝ maama, ba zɩgɩ paarɩ jangɔŋɔ kʋm yigǝ nɩ. Ba ma puri twaanʋ sɩ ba nii. Ba ma daarɩ ba puri tɔnɔ kʋlʋ na yɩ Wɛ ŋwɩ-dʋŋa kam tɔnɔ kʋm tɩn. Ba ma di twa bam taanɩ sɩ kʋ maŋɩ dɩ ba na kɩ kʋlʋ tɩn, nɩnɛɛnɩ kʋ na pʋpʋnɩ kʋ tiŋi twaanʋ tɩm wʋnɩ te tɩn.

eng: The sea gave up the dead that were in it, and Death and the Grave gave up the dead that were in them, and people were judged by what they had done.
local: Curu dɩ tʋʋnɩ ma yagɩ balʋ dɩ na jaanɩ tɩn. Na-fara bam dɩ ma pa twa balʋ na maŋɩ ba wʋnɩ tɩn cwǝŋǝ sɩ ba nuŋi. Ba ma di twa bam kʋntʋ maama sarɩya sɩ kʋ maŋɩ dɩ ba na kɩ kʋlʋ tɩn.

eng: Then Death and the Grave were thrown into the fiery lake. This, the fiery lake, is the second death.
local: Ba laan ma ja Tʋʋnɩ dɩ Curu ba dʋlɩ ba dɩ min-nɩnɩʋ kʋm wʋnɩ. Min-nɩnɩʋ kʋm kʋntʋ yɩ tʋʋnɩ bɩle tu mʋ.

eng: Then anyone whose name wasnt found written in the scroll of life was thrown into the fiery lake.
local: Nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ maama yɩrɩ na maŋɩ dɩ wʋ pʋpʋnɩ dɩ kɩ Wɛ ŋwɩ-dʋŋa tɔnɔ kʋm wʋnɩ tɩn, baá dʋlɩ kʋntʋ tu ba dɩ min-nɩnɩʋ kʋm kʋntʋ wʋnɩ mʋ.

eng: Then I saw a new heaven and a new earth, for the former heaven and the former earth had passed away, and the sea was no more.
local: Amʋ laan ma na wɛyuu-dʋŋʋ dɩ tɩ-dʋŋa. Dayigǝ wɛyuu kʋm dɩ dayigǝ tɩga baŋa kam ma kɛ, yɩ na-fara dɩ daa tǝrǝ.

eng: I saw the holy city, New Jerusalem, coming down out of heaven from God, made ready as a bride beautifully dressed for her husband.
local: Amʋ ma daarɩ a na Wɛ tɩtɩ tɩʋ kʋm kʋ yɩrɩ na yɩ Zeruzalɛm nadʋŋʋ tɩn. Kʋ ma nuŋi wɛyuu Wɛ tee nɩ kʋ maa tu lʋgʋ baŋa. Wɛ ma kwɛ-kʋ lanyɩranɩ nɩ kaanɩ na ti o yigǝ sɩ o zʋ barʋ te tɩn.

eng: I heard a loud voice from the throne say, Look! Gods dwelling is here with humankind. He will dwell with them, and they will be his peoples. God himself will be with them as their God.
local: Amʋ ma ni kwǝr-dɩa na ŋɔɔnɩ paarɩ jangɔŋɔ kʋm seeni ka wɩ: «Wɛ tɩtɩ sɔŋɔ laan mʋ wʋ nabiinǝ tɩtarɩ nɩ. DƖ nan wʋ́ ta wʋra dɩ ba, yɩ baá ta yɩ DƖ nɔɔna. Wɛ tɩtɩ wʋ́ ta wʋ ba tee nɩ yɩ DƖ nii-ba.

eng: He will wipe away every tear from their eyes. Death will be no more. There will be no mourning, crying, or pain anymore, for the former things have passed away.
local: Wɛ wʋ́ guguni ba yi-na maama. Tʋʋnɩ dɩ wʋ-cɔgɔ dɩ kǝrǝ dɩ yaara daa bá ta wʋra. Dayigǝ wo-dwǝǝnu tɩm kɛ.».

eng: Then the one seated on the throne said, Look! Im making all things new. He also said, Write this down, for these words are trustworthy and true.
local: Wʋlʋ na je paarɩ jangɔŋɔ kʋm baŋa nɩ tɩn laan ma ta o wɩ: «Nii, amʋ laan pɛ wǝǝnu maama ji wo-dʋnnʋ mʋ.» O daa ma ta dɩ amʋ o wɩ: «Pʋpʋnɩ wǝǝnu tɩntʋ n tiŋi, bɛŋwaanɩ taanɩ dɩntʋ yɩ cɩga mʋ yɩ dɩ maŋɩ sɩ nɔɔna sɛ-dɩ.».

eng: Then he said to me, All is done. I am the Alpha and the Omega, the beginning and the end. To the thirsty I will freely give water from the life-giving spring.
local: O ma daarɩ o wɩ: «Wǝǝnu tɩm kɩ tɩ ti. Amʋ mʋ yɩ pulim dɩ gurim. Amʋ nan ta mʋ yɩ dayigǝ tu dɩ tiim tu. Na-nyɔm na jɩgɩ wʋlʋ maama, amʋ wʋ́ pa kʋntʋ tu nyɔ buli-yi dɩlʋ na na paɩ ŋwɩa tɩn zaanɩ.

eng: Those who emerge victorious will inherit these things. I will be their God, and they will be my sons and daughters.
local: Wʋlʋ maama na wanɩ balɔrɔ tɩn mʋ wʋ́ joŋi wo-laarʋ tɩm kʋntʋ. Amʋ Wɛ wʋ́ ta nii-o, yɩ o taa yɩ a bu.

eng: But for the cowardly, the faithless, the vile, the murderers, those who commit sexual immorality, those who use drugs and cast spells, the idolaters and all liars—their share will be in the lake that burns with fire and sulfur. This is the second death.
local: Kʋ daarɩ, kʋ na yɩ balʋ na kwarɩ cam tɩn, dɩ balʋ na pipiri ba kwaga ba ya Zezi tɩn, dɩ balʋ na kɩ wo-zɔɔna, dɩ balʋ na yɩ nɔn-gʋra, dɩ balʋ na boori tɩn, kʋ wǝli dɩ liri kǝrǝ, dɩ balʋ na kaanɩ jwǝnǝ tɩn, kʋ wǝli dɩ vwa-nyɩna dwi maama, bantʋ jǝgǝ mʋ yɩ min-nɩnɩʋ kʋlʋ ciribi na di kʋ wʋnɩ tɩn. Kʋntʋ mʋ yɩ tʋʋnɩ bɩle tu.».

eng: Then one of the seven angels who had the seven bowls full of the seven last plagues spoke with me. Come, he said, I will show you the bride, the Lambs wife.
local: Malɛka kadoŋ laan ma ba amʋ te. Ka nuŋi malɛsɩ sɩrpɛ sɩm wʋnɩ mʋ, sɩlʋ na jɩgɩ zwɩ sɩrpɛ sɩm dɩ sɩ wʋ yaara yarpɛ yalʋ na lagɩ ya ba ya kɩ ya ma kweeli tɩn. Ka ma ta dɩ amʋ ka wɩ: «Ba, sɩ a brɩ-m ka-dʋʋrʋ wʋlʋ na yɩ Pǝlbu wʋm kaanɩ tɩn.».

eng: He took me in a Spirit-inspired trance to a great, high mountain, and he showed me the holy city, Jerusalem, coming down out of heaven from God.
local: Malɛka kam na tagɩ kʋntʋ tɩn, Wɛ Joro kʋm ma ba amʋ te dɩ dam, yɩ ka ja-nɩ ka vu pu-zɔŋɔ kʋlʋ na yɩ baŋa baŋa tɩn yuu. Ka ma brɩ-nɩ Wɛ tɩtɩ tɩʋ kʋm, kʋ yɩrɩ na yɩ Zeruzalɛm yɩ kʋ nuŋi wɛyuu Wɛ te kʋ bɩɩnɩ lʋgʋ baŋa tɩn.

eng: The city had Gods glory. Its brilliance was like a priceless jewel, like jasper that was as clear as crystal.
local: Wɛ paarɩ-zulǝ yam ma pa tɩʋ kʋm nyɩɩnɩ lanyɩranɩ, nɩ kandwɛ-ŋʋnɩ dɩlʋ yɩrɩ na yɩ Zasɩpɩ yɩ dɩ nyɩɩnɩ pɩlɩ pɩlɩ nɩ niu na nyɩɩnɩ te tɩn.

eng: It had a great high wall with twelve gates. By the gates were twelve angels, and on the gates were written the names of the twelve tribes of Israels sons.
local: Kǝbri-kamunu kʋlʋ na dwara tɩn ma lɔ kʋ kaagɩ tɩʋ kʋm. Kǝbrǝ kam maa jɩgɩ niǝ fugǝ-yale. Wɛ malɛsɩ fugǝ-sɩle maa zɩgɩ niǝ yam kʋntʋ dɩdʋa dɩdʋa nɩ. Yisɩrayɛlɩ tiinǝ dwi fugǝ-bɩle kʋm yɩra ma pʋpʋnɩ niǝ yam baŋa nɩ.

eng: There were three gates on the east, three gates on the north, three gates on the south, and three gates on the west.
local: Tɩʋ kʋm sɛ sɩm maama jɩgɩ niǝ yatɔ yatɔ mʋ. Yatɔ yɔɔrɩ wa-puli seeni. Yatɔ maa wʋ wa-puli jagwiǝ seeni. Yatɔ maa wʋ wa-puli jazɩm seeni. Yatɔ maa daarɩ ya wʋ wa-zʋʋrɩ seeni.

eng: The city wall had twelve foundations, and on them were the twelve names of the Lambs twelve apostles.
local: Tɩʋ kʋm kǝbrǝ kam kuri ma cwi kandwa-pulwaarʋ fugǝ-tɩle baŋa nɩ. Pǝlbu wʋm tɩntʋŋna fugǝ-bale bam yɩra ma pʋpʋnɩ pulwaarʋ tɩm kʋntʋ yɩra nɩ.

eng: The angel who spoke to me had a gold measuring rod with which to measure the city, its gates, and its wall.
local: Malɛka kalʋ na ŋɔɔnɩ dɩ amʋ tɩn maa ze sǝbu-sɩŋa nacǝgǝ sɩ ka ma maŋɩ tɩʋ kʋm na maɩ te tɩn, dɩ kʋ niǝ yam dɩ kʋ kǝbrǝ kam dɩ na maɩ te tɩn.

eng: Now the city was laid out as a square. Its length was the same as its width. He measured the city with the rod, and it was fifteen hundred miles. Its length and width and height were equal.
local: Tɩʋ kʋm sɛ sɩna sɩm maama mara sɩ mara mʋ. Malɛka kam ma kwe ka nacǝgǝ kam ka ma maŋɩ tɩʋ kʋm. Kʋ saŋa maama dwarɩm maa yɩ kilomɛtra mʋrr-tɩle dɩ biǝ yale . Kʋ sɛ sɩm dɩ kʋ wɛyuu maama dwarɩm maɩ daanɩ mʋ.

eng: He also measured the thickness of its wall. It was two hundred sixteen feet thick, as a person—or rather, an angel—measures things.
local: Ka ma daarɩ ka ma ka jɩŋa ka maŋɩ tɩʋ kʋm kǝbrǝ kam. Ka yɩ kantɩa kuni bi dɩ fiinna-bɩna mʋ . Malɛka kam na maŋɩ te tɩn yɩ bɩdwɩ mʋ dɩ nabiinu na maŋɩ kantɩa te tɩn.

eng: The wall was built of jasper, and the city was pure gold, like pure glass.
local: Ba lɔgɩ kǝbrǝ kam dɩ kandwa-ŋʋna yalʋ yɩrɩ na yɩ Zasɩpɩ tɩn mʋ. Kʋ daarɩ ba lɔgɩ tɩʋ kʋm tɩtɩ dɩ sǝbu-sɩŋa kalʋ na tiini ka lana fasɩ nɩ niu na nyɩɩnɩ te tɩn mʋ.

eng: The city walls foundations were decorated with every kind of jewel. The first foundation was jasper, the second was sapphire, the third was chalcedony, and the fourth was emerald.
local: Kandwa-pulwaarʋ tɩlʋ tɩʋ kʋm kǝbrǝ kam na cwi tɩ baŋa nɩ tɩn, ba mɛ kandwa-ŋʋna dwi maama mʋ ba ma pʋpʋrɩ tɩ yɩra. Pulɔrɔ maama jɩgɩ kʋ kandwɛ-nyɩnʋ mʋ, yɩ ya yɩra mʋ tɩntʋ: . Zasɩpɩ . Safiirɩ . Kalɩsɩdʋanɩ . Emɛrɔdɩ . Sardonisi . Sardʋanɩ . Krisolidi . Bɛrili . Topazɩ . Krisopasɩ . Yasintɩ . Amɛtisi.

eng: The twelve gates were twelve pearls; each one of the gates was made from a single pearl. And the citys main street was pure gold, as transparent as glass.
local: Kʋ daarɩ ba mɛ kandwa-ŋʋna yalʋ yɩrɩ na yɩ pɛɛrɩlɩ tɩn mʋ ba kɩ tɩʋ kʋm niǝ fugǝ-yale yam bwǝǝru tɩm. Kʋ bwǝǝru tɩm maama yɩ pɛɛrɩlɩ dɩdʋa dɩdʋa mʋ ba mɛ ba kɩ. Tɩʋ kʋm pɩmpalɩ dɩm maa yɩ sǝbu-sɩŋa kalʋ na tiini ka lana nɩ niu na nyɩɩnɩ te tɩn.

eng: I didnt see a temple in the city, because its temple is the Lord God Almighty and the Lamb.
local: Amʋ ma na nɩ Wɛ-digǝ tǝri tɩʋ kʋm wʋnɩ, bɛŋwaanɩ Dam-fɔrɔ Tu Baŋa-Wɛ tɩtɩ dɩ Pǝlbu wʋm mʋ wʋra yɩ nɔɔna zuli-ba.

eng: The city doesnt need the sun or the moon to shine on it, because Gods glory is its light, and its lamp is the Lamb.
local: Ba daa ba lagɩ sɩ wɩa dɩ cana daa ta zǝŋi tɩʋ kʋm baŋa nɩ, Wɛ paarɩ-zulǝ yam paɩ tɩʋ kʋm jɩgɩ pooni, yɩ Pǝlbu wʋm dɩ paɩ kʋ jɩgɩ pooni.

eng: The nations will walk by its light, and the kings of the earth will bring their glory into it.
local: Lʋgʋ baŋa dwi tiinǝ maama wʋ́ taa ŋwɩ pooni dɩm kʋntʋ wʋnɩ. Lʋgʋ baŋa pwa bam ma wʋ́ ja ba jɩjɩgɩrʋ ba ba ba kɩ tɩʋ kʋm wʋnɩ.

eng: Its gates will never be shut by day, and there will be no night there.
local: Dɛ maama ba ma daa bá pɩ tɩʋ kʋm niǝ yam, bɛŋwaanɩ tɩga daa bá yi jǝgǝ kam kʋntʋ nɩ.

eng: They will bring the glory and honor of the nations into it.
local: Ba ma wʋ́ kwe lʋgʋ baŋa dwi tiinǝ zulǝ dɩ ba jɩjɩgɩrʋ maama ba ja ba ba kɩ da.

eng: Nothing unclean will ever enter it, nor anyone who does what is vile and deceitful, but only those who are registered in the Lambs scroll of life.
local: Kʋ daarɩ kʋlʋ maama na jɩgɩ digiru tɩn bá zʋ kʋ wʋ. Nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ maama na kɩ wo-zɔɔna tɩn dɩ wʋlʋ maama na yɩ vwa-fɔrʋ tɩn bá zʋ kʋ wʋ. Balʋ yɩra na pʋpʋnɩ ya tiŋi Pǝlbu wʋm ŋwɩa tɔnɔ kʋm wʋnɩ tɩn yɩranɩ má mʋ wʋ́ zʋ tɩʋ kʋm kʋntʋ wʋ.

eng: Then the angel showed me the river of life-giving water, shining like crystal, flowing from the throne of God and the Lamb.
local: Malɛka kam ma daarɩ ka brɩ-nɩ bu-tʋla kalʋ na na paɩ ŋwɩa tɩn. Na bam tiini ba lana yɩ ba nyɩɩnɩ nɩ niu te. Bu-tʋla kam na bam maa burǝ ba nuŋi Wɛ dɩ Pǝlbu wʋm paarɩ jangɔŋɔ kʋm tee nɩ ba duri tɩʋ kʋm tɩtarɩ nɩ.

eng: through the middle of the citys main street. On each side of the river is the tree of life, which produces twelve crops of fruit, bearing its fruit each month. The trees leaves are for the healing of the nations.
local: Tiu kʋlʋ biǝ na paɩ ŋwɩa tɩn maa zɩgɩ bu-tʋla kam jazɩm dɩ jagwiǝ nɩ. Tiu kʋm kʋntʋ maa yǝni kʋ lǝri biǝ kuni fugǝ-bɩle bɩm maama wʋnɩ. Cana maama wʋnɩ kʋ lǝri biǝ mʋ. Kʋ vɔɔrʋ tɩm ma maɩ kʋ sooni lʋgʋ baŋa dwi tiinǝ yɩ ba naɩ yazurǝ.

eng: There will no longer be any curse. The throne of God and the Lamb will be in it, and his servants will worship him.
local: Woŋo kʋlʋ maama Wɛ na culi tɩn daa tǝri tɩʋ kʋm kʋntʋ wʋnɩ. Wɛ dɩ Pǝlbu wʋm paarɩ jangɔŋɔ kʋm mʋ wʋ́ ta wʋ tɩʋ kʋm wʋnɩ, yɩ DƖ tɩntʋŋna bam zuli-DƖ.

eng: They will see his face, and his name will be on their foreheads.
local: Baá ta naɩ Wɛ yibiyǝ, yɩ DƖ yɩrɩ dɩm wʋ́ pʋpʋnɩ ba trǝ nɩ.

eng: Night will be no more. They wont need the light of a lamp or the light of the sun, for the Lord God will shine on them, and they will rule forever and always.
local: Tɩga daa bá yi tɩʋ kʋm nɩ. Ba bá ta lagɩ kanɩɩ sɩ sɩ taa zǝŋi pooni, naa wɩa dɩ. Bɛŋwaanɩ Yuutu Baŋa-Wɛ tɩtɩ wʋ́ ta yɩ pooni DƖ pa-ba. Baá ta tɔgɩ ba di paarɩ sɩ kʋ taa ve maŋa kalʋ na ba ti tɩn.

eng: Then he said to me, These words are trustworthy and true. The Lord, the God of the spirits of the prophets, sent his angel to show his servants what must soon take place.
local: Malɛka kam daa ma ta dɩ amʋ ka wɩ: «Taanɩ dɩntʋ maama yɩ cɩga mʋ, dɩ maŋɩ sɩ nɔɔna sɛ-dɩ. Yuutu Baŋa-Wɛ mʋ yɩ dɩlʋ na zǝni DƖ nijoŋnǝ bam dɩ DƖ Joro kʋm yɩ ba tɔɔlɩ DƖ kwǝrǝ kam tɩn. Dɩntʋ mʋ tʋŋɩ DƖ malɛka sɩ ka ba ka brɩ DƖ nɔɔna bam, sɩ ba lwarɩ kʋlʋ na lagɩ kʋ kɩ lele tɩn.».

eng: Look! Im coming soon. Favored is the one who keeps the words of the prophecy contained in this scroll.
local: Cǝgi-na, Zezi tagɩ o wɩ: «Amʋ ma bɩɩnɩ lele. Balʋ na sɛ Wɛ kwǝrǝ kalʋ na pʋpʋnɩ tɔnɔ kʋntʋ wʋnɩ tɩn jɩgɩ yu-yoŋo.».

eng: I, John, am the one who heard and saw these things. When I heard and saw them, I fell down to worship at the feet of the angel who had shown them to me.
local: Amʋ Zan mʋ sɩɩnɩ a ni wǝǝnu tɩm kʋntʋ, yɩ a kwǝri a na-tɩ. Kʋ maama na tu kʋ ba kʋ ti tɩn, a laan ma kuni doonǝ malɛka kalʋ na brɩ-nɩ wǝǝnu tɩm kʋntʋ tɩn yigǝ nɩ sɩ a zuli-ka.

eng: But he said to me, Dont do that! Im a servant just like you and your brothers and sisters, the prophets, and those who keep the words of this scroll. Worship God.
local: Ka ma ta dɩ amʋ ka wɩ: «Yɩ kɩ kʋntʋ. Amʋ yɩ Wɛ tɩntʋŋnʋ mʋ, nɩ nmʋ dɩ n ko-biǝ balʋ na tɔɔlɩ Wɛ kwǝrǝ kam tɩn dɩ balʋ maama na sɛ kʋlʋ na pʋpʋnɩ tɔnɔ kʋntʋ wʋnɩ tɩn dɩ na yɩ te tɩn. N maŋɩ sɩ n zuli Wɛ mʋ.».

eng: Then he said to me, Dont seal up the words of the prophecy contained in this scroll, because the time is near.
local: Ka daa ta ma ta dɩ amʋ ka wɩ: «Yɩ zaŋɩ n sǝgi Wɛ kwǝrǝ kalʋ na pʋpʋnɩ tɔnɔ kʋntʋ wʋnɩ tɩn, pa nɔɔna lwarɩ-ka. Bɛŋwaanɩ maŋa yiǝ sɩ wǝǝnu tɩm kʋntʋ sɩɩnɩ tɩ kɩ.

eng: Let those who do wrong keep doing what is wrong. Let the filthy still be filthy. Let those who are righteous keep doing what is right. Let those who are holy still be holy.
local: Kʋntʋ, wʋlʋ maama na kɩ balɔrɔ tɩn, o dɩ nan ve yigǝ dɩ o tɩtʋŋ-balwaarʋ. Wʋlʋ maama na kɩ wo-digiru tɩn, o dɩ nan ve yigǝ dɩ o wo-digiru kǝm. Kʋ daarɩ wʋlʋ na sɛ o kɩ lanyɩranɩ tɩn, o tiini o kwaanɩ o taa kɩ lanyɩranɩ. Wʋlʋ na yɩ Wɛ nɔɔnʋ tɩn, o tiini o kwaanɩ sɩ o taa kɩ Wɛ wʋbʋŋa na lagɩ te tɩn mʋ.».

eng: Look! Im coming soon. My reward is with me, to repay all people as their actions deserve.
local: Cǝgi-na, Zezi tagɩ o wɩ: «A ma bɩɩnɩ lele. A na tuǝ, a laan wʋ́ pa nɔɔnʋ maama ŋwɩɩrʋ tɩlʋ na maŋɩ dɩ o tɩtʋŋa tɩn.

eng: I am the alpha and the omega, the first and the last, the beginning and the end.
local: Amʋ mʋ yɩ pulim dɩ gurim. Amʋ ta mʋ yɩ dayigǝ tu dɩ kwaga tu, amʋ mʋ pulǝ yɩ a gurǝ.».

eng: Favored are those who wash their robes so that they may have the right of access to the tree of life and may enter the city by the gates.
local: Balʋ na zarɩ ba gwaarʋ ba pa tɩ pɩɩrɩ parɩ parɩ tɩn jɩgɩ yu-yoŋo. Bantʋ jɩgɩ cwǝŋǝ sɩ ba di tiu kʋlʋ biǝ na paɩ ŋwɩa tɩn, yɩ ba kwǝri ba jɩgɩ cwǝŋǝ sɩ ba zʋ Wɛ tɩtɩ tɩʋ kʋm wʋ.

eng: Outside are the dogs, the drug users and spell-casters, those who commit sexual immorality, the murderers, the idolaters, and all who love and practice deception.
local: Kʋ daarɩ, balʋ na wʋ́ maŋɩ tɩʋ kʋm cicwǝŋǝ nɩ tɩn mʋ yɩ balʋ na kɩ wo-zɔɔna dɩ liri kǝrǝ, kʋ wǝli dɩ balʋ na boori tɩn, dɩ balʋ na yɩ nɔn-gʋra tɩn, dɩ balʋ na kaanɩ jwǝnǝ tɩn, kʋ wǝli dɩ balʋ na soe vwa-fɔm yɩ ba kɩ vwan kikiǝ tɩn.

eng: I, Jesus, have sent my angel to bear witness to all of you about these things for the churches. Im the root and descendant of David, the bright morning star.
local: Zezi tagɩ o wɩ: «Amʋ mʋ tʋŋɩ a malɛka sɩ ka ba ka brɩ abam balʋ na yɩ amʋ kɔgɔ kʋm nɔɔna tɩn wǝǝnu tɩntʋ maama. Amʋ yɩ wʋlʋ kuri na nuŋi Pɛ Davidi dwi dɩm wʋnɩ tɩn. Amʋ yɩ tɩtɩɩtɩ calɩcʋa kalʋ yɩrɩ na yɩ naŋɔgɔ yɩ ka nyɩɩnɩ tɩn.».

eng: The Spirit and the bride say, Come! Let the one who hears say, Come! And let the one who is thirsty come! Let the one who wishes receive life-giving water as a gift.
local: Wɛ Joro kʋm dɩ Zezi nɔn-kɔgɔ kʋm na nyɩ nɩ o ka-dʋʋrʋ te tɩn ma ta ba wɩ: «Nan ba.» Wʋlʋ maama na ni kwǝrǝ kantʋ tɩn, sɩ o dɩ ta nɩ: «Nan ba.» Na-nyɔm na jɩgɩ wʋlʋ maama tɩn, sɩ o ba. Wʋlʋ maama na lagɩ sɩ o nyɔ na balʋ na paɩ ŋwɩa tɩn, sɩ o ba o joŋi o nyɔ zaanɩ.

eng: Now I bear witness to everyone who hears the words of the prophecy contained in this scroll: If anyone adds to them, God will add to that person the plagues that are written in this scroll.
local: Amʋ Zan nan lagɩ a kaanɩ balʋ maama na cǝgi wǝǝnu tɩlʋ na pʋpʋnɩ tɔnɔ kʋntʋ wʋnɩ yɩ tɩ yɩ Wɛ kwǝrǝ tɩn. Nɔɔnʋ na wǝli woŋo tɔnɔ kʋntʋ taanɩ dɩm wʋnɩ, Wɛ wʋ́ pa o na yaara yalʋ tɔnɔ kʋm na brɩ tɩn.

eng: If anyone takes away from the words of this scroll of prophecy, God will take away that persons share in the tree of life and the holy city, which are described in this scroll.
local: Nɔɔnʋ wʋlʋ nan na lɩ woŋo tɔnɔ kʋntʋ wʋnɩ dɩ o yagɩ tɩn, Wɛ wʋ́ lɩ o dɩ yigǝ DƖ yagɩ, sɩ o yɩ da o di tiu kʋlʋ biǝ na paɩ ŋwɩa tɩn naa o tɔgɩ o zʋ Wɛ tɩtɩ tɩʋ kʋm wʋ nɩ tɔnɔ kʋntʋ na brɩ te tɩn.

eng: The one who bears witness to these things says, Yes, Im coming soon. Amen. Come, Lord Jesus!.
local: Wʋlʋ na zɩgɩ wǝǝnu tɩm kʋntʋ cɩga kam kwaga nɩ tɩn mʋ tɛ o wɩ: «Kʋ yɩ cɩga mʋ. A ma bɩɩnɩ lele.» Amina. Dɩ́ Yuutu Zezi, nan ba.

eng: The grace of the Lord Jesus be with all.
local: Dɩbam Yuutu Zezi yu-yoŋo kʋm wʋ́ ta wʋ abam maama tee nɩ.
